Formed in the midst of the emerging worldwide Pentecostal revival, the Assemblies of God quickly took root in other countries and formed indigenous national organizations. The Assemblies of God (USA) is a constituent member of the World Assemblies of God Fellowship – one of the largest Pentecostal fellowships in the world.

Name: Student Life
Description:
For more than 20 years, Student Life Camphas been a creative, fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment committed to serving the Church in her mission of making disciples.  Student Life Camp has hosted over one million students and adults at our summer events.  We are committed to continue our work of Helping people know Christ through His Word at camp.

In 2012, Student Life Camp joined the ministry of LifeWay Christian Resources of the Southern Baptist Convention. Through our partnership with LifeWay, we have the ability to share the gospel of Christ even further. We are excited for the opportunity to join this global ministry and to see all that is in store for Student Life Camp in the future.

Name: Islamic Reminders Network
Description:
About IR
THE STORY

The story of Islamic Reminder (IR) began in 2017 with the simplest of visions: How to make Muslims connect with Quran and Sunnah and fall in love with their faith using the latest technology available which they use on a daily basis by giving them daily reminders of this great religion as Allah (swt) says in Quran.


وَذَكِّرۡ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ 

And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.

Quran 51:55
The aim was to showcase and promote the beauty of Islam to a truly universal audience

For people to be inspired by sacred text and by real life experiences of people whose lives were changed forever due to the sheer inspiration our beautiful faith offers. We wanted to make inspiration the footprint for our vision, and so the IR journey started, like many other success stories with humble beginnings.

We started with one person and a simple idea of that time was 3rd  November 2017.


INSPIRING THOUSANDS

Our mission statement is to inspire. We inspire our members with daily drops of inspirational and educational knowledge. We have been Inspired by some of the world’s leading scholars such as Dr. Zakir Naik, Mufti Ismail Menk, Sheikh Ahmed Deedat, Ustadh Nouman Ali Khan, Sheikh Imran Hosien, Omar Sulemain, Yasmin Mogahed and many more.

We are based in Malaysia.

Peace and Blessing from the team of Islamic Reminders Network

Name: Pontifical North American College
Description: Since 1859, the Pontifical North American College has served as 'America's seminary in Rome.'  Roman Catholic dioceses send seminarians and student priests to study in one of our three main departments: The Seminary, the Casa Santa Maria (graduate studies), or the Institute for Continuing Theological Education.

Name: Salem Church Products
Description:
Equipping pastors and church leaders to minister and spread the Gospel.

Salem Church Products' websites are leaders in offering effective and professional resources for churches & ministries in the areas of media, preaching & teaching, youth ministry, children’s ministry, and employment. Explore our sites to see how we can help enhance & grow your ministry.

Name: Archdiocese of St. Louis
Description: As Catholics in the Archdiocese of St. Louis, in communion with the Bishop of Rome, we are called by our Lord Jesus Christ to be His Church and live His Gospel. With joy, we strive to fulfill our Baptismal calling by prayer and worship, teaching and sharing our faith, serving others, and fostering unity in diversity. Guided by the Holy Spirit, we commit ourselves to the responsible stewardship of all God's gifts.

Name: Haggai International
Description:
Haggai International is a global nonprofit that identifies and equips strategically positioned, influential international Christian leaders to more deeply understand God’s calling for their lives and craft an inspired vision that, through their distinct cultural and vocational access and influence, allows them to more powerfully impact lives through the Gospel in their communities and countries.
 
OUR VISION:
Every nation redeemed and transformed through the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

OUR MISSION:
To equip and inspire strategically positioned leaders to more effectively demonstrate and present the Gospel of Jesus Christ and to prepare others to do the same.

Name: Igreja Deus é Amor
Description:
Fundada em 1962 pelo Missionário David Miranda, hoje já atingiu a marca de mais de 1.000.000 de membros, que frequentam regularmente os 15 mil templos espalhados pelo Brasil e mais 80 países.
Sua sede, está situada na Av. do Estado, 4568, na cidade de São Paulo, SP, com capacidade para mais de 60.000 pessoas. É uma obra gigantesca que já está marcada na história do evangelho mundial, pelo impacto gerado em milhares de vidas.

Name: Roman Catholic Church
Description: Church founded by Jesus Christ. All are welcome. Humility, sacrifice, love, willingness to give one's life a plus.

Name: Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of America
Description:
The mission of the Archdiocese is to proclaim the Gospel of Christ, to teach and spread the Orthodox Christian faith, to energize, cultivate, and guide the life of the Church in the United States of America according to the Orthodox Christian faith and tradition.

The Greek Orthodox Church in America considers that it sanctifies the faithful through divine worship, especially the Holy Eucharist and other sacraments, building the spiritual and ethical life of the faithful in accordance with the Holy Scriptures, Sacred Tradition, the doctrines and canons of the Ecumenical and local Councils, the canons of the Holy Apostles and the Fathers of the Church and of all other Councils recognized by the Orthodox Church.

The Archdiocese states that it serves as a beacon, carrier, and witness of the message of Christ to all persons who live in the United States of America, through divine worship, preaching, teaching, and living of the Orthodox Christian faith.[2]

Name: Union for Reform Judaism
Description:
The Union for Reform Judaism (URJ) builds community at every level, from the way we collaborate with congregations, organizations, & individuals to how we make connections across North America to advance contemporary & inclusive Jewish life. 

Providing vision & voice to transform the way people connect to Judaism, we help congregations stay relevant & innovative, motivate more young Jews to embrace Jewish living, agitate for a more progressive society, & foster meaningful connections to Israel.

Founded in 1873, the URJ has grown into the largest & most diverse movement in North American Jewish life, with nearly 900 member congregations & work that inspires, connects & educates millions of people. Our legacy, reach, leadership, & vision mean that we can unite thousands of years of tradition with a modern, evolving Judaism to strengthen Jewish communities today & for future generations.

...and we're always looking for talented staff: https://urj.org/careers

Name: Christ's Church of the Valley
Description:
From the message, to the music, to the community; a weekend at CCV is an experience you don't want to miss. CCV is about introducing people to the adventure that a life with Christ can bring, and then challenging and encouraging them to live a life of significance. Whether you have never been to church, you’ve been hundreds of times, or you are returning from a long absence, we invite you to get acquainted with CCV and, more importantly, to get connected with Christ.

We’re a church that values people for who they are, and how they might uniquely serve the Kingdom. We set the bar high on delivery, conduct, and character, but it’s matched by our commitment to grow our people as they share faith beyond our walls. No amount of smart words might ever do this justice, but take a peek inside CCV and you’ll understand these words ring true.

For campus locations, service times, and more info, visit ccv.church

Name: Crossroads Church (Cincinnati, OH)
Description:
We started this church for our friends who have given up on church but not on God.

Crossroads is for anyone who wants to seek God—from those exploring whether or not God even exists, to committed Christ-followers. We present biblical truths and show how they apply to our everyday lives. And we have a lot of fun while doing it.

View sites and locations at www.crossroads.net/locations.

Name: Conférence des évêques de France
Description:
Le rôle de la Conférence des évêques de France

Le contexte historique, institutionnel, culturel, social et politique est en partie commun à l'ensemble des diocèses français. C'est pourquoi les évêques ont besoin de cet organisme qui, au niveau national, leur permet d'échanger entre eux sur les questions touchant la proposition de la foi dans les diocèses français. Cet organisme leur permet également de réfléchir ensemble sur des sujets sociétaux, sociaux, éthiques, etc.

La Conférence épiscopale répond donc d'abord à un objectif de collégialité au service de l'Église catholique en France et de la société française. Elle a également un rôle de représentation auprès des pouvoirs publics et des médias.

Cependant, son autorité est une « autorité de service », autrement dit la Conférence épiscopale n'est pas un échelon intermédiaire entre le pape et les évêques : l'entière compétence de chaque évêque dans son diocèse demeure sauve.

Maison de la Conférence des évêques de France 
58 avenue de Breteuil
75007 Paris

Name: 31Ministry
Description: 31 Ministry was founded to empower women who have endured poverty, divorce, domestic violence, trauma, or narcissistic abuse. Our mission is to equip them with the strength and faith to rise above their past, break free from their “Egypt,” and step boldly into the purpose and freedom God has destined for them.

Name: Transformation Church
Description: Join us every Sunday for our weekend experience at 10 AM CST or watch service live online at http://transformus.churchonline.org/

Name: Westminster Abbey
Description:
Westminster Abbey is one of the world's great churches. It has been the setting for every coronation since that of William the Conqueror in 1066 and for countless other great events in the life of the nation. Thirty kings and queens lie buried within the Abbey’s walls, and many great men and women from our history are commemorated here, from statesmen and soldiers to scientists, writers and artists.

Every year more than a million visitors from around the world come to explore this wonderful 750-year-old building. Thousands more come to worship at the daily services which are at the heart of life at the Abbey. 

The Abbey is an exciting, fascinating place to work. Our 600 highly-committed staff and volunteers are dedicated to caring for the Abbey and for all who visit and worship here. Our community is made up of clergy, musicians, vergers, conservators, stonemasons, teachers, visitor welcome and security staff, and many more besides.

The Abbey is also home to the thriving Westminster Abbey Institute which aims to renew faith in public life, and to the Abbey's Foundation which raises funds to protect the Abbey, its collections and musical heritage for today and for future generations. 

Find out more about joining us at Westminster Abbey: www.westminster-abbey.org/about-the-abbey/jobs-volunteering/

Name: First Baptist Church
Description: First Baptist Church, Aberdeen is a community of believers whose worship and service is dedicated to the Lord Jesus Christ. We have numerous opportunities for worship, service and discipleship.

Name: Watermark Community Church
Description: Watermark is a community of faithful, creative, entrepreneurial, authentic Christ-followers who are united in one purpose: to be and make disciples of Jesus. Our Staff Team serves, equips, and deploys the saints to live on-mission for the glory of our King.

Name: Crown Financial Ministries
Description: We help individuals understand God’s unique design and plan for their personal finances, career and business management decisions. Our biblically-based teachings and principles inspire our constituents to faithfully apply their gifts and talents — transforming both their lives and the world around them. Join us and discover what it means to Do Well.

Name: The Methodist Church
Description:
The calling of the Methodist Church is to respond to the gospel of God's love in Christ and to live out its discipleship in worship and mission.

Worship: The Church exists to increase awareness of God’s presence and to celebrate God’s love.

Learning and Caring: The Church exists to help people to grow and learn as Christians, through mutual support and care.

Service: The Church exists to be a good neighbour to people in need and to challenge injustice.

Evangelism: The Church exists to make more followers of Jesus Christ

Name: La Salle College High School
Description: La Salle College High School, a Catholic, independent, college preparatory school for young men of varied backgrounds, is conducted in the tradition of St. John Baptist de La Salle.  Through a broad and balanced, human and Christian education, La Salle College High School guides each student in the development of his unique God-given talents and fosters a commitment to academic excellence, service, and leadership.

Name: Jamia Tur Rasheed Karachi
Description:
Jamia Tur Rasheed, Karachi is an Institute in Karachi, Pakistan. It is accredited degree awarding institute by Ministry of Federal Education and Professional Training and the Higher Education Commission.

Email: info@jtr.edu.pk

Name: Church of the Incarnation
Description:
Since 1878, the Episcopal Church of the Incarnation has been worshipping God in the Great Tradition of Christ's Church, and we see God's Spirit at work in our midst to this day. Our desire is to grow in Christ together, to serve those in need, and to raise up godly leaders in the context of a rooted, vibrant, faith-filled community.

Wherever you are in your spiritual journey, we invite you to take your next step with us.

Name: Evangelical Missionary Church of Canada (EMCC)
Description:
Following Jesus together.

The Evangelical Missionary Church of Canada (EMCC) is a family of 150+ churches across Canada organized to fulfill the Great Commandment and the Great Commission of our Lord Jesus Christ. The EMCC maintains offices in Kitchener, Ontario and Calgary, Alberta.

Our Vision
Seeking God passionately for dramatically increasing numbers of Jesus followers, led by Christ-inspired leaders. 

Our National Team
The EMCC National Team coaches, catalyzes, resources, and networks Great Commission EMCC congregations, leaders and followers of Jesus.

Name: Church of God of Prophecy
Description: Website for the head office in Eastern Canada

Name: Auburn Community Church
Description: Church is a movement, not a meeting. Church is people, not a place. We want to be a church that breaks down walls between where people are and where Jesus is. We want to be a church that knocks down any and every boundary that might hinder people from experiencing the abundant life God has for them. We will not stop one inch short of the life Jesus died for us to live. We will be a church without walls.

Name: BeEzrat HaShem Inc.
Description:
Founded in 2016 by Rabbi Yaron Reuven and Rabbi Efraim Kachlon, BeEzrat HaShem Inc. has established itself as a leading Jewish educational and humanitarian organization. Our mission is to address the world's spiritual and moral challenges through the ethical teachings of the Torah, while simultaneously providing food and financial aid to impoverished Jews in Israel. We are committed to helping Jews, converts, and Noahides globally, meeting them at their individual levels of understanding with honesty and deep passion for Torah teachings. This unique combination of spiritual guidance and humanitarian aid has enabled us to successfully bring the Divine Light of Torah to seekers worldwide.
Within a decade, our organization's growth and impact are demonstrated through
the following achievements:

Educational Outreach:
Produced and distributed +15,000 educational lectures across 23 YouTube channels in 15 languages

Created 500+ Torah-based films

Published and distributed 36 books and over 280,000 copies free of charge

Distributed over 2 million educational materials through CDs, USBs, and promotional cards

Technological Innovation:
Recently launched AI RABBI (www.AIRabbi.org), a revolutionary application that extends our educational reach

Developing multiple additional applications to enhance our global outreach

Maintaining an active technology development pipeline for future growth

Financial Stability:
Maintain consistent annual donations of approximately $2,000,000

Support from a diverse donor base spanning six continents

Strong track record of efficient fund deployment for both educational and humanitarian initiatives

Positioned for substantial growth through technological innovations and expanding digital presence

Our organization's remarkable growth and impact since 2016 demonstrates our operational excellence and financial stability. We continue to innovate and adapt to modern technologies, as evidenced by see more https://www.beezrathashem.org/about-us

Name: The Ark Church
Description:
The Ark Church was founded June 2, 1996 by three couples who had developed strong friendships while attending Lakewood Church in Houston, Texas.  These couples also shared a dream of having a church in Montgomery County where everyone was welcome and had a chance to connect with God in a real and meaningful way.

The atmosphere of The Ark is warm, genuine, and relaxed. The diversity of people represents a true picture of Montgomery County and there is a collective sense of the reality of God and His love.

At The Ark, children and youth are a key focus, the senior adults are celebrated, and people from all walks and backgrounds are treated to a message of hope, love, and the goodness of God. Each week hundreds of people volunteer their time to be involved in the various ministries and outreaches.  The prevailing mindset is that if we are going to “do church” together we might as well have a good time doing it!

At The Ark there are thousands of us living out a dream of “Connecting people to Christ and equipping them for growth and ministry.”  We invite you to come be a part. Looking forward to seeing you this Sunday!

Name: Bistum Essen
Description:
Über 2,5 Millionen Menschen leben im 1958 gegründeten Bistum Essen, 739.000 von ihnen sind katholisch. Es ist das flächenmäßig kleinste Bistum Deutschlands und wird aufgrund seiner Lage zwischen Rhein und Lenne umgangssprachlich als „Ruhrbistum“ bezeichnet. Rund 30.000 Menschen engagieren sich hier in kirchlichen Einrichtungen, Verbänden und Initiativen.

Die Stadt Essen mit dem Essener Münster beheimatet den Bischofssitz sowie das Bischöfliche Generalvikariat als zentrale Verwaltung dieser Region, die von einer eigenen Urbanität geprägt ist. Unter der Leitung des Generalvikars, dem Stellvertreter des Bischofs, arbeiten hier 400 Mitarbeitende in den drei Hauptabteilungen „Personal und Verwaltung“, „Pastoral“ und „Finanzen“ sowie den Stabsabteilungen „Kommunikation“ und „Recht“.

Die meisten Einrichtungen des Generalvikariates befinden sich innerhalb der „Dominsel“ zwischen Burgplatz und Zwölfling in der Essener Innenstadt. Zugehörige Einrichtungen, wie die katholische Akademie DIE WOLFSBURG oder das Jugendhaus St. Altfrid, liegen in der Essener Umgebung sowie in Mülheim an der Ruhr.

Als kirchliche Verwaltungseinrichtung mit Aufsichts- und Servicefunktion, ist das Generalvikariat verantwortlich für 42 Pfarreien und 171 Gemeindenim Ruhrbistum. Jede Pfarrei stellt dabei als eigener Rechtsträger eine eigene kleine kirchliche Verwaltungseinheit dar, die die Kirche vor Ort gestaltet. Insgesamt setzen sich in unserem Bistum täglich rund 730 pastorale Mitarbeitende sowie 400 Verwaltungs- und Serviceangestellte im Generalvikariat für die Kirche vor Ort ein.

Name: World Challenge, Inc.
Description:
World Challenge, Inc. was founded by Reverend David Wilkerson in 1971 and served as a corporate umbrella for his worldwide crusades, ministers' conferences, book and tract publication, video production, street evangelism, literature distribution, church planting, drug and alcohol rehabilitation centers and many charitable outreaches. Today, World Challenge Inc. shares the message of the gospel through mission outreaches and literature distribution. Sermons from David Wilkerson and his son Gary are shared monthly through the Pulpit Series newsletter to hundreds of thousands of people. The numerous mission outreaches of World Challenge to the poor include orphanages, overseas widows’ fund, emergency/disaster relief, healthcare/clinics, community development and feeding centers. Gary Wilkerson became president of World Challenge in 2010 and moves forward with the same heart and vision as his father.

Vision Statement
The vision of World Challenge is to evangelize the lost; empower, equip and encourage Christians in their daily faith; and bring biblical solutions to poverty within reach of every poor community around the world.

Mission Statement
World Challenge is a nondenominational Christian organization committed to communicating the truths of Scripture and the person of Jesus Christ in an accurate, clear, and practical manner leading people to an understanding of God’s love and plan for their lives. With God’s provision and following biblical principles, World Poverty Solutions brings lasting change to the whole person and communities – mentally, physically, socially, financially and spiritually.

Name: Diocese of Oakland
Description:
At the time of its creation in 1962, there were an estimated 329,000 Catholics among the East Bay’s population of 1.3 million people. Within its 1,467 square miles, the current estimated population of Alameda and Contra Costa counties is over 2.7 million people with a Catholic population projected 590,000.

As of 2015, Serving the needs of the faithful, are 349 priests, 114 deacons and 481 religious brothers and sisters in 84 parishes, 16 pastoral centers and other diocesan offices. Including religious education programs, there are nearly 50,000 students under Catholic instruction in the Diocese at 46 elementary schools, nine high schools, two Catholic colleges and several schools of religious formation.

The Catholic Church throughout the diocese offers a range of service ministries assisting the elderly, the young, the poor, and the oppressed.  As such the Church is the largest provider of social services in the East Bay, delivering shelter, meals, counseling, education and other critical services free of charge to over 500,000 people of all faiths each year.

Name: Church of the Living God
Description:
We are a Missionary Baptist Church; the 7th of 7 churches founded by the late William Rush Plummer in the mid to late 1800s. Six of the churches are located in Memphis, Tennessee and the 7th is located in Palmdale California. 

The Palmdale location is largely a training and resource location. It publishes a local community newspaper, God's Gift of Grace, called 'Having Our Say...Community Newspaper'. 

This location also provides an accelerated program specifically designed for women seeking to embrace their calling as a Pastor, Evangelist, Missionary, Teacher or Disciple. The most recent program graduated on November 28, 2010. The program is currently open for enrollment. Men are welcome to join this program, however the Minister's in Training Program is designed specifically for men seeking to learn more about their duties and responsiblities in ministry prior to ordination. Men are taught within the church under the supervision of an ordained member of the Clergy.

This location provides Etiquette class for children ages 11-17 from a Christian perspective.

This location has launched a local Missionary Baptist Association as well in effort to fellowship with churches of like faith, to organize and promote an annual convention and retreats for the family an the congregations in Southern California. 

For more information, please logon to our websites at:  www.church-living-god.org and www.women-ministry.webs.com and www.missionarybaptistassociation.org

Name: Canary Wharf Multifaith Chaplaincy
Description: The Canary Wharf Multifaith Chaplaincy through their activities can help individuals and companies support and encourage colleagues as they contribute to a creative and healthy work environment. London is also one of the most multicultural cities in the world, and recent research has been described as a religious city. Increasingly religion is becoming a factor that needs to be considered within our corporate cultures. The Chaplains have a wealth of experience and expertise to provide faith advice, pastoral and spiritual care within our complex world and business environments, particularly to those with Canary Wharf.

Name: Verre Naasten
Description: Verre Naasten is de landelijke mission-organisatie van en voor de Nederlandse Gereformeerde Kerken. Wij geloven dat de verbinding tussen partner-kerken van over de hele wereld en support-kerken in Nederland de impact van het wereldwijde mission-werk versterkt, daar én hier! Onze missie: geloof delen wereldwijd!

Name: Projeto Renova & Inova
Description:
Renova & Inova

Mulheres Transformadas por Deus

A Renova & Inova é um grupo de mulheres cristãs dedicado a impactar e transformar a vida de mulheres em diferentes realidades e fases da vida — mães, donas de casa, empresárias, mulheres que trabalham fora, casadas, solteiras, entre outras — incluindo mulheres vítimas de todos os tipos de violência vivenciados na atualidade.

Diante de tantas realidades dolorosas, acreditamos que é possível pensar e construir um futuro melhor por meio da restauração emocional, espiritual e social, oferecendo acolhimento, apoio e esperança.

Essa transformação acontece a partir de um relacionamento genuíno com Deus, que cura feridas, fortalece a fé e renova a esperança. Nosso propósito é conduzir mulheres a uma vida renovada pela fé, fundamentada na Palavra de Deus e vivida com obediência, amor e sabedoria, para que possam reencontrar sua identidade, dignidade e propósito.

Name: Fraternité Chretienne Salomon
Description:
La FRATERNITÉ CHRÉTIENNE SALOMON est un Apostolat de la Communauté Mère du Divin Amour destiné aux personnalités politiques, chefs d’entreprises et hauts cadres. 
Elle a pour vision de faire éclore ces leaders selon les préceptes de DIEU. Ceci dans un cadre de formation spirituelle, d’écoute, de partage et de prière. 



NOS ACTIVITÉS

- Assemblés de Prières

Elles ont lieu les dimanches de 17 h 00 à 19 h 30 et les vendredis de 18 h 30 à 20 h 00. Au cours de ces assemblées, un enseignement est donné sur un thème précis. Les enseignements sont précédés et suivis d un temps de louange, d adoration et prières d intercession. Les prières de vendredi sont portées essentiellement sur le « combat spirituel ».

- Les Petits-déjeuners chrétiens

Ils ont lieu dans un grand hôtel de la place. Le programme se compose de louanges, prédications, enseignements, témoignages et prières d intercession autour d un petit déjeuner.

- Les Séminaires

Ils sont l'occasion d approfondir un thème. Ils ont lieu sur un ou plusieurs jours.

- Les retraites Spirituelles

La Fraternité Chrétienne Salomon offre l'opportunité aux décideurs de participer à des retraites individuelles ou de groupes.

- Les Conférences

Elles sont ouvertes au grand public et ont pour but de faire ressortir la vision chrétienne sur des sujets d actualités.

- Les Agapes

Rencontres fraternelles entre les membres de la FCS autour d un repas pour échanger. Pour renforcer les liens entre les membres.Abidjan

Name: Christian Educators
Description: A professional association of educators – supporting, connecting, and protecting Christians working in our schools.

Name: Trinity Evangelical Lutheran Church
Description: We are an ELCA congregation located in Long Lake Illinois. We have services on Sunday at 8 and 10:30 a.m. Our Sunday school is at 9:15 a.m. With adult study at the same time. We also operate Little Lambs Preschool and Kids Klub child care for after school care.

Name: Franciscan Sisters of Perpetual Adoration
Description: We are Catholic sisters who, together with our affiliates and prayer partners, are engaged in furthering the work of the Catholic Church and the Gospel. We work in the United States and internationally in varied ministries, creating innovative approaches to healing, teaching and praying.

Name: Evangelische Kirche im Rheinland
Description:
Verkündigung der frohen Botschaft, Glaube an Gott den Vater, seinen Sohn Jesus Christus und den Heiligen Geist, Bindung an die Bibel, Gottesdienst, Gebet sind die Grundlagen der Evangelischen Kirche im Rheinland (EKiR).
Weihnachten, Ostern und Pfingsten sind unsere wichtigsten kirchlichen Feste. Die rheinische Kirche, deren Fundament das Leben in mehr als 600 Kirchengemeinden ist, begleitet die Menschen in ihrem Leben, insbesondere mit Taufe, Konfirmation, Trauung und Bestattung.
Weil Glaube nicht ohne Verantwortung für die Gemeinschaft der Menschen denkbar ist, engagiert sich die rheinische Kirche darüber hinaus intensiv diakonisch und gesellschaftspolitisch. Zu ihren Handlungsfeldern gehören auch Seelsorge, Kirchenmusik und Bildung. Enge ökumenische Verbindungen sowohl in direkter Nachbarschaft wie auch mit Partnerkirchen in der ganzen Welt gehören zu ihrem Profil.
Die rheinische Kirche ist die zweitgrößte der 20 Gliedkirchen der Evangelischen Kirche in Deutschland (EKD). Die 627 Kirchengemeinden sind in 37 Kirchenkreisen miteinander verbunden (Stand zum 1.1.2023). Das Kirchengebiet erstreckt sich von Emmerich bis Saarbrücken und umfasst Teile der vier Bundesländer Nordrhein-Westfalen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Saarland und Hessen.

Mehr Informationen über die Evangelische Kirche im Rheinland gibt es auch unter www.ekir.de.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of London
Description: The Diocese of London stretches across nine counties in southwestern Ontario, from Windsor to Woodstock and from Goderich to Port Dover, with more than 110 parishes and Catholic communities serving 444,000 Catholics. More info is available at www.dol.ca.

Name: Memorial Baptist Church
Description: Memorial Baptist Church is located on Paris Road in Columbia, MO. We have Services on Sunday Morning and Wednesday evening.

Name: Meet The Need Ministries
Description:
Meet The Need connects churches, ministries, and individuals so they can work together to help those less fortunate. We are a 501(c)(3) Public Charity that spent the past 20 years developing technology and strategies formerly only available in the business world to enable churches and ministries to:

Provide their members and volunteers avenues for living out their faith by meeting the needs of struggling families in their communities in Jesus’ name.

Move churches beyond occasional outreach events, providing opportunities for members to meet day-to-day, recurring needs on THEIR schedule.

Bring churches and ministries within communities together through collective outreach efforts using a common, state-of-the-art platform.

Dispel the notion that churches are about “inflow” more than “outflow” by equipping them to impact their communities through loving acts of service.

Put Christians directly in touch with families in need, giving them chances to share not only their time and talents, but their faith as well.

Name: Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Boston
Description: The archdiocese of Boston represents the larger Catholic Church (aka, "The Mystical Body of Christ") for Boston and its surrounding towns.  There are 1,845,758 Catholics here, and 315,000 attend mass regularly.    St. Patrick is the patron saint and the Cathedral of the Holy Cross is the primary church.  The primary goals are to serve God by giving Him proper worship and leading souls to Heaven.

Name: Christian Activities and Events
Description:
This is considered to be a community outreach ministry that was established in 2010.

We join together for Christian Activities and Events.

We list all types of local Christian events in the hope of encouraging Christians to gather together.

"Iron sharpens iron" -Proverbs 27:17

Name: Bahtera Media Network
Description:
We believe that every ministry and movement in this world, should be done in purity and excellence. We are here to share the LORD's Gospel and The Good News of His, to the ends of the earth. To minister and change people's lives is to take courage and humility, in shepherding the souls. We know for sure that everyone deserves to experience the highest quality of their lives, in spirituality and character. 

So, how do we do that? We guide and we lead, through media --a media that brings healing, repentance and restoration.

Hence, here we are Bahtera Media Network.

Name: Order of Malta Western Association
Description:
The Order of Malta is one of the oldest continually existing organizations of Western civilization. A sovereign subject of international law, the Order of Malta maintains diplomatic relations with over 100 states and the European Union, and has permanent observer status at the United Nations. It is neutral, impartial and apolitical.

Founded in Jerusalem in the second half of the 11th century, the Order of Malta has a long and complex history of service to the vulnerable and the sick throughout the Mediterranean, as reflected by the past headquarter cities contained in its full name: Sovereign Military Hospitaller Order of Saint John of Jerusalem of Rhodes and of Malta. Since 1834, the Order of Malta’s government seat has been in Rome, where it was granted extraterritorial rights by the Italian Republic.

Today, the Order of Malta Western Association has over 850 Knights, Dames, Chaplains, and Provisional Members residing throughout the Western United States (AZ, CA, CO, HI, ID, OR, UT, WA). Please visit our website for more information on the Western Association.

Name: Caleb Dada Ministries
Description:
Caleb Dada Ministries (CDM) is an apostolic and prophetic ministry that has been commissioned by God with the mandate to take the presence of Jesus to the Nations.
We achieve this mandate of “Discipling Nations” in four ways which are:
-- Raising Sons of God
-- Raising Kingdom Financiers
-- Strengthening Saints
-- Voice of Direction and Wisdom

Join "The Kingdom Financier by CDM" on Telegram



https://t.me/CDMKFS

Name: Josh McDowell Ministry
Description: Josh McDowell Ministry delivers breakthrough moments and messages that lead to clarity, conviction, confidence and connection for people seeking meaning and purpose. Through a combination of live events, podcasts, print and digital resources, we seek to serve others until the whole world hears about Jesus.

Name: Fountain Of Liberty Embassy Church International
Description: We are a believing family. Fountain Of Liberty Embassy Church International Is Church That Is Center On Christ And His Teaching. We Are Founded And Built Upon The Foundation Of The Apostles And The Prophets, Jesus Christ Himself Being The Chief Corner stone.

Name: The Vine Church Limited
Description: The Vine is a vibrant international church based in the Wan Chai district of Hong Kong. We are both a local and international family, made up of people born and raised in Hong Kong and others who have moved here from other countries. Our pastors and leadership consider Hong Kong to be home and are committed to building the family of God and seeing His kingdom flourish in this amazing city and beyond.

Name: Reconciling Ministries Network
Description: Reconciling Ministries Network celebrates that LGBTQ+ persons are a good expression of God’s diverse creation and exists to advocate for the affirmation of all of God’s children in the Church and the world.

Name: Center for Spiritual Enlightenment
Description: The ministry of the Center for Spiritual Enlightenment is focused on the essential truth and harmony found in the world's religions, the necessity for a global ethical and spiritual awakening to bring about world peace, and the importance of individual participation toward this goal. Our vision is individual and planetary awakening to the One Truth known by many names.

Name: Trinity Christian Academy
Description: Trinity Christian Academy is a private Christian school in Willow Park, Texas. We were founded with a vision of helping each of our students fulfill God's purpose for his/her life and reaching maximum potential in a joint effort between school, student, family, and church.  Our mission is to develop excellence in education, character, and servant leadership through a Christ-centered, biblical perspective.

Name: YMCA of Hong Kong
Diocese of Allentown
Description:
We are a Roman Catholic family of faith, centered in the Holy Eucharist, faithful to the Church's teachings, bringing the Light of Christ to each other and to our community.

The Diocese of Allentown was formed on January 28, 1961, when Pope John XXIII signed a document separating the counties of Berks, Carbon, Lehigh, Northampton and Schuylkill from the Archdiocese of Philadelphia. The news became public February 15. The following April 11, Bishop Joseph McShea, then auxiliary bishop of Philadelphia, was installed as the first Bishop of Allentown by Archbishop Egidio Vagnozzi, Apostolic Delegate to the United States in the new Cathedral Church of Saint Catharine of Siena in Allentown.

Bishop Thomas Welsh succeeded Bishop McShea in 1983, followed by Bishop Edward Cullen in 1998 and Bishop John Barres in 2009. Like Bishop McShea, Bishops Welsh and Cullen were former Auxiliary Bishops of Philadelphia. Bishop Barres was a priest of the Diocese of Wilmington, DE, when he was appointed. He became the first priest ordained a Bishop in Allentown’s Cathedral of St. Catharine of Siena. Seven-and-a-half years later, he became the first Allentown Bishop to be transferred when Pope Francis appointed him the Fifth Bishop of the Diocese of Rockville Centre, NY.

As the Fifth Bishop of Allentown, Pope Francis, on June 27, 2017 appointed Monsignor Alfred A. Schlert. Bishop Schlert is the first priest ordained for the Diocese of Allentown to be appointed Bishop of the Diocese.  He was ordained a Bishop and installed as Bishop of Allentown on August 31, 2017.

Catholics form the largest single religious group in the five counties of the Diocese. In the 84 parishes of the Diocese, there are more than 252,000 registered Catholics, representing more than 20 percent of the general population.

Name: Bistum Augsburg
Description: Das Bistum Augsburg ist eine römisch-katholische Diözese im Südwesten von Bayern. Sie umfasst nahezu den ganzen bayerischen Regierungsbezirk Schwaben, Teile des altbayerischen Gebietes östlich des Lechs und ein kleines Gebiet im südwestlichen Mittelfranken.

Name: St Mellitus College
Description:
St Mellitus College is a learning community dedicated to helping Christians explore their faith more deeply, combining academic excellence, a focus on missional leadership, and the flexibility to fit around busy lifestyles.

Our core values are:
Leadership for Mission: The church thrives when focussed on its mission. St Mellitus keeps a special focus on preparing people with a Christ-like character and skills for leadership.  

Generous Orthodoxy: St Mellitus is committed to exploring and expounding the ‘faith once handed down to the saints’ in a way that combines academic excellence with a generosity of spirit, an openness to enquiry, and a wide range of styles of worship.

Unity in the Spirit: With students from a wide range of theological and church backgrounds, St Mellitus seeks to hold unity around an expectation of the presence and power of the Holy Spirit in all Christians.

Name: Espoon seurakunnat | Esbo församlingar
Description:
Espoon tuomiokirkkoseurakunta, Espoonlahden seurakunta, Leppävaaran seurakunta, Olarin seurakunta, Tapiolan seurakunta ja Esbo svenska församling muodostavat yhdessä Espoon seurakuntayhtymän. Seurakunnissa on yhteensä 156 053 jäsentä. Työntekijöitä on noin 500.

Kirkko Espoossa vahvistaa yhteisönä kristillistä uskoa, tulevaisuuden toivoa ja lähimmäisenrakkautta. Olemme läsnä ihmisten arjessa ja juhlassa.

Tälle sivulle postaamme esimerkiksi tiedot avoinna olevista työpaikoistamme, kurssikeskusten toiminnasta ja niiden varaamisesta sekä toimintaan liittyviä uutisia.

Name: New Mindset Pathways
Description: New Mindset Pathways is a sacred, supportive space to pause, listen, and notice how God is present and active in your life. In seasons when faith feels distant, prayer is met with silence, or life transitions leave you searching for meaning, spiritual direction offers a path forward. Through one-on-one and group sessions, we explore the deeper story beneath the surface reflecting on experiences, doubts, and desires to discern how the Spirit may be guiding you. This isn’t about fixing problems or giving answers. It’s about attentive listening, prayerful reflection, and discovering what’s already being whispered within. Many come seeking direction during times of change, grief, shifting beliefs, or longing for deeper connection with God. Over time, this practice nurtures clarity where there was confusion, peace where there was restlessness, and purpose where there was uncertainty. Together, we walk the sacred journey toward growth, faith, and the next faithful step.

Name: Shree Rudraksha
Description:
We, Shree Rudraksha, are a well-appreciated Wholesaler, Retailer and Exporter of Rudraksha, Shaligram, Gemstones, Rudraksha Beads, Rudraksha Mala etc. All these products are acquired from the best sources of the market. Description: De Nederlandse Gereformeerde Kerken (afgekort NGK) worden gevormd door ongeveer 320 plaatselijke kerken met samen bijna 140.000 leden. Wij geloven in God, die we kennen uit de Bijbel. Name: Associação Planalto Central - APlaC
Description: Sede administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia para o Distrito Federal, entorno e parte do estado de Goiás.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Lafayette, LA
Description:
We, the Roman Catholic Church of the Diocese of Lafayette, acknowledge Jesus as Lord and find in His person and mission our truest identity. Obedient to the promptings of the Spirit, we acknowledge His life and ministry, His dying and rising as profound expressions of the Father's constant love for all people. We faithfully join Him as ministers in His kingdom.

Our mission involves the total restoration of humanity, the salvation of the whole person. Our response to this mission finds expression in programs that promote healing and unity in every aspect of the human person. Like Jesus, we seek to express solidarity with the poor and the oppressed, striving all the while to remove from ourselves and Church structures whatever promotes inequality, injustice and oppression.

Name: Victory Church
Description:
Victory Church is a church that exists to Reach a City, Change a Nation, and Touch the World.  

Victory Church was founded in Oklahoma City by Pastors Mark and Jennifer Crow, in August of 1994.  Since the first campus was founded, Victory has grown to over 8,000 in average attendance on Sunday morning, and four campuses including three in the Oklahoma City metropolitan area and one in Corpus Christi, TX.  

Victory Church can also be watched 24-hours a day at http://www.victorychurch.tv.

Name: The Foursquare Church
Description: We are a Great Commission movement transforming communities through the multiplication of disciples, leaders, churches and movements in the U.S. and globally.

Name: Christ Church Plano
Description: We joyfully invite you to explore Christ Church and find here a community that marries the best of the Church’s ancient practices with culturally-engaged, biblically-orthodox preaching and teaching.

Name: The Basilica of Saint Mary in Minneapolis
Description:
Our Mission
The Basilica of Saint Mary is a community rooted in the gospel of Jesus Christ.
Here we gather to celebrate faith, mourn, proclaim, serve, heal, learn, reflect, and form community. We join those who seek to be immersed in art and music. We join others in need of refuge, shelter and aid.

Name: Reconstructionist Rabbinical College
Description:
In an increasingly diverse Jewish world, we’re a progressive seminary that prepares students from all walks of life for the rabbinate.

Engaging, seminar-style classes and hevrutah (paired) learning are designed to facilitate intimate, meaningful and educational discussion. Our groundbreaking social justice organizing and multifaith studies curricula, as well as our renowned Jewish ethics center, create real-world foundations for our students' rabbinical education.

Drawing on the powerful texts and magnificent Jewish history we have inherited, the Reconstructionist Rabbinical College trains rabbis in shaping a Judaism relevant to the unfolding challenges and blessings of the current moment.

Name: A More Perfect Union: The Jewish Partnership for Democracy
Faith in Later Life
Description:
Faith in Later Life is a national charity which exists to inspire and equip Christians to reach, serve and empower older people in every community, through the local church,  that all may live fulfilled and fruitful lives.

Faith in Later Life does this in a number of ways, but a focal point is the website which provides resources for churches and individuals.

Name: Centers for Spiritual Living International Headquarters
Description: Centers for Spiritual Living is a global community comprised of 400 spiritual communities, teaching chapters, study groups and other ministries in 30 countries around the world. These communities teach a New Thought philosophy that brings religion and science together and offers spiritual tools to transform personal lives and help make the world a better place. This is done through the study and practice of Science of Mind, also known as Religious Science, which holds that all life is sacred—that each human being is an expression of God. We believe in Cause and Effect and teach that “It is done unto you as you believe.” In essence, an individual’s thinking and expectations create their reality. Our teachings incorporate the ancient wisdom of spiritual traditions through the ages. People of all spiritual paths - Christian, Jewish, Buddhist, Hindu, Muslim, and others - are welcome in our communities. For more information, or to find a Center close to you, visit www.csl.org.

Name: Erzdiözese Wien
Description: Katholische Kirche in Wien und Niederösterreich. Die Erzdiözese Wien ist ein römisch katholisches Bistum, das die Stadt Wien und die östliche Hälfte des Bundeslands Niederösterreich umfasst.

Name: Europartners
Description: We are a community of faith-driven business leaders, entrepreneurs and young professionals. Find your place in the community and let us support you on your journey.

Name: Hijas de la Caridad España Centro
Description:
La Compañía de las Hijas de la Caridad es una comunidad internacional fundada en 1633 por Vicente de Paúl y Luisa de Marillac. Vivimos llamadas a servir Jesucristo en la persona de los pobres y los marginados, con un espíritu de humildad, sencillez y caridad.

Siguiendo el espíritu, el carisma y la inspiración de nuestros fundadores, trabajamos por la atención y la promoción de las personas más vulnerables y promovemos la justicia, la paz y la solidaridad, sirviendo en obras que cambian y se adaptan constantemente.

Nuestra misión es ofrecer un servicio de calidad a los más pobres desde una concepción cristiana de la persona, de la vida y del mundo, haciendo presente la Buena Noticia del Evangelio.

Impulsadas por el amor de Cristo y sostenidas por una profunda vida de oración, vivimos en comunidad de vida fraterna, ayudándonos unas a otras en nuestra misión común de servicio que se dirige a la persona en todas sus dimensiones humanas y espirituales.

Desde nuestros orígenes, las Hijas de la Caridad queremos responder con fidelidad siempre nueva a las necesidades de los pobres. Hoy el carisma se encarna y se expresa en distintas realidades culturales y en múltiples ámbitos de servicio:

●	Socio-sanitario y atención al mayor.
●	Centros educativos y pastoral.
●	Personas sin hogar y en riesgo de exclusión social.
●	Atención a la mujer.
●	Enfermos y sus familias.
●	Personas privadas de libertad y familias.
●	Minorías étnicas.

Desde nuestra Provincia de España Centro, llevamos a cabo esta misión en 80 comunidades presentes en Albacete, Ávila, Ciudad Real, Cuenca, Logroño, Madrid, Murcia, Salamanca, Segovia, Toledo y Zamora.

Name: Dawat-e-Hadiyah
Description: Dawat-e-Hadiyah is the Administration of His Holiness Syedna Mufaddal Saifuddin, Leader of the Dawoodi Bohra Community

Name: Life Action
Description:
Life Action exists to help people encounter the fullness of God in a way that revives relationships—with Him and with each other. Through transformative, deeply relational events, we create sacred space for people to step away from the noise of life and experience God in a personal, life-changing way.

Whether you come to us at one of our camp or retreat experiences, or we come to you through church events and marriage workshops, our mission is the same: to help individuals, couples, families, and ministry teams encounter God’s love—and to see that encounter ripple outward into homes, churches, and communities.

Name: Fellowship
Description: Fellowship, launched in 2012, has been called one of the fastest growing churches in America. We are committed to being transformed by the Gospel, Growing in a life of worship, Gathering in community and Giving our lives away on mission.

Name: Westminster Presbyterian Church
Description: Westminster is a terrific congregation….open, thoughtful, energetic. Despite having nearly 900 members, we are a close-knit community. We care. We are committed to getting to know our members and visitors, and hope that as a church, we can nurture everyone who comes to us in the Christian faith in a way that fits who God has made them, and Christ has redeemed them, to be. Above all, in all that we do, we seek to “worship well.”

Name: Anglican Youthworks
Description:
The discipleship of children, youth and families is at the heart of everything we do from Special Religious Education (SRE) in public schools, to Conference Centres, Youthworks College, and Christian publishing. 

No matter where you connect with Youthworks, you can be confident that our ministries will lead, teach, model, encourage, train and resource young people to be lifelong followers of Jesus. And we do this in service of churches, schools, families and individuals in partnership together to help orient the next generation - for life!

Name: E-Daily Devotions
Description:
E-Daily seeks to build a society void of violence, crimes and all social vices by diffusing the society with the living words of grace, mercy and truth. We affect lives by sharing daily content about contemporary happenings in the light of the scriptures. 

We work, pray and study to see that we change one life at a time through the power of the Holy Spirit. 

To further expand our reach, give out Bibles and books, donations are welcome. Kindly visit our website to learn more about us.

Name: The Rescue Mission
Description: The Rescue Mission, founded in 1903, is a faith-based, nonprofit, 501(c)(3) organization, providing restorative care to men, women and children experiencing a homeless crisis. Our organization serves Fort Wayne, Allen County and its nine surrounding counties. The Mission is comprised of four ministries, or houses, that function as communities of compassion.

Name: Living Hope Church
Description: A non-denominational church with a progressive, contemporary approach to ministry.  Our church focuses on Small Groups and Family Ministries for personal growth and discipleship.  We have been operating in Elk Grove Village since 1979 and we are actively pursuing continued growth.

Name: Diocese of Hexham and Newcastle
Description: The Diocese of Hexham and Newcastle is a religious organisation in the North-East of England
Location: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Name: National Association of Catholic Chaplains
Description: The National Association of Catholic Chaplains advocates for the profession of spiritual care and educates, certifies, and supports chaplains, clinical pastoral educators, and all members who continue the healing ministry of Jesus in the name of the Church.

Name: Trueface
Description:
Today’s culture is perfecting the art and science of creating masks. Behind these masks, people are dying inside. We’re here to change that.

Trueface equips people to experience the freedom of living beyond the mask. When we increase trust in our relationships, we are able to experience being more authentically known and loved by God and others. We hope to be a bridge for hundreds of thousands to experience the peace and freedom of the original good news by trusting God and others with their whole selves.

Name: National Council of Churches
Description: Since its founding in 1950, the National Council of the Churches of Christ in the USA has been the leading force for shared ecumenical witness among Christians in the United States. The NCC's 37 member communions -- from a wide spectrum of Protestant, Anglican, Orthodox, Evangelical, historic African American and Living Peace churches -- include 35 million persons in more than 100,000 local congregations in communities across the nation.

Name: First Baptist Church of Glenarden
Description:
First Baptist Church of Glenarden is a vibrant, Bible-teaching church offering more than 100 life-changing
ministries and programs. Under the leadership of our Senior Pastor, John K. Jenkins Sr., God is “Developing Dynamic Disciples through Discipleship, Discipline and Duplication."

Name: The Lawyers' Christian Fellowship
Description: The whole of Scripture points to Christ, whose life, death, burial and resurrection provide the only way to be forgiven by God and to enjoy life in all its fullness. The familiar Micah 6:8 text inspires our fellowship with its simple three-fold imperative, which moves Christian lawyers to retell the Jesus story through the medium of the legal profession. Theirs is a unique opportunity for our time, to Seek Justice, Love Mercy, Walk Humbly, and so to powerfully communicate the whole Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Name: Igreja Evangélica Bola de Neve
Description: Igreja Evangélica Bola de Neve is a religious non profit organization.

Name: LIFE NZ
Description:
Join the team at LIFE, a church to call home.

When you join the LIFE team, you can expect to be part of a passionate and dedicated group of individuals who are united by a common purpose. It's more than a career, it's a calling after all! You'll have the opportunity to contribute to meaningful projects, collaborate with like-minded colleagues, and grow both personally and professionally.

Explore our current job openings and discover how you can make a difference with us at LIFE. Together, we can impact and change our generation with the reality of Jesus!

Name: Vision International University
Description:
Vision International University offers degree programs for students seeking academic advancement and preparation for professional service in Christian Ministry. VIU was founded as a sister institution of Vision International College Australia in 1990. With administrative headquarters in Ramona, CA, the institution specifically offers flexible and affordable distance/online education in a variety of delivery methods.

Vision-Mission-Purpose
Vision International University was founded for education and training on both a local and international basis. From the beginning of the New Testament era, the Lord has used the local church and its pastoral leadership to teach and train its people for God’s service. Vision is an instrument to be used by and for the local church to fulfill its calling. The University campus and the administrative offices are located in Ramona (San Diego), California.

Our Mission Statement:
The mission of Vision International University is to effectively educate and train, by means of distance education, men and women called to Christian service. The academic model shall be biblically based Christian higher education (undergraduate through graduate), for preparing Christian pastors, missionaries, church leaders, educators and other professionals for leadership in various fields of Christian service. This mission is to be accomplished through a Christ-centered distance education curriculum, of academic excellence, intellectual inquiry, spiritual and moral integrity, and practical experience.

Philosophy and Objectives:

Vision International University is a Bible-based, Christ-centered institution dedicated to the educating and training of Christians for the work of the ministry. The following statement of purposes encompasses the scope of the vision of the University.

Name: Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia
Description: Aguardamos a volta de Jesus (advento) e observamos o sétimo dia para adoração especial a Deus.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Lexington
Description:
The Diocese of Lexington was established in 1988 by Pope John Paul II.  The diocese was formed from parts of the Archdiocese of Louisville and the Diocese of Covington, covering almost 16,400 square miles and representing 50 counties in Central and Eastern Kentucky.

The Diocese of Lexington serves the Horse Capital of the World, with its lavish horse-farms as well as central Appalachia. The 40 Appalachian counties of Lexington are the "other America," where 74 percent of children live below the federal poverty line.

The Catholic population of the diocese, at 3% of the total, is very small.  In addition, an estimated 60% of the total population within the bounds of the diocese does not belong to any church or denomination, although most of the residents would identify themselves as Christian.

The city of Lexington and the surrounding counties are a center of commerce, transportation and education; within this generally prosperous area, however, there are many people in need.  The majority of the counties within the diocese are rural and mountain areas, facing the challenges of high rates of unemployment, high rates of poverty, and the problems that affect communities when so many lack basic necessities. Thus, the Diocese of Lexington is designated as a mission diocese within the United States: the geographic, demographic and economic characteristics indicate an acute need to evangelize Gospel values and to provide outreach services elevating human dignity and eliminating human suffering.

Name: Temple Sinai
Description: This dynamic congregation affiliated with the Reform Movement values lifelong Jewish learning, a warm spirit of community, a sense of inclusiveness, and active participation in Jewish life. We believe that full participation from a diverse and broad-based membership benefits our congregation, and therefore welcome all who wish to participate, regardless of age, marital status, sexual orientation, or financial means.

Name: Victory Christian Center, Inc.
Description:
Victory Church is a vibrant, multi-campus church based in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
Our mission is to connect people to God and each other, to equip believers for their calling, and to impact our city, nation, and world through the love of Jesus.

With over weekly service, outreach programs, and global minisitry, Victory is more than a weekend experience — it helps your find your purpose! 

We're always looking for passionate, faith-filled individuals to join our team in areas like ministry, media, production, administration, creative, kids/youth, and more.

Join us and be a part of what God is doing through Victory. Your BEST days are right in-front of you! 

 Tulsa, Oklahoma

Name: Fresno Mission
Description:
The Fresno Mission rescues, restores, and empowers through Christ-centered communities of transformation.

Thanks to the prayers and support of our dedicated friends, God is using the Fresno Mission to change the lives of men, women, and children in desperate need.  Together, we are changing our community, one life at a time. 
Learn more about the work we are doing in the community. 
Go to www.fresnomission.org .

Name: Cadence International
Description: Cadence International is a faith based evangelical mission whose sole purpose is to minister to the military communites throughout the world, both foreign and domestic.  We do this through a variety of ministries.  Please go to our website to learn more about how you may be partner with us in ministry to the military.

Name: Partners for Sacred Places
Description:
Partners for Sacred Places, founded in 1989, is the only national, non-sectarian, nonprofit organization focused on building the capacity of congregations of historic sacred places to better serve their communities as anchor institutions, nurturing transformation, and shaping vibrant, creative communities. Places of worship play vital roles in their neighborhoods and the broader community. They are significant landmarks, places where people access programs and community services, and a focus of neighborhood physical and social identity.

Partners builds the capability of congregational leadership to enact building care, shared-use partnerships, and capital fundraising through training programs, fundraising assistance, and organizational and facility assessments. With a national presence and offices in Philadelphia, Chicago, and Fort Worth, Partners has served thousands of congregations and other local organizations over the past twenty-five years and represents the needs and concerns of over 100,000 older, community-serving sacred places across America.

Name: Alliance Theological Seminary
Description: Alliance Theological Seminary is the national seminary of The Christian and Missionary Alliance, centered in metropolitan New York with extensions in other parts of the United States and abroad. As a multicultural, evangelical seminary, ATS is committed to developing in men and women a personal knowledge of God and his work in the world in order to equip them for the ministry of the gospel of Jesus Christ and the expansion of his church.

Name: EPUdF - Eglise Protestante Unie de France
Description:
Fondée en 2012, l'Église protestante unie de France est le fruit de l'union entre l'Église réformée de France et l'Église évangélique luthérienne de France, toutes deux issues du mouvement de la Réforme au XVIe siècle. Ces deux Églises ont été parmi les membres fondateurs de la Fédération protestante de France en 1905.

Cette nouvelle Église s'engage dans une dynamique commune pour offrir un témoignage plus fort et un meilleur service de l'Évangile au sein de la société française. Elle s'efforce de prendre en compte la diversité des traditions luthérienne et réformée et cherche à s'enrichir de cette diversité.

Elle est présente dans 9 régions avec 420 paroisses et 900 lieux de culte, offrant ses services à environ 250 000 personnes.

Name: Compassion Christian church
Description:
Our mission is to lead people to a life-changing connection with Jesus Christ.

Join us for worship services at 4:30 and 6:15 p.m. on Saturday or 9:15 and 11 a.m. on Sundays. We also offer a mid-week Bible study at 6:45 p.m. on Wednesdays.

We offer programming for children (birth-fifth grade) during every service.

Blitz (our dynamic middle school program) meets from 5:45-8 p.m. on Wednesdays (Sept.-Nov. and Jan.-May) and from 4-5:45 p.m. on Saturdays or 8:45-10:30 a.m. on S...See More

Name: David Romanoff Ministries
Description: Training and equipping of body of Christ through teach and preaching the word of God with demonstration of the Holy Spirit. Ephesians 4:11-13,  1 Corinthians 2:4,5, Mark 16:15-20

Name: Anglican Schools Commission (Qld)
Description:
The role of the Anglican Schools Commission is to support the senior management and governing bodies of Anglican Schools across the Diocese of Brisbane. 

We provide quality advice and service in many areas, including finance, new school development, marketing, professional development of staff, industrial relations, legal and other human resource issues. This ensures the best education is available to our students. 

The Anglican Schools Commission Secretariat supports the Anglican Schools Commission in all its operations.  The Secretariat is located in Brisbane at Church House, 419 Ann Street.

Name: Diocese of St. Augustine
Description: The Catholic Diocese of St. Augustine was established in 1870 and is comprised of 54 parishes and 17 missions and chapels, 2 basilicas, the National Shrine of Our Lady of La Leche, 40 schools, hundreds of ministries and Marywood, a robust retreat and conference center. Today, the diocese is led by our 11th bishop, Most Rev. Erik Pohlmeier, and embraces 17 counties spanning the northeast section of Florida from the Gulf of Mexico to the Atlantic Ocean. It covers 11,032 square miles and serves more than 176,000 registered Catholics.

Name: St. John the Baptist Catholic Church
Description: We’re a Catholic Church serving Madison, Alabama in the Diocese of Birmingham.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Maryland
Description:
Our mission is to cover the world in Christ by unapologetically declaring to the world whose we are by proactively creating faith-centric cultures in the workplace.

We are a group of business executives who come together every month to share how including Christ in our daily lives has positively affected the work environment.

In sharing joys and struggles with others who walk similar paths, we are able to support and encourage our brothers and sisters in Christ to live courageously in witness to him. It is our hope to rejuvenate the working soul through fellowship and praise of God.

How is your soul today?

To get involved with our ministry, please contact Chapter President Wynne Briscoe at wbriscoe@csuiteforchrist.com.

Name: National Organization of the New Apostolic Church USA
Description:
Our Vision

A church in which people feel at home and, inspired by the Holy Spirit and their love for God, align their lives to the Gospel of Jesus Christ and thus prepare themselves for His return and eternal life.


Our Mission

Reaching out to all people in order to teach them the Gospel of Jesus Christ and to baptize them with water and the Holy Spirit.

Providing soul care and cultivating a warm fellowship in which everyone shall experience the love of God and the joy of serving Him and others.

Name: Faith & Work Chicago
Description:
We believe the gospel transforms not only the individual, but whole communities, industries and nations in and through our everyday work.

Faith & Work Chicago exists to equip and catalyze the scattered church to live our faith in the context of our everyday work for the good of the city, to the glory of God.

Name: Gospel Patrons
Description: We believe God uses business leaders to resource great movements of God. We call them Gospel Patrons.

Name: Catholic Charities of the Archdiocese of Miami, Inc.
Description:
Catholic Charities of the Archdiocese of Miami, Inc. is the largest non-profit provider of social services in South Florida.  Our mission is: "To Honor God By; Enhancing human life and dignity, supporting individuals and families, building communities, and working for justice." 

We serve individuals and families regardless of age, race, ethnicity, religious affiliation (if any), sexual orientation, etc.

Name: St. Francis Xavier Catholic School System
Description: St. Francis Xavier Catholic School System is a Christ-centered community dedicated to faith formation, academic excellence, community engagement, and individual growth of our students in a safe environment.

Name: Holy Spirit Catholic Church
Description:
The purpose of Holy Spirit Catholic Church is to make God's kingdom present in the world. 

Jesus established his followers into a Church, under the leadership of the Apostles, as a body responsible for making His saving work present in the world. This means we are part of the universal Church and of the local archdiocese, as well as parishioners of Holy Spirit Church. There are inherent links between our responsibilities in our parish, our parish's responsibility for making the gospel present in the local community, and our parish's role in the archdiocese and even in the world beyond. For Holy Spirit Catholic Church and it’s parishioners, this responsibility/role involves participation in and furtherance of the three-fold mission of the Church: sanctifying, teaching, and guiding.

Name: Beautiful Feet Task Force
Description:
Howard Sands founded the organisation in 1980 with a burning desire to both win souls and encourage the church to be active overcomers in everyday life, fulfilling the Great Commission. Born on the Scripture found in Romans 10.15, "How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of them that bring good news ..." B.F.T.F. is based soundly on the Bible as the Word of God, historically correct, spiritually powerful and relevant for today. We believe that outside of Christ man is eternally lost and that Christ's substitutionary and sacrificial death on the cross of Calvary is the only way which man can find peace with God and eternal life; it is therefore necessary that this gospel be preached to all men, everywhere. 
B.F.T.F. is currently involved in evangelism and leadership training in Australia , Asia and Africa. Howard has taken many small teams of leaders to minister in evangelistic crusades and leadership conferences across many nations. He has ministered in churches across Australia, India, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, UK, USA, Hong Kong, Fiji, New Zealand, Romania, Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Burundi, Ethiopia, Ghana, Togo, Benin, Nigeria, Cameroon, Malawi, Zambia, South Africa, Eswatini, Zimbabwe,  United Arab Emirates, Singapore, China and Malaysia.

Name: eDialogue Corner Society - جمعية ركن الحوار الأهلية
Description:
eDialogueC is a nonprofit organization officially registered #1882 under the law of nonprofit organizations regulations related to Ministry of Human Resource and Social Development, eDialogueC concerns about introducing and serving Islam to Non-Muslims on the internet, help the world for better understanding and phobia less on Islam and Muslims. It was founded in march 2011 by a magnificent team. The society which is located in Saudi Arabia, Dammam at first, shifted its headquarters to Riyadh city.
 
Operating online with 3 main programs as follow:

1- eDialogue live chat

It's the first project which was established alongside the forming of the society. Name: North American Lutheran Church
Description:
The NALC embodies the theological center of Lutheranism in North America. It is a church body committed to the authority of the Bible as the inspired Word of God and the authoritative source and norm of its proclamation, faith, and life. In keeping with the Lutheran Confessions, we believe all doctrines should and must be judged by the teaching of Scripture.

The NALC is committed to shaping its life around four attributes: Christ Centered, Mission Driven, Traditionally Grounded, and Congregationally Focused.

The NALC is a renewed Lutheran community moving forward in faith and mission, focused on living out Christ’s Great Commission to go and make disciples. We hope that you will see the NALC as a church body that will enable your congregation to carry out its mission and ministry faithfully.

Name: CDF Capital
Description:
Helping churches grow since 1953

CDF Capital was created for a single mission: to help churches grow. For more than seventy years, CDF Capital has been addressing the most significant barrier to church expansion: access to the financial capital needed to purchase land and construct buildings. Our fund connects kingdom-building investors with growing churches needing loans to finance their projects.

Name: Church Of Jesus Christ Of Lds
Description: Church Of Jesus Christ Of Lds is a religious institutions company based out of 22599 Titusville Rd, Pleasantville, Pennsylvania, United States.
