Name: Westminster Seminary California
Description:
Westminster Seminary California (WSC) is a Christian institution seeking to glorify God through graduate theological study. Its primary responsibility is to educate future pastors for Christian churches, especially for Presbyterian and Reformed denominations. It also provides theological education for others who will serve in the Christian community and the larger society.

WSC offers instruction in biblical, theological, and ministerial disciplines to both men and women as the heart of a program to help students to develop intellectually and spiritually as leaders. While the focus of our programs is to educate and prepare men for office-bearing ordained ministries of instruction and leadership as pastors, WSC also furnishes training in Scripture and theology to both women and men who are preparing to serve Christ and His church in vocations other than the ordained leadership ministries so that the whole body of Christ may be enriched through the diverse gifts bestowed by God’s Spirit.

Because zeal without knowledge or knowledge without zeal can only injure the church, WSC seeks to develop in its students a balanced combination of scholarship and Christ-like piety. Westminster Seminary California seeks to establish a community of Christian research and scholarship where proper cultivation of the mind increases the devotion of the heart.

Name: Igreja Messiânica Mundial do Brasil
Description:
A Igreja Messiânica Mundial foi instituída no Japão em 1935 por Mokiti Okada, cujo nome religioso é Meishu-Sama. Tem no espiritualismo e no altruísmo as bases essenciais para a concretização do mundo ideal, isento de doença, pobreza e conflito.

Ela foi introduzida no Brasil em 1955, e hoje reúne atualmente cerca de 3 milhões de messiânicos, incluindo os ministrantes de Johrei.

Name: ONE&ALL Church
Description: ONE&ALL Church has the goal to have a fully devoted follower of Jesus Christ in every home of the San Gabriel Valley and beyond. We are an independent Christian church in California that has a passion for reaching our community by walking across the room, walking across the valley and walking across the world.

Name: University of Sedona
Description:
University of Sedona - The Leaders in Self-Paced Distance Learning for
Metaphysical Degrees since 1959

Mission - To offer spirituality to those in search of higher spiritual truth beyond that found in conventional, traditional, fundamentalist, or dogmatic religion while encouraging the individual, metaphysical perspectives of students for creating a diversity of new approaches to spiritual practice and ministry. To ensure the continuation, preservation, expansion, and integrity of the founder’s teachings.

Vision - To provide affordable education in higher advanced Holistic, New Thought Metaphysics, as well as Transpersonal, Transcendent, and Theocentric Metaphysical forms of spirituality, so graduates from our degree programs are well prepared to teach, counsel, coach, practice spiritual healing or engage in whatever their chosen metaphysical specialty may be.

Purpose - To conduct further research into the nature and source of consciousness for discovering the spiritual mysteries of life and how such knowledge may be practically applied to the improvement of human life, both individually and collectively. This includes the evolution toward the synthesis of science, psychology, transcendentalism, and mysticism so that eventually absolute spiritual truth and absolute scientific psychological truth may compliment and explain each other as one reality.

Name: Filter of Hope
Description:
At Filter of Hope, we share clean, safe drinking water and the gospel with people in desperate need of both.

• No one should have to live without clean drinking water. 

• Everyone deserves an opportunity to know Christ personally.

1. Filter of Hope is a non-profit Christian organization that has developed a point-of-use household water filter and implements safe Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene (WASH) solutions for people living in abject poverty.
 
2. We also offer filter recipients an opportunity to begin a relationship with God with an optional, brief explanation of the gospel.

3. For sustainability, we partner with indigenous local community and church leaders to manage our programs in areas classified as Unreached People Groups.

4. We lead teams throughout the year to our ministry bases throughout the Caribbean and Central America.

Name: Ufficio Comunicazione Opus Dei Italia
Description:
L'Opus Dei è un'istituzione della Chiesa cattolica e diffonde il messaggio che il lavoro e le circostanze ordinarie sono occasioni di incontro con Dio, di servizio agli altri e di miglioramento della società. 

L'Opus Dei fu fondata nel 1928 da san Josemaría Escrivá.

Name: GreenFaith
Description:
Our Mission: Because the Earth and all people are sacred and at risk, GreenFaith is building a worldwide, multi-faith climate and environmental movement. 

Together our members create communities to transform ourselves, our spiritual institutions, and society to protect the planet and create a compassionate, loving and just world.

Our Vision: We envision a world transformed, in which humanity in all its diversity has developed a shared reverence for life on Earth. Religious and spiritual communities everywhere generate a moral awakening to the sacredness of Earth and the dignity of all people.  Together, we are building resilient, caring communities and economies that meet everyone’s needs and protect the planet. The era of conquest, extraction, and exploitation has given way to cooperation and community.

The good life is one of connectedness—with each other and all of nature. It is a world of flourishing life that replaces despair with joy, scarcity with shared abundance, and privilege with justly distributed power.

Name: Christian Broadcasting Network
Description: CBN is a multifaceted nonprofit organization that provides programming by cable, broadcast and satellite to approximately 200 countries.

Name: Kairos Prison Ministry International, Inc.
Description:
Kairos Prison Ministry International, Inc. is a lay-led, interdenominational Christian ministry in which men and women volunteers bring Christ's love and forgiveness to prisoners and their families.

The Kairos programs take the participants on a journey that demonstrates the love and forgiveness of Jesus Christ. Kairos Prison Ministry is Christian in nature, although no religious affiliation is necessary to be a participant.

They involve a structured model that includes the weekend experience, followed by guests or participants gathering regularly for accountability, support and prayer.

Kairos Prison Ministry is made up of three programs, which reach over 25,000 people annually: Kairos Inside, Kairos Outside, and Kairos Torch.

Kairos Inside brings positive and negative leaders together, in both male and female prisons, for a 3 ½ day weekend designed to start building the Christian community inside the institution. 

Kairos Outside is a special weekend retreat designed to support the female relatives/friends of men and women who are or have been incarcerated, or women who were unable to attend Kairos Inside while in prison, followed by a continuing ministry.

Kairos Torch offers an initial weekend, followed by a long-term mentoring process encouraging young men and women to move towards making better life.

Kairos operates in prisons in 35 U.S. states, and 10 countries: Australia, Canada, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Nicaragua, Honduras, Peru, South Africa, and the United Kingdom. Over 30,000 volunteers conduct nearly 500 programs in prisons and communities annually in the U.S. and worldwide.

Name: Bishop Miege High School
Description: Bishop Miege High School, a Catholic community of faith, strives to develop the potential of our students through spiritual growth, academic success, and stewardship.

Name: Grace Point Church
Description:
Grace Point Church has been reaching the people of San Antonio and the world since 1992. It is a multi-site church with two locations, Grace Point Church Medical Center and Grace Point Church West.
Under the leadership of Senior Pastor Jeff Harris, Grace Point is steadfastly strategic in its mission to "lead common people into uncommon life in Jesus." 
Grace Point is missional community focused on training, encouraging and challenging its members to understand their identity in Christ and to convey God's message in the community. A frequent refrain at Grace Point is, "We are not called to go to church; we are called to be the church wherever we go."
As a result, over 75 percent of Grace Pointers serve according to their spiritual gifts on a weekly basis, hundreds go on local and global missions regularly and more than a hundred individuals exchange their lives for the life of Christ and are baptized each year.

Name: ONE FOR ISRAEL Ministry
Description:
ONE FOR ISRAEL is an initiative of native-born Israelis on the forefront of high-tech media evangelism, proclaiming salvation to Israel, raising up spiritual leaders through ONE FOR ISRAEL’s Bible College and equipping them with the tools they need to transform our communities.  
OUR MESSIAH JESUS HAS BEEN
THE BEST KEPT SECRET AMONG THE JEWISH PEOPLE
BUT TODAY, a group of native-born Israelis are bringing the Gospel Light back to Israel again. Using innovative methods and technologies, ONE FOR ISRAEL is sending God’s Word out again from Zion throughout the world proclaiming the Gospel of Messiah.  We've reached hundreds of millions around the globe and over 45 Million views in Israel alone with our testimonies Gospel presentations and apologetics resources.
Established in 1990, ONE FOR ISRAEL began as a Bible college and has since expanded to a multi-faceted ministry with the express goal of reaching Israelis with the Good News of Yeshua, training and equipping the Body of Messiah in Israel, and blessing our community with Yeshua’s love. WE ARE THE ONLY ACCREDITED, EVANGELICAL HEBREW-SPEAKING, SEMINARY IN THE WORLD.

The story and ministry of ONE FOR ISRAEL is part of something much larger – the miraculous restoration of the Jewish people and the miraculous unity between Jewish and Arab believers in Jesus.

We are seeing not only the physical restoration of Israel after a 2000-year exile, but a spiritual revolution is taking place right in front of our eyes. Jewish people are returning to their God and accepting the Messiah in numbers not seen since the early church! Not only that, but many Arab people are coming to the Lord and many Arab believers are finding a deep unity with their Jewish brothers and sisters.

ONE FOR ISRAEL exists to do ministry within this miracle.

We are Jews and Arabs, together serving Messiah Jesus, sharing the Gospel with Israel and the world, making disciples, training leaders, and blessing our communities in the name of Yeshua.

Name: Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem
Description: Ever since its reestablishment in 1847, the Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem (LPJ) has been promoting the best interests of the local communities it serves. Today, the Patriarchal Diocese oversees approximately 150,000 faithful in four countries; Jordan, Palestine, Israel and Cyprus, covering a rich tapestry of cultures, languages, religions and traditions. Serving all with special emphasis on the support and care of indigenous Holy Land Christians remains the enduring mission of the Mother Church, the Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem.

Name: King Abdullah Academy
Description: The founding vision of the the King Abdullah Academy is based on the belief that each child possesses a unique set of talents and strengths that, once identified and nurtured, will help them to have the capacity and character to be leaders in their families, communities and in the international connected world of tomorrow. The world needs innovators, thinkers, artists, scientists, and entrepreneurs. King Abdullah Academy's entrepreneurship, STEM, and the arts ("e-STEM-a") curriculum provides multiple pathways for students to learn the skills, knowledge, and habits of mind that will enable them to be of service in our global, hyper-connected world. Character building grounded in Islamic values is the foundation of King Abdullah Academy. Students will graduate as self-directed learners who are ready to innovate.

Name: First Christian Church
Description: At First Christian we are a community of followers of Jesus Christ, fully committed to our relationship with Christ and with others, committed to growing in our faith, and committed to serving each other and the entire community around us.

Name: Northview Church
Description: Northview Church is a non-denominational church with 13 campuses (including 4 prison campuses) across Indiana. Our goal is to make sure Northview is a place you and your family can feel safe and learn about God in a real and relevant way. To find out more about our story, our future, or opportunities for employment, please visit our website.

Name: Migration and Refugee Services - USCCB
Description:
For over a century, the U.S. Catholic bishops have undertaken the Gospel mandate to welcome the stranger and provide support for vulnerable and marginalized populations on the move. 

Migration and Refugee Services (MRS) within the U.S. Conference of Catholic Bishops (USCCB) is one of ten national resettlement agencies that provides immediate resettlement and longer-term integration services to newcomers through a network of local diocesan service providers. MRS also administers programs for unaccompanied migrant children and unaccompanied refugee minors. Through these and other initiatives, MRS fulfills the commitment of the U.S. Catholic bishops to protect the life and dignity of the human person.

The USCCB is located in Northeast Washington, D.C., near the Basilica of the National Shrine of the Immaculate Conception and the Catholic University of America, just a few blocks from the Brookland stop on the Metro's Red Line. The USCCB offers a fantastic suite of benefits to include medical, dental, and vision insurance immediately upon hire, parental leave, tuition assistance, 403(b) contributions, and free parking to those who commute by vehicle. 

MRS serves and employs people of all faiths.

Name: Yale Divinity School, Center for Continuing Education
Description:
The Center for Continuing Education at Yale Divinity School provides opportunities and resources for churches, clergy, and laity to foster the knowledge and love of God in their communities.

Through events, lectures, programs, instructional resources, and publications, our goal is to enable and enrich ministry and lay learning. These resources are intended to support faith formation, religious education, and personal and professional enrichment.

Name: ACNSF
Description: Atendendo o apelo do Papa João Paulo II pela Nova Evangelização, um grupo de famílias da cidade de Campinas, SP, Brasil, constituiu em agosto de 1997 a Associação Cultural Nossa Senhora de Fátima. No ano seguinte a sede da entidade foi transferida para a capital paulista. Pelo favor de Maria Santíssima, em pouco tempo esta nova obra missionária irradiou-se por todo o País.

Name: CityLife Church
Description:
CityLife is a church that meets in multiple locations across the city of Melbourne. It's a place to call home. We are passionate about friends, family, life, following Jesus and making a positive difference in our world.

Our mission is to raise up fervent followers of Jesus Christ who will reach out and impact communities, cities and nations for the kingdom of God.

Name: Calvary Chapel Bible College
Description:
At Calvary Chapel Bible College, students are Established in Christ, Confident in Scripture, and Empowered for Witness — in person or online. 

CCBC offers academic programs that center on Scripture—training the next generation of pastors, missionaries, worship leaders, and Christian workers to live lives of eternal impact.

Founded in 1975 our college exists to cultivate biblical literacy, spiritual maturity, and a heart for the Great Commission. Whether students pursue an associate or bachelor’s program, they leave with more than just knowledge—they leave established in Christ, confident in Scripture, and empowered for witness.

Through in-person, online, and affiliate school options, CCBC is accessible to students around the world who desire to grow in their faith and calling.

Name: CityLife Church
Description:
CityLife is a church that meets in multiple locations across the city of Melbourne. It's a place to call home. We are passionate about friends, family, life, following Jesus and making a positive difference in our world.

Our mission is to raise up fervent followers of Jesus Christ who will reach out and impact communities, cities and nations for the kingdom of God.

Name: Youth Dynamics
Description:
Founded in 1970, Youth Dynamics serves youth and other organizations in the Northwest through relational adventure youth ministry to help youth discover life in Christ. Essential programs include professional outdoor adventures such as rafting, mountaineering, rock climbing, retreat ministry at Stonewater, a 158-acre adventure and retreat center in Leavenworth, WA., and strategic community-based outreach efforts. More than ever, students need experiences like those offered through Youth Dynamics to help them process life, navigate risk, engage with the outdoors, and create space to learn about themselves and God. We should all live to the fullest – let’s adventure together!  

Relational <> Adventure <> Youth Ministry

Name: Center for Earth Ethics
Description: The Center for Earth Ethics works at the intersection of values, ethics, and ecology to confront the climate crisis. Founded in 2015 at Union Theological Seminary, CEE centers the moral and spiritual dimensions of climate change, especially its impacts on Indigenous communities and other groups that have been underrepresented in policy-making. CEE encourages necessary changes in our culture and public policy, cultivates a more expansive and inclusive public consciousness, and prioritizes the well-being of all people and our planet.

Name: Diocese of Raleigh
Fiercely Catholic
Description:
Book a Fiercely Catholic program at your next conference, retreat, or other Catholic event.

Fiercely Catholic is a Catholic apostolate dedicated to teaching and sharing the Gospel of Jesus Christ and the Catholic faith through evangelization, catechesis, and apologetics.

"It is too true that I who write about the devout life am not myself devout, but most certainly I am not without the wish to become so, and it is this wish which encourages me to teach you. A notable literary man has said that a good way to learn is to study, a better to listen, and the best to teach. And St. Augustine, writing to the devout Flora, says, that giving is a claim to receive, and teaching a way to learn." - St. Francis de Sales, An Introduction to the Devout Life

Dr. Marc Tinsley is the director of Fiercely Catholic. Dr. Tinsley is not a perfect Catholic, a great Catholic, and maybe not even a good Catholic. But he’s Fiercely Catholic.

He is tired of the world influencing the Catholic Church instead of the Catholic Church influencing the world.

For decades, he has served his parish as a lector, extraordinary minister of the Eucharist, catechist, RCIA leader, newsletter publisher, social media coordinator, Baptism preparation instructor, and in a variety of other ways.

In 2003, he was nominated by his pastor and awarded the Catholic Diocese of Pittsburgh’s Manifesting the Kingdom Award by the Bishop of Pittsburgh.

He is a husband, a father, a son, and a brother.

He is a professional speaker and writer.

He looks forward to presenting a Fiercely Catholic program at your next conference, retreat, or other Catholic event.

“My job is to inform, not to convince.” - St. Bernadette Soubirous

Name: NHSF (UK)
Description:
NHSF (UK) was founded over 30 years ago because Hindu community leaders and students recognized that Hindu students had the potential to change the outlook of society. Upon launch, initial activities included campaigns and conferences that aimed to engage Hindu students with issues affecting society.

Today, we have grown to host over 4,000 active student members and form a network of thousands of alumni and professionals, all engaging in a variety of activities from campaigning and leadership development to bhakti (worship) and Sewa (selfless service).

NHSF (UK) works in a dynamic way on many different levels. At a university level, we work through our chapters that form the bulk of the NHSF (UK) family, i.e. Hindu societies. These chapters work independently to cater for the needs of their local student population whilst taking guidance and support from the National Committee. Beyond that, we categorize these chapters into one of four zones: North, Central, South and London. The purpose of these zones is to encourage interaction between members beyond the bounds of their university and encourage collaboration. Finally, nationally, we host 5 events including our national training days, sports competition, learning event and AGM as well as several national initiatives. These national initiatives allow members from across the country to share and converse with one another, regardless of the university they are based at, and are coordinated by the National Committee or NatCom.

Through each of these initiatives and platforms, we hope to encourage Hindu youth in Higher Education to contribute more to society and ultimately to our vision: to Protect, Preserve, Practice and Promote Hindu Dharma.

Name: Fellowship of Christian Peace Officers-USA
Description:
The Fellowship of Christian Peace Officers-USA (FCPO) is a nonprofit ministry dedicated to serving the nation’s 800,000+ law enforcement officers. As a nationwide movement, FCPO unites officers committed to representing Christ in their profession.

For over 50 years, FCPO has equipped officers in their faith journey through local chapters, biblical training, and a strong faith community. Our goal is to cultivate spiritual growth, provide biblical guidance, and enable officers to navigate their calling with integrity, resilience, and purpose—while advancing the Gospel in law enforcement.

Law enforcement officers often witness more tragedy, violence, and suffering in a week than most of us see in a lifetime. The stress of the job contributes to high rates of divorce, addiction, and even suicide, leading many officers to withdraw and isolate themselves, questioning their purpose and only trusting their own.

FCPO provides a lifeline—pointing to the hope found only in Christ and connecting Christian officers through local chapters, online communities, and faith-based resources. Officers are encouraged to see their profession as a divine calling, equipping them to serve, protect, and minister with a Christ-centered approach.

Christian officers have a unique opportunity to bring the love of Jesus into places civilians cannot. Imagine the impact if every officer responded with humility, respect, and Christ-like compassion—transforming their agencies, their family lives, and fostering trust within their communities.

Your tax-deductible gift to FCPO-USA provides biblical training, spiritual resources, and fellowship opportunities for Christian law enforcement officers nationwide. Together, we can strengthen their faith, equip them for Christian service and leadership, and help them share Christ’s love with their fellow officers.

Name: Jimmy Swaggart Ministries
Description: Estabilished in 1956, Jimmy Swaggart Ministries is an international, multi-media Ministry, reaching televsion, radio and internet audiences around the world through The SonLife Broadcasting Network, SonLife Radio network, local church services at Family Worship Center Church and through printed materials including, "The Expositor's Study Bible," "The Jimmy Swaggart Bible Commentary," "The Evangelist" magazine and others.

Name: Global Education Ministries
Description: Global Education Ministries exists to plant the gospel in the hearts of children and their families, all over the world, through quality education. We do this by starting gospel-saturated schools that provide affordable and accessible education for those we serve. Our teachers weave the gospel into their lessons as they teach a combination of American and national standards. Each GEM school is slightly different but our mission is always the same一 to make disciples of all nations! We have big plans to bring the gospel to as many communities as God will allow, but in order to do this we need individuals that are both passionate followers of Jesus and talented in their area of expertise who desire to use their gifts to be effective ministers of the gospel in our schools and offices around the world.

Name: The Church On The Way
Description: We're a diverse, intergenerational church with a Spirit-filled heritage and an ongoing commitment to prayer, worship, and the Word.

Name: Fellowship Church
Description:
The Vision of Fellowship Church

Our vision for Fellowship Church is simple. We exist to Reach Up, Reach Out, and Reach In. These three are the biblical mandates of the local church.

REACH UP
We work hard to provide an exciting and God-honoring environment for worship. When we worship God, we express our love and devotion to Him. What an honor it is to humbly come before the Creator of the Universe. All of us are wired for worship, and the only way we can express true love to God and worship Him is through a personal relationship with Jesus Christ.

REACH OUT
Another key purpose of Fellowship is to reach out to people who are outside the family of God. Every day, we rub shoulders with people who are just an invite away from a life-changing encounter with Christ. Invite your friends, family, neighbors and co-workers to attend Fellowship so they will hear and understand what it means to be a follower of Christ.

REACH IN
We also exist to help you, as a Christ-follower, grow in your spiritual maturity and become a full-court follower of Christ. Because the Christian life is one of constant growth and development, we are focused on providing biblical principles that can be applied to every day life. We want to help you move from a spectator in the stands to the game of active service.

Name: River Valley Church
Description:
The mission of River Valley Church is to lead people into an authentic, life-changing relationship with Jesus Christ.

What you’ll find at River Valley Church is a place where you can make life-changing relationships and find your purpose in life. You’ll also experience dynamic worship, inspirational messages and your children will love our fantastic programs designed just for them. We’re a relaxed church and we’re passionate about living our lives for God. There’s a place for YOU at River Valley Church!

Name: Archdiocese of Vancouver
Description: We continue to carry out the mission of the Catholic Church in Greater Vancouver. Our vision is focused on intentionally helping people experience God’s merciful love through four key ways: Making Every Sunday Matter, Getting Closer to Jesus, Strengthening Marriages and Families, and Developing Parish Leadership and Support.

Name: Anglican Diocese of Toronto
Description:
The Diocese of Toronto, founded in 1839, is the most populous of the 30 dioceses in the Anglican Church of Canada. Our geographical area extends over 26,000 square kilometres, stretching from Mississauga to Brighton and north to Haliburton.

To connect with us, visit our Facebook page at http://www.facebook.com/torontoanglican or follow us on Twitter or Instagram at @anglicandioTO.

For careers with the Anglican Diocese of Toronto, visit the Careers and Vocations page on our website: http://www.toronto.anglican.ca/about-the-diocese/careers-and-vocations/.

Name: Ada Bible Church
Description:
The mission of Ada Bible Church is to lead people into a relationship with God and His church that transforms them to Christ-likeness.

We have four locations spread throughout the greater Grand Rapids, MI area. With services at all campuses on Sunday at 9am and 11am, and services on Saturday at 5:30pm at our Cascade, Knapp Street and Kentwood campuses, there is a place for everyone.

For more information on our ministries, please visit our website.

Name: Free Chapel
Description:
Who we are.

Mission:
Inspiring people to live for Jesus.

Core Values:
1.  Never Hold Back.
2.  Live Life Together.
3.  Believe the Best in Others.
4.  Honor Yesterday, Inspire Tomorrow.


Vision:

1. Godly - We honor God and His word by living with integrity.
 2. Grace - We believe the best about people and make forgiveness a priority.
 3. Gathering - We are a family and do life together.
 4. Growing - .We build bigger people and teams with God's word.
 5. Generational - We honor those before us and inspire those behind us.
 6. Generous -  We value others through giving.
7. Guiding - We model healthy values to our community.
 8. Great - We serve God with excellence.

Name: New Wine Nederland
Description: New Wine is een stichting die kerken en geloofsgemeenschappen ondersteunt in geestelijke vernieuwing. Tot opbouw van Gods Koninkrijk.

Name: Christ Church
Description:
Founded in 1965, Christ Church is a multisite, non-denominational church in the Chicago suburbs with more than 6,000 members. We feature a variety of inspiring worship options including both classic and contemporary services. We offer all people the opportunity to build life-changing relationships with God and one another with a rich range of spiritual growth resources, and a selection of service ministries aimed at creating positive change in the world. 

Weekend services are held at our Oak Brook and Butterfield locations, as well as via livestream at www.christchurch.us/online. 
 
For employment opportunities, visit www.christchurch.us/joinourteam. It’s more than a career, it’s a calling.
 
For opportunities to serve, visit www.christchurch.us/serve. Help spread the love of God into all the world.

Name: Holy Trinity Boar Lane
Description: Holy Trinity Boar Lane is a church community for people working in Leeds. We have regular services and events, from church services on Tuesdays and Wednesdays, to our monthly business events - Boar Lane Breakfast - and more. We also offer chaplaincy to every person working in Leeds. Find out more at www.boarlane.church

Name: Kingdomcity
Description: We are one church in many cities around the world. Founded by Senior Leaders of Kingdomcity, Mark and Jemima Varughese in 2006. Our heart and vision is to connect, equip and empower people to bring the reality of God to their world. For more information about Kingdomcity, please visit us at kingdomcity.com

Name: Chabad On Campus International
Description: Our mission is to support the vibrancy and growth of Jewish student life on campus through the sustainability and success of Chabad Houses worldwide.

Name: The Bible Society of Egypt
Description: To make the Scriptures available and accessible to all, at an affordable price, in a language people can understand, and in formats and programs that can help each one grasp the message and effectively apply it.

Name: Archdiocese of Oklahoma City
Description: Archdiocese of Oklahoma City  - Representing the Catholic Church in central and western Oklahoma; archdiocesan offices, parishes, schools, ministries & organizations.

Name: Instituciones Olam Latino
Description:
Olam Latino es una institución sin fines de lucro, oficialmente reconocida por el Estado de Israel, que trabaja desde el 2012 con el propósito de reforzar el estudio de Judaísmo  y de colaborar a una mejor inserción de los Olim jadashim latinos que llegan a Eretz Israel. 
A través de sus diversos programas educativos y de apoyo económico y social, la organización  ayuda a mas de 250 personas de manera permanente, mejorando el bienestar espiritual y material de sus miembros.

Name: Yogoda Satsanga Society of India ( YSS )
Description:
Yogoda Satsanga Society of India (YSS) / Self-Realization Fellowship is founded by Sri Sri Paramahansa Yogananda, author of the renowned spiritual classic Autobiography of a Yogi. The mission of Yogoda Satsanga Society of India/Self-Realization Fellowship (the international organization founded by Paramahansaji to disseminate his teachings worldwide), is to make available to all the ancient scientific teachings of Kriya Yoga for attaining direct personal experience of God.  https://bookstore.yssofindia.org/product.php?mis=ebook

To cope with and overcome the challenges of a fast paced and potentially stressful lifestyle, the modern man is more than ever in need of divine guidance. Paramahansaji’s non-sectarian “how-to-live” teachings embody a complete philosophy and way of life for achieving all-round success and well-being, as well as a comprehensive system of yoga meditation techniques for achieving life’s ultimate goal. Visit at: https://yssofindia.org/

Name: Brentwood Baptist Church
Description: Our mission is to engage the whole person with the whole gospel of Jesus Christ anywhere, anytime, with anybody.

Name: Greater Europe Mission
Description: A community of disciple-makers that works through local ministries, churches, and partnerships to share the love of Jesus throughout Europe.

Name: Jesuit Conference
Description: We support the works of Jesuits and their collaborators across the United States and Canada in our ongoing mission to lead all people to God, accompany the poor and vulnerable, empower young people and care for creation.

Name: International Christian Concern
Description: Founded in 1995, International Christian Concern (ICC) is a non-denominational Christian human rights organization that is dedicated to helping Christian minorities who face discrimination and violence as a result of their faith. ICC provides assistance, seeks to raise awareness of religious persecution, and pressures the US government where needed. ICC is committed to building, supporting, and sustaining the persecuted church. It provides a wide array of financial support, from pastor’s salaries to village wells that are often off-limits to Christians. In the US, ICC tries to bring greater attention to religious persecution by disseminating information through its website, press releases, newsletter, and weekly email updates. ICC is also a strong voice in Washington; it lobbies the US government to push persecuting governments to change their behavior.

Name: Catholic Archdiocese of Perth
Description:
The Archdiocese of Perth, dedicated to the Immaculate Conception of the Blessed Virgin Mary, is located in Perth, the capital city of the State of Western Australia. It is bounded in the north by the Diocese of Geraldton, in the east by the South Australian border, and in the south by the Diocese of Bunbury and by the Southern Ocean in its south-east corner. Perth is the Metropolitan See for the Province of Western Australia which includes the Dioceses of Bunbury, Geraldton and Broome.
The Archdiocese covers 471,118 sq. kms and has a population of about 1.5 million, of whom about 365,000 are Catholics. The bulk of the population is in the capital city, however, the Archdiocese also includes extensive fishing, agricultural, pastoral and mining industries.

Name: Christnode
Description: Unfolding the Kingdom of God on Earth

Name: Healing Movement Ministry
Description:
The Year of Integrity

Bridging Generations to Fulfill The Great Commission

Name: Evangelisch-Lutherische Kirche in Bayern
Description: Wir sind als evangelisch‐lutherische Kirche Teil der weltweiten Kirche Jesu Christi, die ihr Selbstverständnis aus dem Evangelium von Jesus Christus gewinnt. Dabei orientieren wir uns an biblischen Bildern, die uns als Kirche leiten. Wir stehen in der reformatorischen Tradition, die sich in dem vierfachen „allein“ (allein Jesus Christus, allein die Heilige Schrift, allein durch die Gnade, allein durch den Glauben) verdichtet. Als Landeskirche stehen wir an unserem jeweiligen Ort mitten in der Gesellschaft.

Name: Diocese of Green Bay
Description:
The Diocese works to bring the Good News of Jesus Christ to all people by helping persons in need and by providing academic, leadership and spiritual formation opportunities to parish and school leaders.

-Mission-
The Catholic community of the Diocese of Green Bay, through the guidance of the Holy Spirit and in unity with the universal Church-

Boldly proclaims the Gospel of Jesus,
Prayerfully worships in word and sacrament,
And compassionately serves those in need,
in order to advance God's Kingdom of justice and love.

-Description-
The Diocese of Green Bay serves 304,614 Catholics in 16 counties: Brown, Calumet, Door, Florence, Forest, Kewaunee, Langlade, Manitowoc, Marinette, Menominee, Oconto, Outagamie, Shawano, Waupaca, Waushara and Winnebago.

Name: Norwich Cathedral
Description:
Art, culture, food, music, hospitality, learning & worship amidst #Norfolk’s favourite setting. One of England’s greatest cathedrals, where every visit is unique. Share yours #mycathedral.

Norwich Cathedral has welcomed visitors for over 900 years. The Cathedral is located in the heart of Norwich set in 44 tranquil acres by the River Wensum and continues to operate under the Benedictine principles of worship, learning and hospitality.

The stunning cathedral is one of the finest examples of Romanesque buildings in Europe, with the highest Norman tower and largest monastic cloisters in England, and is steeped in history having survived riot, war, plague and fire. There is a Herb garden and Japanese garden to discover and the Cathedral Library is open to all, providing access to over 30,000 books.

The Hostry, opened in 2009, combines old and new architecture providing a stunning venue for exhibitions, conferences, meetings, wedding receptions and private functions. The award winning Refectory Restaurant and Cafe is open to the public on a daily basis and also available for private hire and offers a spaces and airy place to meet combined with freshly cooked food, using local and seasonal produce. Located within the Nave, the Cathedral Shop contains a range of unique locally sourced products.

The Cathedral hosts a variety of events throughout the year, including concerts, recitals and festivals and further information can be found at www.cathedral.org.uk

Name: The Truth About Christianity Ministries
Description:
The Truth About Christianity Ministries is the World’s first Bible based Ecosystem that merges Ministry, Business, Biblical wellness, Education, and Digital outreach to restore people to God’s original design—MIND, BODY & SOUL.
Our structure includes multiple integrated divisions:
Healing Through Christ (retreats and recovery),
God’s Pharmacy Global (biblically inspired wellness products),
TempleHealth (faith-rooted health protocols),
MedicalVerseIO (a Christian wellness metaverse platform),
Biblical Healing Institute (certification in Christian naturopathy),

From physical healing, to business mentorship, to immersive discipleship environments, our ecosystem is designed to equip individuals, churches, and organizations with practical tools grounded in Scripture and aligned with Kingdom purpose.

We serve individuals, churches, and entrepreneurs seeking Gospel-aligned healing, growth, and impact. With a proven model and a growing global reach, we invite believers, investors, and partners to join us in building a Christ-centered ecosystem that heals, equips, and prepares the world for what’s next.

Whether you are seeking personal healing, spiritual growth, ministry tools, or a missional business model, you will find it here.

Our Vision
To build the most impactful, and spiritually grounded Christian ecosystem in the world—healing the nations, equipping leaders, and preparing the world for Christ’s return.

Connect With Us
Join our mission. 
Ministry Website: https://thetruthaboutchristianity.net
Business Ministry : https://business.thetruthaboutchristianity.net
Email: support@thetruthaboutchristianity.net
Book a meeting: https://calendly.com/thetruthaboutchristianity-support

Name: Peachtree Church
Description:
We believe an active, daily relationship with Jesus Christ is the means by which his followers will bring change to a world in need of love, hope, and joy. By growing in the knowledge and understanding of our faith and demonstrating the authenticity of our beliefs in service to each other and the world, we become partners with God in his great restoration project.

The Rev. Dr. Richard Kannwischer is the eighth Senior Pastor of the seven-thousand-member Peachtree Church in Atlanta, Georgia. one of the largest Presbyterian churches in the US. Richard has been a pastor for twenty-five years and has served congregations in Texas, California, and the NYC metropolitan area.

Name: Action International Ministries
Description:
ACTION is an evangelical, nondenominational missionary-sending agency that works in Asia, Europe, Latin America and Africa.

Our three-prong strategy for ministry can be summarized as: evangelism, discipleship, and development. 

We currently have 253 missionaries serving in 28 countries. Our offices are located in Seattle, Calgary, Liverpool, and Manila.

Name: Fondazione Pime Onlus
Description:
La Fondazione PIME Onlus gestisce le attività di raccolta fondi, culturali e di educazione alla mondialità del Centro Pime di Milano.
Opera in Italia e in tutti i continenti, specialmente nei Paesi dove sono presenti i missionari del Pime.

MISSIONE
La Fondazione PIME Onlus persegue esclusivamente finalità di solidarietà sociale operando nel settore della beneficenza. Sostiene le attività di soggetti che operano nell'ambito della cooperazione internazionale, dello svuluppo e delle adozioni a distanza, con particolare attenzione ai luoghi in cui sono presenti missionari del Pime e ai progetti da loro avviati. Attualmente operiamo in 17 Paesi in tutti i continenti. La Fondazione PIME interagisce anche con enti pubblici e privati, istituzioni e organizzazioni italiane, europee ed extraeuropee, sempre ed esclusivamente a fini benefici.

Alla Fondazione PIME Onlus fanno capo:

L'Ufficio Aiuto Missioni: provvede alla raccolta fondi da destinare alle strutture che operano nell'ambito della cooperazione internazionale, delle adozioni a distanza e dei progetti di sviluppo nei Paesi del Sud del mondo.

L'Ufficio Educazione Mondialità: opera in Italia rivolgendosi soprattutto, ma non solo, a bambini e ragazzi; propone percorsi di educazione all'interculturalità per sviluppare una società aperta ai problemi del mondo, della solidarietà e della pace.

Il Museo Popoli e Culture: ospita una collezione stabile di reperti da tutto il mondo, oltre a varie esposizioni temporanee.

La Biblioteca: conserva oltre 40.000 volumi antichi e moderni ed è specializzata sui Paesi in via di sviluppo e su temi missionario.

L'organo di comunicazione della Fondazione PIME Onlus è la rivista Mondo e Missione, una delle più antiche testate missionarie d'Italia.

Name: University United Methodist Church
Description: University United Methodist Church has been in ministry to the San Antonio area since it was founded as West End Methodist Church in 1890.  In 1974, the congregation started a satellite campus in northwest San Antonio – a satellite that would be chartered as University United Methodist Church in 1978.  Today, University is a 5800 -member congregation, drawing 3000 worshippers a week to its two campuses.  Its founding priorities of children, youth and community service continue to expand today through ministries like the largest Day School (2 yrs–K) program in San Antonio, the most prolific non-profit builder of Habitat for Humanity homes in the city, “Under the Bridge” homeless ministry, an accredited secondary school for students with learning disabilities and the founding of Magdalena House (a shelter for abused women and children).  University is currently expanding its u|ability ministry to the special needs community through Sunday schools, weekly worship, vocational training and “Helping Hands” servant ministry.  The congregation also sponsors several clinics and medical missions in both Mexico and Guatemala, and has mission enterprises in other regions and countries, including Rwanda, Russia and Costa Rica. n 2008, the 83,000 square foot North Campus opened as a venue targeted toward youth ministry, contemporary worship (with seating for 1500) and recreation evangelism (which includes u|sk8 – an indoor skateboard ministry).  University’s “Pathway to Discipleship” core curriculum and disciple development concept also launched that year.

Name: Orthodox Presbyterian Church
Description: Denomination of over 300 churches throughout the USA

Name: The Woodlands Methodist Church
Description: Since 1978, The Woodlands United Methodist Church (TWUMC) has been on mission to win people to Jesus Christ, disciple them in faith, and help those in need. TWUMC has grown to 14,000 members, offering 11 live worship services every weekend in three unique worship styles across two campuses. On Sundays, TWUMC streams three services (one in each style) live on YouTube. Throughout the week, TWUMC offers dynamic Christian programs for all ages, placing special emphasis on discipleship, missions and outreach. TWUMC also runs a licensed counseling center and an accredited pre-K – 8 private school. Learn more at thewoodlandsumc.org and on the church’s mobile app available on iOS, Android and Amazon app stores.

Name: Temple Beth Am
Description:
Temple Beth Am, the House of the People, was founded in 1955, and is located in the Village of Pinecrest in South Miami-Dade County.

Open to all, we are a nurturing and caring Reform congregation committed to Jewish continuity, life-long education, spiritual renewal, life-cycle transitions, Shabbat and holy day celebrations. Beth Am offers religious, educational, cultural, social and athletic programs that meet the dynamic needs of our community.

Both the Temple Beth Am Day School and the Temple Beth Am Religious School, with their cutting edge curricula and excellence in the areas of general and Judaic Studies, enhance the academic and religious development of our children. 

Our continuous desire to honor our traditions and embrace a full spectrum of Jewish life led us to the construction of a new Home for Our Heritage — The Janet z"l and Richard Yulman Campus — connecting Jews to Judaism and each other for generations to come.

Name: Devasmriti
Description: We at devasmriti, are collaborating with renowned temple priests, ensuring that every ritual and offering adhered to the sacred scriptures. Using technology, we aim to create a platform that allows individuals to participate in live-streamed pooja ceremonies from the comfort of their homes.

Name: Valor Media
Description:
The world is noisy, divided, and often discouraging. Families feel the weight. Faith feels pushed aside. And many quietly wonder if their influence really matters.

At Valor Media, we believe it does.

Every person has a God-given calling. Every family can be a light in the darkness. And when believers live with courage and conviction, entire communities are renewed.

That’s why we exist: to equip you and your family to live with valor—grounded in truth, rooted in Christ, and ready to impact both your local community and the wider culture.

We pursue this calling by:

Hosting biblical worldview conferences that inspire and equip families and young couples to stand firm in today’s culture.

Creating a media church experience for those seeking authentic Kingdom community when traditional church isn’t possible.

Building digital outposts where believers and seekers can explore cultural questions and encounter the hope of Christ.

Producing weekly podcasts, videos, and articles that connect timeless biblical truth with real-life challenges.

Engaging in local outreach, ministry gatherings, and community events to live out the Gospel in practical, personal ways.

Our vision is simple but powerful: families strengthened, communities renewed, and cultures transformed through Christ.

And this is where you come in. Whether you’re a parent, a volunteer, a donor, or someone longing for hope—you have a role to play. Your involvement, prayers, and partnership help us equip families, reach communities, and advance God’s Kingdom for generations to come.

 Learn more here:

Our Mission https://valormedia.org/valor-medias-mission/

What We Stand For https://valormedia.org/what-we-stand-for/

Valor Media https://valormedia.org/

Name: Center For Congregations
Description: The Center for Congregations is an Indiana nonprofit that works with congregations to help them find and use resources.

Name: Catholic Diocese Of Richmond
Description: The Catholic Diocese of Richmond encompasses all of the southern part of Virginia — including the Eastern Shore of Virginia. Our territory covers three-fifths of Virginia, some 36,000 square miles. On the east, borders stretch from the Chesapeake Bay and the Atlantic Ocean west to West Virginia and Kentucky; to the south, we border Tennessee and North Carolina, and extend north to the counties of Northern Virginia that comprise the Catholic Diocese of Arlington. Click here for a detailed map of the diocese.

Name: Living Word Christian Center
Description: Living Word Christian Center is a Word of Faith, non-denominational, full gospel church. Our mission is reaching and harvesting lost souls for Christ and teaching the Body of Christ how to effectively apply God's principles to have victory in every area of life. Living Word is a place where people can come to learn to use the Word of God as the Covenant of God, thus building a relationship with God, and not just being religious.

Name: Fellowship of Christian Athletes - Greater St. Louis
Description:
Where athletes and coaches connect and grow in their sport and faith in Jesus Christ.

Our 4 C's of the FCA ministry are: 

Camp Ministry

FCA Camps are a time of "inspiration and perspiration" for athletes and coaches to reach their potential by offering comprehensive athletic, spiritual and leadership training. For more than 20 years, the Greater St. Louis Area FCA has poured into student athletes' lives through spiritually-challenging, athletically-focused camps that deepen students' impact on their campuses.

Campus Ministry

Our vision is to see campuses impacted for Christ through athletes who know Him, model servant leadership, connect in fellowship, and honor God through sport. We serve huddle coaches, huddle officers and student-athletes on more than 150 campuses throughout the area and provide a variety of events for fellowship and outreach. 

Coaches Ministry

At the heart of FCA are coaches. Our role is to minister to these men and women by encouraging and equipping them to know and serve Christ. We minister to coaches through one-on-one meetings, coaches fellowship events, camp planning teams and Coaches Huddles.

Community Ministry

Our vision is to present Christ through huddle and chaplain ministry to strategic community athletic organizations (club sports organizations) where a close connection and relationship is built and leveraged ministry will happen.

Name: Small Group Network
Description: Founded by Saddleback Groups Pastor Steve Gladen, the Small Group Network is an international community that connects, equips & inspires Small Group Point People.

Name: Mooie Islamitische Profijtjes
Description: Simpele profijtjes die graag gedeeld worden met broeders en zusters!

Name: Global Disciples
Description: We train leaders living near least-reached communities to multiply disciples.

Name: Kingdom Ambassadors Centre
Description:
We are a Christ centred, Holy Spirit driven global church. Our values are based on the full doctrine of Jesus Christ, as laid out in the Holy Bible. We believe that every word written in the Holy Bible is true and should not be omitted or altered. We strongly believe in the power of prayer - KAC is a praying church who believe in the power of prayer as the fuel for revival. 

We are a community focused church - we value our brothers and sisters in our communities and various localities and seek to share the love of God with them. We are a family-oriented church - we do not have members, but view everyone as part of the KAC family. 

We believe that every believer forms an important part of the body of Christ and has a God-given potential for greatness, therefore we seek to encourage and strengthen this in each other.

Description: خدمة مجانية لتحفيظ القرآن الكريم

Name: Compass Christian Church
Description:
At Compass, our mission is Navigating People To God.

Every week thousands of adults, students, and kids attend Compass to worship together. We are community focused with campuses in Colleyville, North Fort Worth, North Richland Hills, and Roanoke.

Under the leadership of our Lead Pastor, Drew Sherman, each campus has a Campus Pastor who brings their own unique communication style while teaching through the same message series, big idea, and next steps at all campuses. We predominantly do live teaching, but you will experience a video message from time to time.

Name: Oklahoma Baptists
Description:
Oklahoma Baptists are a partnership of churches serving together under the Lordship of Jesus Christ to impact lostness with the Gospel by making disciples of all peoples.

Oklahoma Baptist churches work together through the Cooperative Program to support a wide array of missions, ministries and education within the state, nation and around the world. Joint efforts through Oklahoma Baptists include: evangelism, children’s homes, volunteer missions, missions education, new churches, colleges and universities, collegiate ministries, camps, and much more.

Name: Santuário Cristo Redentor
Description:
O Santuário Cristo Redentor é o primeiro santuário a céu aberto do mundo. Símbolo nacional dos sentimentos cristãos do país, é um espaço originalmente sagrado, que contou com grande participação dos fiéis e empenho da população do Rio de Janeiro para a sua construção. 

É lugar de celebrações cultuais e culturais, de caridade, de cultura, de diálogo ecumênico e inter-religioso, de peregrinação e de ecologia.

O monumento foi erguido com doações do povo brasileiro, entre 1926 e 1931, sendo inaugurado com a benção do Cardeal Leme, na presença do chefe de governo Getúlio Vargas, no dia 12 de outubro de 1931. 

Em 2006, no 75° aniversário da inauguração do monumento, o platô do Monte Corcovado foi reconhecido como um lugar sagrado, recebendo, por decreto de Dom Eusébio Scheidt, o título de Santuário Arquidiocesano do Cristo Redentor do Corcovado.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Faith Promise Church
Description:
This Real Love Movement is a resilient church burdened with an audacious vision to win the world,
starting with people and partners in East Tennessee communities and around the world.
 
We do this by…
Putting God First and creating an atmosphere for people to connect with God and experience life change at our campuses,
Growing Together in groups in homes,
Serving Others with a goal-oriented team,
Giving Generously to solve the real problems all around us,
and Telling Them (the people where we live, work, study, shop, and play) of Him (Jesus Christ).
 
If you are looking for a place and a people where faith and fun can impact life change, find out more how you can be a part by visiting our website.

Name: Cherry Hills Community Church
Description:
Cherry Hills Community Church is a ragtag group of people called to be defined by our love. We want to express love up to God in worship in a way that catches the attention of heaven. We work to extend love out to people by unleashing unprecedented levels of mission. And, we strive to experience love down in discipleship by reflecting on Scripture.

So, come as you are. Experience the love of God. And, when you’re ready, lend a hand.

Cherry Hills Christian Schools provide education from PreSchool through Middle School. We are committed to honoring Christ by teaching, encouraging, training and grounding students in God's truth within a dynamic, academic environment.

Connect with us on our other platforms. 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/chcc_org
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cherryhillscommunitychurch/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chcc_org/

Name: Calvary United Methodist Church
Description: Calvary is a beautiful historical church with stained glass windows established in 1889. We recently went through a million dollar sanctuary renovation to make the place even more beautiful. We do weddings, funerals, baptisms, and rent out facility for social events. We are singing a new song at Calvary. We are a multi-ethnic and inclusive church that blends traditional choir and organ music with contemporary sound of live worship band. We would love nothing else than to have you come and worship with us and be part of the growing and exciting faith community. If you have any question or if there is anything we can do to better serve you please contact us.

Description: Ministère d'évangélisation qui a pour but le salut des peuples non atteints par l'évangile de Christ

Name: Missio Nexus
Description:
The Great Commission is too big for anyone to accomplish alone and too important not to try to do together.

Our vision is to see missional leaders accelerating the fulfillment of the Great Commission in servant partnership with the church globally.

Our mission is to advance the effectiveness of the Great Commission community in North America in global mission.

The rich and diverse history of Missio Nexus gives us a strong foundation. And in coming together with you, we embrace the unity promise of Psalm 133, “For there the LORD bestows his blessing,” and the unity prayer of Jesus in John 17, “so that the world may believe.”

We invite you to join us on this journey as we explore the possibilities God is opening before us for shared learning, collaborative action and increased effectiveness through Missio Nexus.

Name: Christ Church
Description: non-denominational Christian

Name: The Shepherd’s Church
Description: The Shepherd’s Church is a fellowship of believers redeemed for eternity by Jesus Christ, equipped for life by the Word of God, empowered for ministry by the Holy Spirit, whose purpose for existence is in bringing glory to God and enjoying our abundant life in Him. Our various ministries and resources are designed to help chisel God’s Truth on each person’s heart so that our lives may better reflect His glory.

Name: Canterbury Cathedral
Description: Canterbury Cathedral is the Mother Church of the worldwide Anglican Communion and seat of the Archbishop of Canterbury. The Cathedral is both a holy place and part of a World Heritage Site. It is the home of a community of people who seek to make the Cathedral a place of welcome, beauty and holiness.

Name: Archdiocese for the Military Services, USA
Description: The Archdiocese for the Military Services was created by Pope John Paul II to provide the Catholic Church's full range of pastoral ministries and spiritual services to those in the United States Armed Forces. This includes more than 220 installations in 29 countries, patients in 153 V.A. Medical Centers, and federal employees serving outside the boundaries of the USA in 134 countries. Numerically, the AMS is responsible for more than 1.8 million men, women, and children.

Name: Archdiocese Of Liverpool
Description: The Archdiocese of Liverpool serves the Catholic Church in Liverpool, parts of Lancashire, north Cheshire and Greater Manchester and the Isle of Man

Name: Erzdiözese Freiburg
Description: Das Erzbistum Freiburg im Breisgau liegt im Südwesten Deutschlands in unmittelbarer Nachbarschaft zur Schweiz und zum Elsaß. In reizvoller geografischer Lage erstreckt sich das Gebiet vom Bodensee und dem Hochrhein im Süden über den Schwarzwald und die Oberrheinische Tiefebene bis hinauf in den Odenwald und an den Main im Norden. Das 1827 errichtete Erzbistum gehört zu jenen Bistümern Deutschlands, die in der nachnapoleonischen Zeit mit der Intention neu gebildet wurden, Bistums- und Ländergrenzen in Übereinstimmung zu bringen. So gesehen ist die Entstehung des Erzbistums Freiburg eng verbunden mit der Bildung des Großherzogtums Baden. Heute umfasst das Gebiet der Erzdiözese Freiburg weitestgehend den früheren Landesteil Baden sowie den ehemaligen hohenzollerischen Landesteil unseres Bundeslandes Baden-Württemberg.

Name: B'nai Jeshurun (New York)
Description:
Since our founding in 1825, B’nai Jeshurun (BJ) has been at the forefront of the American Jewish experience. As we approach our third century, our vision is focused on the spiritual work of transformation and on the creation of a Jewish path that is authentic, profound, and helps all members of our community seek and live their purpose to the fullest. Our spiritual leaders and our approximately 1,800 member households share a vision of a diverse, dynamic, and welcoming community that offers many paths to Jewish religious life.

Our unfolding vision for life after the pandemic imagines a dynamic mix of in-person and virtual prayer, learning, and programming that is accessible to all seekers wherever they are. As such, our staffing model is evolving to build and deliver this unique offering with excellence and care.

B’nai Jeshurun is committed to creating a staff culture and congregational community that is accessible, inclusive, and equitable. In particular, we have been on a journey over the past several years to understand the history and impact of racism in America, within the American Jewish community, and within the BJ congregation and staff in particular. We seek to build a community and staff that reflects and celebrates the diversity of America, as well as of the Jewish community, and are looking for team members who want to be part of our ongoing learning, and to contribute to it.

Name: Mesa Global
Description:
Mesa Global was founded on the idea of bringing people together. To align efforts in support of God’s redemptive work. To foster leaders who serve like Jesus. And to shape a church that surprises the world with Jesus’ love. We believe in the local church. We believe in its leaders. And we believe in the good that can happen when we all come around the table.

Our Mission
Equipping servant leaders with the Church for God's mission.

Our Vision
A flourishing Church in every place embodying Jesus' love for every person.

Name: Shalom Catholic Community
Description:
The Shalom Catholic Community belongs to the Catholic Church and is recognized by it as an "International Private Association of the Faithful" with legal personality, approved by Pontifical Council for the Laity, Family and Life, in accordance with Code of Canon Law, articles 215, 298, 299, 305 and 322.

With the mission of contributing to renewing the Church's evangelizing action, with new ardor, new methods and new expressions, it seeks to transform secular activities into means of evangelization and sanctification of the World, especially of young people.
Location: 130 Dioceses no Brasil • 38 países no mundo

Name: First Church of God
Description: At First Church, we love to create environments where you can connect to God and connect to others. That is why we provide multiple worship services, small groups that meet throughout the week, plenty of children's activities and a youth program that lives up to its name – EXTREME! We also present a myriad of opportunities to serve others within our church, our community, surrounding areas and even around the world.

Name: Saint Louis Abbey/Saint Louis Priory School
Description: Saint Louis Abbey is an English Benedictine monastic community in suburban St. Louis, Mo. The monks of the Abbey operate Saint Louis Priory School, a college preparatory institution for boys in grades 7-12. The school strives to provide students with an education of the highest caliber, supplemented with student activities, athletics and service opportunities in order for students to develop as a well-rounded individuals.

Name: Netwerk DAK, inloophuizen buurtpastoraat straatpastoraat
Description:
Inloophuizen, buurt- en straatpastoraten bieden een plek voor mensen in een kwetsbare situatie die vaak nergens anders gezien en gehoord worden. De overtuiging dat ieder mens waardevol is en recht heeft op een menswaardig bestaan is leidend voor het werk. 

Netwerk DAK is het netwerk van 150 inloophuizen, buurt- en straatpastoraten. Samen kunnen we elkaar helpen en versterken. Als lid van Netwerk DAK ben je onderdeel van ons uitgebreide netwerk met kennis en expertise over het werk van inloophuizen, buurtpastoraat en straatpastoraat.

Name: Scottsdale Bible Church
Description:
Since God began Scottsdale Bible Church in 1962, we have grown to more than 7,000 meeting weekly in 11 services on four campuses. Our goal is to share the message of hope and grace through Jesus to communities throughout the Valley. Our vision is to create a community of Christ followers marked by unwavering faith and unconditional love. Our key values are transformational Bible teaching, engaging worship, authentic community, and service-based outreach—all expressed through the context of grace.
 
God has richly blessed SBC with a legacy of missions and entrepreneurial ministries, many of which have been birthed out of this church. These ministries offer care and hope to the poor and marginalized; connection for those relocating to the Valley; resources for business professionals; encouragement to families, and more. We also support dozens of global missionaries and send hundreds of people each year on short-term teams to serve people and share the Gospel around the world.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Rochester
Description: The Diocese of Rochester extends from the southern shore of Lake Ontario, through New York's Finger Lakes region, and to the New York-Pennsylvania border. Established in 1868, the Diocese encompasses 12 counties and is home to approximately 350,000 Catholics.

Name: The Cambridge Matignon School
Description: Founded by the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Boston in 1947, The Cambridge Matignon School offers a world-class experiential education for high school students across Greater Boston. We instill in each student the lifelong agency to defend equity and equality above all, opening wide their minds and hearts to transform themselves and their communities. Efficiamur Christiferi. Let Us Be Christ Bearers. We will, because We Must

Name: Reasonable Faith
Description:
Reasonable Faith aims to provide in the public arena an intelligent, articulate, and uncompromising yet gracious Christian perspective on the most important issues concerning the truth of the Christian faith today, such as:

* the existence of God
* the meaning of life
* the objectivity of truth
* the foundation of moral values
* the creation of the universe
* intelligent design
* the reliability of the Gospels
* the uniqueness of Jesus
* the historicity of the resurrection
* the challenge of religious pluralism

Reasonable Faith features the work of philosopher and theologian Dr. William Lane Craig in order to carry out its three-fold mission:

* to provide an articulate, intelligent voice for biblical Christianity in the public arena.
* to challenge unbelievers with the truth of biblical Christianity.
* to train Christians to state and defend Christian truth claims with greater effectiveness.

Name: All In Ministries International Incorporated
Description:
We exist to equip women of all nations to be disciples who make disciples of Jesus Christ ----

This disciple-making movement started unintentionally.

With one step of obedience, we answered the call to go -- first to the Mayan jungle, then to South Asia, Africa, and the Middle east. What we saw changed us.

Women, in many cultures, are told they are “ruined” or a “burden” because they are born female. They are marginalized and oppressed. Never hearing they are loved, women think they have no value, and their lives do not matter. They feel hopeless and forgotten . . . until they encounter Jesus.

Sadly, women have little or no access to discipleship training to grow in their relationship with God. Cultural restrictions or limited resources keep them from learning how to know and share Jesus.

Since 2011, we've traveled around the globe, partnered with local churches, and taught the privileged and the poor to be disciples who makes disciples for Jesus. By God’s grace, we now also equip women to cross cultures and disciple under-resourced women.

We’re 90% volunteer-run and operate in a virtual culture to stay lean while expanding our global network. Our team is spread across the USA, from Alaska to Atlanta, and our in-country leaders live in Asia, Eastern Europe, and Africa, multiplying discipleship to forgotten women.

|| OUR AIM ||

Our immediate aim is for short-term and long-term mission trips to include a disciple-making training component for women.

|| YOU CAN HELP ||

You can help us spread the message and unleash others to go and serve women worldwide. How? If you are looking for an engaging presentation for your conference, college, or church, invite us to speak.* Or, use our free training materials to serve women on your next mission trip. We’d be honored to partner with you to glorify God by equipping others to be disciple-makers for Jesus.

Visit our website at allinmin.org

*Honorariums fund int'l discipleship conferences

Name: Diocese of York
Description:
With its network of parishes covering the country, the Church of England plays an active role in national life, bringing an important Christian dimension to the nation, as well as strengthening community life.  The Church is arranged into 41 areas, each under the care of a Bishop.

The Diocese of York takes in much of North and East Yorkshire, a diverse area which includes the bustling urban centres of York, Hull and Middlesbrough, the North Yorkshire Moors national park, and the incomparable Yorkshire Coast.    We are led and guided by the Archbishop of York, Stephen Cottrell.  York Minster is our principal church.

We are a family of clergy, churches, parishes and schools.  Our mission and ministry relies on relies on thousands of people - lay and ordained, volunteer and paid.  Our diocesan teams provide a wide range of support services, including training for ministry, advice on the care of church buildings, and safeguarding.

Together, we are striving to be a people who are “Living Christ’s Story”.  We are developing and delivering strategic programmes focused on our aims: Becoming more like Christ; Reaching those we currently don’t; Growing churches of missionary disciples; and Transforming our finances and structures.  We want to be a simpler, bolder, humbler church, which in its diversity reflects the communities it serves.    

Further information about the Diocese of York, what we do, and the people who work here can be found on our website: http://dioceseofyork.org.uk/

Name: Nashville Institute for Faith and Work
Description:
The Nashville Institute for Faith and Work is dedicated to helping individuals and groups integrate their Christian faith into their day-to-day work in a way that brings about human and organizational flourishing in Nashville and beyond. 

Considering that the average American will spend over 80,000 hours at work over his or her lifetime, it is important to view the workplace as an opportunity to renew individual hearts, communities, and the world. Some are energized by work while others deplore it; some see it as only a source of income while others see it as a source of self-definition and glorification. Understanding and embracing that all good work – not just ministerial, missionary, medical, or non-profit work – matters to God and is fundamental to joining Him in His redemptive plan for this world.

Name: Puja Pariseva
Description:
Any good work to start? Any wish to fulfil? Offer a puja to your God of Choice at any temple you prefer. With almighty’s blessing, you will surely win.  Pujapariseva.com will do the job for you. Our team of Pandits and Purohits will perform your puja, path, hom, yogya at any temple you desire. Just relax, stay home and visit pujapariseva.com.
 
Great news! Now you can offer Puja at any famous temple in India from your home only. Visit pujapariseva.com today. We shall perform all your religious tasks at minimum cost. You Just relax, stay safe at home.

Name: Central Conference of American Rabbis
Description:
The CCAR enriches and strengthens the Jewish community by empowering Reform Rabbis to provide religious, spiritual and organizational leadership as it:

• Fosters excellence in Reform Rabbis
• Enhances Reform Rabbis’ professional and personal lives
• Amplifies the voice of the Reform Rabbinate in the Reform Movement, the Jewish community and the world in which we live.

Name: The General Theological Seminary
Description: The General Theological Seminary has been at the heart of New York's Chelsea neighborhood for the last 200 years and is a spiritual oasis in the midst of America's largest city. Founded in 1817, General was the first seminary established by The Episcopal Church. The Seminary block, known as Chelsea Square, was donated by the primary Chelsea landowner, Clement Clarke Moore, best known as the author of "Twas the Night Before Christmas." Since 1822, General Seminary has graduated over 7,000 men and women, and we have alumni in service worldwide. In recent decades, an increasing number of seminarians study to serve Christ in lay ministries along with those who seek ordination.

Name: Meer Haris
Description: We provide solutions of your spiritual and psychological problems with scientific and professional approach.

Name: World Gospel Mission
Description: World Gospel Mission engages Christ-like disciples to transform the world. If you desire to step out in faith and go above and beyond, to be a part of something more than yourself, and to allow God to use you in mighty ways, then we want to help you take the next steps on your journey. It’s time to connect your passion with God’s plan for redemption. This is God’s best for us. We can equip and support you, helping you find the intersection of your passion and God’s heart.

Name: National Federation for Catholic Youth Ministry
Description: The NFCYM is a nonprofit, membership organization based in Washington, D.C. and founded in 1982. We serve those who serve the young church by providing resources and a network. Our members are affiliated Catholic dioceses, collaborating member organizations who share our mission, and the National Catholic Committee on Girl Scouts and Camp Fire. We also have subsidiary organizations, including the National Association for Catholic Youth Ministry, Catholic Youth Foundation USA, and CYO Sports.

Name: Alabama Baptist Children's Homes
Description:
For over 130 years, ABCH has been a leader in caring for children and families in need in the state of Alabama. Our mission is to protect, nurture, and restore children and families through Christ-centered services. 

YOU can be a part of this important work. Find out your next step in serving children and families in need by visiting our website: www.alabamachild.org/nextstep

Name: Asmaul Husna Academy
Description:
Asmaul Husna Academy is an Islamic academy that teaches the Asmaul Husna, which are the 99 names of Allah in Islam. The academy aims to help Muslims learn and understand the names of Allah and their meanings so that they can develop a deeper connection with Allah and improve their worship

আল্লাহকে চিনতে না পারার কারনেই মানুষ আল্লাহর অবাধ্য হয়, শিরকে লিপ্ত হয়। এমনকি যারা ঈমানদার তাদের মধ্যেও অনেকে দাড়ি রাখে কিন্তু সুদ খায়, নামাজ পড়ে কিন্তু পর্দার বিধান মেনে চলতে চায়না, রোজা রাখে কিন্তু মিথ্যা বলে, অন্যের দোষ চর্চায় ব্যস্ত থাকে, আল্লাহর উপর ভরসা করার দাবি করে কিন্তু একটু সমস্যায় পরলেই দুশ্চিন্তা ও হতাশায় জর্জরিত হয়। কেউ কেউ ঈমান আনার পরেও সন্দেহে পতিত হয়। আল্লাহর পরিচয় সম্পর্কে জ্ঞানের অভাবই এর অন্যতম প্রধান কারণ। বাচ্চা আগুণকে ভয় পায় না আগুনের পরিচয় না জানার কারনে। তেমনি মানুষ আল্লাহকে ভয় পায়না আল্লাহ সম্পর্কে না জানার কারনে। 
তাই আল্লাহর নাম ও গুণাবলী জানা ও জানানো, শেখা ও শেখানোর দ্বারা প্রথমত নিজের অতঃপর সকল মানুষের আত্মিক পরিশুদ্ধির মাধ্যমে দুনিয়া ও আখেরাতে কল্যাণ ও নিরাপত্তা লাভের আশায় ‘আসমাউল হুসনা একাডেমি’র যাত্রা শুরু। আমরা আশা করি আল্লাহর পরিচয় ঈমানহারা ব্যাক্তির জন্য হবে পথের দিশা, ঈমানদারের জন্য হবে ঈমান মজবুত হওয়ার কারণ।
প্রথমেই আমরা চেষ্টা করেছি কুরআন ও হাদিস থেকে দলিল সহ আল্লাহর নাম গুলো খুজে বের করতে। আমরা প্রায় ২৫০ এর অধিক আল্লাহর নাম খুজে পেয়েছি যার প্রতিটি কোরআন বা হাদিসে রয়েছে। আল্লাহর নাম পরিচয় বিশ্বময় ছড়িয়ে দিতে, এর প্রভাব ও গুরুত্ব সম্পর্কে সচেতনতা তৈরি করতে, আল্লাহর নাম পরিচয় অধ্যয়নে মানুষকে উদ্বুদ্ধ করতে এবং সকল শ্রেনী, পেশা, ও বয়সের উপযোগী প্রয়োজনীয় উপকরণ প্রস্তুত ও সহজলভ্য করতে নানামুখি কার্যক্রম পরিচালনার চিন্তা আমাদের রয়েছে।

Name: HGJB
Description:
‘Samen geloven in de kerk van nu’. Dat is de boodschap van de HGJB voor de komende jaren. Samen met gemeenten, ambtsdragers en jeugdleiders willen we jullie helpen om met en voor God te leven. 

Dat gaat niet zomaar. Leven met God is niet altijd gemakkelijk. We mogen leren en ontdekken wie God is, wie we zelf zijn en waarom God ons oproept tot een leven met God als bron. De HGJB wil kinderen, tieners en jongeren stimuleren tot een dienstbaar leven, waarin je leert om hun gaven en mogelijkheden in dienst te stellen van Gods Koninkrijk. 

Samen, met elkaar dus. In de kerk, dat ook, de HJGB is actief in gemeenten. En nú, ook in 2016, sinds 1910. Op Facebook en Youtube.

Name: Operation Mobilization Canada (OM Canada)
Description:
OM’s role in the Church is to mobilize people to share the knowledge of Jesus and His love with every generation in every nation. OM pioneers and leads initiatives to redeem lives, rebuild communities, and restore hope in over 147 countries, and on board OM's ships.

Almost 5,500 people of 95 nationalities are serving with Operation Mobilisation in over 110 countries to bring a message of hope to the peoples of the world. We have one thing in common—we love Jesus and we want others to have the opportunity to hear about Him.

Through literature, the creative arts, friendship, Bible studies, videos, social media, correspondence courses, relief and development work, and much, much more—by all means possible we will tell people how our lives have been changed—and how they can meet Jesus.

We invite you to join with us as we work to see vibrant communities of Jesus followers among the least-reached areas of the world.

Name: Trinity Anglican Seminary
Description: Trinity Anglican Seminary is an evangelical seminary in the Anglican tradition with 80-100 residential students at our campus in Ambridge, PA, which is 25 miles north of Pittsburgh. We also have 70+ online students and 70+ students in the DMin program. We have 1200+ alumni working in churches and ministries around the world.

Name: GİMDES
Description: GİMDES is a company based out of Turkey.

Name: Wycliffe Canada
Description:
Wycliffe links the Canadian Church with the world's minority language groups, to see community transformation through Bible translation, use of translated Scriptures, mother-tongue literacy and education.
