People in nearly 1,800 language groups still wait for Scripture in their language. It's time to accelerate the pace of Bible translation.

Name: Sanctuaire Sainte-Thérèse de Lisieux
Description: Notre mission : faire connaître aux pèlerins du monde entier les lieux, les écrits et les reliques de Sainte Thérèse de l'Enfant-Jésus, la "plus grande sainte des temps modernes", pour cheminer sur sa "petite voie" spirituelle. Page officielle du Sanctuaire.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Raleigh-Durham
Description:
C-Suite for Christ is an international fellowship for Christian business executives. There are many ways to join our movement. Help us in our mission of being open about our faith and covering the world in Christ.

Get Involved:
1. Attend a monthly gathering.
Join us the first Tuesday of each month via livestream or at 8045 Arco Corporate Drive, Raleigh, NC. Connect with other Christian business leaders.
2. Become a member.
If you are a follower of Jesus Christ and have a significant level of responsibility in your organization, become a member of C-Suite For Christ. Attend our monthly meetings and learn from other members through robust discussions around shared issues of similar complexity and significance.
3. Start a chapter in your city.
Our C-Suite for Christ family is growing. Do you feel a call to help cover the world in Christ? We’re nurturing the beginnings of several new chapters of C-Suite for Christ across the U.S. God is indeed on the move! Plant a chapter near you. Licenses are exclusive to your city. Spots are filling up fast, reserve your area today.
4. Create a corporate partnership.
Invest in your faith and get in front of Christian executives through our partnership opportunities.

For information regarding who we are, our meetings, and membership benefits, please visit our website, or contact Market President Daniel Simon at 908-216-2116 or dsimon@csuiteforchrist.com.

If you’re interested in starting a chapter in your city or creating a corporate sponsorship, contact Founder Paul M. Neuberger at 414-313-8338 or pneuberger@csuiteforchrist.com.

Name: KiemPlaats
Description: Gelovige opvoeders hebben goud in handen. Zij kunnen bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van een stevige identiteit van jongeren. Dat kan op allerlei plekken: denk aan kerken, kampen, scholen, online communities, families en gezinnen. Zo’n stevig gewortelde identiteit is niet vanzelfsprekend in onze samenleving. KiemPlaats versterkt organisaties en opvoeders, zodat kinderen en jongeren groeien, bloeien en vruchtdragen in de samenleving. Dit doen we door o.a. het geven van workshops, webinars, lezingen, cursussen & trainingen, advies en conceptontwikkelingen.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Charlotte
Description: The Diocese of Charlotte encompasses the 46 counties of the western half of North Carolina, bordering Virginia, Tennessee, Georgia and South Carolina, with more than 500,000 Catholics in 93 parishes and missions spread across 20,700 square miles. We operate 20 schools and more than 50 ministries and programs – including food banks, counseling, affordable housing, prison ministry, youth and elder ministry, campus ministry, anti-poverty efforts, refugee resettlement, teen pregnancy support, pro-life advocacy and, new in 2022, a Family Life Office. Founded in 1972, the diocese features wonderful diversity: about half of parishioners are of Hispanic heritage, but our diocesan family includes people from nearly every continent. We have also welcomed other particular churches sui iuris with liturgical rites reflecting the universality of the Catholic Church.

Name: Real Life Catholic
Description: Founded by Chris Stefanick, Real Life Catholic exists to share the love of Jesus and to help others do the same. We inspire, equip, and empower everyday people to live and share the joy of the Gospel through media, live events, and through our Missionaries of Joy.

Name: Urban Youth Workers Institute
Description: UYWI exists to develop urban leaders so that urban youth have the role models they need to live transformed lives by the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Name: MissieNederland
Description: Evangelische alliantie die, vanuit passie voor Gods missie, evangelisch Nederland verbindt, versterkt en vertegenwoordigt

Name: Diplomats for Christ
Description: Reconciling nations to Jesus Christ

Name: Northshore Community Church
Description:
Join us on Sundays online or in person at 9:00 & 10:30 am PST.

We are a church that loves Jesus and loves people. Here at Northshore, everybody’s welcome and nobody’s perfect, which means you can come as you and be loved as you are. And we want to do everything we can do to help you become all that God has created you to be.

Name: The Journey
Description:
We are a church just west of St. Louis, Missouri. Our heart is simple: we want you to enjoy God's grace, embody his love to one another, and engage your culture as an ambassador of Christ.

The way we do that is also simple, and ultimately, this is our prayer for you: that you would love being with Jesus. That you would begin to do the things that Jesus did when he was here on earth. And then, as you go about your work and life that you would link arms with Jesus and partner with him to see his kingdom come in your life, in St. Louis, and in this world.

Name: JALW Consultancy
Description:
Welcome to JALW Consultancy's LinkedIn page! We are a consultancy that is passionate about supporting churches, ministries, and other organizations in fulfilling their vision. Our mission is to help our clients set up and implement structures and systems that improve their operations and ultimately lead them to success.

At JALW, we provide comprehensive services that encompass every aspect of our clients' organizations, including Ministry Vision Development, Strategic Planning, Governance, Leadership Training, Administration, Financial Accountability, Team building, Multimedia, social media, Relevancy, and Publishing. We believe in the scripture, as Proverbs 24:3-4 says, "By wisdom a house is built, and through understanding, it is established; through knowledge, its rooms are filled with rare and beautiful treasures." We believe that our God-given knowledge, wisdom, and skills are essential in helping our clients fulfill their God-given vision for their church or ministry.

Follow us to stay updated on our latest projects and learn how we can help your organization achieve its goals.

Name: CUF
Description:
Catholics United for the Faith (CUF) was founded in 1968 to support, defend, and advance the efforts of the Roman Catholic Church in teaching the faith and helping lay Catholics live holy lives. 

CUF publishes the award-winning magazine, Lay Witness, and produces great Catholic books through its publishing arm, Emmaus Road Publishing (www.emmausroad.org).

Name: Erzbistum Köln
Description:
Das Erzbistum Köln ist eine der ältesten und mitgliederstärksten Diözesen Deutschlands. Rund 60.000 Mitarbeitende sind hauptamtlich in unterschiedlichsten Bereichen tätig, darunter Seelsorge, Bildung, Verwaltung, Bauwesen, IT und Kultur. Allein im Erzbischöflichen Generalvikariat arbeiten etwa 800 Fachkräfte in zentralen Aufgaben wie Personalmanagement, Finanzverwaltung und strategischer Planung.

Zu den Berufsfeldern zählen neben klassischen kirchlichen Berufen wie Priester, Diakone oder Pastoralreferenten auch moderne Tätigkeiten in IT, Architektur, Kunstmanagement oder Archivwesen. Mit Einrichtungen wie dem Kunstmuseum KOLUMBA und der Diözesanbibliothek bietet das Erzbistum zudem attraktive Arbeitsplätze in Kultur und Wissenschaft.
Unsere Mission: Glaube leben, Gemeinschaft stärken, Zukunft gestalten – für eine Kirche, die sich den Herausforderungen der Gegenwart stellt.

Name: Congregation of Holy Cross, US Province, Inc.
Description:
We are an apostolic, Roman Catholic community of priests and brothers, who
with zeal and a preferential option for the poor, work to make God known,
loved and served in our education, parish and mission communities across the
United States and around the world.

Name: Christ Chapel Bible Church
Description: Jesus over everything. We are a church committed to being disciples, making disciples and reaching out to our communities and world for the glory of God. Compelled by the gospel, we exist to make much of Jesus in every area of our lives – in the highs, the lows and everywhere in between.

Name: School Sisters of Notre Dame
Description:
“Urged by the love of Christ, we choose to express our mission through ministry directed toward education. For us, education means enabling persons to reach the fullness of their potential as individuals created in God’s image and assisting them to direct their gifts toward building the earth.”
You Are Sent, C 22

Name: Islamic Council
Description:
Muslims living in the West have long called for providing solutions through Islamic guidance. The Islamic Council are here to answer that call and to provide real contextualised solutions and guidance on issues facing Muslims in the West. 

Just as the lives of Muslims in the West are steeped in challenges around managing relationships, the challenges around everyday living, daily transactions and finding halal alternatives are just as important. Within this reality, what began as a family support service to help couples navigate through difficult periods in their relationships with the Islamic Family Law framework, the Islamic Council has now expanded its services and ventured into the realms of Islamic Business and Finance Law.

The Islamic Council provides a professional support and advice service with experienced and qualified Islamic Advisors on matters including:

- Marriage, Divorce and Relationship Reconciliation
- Business and Trade Transactions
- Islamic Finance and Shari'ah Compliancy
- Family and Inheritance Arbitration
- Formulating Contracts within an Islamic Law Framework

 ICeurope.org
 +44(0)208 610 9870
 enquiries@iceurope.org

Name: Evangelisch College
Description: Het Evangelisch College is een interkerkelijk opleidingsinstituut dat (deeltijd)opleidingen en cursussen aanbiedt op het gebied van de Bijbel, Theologie, Missionair Werk en Pastoraat.

Name: The Bible society of Ghana
Description:
The Bible Society of Ghana is a non – denominational Christian organization registered under the Trustees Act, 1962 of the Republic of Ghana. It exists to make God’s Word available and affordable and encourage its use.

The Bible Society of Ghana is an affiliate member of the United Bible Societies, operating in 200 countries

Name: University Christian Church
Description:
A congregation of the Christian Church (Disciples of Christ) adjacent to the campus of Texas Christian University.

Our Vision
Transforming the world by living out Christ’s courageous love.

Our Mission
Seek the Sacred • Commit to Love • Empower to Serve

Core Values
Discipleship
As members of the Christian Church (Disciples of Christ), we are committed to following Jesus Christ with open minds and loving hearts as we work to bring about wholeness in a fragmented world.

Curiosity
We don’t pretend to have all the answers, and we don’t shy away from big questions about who God is and what God is calling us to do.

Inclusivity
God created you to be you. We welcome all people, understanding that our conversations and relationships, and thus our work, become richer when we listen to each other, rather than when we turn people away.

Vulnerability
Together we create brave spaces where we can be honest and open about where we are on our spiritual journey. It is in these brave spaces where we do the work of discernment to uncover what God is calling us to do, both as individuals and as a community of faith.

Generosity
We respond to God’s abundance with gratitude as we invest in God’s calling for our community. Our giving doesn’t begin and end with our finances. We commit our spiritual gifts and talents back to God.

Compassion
Jesus’ compassionate spirit is at the heart of everything we do. We are called to care for one another as we experience each other’s vulnerability, and we are equipped to carry that compassion into the world.

Name: NRB International Christian Media Convention
Description: The NRB International Christian Media Convention is the world's largest gathering of Christian communicators. Join us February 17-20, 2026, at the Gaylord Opryland Resort & Convention Center in Nashville, Tennessee.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Calgary
Description: Established in 1912, Roman Catholic Diocese of Calgary stretches 110,00 square kilometers, spread across southern Alberta. Comprised of over 400,000 Catholics, 68 parishes and 11 missions, the diocese is led by Bishop Frederick Henry.  The Roman Catholic Diocese of Calgary has many offices that provide administration, pastoral care, and services that strengthen our Diocese.

Name: Resurrection Life Church
Description:
Resurrection Life Church exists to develop committed followers of Jesus Christ to reach the world.

Service times:
    • Wednesdays - 6:30 PM
    • Sundays - 9:30 & 11:30 AM and 5:00 PM
    • Sunday (Español) - 11:30 AM

Name: Conwell-Egan Catholic High School
Description: In 1966, because of the burgeoning population in the Lower Bucks County area, Bishop Egan was separated into two schools: Bishop Egan for boys, located in a new facility in Fairless Hills, and Bishop Conwell for girls, located in the original building in Levittown. Twenty-seven years later in 1993, the two schools were merged to form Conwell-Egan Catholic High School. Conwell-Egan Catholic continues its mission of providing the best possible Catholic education for secondary students in the Lower Bucks County area and beyond.

Name: Nordkirche
Description:
Wir sind die Evangelisch-Lutherische Kirche in Norddeutschland  

Mit mehr als 90.000 Mitarbeiter:innen sind wir eine sichere Arbeitgeberin zwischen Nord- und Ostsee. Dabei bieten wir Dir sinnstiftende Jobs, gute Arbeitsatmosphären und das besondere Gefühl, etwas Gutes zu tun. 

Für Euch posten Victoria Bieler (Stellenvermittlung der Nordkirche), Julia Ahmed (Nachwuchsförderung der Nordkirche) und Oliver Quellmalz (Social Media Manager der Nordkirche).

Name: Student Mobilization
Description: Non-profit college organization in the Central and Midwest United States developing students in leadership, character, and spirituality.

Name: UPPERROOM
Description: Upperroom Global is a prayer and worship movement that exists to see God’s presence transform cities.

Name: Stephen Wise Temple and Wise School
Description:
Founded in 1964, Stephen Wise Temple is one of the largest Reform Jewish synagogues and schools in the world. The Wise community consists of a thriving congregation; Wise School (a top-tier K-6 elementary school and Early Childhood Center); Center for Youth Engagement (including Religious School, teen programming, and Camp Wise); weekly worship services; and hundreds of opportunities for deep learning, tikkun olam (social justice/helping those in need), and Jewish engagement throughout the year. With 1,600 member families and more than 170 regular employees, Wise is known for its extensive educational, spiritual, and musical programs designed for individuals, couples, and families at all stages of life.

The Wise campus is located on 19 beautiful acres atop the Mulholland Corridor of the Santa Monica Mountains and includes the state-of-the-art Katz Family Pavilion for athletic activities and diverse major events. The community founded by Rabbi Isaiah Zeldin is now led by Rabbi Yoshi Zweiback and a committed team of educators, administrators, and lay volunteers.

Wise makes meaning and changes the world.

Name: Lexington Theological Seminary
Description:
Lexington Theological Seminary is the oldest seminary of the Christian Church (Disciples of Christ), leading the newest form of online education, shaping church leaders with excellent & flexible programs. 

Lexington Theological Seminary is an ecumenical seminary that thankfully embraces the wide diversity of denominations and theological perspectives.

The Seminary offers a unique family of programs with flexibility to meet the diverse needs of people who wish to pursue a theological education. We are sensitive to the unique needs of students at various stages of life:  recent college graduates, second-career seekers and persons in special situations. Students are not required to move to campus to complete their theological education. 

The Seminary attempts to integrate theological study with ministerial practice and personal faith formation. Every course contributes directly to the formation for ministry and the practice of ministry while providing a critical foundation for theological reflection and for relating one’s own leadership to that of the church.

Coursework is explicitly linked to the congregation in which a student is participating. Students go beyond simply understanding the Scripture, theology or how to prepare a sermon; students learn to interpret the concepts being studied for the Church and to apply that knowledge in the actual setting of their congregation.

Name: One Mission Society
Description: One Mission Society is an international missions organization dedicated to making disciples of Jesus Christ around the world. With ministry in more than 70 countries, One Mission Society seeks to empower local Christians to follow Christ and make disciples. We’re passionate about seeing the Great Commission fulfilled, and we’re looking for teammates who excel in their fields and want to use their gifts and abilities for kingdom impact.

Name: Reign Ministries
Description:
Reign Ministries is a non-denominational mission organization based in Minneapolis. Fueled by over 30 years of unbridled enthusiasm for students, Reign has successfully discipled youth and trained youth workers to minister in their local church and abroad. We passionately believe such disciples will be tomorrow's history makers for Christ.

OUR MISSION
We are building and advancing the kingdom of God by developing youth and youth leaders who have great commandment hearts and live great commission lifestyles.

OUR VISION
Fueled by nearly forty years of unbridled enthusiasm, both for teenagers and the local church, we have discipled youth and trained youth workers for a lifetime of ministry. Our vision is to:

Expose students to the world's burning need for a Savior,
Equip them to meet that need through discipleship,
Ignite in them a passion to serve and
Send them home to be actively involved in ministry and impact their world for Christ.

OUR HISTORY
As a youth pastor, Revered Louie Inks wanted his students to experience a mission trip overseas, but he was unable to find an organization that emphasized discipleship and evangelism the way he envisioned. So in 1980, he organized and led the trip himself. He found that this 8-week summer mission trip had a profound impact on the lives of his students, in part because of the focus on ministry, emphasis on discipleship, all in an environment outside their comfort zone. Louie founded Reign Ministries in 1981 and the first official Royal Servants mission trip was launched in 1982. That trip was composed of 44 students and staff, over half of whom, amazingly, later became involved in full-time vocational ministry. Reign Ministries was a result of the conviction that God can (and wants to!) use teenagers as ambassadors for His Kingdom and 40 years later, we still believe it.

Name: The Summit Church
Description: The Summit Church is one church that meets in many locations in the Triangle. Following the Holy Spirit, we exist to create a movement of disciple-making disciples in RDU and around the world.

Name: Children of God
Description: In search for the Children of God come one come all for God is always listerning?

Name: Exeter Cathedral
Description: A vibrant community hub and a world-class heritage destination, Exeter Cathedral has been at the heart of Devon for nearly a thousand years. Now, as then, it offers a refuge for reflection, a place for prayer, and a stage for artists, performers and musicians. It has witnessed a fascinating history and remains home to a living faith, a place for learning and a retreat for relaxation. Exeter Cathedral is, at once, a centre of innovation and of ancient treasures; telling stories of the past while carefully conserving them for the future. Innovatively sharing its secrets to welcome a new generation.

Name: Cherry Hills Community Church
Description:
Cherry Hills Community Church is a ragtag group of people called to be defined by our love. We want to express love up to God in worship in a way that catches the attention of heaven. We work to extend love out to people by unleashing unprecedented levels of mission. And, we strive to experience love down in discipleship by reflecting on Scripture.

So, come as you are. Experience the love of God. And, when you’re ready, lend a hand.

Cherry Hills Christian Schools provide education from PreSchool through Middle School. We are committed to honoring Christ by teaching, encouraging, training and grounding students in God's truth within a dynamic, academic environment.

Connect with us on our other platforms. 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/chcc_org
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cherryhillscommunitychurch/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chcc_org/

Name: Diocese of Providence
Description: The Roman Catholic Church serving all of Rhode Island through more than 160 churches, schools, and other ministries.

Name: Ummah Professionals
Description: We are a non-profit organization that strive to bring together Muslims students and professionals and form an Ummah-wide network of collaboration and career development. We connect experienced Muslim professionals who want to give back to their community with younger students and professionals who can benefit from their knowledge and experience.

Name: Bellevue Baptist Church
Description:
Bellevue's mission is to Love God, Love People, Share Jesus and Make Disciples.

Our vision at Bellevue is to be a catalyst for spiritual awakening in Memphis and Beyond. You can learn more about our vision by going to www.bellevue.org/ourvision today.

Join us for weekly services in-person or through livestream on Facebook or YouTube Saturdays at 5pm and Sundays at 9 and 11am.

Name: The Evangelical Catholic
Description:
Put simply, lay Catholics have a secular vocation, meaning they are called in a special way to the world. As sharers in the Church’s mission of evangelization, they perform this mission in the world—in their workplaces, homes, classrooms, sports teams, families, neighborhoods, etc.—rather than as part of parish or ministry structures.

The Church calls this missionary activity "apostolate." Lay Catholics have a unique mission that only they, not their pastor or parish staff, can fulfill. And even more particular than the laity’s mission to the world, each one of them has a unique circle of influence they can reach that no one else can. This is their personal apostolate.

The Evangelical Catholic is increasing the number of lay apostolates in the world through: 1) consulting clergy and parish staff in identifying mission-minded parishioners and inviting them into deeper discipleship; 2) preparing lay Catholics for this unique mission through formation and training; and 3) providing care and support for clergy, parish staff, and lay Catholics as they are sent into mission.

At The Evangelical Catholic, we envision a world where faithful lay people understand the call to be laborers (Matthew 9:37) and are equipped and empowered to bring Jesus to the world as the salt and the light of their communities.

Name: Sandals Church
Description:
People discover a real and awesome life at Sandals Church because God is working through a small group of dedicated staff that embodies the vision of being real with ourselves, God and others and mobilizes God’s people to serve his church.

Ranked among The Press-Enterprise’s Top Workplaces for the last 4 years, Sandals Church is proud to offer a distinct employment experience that encourages employees to leverage their unique gifts and talents.

Name: Archdiocese of Omaha
Description: Founded as a diocese in 1885, the Archdiocese of Omaha serves spiritual and human needs in a 23-county area of Northeast Nebraska. Through its 140 parishes and missions, the archdiocese reaches out to 227,000 Nebraska Catholics. With two Catholic universities, 57 elementary schools, 17 high schools and a parish-based religious education program within its boundaries, Catholic education enriches the lives of some 58,000 young people. The Archdiocese of Omaha is one of the largest private social service providers in the region. Catholic Charities and the Family Life Office lead a network that ministers to the broadest and most fundamental needs of our community. Generous support to the Annual Appeal is symbolic of the collective faith that allows the Archdiocese of Omaha to continue the mission of Jesus Christ.

Name: One Path Dallas-Fort Worth
Description: We believe in faithfully sharing the love of Jesus through our actions as business leaders and collaborate to strengthen each other and our business communities through fellowship, discipleship, and education.

Name: Abbaye de Keur Moussa
Description:
Fidèles à la tradition et au savoir-faire monastique pluriséculaire, les moines de Keur Moussa sont heureux de vous proposer le fruit de leur prière et de leur travail:
Des jus de fruits naturels à la saison; 
Des apéritifs exotiques au différent parfum, bien de chez nous. 
Des digestifs locaux et tonics.
Des fruits séchés, 
Du fromages de chèvres, 
Pratique de la phytothérapie: médicaments à base de plantes 
Fabrication de Koras modernes, 
Production de CD.
Faithful to the tradition and the centuries-old monastic know-how, the monks of Keur Moussa are happy to offer you the fruit of their prayer and their work: Natural fruit juices in season; Exotic aperitifs with a different flavour, very local. Local digestives and invigorating drinks. Dried fruits, Goat cheese, Phytotherapy: herbal medicines, Modern Koras production, CD production.

Name: Lake Institute on Faith & Giving
Description: Lake Institute on Faith & Giving fosters a deeper understanding of the dynamic relationship between faith and giving, through research, education, and public conversation. Part of Indiana University Lilly Family School of Philanthropy.

Name: The Crossing
Description:
We are a non-denominational church with four St. Louis area-locations (Chesterfield, Fenton, Grant's Trail and Mid Rivers) and an online campus. We blend teaching and worship with art and technology to create a service where you can experience the message of Jesus in practical and life-changing ways.

Chesterfield | 114 N. Eatherton Rd, Chesterfield, MO 63005

Fenton | 1800 Bowles Ave, Fenton, MO 63026

Grant’s Trail | 2760 Union Rd, St. Louis, MO 63125

Mid Rivers | 6000 W Geneva Dr, O'Fallon, MO 63366

Online | thecrossing.online

Name: CBMC Nederland
Description: CBMC is een missionaire beweging van en voor ondernemers en zakenmensen in Nederland. Onze missie is zakenmensen helpen Jezus Christus te vinden, te volgen en te verkondigen.

Name: Christian Legal Fellowship (CLF)
Description:
CLF is Canada’s national association of Christian lawyers, law students, and academics. We have 700 members in local chapters meeting in cities across the nation, and law student chapters in most law schools in Canada. 

CLF was founded in the mid 1970’s out of the conviction that for the Christian lawyer, the practice of law is a vocation, a calling from God. As Christian lawyers, we are concerned with legal and constitutional questions facing our profession and the broader community. We believe it is our responsibility to work with others to determine what justice requires in a free and democratic society. 

While having no direct denominational affiliation, CLF members represent more than 30 Christian denominations working in association together. We encourage and equip our members to do justice and show compassion. 

CLF is a registered charity and fulfills its mandate by presenting national conferences and seminars, publishing newsletters and the quarterly Christian Legal Journal, establishing and supporting local groups and chapters, and participating in public life through education and advocacy. This includes, where appropriate, intervening in litigation as a friend of the court in those cases where the public good can be advanced by presenting principles of law and moral, legal, and political philosophy that are consistent with, and illuminated by, Christianity.

CLF is also a Non-governmental organization (NGO) in Special Consultative Status with the Economic and Social Council of the United Nations.

Name: Arquidiocese de Belo Horizonte
Description:
Grande rede de comunidades de fé, formada por quase 300 paróquias e aproximadamente 1500 Igrejas, a Arquidiocese de Belo Horizonte está presente na Capital Mineira e em outros 27 municípios da Região Metropolitana de Belo Horizonte: Belo Vale, Betim, Bonfim, Brumadinho, Caeté, Confins, Contagem, Crucilândia, Esmeraldas, Ibirité, Mário Campos, Nova União, Lagoa Santa, Moeda, Nova Lima, Pedro Leopoldo, Piedade dos Gerais, Raposos, Ribeirão das Neves, Rio Acima, Rio Manso, Sabará, Santa Luzia, São José da Lapa, Sarzedo, Taquaraçu de Minas e Vespasiano. Quatro grandes regiões episcopais integram seu território: Nossa Senhora Aparecida, Nossa Senhora da Conceição, Nossa Senhora da Esperança e Nossa Senhora da Piedade. 
 
A organização da Arquidiocese de Belo Horizonte abrange: os Vicariatos Episcopais de Ação Pastoral, que articula os trabalhos de evangelização das muitas paróquias, de Ação Social e Política, dedicado a articular iniciativas de amparo aos mais pobres e excluídos, e de Comunicação e Cultura, que aproxima e fortalece os projetos culturais e os meios de comunicação da Igreja. Contempla também o Seminário Arquidiocesano Coração Eucarístico de Jesus e instituições a serviço da vida, à luz do Evangelho.

Name: Planetshakers
Description:
Passionate, vibrant, relevant and powerful are all words that aptly describe the ministry and church of Planetshakers, founded by Russell and Sam Evans.

After a radical encounter with God, Russell established a conference called Planetshakers in 1997. The conference quickly became renowned for its passionate praise and worship, its ability to stir hunger in young people for encounters with God, and the frequent outbreaks of miracles, signs and wonders.

With a deep desire to see more people encounter Jesus and His tangible Presence, Russell and Sam founded Planetshakers Church in Melbourne, Australia, in 2004. In addition to the church, Planetshakers Ministries International has a significant global footprint— expressing the Planetshakers mandate, worldwide, through music and touring, international conferences and events, and Planetshakers Bible College.

Planetshakers is a church and ministry for all; everyone is welcome and our primary desire is that people find the healing, breakthrough and provision they need as they encounter the tangible Presence of Jesus and His family, in a personal and life-changing way.

Name: The Friday Note
Description: We deliver Islamic reminders every Friday for Muslim professionals globally .

Name: Diocese in Europe: Church of England
Description:
The Diocese in Europe is a vibrant and dynamic community of Anglican churches, congregations and communities spread across continental Europe and beyond.

Part of the Church of England, we have worshipping communities from Norway and Iceland in the North to Morocco and Turkey in the South. 

Our chaplaincies include people of all ages and backgrounds who love Jesus Christ and seek to follow his teaching through the Anglican tradition. 

We are led by our bishop, the Rt Revd Robert Innes.

We minister to those in Europe who have English as either a first or second language. Being both 'Catholic' and 'Reformed' we bridge the Reformation divide. We sustain a huge range of ecumenical friendships.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Madison
Description: The Diocese of Madison includes 134 parishes and missions in 11 counties in Southwest and Southcentral Wisconsin: Columbia, Dane, Grant, Green, Green Lake, Iowa, Jefferson, LaFayette, Marquette, Rock and Sauk.

Name: Biblical Eldership Resources
Description: Promoting Biblical Eldership governance and shepherding in local churches and building up elders and church leaders worldwide.

Name: Agency for Halal Quality Certification - Bosnia&Herzegovina
Description:
Agency for Halal Quality Certification, in accordance with the provisions of the Codex Alimentarius, worldly accepted code of conduct for halal food, and according to the Law of the Status of Religious Communities and Churches in Bosnia and Herzegovina, the only institution in Bosnia and Herzegovina authorized to issue Halal certification for quality and allowing the use of Halal Quality Trademark for halal products.

In accordance with its works and mission, the Islamic Community in Bosnia and Herzegovina launched a project of formation of the Agency for Halal Quality Certification in order to establish in Bosnia and Herzegovina a system that would allow manufacturers to certify their production processes and products and placed them on the market labeled as "halal”.

One of the objectives of the Agency is keeping up with world trends and achievements in the areas of production, control of production processes and content of halal products. The Agency intends to achieve the goal of establishing and maintaining active communication and cooperation with similar institutions that already operate in other countries and participation in international conferences, symposia, round tables, and attending halal products exhibitions.

Name: Diocèse de Nanterre
Description:
Le diocèse de Nanterre a été créé en 1966, Monseigneur Matthieu Rougé en est l’Évêque nommé.
Quelques chiffres : Quelques chiffres : 9 doyennés, 81 paroisses, 4 Maisons d’Église, 1 séminaire interdiocésain, 155 prêtres, 17 séminaristes, 58 diacres, 49 communautés de religieuses, 370 religieuses, 16 communautés de religieux, 137 religieux, 241 laïcs en mission ecclésiale, 4169 catéchumènes adultes, 200 jeunes catéchumènes, 250 salariés, des milliers de bénévoles, 72 établissements d’enseignement catholique (426500 élèves).
Plus d'infos : diocese92.fr

Name: Community Christian Church
Description: Church

Name: Granger Community Church
Description:
Granger Community Church is one church, two locations, with a campus in Granger, Indiana and Elkhart, Indiana. 

Thirty-one years ago, in a Michiana living room, Mark and Shelia Beeson began Granger Community Church. A lot of things have changed since then (our hairdos, clothes and the size of our phones), but some things never go out of style: connecting with God and each other through inspiring art and practical messages that make a difference in the here and now. 
Our mission? Helping people take their next steps toward Christ… together.

Name: Rede Filhas de Jesus
Description:
Há mais de 100 anos no Brasil, uma Rede de Escolas Completas, que alia experiência, competência, tecnologia e Inovação. Com qualidade pedagógica, corpo docente capacitado, excelência no ensino e ótimos resultados, as Unidades da Rede Filhas de Jesus contam com programas bilíngues, metodologias ativas e interativas, cultura maker, além de grandes parceiros como Google For Education, e Bernoulli Sistema de Ensino. 
A aprovação dos nossos alunos nas melhores universidades do país e o nosso posicionamento no ENEM são reflexos de trabalho e qualidade no ensino.
Conheça nossas escolas e se encante com o Nosso Modo Próprio de Educar.  
Rede Filhas de Jesus – Evoluir sem perder a essência!

Name: Jagannath Sanskruti
Description:
Jagannath Sanskruti is the oldest Sankruti in the world. It based on the principle of Sanatan Dharma. The Lord Jagannath is the ruling God of this Sanskruti.


We are creating this online portal for creating Lord Jagannath consciousness Worldwide. 


We are working for creating awareness among the peoples about the positive effects of Veda, and Purohita Karmakanda.

We are providing an online Puja Service in the famous temple of Odisha. Our expert Pandits of Vedic Brahman Parisad Odisha performs all the Puja as per Veda.


We can book puja online through our website Jagannathsanskruti.com. 


The founder of this organization Pandit Rashmi Ranjan Rath is a Vedic researcher. 


He recognized by the Lord Jagannath Temple administration Puri as a "Shree Jagannath Sanskruti Pracharak" in the year 2013.

Name: Mission Eurasia
Description:
Mission Eurasia focuses the gifts and energies of the global church on training and resources for young Next Generation Christian leaders in 13 countries of the former Soviet Union (FSU)—a region now commonly known as Eurasia. We also work in Israel, due to the country’s large population of Russian-speaking people who emigrated from the FSU.

The heart of our ministry is School Without Walls, a flexible leadership training program that annually equips thousands of young men and women in Eurasia with biblical training, leadership skills, and practical ministry experience. In turn, these passionate Christians leaders are impacting more than 1.6 million people annually for Christ by ministering to refugees, planting churches, leading evangelistic outreaches, organizing summer Bible camps for children, and distributing Scripture and humanitarian aid to those in need. 

Give to support the strategic ministry of our young Next Generation leaders here: https://missioneurasia.org/get-involved/donate-now/

Name: IBAB
Description:
A IBAB - Igreja Batista de Água Branca é uma comunidade cristã evangélica batista, fundada em 1º de maio de 1937 por um grupo de cristãos oriundos da Igreja Evangélica Batista Paulistana. Está filiada à Convenção Batista Brasileira e à Convenção Batista do Estado de São Paulo.

Comunidade indica que a essência de uma igreja é a congregação das pessoas que a compõem, mais um organismo vivo - que o Novo Testamento chama de corpo de Cristo - que uma organização-instituição religiosa.

Cristã indica a orientação espiritual desta comunidade, a saber, comunidade de Jesus Cristo, alinhada com a história da cristandade.

Evangélica indica a tradição da cristandade com a qual a comunidade se identifica, a saber, a tradição oriunda da Reforma Protestante do Século XVI.

Batista indica o segmento do protestantismo com o qual a comunidade se identifica.

Name: National Association of Evangelicals
Description:
The National Association of Evangelicals has spoken as a united voice for millions of American evangelicals since 1942.

But, the voice of the NAE is clearer, stronger and more broadly heard now than ever before. The association represents more than 45,000 local churches from nearly 40 different denominations and serves a constituency of millions.

We serve to make denominations strong and effective, influence society for justice and righteousness, and gather the many voices of evangelicals together to be more effective for Jesus Christ and his cause.

While the NAE headquarters are in Washington, D.C., our staff and constituency live and work all throughout America.

Name: New Apostolic Church South Africa
Description:
Our Vision

A church in which people feel at home and, inspired by the Holy Spirit and their love for God, align their lives to the Gospel of Jesus Christ and thus prepare themselves for His return and eternal life.


Our Mission

Reaching out to all people in order to teach them the Gospel of Jesus Christ and to baptize them with water and the Holy Spirit.

Providing soul care and cultivating a warm fellowship in which everyone shall experience the love of God and the joy of serving Him and others.

Name: Network of Professionals for Missions, International
Description:
Network of Professionals for Missions (NPM),  International is a God-Ordained movement in the professional space for the end-time move of God for soul winning. Matthew 9:37-38

MANDATE: .PRAY .GIVE .SHARE. MENTOR .GO

Together, we will sponsor the budget of Nations and bring the Gospel into them. 

Prayer Link: bit.ly/npmprayer
Telegram Channel Link: t.me/npminternational

Name: Church Army UK & Ireland
Description:
Church Army longs for everyone, everywhere to encounter God's love and be empowered to transform their communities through faith shared in words and action.

Church Army was established in 1882 by Wilson Carlile with a vision to train ordinary Christian men and women to reach those most in need with the gospel. 

Since then, we've been working on estates, in schools, in places where there is no church presence and in communities struggling to make ends meet.

We are Church Army. Our vision is for everyone everywhere to encounter God's love, and be empowered to transform their communities through faith shared in words and action. 

We activate change and strengthen lives and communities.
We don’t shy away from the difficult situations. Instead, we embrace it to make lives better. 

We are prayerful, risk-taking, accountable, collaborative, generous, unconditional. We are Church Army.

Name: Holy Rosary Academy
Description: Holy Rosary Academy is a religious institutions company based out of United States.

Name: Serge
Description: Serge is an international missions agency that sends and cares for missionaries, and equips church leaders locally and globally, and creates resources for continuous gospel renewal - so that believers can go to the frayed edges of our tattered world, to reach souls, renew hearts, and restore communities.

Name: Holy Trinity Diocesan High School
Description:
For nearly fifty years Holy Trinity has been a cornerstone of education for many young people on Long Island.  During this half-century our students and alumni have worked to change the world, whether by choosing to be civic leaders, industry pioneers, groundbreaking artists, volunteering their time and treasure to help others or simply by becoming caring and compassionate mothers and fathers.  It does not matter what your dream in life is, whether you want to be the quarterback or our best dancer, whether you seek Ivy League or a local college, you will find a home at Holy Trinity.  It does not matter whether you've been "popular" or "quirky", whether you were born 5,000 miles away or just up the block, you will be an important part of the Holy Trinity family.  You will be accepted and encouraged at Holy Trinity and your will learn to change the world.  To paraphrase George Bernard Shaw, some people see things as they are say why - at Holy Trinity, you will learn to dream things that never were and say why not?
Amazing things are happening every day on Cherry Lane.  Holy Trinity - How High School Should Be.

This page exists to help our Alumni and current families network and help each other in any way possible.

Name: Uniting Church in Australia - Synod of Victoria and Tasmania
Description:
The Synod of Victoria and Tasmania is part of the Uniting Church in Australia, the country’s third largest Christian denomination.

We are one of six Synods, comprising 600 congregations and more than 60,000 members. We also have eight presbyteries and 12 schools.

Our ministers are men and women and we worship every week in more than 40 languages. Through worship, sharing the story of Jesus, and service in the community, we witness to the belief that life is most fully found in God.

We believe sexual orientation is not a bar to ordination and support the ministry of people in same-sex relationships. In regard to same-sex marriage, we hold two equal and distinct statements of belief, allowing ministers and celebrants authorised by the Uniting Church the freedom to conduct or refuse such services.

Name: Global City Mission Initiative
Description: Global City Mission Initiative is a disciple-making ministry.  We were founded to address the challenges and opportunities for missions in a rapidly changing global & urban world.  As a missions organization, we are initiating evangelism, church planting, discipleship, and grassroots leadership development through applying best practices. Beginning in New York City, we are purposefully serving in urban settings where missionaries encounter nations from around the world within even a single neighborhood. We are making disciples at the world's crossroads.
Location: Tampa, New York City, Orlando, Philadelphia, Phoenix

Name: جمعية تحفيظ القرآن الكريم بالمنطقة الشرقية
Description: جمعية خيريـة تعنـى بتعليـم كتـاب الله لناشـئة المسلمين وجميع فئات المجتمع تلاوة وحفظاً وإتقاناً. وذلك من خلال برامج شاملة ومناهج علمية متخصصة وكفاءات متميزة لخدمة كتاب الله، راجين بذلك مرضاته والأجر والثواب للمنفقين والقائمين عليها. ومصرحة من المركز الوطني لتنمية القطاع الغير ربحي بتصريح رقم 3090.

Name: Wooddale Church
Description:
Wooddale is one church with locations throughout the Twin Cities (Eden Prairie, Edina, Loring Park) and globally online. We believe one connection can change your life - follow us and connect with others! 

Go to wooddale.org/employment to learn about our hiring process and current openings.

Name: Stonecroft
Description:
We are a mission to mobilize a movement of Christian Women to pray and proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christian so that every woman would be reconciled to God through Jesus Christ. God has been using Stonecroft since 1938 to impact communities by supporting local leaders and groups to invite people to know the saving grace of Jesus Christ. 



Stonecroft is a 501(c)(3) non- denominational nonprofit organization and a member of the Evangelical Council for Financial Accountability (ECFA)

Name: National Association of Christian Ministers
Description: The National Association of Christian Ministers is an alliance of Christian ministers from all evangelical denominational backgrounds.  Our purpose is to answer God's call to advance the gospel and unite the Body of Christ. We do this through education, fellowship, ordination, and ministerial licensing.  You may visit our public site at: http://www.nacministers.com

Name: Evangelical Church Winning All (ECWA)
Description:
ECWA exists to glorify God and to achieve His purposes by communicating the Gospel to the lost,discipling and equiping believers,organizing them into local churches and caring for the needy in the world through advocacy and social services.

ECWA has grown tremendously since it was incorporated in 1956 with only 7 DCCs to the present state where it has 74 DCCs and a membership of over 6 million. There is no doubt that ECWA has impacted positively the lives of millions of people in and outside Nigeria today. However, there is a need to find out what and how the church is doing today. What are the realities facing the church today? What are the opportunities, threats and challenges facing the church today? How has the church performed? What strategies should the church adopt in order to be the light and salt of the society? What does God want ECWA to focus on in the future? What is the mind of God for ECWA? How does God want ECWA to address some of the critical issues we face in Nigeria today? These questions can only be answered through the process of strategic thinking and acting.

Name: Assemblies of God Ghana
Description:
Assemblies of God Ghana is a dynamic Pentecostal church dedicated to embracing the entirety of the Gospel #AllTheGospel. Committed to the belief in the divine Word of God, the church actively engages in evangelism, missions, fervent prayer, social action interventions and nurturing fellowship.

Read more about us here: https://www.agghana.org/

Name: Church and Community Development for All People
Description:
In 1999, the United Methodist Free Store opened on the urban South side of Columbus, Ohio. Its atmosphere of unconditional love and hospitality fostered the dream of a church “for all people” that would be intentionally cross-class, multi-racial and diverse, with a new model of service and worship that was “with” the poor, not just “for” the poor.

The Church for All People was founded with the mission of being the church at the heart of both community renewal and personal transformation.  

Community Development for All People  was founded the same year.  From housing to health to music, its programs provide a model and inspiration for urban ministry and community development across the world.

The organization is faith-based, but all services and programs are provided to everyone regardless of faith, race, sexual orientation, gender-identification, income, or any other potentially limiting factor.

Name: Church Divinity School of the Pacific
Description:
An Episcopal seminary shaped by the West Coast context, CDSP forms leaders called to find new ways to create Christian communities and share God’s love.

Through our partnership with Trinity Church and an ongoing dialog with bishops and grassroots leaders, we have focused our degree programs on preparing priests for wise and practical leadership that makes an impact in their church and local community.

On January 31, 2023, CDSP announced that it would respond to increasing demand for online learning and flagging enrollment in residential programs to focus entirely on its low-residence Hybrid Program for MDiv and Anglican Studies students.

MDiv students now receive full funding for their degree program as well as a two-year post-graduation curacy in their diocese.

Name: Jesuits in Central Europe
Description:
We Jesuits face the challenges of the future with energy and drive, but also with trust in God and inner calm. The mission of the Society of Jesus has been universal since its foundation and extends beyond the borders of countries and languages. With its Universal Apostolic Preferences, the order has determined its four main areas of focus for the coming years: showing the way to God, standing by the marginalised, accompanying young people and caring for our common home, God's creation.

The Jesuits are an international religious order of the Roman Catholic Church. "Jesuit" comes from "Jesus". Jesuits are "companions of Jesus". In the tradition of St. Ignatius of Loyola, Jesuits follow Jesus Christ. The symbol of the Order is the monogram IHS, the first three letters of the name Jesus in Greek script. It can also be read as Iesum Habemus Socium: "We have Jesus as a companion". The commitment to faith and justice, education, dialogue with different cultures and the search for reconciliation - this charism of the Order is more relevant today than ever. Jesuits want to make the treasure of Ignatian spirituality fruitful for the lives of others.

As a worldwide religious community, Jesuits are active on all continents. The Jesuits in Central Europe have about 360 members at 35 locations in Germany, Latvia, Lithuania, Austria, Sweden and Switzerland.

Name: Palau
Description:
Proclaim the Gospel
In dependence upon God, we want to win as many people as possible to Jesus Christ throughout the world, proclaiming His Good News by all available means to the millions of people who have yet to respond to the Gospel. 

Mobilize the Church
In dependence upon God, we want to emphasize with the Church the principles of victorious Christian living (Galatians 2:20), so as to stimulate, revive, train, and mobilize the Church to continuous, effective evangelism, follow-up, and church growth. 

Equip the Next Generation
In dependence upon God, we want to hold high the banner of biblical evangelism, influencing Christianity worldwide and raising up a new generation of godly leaders, so that the Church’s commitment to evangelism will never die.

Name: Word of Faith Christian Center
Description: The love of God abounds at Word of Faith International Christian Center. Our church home is built on a foundation of Bible teaching for people of all races, creeds, all ages – children, youth and adults. We believe that through receiving and applying the Word of God, you will have VICTORY in your life DAILY through Jesus Christ.

Name: Anglican Diocese of Melbourne
Description:
A large, dynamic faith community in the Melbourne and Geelong areas.

Diverse and vibrant, our parishes and other ministries cater to a wide variety of expressions within the Christian faith.

What do Anglicans believe?  

Anglican/Episcopal churches uphold and proclaim the Catholic and Apostolic faith, proclaimed in the Scriptures, interpreted in the light of tradition and reason.

Following the teachings of Jesus Christ, Anglicans are committed to the proclamation of the good news of the Gospel to all creation.

Name: St. Luke's United Methodist Church
Description: The Bible’s story of God’s love for us begins in a garden but it ends in a city – the City of God. Here at St. Luke’s, all in our family of ministries share the same vision – A City Transformed by the Love of Jesus.  We believe we are here for a reason: to be sent by Jesus, motivated by his love, to bring about God’s preferred future for the city in which we have been placed, and to invite people to be a part of the City of God.

Name: Catholic Archdiocese of Sydney
Description:
The Catholic Archdiocese of Sydney exists to serve the People of God in the city of Sydney, including the Eastern, Southern, inner-Western and South-Western suburbs and the suburbs of the lower-North Shore.

Currently there are some 593,300 Catholics in the Archdiocese, with a total population of 2,223,102. The Catholic population is 26.7% of the total. There are 137 parishes, in the pastoral care of around 240 diocesan priests. There are 516 priests in total, including religious priests, working within the Archdiocese, including those on lesser duties and retired priests. There are 1,051 religious sisters and 189 religious brothers and 3 permanent deacons.
(Statistics are taken from the Official Directory of the Catholic Church in Australia 2014/2015)

Name: MuslimSoul
Description: Animation About Islam

Name: Voice of Prophecy
Description:
The Voice of Prophecy is a Bible-based media ministry that shares the love of Jesus through digital content, spiritual resources and humanitarian projects

FULL DESCRIPTION
The Voice of Prophecy exists to proclaim the everlasting gospel of Christ—leading people to accept Jesus as their personal Savior and nurturing them in preparation for His soon return.

A leader in religious broadcasting for more than 85 years, the Voice of Prophecy focuses on God's love and heralds the soon return of Christ—providing hope to broken people and guidance for daily living. Founded in 1929 by H.M.S. Richards, the ministry continues today under the leadership of Speaker/Director Shawn Boonstra and Associate Speaker Jean Boonstra.

The Voice of Prophecy can be heard in nearly three dozen languages, and Bible lessons are available in more than 70 languages. Local Discover Bible Schools have been established at 2,400 churches across North America, with hundreds more around the world. And humanitarian projects in countries such as India are meeting physical as well as spiritual needs. As the Voice of Prophecy looks to the future, it will continue to focus on sharing the love of Christ with a hurting world, while using present tools and anticipating yet-to-be-developed technology.
 
How We Serve
• Weekend radio broadcasts on hundreds of stations in North America, including the weekly Disclosure broadcast and Discovery Mountain, a new program for kids launching in April 2017
• Free Bible courses by mail, satellite, online, and mobile devices
• www.biblestudies.com — courses in dozens of languages from Bible schools around the world
• www.bibleinfo.com — questions answered, daily messages, prayer requests
• www.kidsbibleinfo.com — Bible guides, games, stories, and more, just for kids
• Live events worldwide — such as Shadow Empire and A Pale Horse Rides
• Christian resources for spiritual growth and sharing
• Humanitarian projects in places such as India and Myanmar

Name: New Wine
Description:
New Wine is a movement of churches working together to change the nation through a network of church leaders, summer conferences, training events and resources.

Our mission is to see the nation changed through Christians experiencing the joy of worshipping God, the freedom of following Jesus, and the power of being filled with the Spirit.

To see churches renewed, strengthened and planted, living out the word of God in every aspect of life, serving God by reaching the lost, broken and poor, and demonstrating the good news of the Kingdom of God to all.

Name: Unity World Headquarters
Description:
UNITY is the world’s premier resource for spiritual support. Our mission is to help and serve millions of all faiths through publishing and media, events and retreats, and a 24/7 prayer line.

For more than a century, Unity has offered inspiration and education to all. 
 Whether you consider yourself spiritual but not religious or you’re involved in a church, mosque, synagogue, or sangha, you are welcome here. We live up to our name—Unity.

The Unity movement was founded by Charles and Myrtle Fillmore in 1889.  The world headquarters at Unity Village, Missouri, is located in Eastern Jackson County of the Kansas City metro area. Unity provides people around the world with positive, spiritual messages of hope, healing, prosperity and peace. Our core areas  of service include: 

Prayer Ministry—
Silent Unity, the prayer ministry of Unity, responds to nearly 2 million requests per year from people who write, call,  text, instant message or email for prayer support.

Publishing—
Unity publishes two magazines to inspire and advance personal growth: Daily Word and Spirituality & Health. Unity offers hundreds of books, pamphlets and CDs on a variety of spiritual subjects and current events. 

Retreats and Events—
Workshops with top names and engaging material, retreats that offer spiritual enlightenment, and special events including weddings and conventions are all a part of that core process.

Name: Andersonville Theological Seminary (ATS)
Description:
Andersonville Theological Seminary believes that actively serving God in the field is of greatest importance. To this end, we have developed a program of study that allows pastors, teachers, and counselors to earn their seminary degrees from their own homes while continuing to actively serve in the field.

Our program, however, has always been grounded upon the firm belief that in order to be useful to active Christians, it must be centered upon actual study of the Scriptures as God’s holy and infallible word. Therefore, ATS has placed a great emphasis upon exegetical and expositional Bible courses in all of its programs, often requiring students to go verse-by-verse through key books of both the Old and New Testaments.

Further, Andersonville holds that students must be properly and practically tested in each course to insure proper training of each student in our program. Such testing frequently includes multiple testing formats requiring students to illustrate their comprehension of course lectures, required readings, and Bible passages. And, in addition to all else, Andersonville has always required that the program be practical to real ministry in service of Christ. Therefore, every course offered by ATS, whether Greek or Pastoral Counseling, has passed the scrutiny of its faculty and staff, having been deemed necessary for thorough and complete training in the relevant major and degree program.

What We Offer

Bible Centered Programs
While abstract theological concepts or abstract ministry principles can be complimentary to ministry work, the true foundation of all ministry work must be God’s word, studied as inspired and complete. Andersonville Theological Seminary offers just such studies, with each program being centered upon God’s word, taught by professors well-versed in both academic studies and practical ministry work. At ATS, We offer undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral degrees.

Name: Diocese of Camden
Description: The Diocese of Camden serves approximately 450,000 Catholics in 62 parishes in Atlantic, Camden, Cape May, Cumberland, Gloucester and Salem Counties. The Diocese serves the South Jersey community through faith, education and social services. Most Reverend Joseph Williams, ninth bishop of Camden, was installed on March 17, 2025.

Name: Fellowship Bible Church
Description:
Our Mission:
    ... to produce and release spiritual leaders who know and express the
                authentic Christ to Northwest Arkansas and the world.

Our Vision:  
    ... “To change the heart and soul of Northwest Arkansas and the world.”

Cell/Celebration Model:

Fellowship is structured to be a Celebration/Cell church. At our core, this is who we are. We refer to the corporate worship gathering as Celebration. It is when we gather the church to worship the Lord and hear from his word. It is a rallying point for the people of Fellowship which encourages and inspires so that we can go out and express our faith during the week.

Name: James River Church
Description:
James River Church, led by Pastors John and Debbie Lindell, is one church in four locations in southwest Missouri and online. The church is passionate about making everyone connected to James River Church feel welcomed home through inspiring worship services and high-energy kids and youth programs. The leadership at James River Church is dedicated to teaching the whole Word of God through engaging, expository preaching. We pray these messages are a blessing and encouragement to your life as God reveals His truth to you through the good news of the Gospel!

Our Core Values are to:
Reach the Lost 
Expository Preaching
Prayer and Worship
Discipleship
Children & Youth
Involved People in Ministry
Encourage People

We would love for you to visit one of our campuses. You find out all the details about visiting a campus, as well as planning out your visit at https://jamesriver.org/visit.  

We also have a fully integrated online campus for we would love for you to be a part of!  You can check out all of our online options at https://jamesriver.org/online-church.

Name: Fellowship International Mission (FIM)
Description: Sharing how God is at work through missionaries who serve with FIM. Helping missionaries fulfill their call, and helping churches fulfill their missionary vision.

Name: NickV Ministries
Description:
Nick Vujicic and NickV Ministries champion the cause of the brokenhearted and share the Good News of Jesus Christ around the world.

Nick Vujicic (“voo-yi-chich”) is an Australian-American known around the world as an evangelist, entrepreneur, speaker, and author. Born without arms or legs, Nick has defied the odds to become an internationally renowned figure, sharing his inspiring life story and preaching the Gospel of Jesus Christ to over 760 millions people in 75 countries.

Nick's early life was marked by challenges, including rejection, bullying, depression, and suicidal thoughts. However, through a personal encounter with Jesus Christ, he found the strength to overcome these difficulties and live a full and fruitful life.

Name: Damascus
Description:
At Damascus, we are reversing the trends. Our 471 Acre, $22 Million Campus in Ohio is built as a place of encounter for generations of youth to encounter Jesus.  The campus features 25,000 square foot lodge large enough to hold 1,300 people, 8 cabins with capacity of 20 person a piece and 2 lakeside lodges housing 40 people at a time.  All of this was built around a 30 acre lake, 200 acres of forest and 200 acres of agricultural land. 

Our mission is to empower a generation of Catholics by establishing a faith-awakening campus that fosters faith that is deep, contagious, and joy-filled.

Like St. Paul who encountered the living God on the road to Damascus. Damascus Catholic Mission Campus is a place of encounter where generations of Catholics are awakened, empowered, and equipped to live the adventure of their Catholic faith.

Name: Scientology Religion
Description:
The Code of a Scientologist requires every Scientologist to make a solemn commitment to benefit others:

"As a Scientologist, I pledge myself to the Code of Scientology for the good of all. ... To use the best I know of Scientology to the best of my ability; to help my family, friends, groups and the world. ... To make this world a saner better place."

Churches of Scientology and their parishioners carry out and support many humanitarian initiatives and affiliated social betterment programs. Where there is a need for assistance in improving conditions, the Church of Scientology and its members step in. The scope of the activities is limitless—from caring for the environment to looking after the elderly and raising funds for worthy charitable causes.

Of particular address is the global devastation and human misery wrought by drug abuse, illiteracy and moral decay—to say nothing of natural and man-made disasters. They threaten to rip the social fabric to shreds and in many parts of the world these societal ills have already caused irreparable damage.

Further, and to realize Scientology’s greater humanitarian objective, the Church has made readily available, easily assimilated and rapidly distributable multimedia tools to raise awareness, educate and activate millions.

The goal is at once bold and ambitious: to resolve broad planetary ills and arrest a creeping cultural decline, all while uplifting society by instilling commonly shared values. Each campaign is founded on the proposition that education is the cornerstone of change. They acknowledge that only when truly informed can individuals make lasting and transformative decisions to live drug-free, ethical, respectful lives in harmony with their loved ones and neighbors.

Inspired by the words of L. Ron Hubbard that “a being is only as valuable as he can serve others,” Scientologists assume responsibility not only for self and family, but also for the larger community.

Name: Anglican Church of Canada
Description: The General Synod of the Anglican Church of Canada is the national voice of the Anglican Church of Canada and provides support to dioceses, parishes and ministries across Canada.

Name: Kirkko Helsingissä - Helsingin seurakuntayhtymä
Description:
Helsingin seurakuntayhtymä on osa Suomen evankelis-luterilaista kirkkoa – Kirkko Helsingissä. Kristittyjen yhteisönä edistämme helsinkiläisten hengellistä elämää ja rakennamme yhdessä merkittäviä ja laadukkaita kohtaamisen ja auttamisen paikkoja. Puolustamme tasa-arvoa, yhdenvertaisuutta, oikeudenmukaisuutta ja luontoa. Arvomme ovat usko, toivo ja rakkaus.

Helsingin seurakuntayhtymä koostuu 16 suomenkielisestä ja 3 ruotsinkielisestä seurakunnasta sekä yhtymän yhteisistä palveluyksiköistä, jotka hoitavat muun muassa talous-, henkilöstö-, jäsenrekisteriasioita, yhtymän yhteistä hallintoa, kiinteistöjä, hautausmaita, viestintää sekä seurakuntatyön yhteisiä tehtäviä (perheneuvontaa, kasvatusta, oppilaitostyötä, erityisdiakoniaa, sairaala-sielunhoitoa, vapaaehtoistoimintaa sekä erityisryhmien toimintoja).

Helsingin seurakuntayhtymässä on noin 1200 työntekijää. Helsingin seurakunnissa on noin 320 000 jäsentä.

Katso avoimet työpaikkamme: https://kirkkorekry.fi/fi/tyonantajat/helsingin-seurakuntayhtyma/

Name: IPHC Ministries
Description:
Welcome to the International Pentecostal Holiness Church! The IPHC is a global movement of disciples of Jesus Christ in 100 nations with 1,600,000 members.

We believe that because we are different, we can make a difference. We’re on a mission to encounter the cultures around us as we share the Gospel of Jesus Christ. We dive into the Word so we know the difference between Biblical commands and cultural preferences. We’re committed to being authentic and living out our beliefs 24/7.

God is challenging us to change the world by allowing Him to change us.

Join us, and make a difference in your community today!

Name: Central Church of Christ
Description: A church in the heart of Amarillo pursuing the life of Jesus

Name: Salesianos São Paulo
Description: A Inspetoria Salesiana de São Paulo é responsável por unificar as diretrizes de trabalho das 17 Obras Sociais, 11 Escolas, 8 Campos Universitários, 22 Paróquias, Igrejas Públicas e Santuários e 5 Casas de Formação administradas pelos Salesianos de Dom Bosco, em 14 cidades do estado de São Paulo.

Name: Sydney Anglican Services
Description:
Sydney Anglican Services (“SAS”) exists to support the mission of the Anglican Church in the Diocese of Sydney. We mainly do this by providing a range of professional services to the Synod, to other diocesan organisations and to parishes in support of the central administration of the Diocese.

Our services include financial management, legal, corporate secretarial, IT and human resources.

Name: Fraternité Chrétienne Salomon officiel
Description:
La Fraternité Chrétienne Salomon est un apostolat de la Communauté Catholique Mère du Divin Amour. Crée en 1999, c’est un cadre, de formation spirituelle, de partage et surtout de prière ouverte aux décideurs que sont, les autorités politiques, administratives, militaires et les hauts cadres des services publics et privés.
 
A- Missions

1) Apporter l’Évangile aux décideurs, aux cadres et aux hommes politiques dans leur milieu
 
2) Former les décideurs aux combats spirituels (aux attaques des forces occultes)
 
3) Enseigner aux décideurs que le Seigneur rend prospère et riche
 
4) Créer un espace de vie fraternelle et un réseau d’échange et d’affaires
Location: Abidjan, Cocody cité des Arts, Côte d’Ivoire

Name: Community
Description:
Community Bible Church is a non-denominational church located 30 minutes south of Atlanta.  The senior pastor of Community Bible is Pastor Beau Adams.

The conception of Community Bible Church goes back to the mid 1960's when a cutting-edge ministry called the Atlanta Youth Ranch began under the leadership of Beau's father, Dr. Buford Adams.  The church emerged as the Youth Ranch exploded into a large group of believers who desired to form a congregation committed to bringing the truth of Christ to its community. More than forty years later, Community continues to reach out to the south-side of Atlanta and beyond in a progressive, authentic and innovative style.

The purpose of Community has remained the same over the last several decades:  to connect people with Jesus Christ through relevant messages, powerful worship and servant leadership.  As Pastor Beau puts it, "the method may change from time to time but the message remains the same."

Community is a safe place for those seeking answers as well as those who need acceptance and love as they heal from habits, hurts and hang-ups.  With His divine creativity, God continues to write Community's story.  We believe that each person who walks onto this campus has an important chapter to add.  Whether you know the truth of Christ or have tons of questions, Community is the place for you.

Name: Church on the Move
Description:
// INTRODUCING PEOPLE TO THE REAL JESUS.
Church on the Move is a family of churches in Tulsa, Broken Arrow, and West Tulsa. Our mission is to introduce people to the real Jesus.

// SERVICE TIMES
Tulsa:
SAT | 5 PM
SUN | 9, 10:30, & 11:30* AM (*At Youth Building)

Broken Arrow:
SAT | 5 & 6:30 PM
SUN | 8:30, 10, & 11:30 AM

West: 
SAT | 5 PM
SUN | 8:30, 10, & 11:30 AM


For more information, visit churchonthemove.com

Name: Pastors Discipleship Network
Description:
PDN - Pastors Discipleship Network - Is A Ministry That Equips Pastors And Strengthens The African Church.

PDN is a registered nonprofit 501c(3) organization established in 2008 to train and equip pastors and their wives with critical ministry and life skills to help them lead and teach their congregations while fostering personal development.

“To bring training to untrained church leaders In Africa in order to deepen the church and to advance the Gospel of Jesus Christ through healthy churches.”
— Our Mission Statement

During the past nine years, we have successfully trained and equipped over 4,000 pastors in East Africa – providing quality theological education by gifted facilitators, securing and delivering high-quality ministry resources to African church leaders, effectively following up with pastors after training, and building networks for pastors across East Africa to facilitate accountability and fellowship.

In our special business training program, we have provided more than 1,600 pastors and their wives with training and resources in small business development, financial accountability, and entrepreneurship.  The goal of this special training is to alleviate the extreme poverty that is common among African pastors.

Our efforts are making a difference:

We have received overwhelming feedback from congregation members about positive changes in their pastor’s performance.

* Pastors have shared their stories of transformation.
* Communities have been reached more effectively with the truth of the Gospel.
* Record numbers of pastors and their wives have registered for our programs demonstrating a growing hunger for new knowledge and skills.

Name: Cottonwood Creek Church
Description: The call to love God and to love others is woven into the very fabric of Cottonwood Creek Church. This is the place of preaching, prayer, praise, adoration, evangelism, and outreach to the community. We are always willing to do whatever it takes!

Name: The National Catholic Bioethics Center
Description: A Catholic, non-profit, think tank and research center specialized in upholding and teaching Catholic principles on medical ethics. The National Catholic Bioethics Center is the preeminent Catholic medical ethics institution in the United States and its board of directors includes three Cardinals and five Archbishops. With a focus in four key areas: Consultation, Education, Publication, and Public Policy, the NCBC provides critical information to institutions and individuals who are grappling with serious ethical issues in a world often plagued by a lack of respect for human dignity. The NCBC steps in to use Catholic moral thought to protect the whole human person. The NCBC has been defending human dignity in medicine and the life sciences since 1972.

Name: Al-Emaan Centre
Description:
At Al-Emaan Centre, we are proud to be a community-driven organisation run by and for the local community. Our mission is to foster peace, harmony, and unity among people of all faiths, cultures, and backgrounds. Where community, compassion, and faith connect. We are committed to building bridges and creating a space where everyone can thrive together.

Since acquiring our historic premises in October 2014, we have worked diligently to restore and renovate the building, blending traditional design with modern functionality while honouring its original foundations. The completion of our renovation in June 2016 marked the beginning of our journey to bring our vision to life.

Today, Al-Emaan Centre serves as a vibrant religious, spiritual, educational, and community hub for the growing Muslim population in Bromley and beyond. We are dedicated to creating a safe and welcoming environment where families and young people can grow, learn, and develop. Through compassionate outreach and faith-inspired initiatives, we aim to nurture a generation of positive role models who contribute meaningfully to society.

Our Vision
We envision a community where people of all races, religions, and cultures can live together in peace, harmony, and mutual respect. Through meaningful engagement with individuals of diverse faiths and backgrounds, we strive to build stronger relationships with our neighbours and promote greater understanding. We hope to make Bromley a shining example of unity and collaboration, where community, compassion, and faith come together to create a brighter future.

Guided by the timeless principles of the Prophets (peace be upon them all), Al-Emaan Centre is built on the belief that true change begins within. With faith, dedication, and the support of our community, we aim to inspire positive transformation - one individual, one family, and one community at a time.

Join us as we work together to create a brighter, more inclusive future for all.

Name: Power to Change Australia
Description:
Power to Change is an international, faith-based mission organisation that seeks to build spiritual movements by connecting people to Jesus and each other.

Internationally, we are known as Cru or Campus Crusade for Christ and have approximately 17,000 missionaries serving in over 190 countries. Launched in Australia in 1967, we have 150 people serving throughout the country.

Name: Urjaa Dham
Description: Urjaa Dham is a spiritual project organised and run Urjaa Trust , registered under Indian Trust Act 1920  at Nakodar, Punjab, India with the purpose of spreading spiritual vibrations throughout the world. It was established to provide treatment to those problems which are beyond the reach of medical science with the help of Ancient Vedic Science. The main motive of this Trust is to build up a strong nation with healthy mind and healthy body.

Name: Reformierte Kirche Zürich
Description:
Die reformierte Kirche Zürich ist die mitgliederstärkste reformierte Kirchgemeinde der Schweiz. Hier finden vielfältige Veranstaltungen wie Gottesdienste, Seelsorge, Beratung, Kulturanlässe, Bildung und soziales Engagement statt.

Evangelisch-reformierte Kirchgemeinde Zürich
Abteilung Kommunikation
Stauffacherstrasse 8
8004 Zürich
T: +41 43 322 15 30
kirchgemeinde@reformiert-zuerich.ch
Impressum: http://reformiert-zuerich.ch/home/impressum~1671/

Name: Jewish Voice Ministries International
Description: Jewish Voice Ministries International is dedicated to proclaiming the Gospel of Yeshua (Jesus) to the Jew first and also to the Nations throughout the world. The Good News is proclaimed through television, media, international festival outreaches & medical clinics/humanitarian aid.  This is followed by planting new, and strengthening existing congregations, to nurture and disciple new believers.  We also partner with other ministries to establish and operate Messianic Jewish Bible Institutes(MJBI) to equip leadership for Jewish ministry.

Name: Moreleta Kerk
Description:
Ons is 'n gemeente wat poog om te wees soos Jesus is, te doen soos Jesus doen, en mense saam te neem op ons reis. Kom besoek ons by: De Villebois Mareuilrylaan 1353, Moreletapark x83. Navrae: 
t | +27129978000  
f | 0866778888
e | info@moreleta.co.za

Name: Caritas Roma
Description:
La Caritas diocesana di Roma è un organismo pastorale istituito dal Vescovo al fine di promuovere la carità nelle Parrocchie e nelle comunità in tutte le sue forme. 
Fondata nel 1979 da monsignor Luigi Di Liegro per volontà del Cardinale vicario Ugo Poletti, è espressione dell’impegno della Chiesa di Roma nella testimonianza di solidarietà verso le persone svantaggiate, per lo sviluppo dell’uomo, la giustizia sociale e la pace.

Name: Saint Patrick's Cathedral
Description:
St. Patrick’s Cathedral is the Mother Church of the Archdiocese of New York and the seat of its Archbishop. Built by contributions large and small, it remains emblematic of the ascendance of religious freedom in the New World.
