- Wij gaan verantwoordelijk om met mens, macht en materie
- Wij vertellen het eerlijke verhaal, want wij geloven in de kracht van kwetsbaarheid
- Wij maken unieke creaties en content, en stelen het niet

Name: C-Suite For Christ Phoenix (Fellowship for Christian Executives Internationally)
Description: C-Suite for Christ is an international fellowship for Christian business executives. There are many ways to join our movement. Help us in our mission of being open about our faith and covering the world in Christ.

Name: Awhile Christian Forum
Description:
AWHILE CHRISTIAN FORUM, the free online community, was founded by KUFRE-UDEME THOMPSON on April 7, 2013.

We are a community of Christ-followers who believes in His Second Coming to receive the believers, so that where He is, there we may be also (John 14:3).

Over the years, AWHILE has helped many people like you to build and strengthen their faith in God as they prepare for the Second Coming of Jesus Christ.

We believe that our present stay on earth is for a while, to prepare for eternity.

We are available on your WhatsApp Messenger.

Joining is % FREE!

Name: Jesuits in Britain
Description:
There are over 80 Jesuit priests and brothers in Britain, ministering to communities all over the country. They work as parish priests, chaplains, teachers, academics, writers, doctors, spiritual directors, and artists. Outside of the formal members of the order, we have some truly gifted and passionate people working with us to achieve our mission.

Jesuits in Britain (Jesuits in Britain CIO) is a registered charity in England & Wales (1207742) and Scotland (SC053495).

Name: Tasrih Foundation
Description: Tasrih Foundation is a nonprofit and non-political religious organization. It was founded in September 2020. Our mission is to share the teachings of the Qur'an and Hadith with the Muslim Ummah through various content. We create and share Islamic content that makes it easy for people to understand and practice their faith. Along with spreading religious knowledge, Tasrih Foundation organizes educational programs and competitions to engage the community. These activities help people learn more about Islam and encourage personal growth. We are also committed to social responsibility. Tasrih Foundation plays an active role in disaster relief, offering help to those affected by crises. Additionally, we run various social programs to support the needy and uplift communities. Our aim is to educate, inspire and serve. By spreading knowledge and providing support, we work to make a positive difference in the lives of individuals and society.

Name: Svenska kyrkan, Lunds stift
Description:
Lunds stift är ett av Svenska kyrkans 13 stift och består geografiskt av Skåne och Blekinge. Det finns cirka 500 kyrkobyggnader i hela stiftet.

Stiftets uppgift är att stödja och stimulera anställda, förtroendevalda och frivilligarbetare i stiftets 148 församlingar. Det sker bland annat genom utbildning, fortbildning och rådgivning i olika frågor.

Stiftet ska också se till att församlingarna följer Svenska kyrkans regelverk, kyrkoordningen och Svenska kyrkans bestämmelser och har till uppgift att förvalta kyrkans skog, jord och fondmedel, de så kallade prästlönetillgångarna.

I organisationen finns också Stiftsgården Åkersberg och Stiftsgården Södra Hoka.

I Lunds stift finns:
* Stiftsfullmäktige är stiftets högsta beslutande organ och har till uppgift att besluta i principiella och övergripande frågor.
* Stiftstyrelsen är stiftets förvaltande och verkställande organ.
* Domkapitlet är ett tillsynsorgan för präster och diakoner, men också en inomkyrklig domstol. Här prövas om beslut är fattade enligt kyrkoordningen.
* Egendomsnämnden förvaltar prästlönetillgångarna (jord, skog och fondmedel) på delegation av stiftsfullmäktige.

Name: Cidade Viva
Description: A Fundação Cidade Viva busca promover a restauração da dignidade do ser humano, contribuindo em áreas sociais relevantes através de ações de apoio à família, educação, cultura e lazer, saúde, geração de emprego e renda, ao meio ambiente, promoção da ética, direito, cidadania e valores cristãos, objetivando assim que elas mudem de vida e se tornem agentes de transformação em sua comunidade e em todo mundo.

Name: Hope Church
Description:
It all began in 1988 when our founding pastor, Dr. Craig Strickland, felt the call to plant a church “out east” in the suburbs of Memphis.  Along with 25 charter members, Craig began Hope in the living room of a Germantown home in September of 1988.  Eli Morris came to join Craig at Hope with a heart for inner city missions.  In 1992, Hope purchased our first piece of land at 8500 walnut grove Road and moved into their first permanent worship space.  Over the next 20 years, Hope’s congregation and building has expanded to serve over 30 ministries, thousands from Memphis to the Bronx, to Belize.
 
Craig and Eli’s prayers were met when Rev. Rufus Smith agreed to leavehis hometown of Houston, Texas, to join the preaching/teaching team in 2010.  In November 2013, Rufus was voted in to take the position as senior Pastor.  Craig moved into Founding Pastor role and Eli remains in his desiredposition, God calling position of Senior Associate Pastor.  
 
At Hope, our mission is clear: We want to engage our un-churched neighbors of every age and ethnicity to experience Jesus. "What exactly is 'un-churched?'" you might ask. Un-churched are not only those who have never been to church, but also those that may have grown cold to the idea of church. Those who feel church is nothing but shame, guilt and judgment. Reaching the un-churched has been our focus from day one.
 
We try to be different. We try to offer a place of powerful worship and timely, relevant, life-application messages rooted in Bible truths. We don't care what you wear, we just care that you're here. We provide a safe, welcoming place for new guests checking us out, but also a gathering place for friends and small groups that want to dive deeper into God's Word. Wherever you are in your walk of faith—whether just starting or well-traveled—we invite you to come and be a part of Hope. You'll fit right in.

Name: Woodlands Church
Description: Woodlands Church, led by Senior Pastor Kerry Shook, is a non-denominational church in the Houston, TX area. Woodlands Church is one church in many locations with our campus in The Woodlands, TX, and several satellite campuses including a Church Online Internet campus. We want to personally invite you to experience a warm and friendly church home. The service is relaxed, the message is relevant and the atmosphere is amazing! We have quality events and programs for you and your entire family.

Name: Trinity Baptist Church
Description: Trinity Baptist Church is a independent, local Baptist church that embraces the truth of Scripture over the philosophical humanism of the 21st century.  We exist to glorify God through the preaching of God's Word, the fellowship of believers, and the evangelizing of the lost.

Name: Archdiocese of Louisville
Description: We are the Catholic Church in Central Kentucky, disciples of Jesus Christ, rich in our tradition and growing in our diversity, striving for fullness of life in God. Led by the grace of the Holy Spirit and in communion with the Bishop of Rome, our mission is to proclaim and live the good news of Jesus Christ.

Name: Shaking the Heavens
Description:
Shaking the Heavens was created to bring the body of Christ together through prayer. It is time for the church to wake up and come together to fight against the principalities and powers of this world. Jesus prayed that all believers would become one just as He and His Father and we are setting out to help that happen. 

Shaking the Heavens metaphorically speaking is like shaking an apple tree. His blessings, His Kingdom on earth is there for the taking, we just need to show Him we want it and go and get it. We need to shake the heavens with our united voice in prayer, stand in faith, and receive His promises.

Name: Australian Province of the Society of Jesus (Jesuits)
Description: The Society of Jesus is also generally referred to as ‘the Jesuits’. Founded by Saint Ignatius Loyola more than 450 years ago, the Society is an international Catholic religious male order of priests, brothers and others in formation for these roles. The Australian Province of the Society of Jesus had its beginnings with the arrival of the first Jesuits in Australia in 1848.

Name: Regnum Christi España
Description:
Somos una realidad de la Iglesia católica llamada a ser un #HeavenSpoiler, esto es: hacer presente a Cristo vivo generando un tipo de relaciones y de ambientes que favorezcan una experiencia de su amor. 

El Regnum Christi está formado por los legionarios de Cristo, consagradas, laicos consagrados y laicos. 

Aporta a la sociedad en España una obra educativa (7 Colegios Regnum Christi y la Universidad Francisco de Vitoria), una obra social (la Fundación Altius), una obra misionera y otras iniciativas apostólicas.

El Regnum Christi en España está presente en Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Bilbao, Córdoba, Palma de Mallorca y Ávila.

Name: The Riverside Church
Description:
The Riverside Church is an interdenominational, interracial, international, open, welcoming, and affirming church and congregation.

Whoever you are: You are safe here. You are loved here. You are invited into full participation in our life together.

Name: Center for Faith and Work
Description: The Center for Faith and Work is a Christ-centered company based in Rwanda, dedicated to fostering the integration of Christian faith into business, education, and ministry. Affiliated with Open Christian University and Open Christian Ministries (USA), we serve as a multifunctional hub for Christian professionals, offering training, business services, and ministry resources. Our mission is to empower individuals to honor God in their professional endeavors while cultivating a spirit of humility and reverence.

Name: Calvary Christian School
Description:
Calvary Christian School is a ministry of Calvary Chapel Old Bridge. The ministry of CCS is committed to helping parents to disciple their children in the ways of the Lord. We believe that every student is created “in the image of God” (Genesis 1:27) and that when a child receives Jesus Christ as their Lord and Savior, they become a part of the family of God and need “the pure milk of the Word” (1 Peter 2:2) in order to mature spiritually. Our desire is to help them to develop and grow in the purposes and plans that God has for their lives. Therefore, a central focus of the school is to prayerfully seek the leading of God regarding the school’s mission and government.

We believe in the education of the whole student: we seek to minister to them spiritually, academically, and socially in much the same way that Jesus did when He lived among the people of His day. In each classroom, the teacher, under the leading and empowering of the Holy Spirit, is called to model the life of Christ before the students as they create a stimulating learning environment. All subject material will be integrated with Scriptural principles in order to cultivate a biblical worldview. Our desire is for students to have a love for learning that will help them to reach their God-given potential.

Name: Central Baptist Church
Description: Love God. Love People, Make Disciples

Name: EABENSON MINISTRIES AND CHURCH TRUST
Description:
Eabenson Ministries was founded by Evangelist Dr Eabenson James. The ministry aims to preach the gospel of Jesus Christ to every nation. We conduct leadership training conferences to train people to become leaders for Christ. These conferences are to equip pastors and church leaders to rightly divide the word of God, and act upon the word of God. In these conferences church leaders, pastors, youth are equipped for the ministry, we train them to be disciples of Christ, to preach, to heal, and to deliver the oppressed. 

Eabenson Ministries is a Christian non-profit organization based in Trivandrum, Kerala State, South India. We conduct prayer conferences in many states of India. Dr. Eabenson James is admired as an excellent teacher and preacher of the word of God. He is also a renowned professor in economics. He worked in various government colleges in Kerala. Evangelist Dr. Eabenson James teaches the word of God to people from all walks of life

ABOUT THE FOUNDER

Academic

Evangelist Dr. Eabenson James is a Professor of Economics. He has worked in renowned government colleges in Kerala, India. He was awarded a Doctorate in Economics (Ph.D.) from the University of Kerala. He did an elaborative study on water harvesting systems in Kerala. He was awarded a major research project to study the life of workers in abandoned tea plantations in the state of Kerala by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Government of India. He also worked as principal of a self-financing college, under the Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT). He has published several research papers.

How it all began

Early Days

As a young teenager at the age of 18, Dr. Eabenson James started preaching and praying for people. He used to pray for people in his congregation by visiting their houses at regular intervals. He was active in his church organizations. He also did a lot of charity.

Name: Society of the Sacred Heart, United States – Canada Province
Description:
We are the United States – Canada Province of the Society of the Sacred Heart, an international community of women religious in the Catholic Church, known as the Religious of the Sacred Heart (RSCJ), founded in 1800 by Saint Madeleine Sophie Barat.

We are committed to discovering and revealing God’s love in the heart of the world through the service of education.

As RSCJ, we join a vast community of Associates, educators, partners in mission and Sacred Heart alumnae/i, who share in and live out our mission, revealing God's love in communities throughout the United States, Canada and beyond.

We are a part of an international congregation with RSCJ living and serving in 41 countries.

Name: Courageous Christian Father
Description: One Courageous Christian Father boldly blogging for God being led by the Holy Spirit to help others know Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior! (Christian Blog, Family Blog, Daddy Blog)

Name: Churchome
Description: Churchome is a community that is centered around the story of Jesus and his scandalous grace.  We love Jesus. We love people. We believe each person is on a journey and our job is to love people and create a home where everyone belongs. We’re all in this together.

Name: American Baptist Home Mission Societies
Description:
"For the love of Christ urges us on...."
--2 Corinthians 5:14.15
 
Since 1832, American Baptist Home Mission Societies, American Baptist Churches USA has been spreading the Good News of God's love across the United States by preaching the gospel, planting churches and ministering to those in need.

Our mission has grown and expanded in the intervening years-more than a century and a half!   Herein lies our story of faith. Please take time to visit and learn about our ministries.  We pray the American Baptist Home Mission Societies story brings you inspiration and hope.

Name: Diocese of Cleveland
Description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Cleveland serves the people of the 8 counties located in northeast Ohio.  We welcome everyone who works or is interested in the mission of the Catholic Church in Northeast Ohio.

Name: Temple Israel
Description: Temple Israel is a community committed to the religious beliefs and practices of Reform Judaism.

Name: Christian Life Center
Description: Christian Life Center is a non-denominational church located in Williamsburg, Virginia. We are located directly across from Lafayette High School. Sunday service starts at 10am and Hispanic service starts at 1:30. Youth Church starts at 7pm on Wednesday nights and is for Middle School through College.

Name: Northland Church
Description: Northland Church exists to glorify God as we participate in His mission of redeeming a people from all peoples by engaging neighbors and nations to be Fully Alive in King Jesus through the power of the Spirit.

Name: Heritage Baptist Church
Description:
Christ is our first love.
Jesus Christ is the central focus of our worship, our identity, and our hope. He is the one we strive to emulate, endeavor to proclaim, and long to know. Our desire is to be captivated by Him in every aspect of life, living every moment to enjoy and realize His presence. He is our source of joy and satisfaction and it is Christ who is the head of our church. Everything we do is done to bring glory to God through the authentic life worship of His Son, Jesus Christ. He is our first love.


We are a people under grace.
We are an imperfect church filled with imperfect people who have been rescued and loved by the grace of God. Grace is God’s favor that we could never deserve, initiate, or be worthy of. Grace defines us, upholds us, and is based solely in the person and work of Jesus Christ. We believe that God’s grace is available to all people, no matter who they are, what they have done, or where they come from, because God’s mercy is loving and kind. We are a people under grace.


We desire to make Him known.
From Lynchburg to the other side of the world, our passion is to show Jesus Christ to the nations. We desire to share the love and hope that we have experienced in Christ and to lead others into salvation and spiritual maturity as followers of Christ. In obedience to God who first loved mankind, we now desire to go to others so that all might hear of the truth and salvation that is found only in His name. God’s love is demonstrated in His longing to draw peoples from every tribe, tongue, and nation to Himself. We desire to make Jesus Christ known.

Name: Erzbistum Paderborn
Description:
Gegründet im Jahr 799 blicken wir heute auf eine mehr als 1.200-jährige Geschichte zurück. Geografisch erstreckt sich das Erzbistum Paderborn auf einer Fläche von rund 15.000 Quadratkilometern von Minden bis nach Siegen und von Höxter bis nach Herne im westlichen Ruhrgebiet. Ebenfalls dazu zählen der ehemalige Kreis Waldeck (Hessen) und die Stadt Bad Pyrmont (Niedersachsen).

Für das Erzbistum Paderborn sind annähernd 3000 Mitarbeitende tätig. Sie und viele ehrenamtlich Engagierte setzen sich täglich dafür ein, einen lebendigen Glauben zu gestalten und den Auftrag der Kirche zu erfüllen.

Als Kirche von Paderborn lassen sich unsere Kernaufgaben in die folgenden drei großen Bereiche gliedern:

Seelsorge, Begleitung und Beratung

Bildung und Erziehung

Kunst und Kultur

Unser kirchliches Handeln findet sich überall da, wo Menschen zusammen kommen.

Im Rahmen unseres Zukunftsbildes wollen wir gemeinsam mit Ihnen die Kirche von morgen gestalten. Finden Sie Ihr neues berufliches Zuhause im Erzbistum Paderborn - wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: Church of Scotland. Church and Society Council
Description:
The Church of Scotland is one of the largest organisations in the country. It has around 600,000 members, with many thousands more regularly involved in local congregations and our work. More than 100,000 children and young people also take part in a range of our church-based activities, led by a team of 15,000 volunteers.

Within the organisation, there aree around 1200 ministers serving in parishes and chaplainces, supported by more than 2,000 professional and administrative staff.

Name: Cornerstone Baptist Church
Description:
Cornerstone is Growing believers to be Going believers. 

Our Vision: 

To multiply worshipers who magnify Christ…
	To connect real people in real community…
		To equip believers for exceptional service…
			To engage our world with enduring truth…

How will we accomplish this? 

Worship Services  multiplying worshipers who magnify Christ
	Life Groups  connecting real people in real community
		Equip  equipping believers for exceptional service
		        Mission  engaging the world with enduring truth

Name: Florida Conference of Seventh-day Adventists
Description:
Florida Conference of Seventh-day Adventists is an unincorporated, nonprofit organization which serves as the administrative body for its sisterhood of churches with emphasis on evangelism, nurturing constituents, and operating a system of schools.

The Seventh-day Adventist Church is a mainstream, protestant, Bible-believing denomination with more than 17 million believers worldwide. The Florida Conference regional corporate headquarters provides resources to its members, church congregations, and the general public.

The territory of Florida Conference, organized in 1893, includes the entire state except Bay, Calhoun, Escambia, Gulf, Holmes, Jackson, Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and Washington counties which belong to Gulf States Conference. As of March 2017, more than 64,000 Adventists are Florida Conference members at 208 churches, 57 companies, and least 32 mission groups.

Name: Ginghamsburg Church
Description:
You are invited to be part of: 
-a mission-driven church 
-a people committed to world change 
-a United Methodist community actively serving locally, nationally and globally 

For more information, 937.667.1069 or info@ginghamsburg.org

Name: Mitra Da Arquidiocese De Curitiba
Description:
A Arquidiocese de Curitiba, fundada em 27 de abril de 1892, é a Igreja Particular mais antiga do Paraná. É formada por 139 paróquias, 2 capelanias e 2 reitorias que se organizam em 3 regiões episcopais, cada uma com 5 setores Pastorais.

A Composição das regiões episcopais são: Centro-Oeste, formada pelos setores: Centro, Mercês, Santa Felicidade, Orleans/Campo Comprido e Campo Largo. A região Norte é formada pelos setores: Cabral, Cajuru, Pinhais, Almirante Tamandaré e Colombo. E a região Sul é formada pelos setores Rebouças, Boqueirão, Pinheirinho, Capão Raso e Portão.

A Arquidiocese é composta por 13 comissões pastorais: Comissão Da Animação Bíblico Catequética, Comissão Litúrgica, Comissão da Dimensão Sócio-Transformadora, Comissão da Dimensão Missionária, Comissão do Ecumenismo e Diálogo Inter Religioso, Comissão da Comunicação, Comissão da Família e Vida, Comissão de Animação Vocacional, Setor Juventude, Comissão da Dimensão Econômica e Dízimo, Comissão do Conselho de Leigos, Comissão dos movimentos Eclesiais e Comissão das Novas Comunidades.

Name: Evangelische Kirche in Hessen und Nassau
Description: Die Evangelische Kirche in Hessen und Nassau (EKHN) eröffnet vielfältige Möglichkeiten für Menschen mit unterschiedlichsten Begabungen und Talenten. Ob in der Seelsorge, der Musik, der Bildung oder der Verwaltung – bei uns erwartet Sie ein sinnstiftendes Arbeitsumfeld, das Raum für persönliche Entfaltung und berufliche Entwicklung bietet. Mit zahlreichen Berufsfeldern und einer starken Gemeinschaft bieten wir die Chance, an einer lebendigen Kirche und einer nachhaltigen Zukunft aktiv mitzuwirken. Mit Tausenden Mitarbeiter*innen ist die EKHN eine starke Arbeitgeberin in Hessen und in Rheinland-Pfalz sowie eine treibende Kraft im sozialen und kirchlichen Engagement. Gemeinsam gestalten wir eine offene und einladende Kirche, die den Menschen und das Evangelium in den Mittelpunkt stellt. Werden Sie Teil der EKHN und machen Sie mit uns einen Unterschied!

Name: Saffron Think Tank
Description:
Our Key Focus Areas:

1. Uniform Civil Code - Article 44 of the Constitution of India lists Uniform Civil Code as one of the Directive Principles of State Policy
2. One Nation, One Education Board
3.Protection of cultural heritage and Hindu Temples
4. Abolishment of Article 30/ Amendment of article 30 and make it for 'all'.
5. Combating Infiltration
6. Yuva Rashtra - Creating employment opportunities for Hindu Youth and encourage the spirit of entrepreneurship amongst Hindu youth
7. Yuva Rashtra - Youth in Governance 
8. Yuva Rashtra - Youth in Traditional Sports
9. Combating Left Wing Extremism
10. Adoption of Hindu Assets like Granthalayas, Temples, Dharm Shalas, Hindu Community Centers, Schools, Aushadhayalas etc which are in dilapidated condition, and reconstruct/maintain them.
11. Sanatan Shiksha - Develop a Sanatan Shikha system and keep it in pace with modern trends and knowledge, and be oriented towards ensuring a global, scientific, outcome-focused, knowledge-oriented,
accessible, child-friendly Sanatan Shikha system in order to ensure that our next generations gain the required knowledge for their future.
12. Mission Bramhand - Continuous dialogue with Hindus living across the globe. Preach Hindu Dharma across the globe and make this world a better place to live in!

Name: Cambridge Central Mosque
Description:
Cambridge Central Mosque is Europe’s 1st eco-friendly mosque and Cambridge’s first purpose-built mosque which opened its doors to the public on 24th April 2019.

The facility is dedicated to the spiritual and social welfare of the city’s estimated six thousand Muslims, including many visiting students, but also serves as a cultural bridge fostering greater understanding between communities. It has a strong educational component, providing an infrastructure and support for learning and research.

The Mosque does not follow or expect adherence to any particular school of Islam and welcomes worshippers from every part of the Muslim family.

Reflecting Islam’s contribution to contemporary debates over sustainability, the Mosque incorporates significant design features that minimise carbon emission and emphasise the role of faith in promoting responsible management of the earth’s resources.

Name: Milestone Church
Description: At Milestone we are a community of people doing our best to serve God and love others as genuinely as we know how. Our vision statement sums up who we are and what we are passionate about, "Reaching People. Building Lives." We simply want people to meet Jesus in a real way, see their lives built on a biblical foundation and do life together through authentic relationships. We have found there is no better way to live and nothing better to live for than seeing God work in the lives of people.

Name: Christian Motorcyclists Association
Description:
CMA is a non-profit, interdenominational organization, dedicated to reaching people for Christ in the highways and byways through motorcycling. Since its beginning in the mid 70's, CMA has had over 150,500 applicants for membership and over 1,000 chapters chartered  in the United States. Also, through the CMA International Ministry, CMA is represented in other countries throughout the world. 

CMA is not a club but a ministry. Our ministry team program is designed to make ministers of our members. We are involved in motorcycling events across the country and in taking the gospel of Jesus Christ into America's prisons. Our Seasons of Refreshing Conferences, conducted by CMA staff evangelists, prepare our members for ministry in the coming rally season.

CMA also has State, National, and Regional rallies. These rallies are times of fellowship, praise and worship, fun bike games, and encouragement.

CMA operates under the heading of a Board of Directors working in conjunction with six regional evangelists and one evangelist to work special projects in order to support the growth of the ministry. Together, this leadership team oversees CMA from a national level appointing state, area, and local leaders across the country.

Vision: Changing the world, one heart at a time.

Name: Deutsche Pfadfinder*innenschaft Sankt Georg (DPSG)
Description: Die Deutsche Pfadfinderschaft Sankt Georg ist ein katholischer Pfadfinder*innenverband und der größte Pfadfinder*innenverband in Deutschland. Er ist Mitglied im Ring deutscher Pfadfinder*innenverbände und im Bund der Deutschen Katholischen Jugend.

Name: The Sovereign Royal Priesthood Christian Assembly
Description:
We are a pentecostal fellowship/Church whose main goal are:
1. The Great Commission(Mat 28:18-20: To spread the Good News of our Lord Jesus Christ
2 To help fight and eradicate or relief poverty and human sufferings
3. To help relief pain and suffering resulting from sickness
4. To help victims of natural disasters
(Registered Charity No. 1184484, England & Wales, UK)

Name: Christian Medical Fellowship (CMF)
Description:
The Christian Medical Fellowship unites and equips Christian doctors, midwives and nurses to live and speak for Jesus Christ. We were formed in 1949 and there are currently 5,000 doctors, 900 medical and nursing students and 300 nurses and midwives as members. We also have a growing number of Christians in the allied health professions who are members or connect with us at the local level.
The aims include:
•Discipleship - to unite Christian doctors and medical students in Christ, and to encourage them to deepen their faith, live like Christ, and serve him obediently, particularly through acting competently and with compassion in their medical practice.
•Evangelism - to encourage Christian doctors and medical students to be witnesses for Christ among all those they meet.
•Mission - to mobilise and support all Christian doctors, medical students and other healthcare professionals, especially members, in serving Christ throughout the world.
•Values - to promote Christian values, especially in bioethics and healthcare, among doctors and medical students, in the church and in society.

Name: Stuff You Can Use
Description: Stuff You Can Use is a ministry resource company. We provide curriculum, training, community, and tools to help people grow, and to help ministry leaders grow their volunteer teams, grow their parent engagement, and grow in their leadership.

Name: The New Man
Description: We are a Gospel family who are media inclined and desire to see the true value of change in society.

Name: Lutheran Church of Hope
Description: Lutheran Church of Hope is a church with a mission to reach out to the world around us and share the everlasting love of Jesus Christ! With several campuses throughout the state of Iowa (West Des Moines, Ames, Ankeny, Des Moines (Hope+Elim), Grimes and Waukee), as well as several Local Sites (Bondurant, Clear Lake, Forest City, Iowa City, Kansas City, Panora, and Winterset), Hope is truly one church in multiple locations!

Name: International Network of Children's Ministry
Description:
INCM has existed for 40 years to connect the children’s ministry community to what they need to champion the discipleship of kids and families. It began with a small group of children’s ministry leaders in Colorado recognizing their need for one another, for training, and for resources as they carved out what it looked like for the discipleship of children to be prioritized in their communities. From there, the network has grown to an international community that celebrates and shares generously with one another in the magnificent things we have in common – a deep love for the Lord, the Gospel, His Word, and shepherding kids to know, love, and follow Jesus. 

We believe that Children’s Ministry is the most futuristic and strategic ministry of the Church; because of this, we understand that children’s ministry leaders have the opportunity to ignite transformation in discipleship for the kids and families they serve. This is why we are passionate about connecting leaders to what they need to do what God has called them to do. It is an honor to serve children’s ministry leaders and run alongside them in these efforts.

Name: BIBLE BELIEVING CHURCH OF GOD BBCG
Description:
#ABOUT US !

BIBLE BELIEVING CHURCH OF GOD. BBCG.

• The Church Is Created By GOD.
• Founded & Owned By JESUS CHRIST.
• Directed & Organized By THE HOLY SPIRIT.

WON'T YOU RATHER WORSHIP WITH US?
COME AND BE BLESSED
JESUS CHRIST LOVES YOU
JESUS CHRIST IS LORD!!!
GOD BLESS YOU
SHABBAT SHALOM!

#OUR MISSION:
1 To Expand God's Kingdom
2 In Giving
3 In Aggressive Winning Of Soul
4 In-depth Study Of The Word Of GOD.
5 Prevailing Prayers
6 Spiritual Worship: Deep Respect, Reverence, Obedience And Service To GOD.

#OUR VISION:
1 Reach Lost People
2 Train Them
3 Get Them Involved
4 Pastor The Flocks

#OUR MOTTO:
The BIBLE...Basic Instructions Before Leaving Earth!

* MATTHEW 28:18 - 20; ACTS 2 : 42; JOHN 3 : 16; MATTHEW 6 : 33.

• Founding Senior Pastor: PASTOR SHARON E. J. WILSON.

Name: Gospel Fellowship Association
Description: As an international mission agency, we exist to recruit, equip, and uphold Great Commission laborers to spread the good news of Jesus Christ around the world and to establish and build up Bible-believing churches that send them. Our vision is to see a fresh awakening of well-equipped gospel witnesses, being sent out from a strong base of conservative local churches and reproducing disciples of Jesus Christ in every nation of the world.

Name: NorthRidge Church
Description:
The main campus for NorthRidge is located at 49555 N.Territorial Road in Plymouth, Michigan, with an additional campuses in Brighton, MI.

NorthRidge Church is a non-denominational ministry that serves approximately 20,000 southeastern Michigan residents. Senior Pastor, Brad Powell has led the congregation for the past 34 years. NorthRidge offers services each weekend at the Plymouth location and at the regional campus. 


NorthRidge Social Media:
Facebook: Facebook.com/NorthRidgeNews
Instagram: NorthRidgeChurch
Twitter: Twitter.com/NorthRidgeNews
YouTube: YouTube.com/NorthRidgeNews

Brad Powell Social Media:
Facebook: Facebook.com/PastorBradPowell
Twitter: Twitter.com/BradPowell

Name: Green Lane Masjid & Community Centre
Description:
Mission

Our Mission is “Islam to Inspire, Educate and Serve the People”

Green Lane Masjid and Community Centre aims to Inspire, Educate and Serve the local community and worldwide and to encourage others to Inspire, Educate and Serve.

We aim to Inspire people to faith and to increase in faith through Talks, Social Media, various Social Activities and our Young Ummah program

We aim to Educate Muslims and non-Muslims, both young and old about the true Islamic teachings.

We aim to encourage the worship of Allah (Glory be to Him) and to Serve the community.

Vision

The Vision of Green Lane Masjid and Community Centre is “Islamic Faith in the Hearts of the People”.

Our vision highlights our wish for everyone among mankind to worship our Lord Allah alone (Glory be to Him) according to the teachings of His Messenger Muhammad (Peace be upon him).

Name: Just Keep Walking, LLC
Description: We provide products and services that inspire others to seek and become their best. We believe that it is possible to make a successful life attainable to all  humanity.

Name: The Colson Center for Christian Worldview
Description:
The Chuck Colson Center for Christian Worldview is an affiliate ministry of Prison Fellowship Ministries. The mission is to grow and resource a movement of Christians committed to live and defend the Christian worldview.
BreakPoint, a daily 4-minute Christian worldview commentary, provides a Christian perspective on today’s news and trends via radio, interactive media, and print. BreakPoint airs each weekday on more than 1,200 outlets with an estimated weekly audience reach of eight million people. Eric Metaxas and John Stonestreet are regular contributors and voices for BreakPoint.
The weekly “Two Minute Warning” with John Stonestreet can be found on this website www.breakpoint.org.  This is a video commentary by John speaking to current and timely cultural issues. John also produces a daily one-minute radio commentary call The Point.
Both the BreakPoint and Colson Center websites feature commentaries and feature articles by other established and up-and-coming writers to equip readers with a biblical perspective on a variety of issues and topics.
The Centurions Program is an intensive biblical studies program that equips Christians to engage their church, community and culture with biblical truth. Over 700 commissioned Centurions have gone through this one year program as of 2011.
Teaching products such as The Faith, ReWired, Wide Angle, and Doing the Right Thing assist believers in teaching others to understand and apply the truths of Scripture in everyday life.

Name: Cornerstone Christian Schools
Description: Cornerstone Christian Schools will create and sustain a Christ-centered teaching-learning environment of unprecedented excellence designed to develop every student spiritually, intellectually, physically, and socially to their maximum potential.

Name: منصة محمد السادس للحديث الشريف
Description: عناية أمير المؤمنين و المغاربة بالحديث النبوي الشريف

Name: Pauline Books & Media
Description: Pauline Books & Media is a publishing house and religious order of religious women who work in the media: film, radio, tv, social media, and bookstores.

Name: Sisters of Bon Secours
Description: Sisters of Bon Secours is an international congregation of religious sisters.  Founded in 1824 in Paris, France, the Sisters are in seven countries.  Founded to nurse the sick in their homes, the sisters' mission includes health care, human and social services, pastoral and spiritual retreats and education today.  Compassion, healing and liberation is at the heart of who we are.  Ministry, community and prayer are the cornerstones of our life.  The Bon Secours family extends to associates, lay service volunteer ministry and colleagues.  We are located in six states in the USA.  We welcome you to inquire about our life.  For more information email us at CBSVocations@bonsecoursusa.org. or call: 1-877-742-0277, or visit our website at: www.BonSecours.us for the United States or www.bonsecours.org to view our international page.

Name: Grace Cathedral
Description:
Grace Cathedral is an Episcopal church in the heart of San Francisco that is reimagining church with courage, joy and wonder. Grace is both a warm congregation and a house of prayer for all people, welcoming visitors from all over the world. 

Grace Cathedral is a place of inclusive community, spiritual practice, social justice, music and the arts. 

We invite you to join our services, visit our calendar of events, and connect with us on facebook, instagram and twitter.

Love, peace, hope and the arts live online at Grace.

Name: Open the Bible
Description: Helping people open the Bible so everyone everywhere can experience the transformative power of God's Word

Name: St. Andrew Methodist Church
Description: St. Andrew Methodist Church, founded in 1986, is located on 21.2 acres in Plano, Texas, and has more than 7,000 members. The church hosts over 2,000 people each weekend for worship services in both a traditional style with the classic pipe organ and a contemporary style with an LED center screen and lighting technology. St. Andrew extends an open invitation for all to be a part of a community ready to embrace faith in Christ that is real, practical, and life changing.  Many opportunities are provided to gather on campus and serve locally, regionally, and globally. Through Invite Ministries, St. Andrew’s publishing house, and Beacon of Light, a mental health ministry, St. Andrew offers innovative ways to reach Christians within its congregation and out in the community. The new 300-seat Hasley Chapel provides worship and other gathering opportunities in a scenic and more intimate setting. In 2022 St. Andrew became an independent Methodist Church seeking to live more like Jesus every day and to learn in deeper ways what it means to follow His teachings, live in community, and serve the world. 5801 West Plano Parkway, Plano, Texas 75093. Visit www.standrewmethodist.org; call (972)380-8001.

Name: Holy Language Institute
Description: WE STOPPED POSTING! Sign up free at holylanguage.com to get a weekly text/email with the lessons, stories, memes, and news we used to post here.

Name: Gloucester Cathedral
Description:
Gloucester Cathedral is a place where all are welcome, regardless of background or faith. We are open 365 days a year and are proud that there is no charge to enter the building. A donation will be requested.

Over 350,000 people from all over the world come to the Cathedral every year to take part in our services, events and activities or to enjoy the experience of visiting one of the finest medieval buildings in Europe. 450 hard-working, loyal volunteers help to ensure that their visit is as good as it possibly can be.

As a charity which is independent of Government we rely on donations and legacies, as well as income raised from our commercial activities. It costs over £6million a year to ensure the building is kept open and in the best condition possible for future generations.

Name: Göteborgs stift Svenska kyrkan
Description:
Med Svenska kyrkans 22 000 anställda, varav mer än hundra hör till Göteborgs stift, och ännu fler ideella är kyrkan en stor och inspirerande arbetsplats, flödande av kunskap och idéer.

En rik mångfald av människor och verksamhet ryms inom Svenska kyrkan och Göteborgs stift; allt från teologi och rättvisefrågor till fastighets- och finansfrågor. Tillsammans bedriver vi ett långsiktigt arbete, både nationellt och internationellt. Här får du chans att göra verklig skillnad och bidra till en hållbar samhällsutveckling med människovärdet i centrum. Vår grundsyn är att alla människor har lika värde inför Gud.

OM GÖTEBORGS STIFT
Svenska kyrkan framträder regionalt som ett stift under ledning av en biskop. Göteborgs stift omfattar Bohuslän, Halland och västra delen av Västergötland och består av 177 församlingar. Stiftets grundläggande uppgift är att främja och ha tillsyn över församlingslivet samt att förvalta Svenska kyrkans tillgångar inom jord, skog och fonder. Inom Göteborgs stiftsorganisation tjänstgör ett hundratal personer på stiftskansliet i Göteborg, i Uddevalla och ute i skog och mark.

Name: Diocèse de Versailles
Description:
Le diocèse de Versailles correspond au territoire du département des Yvelines. Il se caractérise par la diversité de sa géographie et de sa population : il regroupe, en effet, des zones urbaines, des zones encore très rurales et des villes nouvelles. 

En 2022, 215 prêtres sont incardinés au diocèse de Versailles. Plusieurs communautés masculines et féminines sont également présentes.

Pour mettre en œuvre les orientations pastorales de l'évêque, les services diocésains s'appuient sur des équipes de salariés et de bénévoles, au service des paroisses, des mouvements et des associations. Leur action n'est financée que par les dons.

Mgr Luc Crepy est évêque du diocèse de Versailles depuis le 6 février 2021. Il était auparavant évêque du Puy-en-Velay.
Sa devise « Delectare in Domino » se traduitpar « Trouve ta joie dans le Seigneur » (psaume 37,4) fait écho à l’appel du pape François dans son exhortation « L’Évangile de la joie » où il appelait toute l’Église à être missionnaire, c’est-à-dire à proposer à tous la joie qui remplit le cœur de ceux qui accueillent la bonne nouvelle du Christ.

Name: Center for Faith & Work
Description: Redeemer's Center for Faith & Work (CFW) is the cultural renewal arm of the Redeemer movement.

Name: Mount St. Mary's Seminary & School of Theology (MTSM)
Description: Mount St. Mary's Seminary & School of Theology (MTSM) is the Archdiocese of Cincinnati’s graduate-level Catholic Seminary and School of Theology with nearly 200 full and part-time students. Founded in 1829, our 75-acre campus provides preparation for ordination to the priesthood and permanent diaconate as part of Mount St. Mary’s Seminary. In addition, our School of Theology offers classes for graduate, non-degree and certification programs for laity, clergy and religious.

Name: Paróquia Sant'Ana - Diocese de Santo Amaro
Description:
A página "Paróquia Sant'Ana - Diocese de Santo Amaro" é dedicada exclusivamente para divulgação do Projeto Carreira Sant'Ana.

O PROJETO CARREIRA SANT’ANA foi criado para auxiliar profissionais no seu reposicionamento, na inserção no mercado, e na divulgação de seus negócios, visando aprimoramento de competências e networking.

O projeto possui palestras com temas atuais e relevantes e cursos online.

O projeto é gratuito e aberto a qualquer interessado, independente de credo, idade, raça ou situação profissional.

Os eventos do grupo ocorrem na primeira sexta-feira do mês às 19:00.

Name: First Alliance Church Calgary
Description:
Welcome to the official First Alliance Church (Calgary) LinkedIn page. Join us online or in person as we join Jesus in the renewal of all things! 

The Bible is our guide; the absolute truth that guides our teaching, use of the arts, and relationship to each other and to God. 

More than anything, we want to join Jesus in the renewal of hearts in Calgary and beyond as part of The Alliance Canada. To learn more, visit: faccalgary.com

Name: National Eucharistic Congress
Description: The National Eucharistic Congress, Inc. was formed by the United States Catholic Bishops in February 2022 as a key outreach of the missionary call of the Church. Its mission is to host the first National Eucharistic Congress since 1941 and a National Eucharistic Procession leading up to this milestone moment. It will then be tasked with continuing the missionary transformation of the Church by perpetuating the grassroots movement of the three-year Eucharistic Revival: continuing to form leaders, send Eucharistic Missionaries to the margins, spread Eucharistic Processions and Adoration, and re-establish National Eucharistic Congresses as key opportunities for Catholics in the United States to encounter Jesus Christ and be sent on mission “for the life of the world.”

Name: ISAIAH
Description: ISAIAH is an ecumenical, multi-racial, democratic and nonpartisan congregation-based community organization in the Twin City and St. Cloud regions of Minnesota. Our ninety member congregations (representing 175,000 individuals) work to promote racial and economic justice through intentional, intensive leadership development and collective, faith-based actions. ISAIAH works to ensure that all people, particularly the most vulnerable, are involved in creating their community’s future. ISAIAH is known as one of the most effective groups at the Capitol as well as throughout Twin Cities and St Cloud communities.

Name: Georgia Interfaith Power & Light
Description: Georgia Interfaith Power & Light engages communities of faith in stewardship of Creation as a direct expression of our faithfulness and as a religious response to global climate change, resource depletion, environmental injustice, pollution, and other disruptions in Creation.

Name: Diocese of San Diego
Description: Roman Catholic jurisdiction encompasing San Diego and Imperial counties in California, USA. Currently there are 98 parishes, six high schools, two universities, forty four elementary schools, two hospitals and several social service agencies which include Catholic Charities Diocese of San Diego and St. Vincent de Paul, AKA Fr. Joe's Villages.

Name: Grace United Methodist Church
Description: United Methodist Church

Name: St. Philip's in the Hills Episcopal Church
Description:
Saint Philip’s in the Hills is a community that is gathered in love, transformed by grace, and sent to serve. We have a long history as a cornerstone of life in Tucson. Grounded in faith in Christ we have sought to share our gifts and make God’s love known through service, art, music, and more. Our life is grounded in offering praise to God and service to our wider as we go deeper into the call of Christ to follow.

Saint Philip’s in the Hills is the largest Episcopal church in Arizona. We are known for outreach to the community, an outstanding music program, being a home for art and culture, and a history of active engagement in the life of the city. All of this has been done for the sake of knowing Christ and making Christ known. We have ways for those of all ages to grow in faith and to go deeper in their relationship with Christ. Faith, at Saint Philip’s, is the ongoing work of showing our love for God in our love for our neighbors.

Name: Saint Michael and All Angels Episcopal Church
Description: A parish of 5,000 members, Saint Michael and All Angels is one of the largest Episcopal Churches in the United States. Several services are offered to worshipers every weekend, and there are a wide variety of opportunities for spiritual formation, fellowship, and service to the community for all who seek a Church home. Affiliate organizations include the St. Michael's Woman's Exchange, Saint Michael Episcopal School, and Saint Michael's Farmers Market.

Name: Living on the Edge
Description: Living on the Edge exists to help Christians live like Christians. Founded by pastor and author Chip Ingram, the ministry provides Biblical teaching and practical tools that help believers live out their faith on a daily basis by fulfilling God’s calling on their life.

Name: The Blue Line Angels Church
Description: Our mission to pray for, evangelize by bringing the great news of Jesus to both the Jew and gentile, making disciples from all nations, teaching all to believe, repent, baptize and follow Jesus.

Name: Montreat Conference Center
Description:
Montreat Conference Center is a private, non-profit, national conference center with roots in the PC(USA). The conference center often is referred to simply as “Montreat” by the more than 30,000 guests, conferees, and cottagers who pass through the Gate each year. While we are affiliated with the Presbyterian Church (U.S.A.), we also readily welcome groups and individuals outside the Presbyterian church to experience Montreat. 

Nestled in the mountains of Western North Carolina, Montreat has served as place of spiritual retreat for over 120 years. Each year the conference center hosts dozens of programmed events, hundreds of retreats and conferences, and hosts thousands who seeking renewal and rest. We welcome visitors of all races, faiths, and orientation. All are welcome here. Find out more at www.montreat.org

Montreat has 13 hiking trails. Of Montreat’s 4,000 acres, 2,500 acres are dedicated to wilderness and are entered in the North Carolina Registry of Natural Heritage Areas. Learn more about the Montreat wilderness. In addition to its wilderness activities, Montreat also offers seven tennis courts, Robert Lake Park for children, Bill Wilde Youth Center, and Lake Susan for paddle boating, canoeing and fishing.

We welcome visitors of all races, faiths, and orientation. All are welcome here. Find out more at www.montreat.org

Name: National Community Church
Description: We exist to help you reach your God-given potential through a relationship with Jesus Christ. We believe that potential is God's gift to you and what you do with it is your gift back to God. We also believe that we can accomplish far more together than we can individually—so anyone and everyone is welcome to be part of National Community Church.

Name: Augustinian Province of Saint Thomas of Villanova
Description: The Order of Saint Augustine was founded in 1244 in Italy when several communities of hermits living in the region of Tuscany came together to ask Pope Innocent IV that they be united under one common Rule of life and one Superior General like other Orders that had recently been founded. The Pope gave them the Rule of Saint Augustine and asked representatives of each of their houses, gathered in chapter, to elect a Prior General who would be the sign and principal promoter of their desired unity. Not many years later, as the number of friars grew and the Order became more geographically extensive, other similar groups of hermits, scattered mostly throughout central Italy, were united to them, forming in 1256 what has come to be known as the Grand Union of the Order. The strong eremitical emphasis which characterized the early groups gradually began to give way to a mixed life of contemplation and pastoral ministry as the Church called the Order to form part of the Mendicant Movement and engage in the work of evangelization.

Name: KAILASA
Description:
Revival of the Hindu Nation

Eons ago, Paramashiva, the supreme consciousness & the ultimate Lord - revealed the cosmic constitution and Himself established an enlightened civilization & the first Hindu nation - Kailaasa. 

In the course of time, 56 major nations, 200 states and over thousand provinces were following Sanatana Hindu Dharma as the state religion. But in the last 1000 years of invasions and persecution, Hinduism lost all territories and after 2007, Nepal - the last remaining Hindu nation was lost. Along with it, the science of enlightenment started getting destroyed. There is no place left on planet earth for Hinduism to be practiced in peace, no place where Hinduism is the state religion. 

In this manner, till date, Hinduism has lost 56 Deshas (countries), 200 states, 1700 provinces, & 10,000 Sampradayas (spiritual and religious traditions). This is why we need a Hindu nation. Kailaasa is reviving our ancient enlightened civilization by forming the the only Hindu nation in the world right now.

Name: Central Christian Church
Description: Central Christian Church seeks to be a body of disciples who bring glory to God in all things according to Scripture – worshiping him, equipping His people, and evangelizing the world – as we eagerly anticipate the restoration of heaven and earth under one head, Christ the king.

Name: Eternal Wall of Answered Prayer
Description:
Eternal Wall is a national Christian landmark in the UK. A stunning piece of architectural art to provoke a conversation about prayer. A wall of a million bricks linking to one million people’s stories revealing how and why God answers prayer.

This is the first national landmark globally that has not only been crowd-funded and crowd-resourced, but also crowd-created.

Find out how you can be part of it by clicking on our 'Learn More' button.

Please note that the views, information, or opinions expressed in the answered prayers are solely those of the individuals and do not necessarily represent those of Eternal Wall.

Name: Peterborough Cathedral
Description:
Peterborough Cathedral is in the heart of the historic city of Peterborough, England. There has been a place of worship and prayer on this site for 1350 years, the present building is just over 900 years old.

Today it continues to be the focus for a vibrant community. It is the principle church for the Church of England diocese of Peterborough, which serves Northamptonshire, Rutland and the Soke of Peterborough.

The origins of the Cathedral can be traced back to King Peada of the Middle Angles who founded the first monastery on the site in 655AD. The monastic settlement was almost entirely destroyed by the Vikings in 870 and rebuilt as a Benedictine Abbey between 960 and 970. The Abbey church then survived Hereward the Wake’s attack on the Abbey in 1069, and remained intact until an accidental fire destroyed the second Abbey here in 1116. It was rebuilt in its present form between 1118 and 1238. It became the Cathedral of the new Diocese of Peterborough in 1541 and it is now known as the Cathedral Church of St Peter, St Paul and St Andrew.

Name: Aish NY
Description: The Aish Center is New York City’s premier organization for Jewish, learning, community and experience. Our one-on-one, Executive Learning Program (ELP) brings together Jewish professionals of any level of observance and a rabbi in a comfortable and convenient setting. We also offer a one-on-one Youth Learning Program (YLP) which is designed to supplement and enhance your child's (ages 8-15) current learning program. Our Our rabbis visit participants at their home or office providing highly customized, learning sessions, designed for those who don’t have a lot of free time and have interest or curiosity about Judaism, Torah, Talmud, spirituality, improving their relationships or marriages, business ethics or just finding a better way of living. The Aish Center also provides access to networking events, inspirational speakers, special film screenings, unique trips and more.

Name: Heart of God Church (Singapore)
Description:
Heart of God Church (HOGC) started in 1999 as a divine experiment to build a prototype Youth Church. It was founded by Senior Pastors Tan Seow How (Pastor How) and Cecilia Chan (Pastor Lia), who in their mid-20s dreamt of building a church operated by youths, for youths, to reach youths.

Today, HOGC has developed into a proof of concept that youths can build a STRONG CHURCH. Our vision is to raise up GenerationS of people who are willing to give God the best years of their lives.

More than 20 years since HOGC started, the average age across the church is 22! It is a growing 5,000-member congregation of youths, young adults and families who call HOGC their home.

For more on Heart of God Church and their Senior Pastors, visit PastorHow.com and PastorLia.com.

Name: Georgia-Cumberland Conference
Description:
The Georgia-Cumberland Conference of Seventh-day Adventists oversees more than 200 churches, 35 companies, and 39 elementary and high schools located in Georgia, Eastern Tennessee, and Cherokee County in North Carolina.  Also within this region are four Adventist hospitals, nine Adventist Community Services Centers, and one Adventist University.

There more than 42,600 Seventh-day Adventist members of the Georgia-Cumberland Conference.  The conference employs over 400 pastors, teachers, and support staff.

Name: Operatie Mobilisatie
Description: Operatie Mobilisatie is een wereldwijde beweging van volgelingen van Jezus. We zetten ons in voor de verspreiding van het Evangelie. Daarvoor bouwen we mee aan kleine geloofsgemeenschappen van discipelen die samen gemeente van Christus zijn. Zij maken het Evangelie hoorbaar, zichtbaar, tastbaar en richten zich actief op het opzetten van nieuwe gemeenschappen. Hiervoor mobiliseren we christenen in Nederland door ze te inspireren en toe te rusten om in de voetsporen van Jezus discipelmakers te worden.

Name: Southern Baptists of Texas Convention
Description:
REACHING TEXAS
•By starting new churches—From the beginning, the SBTC made missions and evangelism the priority in every aspect of our work. Churches in the SBTC have started hundreds of congregations since the convention began. Of those, over 300 were funded with SBTC missions money. Together we can do what no church can do alone.
•By strengthening church ministries—The Southern Baptists of Texas Convention supports the work of its churches by providing over 100 ministry services.
•By joining with ministry partners to provide resources for local churches—Educational institutions, family ministries, and other crucial services provide important ministry resources for SBTC churches. 

TOUCHING THE WORLD
•By joining with the Southern Baptist Convention—Ministries supported by over 40,000 Southern Baptist churches across the U.S. are also SBTC ministry partners. Our partnership with the Southern Baptist Convention allows us to share in a ministry that touches the world.
•By working with SBC partners to strengthen churches—Resources and expertise are available from SBC agencies providing trainings and support for churches committed to Great Commission ministry.
•By highlighting the priority of worldwide missions—The SBTC sends more through the SBC for worldwide missions than it keeps for in-state missions.

Name: JOHN CENTRE
Description:
John Centre (JC) is a present truth apostolic reformation church, sent to build and equip the saints to execute kingdom purpose. Eph. 4:11-13

John Centre is commissioned with a mission from the Lord to build the dimensions of Christ into human lives. When God wanted to save humanity because of His love for the world, He gave His only begotten son. We reciprocate the love of God to us in Christ by living Christ like life on the earth that glorifies our heavenly father. [John 3:16]

Name: Darashan
Description:
India being Hindustan, the birthplace of Hindus, needs a platform that gives individuals a personalized, spiritual connection to the deity they believe in. Darashan aims to connect people with their faith and religion, sacred texts and rituals, stories and quizzes.

We simplify bringing religion and technology together so you don’t have to go on a pilgrimage just to feel connected to your Gods. 

When spiritual roots are scattered and information online can’t be trusted, when it contradicts itself, you can find multiple stories on Darashan and interpret your truth for yourself. 

The secondary goal is to help children enjoy our grand history and benefit from the spirituality that our religion offers. With quizzes, stories and technology making our rituals accessible and tech-friendly, the chasm between the younger religion and the beliefs of the old can finally be bridged.

Purdue University, MSBA Department, has collaborated with Darashan to study the platform and streamline its database process leading to smooth service delivery to Darashan users.

At Darashan, we empower your beliefs. Live to the fullest.

Name: Moving Traditions
Description: Since its founding in January 2005, Moving Traditions has championed impact-focused youth-serving programs at the intersection of gender, wellbeing, and Judaism. Along the way, we’ve partnered with hundreds of synagogues, JCCs, camps, day schools, and emerging organizations and we have trained thousands of educators and clergy to meet the needs of Jewish preteens and teens. Today, 18 years of research and careful program evaluation shows just how well Moving Traditions strengthens Jewish educators, emboldens preteens and teens, and engages families.

Name: Theology of the Body Institute
Description:
The Theology of the Body Institute exists to promote the revolutionary teaching of Pope John Paul II on the divine meaning of the human body and human sexuality.

The mission of Theology of the Body Institute is to educate and train men and women to understand, live and promote the Theology of the Body.

Theology of the Body Institute envisions a world filled with men and women who freely embrace God’s glorious plan for their sexuality. Only from this foundation can an authentic culture of life and love take root and flourish. We aim to ensure that the teachings of John Paul II are promoted faithfully and effectively. Through our first rate education and unique outreach programs, the TOB Institute will be a premiere resource for education and formation in Theology of the Body.

Name: Jakarta Praise Community Church
Description:
We see a relevant local church with a global influence.
To build generations of stars that are pleasing to God and respected by people.

Name: The Evangelical Fellowship of Canada
Description:
Esablished in 1964, the EFC is the national association of evangelical Christians in Canada. We gather Evangelicals together for impact, influence and identity in ministry and public witness and provide a constructive voice for biblical principles in life and society. Our mission is to “unite Evangelicals to bless Canada in the name of Jesus.”

"Uniting Evangelicals" involves gathering, networking and convening Evangelicals for consensus, cooperation and collaboration. The EFC itself is a prime example of collaboration among Canadian evangelical leaders. It provides a platform for networking and convening, and engages with initiatives and programs that foster consensus, cooperation and collaboration among Evangelicals.

"Blessing Canada" involves undertaking and promoting activities that seek the wellbeing of our neighbours, communities and country, expressed through acts of service and speaking the truths of the Scriptures in love. We also bless our communities and our country by facilitating cooperation and collaboration among denominations, ministry organizations and local congregations for effective ministry, public witness and discipleship, by promoting religious freedom for all, and by promoting laws and public policy that conform to the life giving and shalom nurturing principles of Scripture.

"In the Name of Jesus" is both directive and expressive. It is directive in that it focuses our initiatives and programs, our words and deeds, on activities that are consistent with and flow out of our being disciples of Jesus Christ, being faithful to the teaching of Scripture, and that bears witness to His coming Kingdom. It is expressive in that we seek to see Him lifted up and alone given glory, affirming that all we do we do in service to Him.

Name: Union Church
Description:
KNOW GOD.
FIND FREEDOM.
DISCOVER PURPOSE.
MAKE A DIFFEENCE.

Name: All Nations Worship Assembly
Description: When visiting All Nations Worship Assembly (ANWA), you will enjoy contemporary worship with our growing community of diverse believers, experience unrestrained intimacy with the Holy Spirit, receive deliverance, and you will be healed and activated to make a lasting impact in the World through teachings and trainings designed to help unlock your full potential in Christ.

Name: Chase Oaks Church
Description: We inspire people to follow Jesus and together change our world for good.

Name: Apostolato Digitale
Description: Il Servizio per l’Apostolato Digitale è inserito nell’Ufficio per la Pastorale Universitaria dell’Arcidiocesi di Torino. Il nostro compito è quello di riflettere, progettare ed agire rispetto alla cultura digitale con un’ottica di fede.

Name: Birthastro
Description:
Born and brought up in Jammu & Kashmir, Deepak Chopra - An eminent astrologer has earned an outstanding position in society due to his commendable work in the field of astrology in India and abroad. Hailing from the city of temples, he is raised to prominence in his 23 years of experience in the field of astrology due to his strong will power, uniformity, caliber, conviction and perseverance towards his work.

Bestowed with many awards and medals, Deepak has earned accolades among astrologer fraternity across the nation. He provides best astrological solutions to his clients and offers the most precise readings by combining different practices. He not only offers astrological readings but also specializes in various other fields. He also offers other services like numerology, tarot reading, zodiac compatibility, and change. He has a lot of expertise and experience in the field, and his website covers details on all aspects of astrology and allied sciences.
In today’s online world, he also runs a website www.birthastro.com that ranks at the top in which he allows people to get astrological results by using specially designed software. He has also developed a mobile named Birthastro. Deepak Chopra is a hard-working personality with deep knowledge of Vedic astrology and allied science. 
          
Not just in India only, Deepak has also given various guest lectures all over the world. He has gained his large clientele from all over the world, and his clients go as far as Canada, Australia, and Singapore. Despite his tight schedule and huge clientele, he individually offers time to all of his clients.
With a quantity of occurrences and predictions, he is recognized as the top astrologer in India. Top business tycoons and bureaucrats from across the globe are engaged with Deepak and making their lives smooth with his accurate predictions.

Name: Chapelhill Church
Description: We are a family of churches located across the Atlanta area and online that exist to lead people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ.

Name: The Immaculata
Description: The Immaculata is a Catholic Church built by the Society of St. Pius X in the heartland of America – as a symbol of hope for Traditional Catholicism serving the community of St. Marys, KS. With seating designed to sit over 1,500 faithful, this will be the largest Catholic Church in the state of Kansas - and the largest Church ever constructed by the priestly Society of St. Pius X.

Name: VIVE Church
Description: VIVE Church is a locally focused, globally connected ministry led by Pastors Adam and Keira Smallcombe. In just 10 years, the church has grown to include 10 physical locations and an online community spanning over 20 countries. Based in Palo Alto, CA, VIVE mobilizes the members of their global community through online streaming, original music, and pioneering creativity with the mission of “awakening people to the reality of Jesus and bringing heaven to earth.”

Name: truthministries.info
Description: WE TEACH PEOPLE THE PATTERN OF THE BIBLE!

Name: Max De Pree Center for Leadership
Description: The Max De Pree Center for Leadership equips people to respond faithfully to God's callings in all seasons of their life and leadership. We offer a wide variety of resources and experiences both online and in person, including Life for Leaders free daily devotional, webinars, devotional guides for individuals and small groups, articles, The Road Ahead cohorts, and more. Find these and other resources on our website!

Name: Victory Philippines
Description: Victory is a church in the Philippines that exists to honor God and make disciples. It is a co-founding member of Every Nation, a global movement dedicated to establishing church-planting churches, reaching the next generation on the campus, and preaching the gospel to every nation. Today, Every Nation is present in over 80 nations.

Name: Hickory Grove Baptist Church
Description:
At Hickory Grove Baptist Church our mission is to Exalt Christ, Make Disciples, and Pass the Torch. 

Hickory Grove Baptist Church has three campus locations in the Charlotte area. The Main Campus is located at the corner of Hickory Grove Road and Harris Blvd in east Charlotte.  The second location is our North Campus which is located off of I-85 in north Charlotte and is less than one mile behind Concord Mills Mall. This location includes a worship service for our Latin American congregation.  The third campus is our Latin American campus located on Harris Blvd. 

There are several ways you can check out our services before you decide to come. Visit HickoryGroveWorship.org where you can watch our worship services live video streaming at our main and north campuses, watch or listen on demand, or check out our live rebroadcast of one of our Sunday morning services during the week.

Name: Glad Tidings Assembly of God Church
Description:
We are here to help you become fully devoted followers of Jesus Christ!
	
Our goal at GT is to make church a powerful and inspiring experience each and every week. We incorporate multi-media, drama and a blend of contemporary music with heartfelt worship to complement the Biblical message of the day. We talk about the issues you face every day and connect God’s wisdom and Word to your life. Our prayer is that our services will help you to grow as a “fully devoted fol...lower of Jesus Christ.”

We offer three services every weekend:
Saturday at 6 p.m. and Sunday at 9 a.m. and 11 a.m. All our services are broadcast  live over the internet at www.livestream.com/gladtidings.

(Crossroads Kidz Ministry for children birth-5th grade is available during all services)

GT OFFERS SOMETHING FOR EVERYONE!
CROSSROADS NURSERY AND PRE-SCHOOL: (Infants - 5 years) Our goal in Crossroads is to be sure that every child understands three things: God made them, God loves them, and Jesus wants to be their friend forever.

CROSSROADS KIDZ: (Kindergarten - 5th Grade) Crossroads for elementary-aged kids begins in the gym with an engaging large group environment for worship and teaching by a master Bible storyteller. Immediately following large group, the children meet in grade/gender based small groups to talk about how the monthly virtue and Bible story apply to their lives.

Name: EKBO - Evangelisch im Osten
Description:
Die EKBO ist eine von 20 Gliedkirchen der Evangelischen Kirche in Deutschland. Als lebendige und vielfältige Landeskirche gestalten wir gemeinsam Glauben, Bildung, Kultur und gesellschaftliches Miteinander – in der Metropole Berlin ebenso wie in ländlichen Regionen Brandenburgs und der schlesischen Oberlausitz.

Rund 8.000 Mitarbeitende engagieren sich bei uns in unterschiedlichsten Berufsfeldern: als Pfarrer*innen, Gemeindepädagog*innen, Kirchenmusiker*innen, Religionslehrkräfte sowie in der Verwaltung, der Seelsorge, im kirchlichen Bauwesen und vielen weiteren Bereichen.

Wir schätzen Teamgeist, christliche Werte, Verantwortung und Offenheit. Ob Sie sich beruflich verändern oder gesellschaftlich etwas bewegen möchten – bei der EKBO finden Sie ein sinnstiftendes Arbeitsumfeld mit vielfältigen Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten.

Name: Christ Covenant
Description: We are a gospel-centered family on a mission to make Jesus known and make disciples.

Name: Sightline
Description: Sightline exists to cut through cultural confusion so people see Jesus clearly. We are on mission to equip Christians around the world with resources to help them engage confusion in culture with the essential truths of Christianity. Through a combination of live events, podcasts, print and digital resources, we seek to serve others until the whole world hears about Jesus.

Name: Inspiration For The Beautiful Life
Description:
Prophet Cosmas Inyang is passionate about helping people grow, develop, live and enjoy the beautiful life to the full.
His Ministry spanning over 10 years continues to spread The Gospel of The Lord Jesus, Changing Lives globally.
The Ministry of Prophet Cosmas is characterized by the Revelation of The Word of God, Transformational Teachings, Prophecy, Power, Miracles, Healings and Manifestations.

Prophet Cosmas Inyang is available for Prayer and Counseling via his Prayer Line on WhatsApp  and Telegram. You can get His Teachings, Revelations, Inspiration, Prophecy and Prophetic Declarations via his blog (PROHET COSMAS DIARY),  his podcast(PROPHET COSMAS PODCAST), his official YouTube channel, his Newsletter on LinkedIn / Substack and in his books on Amazon, Audible and other online stores where books are sold like Apple books and Google books.

His books are in categories like Success and Growth, Personal Development and Transformation, Money and Abundance, Healing and Health, Marriage and Relationship, Business, Jobs and Career, Mind and Wellbeing and more.

LEARN MORE/CONTACT
For more about Prophet Cosmas Inyang or to get his personal, reachable and direct contact details like email or mobile phone line,  please click on the VISIT WEBSITE button at the header or top of this page

Thank you for following me and checking on me. God bless you greatly.
PCI

Name: Liquid Church
Description:
Officially launched in 2007 by Lead Pastor Tim Lucas, Liquid is a non-denominational Christian church that is Bible-based and Christ-centered.

We are one church with multiple campuses in Essex, Middlesex, Monmouth, Morris, Somerset, and Union Counties. Each week, more than 4,500 people experience our worship services across New Jersey and around the globe through Church Online.

As part of our global outreach, Liquid provides clean drinking water to the poorest of the poor, with dozens of completed wells in several countries, including El Salvador and Nicaragua – and most recently, Rwanda! Our innovative approaches to outreach and ministry have been spotlighted by CNN and The New York Times.

At Liquid, we invite you to join us and “come as you are” – whether you’ve never been to church before or you’re a Sunday regular, you’ll fit right in!

Name: Bethlehem Lutheran Church
Description:
Connecting people with God, each other and their mission in the world.

Bethlehem is a community of people who come from all over the Twin Cities. We are committed to seeing the world change for the better, in Jesus' name, and seeing how God works through and in our lives. We are a community that is inclusive and open and seeks answers to questions together.

Name: Old St. Patrick's Church
Description: Old St. Patrick's Church located in the heart of downtown Chicago has been a staple in this great city for over a century and continues to seek new horizons in the community. With a membership of more than 3,000 households, we constantly strive to build an organization that reflects the diversity and character of Chicago. Hospitality and welcoming to each person that joins in our mission remains steadfast. Whatever brings you to Old St. Pat's, always know that you are welcome.

Name: Georgia Christian Business Network
Description:
Our goal is to equip business owners and professionals, all who have been called to be His light in their industry, with tools and resources needed for success.  We work to unite and equip business people through networking meetings, workshops and special events. 

We challenge and encourage each to remain focused, to work their unique God-given vision.  Our integrated website allows members unique avenues for advertising, marketing, and interacting with each other. We offer many professional business solutions to facilitate achieving their objectives such as industry seminars and workshops, non-profit organization set-up, business coaching, website, logo, financial services, and more. The programs and services sponsored by GCBN are relevant and are structured in a way that benefits everyone from the small business owner to the corporate professional.

Name: Park Community Church
Description:
We exist to be a biblical community where the Gospel of Jesus Christ transforms lives, renews the city, and impacts the world.

Park Community Church is a non-denominational Christian church with a heart for the city of Chicago. Since its inception, Park has met at close to 20 locations, all the while maintaining the desire to be a vibrant church where the truth of the Gospel could be clearly and creatively communicated to the surrounding community.

Name: CatholicismRocks
Description: CatholicismRocks is a media ministry that serves Christ by explaining and defending the Catholic faith. We help Christians grow in their faith; we bring former Catholics home; and we lead non-Catholics into the fullness of the faith.

Name: Crossings Community Church
Description:
In 1959 a group of people were ready to serve Oklahoma City and love others just like Jesus did. That has not changed. Today, Crossings Community Church continues to help people find and follow Jesus.

For nearly 6 decades Crossings Community Church has followed the example of the early Church we find in Acts 2. This was a community that learned, ate and prayed together. Not only that they were generous and made sure no one was in need!

We are a Christ-centered church.
We are committed to helping people find and follow Jesus. 
We are committed to live by faith, be a voice of hope, and be known by love.

Name: CAPP-USA
Description:
CAPP (Centesimus Annus Pro Pontifice) is a lay-led, pontifical organization characterized by a special relationship through our founder, St.John Paul II, with the Chair of Peter. CAPP is a vehicle for lay education and evangelization of Catholic social doctrine, as contained in the encyclical Centesimus Annus. CAPP is made up of committed business people, academics, and professionals who work to apply/bring the principles of Catholic Social Teaching to the market place.

St. John Paul II established Fondazione Centesimus Annus – Pro Pontifice on June 5, 1993. It is run in accordance with its approved bylaws under the aegis of the Apostolic See. It is headquartered in the state of Vatican City. The organization is subject to the civil law of Vatican City and the Canon Law of the Church.

Name: One Challenge | OC International
Description:
One Challenge. Transforming Nations ... Together.
