One Challenge (OC Intl) is a mission-sending and support agency passionate about the body of Christ working together to disciple whole nations and to bring God's transforming hope to all people.

Our Vision – The body of Christ in unity bringing God’s transforming love and hope to all people.

Our Mission – We serve, equip, and connect the body of Christ and its leaders to advance God’s kingdom among all people.

Our Strategy – We ask how God is at work, then assist the body of Christ to bring God’s transformation to lives, communities, and nations.

One Challenge is involved in Missions Mobilization, Church Planting & Growth, Education, Holistic Ministry, Leadership Development, Member Care, Partnering & Bridge Building, Research, Sports Ministries, as well as Business for Transformation.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Pittsburgh
Description: Founded August 11, 1843, we are a community of 628,000 Catholics who live in the southwest corner of Pennsylvania: Allegheny, Beaver, Butler, Greene Lawrence and Washington counties. Our mission is to help everyone learn Jesus, love Jesus and live Jesus.

Name: Real Spiritual Knowledge
Description:
Our Race is living Being,
Mankind is our Religion,
Hindu, Muslim, Sikh, Christian,
there is no separate religion

Name: Faith Assembly
Description:
We are a dynamic, multi-cultural church in Central Florida. Our mission is simple: Faith Assembly exists to help people encounter Jesus. 

Our vision is that The Gospel reaches all of our surrounding communities. To make Jesus known, we will stay relevant with culture but unmoved by cultural influences that steer away from our firm beliefs. We will design environments and experiences that connect people to the faith community. We will prioritize spiritual growth by framing all of our efforts around the fundamental truths of God’s Word. We will actively support local and global missions by continuously increasing our financial support of missionaries and presence in the mission field.

Weekly Service Times:
Sundays | 8am, 10am, & 12pm
Wednesdays | 7pm

Name: REVIVAL ORDER TV
Description: BUILDING GODLY CHAMPIONS FOR GOD ALMIGHTY OUR CREATOR  OF HEAVEN AND EARTH

Name: Ellel Ministries Canada
Description:
Ellel Ministries is a non-denominational Christian Mission Organisation with a vision to resource and equip the Church by welcoming people, teaching them about the Kingdom of God and healing those in need (Luke 9:11).

The mission of Ellel Ministries is to fulfil the above vision throughout the world, as God opens the doors, in accordance with the Great Commission of Jesus and the calling of the Church to proclaim the Kingdom of God by preaching the good news, healing the broken-hearted and setting the captives free. Ellel Ministries is, therefore, committed to evangelism, healing, deliverance, discipleship and training. The particular Scriptures on which this mission is founded are Isaiah 61:1-7, Luke 9:1-2, Luke 9:11, Matthew 28:18-20, Ephesians 4:12 and 2 Timothy2:2.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Fort Wayne-South Bend
Description: The Diocese of Fort Wayne-South Bend is a Roman Catholic diocese in north central and northeastern Indiana. The Most Reverend Kevin C. Rhoades was appointed Bishop of Fort Wayne-South Bend  by Pope Benedict XVI on November 14, 2009 and installed on January 13, 2010. The Diocese includes 14 Indiana counties – Adams, Allen, DeKalb, Elkhart, Huntington, Kosciusko, LaGrange, Marshall, Noble, Steuben, St. Joseph, Wabash, Wells, and Whitley.

Name: Church Ministries Directory Australia
Description:
Creating connections and new relationships.
The Church Ministries Directory Australia has been moved from the Church Support Australia page to its own page. here.

Name: London Diocesan Fund
Description:
The London Diocesan Fund (LDF) exists to support the mission of the Church of England in London. Its strategy is nested entirely within the wider objectives of the Diocese’s Capital Vision 2020, which shares a vision of a Church in London that is Christ-centred and outward looking.

We seek to be more confident in speaking and living the Gospel of Jesus Christ, more compassionate in serving communities with the love of God the Father and more creative in reaching new people and places in the power of the Spirit.

Name: Church Of The City
Description: Church of the City is a family of diverse neighborhood churches working together for the common good & the renewal of Nashville.

Name: The Chapel
Description:
The Chapel a non-denominational church with 8 different location throughout the Chicagoland area.

Our mission is to make disciples of Jesus who embody and extend the Kingdom of God by forging communities that inspire, equip, and release disciples who are experiencing God and sharing his presence, truth, love, and power to everyone in their world.

Name: St. John's Lutheran Church
Description: St. John's Lutheran Church is a religious community that offers worship, education, and social outreach services.

Name: Voltemos ao Evangelho
Description:
Em 04 de Abril de 2013 o Voltemos ao Evangelho uniu forças ao Ministério Fiel. O Ministério Fiel visa apoiar o cristão e a igreja, fornecendo conteúdo fiel à Palavra de Deus através de conferências, cursos teológicos, literatura, ministério Adote um Pastor e conteúdo online gratuito. Acreditamos que nisso tudo o Evangelho é central e por esse motivo unimos forças com o VE para juntos apoiarmos a igreja de Cristo e encorajá-la para voltar ao Evangelho.
O blog Voltemos ao Evangelho nasceu com o grandioso intuito de proclamar as Boas Novas, chamando os cristãos para voltarem à centralidade da glória de Deus, na face de Cristo, e ao fundamento das Escrituras. Fundado em 2008 por Vinícius Musselman Pimentel, com a ajuda de vários colaboradores, o VE se empenhou em disponibilizar textos e vídeos online de diversos pregadores do mundo inteiro. Com a união, o VE, ainda sob liderança do Vinícius, continuará servindo a igreja de fala portuguesa, porém, agora, como parte do Ministério Fiel.
Junte-se a nós nessa missão de ver o Evangelho anunciado e Deus glorificado!
Leia mais sobre nós aqui: http://voltemosaoevangelho.com/blog/quem-somos/

Name: OCCA The Oxford Centre for Christian Apologetics
Description: At OCCA The Oxford Centre for Christian Apologetics, our mission is to meaningfully engage with people’s big questions about life and God. Through the Christian worldview, OCCA’s team of speakers seek to respond to the culturally relevant topics that are in the forefront of people’s mind and offer a perspective on artificial intelligence, identity, science and faith, human dignity, ethics, and so on. Regardless of your professional background, follow us to join in the conversation and explore life’s big questions with us.

Name: BJC
Description:
We are attorneys, Capitol Hill insiders, ministers, mobilizers and scholars. We file briefs in pivotal Supreme Court cases, advocate for and against legislation, testify in Congress and unite with others across faiths to ensure that all Americans have, and will always have, the right to follow their spiritual beliefs. 

Founded in 1936, we bring our uniquely Baptist perspective of “soul freedom” to protecting religious liberty for all and defending the separation of church and state. We are the only faith-based group working on the national level with this singular focus.

Name: Officers' Christian Fellowship
Description:
OCF exists to gather Christian military leaders together for Biblical encouragement and growth so that the entire military society is impacted positively wherever these leaders serve. Currently serving Christian leaders will be encouraged and helped in their spiritual journey by being connected with the larger body of Christ, especially with those who have served ahead of them.

OCF’s Vision is the military community positively impacted through Christ-like leaders. Our Mission is to engage military leaders in Biblical fellowship and growth to equip them for Christ-like service at the intersection of faith, family, and profession. 

OCF helps develop personal spiritual growth and resilience by connecting men and women in fellowship and mentoring relationships (discipleship) that center on Scripture, engage in prayer, and allow members to live life together. Military Christians understand one another’s customs and courtesies. 

A regular gathering of Christian singles, couples, and families will have the effect of OCF members caring for their neighbors in housing, in exchanges, in commissaries, in their units, in garrison, in the field, at sea, and in times of peace and conflict. Men and women in OCF fellowships plant seeds and provide water for the spiritual growth God gives (1 Corinthians 3:6-9). The result will be leaders and volunteers who are changed and matured in military service, and the places where they work will be blessed by their presence, their leadership, and their fulfillment of duties.

Christ-like leaders love as they have been loved, forgive as they have been forgiven, share in suffering for the sake of others, and spend themselves for the sake of souls found within the military community.

Name: Xavier Mission Fund
Description: Mission agency dedicated to helping Catholic teachers, missionaries, and non-profits manage their efforts, and BE ON MISSION!

Name: Muslim Student Association
Description: The Muslim Student Association here at the University of New Haven strives to be a welcoming, inclusive, and diverse space for our brothers and sisters on campus. We hope to maintain a community of support for our members through various social, religious, and cultural events, alumni networks, and volunteer opportunities. We aim to strengthen community ties and provide a library of social, religious, and academic resources while simultaneously promoting the presence of Muslim students at the university.

Name: Associação Paulistana da IASD
Description:
Sede Administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia e Educação Adventista na Região Central de São Paulo. 
Instagram: @adventistas.paulistana

Name: All Saints Catholic School
Description:
Welcome to All Saints Catholic School! Founded in 1997, our regional elementary school has evolved and grown tremendously. Located in southeast Michigan, our school serves approximately 570 students in preschool through eighth grade. We are fully accredited by the Michigan Non-Public Schools Accrediting Association (MNSAA) and our curriculum includes religion, language arts, math, science, social studies, Spanish, music, art, computer technology, library skills, and physical education

Our philosophy as educators is to go beyond simply imparting knowledge to students but to focus on laying the foundation not only for academic education, but for the spiritual and moral growth and development of the whole child. We have a gifted, supportive team of teachers who assist our students in maximizing their potential. Our staff includes resource and enrichment teachers, classroom aides, a school counselor and volunteer tutors. 

All Saints Catholic School offers an an excellent education where the diversity of learning styles is honored, and individual differences are respected. Our mission is to provide a Catholic education based on four fundamental values: Academic Excellence, Service to Others, Community Building and Sharing our Faith. By focusing on these four pillars, we seek to nurture growth in mind, body and spirit and encourage each student to reach his or her personal potential.

Name: Centre Street Church
Description:
We want to make an impact in your life, your community, and in the world. How do we go about that? By leading people to Jesus and helping them become fully devoted followers of Christ. That's the driving purpose behind everything we do!

We want to help you get to know God better and enable you to become a fully devoted follower. No matter where you are in life, we'll help you figure out the next step in your journey with Him.  Start with joining a small group, serving, participating in classes and workshops, giving, or attending church regularly. Along the way, we hope to work with you to make the world a better place.

We believe that strong families start with a solid foundation. We partner with parents to help raise up the next generation to have a strong relationship with Jesus. 

We're serving a global community, individually and in groups, inside our church and around the world. We serve in many different ways, but there's one common thread: people who are passionate about demonstrating God's love to others. As a church we support and engage in several causes to serve our global community.

Name: Chinchpoklicha Chintamani | Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal, Mumbai
Description:
Mumbai was once a hub of cotton mills and Lalbaug, Parel, Sewree were the heart of this cotton hub.Most of the mill workers were the natives of Konkan who in search of better job opportunities.
With the basic ideology of starting Ganesh Utsav by Lokmanya Tilak for uniting people and to bring about Swarajya local residents of Chinchpokli established Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav in 1920.
Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal is steadily inching towards its Centenary year this mandal is well known for having the largest area as the resident area and with about

 5000 Varganidars 12 Members in Core Committee 103 Karyakarini Sadasyas and over 1000-2000 sahayyak sadasyas the mandal is known for its unity which has brought this mandal to this level.
With the grace of Lord Chintamani and Goddess Aaibhavani Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal has been at the forefront in the field of Social Service by the means of Public Festivals. Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav mandal has always walked the path of humanity with its commendable contribution in the field of Education, Health etc. Mandal over its journey of past so many years has celebrated Ganeshotsav, Navratrotsav, National Festivals, while carrying out Medical camps, health check ups at reasonable rates, Nursery School for toddlers, library, reference library etc.
The office for Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal is open for the general public as well as Chintamani Bhakts all throughout the year. The Karyakartas of this mandal are keeping them ahead with time with Pages on Social Media which are highly responsive to queries and suggestions.
Chinchpokli Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal has been socially active for the welfare of the society and will always stay committed to society and its well being.
We thank everyone who has directly or indirectly helped us to reach this height. Because without their efforts the journey would have been difficult.

Name: Bistum Trier
Description: Das älteste Bistum Deutschlands erstreckt sich über Teile von Rheinland-Pfalz und des Saarlands

Name: सनातनधर्म स्थापनार्थ
Description: Spiritual Mission is a religious institutions company based out of 638 Hogarth Rd & Goodman Rd, Elizabeth South, Australia.

Name: Wesley Biblical Seminary
Description: Wesley Biblical Seminary is a multi-denominational, graduate school of theology within the evangelical, Wesleyan-Arminian tradition. The mission of the seminary is to provide graduate-level, theological education for persons preparing for Christian service. This mission is accomplished by nurturing the spiritual life of the students, guiding the development of their biblical and theological understanding, and improving their ministry skills. The desired outcome is persons who are competently prepared to fulfill their role in the global mission of the church.

Name: Diocese of Southwark
Description:
The Diocese of Southwark is the Church of England in South London & East Surrey. We seek to be a Diocese:

Walking with Jesus and getting to know Jesus better as we jour ney on
Welcoming all, embracing our diversity and seeking new ways of being church
Growing in numbers, generosity, faith and discipleship as we grow God's Kingdom

Our vision is founded on mutual commitment from all who make up the Diocesan family to walk together in the pilgrimage of faith, supporting, encouraging and resourcing each other in our common task.

Name: PastorServe, Inc.
Description:
PastorServe is committed to helping pastors and churches experience healthy leadership as they extend the hope of Jesus into our ever changing world. Since 1999, PastorServe has been coming alongside ministry leaders to provide coaching and support, both equipping and encouraging pastors as they live out their calling. 

We believe all of life matters and has an impact on how effective pastors and ministry leaders will be in living out their calling. This belief leads us to champion something that is distinctive in how we approach our coaching and consulting. At PastorServe we focus on helping our clients holistically, addressing both Personal Life (Backstage) and Professional Life (Front Stage) to guide ministry leaders into 
a flourishing life of effective Kingdom impact.

Personal Life (Backstage)
We help all of our pastors to think more intentionally about the key areas such as marriage, family, relational health, spiritual health, emotional health, physical health, and even finances.

Professional Life (Front Stage)
We assist pastors in truly developing as church leaders, including leadership philosophy, primary roles and responsibilities, and navigating deeper challenges and concerns facing the local church. We address practical needs and opportunities as they arise such as staff development, discipleship pathways, community outreach, and more.

In making progress on these challenges, we’ll help you become more effective in vital leadership competencies such as Diagnosing Situations, Intervening Skillfully, Managing Yourself, Energizing Others, Identifying Opportunities, and Change Management.

Consulting for us, perhaps more than anything else, is about having perspective.
Our unique perspective comes from serving hundreds of churches and thousands of pastors over 20+ years. More importantly, we love helping pastors benefit from the perspective God has given us.

Reach out today for a free 1 hour coaching session

Name: United Women in Faith
Description: United Women in Faith seeks to connect and nurture women through Christian spiritual formation, leadership development, creative fellowship and education so that they can inspire, influence and impact local and global communities.

Name: Journey Church
Description:
We are a spiritual family leading people to become “all in” followers Jesus. Join us online for our livestream or on-site at The Commons,
Sundays at 9 and 11 am MST

Name: COZA Global
Description: The Commonwealth of Zion Assembly is an international church sent to reach out to the unreached in our generation. We are quite excited by your interest in our church and sincerely hope that your experience with us will inspire you into a deeper sense of purpose and walk with God.

Name: Saint Nicholas Greek Orthodox Church & National Shrine
Description:
The Saint Nicholas Greek Orthodox Church was the only house of worship destroyed in the September 11, 2001 terrorist attacks.

Finally being rebuilt, the Church and National Shrine will serve as a powerful symbol of resilience and a beacon of hope and light that will welcome people of all faiths.

Name: Anglican Church of Australia
Description: Aiming to be a Life changing Christian community

Name: Rhema Bible Training College
Description: RBTC is a school unlike any other! the moment you step on campus, you'll sense the presence of the Holy Spirit and the spirit of faith that saturates the atmosphere. Additionally, our unique blend of practical and supernatural training will give you a solid biblical foundation and equip you for success. Not only will you learn how to hear the voice of God and recognize His leadings, you'll also receive targeted training that will enable you to fulfill everything God has called you to do.

Name: Sexuality Matters
Description: Our heart is to educate and provide counsel on the topics of healthy sexuality as a foundation for wise leadership of ourselves and others.

Name: School Sisters of St. Francis
Description: We are an international community of Catholic sisters who unite with others to build a just and peaceful world.  Founded in 1874, we now have sisters, associates, donors and volunteers actively working to address the needs of those who are poor and marginalized by society.  Our mission is thriving throughout the United States, Europe, Latin America and India.

Name: All Christ Church
Description: Church is a movement, not a meeting. Church is people, not a place. We want to be a church that breaks down walls between where people are and where Jesus is. We want to be a church that knocks down any and every boundary that might hinder people from experiencing the abundant life God has for them. We will not stop one inch short of the life Jesus died for us to live. We will be a church without walls.

Name: Doxa Deo
Description: Doxa Deo is a multi-site church with locations throughout South Africa, the United Kingdom, Germany, and New Zealand. Alan Platt is the founder and senior pastor of Doxa Deo. There are currently 34 Doxa Deo campuses worldwide, with as many associated educational and non-profits. Doxa Deo serves a constituency of approximately 30,000 people.[1] Doxa Deo Church is part of the Apostolic Faith Mission of South Africa, the Evangelical Alliance of South Africa, the Pioneer Network of London, and Die Stadtreformer in Germany.

Name: Uniao Sul Brasileira Da Igreja Adventista Do 7 Dia
Description: Uniao Sul Brasileira Da Igreja Adventista Do 7 Dia is a religious institutions company based out of R Joao Carlos Souza Castro, 562, Curitiba, Paraná, Brazil.

Name: ACdP
Description:
La ACdP es una asociación católica con más de cien años de historia, de intensa participación en la vida pública española. 

Promueve obras en todas las áreas de la soceidad: educativas, como el CEU y el Colegio Mayor Universitario de San Pablo, culturales, como la Fundación Cultural Ángel Herrera Oria, y medios de comunicación, como el diario digital eldebatedehoy.es; además, es la entidad organizativa del Congreso y Jornadas Católicos y Vida Pública.

Name: MarketPlace Midland
Description:
MarketPlace Midland (MPM) was formed to sustain and reinforce the legacy left to us by those who came before us and built The Tall City. Our intention is to do so from a decidedly biblical world-view. We believe God is interested in our entire week and not just our time in church on Sunday morning. MPM will endeavor to introduce helpful tools that will enable all of us to integrate timeless biblical principles into modern business. 

We meet once a month for a luncheon and fellowship at various locations in Midland, TX. Please email Alyssa at alyssa.castille@desertroyaltyco.com for more information and to reserve your seat.

Name: Klooster Nieuw Sion
Description: Klooster Nieuw Sion is een plaats en gemeenschap waar mensen dichter bij God, bij zichzelf, bij de medemens en de natuur kunnen komen door stilte en gebed, arbeid en gastvrijheid vanuit een christelijke, neo-monastieke spiritualiteit.

Name: Islamic Reminders Pakistan
Description:
Islamic Reminders Pakistan is an online community that encourages creativity, self-development and entrepreneurship. IRP is founded few years ago, supported by a group of writers and creative people, who share their experiences, daily lives and tips on a wide range of topics to spread the message of Islam. Their goal is to inspire and motivate you and each other. Believer unites people from different backgrounds and cultures, not only to create a strong community of Muslims, but to make the world of Muslims more accessible to others. Sharing stories and keeping an open mind is what IRP is all about in support to spread the message of Islam.
Vision: Connect all humans with Quran and Sunnah.
Mission: Use technology for the purpose of spreading the message of Islam in the country.
•	Islamic Reminders Pakistan is an organization that hosts talks and Tarbiyyyah training for youth and aims to revive and strengthen their Muslim identity, spirit, and passion to contribute to the betterment of the Ummah for the Sake of Allah.
•	We are a body that takes care of the Muslims welfare, a body to educate the public on Islam and to subside misunderstanding about the religion, also as a body to unite between the Muslims other than as a body that would stimulate and catalyse an Islamic and high morality environment on daily basis.
Our Areas of Focus
We aim to address relevant topics head-on with the help of the foremost experts in this space. Our work concentrates in the following areas.
Working Areas: Dawah – Daily Reminders about Islam – Kids Zone – IR Charity Foundation – Conferences - Seminars – Talk’s – Sister’s Halaqa – Sessions.

Name: Marian Catholic High School
Description: Since its founding, the mission of Marian Catholic High School was and continues to be, to develop students spiritually, morally, academically, academically, and socially by integrating the teachings of Jesus Christ with a value-centered curriculum. In a safe family atmosphere, the faculty and administration challenge students not only to reach their highest academic potential, the faculty and administration challenge students not only to reach their highest academic potential, but also to adopt a disciplined work ethic necessary to become contributing self-sufficient citizens who give witness to their Catholic Faith.

Name: Christ Church
Description:
Christ Church is a non-denominational Christian congregation comprised of people from diverse racial, cultural, and ethnic backgrounds. We are a community minded congregation with a global sensitivity. Christ Church exists to unite people to God and people to people.

It is our hope that your spiritual needs will be met, and that your physical and emotional concerns are addressed as we seek God together through praise and worship.

Our church family of 6000+  represents approximately 40 different nationalities. To accommodate the needs and schedules of our congregation, we offer a number of weekend worship services along with various classes and small group activities for weekly Bible-based instruction.

Weekly Services @ Christ Church

East Campus
Church Street & Trinity Place (68 Church Street)
Montclair, NJ 07042

Saturdays: 7:00 PM.
Sundays: 8:00 AM, 10:00 AM, 11:45 AM and 1:30 PM.
Thursdays: 7:00 PM

Teen Church: Services for teens (ages 12-17) are held on the East Campus every 1st and 3rd Sundays at 10:00 AM and 11:45 AM in the Fellowship Hall.


West Campus
140 Green Pond Road
Rockaway, NJ 07866

Sundays: 9:00 AM and 11:30 AM.
Thursdays: 7:00 PM

Teen Church: Services for teens (ages 12-17) are held on the West Campus every 2nd and 4th Sundays at 9:00 AM and 11:30 AM in the Fellowship Hall.

God bless you & thanks for connecting with us on LinkedIn!

Name: Cathedral of St. John the Divine
Description:
The Cathedral Church of Saint John the Divine, the mother church of the Episcopal Diocese of New York and the Seat of its Bishop, is chartered as a house of prayer for all people and a unifying center of intellectual light and leadership. It serves the many diverse people of our Diocese, City, Nation and World through an array of liturgical, cultural and civic events; pastoral, educational and community outreach activities; and maintains the preservation of the great architectural and historic site that is its legacy.

People from many faiths and communities worship together in services held more than 30 times a week; the soup kitchen serves roughly 25,000 meals annually; social service outreach has an increasingly varied roster of programs; the distinguished Cathedral School prepares young students to be future leaders; Adults and Children in Trust, the renowned preschool, afterschool and summer program, offers diverse educational and nurturing experiences; the outstanding Textile Conservation Lab preserves world treasures; concerts, exhibitions, performances and civic gatherings allow conversation, celebration, reflection and remembrance—such is the joyfully busy life of this beloved and venerated Cathedral.

Name: Kettle Moraine Lutheran High School
Description:
Kettle Moraine Lutheran High School is a 9-12 Christian high school affiliated with the Wisconsin Ev. Lutheran Synod. Our broad-based curriculum provides quality education for those entering college, technical school, military or the work force. 

We believe that Jesus Christ is our Savior. That truth motivates us to share the message of salvation, and to live our lives to the glory of God and for service to others.

Name: Sisters of Notre Dame of the United States
Description: A Catholic congregation of women religious, the Sisters of Notre Dame of the United States are united in one heart, one hope, and one mission to proclaim God’s goodness and compassionate love for people of all faiths and cultures through a variety of ministries, both national and international, particularly serving those who are poor and marginalized.

Name: Christian Videos
Description: Watch and share Christian devotional videos online at https:/christianvidios.com

Name: Andersonville Theological Seminary (Camilla, GA)
Description: For over a quarter of a century, ATS has grown, beginning from a small unknown Bible school into a seminary with worldwide student body. Over those years, many things have changed at ATS so that our students might have the best opportunities to receive a seminary education while actively serving in the field. Yet, one thing has not changed and will not change, and that is ATS’ commitment to teaching God’s Word in a verse-by-verse style as frequently as is possible in every ATS program. No filler courses will be found in our curriculum; instead our programs are overflowing with actual Bible exposition and exegesis.

Name: Archdiocese of Saint Paul and Minneapolis
Description: Comprising a 12 county area, the Archdiocese has 217 parishes and is home to approximately 800,000 Catholics (roughly 25% of the population). During the past ten years, 100,000 new members have joined the Archdiocesan Catholic family. Approximately 9,000 infants and 300 adults are baptized annually in Archdiocesan parishes.

Name: Faithbridge Church
Description:
Real People. Real Life.

The mission of Faithbridge is to make more and stronger disciples of Jesus Christ by being a bridge of faith to people every day.

Faithbridge believes strongly that we are to be a bridge of faith to people every day. It’s in our name! We are an externally-focused church, working to reach others for Jesus Christ. At Faithbridge, you’ll hear a lot about practicing the rhythm of worship +2. This simply means that, in addition to joining together in Sunday worship, we recognize the importance of each person connecting in two types of small groups: a authentic group of people to grow with spiritually, and a team to serve others through ministry.

Name: Texas Conference of Seventh-day Adventists
Description:
The Texas Conference of Seventh-day Adventists is the administrative headquarters for the Seventh-day Adventist Church in the eastern two-thirds of Texas. It is our mission to empower members, pastors, churches, and schools in our territory to share the gospel message with their friends and communities.

The Texas Conference is comprised of approximately 58,500 members amongst 300 churches and companies, in addition to its 25 schools, and Southwestern Adventist University.

Name: Calvary Chapel Melbourne
Description: Calvary Chapel Melbourne is a Christian Church in West Melbourne, FL, with campuses in Viera and Sebastian. Together we exist to see all people become fully devoted followers of Christ, experience the fulfilling life Jesus provides, and share His life-changing message with the world.

Name: Cedar Rapids Xavier High School
Description:
Learning with a higher purpose. The mission of Xavier High School is to develop the total person in a Catholic environment.

Xavier High School was founded in 1998, created through the merger of LaSalle High School and Regis High School. Accredited by the National Catholic Education Association and the Iowa Department of Education, Xavier serves the greater Cedar Rapids area as a Catholic High School under the Archdiocese of Dubuque with an enrollment of more than 700 students.

Xavier High School opened on September 2, 1998. The 146,500 square- foot facility was constructed on a 60 acre campus.

Name: Grace Community Church
Description: Our mission is to glorify God by proclaiming the gospel of Jesus Christ through the power of the Holy Spirit, for the salvation of the lost and edification of the church.

Name: Creation Ministries International
Description:
Creation Ministries International (CMI) exists to support the effective proclamation of the Gospel by providing credible answers that affirm the reliability of the Bible, in particular its Genesis history.

CMI has offices in Australia, Canada, Singapore, New Zealand, United Kingdom, South Africa and United States of America.

Name: All Peoples Church & World Outreach
Description:
APC places a strong emphasis on equipping working professionals to live out their faith and have an impact in the workplace and influence others for God's Kingdom. Believers in the marketplace are on the frontlines for Kingdom advancement and hence need all the equipping and empowering available. We encourage believers to find and take their place, as agents of transformation, on the seven mountains of society (Business, Education, Government, Media, Art/Entertainment, Family, Religion). We encourage believers to walk in the anointing of God, expect miracles, demonstrate the work of the Spirit and display God's glory in the marketplace.

For more detail visit our page: https://apcwo.org/ministries/christian-professionals

Name: Hosanna Church
Description:
OUR MISSION: To humbly and boldly be a church that looks more like Jesus. 
OUR VISION: Multiplying the hope and heartbeat of Jesus through irresistible love, generosity and unity.

Name: Yeshua Groups
Description: Network of groups getting together to tell the stories of Scripture and talk about them "campfire style". Start a group at yeshuagroups.com/start.

Name: Wycliffe Global Alliance
Description:
Mission: In communion with God and within the community of His Church, the Wycliffe Global Alliance contributes to the holistic transformation of language communities worldwide.

As a community of participants in God’s mission, the Wycliffe Global Alliance offers leadership, influence and service within Bible translation movements.

Collectively, the Alliance serves in advocacy with minority language communities to see God’s Word translated, accessible and in use in every language community that still needs it. The Alliance also facilitates compassionate service among the world’s minority peoples, encouraging sustainable, locally-owned initiatives and programs that will help communities thrive.

Find an organization in your part of the world: http://www.wycliffe.net/en/organizations

Name: Cornerstone Church
Description: Vision and direction of the Junior High ministry.

Name: SPIRITUS Ministries
Description:
We at SPIRITUS Ministries love our Lord, His Church, and His children. Our retreat center and missionaries facilitate hundreds of retreats for over 5,000 students each year. Join our team! 

Our retreat leaders, SPIRITUS missionaries, are young adults (19-29) who commit to 9 months of giving retreats to students in grades 2-12, inspiring them to grow in their relationship with God through praise and worship, dramas, interactive activities, and small/large group discussions. 

NO fundraising!

All SPIRITUS missionaries receive food and lodging, a gym membership, monthly spiritual direction, and more. They fine-tune public speaking skills, grow in conflict management strategies, leadership, teamwork, and effective communication.  

Apply today!

Name: Impact Church
Description:
Our Purpose: 
To transform lives and communities as we make an impact in our world.  

Our Vision:  
An inclusive gathering of people committed to holistic salvation and doing Christ's work in the world.

Please join us for one of our worship experience at 8 a.m., 10 a.m. or 12 p.m. in personal or online.

Name: Knoxville Catholic High School
Description:
Our vision: To be a cornerstone of Catholic school education, inspiring young people through the ministry of Christ.

Our mission: Knoxville Catholic High School, in partnership with parents and supporting parishes, is dedicated to teaching the Gospel, igniting a love for learning, and nurturing individual growth in body, mind, and spirit, as students are prepared to be Disciples of Christ who influence a constantly changing world.

Name: International Leadership Institute
Description:
We're a non-profit international ministry whose mission is to train and mobilize leaders of leaders to reach their nations with the Gospel of Jesus Christ. 

ILI trains and mobilizes more than 40,000 Christian leaders each year through the Eight Core Values of the most effective Christian leaders. In 2018, over 900 conferences were hosted in 83 countries. 

Leadership training is provided through interactive leadership seminars, small groups, and online study. ILI training focuses on the Eight Core Values of the most effective Christians and is currently provided in two to seven-day conferences or through small group studies.

Name: Trinity Catholic High School
Description:
Trinity Catholic High School is Central Florida's premier private college preparatory school.  Accredited by AdvancED for the Southern Association of Colleges and Schools, TCHS has been recognized on the Cardinal Newman Society Catholic Honor Roll of Excellence, voted Best of the Best High Schools in Marion County and noted as Best Private School in Ocala.

One of five high schools in the Diocese of Orlando, Trinity Catholic High School provides ~520 students a high-quality academic, moral, and religious education.  Our curriculum is designed to produce graduates of competence, compassion, and conscience and includes honors, advanced placement and dual enrollment options supplemented by a full array of co-curricular activities and sports programs.

Name: Vineyard Cincinnati Church
Description:
Vineyard Cincinnati is open to everyone— no matter what your thoughts are about God or church.

We are a diverse congregation that welcomes everyone and every age.

You’ll find a casual atmosphere, friendly people, a full children’s ministry, and solid biblical teaching you can trust.

Whether you’re new to church or have been around your whole life, you’re in good company with those of us who are exploring who God is—or rediscovering what church can be.

Join us on our mission to LIVE and LOVE like JESUS!

Name: Summit Bible Church
Description: Summit Bible Church is a New Testament bible-based church situated in the heart of Abuja, Nigeria.

Name: Runnymede Christian Fellowship
Description:
To establish God’s people in Egham, Runnymede and beyond through worship, discipleship and preaching the Word of God without compromise.

https://www.youtube.com/@runnymedechristianfellowship?sub_confirmation=1 

To see God’s church moving and functioning in power and in strength by enabling individual Christians to fulfil their God-given potential, by using God’s gifts under the anointing and authority of the Holy Spirit.

To be a practical expression of God’s love, for the people of Egham & surrounding areas by meeting people's physical, emotional and social needs and by bringing God’s healing and salvation. RCF 

#RCFEgham @RCFEgham

Name: The Meeting House
Description:
At The Meeting House, as we study the teaching and life of Jesus, it strikes us that it was all the irreligious people who were drawn to his movement and it was the religious leaders who were offended by him.

Jesus' message was that people didn't need to go through religion with all its rules, rituals, regulations and routines to get right with God. They could go directly to God and simply trust in him and allow God's love and truth to change their hearts and lives. They could be changed from the inside out.

Name: Canyon Ridge Christian Church
Description:
MISSION
To join Jesus and bring life to everyone, everywhere, every day.

Name: Instituto Católico de Liderança
Description:
Seja bem-vindo ao Instituto Católico de Liderança.
 
Somos um instituto focado na formação de líderes católicos que buscam conhecer mais sua fé, formar-se e ser agentes de transformação na sociedade. Alcançar novos patamares em suas vidas e carreiras, sempre seguindo o exemplo de Jesus e os ensinamentos da Igreja Católica. 
 
Nosso trabalho principal é a produção de conteúdo que oferecemos através de cursos, livros, artigos e vídeos. Também desenvolvemos nosso aplicativo de meditação católica Seedtime, através do qual, oferecemos ajuda para formar o hábito da oração e aprofundamento da fé. Tudo isto com o intuito de acompanhar o amadurecimento da fé desde uma perspectiva moderna e concreta.
 
Convidamos você a descobrir conosco como aprender e crescer na sua fé e na sua liderança. Ao final Jesus nos mandou a fazer discípulos de todas as nações, o que implica influir e transformar o mundo com o poder do evangelho. Acreditamos que todos tem potencial para ser líderes, porém assim como uma pedra bruta, precisa ser lapidado até chegar no esplendor e no máximo do seu potencial.
 
Nosso compromisso é com você e com a missão que Cristo nos encomendou.

Name: Wesley United Methodist Church
Description: Solo pastor in the Mount Zephyr neighborhood of Alexandria, Va

Name: YWAM Kona
Description: Youth With A Mission is a global movement of Christians from many cultures, age groups and Christian traditions, dedicated to serving Jesus throughout the world.

Name: FAME
Description:
FAME exists to spread the fame of Jesus Christ to all nations through medical evangelism.

FAME seeks to lead people to Christ and meet real physical needs by partnering with other mission organizations to deliver a unique combination of medical mission services providing:

    * Desperately needed medical facilities
    * Life saving and sustaining medicines and medical supplies
    * Hands-on care through medically focused short-term mission teams

Name: R.C. Diocese of Paterson
Description:
The Diocese of Paterson includes the three counties of Passaic, Morris, and Sussex in northern New Jersey, under the leadership of Bishop Kevin Sweeney. The diocese is blessed with urban, suburban, and rural parishes.  Our parishes, schools, agencies, hospitals, and ministries help to serve over 400,000 Catholics who live in the diocese. 

We are committed to building a community which is truly Catholic, united in our adherence to the faith handed down through the ages from the apostles. We invite you to learn more about our community of faith. We offer our services to those in need, and for those who wish to serve, we offer many opportunities.

Name: PROVERBS226
Description:
Proverbs226 is an evidence-based non-profit committed to healing families affected by parental incarceration.

We are breaking the cycle of generational incarceration and awakening the potential within each child by empowering them to pursue a sustainable career.

Our vision is to have a world where children impacted by parental incarceration feel equipped to change the trajectory of their lives.

Name: PeaceWise
Description:
PeaceWise exists to provide practical help and real hope to a conflict-weary world.   

We help individuals, organisations and communities learn life-changing biblical peacemaking principles and build cultures of peace.

We teach personal peacemaking and Christian conflict resolution skills, provide Christian mediation and other help for conflict situations and share the reconciling power of the gospel of Jesus Christ.

All our teaching has a strong biblical foundation, and we seek to be instruments of God’s love in all we do.

Name: Toronto Islamic Centre & Community Services
Description: Toronto Islamic Centre is a masjid in the heart of downtown Toronto, serving a large and diverse Muslim community. To establish a permanent Islamic presence in downtown Toronto with a mosque and facilities to meet the religious, social and intellectual needs of Muslims and those of other faiths.

Name: Diocese of Guildford, Church of England
Description:
Guildford is one of 41 Church of England dioceses which cover the whole of England. We have 156 parishes, 82 church schools and several hundred social and community projects.

Our region contains over a million people, and our churches seek to be at the centre of every community, to reach out to those in special need, and to encourage all their members to grow into their full potential as children of God. 

The Diocese has 212 church buildings which see more than 25,000 people worshipping on an average Sunday, in addition to many thousands more of all ages who use those buildings or neighbouring Church halls on weekdays for church activities and community clubs and meetings.

Each of our parishes is an independent charity, with their own leadership and governance structures, working together under the leadership of the Bishop of Guildford and his team, so as to make the very best use of our resources across the region. Every one of the 1 million or so people who live in our area has a parish church, and access to its support and facilities when they need them most, often at life events such as Baptisms, Weddings and Funerals.

A transforming Church, transforming lives 

Our vision as the Diocese of Guildford is to be a Transforming Church, Transforming Lives, and we are together committed to 12 diocesan goals. Our calling is to join with other Christians in living out and proclaiming the Good News of Jesus Christ across the region we serve and beyond, responding to Jesus’ Great Commandment to: “Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind… and to love your neighbour as yourself”; and his Great Commission to: “Go and make disciples of all nations, baptising them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you”.

Name: Kentucky Baptist Convention
Description:
The Kentucky Baptist Convention is a cooperative missions and ministry organization made up of nearly 2,400 autonomous Baptist churches in Kentucky. 

Working through 71 local associations and in cooperation with the Southern Baptist Convention, Kentucky Baptists share a common bond of basic Biblical beliefs and a commitment to proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ to the entire world.

Each church is self-governing under the Lordship of Jesus Christ. Churches elect messengers (not delegates) to various denominational meetings, including the annual convention. The messengers determine the course of many programs, ministries and institutions of the convention and its staff as guided by the KBC Constitution and Bylaws. 

When the annual convention is not in session, the convention's Mission Board provides leadership for the convention and its staff.

Name: The Council of Christians and Jews
Description:
CCJ is the leading national forum for Christian-Jewish engagement. CCJ operates at a local level within 25 branches, comprising some 3,000 members; Her Majesty The Queen was our Patron from 1952 until her passing and our Presidents are the leading spiritual figures of all Christian and Jewish denominations.

CCJ‘s mission is to promote respect and mutual understanding between Jews and Christians and others, addressing national and global issues relevant to faith traditions within UK society today. We run a range of local and national programmes spreading across three areas of engagement: Education, Dialogue and Social Action.

Our work reaches individuals and groups across the UK, as we partner with Synagogues and Churches, schools, student organisations and our 25 local branches to deliver exciting and innovative programming.

More information can be found at: http://www.ccj.org.uk/

Name: Diocese of Worcester
Description:
We are the Church of England in Worcestershire and Dudley. 

We believe that the Church exists to serve those who are not - or not yet - its members. Our 3 priorities are 'The deepening of our prayer', 'The renewal of our public worship' and 'The equipping of people to share their faith'.

The Church of England is arranged geographically into 44 Dioceses, each under the care of a Bishop, and covers every part of England.

Name: Ottawa Muslim Association
Description:
The Ottawa Muslim Association (OMA) is a grass-root charitable Muslim organization governed by the guidance provided in the Holy Quran and the Sunnah (teachings) of Prophet Muhammed (Peace Be Upon Him) to serve Muslims and the community at large in the greater Ottawa Community.

The OMA is run solely on the hard-work, dedication and efforts of volunteers who ensure that the Ottawa Main Mosque runs efficiently.

Name: Chichester Cathedral
Description:
Chichester Cathedral is a living church that has been at the centre of life in its city for over nine centuries, and is the Mother Church of the Diocese of Chichester. It attracts visitors from across the world, welcoming pilgrims, worshippers, lovers of music and heritage, people of all faiths and none. 

Through imaginative worship, inspiring music and art, engaging teaching and generous hospitality, we aim to be a place of transformation where our human experience finds its meaning in the unconditional love and compassion of God.

Name: WHEELER AVENUE BAPTIST CHURCH
Description: Wheeler Avenue Baptist Church is a religious institution based in Houston, Texas, USA.

Name: Notre-Dame-des-Neiges Cemetery
Description:
Le cimetière Notre-Dame-des-Neiges est le plus grand cimetière au Canada et le troisième en importance en Amérique du Nord. Son histoire est intimement liée à celle de Montréal. 

Nos équipes sur le terrain s’assurent que la gestion de 341 acres de superficie n’entrave pas le calme des lieux, que nous nous engageons à préserver. Cela représente de grands défis quotidiens : assurer le calme des lieux pour les proches de près d’un million de défunts, tout en tenant compte de notre statut de site patrimonial, de notre luxuriante faune et végétation, sans oublier nos activités de développement pour l’accueil des générations à venir.

Le cimetière est géré par La Fabrique de la paroisse Notre-Dame de Montréal, organisme sans but lucratif qui possède également la Basilique Notre-Dame de Montréal.

Dynamique, La Fabrique emploie 225 personnes. Suivez cette page et celle de la Basilique Notre-Dame de Montréal pour connaître nos offres d'emploi et nos activités.

Name: Oud-Katholieke Kerk van Nederland
Description:
Welkom bij een katholieke kerk die zich wil oriënteren op de vroeg-christelijke kerk. Daarom ook die naam: Oud-Katholiek. De Oud-Katholieke Kerk is een katholieke kerk, die onafhankelijk van Rome reeds drie eeuwen een zelfstandig leven kent. Een historische kerk met een rijk erfgoed en een grote traditie. Niet onveranderlijk en star,  maar open voor vernieuwing van het geestelijk en kerkelijk leven. 

In Nederland bevinden zich 27 oud-katholieke parochies en staties. De parochies en staties zijn verdeeld over 2 bisdommen, het aartsbisdom Utrecht en het bisdom Haarlem. 
De Oud-Katholieke Kerk van Nederland is binnen de Unie van Utrecht internationaal verbonden met een twaalftal oud-katholieke landskerken in Europa, de Verenigde Staten en Canada. Daarnaast is zij internationaal verbonden met  o.a. de anglicaanse en oosters-orthodoxe kerken.

Name: Catholic Bishops' Conference of England and Wales
Description:
The Catholic Bishops' Conference of England and Wales is the permanent assembly of Catholic Bishops and Personal Ordinaries in the two member countries.

Interested in working for the Catholic Bishops' Conference of England and Wales? 

The work undertaken at the Secretariat of the Bishops' Conference and its agencies and offices encompasses a wide range of issues touching on many aspects of the life of the Church and of society. 

More than 40 people are employed by the Bishops’ Conference to support the Bishops. We recognise and value the commitment and considerable expertise of each member of staff. We aim to foster this commitment to ensure that the Gospel is the inspiration for all that we do.

The Bishops’ Conference, through its administrative and legal wing CaTEW, aims to be a good employer, promoting a safe and congenial working environment where all are treated with respect and dignity. CaTEW is committed to developing and training staff so that best practice can be shared across the different parts of CaTEW and together we can give of our best in the service of the Church. CaTEW and together we can give of our best in the service of the Church. We are an equal opportunities employer.

Name: Baptist Children's Village and Family Ministries
Description: We exist, as part of the Mississippi Southern Baptist Church, To take the good news of Jesus Christ to at-risk children and families.

Name: Fellowship of the Emirates
Description:
Fellowship of the Emirates is an imperfect church full of imperfect people. So, if you’re not perfect, you’ll fit right in with us! We are a diverse group of people who meet every Friday to pursue a shared interest in our Lord Jesus Christ.

Whether you’ve relocated to the United Arab Emirates, are searching for a church family or are just curious about spiritual matters, we welcome you to Fellowship of the Emirates. We hope you will have the opportunity to visit one of our Friday Services soon, and find community in one of our 2:42 home groups.

Fellowship of the Emirates is a come-as-you-are church family that loves to see new faces, in fact, we especially encourage people who are new to Christianity to check us out. Our motto is actually to be ‘a church for people who think they don’t like church’, so if you think you don’t like church, why not try us out? Friday services are for us to meet together as a church to praise, pray, and learn about God and Jesus, His son.

Name: Meaningful Minute
Description:
Our mission is to add more meaning to the 1,440 minutes in our day. 

Our philosophy is that it starts with a minute: if you could just take 60 seconds of clip that we carefully curate and hits the spot for you, ultimately it will lead to more inspiration and more motivation for you to take in more of our content which is more than a minute. 

Meaningful Minute started in 2017 with the purpose of inspiring Klal Yisroel. What started as a hobby by our founder Nachi Gordon, has evolved into one of the largest Jewish media platforms. 

In the beginning Nachi shared short video clips via WhatsApp, but that quickly snowballed into something bigger. From organizing events in different cities with top Jewish speakers, to thousands of followers across Social Media. 

Meaningful minute also created a Meaningful Minute app with over 30,000 downloads. The mobile app serves as a social media platform that’s dedicated to torah thoughts and ideas. 

Meaningful Minute is the producer of:

- Meaningful People Podcast: a weekly podcast showcasing the most intresting Jewish voices of today.

- The Daily Thread: A podcast  by Nachi and Larry Gordon that discusses what's going in the Jewish World, every weekday. 

You can find Meaningful Minute on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, and our mobile app.

Name: Cornerstone Christian Fellowship
Description: We are a contemporary church committed to bringing good news those living in Chandler and its surrounding communities. We believe God's inerrant word gives the true direction in life that people so desparately need. Everlasting life is found only in the person of Jesus Christ through believing that He died and rose again to take away mankind's sin. He is our Cornerstone.

Name: FOCUS (Fellowship of Christians in Universities and Schools)
Description: FOCUS is the Fellowship of Christians in Universities and Schools.  It is a diverse community of students, alumni, parents, faculty, clergy, and professionals from a variety of Christian denominations drawn together by a common faith and purpose.  Our purpose is to explore with independent school students a life of faith that is real, adventurous, intellectually sound, and eminently practical.

Name: Shekinah Kingdom Assembly
Description: Shekinah Kingdom Assembly was formerly known as Word Worship and Prayer Network (WWP), a vibrant, registered, Spirit-led Christian organization dedicated to igniting revival through the power of the Word, Worship, and Prayer. Born out of a deep hunger for God's presence and a passion to see lives transformed, WWP exists to awaken the Body of Christ to deeper intimacy with God and a greater impact in the world.

Name: GD Vashist Jyotish Sansthan
Description: GD Vashist Jyotish Sansthan is India's Leading organization in the field of Astrology, Founded by Celebrity Astrologer Gurudev GD Vashist Ji. It's a leading Astrology consultancy and service provider company that has been offering services for over 3 Decades and helped millions of people in India and Abroad. It has its head office in Udyog Vihar, Gurugram (Gurgaon), Haryana, India. For more than 3 decades we did painstaking Astrology research, in-depth studies, dedication, day-night Sadhana practice, converting-interpreting some of the ancient Sanskrit studies, Lal Kitab etc to modern-day life situations, brainstorming software Apps and technologies etc.

Name: Holy Cross Congregation International
Description: The Congregation of Holy Cross (CSC) is an International Religious Congregation in the Roman Catholic Church composed of Religious Brothers (Br.) and Religious Priests. (Fr.) dedicated to Educating in Faith believing in the Cross as our Only Hope. Ave Crux Spes Unica.

Name: Good Shepherd Life Recovery
Description:
GSM provides a sober living environment and
all the programs necessary to prepare our
clients to return to the mainstream, of life.
Our philosophy is that our clients need to be
continually engaged in recovery work, service
work, employment, or self-improvement programs.
This philosophy not only increases life and
sober skills, but gives our clients a feeling
of self-worth and accomplishment which we
believe is critical to long term recovery.
• Housing Program
• Service Work Program
• Crisis Coaching
• Drug and Alcohol Services
• Group Sessions
• Literacy Referrals
• Career Coaching and Resume Guidance
• Job Search Assistance
• Partnerships with local employers
• Life Skills Formation
• Participation in AA/NA 12 Step meetings
and Celebrate Recovery
• Medical and Dental Referrals
• Food Pantry for program members
• Regular Drug and Alcohol Screenings

Name: Snowbird Wilderness Outfitters Inc.
Description:
Snowbird Wilderness Outfitters exists to proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ through the exposition of Scripture and personal relationships in order to equip the Church to impact this generation. SWO is located in the mountains of western North Carolina and is a year-round discipleship ministry that offers weekend retreats and 10 weeks of summer camp, serving over 12,000 annually.
During the summer season, Snowbird hires over 100 college-age adults to serve as small group leaders and recreational staff, as well as 40 high school students to train under the LMNT program. In addition, the Snowbird Institute is a program designed to train college-aged students in relational, Gospel-centered ministry, while equipping them with a Bible-based, theological education, in addition to vocational training in a healthy Christian environment.
Everything we do at SWO, from whitewater rafting, rappelling, and climbing to using relevant drama, breakout sessions, and worship, is used as a platform to teach God's word and to build long-lasting relationships with students.

Name: The Baptist Children's Village
Description: We exist, as part of the Mississippi Southern Baptist Church, To take the good news of Jesus Christ to at-risk children and families.

Name: LouDiazMusic
Description: To be the hands, feet, and voice of Jesus in a world in need of His love and truth.

Name: EFCC
Description: To be the hands, feet, and voice of Jesus in a world in need of His love and truth.

Name: Diocese of Palm Beach
Description:
The Mission of the Roman Catholic Church of Palm Beach, which comprises the people of God in the counties of Palm Beach, Indian River, Martin, Okeechobee and St. Lucie in the State of Florida, in communion with the Universal Church, whose visible head is the Roman Pontiff, the Vicar of Christ and in communion with the Diocesan Bishop, is to proclaim the Good News of Jesus Christ.

This message of salvation is addressed to all of Christ's faithful and to all people.

With stewardship of our God-given human and material resources, the Church of Palm Beach will strive to discern God's will in satisfying the spiritual, moral, sacramental, educational and basic needs of all people, with justice, respecting the dignity of each person.

By planning and implementing pastoral, sacramental, charitable, educational and administrative services, the Church of Palm Beach, to the best of its ability and with the grace of God, will promote faith, hope and love.

Name: Nigerian Baptist Convention
Description:
The statements of Faith herein constitute the consensus of opinion of the Baptist body known as the Nigerian Baptist Convention and are meant for general instruction and guidance of her people. They are not meant to add anything to the conditions of salvation as revealed in the New Testament, i.e. repentance toward God and faith in Jesus Christ as Saviour and Lord. 
This Statements of Faith and Practice is not a creed to be adopted. Baptists are a people who profess a living faith rooted in Jesus Christ. Therefore, the only authority for faith and practice among Baptists is Jesus Christ, whose life and will is revealed in Holy Scriptures.
A living faith exercises a growing understanding of truth and must be continually interpreted and related to the needs of each generation. No Statement of Faith can be regarded as complete, without error, or as an official document of authority demanding compulsory adherence.

Name: Fondazione Comboniane nel Mondo
Description:
La Fondazione Comboniane nel Mondo Onlus gestisce progetti in Africa, Medio Oriente e America Latina, entrando in dialogo con persone che vivono fedi diverse, nelle zone rurali più remote o nelle baraccopoli. Lavoriamo nei seguenti settori:
Ambiente: collaboriamo con la gente per iniziare cooperative che hanno lo scopo di rendere le persone più autonome; promuoviamo progetti che mirano ad un positivo impatto ambientale e ad un uso sostenibile delle risorse naturali locali.
Educazione: Sosteniamo studenti meritevoli, orfani o provenienti da famiglie con grave disagio sociale. Gestiamo scuole materne, primarie, secondarie e istituti tecnici con corsi mirati ad aiutare i giovani a trovare lavoro. Organizziamo workshop formativi mirati ad approfondire ed informare su temi attuali del singolo paese e del mondo.
Sanità: Forniamo assistenza medica di qualità e accessibile a tutti e in particolare per le categorie di persone più vulnerabili (donne, bambini, anziani, diversamente abili, malati cronici, sieropositivi). Organizziamo incontri di prevenzione e sensibilizzazione delle malattie (inclusa HIV AIDS).
Sociale: diamo una forte priorità alle donne con le loro famiglie, attraverso educazione informale, formazione civica, conoscenza e difesa dei diritti umani; ci impegniamo ad iniziare progetti che mirano all’autosostentamento e allo sviluppo integrale della persona; assistiamo i profughi nei campi di rifugiati.
Strutture: Costruiamo dispensari, pozzi, piccole scuole ed effettuiamo miglioramenti a strutture già esistenti per renderle più efficienti.

Description: Pastoraal Diaconaal Centrum de Herberg wil als verlengstuk van de plaatselijke kerkelijke gemeente een tijdelijk huis en geestelijke begeleiding bieden aan individuele gemeenteleden die, om wat voor reden dan ook, even afstand willen nemen van hun woon/werksituatie en zich willen bezinnen op levensvragen

Name: New Life Community Church
Description:
A local Church of the Christian and Missionary Alliance, a part of a worldwide team of Bible believing Christians in alliance with Bible preaching and teaching pastors and missionaries who are dedicate to taking the Gospel of Jesus Christ to the ends of the earth.
Located in the northern part of Orlando.
The spout where the blessing comes out.

Name: Lancaster Search
Description:
A Biblical and prayerful approach that utilizes the wisdom of the search team combined with the unique insights pastor Jason brings to the search. He can jump in at any point during the pastor search process in order to recruit and screen candidates.
Initially, the pastoral profile is dispersed throughout a variety of venues and networks to get the word out. However, the goal is not to wait passively for resumes to come in, but the focus is to actively seek out candidates nationwide. After a narrowing of the candidate pool, your search team will conduct all final interviews and make the hiring decision.

Name: Keys for Kids Ministries
Description:
Keys for Kids Ministries, formerly Children's Bible Hour, is a media ministry that's igniting a passion for Christ in kids, teens, and their families. Our goal is to give them the opportunity to respond to the gospel of Christ through our radio, print, and online resources. 

We Publish:
- Keys for Kids quarterly devotional
- Unlocked teen devotional
- Seasons of Faith illustrated picture book

We Produce:
- Keys for Kids (1 minute and 4:30 broadcast)
- Parent Minute with Greg Yoder (1 minute broadcast)
- Down Gilead Lane radio drama

Other Programs:
- WORD with Zach summer reading program 
- Keys for Camps
- Keys for Kids Storyteller

Radio Network:
- Access Keys for Kids Radio at keysforkids.org or on our mobile app

Name: Walk in the Word
Description: Walk in the Word, the Bible teaching ministry of Dr. James MacDonald, pastor of Harvest Bible Chapel in the suburbs of Chicago, emphasizes the precise exposition of God's Word and life application. Igniting passion in the people of God through the proclamation of truth is not just our motto—it's our daily commitment! Through audio, video, web, printed resources, and listener events, Walk in the Word provides personal and practical teaching that leads listeners to the transforming power of God.

Name: Keluarga Mahasiswa Islam (GAMAIS) ITB
Description:
GAMAIS ITB yang didirikan pada tahun 1987 berupaya memenuhi seruan dakwah dengan mengukuhkan diri sebagai Lembaga Dakwah Kampus dan menjadi Unit Kegiatan Mahasiswa ITB pada tahun 1992. Tujuan pendirian unit GAMAIS ITB adalah :
1. Terhayatinya nilai‐nilai Islam di lingkungan Institut Teknologi Bandung
2. Terbinanya ukhuwah islamiyah di lingkungan Institut Teknologi Bandung menuju kesatuan umat
3. Terciptanya profesionalitas dan intelektualitas yang islami di kalangan anggota
4. Menjadikan kampus sebagai pendukung dakwah kampus
5. Terhayatinya tanggung jawab kemasyarakatan yang dilandasi nilai-nilai Islam di kalangan anggota.

Dalam rangka mencapai tujuan tersebut, GAMAIS ITB membuat sistem organisasi yang secara umum termaktub dalam AD/ART. Sebagai lembaga intrakampus, GAMAIS ITB tidak lepas dari hubungan dengan elemen‐elemen kampus baik civitas akademika sebagai objek kerja maupun pihak rektorat dengan segala kebijakan yang dikeluarkannya. Peran GAMAIS ITB sebagai lembaga intra kampus merupakan salah satu faktor yang membuat organisasi ini bergerak dinamis.

Sinergi dalam harmoni merupakan sebuah cita-cita bersama yang diusung GAMAIS ITB ITB dalam perannya sebagai lembaga dakwah kampus. Penyelarasan gerak dan langkah dakwah dengan sebuah tujuan bersama menjadi cikal bakal pemikiran urgensi penyusunan Blueprint GAMAIS ITB ini. Dibutuhkannya sebuah pedoman yang jelas dalam dakwah menjadi bagian dari perencanaan dakwah yang berkesinambungan.

Pedoman dakwah yang hakiki dan selalu GAMAIS ITB ITB pergunakan adalah Al Qur’an dan Al Hadits, selanjutnya agar pedoman ini lebih mudah dipahami, maka GAMAIS ITB membuat sebuah pedoman dakwah operasional yang terdiri dari AD/ART GAMAIS ITB ITB, Blueprint GAMAIS ITB, dan Rencana Strategis GAMAIS ITB. Ketiga pedoman inilah yang akan digunakan GAMAIS ITB dalam menjalankan amal dakwahnya.

Description:

Name: Providence Baptist Church
Description: We are a Cooperative Baptist Fellowship congregation located in the Cotswold neighborhood of Charlotte. Our guiding vision is to place Jesus Christ at the center of everything we do, both as a gathered community of faith and as individual followers of Jesus.

Name: Exponential: Equipping Movement Makers
Description:
Exponential is committed to accelerating the multiplication of healthy reproducing faith communities. We equip movement makers with actionable principles, ideas and solutions through conferences and resources.

Jesus. Leaders. Acceleration. Movements. Multiplication.

Name: Our Savior's Lutheran Church
Description:
Created for Relationship with God, all people everywhere and creation itself
Called to equip people to Serve by growing disciples of Jesus Christ

That’s really who we are and what we're about. So if you're searching for a gathering of Christians who are helping one another to live with hope in God's world, Our Savior's may be your place. Whether you’re new to the area and find yourself looking for a church, visiting from out of town or are a long time resident looking for Christian relationships and direction, we welcome all people at Our Savior’s.  We support each other in difficult times, we challenge one another to grow in our faith and we take seriously the call to be the body of Christ for our community.  This is a wonderful intergenerational congregation.

Name: Full-time Training in Anaheim
Description:
The Full-Time Training in Anaheim (FTTA) is a two-year program dedicated to equipping men and women for Christian service in their respective churches and communities. Guided by the authority of the Scriptures, the program seeks to: foster continued growth toward the spiritual maturity of students by encouraging fellowship with God and fellow believers; equip students in the realization and practical application of Biblical truths according to the Scriptures by the revelation of the Holy Spirit; and cultivate each student’s spiritual capacity in interpersonal relationships, evangelism, and church-planting in diverse cultural settings. 

FTTA offers a non-degree certificate of graduation in Biblical Truth and Church Service Studies. The goals of this program may be summarized in four words: truth, life, gospel, and service. This means that FTTA provides a comprehensive theological education that will help any Christian believer cultivate: a serious consideration of the essential Biblical doctrines of the Christian faith (truth); the development of communal and personal spiritual growth in the divine life of God (life); training and experience that promote a practical Christian life of evangelism and ministry (gospel); and the carrying out of practical tasks and needs in local churches (service). 

At the conclusion of the program, many graduates pursue advanced degrees at leading graduate schools and obtain successful positions in government, business, and academia. At the same time, many are committed to pursuing a healthy spiritual life and are actively involved in their respective churches. 

FTTA has produced over 3,500 graduates who continue to serve their churches and communities in fruitful ministry in many countries. In addition, 17 affiliated training centers with similar goals and programs of study have been established in places such as Mexico City, London, Tokyo, and Moscow.

Name: Growing Muslim
Description:
Welke ouder wil zijn kinderen niet zien opgroeien tot sterke, gelukkige en trotse moslimvolwassenen? Er zijn vele methoden om onze kinderen de juiste richting in te sturen en het investeren in hun islamitische identiteit is een van de beste aspecten waar wij ons op kunnen focussen wanneer ze nog jong zijn.

Tegenwoordig is het praktiseren van het geloof een hele uitdaging. De Islam en de moslims zijn het doelwit van negatieve aandacht. Wij hoeven niet uit te leggen dat dit een negatief effect kan hebben op de islamitische identiteit van de jongeren als zij niet stevig in de schoenen staan. Wanneer de ouders in dergelijke omstandigheden niet investeren in de islamitische identiteit van hun kinderen dan is het ook geen verassing wanneer de jongeren besluiten om hun geloof niet te praktiseren. Het is om deze reden ontzettend belangrijk dat we onze focus, tijd en energie steken in het opbouwen en ontwikkelen van een sterke islamitische identiteit.

Hierom is Growing Muslim ontstaan en zoals de naam al aangeeft staat het groeien van het moslimkind centraal in alle aspecten en vooral als het gaat om de islamitische identiteit. Groeien is bloeien!

Wij focussen ons op het ontwikkelen van islamitisch educatief materiaal waar de kinderen niet alleen heel veel plezier van hebben maar ook een heleboel van kunnen leren. Al het materiaal is zelf ontworpen en wordt met heel veel liefde en positiviteit op de markt gebracht. Hiernaast focussen wij ons op het onderwijzen van kinderen in de leeftijd 4 t/m 16 jaar. Wij zijn inzetbaar voor verscheidene workshops.

Name: Second Presbyterian Church
Description: Second Presbyterian Church is a family of believers committed to worshipping, loving and serving God. We are Reformed, evangelical and members of the EPC denomination, all of which you can learn more about below. The main thing to know is that we love God, each other and this world in His name.

Name: GenerousChurch
Description:
IMAGINE A MOVEMENT OF GLOBAL GENEROSITY. 

GenerousChurch exists to catalyze and strengthen generosity through global church and ministry networks to accelerate disciple-making. We partner with leaders, organizations, and networks to develop customized generosity training that unleashes generous disciples. 

Through our Generosity Design Lab, we help leaders design their own native generosity training that fits their culture and training cycles. Using first-principles thinking, we teach them "how to cook versus follow a recipe" using 12 generosity principles, 4 dynamics of transformation, and 3 measurements of success.

Name: Associação Paulista Leste
Description: A Sede Administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia para as regiões Norte e Leste da capital do Estado de São Paulo abrange mais de 37 mil membros. Com aproximadamente 260 congregações, nosso lema é cuidar das mais de 7 milhões de pessoas que habitam nas regiões por meio do discipulado em Cristo.

Name: St. Elizabeth Ann Seton Catholic Church
Description: St. Elizabeth Ann Seton is listed in the Catholic Church Directory as a member of the Catholic Diocese of Fort Worth, Texas. We are a qualified Church, Religous Organization, 501 (c)3 organization.  The church has 5,000 member families and a Parish School with 705 students in grades Pre-k to 8th grade.

Name: National Ramah Commission
Description: Ramah is the camping arm of Conservative Judaism. With ten overnight camps, five day camps and Ramah Programs in Israel, Ramah impacts over 11,500 campers and staff every summer. A summer at Ramah is spent immersed in Jewish living – highlighted by dynamic and innovative programming. Traditional camp and outdoor activities, including swimming, sports, dance and art, are enhanced by Ramah's dedication to excellence in informal Jewish education. Combining a love for camping with meaningful Jewish experiences, Ramah instills in its campers and staff a love of Judaism, the Jewish people, Israel and the outdoors. The Ramah Camping Movement is guided by seven core values: self-esteem of every individual; character development; Jewish learning; Jewish identity and community; Jewish observance; Zionism; and Hebrew.

Description: CALVARY CHAPEL BIG SKY is a religious organization located in Billings Montana
