Description:
Waqaf An-Nur Corporation Berhad (“Waqaf An-Nur”) is a Malaysian company limited by guarantee established in 2000 to manage the assets and shares endowed (via waqf) by JCorp. As the corporate social responsibility arm of JCorp, Waqaf An-Nur continues to dutifully manage the waqf assets and funds for more than 20 years.

Waqaf An-Nur is recognised as a ‘Nazir Khas’ (special administrator) by Majlis Agama Islam Negeri Johor in 2005 to receive, manage and administer Islamic endowments.

Name: AFES (Australian Fellowship of Evangelical Students)
Description:
Proclaiming Jesus Christ at university to present everyone mature in him.

Universities in Australia are full of students who are poised to make life-changing decisions about what they believe and where they are heading. AFES works in this God-given window of opportunity to reach students for Christ.

AFES engages staff to help and encourage students in their Christian growth and witness, and has student groups on campuses in every state and territory in Australia. Groups hold a variety of activities, such as regular public Bible talks, smaller Bible studies, prayer groups, mid-year conferences and outreach events.

Name: St. John Paul II Foundation
Description:
The St. John Paul II Foundation is a national Catholic apostolate proclaiming the good news about life and family through education and formation. We pursue our mission through our three hallmark initiatives:

Converging Roads: Where Health Care Ethics and Medicine Converge
Shepherd’s Heart: Where Clergy Embrace Christ’s Heart for Life and Family
Together in Holiness: Where Spouses Discover God’s Plan for their Family

Our passionate commitment to pursuing our mission from the heart of the Church and our steadfast commitment to genuine collaboration allow us to successfully educate, inspire, and empower medical professionals, clergy, and spouses nationwide.

Name: Sisters of Charity of Nazareth
Description: Impelled by the love of Christ, the Sisters of Charity of Nazareth dedicate their lives to God by addressing the needs of oppressed people, especially women and children. Founded in Kentucky over 200 years ago, the Sisters minister in India, Nepal, Belize, Botswana and the US today.

Name: Avant Ministries
Description:
Formerly known as Gospel Missionary Union, Avant Ministries is one of the oldest missionary sending agencies in the United States and Canada. Early Avant missionaries were some of the first North American missionaries to travel to distant places, entering Ecuador in 1892 and Mali in 1913. They suffered illness, persecution, separation from family and friends and sometimes death in order to share the gospel with people who had never heard it. We’re proud of the legacy we inherited from them.

Today we demonstrate our commitment to the church through planting churches in unreached places, partnering with established churches and participating in church support ministries. We believe the church is God’s instrument for preserving and proclaiming the gospel, uniting believers and transforming communities. It is through a local church working in its own culture that the greatest problems of our time can be addressed, as the gospel first changes an individual’s life and then spreads throughout the community.

Name: Evangelical Council for Abuse Prevention
Description: Child protection and abuse prevention standards and accreditation for Christian ministries. Support Evangelical Council for Abuse Prevention to help prevent abuse in ministry.

Name: Aliança Bíblica Universitária do Brasil
Description:
A Aliança Bíblica Universitária do Brasil (ABUB) é uma organização missionária evangélica que existe para compartilhar o evangelho de Jesus Cristo nas escolas e universidades brasileiras através da iniciativa dos próprios estudantes. O treinamento e a formação de estudantes e profissionais, visando o testemunho cristão e o serviço à igreja e à sociedade, completam nossa missão. 

Nossa visão: Estudantes que formam comunidades de discípulos, transformados pelo evangelho, e que impactem o mundo estudantil, a igreja e a sociedade para a glória de Cristo.

Convidamos a todos que já se envolveram com grupos locais ou regionais a adicionar a experiência na seção de trabalhos voluntários de seu perfil (e não experiência).

Name: Faith Lutheran Church
Description: Faith Lutheran Church is a community of faith located in Coon Rapids, Minnesota. All are welcome to come and experience God’s gift of grace. Faith Lutheran is an active, friendly and growing congregation offering diverse worship, education, service, music and fellowship opportunities for all ages.

Name: SKIN-Rotterdam
Description: SKIN-Rotterdam is an umbrella organization of international Christian communities in Rotterdam. We represent the interests of the communities, give advice and organize activities and projects to strengthen these communities. Together they form a great social capital for the city!

Name: Southwark Cathedral
Description: The Cathedral lies on the South Bank of the River Thames close to London Bridge on a site occupied by a Church for over one thousand years.  The main structure of today's church was built between 1220 and 1420.  The Cathedral is the mother church of the Anglican Diocese of Southwark.

Name: Hope Community Church
Description: We exist to honor God by helping as many people as possible become fully devoted followers of Jesus Christ.

Name: Al Azhar Quran Teaching
Description:
Online Quran, Arabic and Islamic Studies to all ages all levels in all over around the World.Al-Azhar Quran Teaching is an online teaching academy to help people of all ages and nationalities understand the words of the Glorious Quran. Our teachers are highly qualified individuals who have graduated from the prestigious Al-Azhar University in Cairo,Egypt.

Al-Azhar University in Cairo is one of the oldest operating universities in the world. The Islamic university is connected to the beautiful and historic Al-Azhar Mosque. Al_Azhar was built in 971 CE and has become the chief center of Islamic and Arabic knowledge in the world.The core academic life of Al-Azhar has remained much the same for over a millennium. The curriculum includes the study of Islamic law, theology and the Arabic language.

Name: Christian Brothers Conference
Description:
Christian Brothers Conference (CBC) is the office for the Lasallian Region of North America (RELAN) in the Institute of the Brothers of the Christian Schools. Located in Washington, D.C., CBC provides programming and support for Lasallians throughout RELAN. 

Saint John Baptist de La Salle, patron saint of teachers, founded the Institute of the Brothers of the Christian Schools (De La Salle Christian Brothers) in 17th century France. The De La Salle Christian Brothers are lay religious men dedicated exclusively to education. Today, De La Salle’s mission lives on in 80 countries, with 4,000 Brothers and 90,000 Partners serving one million young people in 1,000 ministries.

Name: The Friar
Description:
The Friar  is a combination of podcasts and posts. Our Podcasts contain daily and Sunday homilies, commentaries, and theological and Catholic School Resources.

The DePorres Pages is an attempt to make real the Dominican notion of the Sacred Preaching, not simply as what a priest does from the pulpit on a Sunday, but as a way to apply the gospel to a variety of locations and interests.

Name: Central Presbyterian Church NYC
Description: Central Church, a historic congregation on the Upper East Side of Manhattan in New York City, is committed to building a strong community of faith in Jesus Christ that enables people from diverse backgrounds to experience the transformative power of the gospel through insightful biblical teaching, expressive worship, authentic prayer, and meaningful relationships. At the same time, we aim to provide a setting in which people who are undecided about their religious commitments may freely investigate the claims of Christianity. Together, we strive to serve the people of New York in humility and love so that we might have a positive impact on the world around us.

Name: INJOY Stewardship Solutions
Description:
Our mission says it all: ISS exists to create stewardship solutions that resource the vision of the local church. For ISS, our calling and sole focus is the church. While other companies diversify with education, non-profit, and private organization fund raising, ISS remains true to its calling and passion of advancing the local church's mission and vision.


Our vision is Your Vision. Fully Funded.

Name: Lifest
Description: Lifest is a nonprofit organization dedicated to Sharing Life Together through bringing messages of hope, purpose, dignity, and faith across the nation. Life Promotions is the home of speaker Bob Lenz, Lifest, Dignity Revolution, and Quake.

Name: Hadar
Description:
Founded in 2006, Hadar is an educational institution that empowers Jews to create and sustain vibrant, practicing, egalitarian communities of Torah learning, prayer, and service.

Hadar offers year-long fellowship programs for Jews wanting to expand their knowledge of Torah. It teaches core Jewish values, Jewish ideas, and communal music. The institute also organizes short-term seminars for Jewish leaders of all backgrounds, from teachers and rabbis to Hillel professionals and lay people—all who want to make a difference in their communities.

Through outstanding faculty, enthusiastic staff, individual donors, committed supporting foundations, and hundreds of alums, Hadar touches thousands of Jewish lives throughout the U.S. and Israel.

Name: John 3:16 Mission
Description:
John 3:16 Mission is an interdenominational Christian ministry that exists to meet the physical, emotional and spiritual needs of Tulsa's hungry, homeless and at-risk. Located in downtown Tulsa, Okla., the Mission provides food, shelter, clothing and restorative programs to those in need. Since its founding in 1952, the Mission has served in excess of 4 million meals and provided over 1 million individual shelters to the homeless.

Tulsa's Only Gospel Rescue Mission

John 3:16 Mission is Tulsa's only Gospel Rescue Mission and is a member of the Association of Gospel Rescue Missions (AGRM). As such, it emphasizes the power of the Gospel of Jesus Christ to transform even the most broken lives for the better. To this end, the Mission strives through all its programs to emulate the compassion and love of Jesus so that the lives of homeless and at-risk people can be improved.

The Mission's overnight shelter at 506 N. Cheyenne Ave. provides a safe refuge from the street each night for up to 110 men. We also serve, on average, more than 500 meals each day to Tulsa's homeless and at-risk. Additionally, the Mission operates a Family & Youth Center located in north Tulsa that is dedicated to family and community restoration. The FYC provides material, spiritual and educational support to at-risk, low-income families living in inner-city environments.

Name: Methodist Church of Southern Africa
Description:
Please visit the denominational website for specific information.

Vision
“ A Christ healed Africa for the healing of nations”
Mission Statement
“God calls the Methodist people to proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ for healing and transformation”
We believe the Church is called to
A deepening spirituality.

A resolve to be guided by Gods mission.

A rediscovery of every member of ministry, or the priesthood of all believers.

A commitment ‘to be one, so that the world may believe’.

A re-emphasis of servant –leadership and discernment as our model for ministry.

A redefinition and authentication of the vocation of the clergy in our church.

A commitment to environmental justice.

Name: Mosque-Madrasah-Wakaf Shared Services
Description: Mosque Shared Services is a committee formed by the Islamic Religious Council of Singapore to provide shared services solutions to the Mosques, Madrasah and Wakaf in Singapore. The services and/or solutions provided are financial management and accounting, HR and payroll, manpower, marcomm and ICT.

Name: Cathedral of Praise
Description:
Cathedral of Praise is a Christian church with campuses across Metro Manila and branches worldwide. Get to know us and, more importantly, Jesus Christ, whom we serve.

Formerly known as the Manila Bethel Temple, the Cathedral of Praise was founded in 1954 by Dr. Lester Sumrall.

Name: The Joshua Fund
Description: Founded by New York Times bestselling author Joel C. Rosenberg, The Joshua Fund is dedicated to blessing Israel and her neighbors according to Genesis 12:1-3. We work in Israel, Jordan, Lebanon, Syria, Iraq, Egypt, and the Palestinian Territories.

Name: Bristol Cathedral
Description: Standing in the heart of the vibrant city, Bristol Cathedral is one of England’s great medieval churches. Since the 12th Century it's been a place of daily prayer, music, beauty, and peace.

Name: Christian Women's Small Business Association
Description: Our mission is to equip and empower women to serve and honor God with their business. You'll have the opportunity to build friendships with other Christian women in business and even find new customers. All meetings are interactive and provide attendees with multiple opportunities to network with other members. There is great power in community! I hope you'll join us for fun and fellowship. This is truly an amazing group of women!

Name: Presbyterian Church in Ireland
Description:
The Presbyterian form of Christian faith is best described as 'Reformed' with its strong emphasis on the Sovereignty of God, the Kingship of Christ and the authority of the Bible.

The word 'Presbyterian' describes the form of the Church government which emphasises the individual and corporate responsibility of members. Ministers and members share in the organising and running of every aspect of the Church's work.

The preaching of the Word of God is central to Presbyterian worship services that are set amongst a mixture of prayer and praise. There is no fixed liturgy in Presbyterian services of worship. Prayers and hymns, psalms and paraphrases, Scripture readings and sermons are adapted to the needs of the occasion.

The best test of the Presbyterian Church and its members lies in what their faith compels them to do for others, not just what has been done for them as individuals.

The Presbyterian Church in Ireland has over 240,000 members belonging to 545 congregations across 19 Presbyteries throughout Ireland, north and south.

Name: Ionian Village
Description:
The mission of Ionian Village is to enrich the lives of its participants by bringing campers and staff into close contact with their Orthodox faith and Hellenic heritage. Ionian Village provides the opportunity for young people of the Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of America to Greece to foster a life-long appreciation and love of Greece, Orthodoxy, and Hellenism.

This important mission is accomplished by providing a safe and fun environment in which campers and staff can fully immerse themselves into our rich Greek heritage, experience the vibrancy of our Greek Orthodox tradition, and learn to lead Christ-centered lives. Ionian Village participants travel across Greece, venerate the relics of saints, walk in the footsteps of the Apostles, and visit significant sites of Greek history and culture. At the end of each program, our campers and staff return home with strengthened faith, life-long friendships based on Christian love, and an expanded appreciation for the Orthodox Church and Greek culture.

Name: Rolling Hills Covenant Church
Description: We endeavor to know Jesus intimately and to share His love and truth passionately.  We encourage you to celebrate new life in Him at our worship services, connect in fellowship through small groups, and contribute your time and talents to sharing the love of Christ with others.

Name: Islamic Center of Greater Austin
Description:
ICGA opened its doors in the 1970's with its initial location on the UT campus , Nueces Masjid. In the late 90's to address the growing needs of the Austin Muslim population, NAIT extended a waqf property at 5110 Manor Rd to the Islamic Center of Greater Austin.

Masjid Khadijah, one part of the ICGA puzzle, opened in the early 2000's. Masjid Khadijah and ICGA at large at an exciting moment in its development with the revamping and revitalization of its programs and structure.

Name: Elevate Life Church
Description: Elevate Life is a non-denominational church founded in January of 2000 in Frisco, Texas with a focus on leadership. Elevate Life is more than just a place to go on the weekend to receive transformational teaching, but it is a place where people are loved, by God and others, and where people can develop beneficial lifelong relationships with people that seek to be great for God. Love is demonstrated by the example of our many wonderful servant-leaders, and the quality relationships they develop.

Name: Missionary Ventures International
Description:
Missionary Ventures is an interdenominational Christian organization that connects individuals and churches worldwide with local or indigenous ministries. Personal involvement with local ministries is emphasized to support maximum impact in influencing the world for Christ.

Missionary Ventures supports the development of churches, schools, feeding centers, clinics, and much more in over fifty countries.

Name: Bistum Mainz
Description: Das Bistum Mainz liegt in Teilen der Länder Hessen, Rheinland-Pfalz und Baden-Württemberg. Es kann auf eine 1.600-jährige Geschichte zurückblicken, davon rund tausend Jahre als Erzbistum.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Des Moines
Description:
The employees and services housed in the Roman Catholic Pastoral Center, located at 601 Grand Ave. in Des Moines, IA, serve 23 counties in southwest Iowa. 

Mission:  Rooted in Jesus Christ, with a spirit of joy and collaboration we assist the bishop in serving the People of God in Southwest Iowa

Greater Des Moines is a great place to live and work. It is one of the few places where you can truly find a great job and have time to live!
We pride ourselves on our schools, friendly communities, short commutes, affordable living and world-class amenities. Forbes ranked us the #2 city in the nation for business and careers, the #6 place to raise a family and Fortune Magazine named us the #1 city with an up and coming downtown. 
And, with its cost of living nearly 10% below the national average, Des Moines was recently named America’s Wealthiest City by the TODAY show. Along with its Midwest lifestyle—including affordable housing and a strong sense of community—Des Moines is rich in culture and recreational activities.
•	Metro population of 500,000
•	Vibrant downtown with dining, entertainment, public art and shopping
•	Named the #2 Farmers’ Market in the nation by the Daily Meal.
•	Home of outstanding, nationally-recognized schools, including Drake and Des Moines Universities
•	The symphony, arts center, Triple A baseball, USHL hockey, and 676 miles of beautiful and well maintained bike and recreational trails
•	Headquarters of several insurance and financial services companies
•	Convenient international airport serviced by several major airlines including Southwest
•	One of the nation’s shortest commute times
You can live in Des Moines and have it all.
We know making a decision about where to live and work is one of the most important, and sometimes, hardest to make. Please visit the links to explore Des Moines and all it has to offer.  https://www.desmoinesmetro.com/en/dsm_metro_info/rankings/
We think you’ll enjoy doing more in Des Moines.

Name: Knoxville Center for Faith & Work
Description: The mission of Knoxville Faith & Work is to equip Christians to see the Gospel transform their day to day work into God's place for them to live out their faith and seek the peace of our city by shining His light in the marketplace.

Name: Institute for School & Parish Development
Description: Established in 1989, the Institute for School and Parish Development (ISPD) is a national development consulting, coaching, and educational firm working exclusively with Catholic institutions. We serve Catholic schools, parishes, and dioceses by helping them create and establish effective processes that engage people and invite resources in order to make their mission and vision come alive. Through consulting, coaching, and teaching, ISPD assists in growing, revitalizing, and strengthening Catholic institutions through assessments; strategic plans; capital campaigns, annual funds, major gifts, and endowment growth; continuous improvement; establishment of a giving culture; and the organization of development, advancement, stewardship, and enrollment management processes. ISPD's consulting processes are delivered on-site, on-line, or hybrid; coaching processes are delivered on-line via the ISPD Partnership Coaching Portal.

Name: Saint Mark's Episcopal School
Description:
Our Missions

We are a family committed to proclaiming God's redeeming love, building up the Body of Christ, and nurturing faith through Christian transformation.

Our mission at Saint Mark's Episcopal School is to provide an education of academic excellence within an Episcopal Ethos which includes spiritual development, ethnic and cultural diversity, service to community, and respect for self and others.

Name: Capitol Hill Baptist Church
Description:
This church exists for the glory of God. We believe that we are made expressly to be in a relationship with Him and to recognize Jesus of Nazareth as our Lord and Savior. We strive to bring God glory through singing and praying together, hearing His Word preached, loving Him, and loving one another.
We are an evangelical community of believers in a needy environment. Our setting has its problems and its opportunities. We cannot be sure what life in the future will bring for us as a church anymore than we know what tomorrow will bring for us as individuals. We are nonetheless delighted at the spiritual health God has cultivated here and thankful that He continues to bring committed believers into our fold. It is a blessing to serve God in the mission field of Capitol Hill with these brothers and sisters of all ages, backgrounds, and occupations.

Name: Bhavishyawani
Description:
Bhavishyawani is known as the premier astrology consulting service provider which performs under the supervision of "Shree Mahakali Vaidic Jyotish & Vastu Kendra (Delhi)".
We have highly experienced astrologers who provide astrological solutions for Horoscopes, Kundli Analysis, Match Making, Property, Relationship, Education, Career, Wealth and Vastu For Home, Office, Shops And Business Premises etc. Our Astrologers have been providing the common people with the accurate Jyotish  Reading with easy remedies to rectify any doshas in the kundli.
We provide 100% certified Gemstones, Siddh Yantra, Rudraksha and Divine Articles as astrological remedies to our clients which gives the desired result to them. 
We performs online/ destination puja and anushthan for our client and partners by well experienced scholar  achrayas.
They performs all the puja and anushthan according as ancient vedic right and rituals. 
We are Perfect destination for your astrological solutions.
Our mission is for our clients alike experience exceptional service, quality and trust.

Name: Union of Evangelical Students of India
Description:
UESI is a non-profit organisation, registered in India.

Vision: Transformed students impacting the campuses and the nation as disciples of the Lord Jesus Christ.

UESI is a student movement linking college/university Evangelical Unions (EUs) throughout the Indian subcontinent and is a member movement of the International Fellowship of Evangelical Students (IFES) a global community of indigenous student movements, called to engage the university with the good news of Jesus Christ. Currently there are more than 500,000 students involved in over 150 national movements worldwide. http://ifesworld.org/

UESI is inter-denominational, it stands on the common ground of all evangelical churches.

It is a member of Evangelical Fellowship of India (EFI) and Indian Missions Association(IMA). Awarded IMA's Excellence in Leadership in 2003.

Name: Pure Desire Ministries
Description: Pure Desire Ministries is a Sexual Integrity Ministry focused on equipping men, women, students, and churches with resources and group structure to bring hope and healing from the effects of sexual addiction and betrayal.

Name: Our Spiritual Teacher
Description: Our mission is to impart a profound and comprehensive understanding of Islam, ensuring that no one is left with a void in their knowledge of our beloved faith. We firmly believe that a Muslim's life purpose transcends mere wealth and luxury; it is to live in accordance with the sacred principles of Islamic Shariah.

Name: Islamic Circle of North America
Description:
Aims for betterment of society thru promotion of Islamic values.

Islamic Circle of North America is a leading grass roots organization which seeks to obtain the pleasure of Allah (SWT) through working for the establishment of Islam in all spheres of life. ICNA has many projects, programs, and activities which are designed to help in the process of molding the individual and reforming society at large. Established in 1968.

Name: Emotionally Healthy Spirituality
Description:
Our mission is to equip the church  in deep, beneath-the-surface spirituality that transforms people who transform the world.

Emotionally Healthy Spirituality was birthed out of the realization that key areas were missing in the churchâs spiritual formation/discipleship initiatives. Over an 18-year period, these missing elements were identified and were found to be applicable around the world as essential to engaging in deep, beneath-the-surface spiritual formation. This is grounded in the conviction that genuine growth cannot help but release the life and gifts of God through His people out into the world.
 

Our objectives are to:

1) Pioneer the integration of emotional health and contemplative spirituality to discipleship and spiritual formation.

2) Transform the quality of leaders, relationships, churches and organizations through media rich resources, in depth personal training, and personal relationships.

3) Enrich the quality of marriages, especially those of leaders, through written material, experiential conferences and seminars.

Name: Faith in Business
Description:
Faith in Business is inspired by a vision of business as a force for good, transforming society in a way that expresses the kingdom of God. It encourages and equips Christian business people to be faithful followers of Jesus Christ in a demanding workplace context. 

We serve a thriving Christian community through a weekly email reflection, monthly online webinar, quarterly magazine, prayer network, annual Retreat, other speaking engagements, newsletters and more. If you'd like to join us, email hello@faithinbusiness.org or see our website at https://www.faithinbusiness.org/

Name: IKAR
Description:
A dynamic community of inspiration and experimentation dedicated to translating Jewish tradition and practice for ringers and rookies, holy rollers and heretics, die-hards and the disaffected – in Los Angeles and throughout the Jewish world. We see an integral connection between intellectual and spiritual development, and political and social activism. 
It is our hope that our community will energize and revitalize elements of the broader Jewish community, and profoundly impact the way we, as Jews, live and act in our world.

IKAR was created in the spring of 2004, and has been inspired by the spirit of B'nai Jeshurun in New York City, where Rabbi Brous served as a Marshall T. Meyer Rabbinic Fellow before moving to Los Angeles.

Our VISION:
We believe that the Jewish community can and should be vibrant, vital and deeply engaged in the world.
We believe that prayer and learning in a holy community can be soulful, inspiring, and profoundly impactful. We believe that matters of the spirit are intimately linked to matters of the world, and that the Jewish community has a distinct responsibility to participate in social justice and tikkun, healing. 
We believe in the transformative power of Shabbat, and we celebrate the dynamic potential of communal prayer that is joyful, musical and heartfelt.
We believe that serious, passionate, and authentic engagement with Torah is an enduring response to the deepest cry of the human heart. We strive to receive sustenance from the wisdom of our tradition, while simultaneously engaging it in lively debate.
We believe that a community of conscience can make manifest the presence of God both within and beyond the walls of the synagogue.
We are both traditional and progressive. Our community is creative, spiritual, and egalitarian, welcoming people of diverse backgrounds, affiliations and lifestyles. Please join us as we continue to search for increasingly more meaningful ways to serve each other, our world and God.

Name: Ignatian Spirituality Project
Description:
The Ignatian Spirituality Project invites people recovering from homelessness and addiction to encounter God’s love, hope and healing through spiritual companionship that transforms lives.

Our Approach:
-We offer spiritual retreat programs, inspired by and rooted in Ignatian spirituality, which invite individuals into communities of hope and belonging.
-We are a network of volunteer teams building relationships with one another and creating welcoming spaces for all.
-We empower people who are in recovery from homelessness and addiction to become leaders on our teams and in our organization.  
-We collaborate with other ministries and organizations in the communities where we serve to achieve and further our mission.

ISP is a volunteer-based ministry that is privileged to support over 750 volunteers who work together in collaborative teams to facilitate our retreat and spirituality programs across our network of 28 cities.

Name: The City Prayer Breakfast
Description:
For over 55 years, city workers and leaders have gathered in London to serve the heart of our city through prayer and fellowship. This event continues the legacy of faith, and service in the City of London.

If you're looking to connect with others who share a passion for supporting the city through prayer, gathering in spirit of love and reconciliation as Jesus of Nazareth taught us over 2000 years ago,  this is the perfect opportunity.

Register today and be a part of this excellent tradition: https://lu.ma/0eouc3xn

Name: Bridgetown Church
Description:
Bridgetown Church is built around the idea of practicing the way of Jesus, together, in our city. We believe that to be an apprentice of Jesus of Nazareth is to order your life around three goals: be with Jesus, become like Jesus, and do what Jesus did. Our dream is that as we live this way, our lives, our communities, and our city, will be transformed.

We believe the Church is not another sub-culture, but the making of a new humanity. It’s not a building or a weekend activity, but a people. We strive to live out the Gospel in our city throughout the week, then gather each weekend as a collection of Communities. We want to partner with God in his relentless pursuit to put the world to rights. Our prayer is as Jesus prayed, that God’s will would be done in Portland as it is in Heaven.

Name: Diocese of Liverpool
Description:
The Diocese of Liverpool is an exciting, challenging and stimulating place to be. We serve a wide mix of communities in urban, rural and town parishes. we ae innovative, seeking new ways to further God's mission while respecting cherished traditions.

We are working to achieve a sustainable, led and transforming Christian presence in every community in the Diocese to enable all to act justly, love mercy and walk humbly with God.

Name: Oregon Hillel
Description:
Oregon Hillel is the catalyst for connecting students, building community and inspiring leadership through Jewish values at the University of Oregon & Oregon State University.  We are student-centric organization and the only pluralistic Jewish community on our campuses; committed to providing a caring and welcoming environment for all students.

@oregonhillel

Name: Uniting Church in Sweden
Description: The United Church in Sweden (UCS) is a church for all of life – where the encounter with Jesus Christ transforms me, you, and the world. Three denominations, with the roots in the Swedish revival, wanted to form something new and joined together in 2011 to become The United Church in Sweden. With over 600 congregations, we gather tens of thousands of people all over Sweden every week for services. We are proud of our youth ministry, Equmenia, our aid organization Diakonia and our international cooperation with around 25 churches around the world. Education and learning have a special place in our church and today we are principals of 6 folk high schools, the Theological University of Stockholm and the study association Bilda.

Name: Mount Hope Church
Description: Mount Hope Church has been in the Lansing community for 100 years, and is dedicated to strengthening families and sharing God’s message of hope. Our church is a home where people specialize in loving God and loving others. Whether your a young adult or an empty-nester, single or married with kids, we have an experience waiting for all walks of life! From the parking lot, you can expect a warm and welcoming atmosphere filled with love and grace. Join us on a Sunday morning and be surrounded by kind and sincere people who are here to help equip you!

Name: Order of Malta Romania
Description:
The Sovereign Military Hospitaller Order of St. John of Jerusalem of Rhodes and of Malta, founded in the 11th century in Jerusalem, is a lay religious order of the Catholic Church and a sovereign subject of international law. 

The Order of Malta Romania is the Order's presence in Romania, consisting of three entities:
1. The Relief Service of the Order of Malta in Romania (SAMR).
2. The National Association of the Order of Malta in Romania (AROM).
3. The Sovereign Order of Malta Embassy to Romania.

To confirm details on the official entities of the Order of Malta in Romania please visit: https://www.orderofmalta.int/contacts/europe/romania

The Order of Malta’s mission is summed up in its motto “Tuitio Fidei et Obsequium Pauperum”: nurturing, witnessing and protecting the faith (tuitio fidei) and serving the poor and the sick (obsequium pauperum).

Caution is strongly recommended when considering proposals or appeals from organisations claiming to be the ‘Order of Malta’ or the ‘Order of Saint John’. Please have their authenticity confirmed by one of our Grand Priories, National Associations, or Diplomatic Missions. For a complete list of the Order’s official entities worldwide, please visit: https://www.orderofmalta.int/contacts

Name: The Quran Learning Center
Description:
Welcome to The Quran Learning Center. We're an online platform dedicated to teaching Quran to individuals of all ages and levels. Our experienced teachers provide personalized instruction in Quran recitation, studies, and more.

We offer learning opportunities for people of all ages and skill levels, from beginners to advanced learners. Our goal is to provide a supportive and engaging environment for spiritual growth and Quranic understanding.

Contact us today to learn more about our programs and start your Quranic learning journey.

Name: Mt. Bethel Church
Description:
Mt. Bethel has served our community for over 175 years. In the late 1870s, the original church structure at the intersection of what is now Richmond Hill and Charlsie Drive, moved to the corner of Lower Roswell Road and Johnson Ferry Road. Shortly after this move, the new church caught fire, but in no time the Mt. Bethel family rallied together and rebuilt their church stronger than ever. This original church building still exists, but we’ve evolved and expanded over the years.

In 2016, our church grew to include two new campuses: Our North Campus, a family-centric community and worship environment located a few miles north of our Lower Roswell Road campus, and The Gathering, our church-within-a-church that offers a modern worship style.

We look forward to the ways that God will continue to grow us in the future. Our local community is a significant part of our history, and we hope that you will make us part of yours.

Bishop Carl A. Kemme is the 11th Bishop of the Catholic Diocese of Wichita. He was appointed on February 20, 2014, by Pope Francis.

Name: Gebetshaus Augsburg e. V.

Das Gebetshaus ist ein Kloster der Moderne – ein Ort des Gebets, des Trainings und der Inspiration.
Die ökumenische Organisation hat es sich zum Ziel gemacht, den christlichen Glauben auf zeitgemäße Weise erfahrbar zu machen. Es ist ein Ort, an dem Christen aller Konfessionen seit 2011 rund um die Uhr beten. Neben dem Tag-und-Nacht-Gebet bietet das Gebetshaus Schulungen, Festivals und andere Veranstaltungen an, die den persönlichen Glauben stärken. Millionen von Menschen werden von den Vorträgen und der Musik aus dem Gebetshaus auf verschiedenen digitalen Plattformen bewegt und inspiriert. Der gemeinnützige Verein trägt sich durch Spenden, beschäftigt derzeit rund 100 Mitarbeiter und wird durch zahlreiche Ehrenamtliche unterstützt.

Name: Antiochian Orthodox Christian Archdiocese of North America
Description:
Welcome to the Antiochian Orthodox Christian Archdiocese of North America, an Archdiocese of the Orthodox Patriarchate of Antioch and All the East. We trace our roots to first century Antioch, the city in which the disciples of Jesus Christ were first called Christians.

Sometimes called the Eastern Orthodox Church, the Orthodox Church is the first Christian Church, the Church founded by the Lord Jesus Christ and described in the pages of the New Testament. Her history can be traced in unbroken continuity all the way back to Christ and His Twelve Apostles. For twenty centuries, she has continued in her undiminished and unaltered faith and practice. Today her apostolic doctrine, worship and structure remain intact. The Orthodox Church maintains that the Church is the living Body of Jesus Christ. 

The Church of Antioch was established by the Apostles Paul and Barnabas in 42 A.D., with St. Peter serving for the next eight years as its first prelate. The Church of Antioch is one of the five ancient Patriarchates of the Christian Church, along with Alexandria, Constantinople, Jerusalem, and Rome. We are in full communion with our brothers and sisters in various other Orthodox Christian jurisdictions, such as the Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of America and the Orthodox Church in America. Together we work to nurture the Orthodox Christians of this land—whether immigrants or native-born, cradle Orthodox, or converts—and to bring America to the ancient Orthodox Christian Faith.

Our Archdiocese currently includes nine dioceses spanning the continent and is led by His Eminence Metropolitan JOSEPH and eight diocesan bishops. Much work of our Archdiocese is accomplished by dedicated ministry staff and volunteers laboring in a wide range of departments and organizations seeing to the needs of our communities. From sacred music to Christian education, from care for aging priests to missionary work, and beyond, our Archdiocese benefits from the work of those who choose to serve.

Name: Faith Farm Ministries
Description:
A Unique Premier National Model

Since 1951, Faith Farm Ministries has evolved from an overnight rescue mission in the streets of Ft. Lauderdale serving homeless and addicted men in church, into a minimum 9 to 12 months, faith-based, residential recovery program for men and women with 445 beds on over 1,600 acres in Ft. Lauderdale, Boynton Beach and Okeechobee. Although our physical locations are in south Florida, we are a national program attracting participants from 47 of 50 states and internationally.

Faith Farm Ministries is the ONLY rescue mission that offers college credits to student for the recovery curriculum they learn while in the 9 month program.  Our Comprehensive Work Training (CWT) Institute provides resume worthy job skills training while providing revenue streamed through various micro-enterprise that funds 94% of the student's free program.  The program's design is unique and genius!

We are open to all faiths, races and socio-economic classes, and we’re here for anyone who not only needs help, but truly wants help.  We provide a safe place, food, clothing, life-skills training, work therapy, counseling and spiritual renewal. It is not enough to have our students achieve sobriety. They must change their way of thinking…a lasting change that results in productive lives.

Continuing in the genius of the program’s design, to be a self-sufficient, self funding, entrepreneurial combination of micro-enterprise, results in a vision of unimaginable possibilities as a premier, national model with capacity to help thousands of people in the midst of the addiction epidemic together with their families.

For more information, contact Judy Walters, Project Manager at jwalters@faithfarm.org.

Name: Diocèse de Meaux
Description:

Quelques chiffres : 16 pôles missionnaires, 91 paroisses, 525 églises, 119 prêtres en activité et 42 diacres permanents.

L’association Diocésaine de Meaux est une association cultuelle. Elle prend en charge les besoins liés à l’exercice du culte catholique et subvient à ses frais. Pour accompagner sa mission d’annonce de l’Evangile, le diocèse s’appuie sur le clergé, mais aussi sur la collaboration des salariés de ses différents services, ainsi que de très nombreux bénévoles.

Name: VEDAKSHAYA YATHRA
Description:
Welcome to Vedakshya Yathra – A Sacred Journey into the Heart of Tradition and Spirituality! 

 About Us:
Embark on a sacred journey with Vedakshya Yathra, founded in 2021 in the spiritual haven of Rameshwaram, Southern India. We specialize in meticulously curated rituals and puja services, with a mission to spread the divine essence across the globe.

 Our Vision:
At Vedakshya Yathra, we envision a world where the sacred rituals of our tradition transcend borders, uniting hearts and fostering global harmony. Join us as we weave a tapestry of spiritual experiences that resonates across continents.

 Services Offered:
Indulge in a spectrum of divine experiences with our diverse services, including Thila Homam, Naga Pradishta, Rudra Homam, Sarpa Shanthi, Varsha Thithi, Pitru Pooja, Sudarshana Homam, Shanthana Gopala Krishna Homam, and more. Our ceremonies are conducted by Vedic certified pandits and Brahmins, reflecting the purity of our cultural heritage.

 Global Presence:
Rooted in the sacred soil of Rameshwaram, Vedakshya Yathra extends its spiritual embrace globally. Connect with us through our digital platforms, and experience the sanctity of our rituals from anywhere in the world.

 Ancestral Wisdom:
Guided by the wisdom of our ancestors, each ritual at Vedakshya Yathra is a profound offering steeped in the heritage of our culture. Join us on this transformative journey where tradition meets innovation.

 Future Endeavors:
As Vedakshya Yathra continues its sacred expedition, we remain committed to preserving ancient traditions while embracing the needs of a modern, global audience. Join us in building a global community bound by the threads of spirituality.

Contact Information:
Website: www.vedakshayayatra.com
Email: vedakshaya.global@gmail.com
Phone: 6360596807

Embark on a sacred journey with Vedakshya Yathra – Where Traditions Thrive, and Spirits Unite!  #VedakshyaYathra #SpiritualJourney #AncientRituals #GlobalHarmony

Name: Réseau Barnabé

Ces projets sont soutenus et fédérés par la Coordination nationale du Réseau. La Coordination nationale pilote des actions de formation et d'accompagnement des professeurs de français auxquelles participent enseignants et formateurs de l'Enseignement catholique. Name: Hispanic Baptist Convention of Texas
Description:
The Hispanic Baptist Convention of Texas (HBCT) consists of over 1,200 Hispanic Baptist congregations in Texas.  The congregations are as varied as the landscape of Texas: from people who have been Texans for generations and speak only English, to first generation immigrants, to multi-ethnic congregations, 

CBHT is currently developing pastoral peer groups through its Conexión Pastors initiative. It also focuses on increasing the graduation rate of Hispanic and under-served students through the Baptist General Convention of Texas' Hispanic Education Initiative.  CBHT continues to be faithful to its initial core mission of partnering with others to share the hope of Christ and the reality of that hope as it nourishes the spirit, mind and body of Texans.

HBCT has enjoyed a long partnership with the Baptist General Convention of Texas.

Name: Bridges International
Description:
Bridges International is a non-profit organization that exists to help serve and mobilize international students in the USA and abroad. Many of our staff have lived, studied & worked overseas, and we understand the unique challenges facing students.

The United States is home to nearly 1,000,000 international students and visiting scholars. It’s no stretch of the imagination to predict that many of the world's next generation of business, political and academic leaders will emerge from this elite group.

Bridges International is a non-profit organization that exists to help serve and mobilize the international student population in the USA and abroad. Many of our staff have lived, studied and worked overseas, and we understand the unique challenges facing international students.

If you would like information about becoming a key student leader or community volunteer with Bridges International, please contact us. Include as much information as possible, especially your campus location. We look forward to hearing from you.

Waar je met anderen in gesprek kunt zijn. Waar je God kunt zoeken; in de stilte van de kapel, in ontmoetingen rond de eettafel, in bezinning op een thema. Dat is retraitecentrum De Spil; een plek ‘tussen herberg en klooster’. Ook voor zakelijke verhuur.

Name: Global Ministries of the Christian Church (Disciples of Christ) and United Church of Christ
Description:
Global Ministries is a common missional witness of the Christian Church (Disciples of Christ) and the United Church of Christ. Global Ministries works with approximately 290 faith-based international partners in close to 90 countries.

Our Vision: That all of God’s people and creation share in God’s abundant life.

Our Mission: To receive and share the Good News of Jesus Christ by joining with global and local partners to work for justice, reconciliation, and peace.

Name: St. Mary's Academy- Inglewood, CA
Description:
Founded by the Sisters of St. Joseph of Carondelet in 1889, St. Mary's Academy is dedicated to educating and empowering young women to meet the challenges of an ever-changing world. The vibrant SMA campus is a place where students can grow in an academically rigorous environment and foster lasting bonds with all members of our community, all while nurturing the development of a Christian heart of love for and service to the "dear neighbor" in the tradition of the CSJ Sisters.  

To learn more about SMA, visit our website or find us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter 

@smabelles 

“All of which woman is capable.”

Name: Fellowship In The Word Ministries
Description:
We began Fellowship In The Word because of the lack of true Bible Doctrine that is being preached and taught these days in the traditional Church. Not to say there is no one preaching and teaching sound doctrine, as we know there are many Churches that live on sound doctrine.  We believe that one of the best places for your Church may be your home.  After all, homes are where the first Churches began meeting for worship, fellowship, teaching and ministry.  These Churches were powerful and changed the world.  In the home is where your first ministry begins and you must begin that ministry with sound doctrine.

Our goal is to help build Godly relationships with the Heavenly Father and His Son Jesus Christ and to have fellowship with us here at Fellowship In The Word Church.  We are a Home Church with online presence reaching out to anyone who wants fellowship and wants sound doctrine, line upon line, precept upon precept, to be used in their daily life with practical application of God's Word. 

Today over 112 million Christians worldwide do not attend a tradition Church.  Every year it's estimated that 1 million Christians leave the institutional Church in the United States.  Presently, the number of adult Christians meeting outside the traditional Church setting is over 11 million.  This number is growing every day.

Sometimes traditional Church can get a little bogged down with worrying about the building, salaries, maintenance, complicated organizations and loose sight of the purpose of Church, and that is to fellowship, worship and be edified with sound doctrine for the equipping of the saints for ministry and spiritual growth.  WE ARE! YOU CAN TOO!

Name: It Is Written, Inc.
Description:
It Is Written is an international Christian television ministry dedicated to sharing insights from God's Word with people around the world. Founded in 1956 by George Vandeman, the theme of this ministry can be found in Matthew 4:4: "It is written, 'Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceeds from the mouth of God.'"

It Is Written has been positively impacting lives around the world for the last 56 years through former speaker/directors George Vandeman, Mark Finley and Shawn Boonstra, and current speaker/director John Bradshaw.

Each weekly program takes timeless truths and applies them to everyday life. Programs regularly deal with such issues as loneliness, fear, low self-esteem, health, family values and spiritual principles. People of all faiths and creeds—even those with no faith at all—have been inspired and encouraged through It Is Written's straightforward and uplifting presentations.

Name: Madina Institute
Description: Madina Institute seeks to bring hope, growth, and opportunity to all human beings as a place of deep theological reflection.  We understand that people can be both seekers of knowledge and believers of faith, each solidifying the other. Madina Institute is a place where your spiritual journey will flourish and help you go deeper into your faith to serve humanity.

Name: Arrowhead Conferences + Events
Description: Founded in 1986, Arrowhead is a non-profit ministry of Cru, with a mission to save ministries time and money on their conferences so they can apply greater resources to achieving their mission of "taking the Gospel to the end of the world." (Matthew 28:19-20).

Name: Trinity United Methodist Church
Description:
Trinity United Methodist Church is a progressive church located in southeast Lincoln.  We believe in mission, outreach, spiritual growth and community.  

Sunday morning at Trinity is a time when we come together for fellowship, spiritual growth and worship. We invite you to join us, Sundays at 9:00 & 10:30!

9:00 Contemporary Worship
9:00 Sunday School (All Ages)
10:30 Blended Worship

Join us on Sunday to experience worship at Trinity!

Name: Hope Church
Description: HOPE is a church community in Richmond, VA that exists to help people find life and purpose in Jesus Christ.

Name: Paul Tripp Ministries, Inc.
Description: Paul Tripp Ministries, Inc. a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization that supports pastor and best-selling author in his mission: connecting the transforming power of Jesus Christ to everyday life. Follow Paul David Tripp on LinkedIn for teaching and encouraging content: http://www.linkedin.com/in/paul-david-tripp

Name: Marcem Quran Academy
Description: MARCEM Quran Academy is a leading online Quran learning platform offering authentic Quran and Islamic education to students around the world. We specialize in online Quran classes, Tajweed courses, Hifz programs, and Islamic studies for learners of all ages. Our qualified male and female Quran tutors deliver interactive one-on-one and group sessions, ensuring every student receives personalized attention and guidance. With a focus on flexibility, accessibility, and excellence, MARCEM Quran Academy uses modern technology to make Quran learning engaging, effective, and spiritually uplifting. Our mission is to help students learn the Quran online with proper pronunciation, understanding, and reflection, fostering a deeper connection with Islam and its teachings.

Name: Treasure for our hearts
Description: A bible verse a day, a message of hope.

Name: Friends of The Great Commission
Description:
Our main purpose is to partner with people, ministries, and projects in order to help fulfill the Great Commission as defined in the gospel of Matthew in the Bible. Our aim is to fulfill the Great Commission through financial management support to the people who serve the world. Our motto is “serving people serving the world.”

Our mandate, as registered with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and in Canada with the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA), is as follows:

• Advancement of the Christian faith
• Advancement of education
• Relief of poverty.

We provide a convenient avenue for donors to process gifts of cash or assets for Christian humanitarian and evangelization projects that contribute to the fulfillment of the Great Commission.

We provide ministry workers and organizations with these financial management and compliance services:
• Tools for online fund-raising
• Donation acknowledgement with official income tax-deductible receipts
• Book-keeping and financial management
• Expense processing and payroll
• International bank transfers
• Charity compliance reporting to the IRS and CRA.


We also are able to advise our partner Agents on cost-effective access to a robust group benefit plan that includes medical and travel insurance for both national and international workers.


Friends of the Great Commission Foundation is a registered United States 501(c)(3) charity (EIN #46-5506318).

our sister organization, The Great Commission Foundation is a registered Canadian charity with Canada Revenue Agency (#85992 8483 RR0001).

SERVING PEOPLE SERVING THE WORLD

Find us at:

Twitter: https://twitter.com/TGCFandFriends

Facebook:
https://www.facebook.com/TheGreatCommissionFoundation/

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6KkZmCCJBvfi5j02XKm_Ig/videos

VISÃO DE REINO

Realizar eventos sociais de cunho evangelístico, assim como congressos de temas específicos relacionados ao mercado

Name: American Baptist Churches USA
Description:
American Baptist Churches are missional congregations that nurture devoted disciples of Jesus Christ who live their lives in mission and ministry for the healing of the world through the love of God.

The ABCUSA Office of the General Secretary exists to serve the entire denomination by supporting our American Baptist family, strengthening our regions, and bringing together American Baptist across all of our diversities.

Name: Trinity Lutheran Church and School
Description: Trinity Lutheran Church and School has served God's people in central Illinois since 1858. Our mission is to share the forgiveness and love of the risen Christ, and to make disciples by the power of the Holy Spirit through Prayer, Teaching, Worship, Care and Concern, and Fellowship.

Name: Christian Entrepreneurs Alliance
Description:
The Christian Entrepreneurs Association is an organization of entrepreneurs and business professionals whose mission is to guide participants to live out their Christian faith more fully in our chosen professions.

Our activities and gatherings are designed to enable Christians to meet others who share similar passions and beliefs. We will often invite guest speakers to our events who have expressed a willingness to share their perspective and experiences on integrating their faith and work.

Silicon Valley and the great SF Bay Area is the premier place in the world where people gather for technology innovation. We’re like the see the same entrepreneurial and innovative efforts from this region to be used to serve the Kingdom of God.

Name: First Houston
Description:
First Methodist Houston has been working for Houston and its people since its inception in 1832. We are dedicated to two things: serving Jesus, and inviting everyone to come along with us. That philosophy spreads throughout everything we do, from our ministries to the homeless, immigrants, and refugees throughout Houston, to our worship, both in person and online, to our missional reach across the world. 

We have two campuses: 1320 Main Street, in the heart of downtown, and 10570 Westpark Drive, in West Houston.

Name: First Methodist Houston
Description:
First Methodist Houston has been working for Houston and its people since its inception in 1832. We are dedicated to two things: serving Jesus, and inviting everyone to come along with us. That philosophy spreads throughout everything we do, from our ministries to the homeless, immigrants, and refugees throughout Houston, to our worship, both in person and online, to our missional reach across the world. 

We have two campuses: 1320 Main Street, in the heart of downtown, and 10570 Westpark Drive, in West Houston.

Name: Capital Camps & Retreat Center
Description:
Capital Camps & Retreat Center provides fun, challenging and creative camp and retreat experiences that build vibrant Jewish communities and nurture individual growth.

As a community agency, both our summer camp and all-inclusive retreat center, located just 75 miles from Baltimore and Washington DC in the stunning Catoctin Mountains of Pennsylvania, offer multiple pathways to engage and explore. Capital Camps is the premier Jewish community overnight camp in the region.

Name: Saddleback.com.Live Broadcast/Online chat host & moderator, social media trainer and content generat
Description: Saddleback Internet Campus serves the Southern California community through more than 200 ministries, ten worship venues, a variety of counseling and support programs, Bible studies and seminars, local and global outreach programs, and a broad network of small groups meeting in local homes. Its purpose is to lead people to Jesus and membership in his family, teach them to worship the Lord and magnify his name, develop them to Christlike maturity, and equip them for ministry in the church and a mission in the world.

Name: Gateway Baptist Church
Description: Gateway Baptist Church is a large multi campus church based in Qld with campuses in Mackenzie, Ormeau, Redlands, Logan, Brisbane City and an online campus that reaches people wherever they are. Everyone who comes through our doors is welcome.

Name: International Bahá'í Community
Description:
The Bahá'í Faith is the youngest of the world's independent religions. Its founder, Bahá'u'lláh (1817-1892), is regarded by Bahá'ís as the most recent in the line of Messengers of God that stretches back beyond recorded time and that includes Abraham, Moses, Buddha, Krishna, Zoroaster, Christ and Muhammad.

The central theme of Bahá'u'lláh's message is that humanity is one single race and that the day has come for its unification in one global society. God, Bahá'u'lláh said, has set in motion historical forces that are breaking down traditional barriers of race, class, creed, and nation and that will, in time, give birth to a universal civilization. The principal challenge facing the peoples of the earth is to accept the fact of their oneness and to assist the processes of unification.

One of the purposes of the Bahá'í Faith is to help make this possible. A worldwide community of some five million Bahá'ís, representative of most of the nations, races and cultures on earth, is working to give Bahá'u'lláh's teachings practical effect. Their experience will be a source of encouragement to all who share their vision of humanity as one global family and the earth as one homeland.

Name: Anglican Diocese of Perth
Description:
The Anglican Diocese of Perth is a diocese within The Anglican Church of Australia. It is the Metropolitical See in the State of Western Australia. It holds strongly to the bonds of affection with the Archbishop of Canterbury, the Anglican Consultative Council and the Instruments of Unity of the worldwide Anglican Communion.

Our Core Purpose, as outlined in the Mission Plan, is as follows:
•	We are a people called to worship God in Christ and by the power of the Spirit to share radical love with the world, building communities of hope, healing and transformation.
•	We seek to hold together the Ministry of Word and Sacrament, evangelical zeal embedded in prayer, pastoral care and social justice.

There are more than 100 parishes in the Diocese of Perth which, along with St George’s Cathedral, make a significant contribution to the life of the city and state.

A collaborative style of ministry is encouraged in the Diocese of Perth: Lay/clergy, women/men, old/young – a variety of people from different cultural, linguistic backgrounds seek to work in partnership, holding on to the dignity of each. Laity are encouraged to take on important roles in diocesan and parish life. The Diocese of Perth is at the forefront of providing opportunities for women, ordained and lay, to be fully involved at every level of leadership in the Church.

Name: Sagebrush Church
Description:
AT THE HEART OF SAGEBRUSH is our mission: to know Christ and to make Christ known.
Sagebrush is a multisite church with locations based in the beautiful State of New Mexico. The church has a thriving local community, along with online services that reach all across the world. We offer a casual environment where people can experience contemporary worship and engage with one another through the teaching of the Bible.

In 2024 we are celebrating our 25th year as a church!  
Senior Pastor, Todd Cook.

Name: FEBC (Far East Broadcasting Company)
Description: FEBC (Far East Broadcasting Company) is an international Christian missions organization that preaches the Gospel of Jesus Christ through local radio station broadcasts. Using modern missions technologies, we share the Gospel in 50 countries and 130 languages through mobile devices, streaming internet programs, and radio broadcasts. Our Christian radio ministry has project locations in countries all over Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. By broadcasting Christian messages through radio, we are able to reach people with the Gospel where traditional missionaries can't, such as the Muslim world, persecuted Christians in restricted countries, and unreached people groups.

Name: Panditji on way
Description: Panditji on way is a company based out of Maharashtra Nagar, Mankhurd, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

Name: Sagemont Church
Description:
Sagemont Church works to provide Living Proof of a Loving God to a Watching World.

We achieve our mission by continually working through all six parts of the "Heart of Living Proof."

Worship: Gathering for weekly worship events. 
Connect: Building relationships with God and others. 
Learn: Knowing what the Bible says and how to apply its principles to daily life. 
Pray: Having daily conversation in your personal relationship with God. 
Serve: Using your time, spiritual gifts, and abilities to serve others. 
Give: Funding the vision of Sagemont through weekly giving and special donations.

Name: Thousand Pines Christian Camp
Description:
Thousand Pines exists to help people see, know, and experience God.

Since 1939, Thousand Pines Christian Camp and Conference Center has been ministering in the name of Jesus Christ to people across the Pacific Southwest and beyond. Tens of thousands have joined the Kingdom, countless others have renewed their walk, and many others are serving churches and on the mission fields across the world. Although Thousand Pines is surrounded by great natural beauty and great recreational opportunities, our primary goal is to create a distraction-free environment where our guests have opportunities to see, know and experience God.

Our 255 acre facility is located approximately two hours east of Los Angeles in the San Bernardino National Forest at an elevation of 5,000 feet. Over 25,000 people attend Thousand Pines each year. Of that number, over 30% of guests are with groups that program and run their own Custom Retreats. The Thousand Pines Outdoor Science School meets at the same location.

Our goal is to exceed our guests’ expectations at every level. To do this takes teams of high performing staff who posess servant’s hearts and embrace the value of saying “yes” to our guests whenever feasible- even if it requires extra work.

Name: Lebanese Muslim Association
Description:
The Lebanese Muslim Association (LMA) was established in 1962 by a group of Lebanese immigrants, along with the construction of Imam Ali bin Abi Taleb Mosque of Lakemba, completed in 1977. The organisation has been in operation for over 50 years, servicing the local established and newly migrant community by providing social, religious, educational and recreational services. 

The LMA currently runs dedicated programs supporting refugees and new migrants to Australia, programs to develop youth, build capacity within the community and promote social cohesion. The organisation also focuses on delivering key infrastructure services to meet the growing needs of the Muslim community such as; the construction of a residential aged care facility that aims to deliver a CALD service to the community, foster care service for Muslim children, educational services and a self managed funeral. This is an addition to political advocacy and media representation the organisation is involved with.

Name: St. Andrews Presbyterian Church
Description:
We are a Neighborhood Church with Global Impact. St. Andrew's has been located in the heart of the Newport Beach community for 75 years, between Newport Harbor High School and Ensign Middle School. One of the distinct things about our church is that we're an all-generations community. There's a place for you here, and we look forward to seeing you soon.

We have four worship services between Saturdays and Sundays. Three are Modern in style (live band, relaxed clothing, etc.), and one is Classic in style (choir, hymns, organ, orchestra, Sunday best). If you'd like to check out some of our latest sermons, Click Here.

Modern Service Times: Saturdays 5:30 p.m., Sundays 9:00 and 10:30 a.m.
Classic Service Time: Sundays 9:00 a.m.

Name: Zentralkomitee der deutschen Katholiken (ZdK)
Description:
Wir, das Zentralkomitee der deutschen Katholiken (ZdK), sind die katholische Stimme in der Zivilgesellschaft in Deutschland. Wir gestalten aus unserem Glauben heraus Kirche, Gesellschaft und Politik aktiv mit.

Das ZdK ist der Zusammenschluss von 
- Vertreter*innen der Diözesanräte
- der katholischen Verbände und Organisationen sowie
- weiteren Persönlichkeiten aus Kirche und Gesellschaft. 

Seit 2019 sind wir gemeinsam mit der Deutschen Bischofskonferenz auf dem Synodalen Weg, um die katholische Kirche mit ihren Strukturen zu reformieren und aktiv gegen die missbrauchsfördernden Strukturen vorzugehen.

Außerdem veranstalten wir seit 1884 den Deutschen Katholikentag.

Name: Manhattan Jewish Experience
Description: Founded by Rabbi Mark N. Wildes in 1998, MJE is a warm and open community where young men and women in their 20s and 30s can explore Jewish life and meet new people. MJE runs a wide range of inclusive, engaging and innovative programs for thousands of young Jewish professionals, including Shabbat Dinners, Holiday Events and Parties, Ski Trip, Classes, Beginner Services, Trips to Israel, Marching in the Israel Day Parade and much more. MJE was founded in memory of Ruth B. Wildes z”l.

Name: Stichting Al-Andalous
Description: Moskee en maatschappelijk betrokken

Name: LUX Academy Den Haag
Description: De LUX Academy is een platform voor inspiratie en bezinning. Je vindt er masterclasses, lezingen en workshops.

Name: Camp Ramah in California
Description:
Our Vision: We dream of a more just world with many generations of proud, educated, and reflective Jews, deeply committed to their communities and the pursuit of vibrant Jewish life.

Our Mission: Camp Ramah in California creates lifelong relationships through joyful, welcoming, and immersive Jewish experiences rooted in Torah, Avodah, and Gemilut Hasadim. Ramah is committed to the future of the Jewish community and the betterment of the world.

Torah – We cultivate a passion for lifelong Jewish learning and a commitment to our heritage and the wisdom of our people.

Avodah – We create opportunities for joyful prayer and positive engagement in the richness of our rituals and mitzvot.

Gemilut hasadim – We take active responsibility for each other and the world.

Camp Ramah is an American Camp Association accredited, coeducational, residential summer camp affiliated with the Conservative Movement and National Ramah Commission and operates under the educational auspices of the Ziegler School of Rabbinic Studies at American Jewish University.

Name: San Carlos Seminary
Description: The Royal and Conciliar San Carlos Seminary is the archdiocesan seminary of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Manila. It was established in the year 1702, by decree of King Philip V of Spain. At present, the institution houses seminarians belonging to various dioceses in Luzon, particularly from the Metro Manila region.

Name: Bethany International
Description: Bethany exists to train and equip the next generation of disciplemakers. Through training, sending, and partnering, our ministries prepare Kingdom builders to advance the Good News of Jesus Christ. Bethany missionaries and partner organizations serve in dozens of countries around the world in places with little to no access to the Gospel.
