> Kids: ISKCON School of Culture & Values
> ISKCON Youth Services (Trainings for Boys & Girls)
> Family: Ashray & Nāmhatta Groups
• Food for Life (Midday Meal)
• Spiritual Concerts and Holy Pilgrimages.
Join us on this Blissful Journey!

The International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON) is the spiritual institution founded by His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada in July 1966 as a continuation of the Brahma-Madhva-Gaudiya sampradaya. It is scripturally based on the 5,000-year-old Sanskrit text Bhagavad-gita.ISKCON was personally directed by its Founder-Acarya Srila Prabhupada until his departure on November 14, 1977.Today, ISKCON is a worldwide community of devotees, or Vaishnavas , practicing bhakti yoga, loving service to Krishna. The Krishna Consciousness movement is not exactly a religion, but an educational and cultural system that is open to everyone.
ISKCON, otherwise known as the Hare Krishna movement, includes five hundred major centers, temples and rural communities, nearly one hundred affilated vegetarian restaurants, thousands of namahattas or local meeting groups, a wide variety of community projects, and millions of congregational members worldwide. Members of ISKCON practice bhakti-yoga in their homes and also worship in temples. They also promote bhakti-yoga, or Krishna Consciousness, through festivals, the performing arts, yoga seminars, public chanting, and the distribution of the society’s literatures. ISKCON members have also opened hospitals, schools, colleges, eco-villages, free food distribution projects, and other in

Name: Congregation Beit Simchat Torah
Description:
Congregation Beit Simchat Torah is committed to the idea that gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Jews are wholly legitimate members of the Jewish people, are equally legitimate members of civil society, and have a unique and essential contribution to make to the life of Judaism and society. It is this commitment to social justice and gender equality that has also attracted straight and even non-Jewish adults to our community.

A Spiritual Community

We are active in many dimensions through which we seek to transform ourselves from a collection of individuals into a spiritual community in which we can create a profound sense of purpose and meaning in our lives and in which we can experience the presence of G-d.

We are a house of prayer, offering both traditional and liberal services within an egalitarian framework. We are committed to developing the ritual, liturgical, and theological heritage of Judaism to meet our widely ranging needs as a congregation.

We are a spiritual community, warm and nurturing, intense and challenging. We are committed to one another and to our sense of purpose as a significant voice in the gay community, in the world of Judaism, and in the dialogue of the world’s religions. Even  m’asu  habonim  haitah  l’rosh  pinah:  the stone that the builders rejected has indeed become the corner-stone. May G-d grant us the vision and the strength to continue with the building.

Name: Kerkpunt
Description: Kerkpunt inspireert, adviseert en begeleidt kerken om voorproefjes te zijn van het koninkrijk van God. Kom verder in kerk-zijn!

Name: corp iglesia de jesucristo de los santos de los ultimos dias
Sisters of Notre Dame de Namur Ohio Province
Description:
The Sisters of Notre Dame de Namur are women with hearts as wide as the world.

Following the call of Jesus as he reveals himself in the gospels, we live simply and joyously in the footsteps of St. Julie Billiart, our founder.

We place a special emphasis on education, especially for women and children, who are poor and ministering where others may not choose to go. We strive to listen faithfully to the challenge and invitation of the Spirit as we move into the 21st century, there to meet the needs of God's people still awaiting us.

Name: BibleOn
Description:
BibleOn: Holy Bibles + Audio

Welcome to BibleOn, your ultimate digital companion for reading and listening to the Word of God. Our mission is to make the Holy Scriptures accessible and understandable to everyone, transcending language barriers and cultural differences. BibleOn offers the Holy Bible in both text and audio formats, covering a vast array of international and tribal languages, all available for free.

Key Features:

Multilingual Audio Bible: Experience the Scriptures in your preferred language with our extensive selection of digital Bibles.
Text and Audio Sync: Enhance your understanding with synchronized text and audio.
Offline Access: Download your favorite passages for uninterrupted access anytime, anywhere.
Car Audio Integration: Connect the app to your car audio system for a spiritually enriching commute.
Custom Playback Options: Personalize your listening experience with adjustable playback settings.
Our Vision:
At BibleOn, we strive to empower your faith by making the Bible accessible to all, ensuring everyone can connect with God's word in their native language. Whether you are at home, traveling, or relaxing, BibleOn is your portable gateway to spiritual enlightenment.

Join Our Community:
Be a digital missionary and share the BibleOn app with your family, friends, and network. Train others in its use and help spread knowledge and faith. Stay connected to your Creator and let the transformative power of the Scriptures guide you on your spiritual journey.

Connect with Us:
Visit our website at www.bibleon.app to download the app and embark on your blessed journey with the Scriptures today.

"Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of the prophecy, and blessed are those who hear and who keep what is written in it; for the time is near." - Revelation 1:3

Keep it On, Always!

Name: Fellowship Dubai
Description:
We are a church for people who think they don’t like church, so we can help them come to know a God they think they don’t need, tell them about Jesus, train and equip them, and send them back to their home countries to carry the message of the gospel.

Fellowship Dubai, which was established in 2005, is a quickly growing multisite church with over 80 nationalities. It is unique in that almost everyone who comes will leave within 5 or 10 years as they return to their home country. We have a limited window in which to prepare them as disciples making disciples ready to serve in Dubai and beyond.

Name: Eden Ministries
Description:
Eden Ministries is a human development non-profit committed to impacting lives holistically. We love Jesus and devote ourselves to sharing hope through relief and development of lives by engaging the ministry vehicles of education, healthcare, orphan care, and spirituality. Our headquarters are in Goshen, Indiana and our work centers around Doma Township, Mhangura, Mashonaland West, Zimbabwe. Contact us for diving into this wonderful work together!

More of our story:
Kevin and Susan founded Eden Ministries as Goshen Christian Church African Ministries in 1998. Eden has grown and blossomed much faster into the large undertaking that they originally envisioned, but we’ve yet to realize all God had in His mind from the beginning! We took in our first child in 2000 and have had the honor of caring for 307 total up to this current time. If you’d like to read the whole story, please visit the website!

Name: Erzbistum Bamberg
Description:
Das Erzbistum Bamberg umfasst fast den gesamten Regierungsbezirk Oberfrankens, weite Teile von Mittelfranken und kleinere Gebiete von Unterfranken und der Oberpfalz.

(Impressum: https://erzbistum.erzbistum-bamberg.de/kontakt/impressum - Datenschutz: https://erzbistum.erzbistum-bamberg.de/kontakt/datenschutz)

Name: Federació de Cristians de Catalunya (since 1931)
Description:
La Federació de Cristians de Catalunya és una associació privada de fidels, constituïda a la diòcesi de Barcelona, que té per objecte la preparació i l'exercici de l'apostolat de l'evangelització i la difusió dels principis cristians i la seva aplicació. En poden ser socis tots els fidels catòlics de més de 18 anys que compleixin les condicions que estableix el dret canònic i acceptin els estatuts de la Federació, que siguin proposats per dos membres del Consell Directiu o per dos socis elegibles per formar part del Consell.
Fou creada al 1931 com a Federació de Joves Cristians de Catalunya.
E-mail: federaciocc@gmail.com

Name: Movement.org
Description:
Our mission is to catalyze leaders to spiritually and socially impact their cities through rigorous research, uniting prayer, unified local leadership, and powerful collaboration between diverse sectors.

We believe something powerful happens in a city when Christian leaders come together across generational, cultural, denominational, and socio-economic lines. While division in the church breeds atheism in the world, the unity in the church is the aroma of Christ to the world.

God is using Movement Day to bring the Body of Christ together in a region. But beyond a gathering, Movement Day serves as an accelerator for leaders – church, business, non-profit – to collaborate together in addressing a region’s most stubborn spiritual and social realities.

Name: Digital Church Platform
Description:
The Digital Church Platform understands the challenges that churches face in managing their unique working practices. Our church software is designed to address these challenges by providing tailored solutions through four key modules. These modules are specifically crafted to streamline operations, optimise resource usage, and unlock the full potential for impact and growth within churches.

We believe in the power of digitisation to transform the front and back-office operations of churches, allowing them to become more outward-facing and successful in their mission. By embracing digital solutions, churches improve church management and administration. 

Compliance is a crucial aspect of church management, and our platform includes a dedicated module developed in collaboration with clergy and compliance officers. This module ensures that churches adhere to all laws, regulations, and standards, covering areas such as governance, data protection, property, and employment.

Our digital repository offers a secure and structured storage solution for critical information, allowing churches to access and manage their resources with ease. Stored on cloud platforms like AWS, our repository provides role-based access controls to safeguard sensitive data.

In addition, our visitation compliance module and church content management system (CMS) further enhance the functionality of our platform. The visitation compliance module helps churches track and manage visitation activities, while our CMS empowers churches to publish and manage content on their public-facing websites effortlessly.

At the Digital Church Platform, we are committed to empowering churches with the tools they need to thrive in the digital age. Connect with us to learn more about how our solutions can support your church's mission and growth objectives. Let's work together to shape the future of church management.

Name: Diocese of Chichester
Description: Who are we, as the Diocese of Chichester? We are the young and old, ordained and lay, the women and men who form the Church of England in Sussex. We are the disciples of Jesus Christ. The joys, hopes and sorrows of the world are our joy, hope and sorrow, too.  But the mystery of the truth about life in all its fullness – that is the gift of Jesus Christ that we have received and are asked to share with all who are ready to receive it. We are, through baptism into him, a royal, priestly and prophetic people.

Name: Highland Park Presbyterian Church
Description: For ninety years, Highland Park Pres has been a missions-driven, multi-generational and multi-cultural congregation committed to leading people into a transforming relationship with Jesus. Empowered by the Holy Spirit, we express our love for God through tangible acts of compassion and justice in our everyday lives. And using our gifts and resources, we seek to glorify God through heartfelt worship, a life rooted in Scripture and an experience of authentic community. We are located in the heart of the Park Cities, in Dallas, Texas.

One church, many expressions, serving Baltimore together!

Name: Cidade Vicentina Frederico Ozanam
Description:
A Cidade Vicentina Frederico Ozanam é uma associação de direito privado, beneficente, sem fins lucrativos, com natureza de Instituição de Longa Permanência para Idosos (ILPI),  com atendimento de forma continuada, permanente e planejada na área de Assistência Social.

Atualmente a entidade possui aproximadamente 130 (cento e trinta) idosos, sendo 100 (cem) em regime de Internato e 30 (trinta) no Centro–Dia. 
 
Além de proporcionarmos serviços de lavanderia, limpeza, manutenção, medicamentos, itens de higiene pessoal, transporte para atendimento médico especializados e hospitalares, a instituição oferece assistência moral, intelectual e social sem distinção alguma quanto a raça, cor, sexo, condição social, credo religioso ou qualquer outra forma de discriminação dos assistidos. 

Oferecemos também moradia digna e adequada às suas necessidades, preservando os direitos da pessoa idosa e os cuidados essenciais à saúde física e mental de nossos assistidos.

Name: Katholische Kirche Stadt Luzern
Description:
Die rund 300 Mitarbeitenden der Katholischen Kirche Stadt Luzern stehen mit ihren Kompetenzen und Werten für eine zukunftsgerichtete Kirche, die mit innovativen und bedürfnisgerechten Dienstleistungen nahe bei den Menschen ist. Im grossen Pastoralraum Stadt Luzern bieten wir vielfältige sinnstiftende Aufgaben mit Raum für Ideen, Gestaltungs- und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten.

Wir pflegen einen offenen, wertschätzenden, auf Vertrauen basierenden Umgang. Die «Du-Kultur» fördert in unseren flachen Hierarchien die Kommunikation auf Augenhöhe und erleichtert den offenen Austausch in der interdisziplinären Zusammenarbeit. 

Besonderen Wert legen wir auf attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen in Bezug auf die soziale Sicherheit (Lohnfortzahlung bei Krankheit und Unfall, Pensionskasse) und die Familienfreundlichkeit. Die Vereinbarkeit von Beruf und Privatleben ist uns wichtig. Die überwiegende Mehrheit der Mitarbeitenden arbeitet in Teilzeit. Wir bieten individuelle, familienfreundliche Arbeitsmodelle an, wo möglich auch im Homeoffice.

Etwas mehr als die Hälfte der 300 Mitarbeitenden sind Frauen. Der Frauenanteil bei den Führungsfunktionen liegt bei über 40%. Zudem werden wir von ca. 1‘700 Ehrenamtlichen unterstützt.

Unsere Kirchgemeinde umfasst: 
• die Pfarreien St. Anton ∙ St. Michael, St. Johannes, Der MaiHof - St. Josef, St. Karl, St. Leodegar im Hof, St. Maria zu Franziskanern, St. Paul sowie die Jesuitenkirche und die Peterskapelle
Die Mitarbeitenden sind in den Quartieren präsent und greifen die Anliegen der Bevölkerung auf.
• die gesamtstädtischen Fachbereiche Alter, Bildung & Kultur, Empfang & Sekretariat, Musik, Räume & Gastgeber, Religiöse Bildung, Spiritualität, Lebensräume, Migration & Integration, Offene Jugendarbeit, Sozialberatung und Verbandliche Jugendarbeit
Die Mitarbeitenden wirken nicht nur an ihren Standorten, sondern sind auch zu thematischen Fachbereichen zusammengeschlossen. So arbeiten sie effizient und nutzen Synergien.
• eine Geschäftsstelle

Name: Buddhist Civilization and Sinhala Literature
Description: Buddhist Civilization and Sinhala Literature, Sinhala Humor Buddhist Philosophy, Writing Criticism, Song Criticism, Nisades Writing, Buddha Characters, Chaturya Satya Arya Ashtangi Marga Karma, Reincarnation, Paticchasamuppada Dharma, Buddha Dharma, Tripitaka Vinaya Pitaka Sutra Pitaka Abhidharma Pitaka, Digha Nikaya, Majkjama Nikaya, Samyutta Nikaya, Anguttara Nikaya, Alphabet, Articulations, Samasa, Grammar, Nouns, Essay Writing, Spelling, Taddhita, Participles, Verbs, Behet Varga Fruits, Folk Life, Bhikshu Jataka Book, Politics.

Name: Christian Stewardship Network
Description:
We are a network of stewardship pastors and leaders who serve in a local Christian congregation. Our mission is simple yet profound: We train and equip church leaders to teach God's financial principles so people can experience financial health and the joy of giving.

CSN gives us a place to network with other leaders who have the same unique calling in ministry. We are more effective in ministry  when we have the opportunity to develop relationships with others  serving on the front lines of stewardship ministry. We can encourage, challenge, equip and share experiences with each other.

If you are a stewardship pastor or a lay stewardship leader who is  responsible for leading the financial stewardship ministries in your  church, we want you in our network.

Name: Great Commission Collective
Description: Planting Churches. Strengthening Leaders.

Name: BDG: Buddhistdoor Global
Description:
Founded in 1995 and based in the Asian gateway city of Hong Kong, Buddhistdoor Global is an online Buddhist journal and multimedia platform providing a diverse range of English-language Buddhist content to the world, centered on the Dharma and dedicated to serving Buddhist communities and helping practitioners navigate their spiritual path. Our diverse and inclusive editorial content encompasses:

- Buddhist studies and philosophy
- Chinese Buddhist thought, culture, and history
- Meditation, mindfulness, science, and psychology
- Buddhist history, heritage, art, and culture
- Engaged Buddhism
- Sustainable living in harmony with the natural environment
- Current events and commentary in contemporary Buddhism

Buddhistdoor Global is expressly non-sectarian and strives to promote an egalitarian, progressive vision of the Buddhadharma that embraces all Buddhist traditions. In line with our aspiration to offer a free and open medium for sharing the riches of this ancient spiritual tradition—through which individuals and communities can learn, connect, and interact—our content is, and always will be, freely available to all.

Name: Reformierte Kirche Kanton Zürich
Description: Als Kirche besitzen wir einen reichen Schatz an Erfahrungen, Möglichkeiten und Freiwilligen und wollen all dies für das Wohl der Menschen einsetzen. Gleichzeitig sind wir bestrebt, uns als Kirche auch immer wieder neu erfinden. Deshalb fördern wir vielfältige kirchliche Projekte und Angebote für unterschiedlichste Menschen und Lebenswelten.

Name: Birmingham Cathedral (St Philip's)
Description: We are a place of worship and reflection, surrounded by the largest green space in central Birmingham.

Name: Saint Mary Coptic Orthodox Church
Description:
Coptic Orthodox House of Worship dedicated to educating the local and global Coptic Community on the teachings of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.  The Coptic Orthodox Churches around the world are  shepharded by our Pope, His Holiness the Pope and Patriarch Shenouda III of the see of St Mark the Evangelist.  The Pope at the Papal residence in reigns in Cairo, Egypt.

St. Mary Coptic Orthodox Church is particularly committed to serving the youth of the Church as our Pope has always maintained that "the youth of the Church are the future of our Church."  We serve the youth in many ways such as providing a fully equipped computer and data center, voluminous library, youth activities center, weekend retreats, youth conventions, spiritual days, and missionary trips to Africa and Fiji.

Name: SoapBox Super App
Description: A family friendly social media and communications app

Name: BC Yukon Pentecostal Assemblies of Canada
Description:
*  To make disciples everywhere by the proclamation and the practice of the Gospel of Christ in the power of the Holy Spirit.
    * To establish local congregations.
    * To train spiritual leaders.
and To strengthen and extend the ministry of the local church.

Name: ReFrame Ministries
Description:
ReFrame Ministries is the new name of Back to God Ministries International. 
Our vision is that the lives and worldviews of all people around the globe will be transformed by God's gospel message. 

Relying on the guidance of the Holy Spirit, we create contextual media resources that proclaim the gospel, disciple believers, and strengthen 
the church throughout the world.

Name: First Presbyterian Church Fort Worth
Description: The mission of First Presbyterian Church Fort Worth is to INSPIRE DISCIPLES and ENGAGE THE WORLD. Experience First Pres for yourself - through worship, service, study, outreach, friendships, and more - what a vibrant and meaningful community it is.

Name: Epiphany Lutheran Church, Rock Hill, SC
Description:
A congregation of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in America. We are an inclusive congregation that offers welcoming grace to all people, in all circumstances of life, as we share the love of Christ with all of God's people.

Our mission is:
Welcome All
Accept All
Love All

Name: International Accreditation Board for Marketplace Ministry
Description:
The International Accreditation Board for the Marketplace Ministry (IABMM) is an independent quality management accreditation and certification body, established to promote quality assurance in Higher education for marketplace ministry. The Council is also an international network of quality assurance and program accreditation professionals responsible for providing information, expert advice on qualifications, quality certification for the marketplace ministry.
Mission
To promote lifelong learning in marketplace ministry and provide quality assurance oversight to Christian institutions worldwide.

Vision
A world where Christian education integrates the application of Christianity to all spheres of life.

The Collaborative
Description: The Collaborative creates discipleship resources & experiences for Christ-centered professionals in the public square.

Name: Svenska kyrkan Västerås
Description: Svenska kyrkan är Sveriges största kristna trossamfund. I vår organisation ryms en mångfald av möten och verksamheter, både i Sverige och utomlands.

Name: KNOWING GOD WITH FEYISAYO
Description:
Knowing God with Feyisayo is an Online arm of H.C.C.M that caters for helping Christian to knowing God through our Lord Jesus Christ personally and thereby commence a life of closer walk with God by faith in our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.
David Oluwafeyisayo Olaotan Ajayi is a Nigerian Teacher of the word of God, as a renowned teacher of the Word, he was tutored by Prophetess Lydia Adedapo(Popularly known as Iya Adura in Akinfenwa ,Prophet and Evangelist Joel & Florence O. Akande of THE FIRST CHRIST GOSPEL CHURCH in Ibadan, Oyo State, Nigeria. He holds an inter-denominational membership fellowship certificate with Mountain Of Fire and Miracles Ministry from South West 26, Gbagi, Ibadan which attracts Christians leadership in nothing less than three(3) Regions in the Ministry as a teacher of search the Scriptures in MFM SW26(Gbagi ,Ibadan) ,LAGOS REGION 46(Olambe ,Ogun State) & 79(Orile-Agege, Lagos) where he serves as a teacher of the word to Adults, Youths and Teenagers.
He doesn't run a church.
He is a Husband to his wife Mary Ajayi and also a Father .

Name: Dominican Sisters of Peace
Description: Dominican Sisters of Peace is a US-based congregation of Catholic Dominicans that includes about 330 Sisters and 400 Associates living and serving in 22 states and Nigeria. As part of the worldwide Order of Preachers (Order of St. Dominic), the Dominican Sisters and Associates of Peace strive to preach the Gospel of Christ Jesus through word and action, serving God's people in many ministerial areas, including education, health care, spirituality, pastoral care, prison ministry, and care of creation, among others.

Name: Ministry of Healing and Deliverance
Description:
Pastor Maria Celeste Germano Dias is the founder of the Ministry of Healing and Deliverance, a global and online ministry, with her headquarters in Andover, United Kingdom. As a pastor, healing minister, and online evangelist, Pastor Maria Dias is a passionate minister of the Gospel who is committed to reach and impact millions of God’s children suffering in sickness and under the bondage of the devil. She brings God’s divine healing and deliverance to millions through her weekly Live Healing and Deliverance Services on Facebook and YouTube.

Millions have been affected by her weekly Live Healing broadcasts on Facebook and YouTube, which brings God’s healing to everyone under the bondage of the devil and people who desire a touch from God. During such healing services, she manifests the healing works of Jesus Christ and helped many receive healing through the operation of the gifts of the Spirit. She has also helped millions experience a victorious and purposeful life in God’s Word.

Our aim is to pray for people, preach the gospel and set people free from captivity, visit hospitals, and prisons.

Name: Radiant Church
Description:
Radiant Church exists to move people towards Christ, community, and calling. With locations across Tampa Bay, led by Pastor Aaron Burke, we’re a thriving, life-giving church passionate about helping people know God, find freedom, discover purpose, and make a difference.

Through vibrant worship, relevant teaching, and a strong focus on community, we create environments where people can encounter the presence of God and grow in their faith. Our commitment extends beyond the Sunday experience—we’re dedicated to serving our local communities, supporting global missions, and raising up the next generation of leaders.

Whether you're new to faith or looking for a place to grow deeper in your walk with God, Radiant Church is a home for you.

 Visit us online at weareradiant.com
 Locations across Tampa Bay | Join us this Sunday!
 Watch live every Sunday at live.weareradiant.com

Name: Helsingør Stift
Description:
Helsingør Stift er ét stift ud af folkekirkens ti stifter.

Geografisk spænder det fra Hornsherred til Hellerup og Hornbæk til Hedehusene.

Stiftets leder er biskop Peter Birch, som også er her på Linked-In.

Name: Pantano Christian Church
Description:
Pantano Christian Church is a non-denominational church that embraces a wide diversity of people. With our upbeat music and modern auditorium, you’ll hear a practical message that’s easy to understand, even if you’ve never been to church. We are passionate about teaching the ageless truths of the Bible in ways that make sense. 

Our vision is to be a catalytic force to bless Southern Arizona and the world and all of our ministries are dedicated in accomplishing this vision. It is the passion and calling of our staff to carry out our vision and core values each and every day.

Name: Flussschifferkirche Hamburg
Description:
Deutschlands einziges Gotteshaus auf Schiffsplanken liegt im Hamburger Hafen vertäut.

Ort für geistliche Angebote und Binnenschifferinnenseelsorge, aber auch Tagungsort/Eventlocation mit dem Flair einer echten Hamburgensie. 

Unser Kalender: https://www.flussschifferkirche.de/de/kalender

Die Flussschifferkirche ist Deutschlands einzige schwimmende Kirche. Sie liegt im Hamburger Hafen zwischen Altstadt, Neustadt und Speicherstadt im Binnenhafen. Die Stationen Rödingsmarkt oder Baumwall der U3 liegen ganz in der Nähe. 

Zweimal monatlich finden Sonntags-Gottesdienste statt, jeweils um 15:00 Uhr. Besonders auf der „Flusi“ ist dabei auch, dass an jedem 4. Sonntag im Monat findet der Gottesdienst in Plattdeutscher Sprache stattfindet. Wöchentlich werden Besatzungen von Binnenschiffen im Hafen besucht, um Gesprächsangebote zu machen und sie in Hamburg willkommen zu heißen. Auf Anfrage gibt es die Möglichkeit der Führungen für Gruppen. 

Veranstaltungsraum Kirche & Sitzungsraum auf dem Ponton 

Die Flussschifferkirche bietet im Kirchenschiff Platz für knapp 100 Personen und ist beliebt für Hochzeiten und Taufen. Die Kirche steht zur Besichtigung offen und sie wird neben Gottesdiensten auch gern für kulturelle Events genutzt. Zwecks Veranstaltungsplanung lässt sich auf unserer Website ein virtueller Rundgang betrachten, in dem ein Ausmessen der Räumlichkeiten vorab möglich ist. 

Direkt daneben befindet sich zudem ein Ponton mit einem Sitzungsraum von 65 qm. Er ist hell und durch seine drei Fensterfronten ist man mitten im Hafengeschehen. Und ist doch unter sich. Der Raum kann verdunkelt werden und für Präsentationen gibt es einen modernen Multimedia-Bildschirm sowie Internetzugang. Bei Bedarf kann auch die angeschlossene Teeküche mitgenutzt werden.

Ein echter Geheimtipp für Arbeitsgruppen oder Sitzungen an besonderem Ort. Machen Sie sich einen persönlichen Eindruck oder sprechen Sie uns an!

Name: St. Andrew's Episcopal Church, Wellesley, MA
Description: Our vision is to grow our parish in breadth and depth by strengthening our worship, community, and ministries. Our hope is to deepen the faith of existing members, and attract new people to our parish so that they can experience Christ’s love. We wish to help people recognize their God-given talents and use them to serve God and their neighbor.

Name: He's The Solution Ministries
Description: He's The Solution Ministries is a non-profit 501(c)(3), is all about keeping God first. Lee and Jaclyn Arnold, the founders, began this ministry as the foundation for all of their other companies. He’s The Solution Ministries desires to be about the work of the Lord and equip Christians to have Bold Faith in all aspects of their lives from home to business!

Description: GLENMARY HOME MISSIONERS is a religious institutions company based out of 5905 E Galbraith Rd, Cincinnati, OH, United States.

Cult Holdings Co. Is a corporate creative ecosystem. We turn visions into brands, and brands into beliefs. Our subsidiaries include:
BETTER HALF • CULT VENTURES • PROPAGANDA FIRM

Name: Women & Work
Description:
Women & Work exists to see women confidently step into their God-given calling and view their work as meaningful to the kingdom of God.

Women & Work is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

Name: Custody of the Holy Land
Description: We are a fraternity of the Order of Friars Minor living in the Holy Land, who preserve, study and render the places where the Christian faith originated welcoming and proclaim the marvels of the love of the Highest Almighty and Good Lord who for our sake took on our humanity for the salvation of all people. We belong to a religious Order in the Catholic Church, the Order of Friars Minor, the Franciscans. Drawn by the love of the poor and crucified Christ, our founder, Saint Francis of Assisi, went to the Middle East at the beginning of the 13th century, in order to “touch” the places which, up to our day, offer an irreplaceable testimony to God’s revelation and to God’s love for the human person. During his pilgrimage, and despite the Crusades, Saint Francis encountered and dialogued with the sultan Melek al-Kamel, who was governing the Holy Land at the time. It was a peaceful encounter, which marked the beginning of the Franciscans’ presence in the Holy Land and also influenced the way in which we have been present in the course of the centuries until today. Over the course of time, this province of the Franciscan Order took the name “Custody of the Holy Land”. Saint Francis and the Franciscans always had at heart the love of the Incarnation of Jesus, and that is why they have loved the Holy Land since the beginning. For there is no Incarnation without a place. For us, loving this land means to love Jesus. And we cannot think of Jesus without loving His land. Because of the Franciscans’ special attachment to the Gospel of Jesus and to His Incarnation, our Catholic Church entrusted to us the mission of preserving the places of our salvation.

Name: The Christian Institute
Description:
The Christian Institute is a nondenominational Christian charity committed to upholding historic biblical Christianity in public life. It is supported by over 44,000 individuals and churches throughout the UK.

We defend religious liberty, the sanctity of life and the sanctity of marriage.
Location: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Name: Glad Tidings Church
Description: Glad Tidings provides the whole family and those seeking to become a part of a family, from all nationalities and socio-economic statuses, the opportunity to know God and draw closer to Him through instruction, preaching of the truth, prayer times, and worship.

Name: Pontifical Academy for Life
Description: The many extraordinary resources made available to human beings by scientific and technological research could overshadow the joy of fraternal sharing and the beauty of common undertakings, unless they find their meaning in advancing that joy and beauty. We should keep in mind that fraternity remains the unkept promise of modernity. The universal spirit of fraternity that grows by mutual trust – within modern civil society and between peoples and nations – appears much weakened. The strengthening of fraternity, generated in the human family by the worship of God in spirit and truth, is the new frontier of Christianity.

Name: TEEN CHALLENGE PUERTO RICO INC.
Description:
Teen Challenge PR have more than 50 years Putting Hope Within Reach and is affiliated with Adult & Teen Challenge USA and Global Teen Challenge serving alongside with more than 1,400 residential programs in more than 129 countries around the world. 

For more information visit our website www.teenchallengepr.org and Facebook page.

Bayamon, PR 00958

Name: Caritas Bergamasca
Description: Lavoriamo per porre fine alla povertà. Per promuovere la giustizia. Per educare alla pace, al dialogo, alla mondialità. Per sostenere lo sviluppo integrale dell'uomo  senza distinzione di etnia, religione e credo politico.

Name: Steiger International
Description:
Steiger is a rapidly-growing, worldwide mission organization that is called to reach and disciple the Global Youth Culture for Jesus.
 
The current urban generation, connected by consumerism, social media, and the entertainment industry forms the largest global culture ever to exist. It spans the globe, sharing the same values, listening to the same music, watching the same movies, and sharing the same posts.
 
This global culture is largely influenced by one predominant worldview: Secular Humanism - God is irrelevant, and man is at the center. In this relativistic culture, we are god and consumerism is our religion. This is a generation that does not look to the church for answers but believes it to be a dead and empty tradition of the past.
 
Steiger’s primary purpose is to bridge the gap between the Church and the Global Youth Culture
 
We do this by raising up missionaries and equipping the local church to proclaim the message of Jesus in the language of the Global Youth Culture. Steiger establishes long-term City Teams in strategic locations around the world, engaging in creative evangelism, relevant discipleship, and local church partnership.

Name: St. John Paul the Great Catholic High School
The Crucible Project
Description: The Crucible Project is a 501c3 nonprofit organization whose mission is Igniting Christ-like change in men and women through experiences of radical honesty and grace.

Name: Camp Timber-lee
Description: Camp Timber-lee creates life changing camp experience for people of all ages throughout the year.  Timber-lee's outdoor education programs, camps, retreats, adventure trips and family friendly fun create memories and learning!

Name: Qari-Ul-Quran "Online Quran Teachings"
Description:
Qari-Ul-Quran is the best online Quran Learning Platform for people living at distances facing problems to get a reliable source for their Islamic Education. We provide services for Basic Quran learning with Tajweed, Memorization of Quran, Hadith Course and Memorization of Salah and Islamic Dua’s according to Quran and Sunnah of Hazrat Muhammad (PBUH). We have experienced, committed, motivated and professional online tutors available for students of all ages.

"The Prophet (PBUH) Said, The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn The Quran and teach it."

Qari-Ul-Quran was formed in vision to enlighten the knowledge of Quran and Deen-e-Islam to those people living at distances and having no reliable source. Qari-Ul-Quran is a plate-form where they can ask any query regarding religion Islam.

Name: Franciscan Friars of the Province of Our Lady of Guadalupe
Description: The Province of Our Lady of Guadalupe is part of a global movement that has been caring for the poor and marginalized for more than 800 years. Many of our longtime employees are proud to work with the friars because they know their work makes a difference in the lives of everyday people. As Franciscans, we are committed to justice and equity, and we care for our employees by providing benefits that promote their health, financial security and overall wellbeing. We are an equal opportunity employer.

Name: Southern New England Conference, United Church of Christ
Description:
The Southern New England Conference of the United Church of Christ came into being on Jan. 1, 2020 with the coming together of the historic Connecticut, Massachusetts and Rhode Island Conferences.

The Conference is one of 36 regional bodies of the United Church of Christ, a distinct and diverse community of Christians that come together as one church to join faith and action.  The Conference comprises 615 churches,  more than 1600 authorized ministers and nearly 120,000 members.

Name: Church of God Cleveland Tenn
Description: Pentecostal church.

Name: Trinity United Church of Christ - Chicago
Description: Trinity United Church of Christ is a non-profit organization that provides prayer, mediation, education, and religious services.

Name: EFS – en missionsrörelse i Svenska kyrkan
Description:
EFS är en självständig organisation inom Svenska kyrkan, med betoning på mission, lekmannaengagemang och vardagskristendom.

Rörelsen består av ca 15 000 människor som är medlemmar i någon av de 300 föreningar som finns spridda över landet. Det gemensamma målet är att hjälpa människor att leva nära Jesus Kristus i vardagen.

Name: Vintage Church LA
Description: From the start, the mission of Vintage has been to join God in the renewal of all things in Los Angeles. Practicing radical hospitality and creating a safe space for people to explore and grow in faith. We aim high in all we do, without taking ourselves too seriously. We’re dedicated to both the Word of God and the ministry of the Holy Spirit. Following the way of Jesus together, to see Heaven in the streets of LA.

Name: Jabatan Agama Islam Wilayah Persekutuan
Description: Peneraju Pengurusan Hal Ehwal Islam Ke Arah Kesejahteraan Ummah Berteraskan Maqasid Syariah dan Memperkasakan Pengurusan Hal Ehwal Islam Melalui Penyampaian Perkhidmatan Yang Komprehensif Ke Arah Kesejahteraan Ummah

Name: Members Church Of God International
Description: MCGI Cares. MCGI Shines.

Name: American  Baptist Churches of Central Region
Description:
Vision & Mission
American Baptist Churches of the Central Region

The ABCCR is a voluntary association of autonomous Baptist churches glorifying God through living the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Our Vision:
Growing Healthy Churches to Fulfill Christ’s Mission.

Our Mission:
To Provide Resources and Services to Assist, Challenge,
Empower and Represent Local Congregations in Ministry.

Name: Ministerio Verbo da Vida
Description: O Ministério Verbo da Vida coordena diversas instituições evangélicas e está ligado ao “Kenneth Hagin Ministries”, em Tulsa, OK, Estados Unidos. Foi fundado pelo casal Ap. Bud e Jan Wright e é atualmente presidido pelo Ap. Guto Emery.

Name: Young Professionals At Work On Purpose
Description:
We help young professionals radically transform their lives through roundtable groups called 'Collaboratories.'

Everything we do at YP is built around the idea of helping young professionals
- The VISION is to help 1 million young people transform their lives.
- The MISSION is to develop young people in their faith, leadership, and network.
- The STRATEGY is creating environments conducive to transformation.

 WEBSITE - ypawop.org
 SCHEDULE a time to connect with us via DM!

Name: aeu - Arbeitskreis Evangelischer Unternehmer in Deutschland
Description:
Wirtschaftliches Handeln und Unternehmertum sind wesentliche Elemente unserer Gesellschaft. Dieses Handeln ist nur auf der Basis ethischer Werte nachhaltig erfolgreich. Die fortschreitende Globalisierung unserer Welt ist zugleich Herausforderung und Chance, diese Werte zu leben - damit unternehmerisches Handeln verantwortliches Handeln ist.

Die zunehmende Komplexität unserer globalen Wirtschaftsordnung verlangt nach einer wirkungsvollen und nachvollziehbaren Werteordnung. Diese findet sich im christlichen Glauben.

Der Arbeitskreis Evangelischer Unternehmer ist die Brücke zwischen Wirtschaft und Evangelischer Kirche. Wir vermitteln Grundsätze, erklären Hintergründe und beleben Diskurse zu aktuellen Themen.

Name: RCC Agape Assembly
Description: Welcome to Agape Assembly, a vibrant and loving community of believers dedicated to growing in faith, sharing God's love, and serving others. At Agape Assembly, we strive to create an environment where people from all walks of life can experience the transforming power of Jesus Christ. We invite you to join us on this incredible journey of faith.

Name: Grace Family Church
Description: GFC is a community of families living out our faith in covenant as a Family Integrated Church. In the Reformed tradition, we hold the London Baptist Confession of 1689 as the best summary of our doctrine and practice.                                                              .

Name: St. Alphonsus School / Parish
Description: Catholic school and parish

Name: Women Living Well Ministries
Description:
Women Living Well Ministries was founded with the purpose of encouraging, developing, and supporting women as growing disciples of Jesus Christ. Our hope is to see the church supporting Women’s Ministries, and the gifts women bring to the body of Christ. Our joyful desire is seeing women (and men) growing in faith as disciples of Jesus Christ.

Women Living Well Ministries partners to serving alongside church ministerial staff and congregations either as a consultant, a teacher, and/or as a resource by either being a consultant, a teacher and/or a resource, along with hosting retreats or conferences that focus on studying the Word of God and how to have a deeper fellowship with the living God.

Visit our website, www.womenlivingwellministries.org to know more about WLW Ministries.  Like us on Facebook, https://www.facebook.com/womenlivingwellministries.

Name: North American Province of the Priestly Fraternity of Saint Peter
Description: Using the ancient liturgy as our well-spring, we form our priests in the traditions of the Church to serve at the altar and in the parish so that the fullness of Christ might enter the emptiness of the world.

Name: Bisdom Roermond
Description: Rooms-katholiek bisdom in de Nederlandse provincie Limburg. Het bisdom wordt sinds 24 augustus 2024 geleid door bisschop Ron van den Hout. In het bisdom Roermond wonen ruim 600.000 katholieken, verdeeld over zo’n 50 parochiefederatie. Het bisdom behoort tot de rooms-katholieke wereldkerk, bestuurd door paus Leo XIV.

Name: Partners International Canada
Description:
Partners International seeks to identify and establish partnership with strategic, emerging indigenous-led Christian ministries to effectively proclaim the Good News of Jesus Christ to those who have never heard and serve communities in ways that speak of the transforming power of God in the hearts and lives of people who know Him.

Christian partnership is powerful in the most difficult, least resourced, least reached parts of the world. Therefore, we focus our attention in these places.

Our goal in partnership is to work with people of extraordinary vision, raised up by God, to change the spiritual and social landscape in their contexts. We work together to achieve a shared vision of transformed communities.
	 
Effective partnership is built on transparency, accountability, shared goals, and mutual respect. Partners International will express these values towards every contributor, both Canadian and overseas partner.

Partners International seeks to contribute to, and enhance the missional goals of Canadian donors.

Partners International commits to the effective and timely reporting on the use of funds to all contributors.

Partners International seeks to channel the maximum amount of a donation	 to the ministry context while functioning from a robust organizational platform.

Name: Seicho-No-Ie International Headquarters
Description:
Seicho-No-Ie is working toward the realization of world peace based on the teaching that "God, nature, and human beings are essentially one."

Seicho-No-Ie's message is simple, direct, and can change lives. The main theme is that each of us can reach spiritual fulfillment when we come to realize the God consciousness within us. Our lives are meant to be harmonious, joyful, and fulfilling in all aspects. Through the power of the mind, we can greatly improve our environment and physical condition by replacing our negativism with positive thoughts and beliefs.

We can become awakened to the true divinity which lies within us through a method of prayerful meditation called Shinsokan, which is taught at the various Truth of Life Centers.  As Christ said, "The kingdom of God is within," and the practice of Shinsokan is a method to make this statement a living reality.

Name: Benediktushof Seminar- und Tagungszentrum GmbH
Description: Der Benediktushof in Holzkirchen ist ein Seminarzentrum für Achtsamkeit und Meditation. Durch das Lebenswerk von dem Benediktiner und Zen-Meister Willigis Jäger geprägt, finden hier Menschen, die sich nach Achtsamkeit, Zen-Meditation oder Kontemplation sehnen, verschiedene Angebote, Seminare und Kurse.

Name: Communauté Saint Martin
Description: Dépendant directement du Saint-Siège, la Communauté Saint-Martin est une association de prêtres et de diacres vivant leur apostolat en communauté, au service des diocèses. Elle forme plus de 100 séminaristes dans son séminaire sur un modèle simple : intense vie communautaire, richesse de la liturgie, exigence des études, souci de mobilité et humour. Envoyés au moins par trois, les prêtres et diacres prient, vivent et travaillent ensemble dans une fraternité spirituelle et pastorale. Elle compte aujourd’hui 94 prêtres et diacres, envoyés dans 19 diocèses en France et à l’étranger (Italie et Cuba).

Name: Chief Rabbinate of Cyprus / Aρχιραββινεία Κύπρου
Description:
Το Αρχιραβινάτο της Κύπρου είναι η ανώτατη εβραϊκή θρησκευτική αρχή στην Κυπριακή Δημοκρατία. Ως μέρος των λειτουργιών του, το Αρχιραβινάτο της Κύπρου ορίζει κανόνες και διαδικασίες σχετικά με το Kashrut (εβραϊκοί διατροφικοί νόμοι), την περιτομή, τους γάμους, τη μεταστροφή και το διορισμό ραβίνων

The Chief Rabbinate of Cyprus is the supreme Jewish religious authority in the Republic of Cyprus. As part of its functions, the Chief Rabbinate of Cyprus sets rules and procedures regarding Kashrut (Jewish dietary laws), circumcision, marriages, conversion and the appointment of Rabbis

Name: Prairie Lakes Church
Description: We believe God loves every one of us. That’s why we’re a No Matter church—no matter who you are, where you’ve been, what you’ve done or what’s been done to you, God loves you, and you can always look for God at Prairie Lakes Church. This is a journey you can take even if you don’t have everything figured out.

Name: Imam Ali Holy Shrine
Description: العتبة العلوية المقدسة / الحرم المطهر: هو مكان الدفن الشريف للامام علي ابن ابي طالب سلام الله عليه، ابن عم الرسول صل الله عليه واله وسلم

Name: sTTu WebMinistry
Description:
Salvation To The Unsaved is a registered WebMinistry with the sole aim of reaching out to the unreached in diverse ways; explaining and revealing the Gospel of Christ Jesus to all, thereby leading to the salvation of the unsaved and establishing them in the faith. To be SAFE, is to be SAVED. Wouldn't you rather be SAVED?

Reaching out . . .  Revealing Christ Jesus . . .  Reconciling all to God.

Name: Viborg Stift
Description:
Viborg Stift er ét af ti stifter i den danske folkekirke og ledes af biskop Henrik Stubkjær. Stiftsadministrationen har adresse i Bispegården i Domkirkestræde 1 i Viborg.

Stiftet består af 11 provstier, 271 sogne og 288 kirker, hvor der ansat omkring 200 præster og en lang række andre medarbejdere og frivillige i forskellige funktioner.

På LinkedIn fortæller vi om Viborg Stift og kirkerne som professionelle arbejdspladser med en bred vifte af indsatser.

Vi opslår job i stiftets administration og udvalgte job i kirkerne. Alle job i den danske folkekirke annonceres desuden lokalt og kan ses på https://viborgstift.dk/aktuelt/ledige-praestestillinger-i-viborg-stift 

Følg os også på 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/viborgstift
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/viborg_stift

Profilen drives af 
Kommunikationskoordinator Henrik Helms i Viborg Stift
Bispesekreær Mette Nielsen i Viborg Stift

Name: Endow
Description: Endow (Educating on the Nature and Dignity of Women) is a Catholic educational program that brings women together to discover their God-given dignity and to understand their role in humanizing and transforming society.  Endow utilizes small group studies, online webinars and studies, and retreats to cultivate faith, fellowship, and formation.

Name: Ganesh
Description: Although he is known by many attributes, Ganesha's elephant head makes him easy to identify. Ganesha is widely revered as the remover of obstacles, the patron of arts and sciences and the diva of intellect and wisdom. As the god of beginnings, he is honored at the start of rites and ceremonies. Ganesha is also invoked as patron of letters and learning during writing sessions. Several texts relate mythological anecdotes associated with his birth and exploits.

Name: Urban Saints
Description:
Urban Saints equips youth leaders with everything they need to disciple young people with confidence, relevance, and hope. 

Through Westbrook Academy training, practical resources, and a supportive community, we come alongside those walking with the next generation – especially young people who may have no connection to church.
 
Our mission is simple: to help young people know and follow Jesus by empowering the leaders who journey with them.

Name: USC Caruso Catholic Center
Description:
The USC Caruso Catholic Center is the Catholic Church serving the students, alumni, faculty, and staff of the University of Southern California.

Since its humble beginnings in 1923, when just sixty USC students gathered together to form the Newman Club, the Catholic Church has been a vital part of the Trojan Family. When Our Savior Parish and USC Caruso Catholic Center opened its doors in 2012, the vision and purpose was to be a welcoming, loving Catholic Community that helped all students find a home amidst the chaos of college life while growing closer to Christ. The church is considered the gem of the Archdiocese and the Student Center, the gold standard of Campus Ministry in the United States.

Name: St. Rose of Lima
Description: St. Rose of Lima, Roman Catholic Church in Newtown CT:  The first Catholic Mass in Fairfield County was celebrated in Newtown in 1781 and since her founding in 1859, Saint Rose Church has been the spiritual center for the spread of the Gospel of Jesus Christ for our area communities. Saint Rose Church is the "Mother Church" of several surrounding parishes having once served eleven towns in upper Fairfield County earlier in her history. Saint Rose Church has been designated a National Catholic Historical Site by the Order of Alhambra. In keeping with our tradition, we have assembled a diverse set of parish information and Catholic Christian internet links to spread the Good News by the means available to us in the modern day. We honor our rich heritage and strive to live the Word together, today, through our common faith in Jesus Christ and our love of the Church.

Name: BridgeBuilders
Description: BridgeBuilders restores relationships under the banner of Christ by engaging, equipping, and empowering individuals, families, and communities in South Dallas.

Name: Sint-Janskathedraal
Description: Sint-Janskathedraal is a religious institutions company based out of TORENSTRAAT 16, 'S-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands.

Name: St. John Paul the Great Catholic High School
Description: St. John Paul the Great Catholic High School exists to form disciples of Jesus Christ. Rooted in truth and joy, we will graduate men and women prepared to witness to the truth and equipped to lead virtuous lives at the service of the Church, our country, and the common good.

Name: Kamp Love
Description: Kamp Love exists to reach college students with the message and mission of the Gospel. Through weekend retreats, community events, and discipleship groups, we seek to create a space for young adults to encounter the presence of the Creator, and to equip them to live missionally for the Kingdom. Currently operating out of Phoenix, AZ, we are partnered with 11 local churches and 3 local ministries to ensure students are brought under church shepherding and intentional discipleship.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Tulsa & Eastern Oklahoma
Description:
The Diocese of Tulsa is comprised of the following 31 counties in the eastern part of Oklahoma:

Adair, Atoka, Bryan, Cherokee, Choctaw, Coal, Craig, Creek, Delaware, Haskell, Hughes, Latimere, LeFlore, McCurtain, McIntosh, Mayes, Muskogee, Nowata, Okfuskee, Okmulgee, Osage, Ottawa, Pawnee, Payne, Pittsburg, Pushmataha, Rogers, Sequoyah, Tulsa, Wagoner and Washington.

There are 78 parishes and/or missions in the 26,417 square miles of the diocese.

A Diocese is a portion of the People of God, which is entrusted to a bishop to be nurtured by him with the cooperation of his priests (canon 369). The Diocesan Bishop enjoys legislative, executive, and juridical authority (canon 391). He is the chief pastor and leader of the diocese. He is the principal dispenser of the mysteries of God, and he strives constantly that Christ's faithful entrusted to his care may grow in grace through the celebration of the sacraments, and may know and live the paschal mystery (canon 387).

The Diocesan Bishop, mindful that the salvation of souls is the supreme law of the Church (canon 1752), fosters and coordinates the work of the laity and urges the faithful to assume their proper roles in the life of the Church. The Diocesan Bishop exercises his responsibilities with the assistance of the members of his cabinet, through the offices in the diocesan curia (chancery), and through parishes and institutions in the Local Church.

Name: The Fountain of Praise
Description:
The Fountain of Praise is a ministry located in Houston, TX with 21,000 members.
Remus E. Wright, Sr. Pastor

Mission
The Fountain of Praise members are committed to spreading the powerful life-changing gospel of Jesus Christ to the world through positive ministries and principle-based programs.

Vision
The Fountain of Praise is a Bible-based ministry focused on the restoration of the lost and broken.  We serve in the spirit of high praise with fervor and God's anointing to minister with compassion and excellence to build and develop a kingdom of empowered people for God that are committed to:

Rejoicing in energetic praise and services, giving God the glory, and ultimately promoting permanent change in the lives of our men, women, and children.

Revitalizing and establishing ministries that teach and encourage believers to return to spiritual integrity, and restore emotional and physical health to all of God's people.

Reinforcing individual and family living with biblical principles, while - providing support and the transformational tools needed to live with power and a sense of purpose.

Rebuilding our local and global community, economically and educationally, through faith-based projects that combine spiritual teachings with social reforms.

Name: Our Lady of Fatima Parish
Description:
Situated just north of the city of Durban, Our Lady of Fatima Parish is part of the Durban Central & North Deanery of the Archdiocese of Durban. The parish was established in 1959 by the Oblates of Mary Immaculate who served here until 1980. Since then it has been served by priests of the Archdiocese.

The church was built in 1963 and plans are in place for Office extensions as well as the construction of a Pastoral Centre to serve the ever increasing activities of the parish.

The present parish population is made up of approximately 900 families, drawn from in and around the Durban North area. The parish priest is Father Desmond Nair, a priest of the Archdiocese who has served the parish since January 1990. He is assisted by Deacon Peter Venter.

Name: RHEMA Ministries
Description: Preparing members of the body of Christ for Heaven through Christ centered and Holy Spirit led teachings, messages and bible studies

Name: Walnut Hill Community Church
Description: Walnut Hill Community Church is a nondenominational church with four campus locations in Connecticut including Bethel, Derby, New Milford and Waterbury. We are passionate about prayer, worship, serving and growing strong in our relationship with Jesus together.

Name: Gospel at Work
Description:
Gospel at Work is a network of lunchtime Bible talks, designed to give workers in central London the opportunity to explore the claims of Jesus. Whether you'd describe yourself as a sceptic, enquirer or a committed Christian, we'd love to welcome you at one of our venues. 

We host talks all around the city - visit gospelatwork.org.uk/map to find your nearest!

Name: The Nebraska District of The Lutheran Church—Missouri Synod
Description: We serve God’s family, encouraging them to be fully engaged in living and sharing the Good News of Jesus.

Name: The Church
Description: The Church is an information project designed to promote reconciliation and mutual understanding between Christians of different faiths and jurisdictions.

Name: Holy Trinity Catholic Church
Description:
Holy Trinity Catholic Church serves the Catholic community in Fairview Heights, Illinois.  Our parish is a proud member of the Belleville Diocese and the East St. Louis Deanery.

Our parish complex covers 84,439 square feet and contains the church sanctuary, multiple meeting and gathering spaces, and a Kindergarten through 8th Grade Catholic school.  The building is surrounded by sports and agriculture fields.

As of 2010, there are more than 1,100 families registered with Holy Trinity Church and about 200 students in Holy Trinity School.  We invite you to call us for a tour.

Name: Diocese of Guildford, Church of England
Description:
Guildford is one of 41 dioceses which cover the whole of England. We have 158 parishes, 83 church schools and several hundred social and community projects.

Our region contains over a million people, and our churches seek to be at the centre of every community, to reach out to those in special need, and to encourage all their members to grow into their full potential as children of God. 

The Diocese has 217 church buildings which see more than 25,000 people worshipping on an average Sunday, in addition to many thousands more of all ages who use those buildings or neighbouring Church halls on weekdays for church activities and community clubs and meetings.

Each of our parishes is an independent charity, with their own leadership and governance structures, working together under the leadership of the Bishop of Guildford and his team, so as to make the very best use of our resources across the region. Every one of the 1 million or so people who live in our area has a parish church, and access to its support and facilities when they need them most, often at life events such as Baptisms, Weddings and Funerals.

A transforming Church, transforming lives 

Our vision as the Diocese of Guildford is to be a Transforming Church, Transforming Lives, and we are together committed to 12 diocesan goals. Our calling is to join with other Christians in living out and proclaiming the Good News of Jesus Christ across the region we serve and beyond, responding to Jesus’ Great Commandment to: “Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind… and to love your neighbour as yourself”; and his Great Commission to: “Go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you”.

Name: Transform Work
Description:
Transform Work (TW) is a UK based Christian charity that encourages Christians to get together to form Christian Workplace Groups where they work to pray for their organisation and workplace.  We then encourage them to approach their HR department under diversity structures to seek recognition as a staff network group through which they can keep praying and bring real benefits to the organisation.

One of the strengths of a Christian Workplace Group is in being a place where staff can go if they have a problem or experiencing difficulties and want someone they can trust to share a confidence or to pray for them.

Our aim is to see the UK workplace transformed, locally and nationally, by every Christian living out their faith in effective workplace ministry, leading to transformation over time in the nation's culture, values and spiritual environment.

Name: Inspiration Ministries
Description: Inspiration Ministries helps you grow your faith in Christ daily through our Strengthen Your Walk video series', daily devotionals, inspiring interviews, articles, and salvation outreaches. Connect with us at http://inspiration.org and sign up for the free Inspiration Today Daily Newsletter.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Albany, New York
Description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Albany serves 325,000 Catholics in 14 counties over 10,400 square miles in New York's Capital Region and beyond.

Name: SonSet Solutions
Description:
We provide technology-based solutions to advance the Gospel worldwide. Our team of technology experts and staff put their creative minds together every day to help our ministry partners around the world multiply their effectivness. 

In 2015 alone, we helped 183 ministries in 68 countries with technical advice, equipment, training, installation and service. Our 30-year history, rooted in the ministry of radio station HCJB in Quito Ecuador, gives us a unique perspective on how technology and missions can work together to tell others about Jesus.

Name: One Church
Description: We are a community of Christ-followers igniting a movement to reach a disconnected culture in Columbus, Ohio, and around the world. Our services are 60 minutes long with engaging worship (music), relevant teaching from the Bible, and fun, Christ centered kids experiences. Dress casual and expect to be inspired!

Name: NorthPointe Christian Schools
Description:
NorthPointe Christian Schools are Christian schools located on the North East side of Grand Rapids, Michigan. NorthPointe Christian Schools seek to provide a strong foundation for development of the Christian faith in the lives of their students. NorthPointe Christian serves over 1050 students in grades three-year-old preschool through grade twelve. The elementary school curriculum builds and develops fundamental skills. The middle school reinforces and expands these skills and the high school curriculum is college preparatory with regular and AP courses offered.

NorthPointe Christian curriculum provides opportunities for concrete, abstract, and hands-on learning. The Special Academic Services department is available, should children have special learning needs.

Bible class and weekly chapel services form one part of the spiritual emphasis at NorthPointe Christian Schools. The purpose is to develop Christlikeness in the lives of the students.

Name: Times Square Church
Description:
Our mission is to make Jesus known, love people, serve, pray and make disciples! 

You can join us for services online or in person every Sunday at 10 am and 1 pm ET.

Founded by Rev. David Wilkerson, author of the best-selling book "The Cross and the Switchblade."

Name: Kenya Association of Christian Chaplains
Description:
We are an Ecclesiastical Ministry set apart for the Christian Church to serve laity as a Chaplain endorsing and ordaining organization. We teach, equip, and ordain qualified candidates for volunteer and professional chaplaincy. 

We acknowledge Christ as the head of our life and ministry, submitting all our activities to His will and good pleasure. Our highest priority is proclaiming the Gospel of Jesus Christ to produce genuine followers whose lives are changed. 

We coach pastors for more effective ministry to grow their churches. We empower disciples to make disciples and leaders to produce leaders. 

We teach professional Chaplaincy including accredited Clinical Pastoral Education leading to professional Board Certification. Our Chaplains become a caring presence, non-judgmental, not condemning, while engaging in loving relationships that strive to listen to understand rather than to prescribe. We never force our faith unwanted on anyone. We learn to share our faith as invited to do so. We love and care for everyone no matter how they live.

Name: Church Unlimited
Description:
Starting with one location in 1998, and growing to multiple locations today, Church Unlimited is committed to taking as many people to Heaven as we can before we die. Period.

We are passionate about using our talents for God’s purposes and that’s why we’ve dedicated our careers to a ministry, not a job title. If you feel led to utilize your God-given abilities for the purpose of helping us take as many people to Heaven as we can before we die, take a look at the following job opportunities and see if there's a fit for you!

Name: Iran Alive Ministries
Description: With a 24/7 satellite channel, Iran Alive broadcasts the Gospel to the Middle East. Our strength is to use media not just for evangelism, but leadership training, and planting underground churches in Iran.

Name: Sacred Military Constantinian Order of St George
Description:
The Sacred Military Constantinian Order of Saint George is an ancient and internationally recognised dynastic Orders of Knighthood. The Constantinian Order is actively involved in the defence and promotion of the Roman Catholic religion and  undertakes spiritual, humanitarian, hospitaller, inter-religious and charitable initiatives across  the world.

HRH Prince Charles of Bourbon Two Sicilies, Duke of Castro, is the current Grand Master and the Grand Prior  is His Eminence Renato Raffaele, Cardinal Martino.

The Prior of the British and Irish Delegation is His Eminence Cormac, Cardinal Murphy-O’Connor and the Delegate of the British and Irish Delegation is HE Mr Anthony Bailey who direct the day-to-day activities and obligations of its membership.

As part of this international network, the Delegation, which recently celebrated its 210th anniversary, supports and participates in many charitable, humanitarian and inter-faith initiatives across the British Isles.

The Constantinian Order which is headquartered in Rome is fully recognised by the Italian Republic and many other governments and dynasties across the world and maintains Consultative Status of the Economic and Social Council at the United Nations in New York, Geneva and Vienna. Today knights and dames of the three Orders can be found across the globe and especially so throughout Italy, the rest of Europe, North and South America as well as in Asia.

Name: Allegheny Center Alliance Church
Description: Following Jesus in diverse community, God has appointed us to be an ethnic, socio/economic and generationally diverse Christian congregation drawn from the Greater Pittsburgh Region and located in Pittsburgh’s North Side.

Name: IBAAD ALLAH Organization
Description: This is an Organization that works for Islam on the path of Allah and Muhammad ﷺ. Join us to start serving Islam with us.

Name: Cabrini World - Missionary Sisters of the Sacred Heart of Jesus
Description:
The Missionary Sisters of the Sacred Heart of Jesus are a worldwide, mission-based and faith-based congregation of Catholic women. 
The Institute was founded in 1880 by a passionate and bold woman – Saint Frances Xavier Cabrini – whose desire was to communicate, demonstrate, and make known the love and mercy of Jesus Christ through tangible acts of love, mercy and justice. From its humble beginnings in Italy, the Institute now exist in 17 countries on six continents. In a dynamic effort to respond to the unmet needs of the many people excluded from basic human rights, the Missionary Sisters sponsor many endeavors including: schools, hospitals and clinics, spirituality centers; low income housing for the ederly; and community-based immigrant and social services. 

The Missionary Sisters’ vision for promoting a world where each person is treated with dignity and given the opportunity to develop their fullest potential is creative, intelligent and bold. 
The Missionary Sisters have initiatives around the world, spanning the streets of the lower east side of Manhattan, the favelas of Brazil, the barrios of Argentina and Nicaragua, and the rural areas of Swaziland and Ethiopia. Together with every employee, CEO, administrator, Lay Missionary and other partners in mission, the Cabrini Sisters strive to get close to the people, to respond the current issues, and to work for transformational change. 

The Missionary Sisters work for the common good in a spirit of collaboration and mutuality of leadership. In a time of unprecedented mass migration and displacement of persons across the world, the Missionary Sisters are inspired by their foundress Saint Frances Cabrini, who was proclaimed the Patroness of Immigrants in 1950. Throughout their many endeavors they focus especially on the needs of those who are forced to migrate due to poverty, climate change, lack of work or racial or religious persecution.

Name: Venture Christian Church
Description:
Venture Christian Church in Los Gatos, CA is a non-denominational church composed of a very diverse group of people who come from all walks of life. We’ve experienced God’s love and want to share it with our neighbors and the rest of the world. Our heart is to meet people where they are and to encourage them to take a next step in order to discover the Kingdom of God in real life.

Service times: Saturdays at 5pm | Sundays at 9:30 & 11:15am

Name: ABUNDANT LIFE EMBASSY
Description:
Abundant Life Embassy(a.k.a. ALEM) is a youth-centred ministry commissioned by the Holy Ghost to reach men especially, young people with the light of the glorious gospel; making plain to them God’s original plan (the unending and incalculable riches of the inheritance in Christ Jesus for God’s chosen ones), stimulating the faith of God’s chosen ones ...leading them on to accurate discernment and recognition of and acquaintance with the truth of the gospel which harmonizes and espouses the supernatural life.

ALEM is a city of light on top of the mountains that equips its audience with consistent intense radiance of  Present truths of the gospel by which supernaturally all followers emerge as passionate and diligent Endtime chariots with infallible proofs of the divine life..... defying all odds and the rudiments of this corrupt world.

Name: Amor Ministries
Description:
Since 1980, Amor's mission has remained the same. God has called us to build his Church.  We do that by responding to the spiritual and physical poverty in the world by empowering groups and individuals to participate in an Amor Mission Trip, a house building mission trip.

As we carry out this mission, we realize that building a house doesn't just provide shelter.  It's a step toward Jesus and obedience to the one thing he asked us to build.  HIS CHURCH.

Our very name means love. We choose to show God's love through simple, tangible acts of service.  Amor demonstrates to the poor the same grace we have all received through Jesus.  We are committed to be like Christ as we:

1:   Provide educational and mission experiences that radically change people.
2:   Eradicate spiritual and physical poverty in the lives of families.
3:   Impact the future of the church.

Name: SHOFAR CHRISTIAN CHURCH
Description:
Our Vision: To reach nations and generations through disciple-making; leadership development and church planting.

Our Values:
PASSION for Jesus
PEOPLE to serve
POWER of belief
PURPOSE to pursue

Name: Astroscience Technologies
Description: Get Free Horoscope, Vedic Astrology, Future Prediction Services Online at Astroscience. We provide a solution for Kundli, Manglik dosh, daily horoscope, matchmaking, and free prediction 2019 from our best astrologers in Gurgaon

Name: Diocese of Salisbury
Description:
The Diocese of Salisbury is a Christian community of churches, schools and chaplaincies serving one million people, stretching over 2000 square miles, from North Wiltshire to the Jurassic Coast and Channel Islands of Jersey and Guernsey. 

We're one of the most geographically diverse Anglican dioceses, covering a wide range of landscapes, from the rural villages to the diversity of Poole and North Bournemouth. For more than 900 years we have been a regional presence of the Church of England, with a history of serving our communities. 

Today, as always, we are committed to encouraging people to explore their faith in Jesus Christ and discover how God's love can transform lives.

Name: Grace Church (Greenville, SC)
Description: A family of local congregations in the Upstate that exists to make mature followers of Jesus Christ.

Name: Soccer Chaplains United
Description:
Soccer Chaplains United is a Christian organization dedicated and united in providing spiritual care, wise counsel, and meaningful service to those in the world of soccer.

Soccer Chaplains United is a non-profit, 501(c)3 organization.

Our primary emphasis is on chaplaincy development that considers and cares for the whole person — whether an athlete, coach, staff member, alumni, fan, or family member. We train our chaplains to pastorally and spiritually care for the greater soccer community.

Soccer Chaplains United also helps steward and facilitate meaningful service opportunities between the faith and soccer community.

Name: Ablaze Ministries
Description:
At Ablaze Ministries, we believe in a simple but powerful truth: it is not enough to talk to young people about Jesus; we must show them Jesus. Our mission is to meet the next generation where they are and ignite a passion for faith, community, and purpose.

Through our Reach–Teach–Serve model, we bring Christ to the margins, build up parish life, and empower missionaries to lead with vision and courage. Together, we are answering the urgent call to serve a generation in crisis and inspire faith that lasts a lifetime.

Name: Alhikmah
Description: Lembaga pendidikan islam yang didirikan oleh KH.M.Sulthon Abdul Hadi bersama Nyai Hj.Muthma’innah Fattah pada tahun 1981 atas do’a dan restu Ibunda Nyai. Hj. Musyarofah Bishri. Pada awalnya KH. M. Sulthon Abdul Hadi diberi amanah untuk mengasuh anak yang jumlahnya 15 orang, kemudian beliau mendirikan pondok pesantren yang diberi nama Al-Amanah Bahrul ‘Ulum. Tetapi, dikarenakan di Bahrul ‘Ulum ini terdapat banyak sekali nama tersebut, kemudian beliau mengganti nama Al-Amanah tersebut menjadi pondok pesantren Al-Hikmah Al-Fathimiyyah Bahrul ‘Ulum Tambakberas Jombang

Name: University of Birmingham Islamic Society
Description:
What is the University of Birmingham Islamic Society?

A space on campus in which a diverse community of Muslim students and staff can be themselves without any fear or discomfort.

Common Intrinsic Values: Worship, seeking Islamic knowledge, seeking Academic and Professional Excellence, Personal Development, and seeking Lifelong Like-Minded Friendships.

An Institution and Organisation which pools resources to promote the enjoyment of these common values for the membership.

A platform representing Muslim students and their interests to the University.


History

UBISoc was established in the late 50s, early 60s and was initially used primarily by International Students studying at the University.

In the 1960s UBISoc hosted Malcolm X, and the inaugural meeting of FOSIS.

Many notable alumni have come out of UBISoc including Heads of Charities and scholars who are active in the local Muslim community today as well as many doctors, lawyers, engineers and so on.

Name: Evangelisch-lutherische Landeskirche Hannovers
Description: Von der Nordseeküste bis in die Kasseler Berge, vom Wendland bis zur niederländischen Grenze spannt sich die Landeskirche, die nach der Landeshauptstadt an der Leine benannt ist. Sie ist nicht die einzige evangelische Kirche in Niedersachsen, aber die größte. Sechs Sprengel, 47 Kirchenkreise, mehr als 1200 Kirchengemeinden – das sind rund 165.000 Menschen in Ehrenamt und Beruf. Sie engagieren sich in Kirchen und Gemeindehäusern, in der Zivilgesellschaft und in diakonischen Einrichtungen, in Kirchenämtern, auf Friedhöfen und in Kindertagesstätten, in der Hauswirtschaft und Organisation. Mit allen Christinnen und Christen sind und leben wir: Kirche.

Name: Converge
Description:
Converge is a movement of 1700 churches working to help people meet, know and follow Jesus. We do this by starting and strengthening churches together worldwide.

For over 165 years we’ve helped churches bring life change to communities in the U.S. and around the world through church planting and multiplication, leadership training, coaching and global missions.

Name: CATHOLIC CHURCH
Description: Catholic Church founded by Our Lord Jesus Christ; announcing the Gospel to the whole world.

Name: VIGLOBIM-AYO NI O Inc
Description:
This is Victorious Global Bible Mission - Ayo Ni O (Inc.), to reach rural and urban areas for Biblical Evangelism and soul-winning, as we are called and ordained to raise valiant men and women for Christ, to nurture and develop the developing churches for the Glory of God, to empowering and impacting both locally and globally for the gospel of Jesus, to deliver captives by the power and authority of His word, we are with you to share warm fellowship online with widows, widowers, orphanages, and those who are in needs of spiritual supports.

We are called to rescue the perishing souls.

Name: Lehman Catholic High School
Description:
Our Vision

Lehman Catholic High School is a Christian Community which "seeks first the Kingdom of God."
(Matthew 6:33)
Our Mission

Lehman Catholic educates the whole person - body, mind and soul - for the glory of God
and service to others

Lehman Catholic High School offers you a rewarding experience, one that as a graduate you will recall with pleasure the rest of your life. You remember the challenge of investigating new ideas, the fun of making new interests. The high school years are a time for developing intellectual curiosity, participating in new experiences, and most of all, learning about who you are.

Lehman Catholic High School is your only North Central accredited, Catholic high school in a six-county service area. The tradition of excellence in Catholic secondary education that you join at Lehman dates back to our first graduates in 1889.
