You find this excellence alive today in our faculty, our students, and our graduates. We teach you to take pride in yourself and in what you do.

We invite you to consider Lehman Catholic High School and discover the difference a Catholic education can make.

Name: World Mission, Inc.
Description: World Mission is a Christian non-profit organization focusing on the distribution of The Treasure (audio Bibles) throughout the world. We are most interested in reaching the people groups that are still considered unreached. These groups have less than 2% of the population identified as Christians and are highly illiterate. We are accomplishing our goal through a network of prayer support and funding from individuals, organizations, our World Mission Thrift stores, and recycling projects.

Name: IIGD
Description: Empresa criada para administração do funcionamento da Igreja Internacional da Graça de Deus, fundada pelo missionário Romildo Ribeiro Soares. Seu principal canal de informação pela internet é o portal ongrace.com que é mantido em prol dos objetivos da igreja.

Name: Newcastle Cathedral
Description: The mother church of the Diocese of Newcastle (the most northerly diocese of the Church of England) and the seat of the Bishop of Newcastle. Redeveloped with support from the National Lottery Heritage Fund to offer a versatile and adaptable space for worship, cultural and community events.

Name: Hollywood Prayer Network
Description: Hollywood Prayer Network is a movement of prayer for the people, the projects, and the powerful influence of Hollywood: the world's most influential mission field. We mobilize Christians around the world to pray for entertainment professionals. Whether you're an industry professional who wants prayer and support or you're a Christian who has a heart to pray for Hollywood, you can JOIN THE MOVEMENT.

Name: La Fabrique de la paroisse Notre-Dame de Montréal
Description: Véritable institution à Montréal, la Fabrique veille au sain développement du cimetière Notre-Dame-des-Neiges, le plus grand au Canada, ainsi que de la basilique Notre-Dame de Montréal, lieu de pèlerinage, de tourisme et de culture incontournable.

Name: Global Revival Prayer and Prophetic Ministries
Description:
Apostle Gabriel Isaiah Kretchy and Rev  Prophetess Mrs Faith Kretchy have been in full time ministry for the past 35 years. Apostle Gabriel had undergone training in engineering, he responded to the call of God into ministry with the Pentecostal Charismatic organisation (AoG). He has since trained in the SG Bible College (Africa), Kingdom Faith Revival College- North Yorkshire, Mattersey Hall-(University of Wales- Bangor) and Chester University for his Masters degree.
After working in full time ministry with Assemblies of God in Africa for 8yrs he felt called into the United Kingdom and has since continued his pastoral work.His Apostolic ministry has taken him to the Netherlands, Germany, United States, Italy,Uganda,Zambia, Austria,Zimbabwe,France, Belgium,South Africa, Switzerland,Kenya,Spain and other parts of the UK. His wife, Rev Prophetess Mrs Faith Kretchy is a qualified Nurse who has worked in the NHS for over 23 years and has been serving the Lord for the past 30 years,she works alongside her husband in ministry.God has been giving her accurate prophetic messages for ministries, churches, nations, individuals and families. She has been anointed to bring deliverance to those held captive under demonic powers. She has also been empowered alongside her husband to bring healing to the sick and deliverances to those oppressed by the evil one. She is able to teach and preach the word of God with power and precision. 

She is the Visionary not the Women of Prophetic Destiny International, an organization that is making huge impact across the USA,UK, Africa, Europe and other parts of the world. The women's Prophetic Conferences are held in various nations including Fasting and Prayer Retreats held in the mountain s of Wales these have become an instrument of blessing to Women across the World.

At present they have been called into the Apostolic and Prophetic ministries.They are both overseers of GRPPM an interdenominational ministry which aims at planting churches.

Name: Theos Seminary
Description: We exist to remove the barriers of time and money that stand in the way of the person called to ministry or hungry for a theological education. Through religious exemption, we are able to offer undergraduate and graduate degrees in theology. Our model is innovative, user-friendly, financially viable and academically rigorous. Welcome to Theos Seminary.

Name: The Fellowship
Description:
We are a vibrant and dynamic church of hundreds of people who invest their time, talents and treasures to serve, love, grow and dream. Our people show every day what it means to love God and love others in ways that truly say "you matter to God!" God is good and He is doing great things as we pursue His heart and vision here at The Fellowship at Cinco Ranch.

Our Mission:
"God has called us to be fully devoted and developing followers of Christ, committed to bringing people into a right relationship with Him and each other, reaching the unchurched in our world beginning in Cinco Ranch and surrounding communities through innovative and contemporary approaches to Worship, Evangelism, Discipleship, Fellowship and Ministry, with small groups at the heart of our church."

Service Times:
 •Sunday Morning Worship - 9:00 am & 10:50 am in the LIFE Center
 •Interstate 45 (4th & 5th grade ) - 9:00 am & 10:50 am at the West Campus 
 •Realife Junior High Ministry (6th-8th grade) - 10:50 am at the West Campus
 •Realife High School Ministry (9th-12th grade) attends 9:00 am & 10:50 am services in the LIFE Center and 
   meets Wednesday nights at 6:30 pm in the Student Building

General Information:
 The Fellowship at Cinco Ranch is located on the southeast corner of Westheimer Parkway and Peek Road.

    The Fellowship at Cinco Ranch
    22765 Westheimer Parkway
    Katy, TX 77450

    Phone: 281-395-3950
    Fax: 281-392-1393
 
    Email: info@thefellowship.org

Name: Guru Nanak Gurdwara Camberley
Description:
Vision:
Our vision is to create a vibrant, inclusive Gurdwara centered around the teachings of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji. We aspire to be a sanctuary of learning, reflection, and spiritual growth, where the sangat feels welcomed, respected, and inspired. Guided by the principles of our founder, Guru Nanak Dev Ji— including Seva (selfless service), Simran (meditation on the Divine), and Sangat (spiritual community)—we strive to foster a deeper understanding of Sikh values.
Welcome to Guru Nanak Gurdwara Camberley, a beacon of spiritual growth nestled in the heart of Surrey. Established with the vision of deepening the connection to Vaheguru, our Gurdwara serves as a sanctuary where individuals and families can come together to embrace the teachings of Guru Nanak Dev Ji.

Our Mission:
Inspired by the principles of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji, our mission is to foster a nurturing environment that promotes personal and spiritual development. We are committed to providing a wide array of programmes and services designed to support and enrich the lives of our community members through Sikhi.

Name: Social Dallas
Description:
Social Dallas is a vibrant, Spirit-empowered church in the heart of Dallas, Texas, led by Pastors Robert and Taylor Madu. We exist to help people encounter Jesus, walk in freedom, discover their God-given purpose, and make a lasting impact.

Our services are marked by passionate worship, practical and powerful teaching, and a strong sense of community. Whether you join us in person or online, you’ll find a place to belong, grow, and be equipped to live out your faith boldly.

At Social Dallas, we believe church should be social—faith is meant to be lived out in authentic relationship with God and others.

God Loves Dallas. We’re serving our city in tangible ways—meeting needs, loving people, and spreading the message that God’s love is real, relentless, and for everyone. From city-wide outreach to servant leader opportunities, we are the hands and feet of Jesus to Dallas and beyond.

Name: Stichting voor islamitische ontwikkeling (SVIO)
Description:
Stichting voor Islamitische Ontwikkeling (SVIO) staat in dienst van de Nederlandstalige moslimgemeenschap.

Wij bieden moslims leiding en oplossingen bij het vormgeven en toepassen van de klassieke Islam in hun dagelijkse leven. We helpen moslims om het beste uit zichzelf te halen en van positieve invloed te zijn op hun omgeving.

In alles wat wij doen worden wij gedreven door onze visie. Wij zien een Nederlandse moslimgemeenschap voor ons die leeft volgens de goddelijke normen en waarden.

Een moslimgemeenschap die de Islam centraal stelt in haar leven en voorloper is in het vestigen van rechtvaardigheid. In de weg daar naartoe biedt SVIO leiding en oplossingen, die zijn onttrokken uit het Boek van Allah en de Sunnah van de Profeet, sallallaahu ‘alayhi wa sallam.

Name: Sacerdoce Royal
Description:
Le SACERDOCE ROYAL,  Ministère Catholique évangélisation au sein de la Sainte Eglise, né officiellement le 18 Juillet 2010, a pour paroisse d’origine la paroisse SAINT AMBROISE DU JUBILÉ de Abidjan, Cocody, Angré. Sous la paternité du Père Curé ABONGA Abey François de Paule, le groupe s’inscrit à la suite du Christ qui nous invite à œuvrer positivement en vue du bonheur et de l’épanouissement des autres.  
La spiritualité du groupe est donc portée vers l’évangélisation. 
A ce titre,  le Sacerdoce Royal a pour vocation fondamentale d’être un tabernacle à la dimension de Dieu, d’être le prolongement de DIEU sur terre.

Name: Iglesia
Description: Comunidad Cristiana Bautista ubicada en la Comuna de Quinta Normal, la Iglesia se encuentra afiliada a la Union de Iglesias Bautistas de Chile, UBACH.

Name: ISKCON Delhi
Description: ISKCON Delhi is also known as Sri Sri Radha Parthasarathi Mandir, a well-known Vaishnav temple of Lord Krishna and Radharani.It was inaugurated on 5 April 1998 by the former Prime Minister of India, Atal Bihari Vajpayee. It is situated at Hare Krishna Hills, Sant Nagar, East of Kailash area, South Delhi, India.

Name: OMF International U.S.
Description: OMF International worldwide unites around a common call and passion. God has given us a heart for Asia and a desire to bring his hope to billions. It is our heart’s cry to partner with the global church to see individual lives and whole communities redeemed through Jesus. Our vision is to plant churches and nurture in ways that equip the believers to grow God’s kingdom among those around them. There are many ways and opportunities to serve, build relationships, evangelize and disciple. How might God use you? Join your story with ours!

Name: Rutgers University Hillel
Description: Rutgers Hillel is the gateway to Jewish life at Rutgers University.  Every week Rutgers Hillel welcomes students for a variety of educational programs, Shabbat meals and social events.  Rutgers Hillel is non-denominational. We provide opportunities for Reform, Reconstructionist, Conservative and Orthodox students.

Name: União Central Brasileira
Description: União Central Brasileira is a religious institutions company based out of Avenida Professora Magdalena Sanseverino Grosso, Artur Nogueira, Sp, Brazil.

Name: Young Catholic Professionals Boston Chapter
Description:
The nation's largest professional Catholic networking organization is now in Boston!

YCP Boston is a spiritual and professional development organization on a mission to challenge, train, and inspire young adults to "Work in Witness for Christ"

Name: First Baptist Church of Jacksonville
Description: For more than 175 years, First Baptist Church of Jacksonville has been sharing and showing the gospel of Jesus Christ to Jacksonville and the surrounding communities. In fact, our mission is to reach all of Jacksonville with all of Jesus for all of life.

Name: Bayside Community Church
Description:
Bayside Community Church exists to help you know God, find family, live in freedom, and discover purpose.

Bayside Community Church is a multi-campus church serving Manatee, Sarasota, and Hardee counties. 

Our desire is to create environments where people of all ages and backgrounds can connect and experience the life-changing message of Jesus Christ.

Name: Rolling Hills Community Church
Description: Rolling Hills is a group of diverse people united in our commitment to reaching the world one person at a time, as we learn to think, love, and live like Jesus, and reproduce that in the lives of others. Our faith family seeks to be in real community together, where it’s safe to be known and walk alongside each other as we pursue Jesus. We believe God is at work in us, as well as through us, to positively impact our community, region and world.

Name: Citipointe Church
Description:
Citipointe Church began as Brisbane Christian Outreach Centre in 1974 at a time when people were seeking more from traditional churches and Pentecostalism was starting to shape the Christian landscape.

What began as a group of 25 people meeting as a homegroup quickly became one of the fastest growing churches in Australia – seeing hundreds of people added each year to this new way of doing church.

Citipointe is now global; with numerous locations across Australia, New Zealand, Europe, the USA and over 12,000 people now call Citipointe their home. Citipointe Church is now one of Australia’s largest and most influential churches with the mission to ‘Unmistakably Influence our World for Good and for God’.

Name: Building Hope in the City
Description:
OUR MISSION
Advance the good of the city.
Magnify the mission of Jesus.
Unleash the capability of underestimated people.

Name: Calvin Institute of Christian Worship
Description:
The Calvin Institute of Christian Worship is an interdisciplinary study and ministry center located at Calvin University and Calvin Theological Seminary that promotes the scholarly study of the theology, history, and practice of Christian worship and the renewal of worship in worshiping communities across North America and beyond.

Founded in 1997, CICW is dedicated to using the unique resources of a Christian liberal arts university and theological seminary—with its collegial environment, international faculty and student body, wide interdisciplinary expertise, and culture of ongoing learning—to partner with congregations, denominations, parachurch organizations, professional organizations, and publishers to further our mission.

Name: Epworth United Methodist Church
Description:
Our Mission:

To make disciples of Jesus Christ for the transformation of the world.

Our Vision:

Epworth’s Four Vision Points that Guide our Congregation from today until 2020…..

CARE—We will deepen our care ministries aimed at supporting all of our members and friends with special emphasis upon senior adults.

PARTNER—We will actively seek partners that will increase the number of positive “on property experiences” for families with kids.

BUILD—We will create a world-class facility that matches our heart passion to reach younger people with the Good News of Jesus Christ.

INVEST---We are looking to make a significant investment to lower the poverty rate of Lucas County by investing with more focus in “The Next Neighborhood Over.”

Name: Sisters of St. Joseph of Baden
Description: The Sisters of St. Joseph of Baden, commit ourselves, our energies and our resources to the mission of unity – to achieve unity of ourselves with God and with each other, to achieve unity of neighbor with neighbor and neighbor with God. We believe that God is alive in our world, in the people who work with us, the people who join us in prayer and celebration, and the people we serve. We are constantly enriched by the lives of those with whom we come into contact. We are filled with hope for the future, and we are challenged by the critical needs of our neighbors here and around the world.

Name: The Bible Chapel
Description:
The Bible Chapel is a non-denominational, Bible-teaching church with multiple locations in the Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania area.

We're excited to meet you wherever you are in your life, and whatever your faith experience has been. We have many ways for you to meet people and grow, and ministries for everyone in your family. 

The Bible Chapel exists to develop followers of Jesus Christ in the South Hills of Pittsburgh, in the greater Pittsburgh area, and throughout the world.

Name: Association of Ministerial PJPs Ltd
Description: The  Association of Ministerial PJPs (AMPJP) brings together the MPJPs of some of Australia’s major Catholic health, aged and community care, and educational organisations. This umbrella body allows the canonical stewards of these MPJPs to interact formally with Bishops, Church agencies and, importantly, with one another.

Name: Bagulamukhi Jyotish Tantra
Description:
◈ Astrology, Tantra & Spiritual remedies in various matters like 

◈ Business
◈ Career
◈ Relationship
◈ Education
◈ Life

Name: Presbyterian Church of Australia
Description:
The Presbyterian Church of Australia is a part of the Christian Church throughout the world. 

What the Presbyterian Church of Australia Believes?

The highest standard by which the Church‟s belief and practice is to be 
measured is the Word of God; the sixty-six books of the Old and New 
Testaments of the Bible. So that others can clearly understand what the 
Presbyterian Church of Australia believes is taught in the Bible, the Church has 
adopted the Westminster Confession of Faith (with two minor amendments) as 
a statement of its key doctrines. While the Church believes the Confession sets 
forth Biblical doctrines accurately and reliably, the Confession is always 
referred to as the subordinate standard and the Bible is the supreme standard.

Name: Hillside Christian Church
Description: Hillside Christian Church is a non-denominational, Christ-centered, Bible-believing church with campuses in West Texas and Eastern New Mexico. Our mission is to love God as we lead people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ. For more information, please visit https://hillsideonline.com.

Name: The Bible Recap
Description:
Have you ever closed your Bible and thought, “What did I just read?” Maybe you've tried to read through the Bible but quit when it felt confusing or impersonal? 

The Bible Recap is here to help! It offers short daily recaps of God’s Word -
explaining the challenging parts and pointing out God and His character on every page. 

The Bible Recap offers tools that equip millions around the world to know and love God in a way that informs their entire lives. 

Not only can you read the whole Bible, but you can understand it, and you can love it.

Name: Impact Retreat
Description:
Impact is an annual 4-day retreat for incoming freshmen at Texas A&M University and Blinn College that aims to connect freshmen with Christian students as well as local churches and ministries in the Bryan/College Station area.

Our Mission seeks to glorify the Lord in every aspect of its existence by serving the incoming freshman class and showing them their first glimpse of the body of Christ at Texas A&M and Blinn.

Name: Église Catholique à Montréal - Catholic Church in Montreal
Description:
L’Archidiocèse de Montréal est situé sur le populeux territoire de l’île de Montréal, auquel s’ajoutent ceux des villes de Laval, Repentigny et l’Assomption. Elle réunit plus de 1,5 million de catholiques à travers 200 paroisses et missions. Mgr Christian Lépine est le dixième évêque et le huitième archevêque de Montréal, depuis la fondation du diocèse en 1836.

Vous y trouverez une richesse multiculturelle unique au Québec : vingt-quatre communautés culturelles catholiques actives représentent autant de pays de tous les continents. De plus, un bon nombre de communautés religieuses et leurs membres associés laïques, ainsi que des communautés monastiques contribuent à sa vitalité. 

Pour en savoir plus, visitez notre site web : www.diocesemontreal.org 

---

The Archdiocese of Montreal comprises a populous urban territory that includes the islands of Montreal and Laval, plus the municipalities of Repentigny and l’Assomption. Its 200 parishes and missions are home to 1.5 million Catholics. Archbishop Christian Lépine is the tenth bishop and eighth archbishop of Montreal, since the founding of the diocese in 1836.

The diocese embodies a multicultural richness unique in Quebec, which includes some 24 different cultural communities, coming from all corners of the world. In addition, many religious communities along with their associate lay members, and monastic communities contribute greatly to the vitality of the diocese.  

For more information, visit our website: www.diocesemontreal.org

Name: Lafayette Catholic School System
Description:
The Lafayette Catholic School System is a pre-K through 12th grade diocesan school system, supported by six local parishes: Church of the Blessed Sacrament, St. Ann Church & Shrine, St. Boniface Catholic Church, St. Lawrence Catholic Church, St. Mary Cathedral, and St. Thomas Aquinas. The school System is made up of five local schools: 

CENTRAL CATHOLIC JR. - SR. HIGH SCHOOL (GRADES 7 - 12)
ST. BONIFACE SCHOOL (GRADES 4 - 6)
ST. LAWRENCE ELEMENTARY (GRADES K - 6)
ST. MARY ELEMENTARY (GRADES K - 3)
ST. FRANCIS EARLY LEARNING ACADEMY (PREK)

MISSION
The Lafayette Catholic School System, centered on Jesus Christ, educates the whole person in a culture that is:
•	sustained by Gospel witness and service;
•	imbued with a Catholic worldview;
•	supported by a community of faith;
•	distinguished by academic excellence; and
•	committed to student success.

VISION
He Shepherds, We Shape, They Shine
S	Strong Catholic Formation
H 	High Academic Standard
A 	Accessibility
P	Positive Christian Environment
E	Excellent Teachers and Facilities

Name: Center for Youth Ministry Training
Description:
Mission:
The Center for Youth Ministry Training equips youth ministers and communities of faith to develop innovative, effective, and theologically informed ministries s

Graduate Residency in Youth Ministry
CYMT brings together churches and youth ministers to create life-changing youth ministries. The Graduate Residency at CYMT is designed to blend theological training with practical experience in the local church – a unique approach that develops theologically informed and practically effective youth ministries.  Real world experience is gained by working as a part-time youth minister at a local partnership church.  At the completion of the three year residency, students will receive a Master's of Arts in Youth from Austin Presbyterian Theological Seminary.

Placement Program
Do you need a job, practical training, and theological education? CYMT provides a 3-year job placement program that matches graduate residents with partner churches throughout Texas and the Southeast, where they serve as the youth director while participating in the CYMT program.  You will gain practical experience while earning a Master of Arts in Youth Ministry.

Professional Youth Ministry Track
Are you looking for a way to get a masters degree without leaving your job? Are you ready to develop your skills for ministry so that you can strengthen your ministry? Apply to CYMT’s Professional Youth Ministry Track.   You will receive receive coaching, training, and be enrolled in the Master of Arts in Youth Ministry degree.


Application Deadlines (These are considered on a rolling basis pending space available, so early application is strongly encouraged)
Nov 15 – Early Consideration Begins
March 15 – Graduate Residency Recommended Date
May 15 – Final Consideration Deadline (space permitting)

Partner Ministries can apply to receive a graduate resident to be placed in their ministry. 

CYMT was founded in 2006 by Brentwood United Methodist Church in  Brentwood, TN & First Presbyterian Church.

Name: Association of Muslim Chaplains
Description: The Association of Muslim Chaplains (AMC) supports the professional development of Muslims who provide spiritual care as chaplains in communities and in public/private institutions in the United States, while promoting the advancement of the field of Islamic Chaplaincy.

Name: Hare Krishna Movement Pune
Description:
The present society’s ever-changing dynamics have altered life in many ways. Today, there is enormous pressure due to expectations, commitments, unhealthy desires & habits, and people seem to be living a fast-paced life, with unhappy relationships, and with deficiency of work-life balance. The consequence is a life full of anxiety, struggle, and discontentment. 

HKM Pune helps individuals in not only understanding and appreciating the wisdom of vedic literatures like the Bhagavad-gita, Srimad Bhagavatam etc., but also in comfortably applying and implementing the same in their day-to-day activities so that they can very rapidly notice positive changes in your life.

Name: Casa de Dios
Description:
Somos una iglesia cristiana que comparte la manifestación de la presencia del Señor.

Nacimos como congregación el 11 de septiembre de 1994, luego de que el Señor llamó a los pastores Cash y Sonia Luna a emprender el ministerio para el cual los había escogido. La Iglesia inició con la reunión de tres familias amigas en la sala de la casa de una de ellas. Desde ese momento, el Señor habló diciendo que dicha iglesia no había nacido en el corazón de un hombre sino en el de Dios y que sería conocida, al igual que el Arca del Pacto, por las manifestaciones de Su presencia.

Name: St Canice's Parish
Description:
St Canice's is a Jesuit parish in the heart of Sydney. We seek to build a hope-filled future for all.

For 35 years, we have operated St Canice's Kitchen, which provides free daily food and support to those experiencing homelessness and social exclusion. Powered by 350+ volunteers, we serve nutritious, cooked meals for 150+ guests each day.

Our parish has also raised more than $1 million for our sister parish in Railaco Timor-Leste for health and education programs.

Visit our website to learn more about how we're practising faith through action.

Name: Global Missions Link
Description:
Global Missions Link (GML) is an international missions oriented organization that is committed to soul winning and human development. Over the years,
GML has supported a number of local and oversea Churches and individuals
with money (seed capital for business), spiritual books, Gospel tracts, clothes, food items,
etc.

Name: Mile Hi Church
Description:
We are an inclusive, New Thought community in Lakewood, Colorado that embraces ALL people.

We stand for:
1. Interfaith engagement.
2. Sustainable living and environmental responsibility.
3. Nonviolence and human dignity for all.

Come give us a try.

Name: UISG - International Union of Superiors General
Description:
As an International body rooted in Christ, and representing Congregations of Women Religious throughout the world, UISG seeks to witness to and proclaim the identity of apostolic religious life in all of its diversity. By weaving global solidarity and opening new frontiers, we animate, support and stimulate leadership of religious to be a prophetic voice and witness in the Church and the world.

The mission of UISG is to build bridges that span distances, borders and boundaries, creating ways for members to be in communication, in community and in communion. The purpose of UISG is to promote an understanding of religious life.

Name: Diocese of Hildesheim
Description: The diocese of Hildesheim, founded in 815, is one of the oldest dioceses in Germany and covers large parts of Lower Saxony as well as Bremen-North and Bremerhaven. It is a public corporation and is divided into 17 deaneries and 119 parishes as an ecclesiastical pastoral and administrative district.

Name: Jubilee Christian Center
Description: Jubilee Christian Center, founded in 1980 by Pastors Dick & Carla Bernal, has proudly served the Greater San Jose area for more than 30 years. Jubilee's vision is for everyone to experience God and love people. Visit www.jubilee.org for our schedule and join us soon for an inspirational celebration service.

Name: Trinity Fellowship Church
Description: To those hungry for an extraordinary life, Trinity Fellowship Church is a healthy family pursuing God, growing stronger, and impacting the world.

Name: The Episcopal Churches of Christ the King and Jesús de Nazaret
Description: A welcoming place to hear the Good News and serve the Lord by serving others!

Name: Editora Cultura Cristã
Description:
A Casa Editora Presbiteriana (CEP) foi fundada em 1948. A organização ocorreu a 25 de fevereiro, mas a data consagrada para a comemoração é 27 de março. Desde então, a editora oficial da Igreja Presbiteriana vem contribuindo significativamente para reformar a igreja no Brasil por meio da literatura.

Organizada como Casa Publicadora, a CEP é uma autarquia da IPB, representada pelo Conselho de Educação Cristã e Publicações (CECEP). Com o nome fantasia Editora Cultura Cristã, a CEP tem abençoado essa denominação e diversas outras, todos os que procuram literatura cristã sadia e biblicamente orientada segundo a perspectiva teológica da Reforma Protestante do século 16. Trata-se de uma editora confessional.

Name: Mozaiek0318
Description:
Wij zijn een kerk waar je welkom bent, zoals je bent. Wij geloven dat Jezus van je houdt. Wie je ook bent, waar je ook vandaan komt en wat jouw verhaal ook is. Of je leven nu in puin ligt of alles op rolletjes loopt. 

Daarom heten we Mozaiek0318. Wij zijn een kunstwerk van gebrokenheid en Jezus is de Kunstenaar. Hij maakt van onze puinhoop en ons succes, onze twijfel en ons geloof een fantastisch mooi kunstwerk: een mozaïek.

Name: Rock Point Church
Description: Rock Point is a non-denominational, Christian church that exists to guide people into a fully-engaged relationship with Jesus. We are committed to live out our motto of Real People.Real Life by creating a place where people are genuinely welcomed and accepted, regardless of the life issues they are facing.

Name: OneWay Ministries
Description: OneWay is a family of media and missions ministries. Through both modern tools and time-proven methods, we come alongside the Body of Christ in fulfilling her mission to make disciples of all nations. From producing Great Commission media resources to inspire and equip believers, to training and sending church planters who serve among the unreached, we help people reach people.

Name: Arquidiócesis de Monterrey A. R.
Description: La diócesis de Monterrey se erigió por la Bula "Relata Semper", del Papa Pío VI, el 15 de Diciembre de 1777. Fue desmembrada de los Obispados de México, Michoacán y, principalmente del de Guadalajara. Comprendía los actuales Estados de Nuevo León, Coahuila, Tamaulipas y Texas. Primero fue llamada Diócesis de Linares, después Linares-Monterrey y, finalmente, Arquidiócesis de Monterrey el 9 de Junio de 1922.

Name: Messenger College
Description:
Messenger College is the national collegiate institution of the Pentecostal Church of God in the United States for the
education of its ministers, missionaries, teachers, and other professionals to serve its constituency and others in the United States and abroad. Messenger College is a private institution and legal entity operating under the statutes of the State of Texas. The college is also approved by the State of California to operate a teaching site location, located in Valencia, California.

Name: Collège Saint-Jean de Passy
Description: Prêtre du diocèse de Paris

Name: MISSION HOSANNA
Description:
Eglise évangélique  fondée par le Pasteur Jonathan Elie 
Missions :
Fait des nations les disciples de Jésus Christ à travers l'évangélisation,
Démontrer la Puissance de Jésus Christ par la prière pour la délivrance des âmes (exorcisme) , les guérisons , orientation des vies par la prophétie 
Conseils spirituels, matrimoniaux, financiers , professionnels ,
Formation de la jeunesse ,
Assistance sociale ( don en vivre ,non vivre , finances aux veuves, orphelins,démunis , malades et prisonniers) ,

Construction d'églises ,d'écoles et d'hôpitaux.

Name: Consejo Episcopal Latinoamericano y Caribeño (Celam)
Description: El CELAM es un organismo episcopal que quiere ser generador de procesos, no de eventos; de propuestas y de articulación; promotor de servicios ágiles y simplificados, de estructuras descentralizadas, atento a las diversas realidades continentales y a responder a los desafíos pastorales que éstas presentan para afirmar, reforzar y contribuir al trabajo de las Conferencias Episcopales, al Magisterio Pontificio, al Magisterio Latinoamericano y al servicio del Pueblo de Dios.

Name: Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of Australia
Description: The Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of Australia is an Eastern Orthodox Church under the hierarchical oversight of His Eminence Archbishop Makarios of Australia (Primate of the Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of Australia, a jurisdiction of the Ecumenical Patriarchate of Constantinople and His All Holiness Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew I)

Name: Mount Olivet Lutheran Church
Description:
BELIEVING in Jesus Christ through the gift of the Holy Spirit.
BELONGING to the community of Jesus Christ.
BECOMING like Jesus Christ through Servanthood.
AFFILIATES:
Cathedral of the Pines Camp
Mount Olivet Home 
Mount Olivet Careview Home 
Mount Olivet Rolling Acres 
Mount Olivet Conference & Retreat Center 
Mount Olivet Day Services

Name: Next Step Ministries
Description: Next Step Ministries is a Christ-centered, 501c3 non-profit organization committed to helping students grow closer to Christ through a life-changing, one-week mission trip. We are passionate about the experience students can have on a mission trip - serving others while encountering a living God who offers freedom and grace. We are passionate about communities thriving - developing from within and restoring dignity. To this end, we lead thousands of students on one-week missions trips that connect them with sustainable community-led initiatives we support on a year-round basis.

Name: International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON)
Description: The International Society for Krishna Consciousness, abbreviated as ISKCON, known colloquially as the Movement of Hare Krishna, is a Gaudiya Vaishnava Hindu religious organization. ISKCON was founded in 13 July 1966 in New York City by A. C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada. Its main headquarters are located today in West Bengal, India.

Name: Xpeditie 3.6.0.
Description: Unieke nieuw concept voor geloofsopvoeding voor gezinnen met kinderen van 4-12 jaar.

Name: Istituto Buddista Italiano Soka Gakkai
Description: sgi-italia.org

Name: LCMS Northern Illinois District
Description: The LCMS Northern Illinois District LCMS consists of 200-plus congregations, schools, church workers and laity who are engaged in advancing His Kingdom through Word, Wellness and Witness.

Name: Southbrook Church
Description: Whether you’re checking out church for the first time or are already a Christ follower, we pray that Jesus speaks to your heart through God-Exalting Worship and Gospel-Centered Preaching. We are never meant to live life alone. Instead, we were created for community and to live on mission for God. While you're at Southbrook, we invite you to be a part of our family as we make disciples who make a big deal of Jesus where we live, learn, work, and play.

Name: Diözese Graz-Seckau
Description:
1218 gründete das Erzbistum Salzburg das Bistum Seckau in der Obersteiermark, seit 1786 ist der Bischofsitz in der Landeshauptstadt Graz. Die heutigen Diözesangrenzen sind mit denen des Bundeslandes Steiermark weitestgehend identisch (16.386 km²)..

Wir wollen jenen helfen, die nicht auf die Sonnenseite des Lebens gefallen sind. Wir wollen unserer Kirche ein steirisches und zugleich weltoffenes Angesicht geben. Wir wollen mutig sein in der Weitergabe der „Freude des Evangeliums“. Wir wollen alles tun, damit möglichst viele Menschen Frieden und Heimat finden. 

Wir übernehmen aus unserem Glauben heraus Verantwortung für unsere Umwelt und unsere Mitmenschen. Besonders wichtig sind uns dabei soziale und wirtschaftliche Gerechtigkeit, nachhaltiger Umgang mit Ressourcen, Menschen auf der Flucht, Integration, Schutz des Lebens, Stärkung der Familien in ihren vielfältigen Formen sowie Bildung und Kultur.

Name: Friends International
Description:
Growing Friendship and Faith with International Students in the UK and Ireland.

Approximately one million international students study at UK and Irish universities and English language schools. We want to give as many as we can a great time in the UK, chances to experience real local culture, and opportunities to hear the Christian message. Our activities are open to those of all faiths and none.

We equip churches and volunteers to serve, minister, and engage with international students, caring for them holistically. We also organise a range of social events and activities for international students to be a part of.

We operate in 40 university towns and cities across the UK, and have over 70 staff workers befriending and supporting international students. 

We are a registered charity in England and Wales (1094095), and in Scotland (SC 048838).

Name: Word of Life Kenya
Description: Word of Life Kenya is a youth ministry that is part of Word of Life Fellowship Inc. in more than 70 Countries around the world. Our goal is to Reach the Youth of Kenya with the Gospel of Christ. Our Mission is Evangelization and Discipleship of youth through various means consistent with the Holy Scriptures to help build and strengthen the Church of Jesus Christ. We currently have two locations in Kenya - One is located on the shores of the Indian Ocean in Diani (south coast of Kenya) and the other in the Scenic Lower Kabete area in the outskirts of Nairobi.

Name: Comunidade Colo De Deus
Description: Somos uma comunidade católica, formada por membros de vida e aliança, que deseja realizar o mesmo objetivo: anunciar o nome de Jesus Cristo pelas nações. Somos jovens e adultos que decidiram se unir em um único lugar com os mesmos propósitos. Somos artistas, criativos e usamos de todas as ferramentas pela evangelização.

Name: Mission Eurasia Canada
Description: We evangelize, train, equip, and mobilize the Next Generation in Eurasia to lead churches in transforming their nations for Christ.

Name: New Salem Baptist Church - Columbus, Ohio, Dr. Keith A. Troy, Pastor
Description: Welcome to the official New Salem Baptist Church LinkedIn page. We are committed to the transforming power of God in us and the community we serve. On this page, you will encounter encouragement and motivation to help support you as you seek to fulfill the calling that God has placed on your life. For more information about New Salem, please visit us at Newsalemcares.com

Name: North American Center for Marianist Studies - NACMS
Description: The North American Center for Marianist Studies provides resources to people interested in the Marianist Family and to Marianist ministries. Through programs, publications, research, and a special library collection, NACMS strives to link the vision of the Marianist Founders to the contemporary Church and world. NACMS is sponsored by the Society of Mary, a Catholic religious order.

Name: Dwell Community Church
Description:
Dwell Community Church is a culturally relevant, non-traditional and non-denominational church with mainstream biblical doctrines located in Columbus, Ohio.  We develop community through home groups led by volunteers.

Xenos is known for its equipping ministries for developing Christian workers and leaders. We offer multimedia Bible teachings, class materials, essays and other excellent resources to browse and download at no charge.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Detroit
Description:
Our mission is to cover the world in Christ by unapologetically declaring to the world whose we are by proactively creating faith-centric cultures in the workplace.

We are a group of business executives who come together every month to share how including Christ in our daily lives has positively affected the work environment.

In sharing joys and struggles with others who walk similar paths, we are able to support and encourage our brothers and sisters in Christ to live courageously in witness to him. It is our hope to rejuvenate the working soul through fellowship and praise of God.

How is your soul today?

Name: firstBible International
Description: firstBible International is a nonprofit organization dedicated to reaching the whole world with the Gospel.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee
Description:
The Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee, founded in 1975, covers the 18 most northwestern counties of the State of Florida. Although the diocese is young, its roots go back to the first European settlement of this region. A fleet of ships carrying 1,500 colonists sailed into what is now Pensacola Bay on August 15, 1559. On behalf of the Spanish crown, Don Tristan de Luna established the first settlement in what was to become the United States of America. The settlement was abandoned in 1561 due to damage from hurricanes that destroyed the settlers' supplies.

Our diocese enjoys the distinction of being a "dual see" diocese. It has two centers from which the bishop governs – Pensacola and Tallahassee. Each see has a cathedral, the Cathedral of the Sacred Heart in Pensacola and the Co-Cathedral of St. Thomas More in Tallahassee.

Name: Lighthouse Catholic Media
Description: Our mission is to answer the call for a New Evangelization by serving the Church in providing inspirational CDs and brochures that will enrich and strengthen people’s relationship with Jesus Christ and understanding of their Catholic Faith. We work to provide the very best presentations and media resources.

Name: The Solomon Foundation
Description:
The Solomon Foundation was created with you in mind; whether you are an investor looking for a fixed rate investment opportunity, or you are just starting to save money with our low-minimum investment. Perhaps you are the pastor looking for a partner in ministry, or the church planter needing funding for a facility where your ministry can grow. We are here to work with you!

Our team strives to provide excellent interest and create eternal impact. We seek to follow our Core Values every day. As a Church Extension Fund, we simply raise investment dollars from investors, and those funds are then lent to churches within the Restoration Movement for refinancing, church building acquisitions, and construction projects.

Name: Bialik Hebrew Day School
Description: Bialik Hebrew Day School is committed to providing an exemplary Jewish and General education to children in Junior Kindergarten to Grade 8 from diverse Jewish backgrounds. Bialik fosters a strong Jewish identity that embraces the values of our Labour Zionist roots – inclusivity, social justice and equality – in a warm and nurturing environment. Hebrew fluency, Yiddish language & culture and a strong connection to Israel and the Jewish people are paramount. Our commitment to Jewish values, academic excellence and innovation inspires our students to become future Canadian and Jewish community leaders.

Name: Full Gospel Business Men's Fellowship International - Millennium Chapter
Description:
The Full Gospel Business Men’s Fellowship International is a non-denominational global movement of laymen (Business owners and Professionals) founded under the unction of the holy spirit 71years ago by an Armenian-American Dairy Farmer - Demos Shakarian to reconcile Men and women in the marketplace back to God.

Millennium Chapter has an encapsulated mandate of reconciling the nobles on the Island back to Jesus Christ.

We are the largest network of Christian Businessmen and Professionals in the world operating in over 85 nations and we hold our meetings in thousands of chapters around the world.


We meet every Tuesday, at 6:00 pm @ Eko Hotels and Suites and Every First Wednesday of the month at the same venue and time.

The link to our online meetings is www.bit.ly/fullprayer1


FGBMFI's primary strategy is executed on the local level; yet the organization is global in scope and reach. Designed to be a grass roots movement, the structure of our organization purposefully attempts to push resources to the local level - equipping the member to impact his or her local community or city.

Name: Christian Fellowship Church
Description:
Christian Fellowship Church (CFC), is an independent, nondenominational church located in Ashburn, Virginia.  CFC is committed to being a place where people become followers of Christ no matter what their religious or denominational background. 

CFC's ministry is grounded on the Word of God, communicated through relevant Biblical teaching.  Messages challenge and help people to change, becoming all that God intends them to be.  Energetic, authentic worship makes our services alive and full of celebration.  Our friendly, casual atmosphere makes guests feel welcomed and relaxed.

Name: Capitol Commission
Description:
Capitol Commission, in partnership with the church, is committed to making disciples of Jesus Christ and promoting the Biblical mandate to pray for those in authority in the Capitol communities throughout the United States and around the world.

Our State Directors teach weekly verse-by-verse Bible Studies for legislators, lobbyists and staff members.  These Bible studies are hand-distributed to each legislative office, emailed and made available throughout the capitol community.  With events such as Pastors' Commission to the Capitol, legislators' prayer breakfasts and election-eve prayer walks.   Churches are offered many opportunities to minister to their elected officials.

We believe that the effectual prayer of the righteous for their leaders as St. Paul requested in his first letter to Timothy will result in 'living peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness." And this 'pleases God our Savior, who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth."  

Website blog, Pray1Tim2.org is dedicated to assisting people in praying for their legislators/political leaders.  The website displays six legislative leaders each day for each state, which is dependent on the choice of the reader of the website.  OR an email will be sent to each person who signs up to receive their state pictures, either each day or weekly.

Name: ST. EDWARD CENTRAL CATHOLIC HIGH SCHOOL
Description: Established in 1941, St. Edward Central Catholic High School is a Roman Catholic Diocesan co-educational, college preparatory high school where faculty and staff nurture the discipleship of Jesus Christ while promoting excellence in education. St. Edward's serves the seven Elgin Deanery Parishes of the Rockford, Illinois Diocese.

Name: Lutheran Bible Translators
Description:
Lutheran Bible Translators (LBT) is an independent Lutheran mission organization dedicated to helping bring people to faith in Jesus Christ.

We strive to do this through our missionaries, staff and partners who work to make the Word of God available to those who do not yet have it in the language of their hearts.

Name: Oxford University Islamic Society (OUISoc)
Description: Our ISoc is a student-run body and serves as the focal point for Muslims in Oxford. We have an open and diverse membership, and a reputation for being amongst the University’s most vibrant and active societies. We aim to organise a host of different activities, services and events to engage and bring together the Muslim community in Oxford.

Name: Archdiocese of Portland in Oregon
Description: The Archdiocese was initially created as a Vicariate-Apostolic on December 1, 1843. It was created as the Archdiocese of Oregon City on July 24, 1846. The Archdiocese of Portland is the second oldest archdiocese in the United States following Baltimore. The name was changed to its current title by Papal decree on September 26, 1928 to reflect the change of location for the See city of the Archbishop.

Name: 2819 Church
Description:
Inspired by The Great Commission of Jesus (Matthew 28:19), our vision is to make His last command our first priority, changing lives through soul-winning and ongoing spiritual formation. 

To this end, the Gospel of Christ is the center of all our endeavors and functions as a church. We seek to express the fullness of who He is through Christ-centered teaching, worship, service, discipleship, community, outreach and Gospel motivated generosity.  

We have a pronounced passion to reach the lost and make disciples of the found and to see them become committed followers of Jesus who serve God by serving others, and live out their purpose and calling boldly in their spheres of influence. 

We are a socially aware and end-time conscious church committed to the spread of the Gospel…UNTIL ALL HAVE HEARD.

This is our vision. It is deeper than just words. It is alive and active at 2819, and reflected in our new name. You can feel it in our gatherings and every aspect of our life-transforming culture.

Name: BattleCreek Church
Description: Helping people Know God, Find Freedom, Discover their Purpose, and Make a Difference.

Name: Catholic Women's Leadership Foundation (CWLF)
Description:
To fund leadership education that inspires Catholic women to be transformational and influential leaders where they live and work.

Statistics and evidence demonstrate a tremendous need for groups to empower and encourage women in leadership roles – not just in the Church but in society as a whole. Today, women comprise 8.5 percent of the highest-paid positions in Canada’s top 100 listed companies. Similarly, a study conducted by the HR Council of Nonprofit and Voluntary Organizations of Canada showed a disproportionate number of men in senior management posts in the nonprofit sector, while women occupied the majority of administrative and support staff positions. This study revealed that women only held 40 percent of executive positions in the nonprofit sector.

There is more that can be done.

The Catholic Women’s Leadership Foundation will encourage Catholic women to develop their leadership skills and provide a network of women to support the acceptance of women in important leadership roles.

Name: Dominion City Church
Description: A non-denominational church that is passionate about God and passionate about people.

Name: Free Church of Scotland
Description: The Free Church of Scotland is a Presbyterian church which preaches and teaches about Jesus Christ: his life, death and resurrection.

Name: LEV AHARON FOUNDATION
Description: The LEV AHARON FOUNDATION is a foundation designated to preserve the historical elements and continue the legacy of Harav Aharon Walkin Zatzal.

Name: The Lumen Institute
Description:
The Lumen Institute is a non-profit organization that provides highly personalized formation for business executives and societal leaders. Its mission is to form Christian leaders to illuminate society with the light of Christ. Through its core values of Character, Faith, and Leadership, it helps to educate and train those who have significant influence to be faithful stewards within their families, businesses, and the broader community. 

It was founded in 2005 by a small group of New York businessmen and priests in response to a critical need for virtuous formation for today's leaders. Lumen has grown to have chapters in many major cities around the United States and is also expanding internationally. To learn more, visit: lumeninstitute.org

Name: Salam Universitas Indonesia
Description: Student Islamic Religious Services, Universitas Indonesia

Name: Crossway Baptist Church
Description:
Crossway is one church based in Melbourne, Australia that loves God, loves people and makes disciples. We have services in English, Mandarin, Cantonese, Indonesian and Korean. To find out more about Crossway visit

Sunday Service Times: 8:45am, 10:15am, 11:45am, 6pm

Name: Sisters in Christ : Women of Purpose, Daughters of Promise
Description:
Sisters in Christ: Women of Purpose, Daughters of Promise exists to create sacred, transformative spaces where women encounter God, embrace intentional discipleship, and discover their divine identity — crowned with beauty instead of ashes, in fulfillment of Isaiah 61:3.
We are building a Christ-centered sisterhood rooted in faith, love, and authenticity — where women are discipled, seen, heard, and uplifted. Through our Vision & Legacy Office, Kingdom Impact & its 7 Pillars, and Resilience University, we cultivate environments of spiritual formation, emotional restoration, and personal empowerment.
These spaces are designed to foster deep connection, biblical truth, and lasting transformation — equipping women to live as disciples, daughters of promise, and leaders of impact in their homes, churches, and communities as we declare, “Maranatha — Come, Lord Jesus.”
“…to bestow on them a crown of beauty instead of ashes…” — Isaiah 61:3

Name: Christian Game Developers Community
Description: The Christian Game Developers Conference is the largest gathering with the purpose of encouraging game developers, in both software and traditional mediums, to apply Christian principles to their industry.

Name: Fellowship Church Knoxville
Description: We want to share the story God is unfolding in this place...the moments that have shaped us most, the beliefs and core values that define us, the unique ways God has called us to serve, live out the Gospel together, and make disciples. Our desire is for everyone who gathers in worship here to experience meaningful connection to the Body of Christ and to join in this movement as partners in the Gospel. In all things, it is our hope to be... grounded in truth, faithful in obedience, generous in love and fruitful in disciple-making.

Name: Christian Businesses in Kent (CBiK)
Description: We are a networking group for the Christian Business People of Kent and surrounding areas. Please do join in with our free online networking opportunities. Follow this page for regular updates.

Name: Orthodox Christian Prison Ministry
Description: Orthodox Christian Prison Ministry (OCPM) is an agency of the Assembly of Canonical Orthodox Bishops of the United States. For Orthodox Christians who have been arrested for crimes, OCPM helps them return to the Faith, offering forgiveness and reconciliation with Christ. For both Orthodox and non-Orthodox alike, OCPM provides spiritual care, enabling prisoners to find hope and purpose in their lives.

Name: Holy Cross Lutheran Church
Description:
A Reconciling in Christ congregation of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in America. 

Our Mission Statement: "United by Christ, we reflect God's love through joyful service to all people."

Our Welcome Statement: "We model Jesus’ radical love by embracing all. Created in God’s image, you are welcome at Christ’s table with us regardless of your ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, age, ability, or life circumstances."

Name: Ma'ayanot Yeshiva High School
Description: Ma'ayanot is an all-girls Modern Orthodox High School in Teaneck, New Jersey. Ma'ayanot provides a rigorous college preparatory education, characterized by an educational approach that empowers students to master independent, text-based study in both Jewish and general studies. Ma'ayanot students benefit from a fantastic array of co-curricular activities and from a warm, nurturing, student-centered environment in which they develop strong relationships with faculty members, guidance counselors, and students in all grades. At Ma'ayanot, students learn to take initiative, build relationships, find their creative talents and their voices, and be active, independent learners. Please explore our website to learn about all of the areas in which Ma'ayanot provides opportunities for students to learn, grow, and flourish.

Name: RiverTree Christian Church
Description: We want to see everyone in Northeast Ohio wake up to the Lordship of Jesus Christ. Our churches, leadership center, coffee shop, and school help everyone connected to them wake up daily to the Lordship of Jesus by equipping them to be disciple-makers, celebrating the Gospel each weekend through in-person and online gatherings, and by linking arms with other churches and organizations, forming regional Kingdom networks.

Name: Bispo Macedo
Description: O fundador da Igreja Universal do Reino de Deus, bispo Edir Macedo, 65 anos, nasceu no Rio de Janeiro. Em 1963, iniciou a carreira no funcionalismo público: tornou-se contínuo na Loteria do Estado do Rio de Janeiro, a Loterj, e trabalhou no Instituto Brasileiro de Geografia e Estatística, o IBGE, como pesquisador no censo econômico de 1970. Chegou a completar 16 anos de carreira como funcionário público. Deixou o cargo para se dedicar à Obra de Deus, o que na época foi considerado por algumas pessoas uma loucura.

Name: Historical Society of the Episcopal Church
Description: The Historical Society of the Episcopal Church is a 501(c)(3) religious organization whose office is located in Mineral Point, Wisconsin, United States.

Name: Temple Beth Elohim
Description:
Temple Beth Elohim is a warm and inclusive Reform congregation, dedicated to creating a sacred community engaged in joyous, participatory and meaningful prayer, lifelong Jewish learning, excellence and innovation in education, and dedicated social activism. We are a magnet congregation of more than 1,200 families from more than 37 different cities and towns from the suburbs of Boston. 

We are committed to realizing the idea of our synagogue as a sacred home driven by Jewish values. 

We are steadfast in our efforts to cultivate an open and caring atmosphere in which all members are actively involved in the life of the congregation, the State of Israel, and the local, national and international Jewish communities, building bridges of understanding with other faith communities through communication, study, and a respectful exchange of thoughts and ideas.

Name: Gross Schechter Day School
Description: Dedicated to providing children an education equally outstanding in general and Judaic studies, in an engaging, empowering environment based on Conservative Judaism, so they become committed to Jewish life and emerge as leaders in the Jewish and general communities.

Name: CITAM Karen
Description:
Christ Is the Answer Ministries (CITAM) formerly known as Nairobi Pentecostal Church was established in 1959, as a ministry of Pentecostal Assemblies of Canada (PAOC).

In 2003 Nairobi Pentecostal Church changed its name to Christ is the Answer Ministries (CITAM) and registered as an autonomous independent entity under the Societies Act of Kenya.

The new name is drawn from our well-known motto “Christ is the Answer” believing that only Jesus Christ can provide the answers to human challenges and needs.

Name: Connect Ministries, Inc.
Description:
Connect Ministries exists to help churches meet new people. 

We execute experiences to help your church gain new relationships with their community, without the stress of planning events alone. 

Having helped over 2,000 churches connect with over 500,000 people, our team is ready to support churches to leave a lasting legacy in their community.

Name: Fondazione Cortile dei Gentili
Description:
La Fondazione Cortile dei Gentili è stata istituita dal Card. Gianfranco Ravasi, su invito di Papa Benedetto XVI, per promuovere il dialogo tra credenti e non credenti sui grandi temi e le sfide che interessano la società contemporanea.

Da più di 10 anni la Fondazione, che è presieduta dal Prof. Giuliano Amato e lavora in stretta connessione con il Dicastero vaticano per la Cultura e l'Educazione, organizza e promuove incontri, dibattiti, progetti e ricerche per stimolare un dialogo concreto e costruttivo tra il mondo laico e quello cattolico. Con questo obiettivo, ogni anno affronta e approfondisce tematiche di attualità che riguardano la spiritualità, l'etica, la scienza, l'economia, la cultura, lo sport, la legalità, l'intelligenza artificiale e molto altro.

Affermatosi come luogo privilegiato di incontro e confronto tra personalità di spicco del mondo della cultura, dei media e delle imprese, il "Cortile dei Gentili" è uno spazio aperto al pluralismo delle idee, la cui importanza è stata ribadita più volte anche da Papa Francesco.

Name: Reformierte Kirchen Bern-Jura Solothurn
Description: Zum Einzugsgebiet der Reformierten Kirchen Bern-Jura-Solothurn gehören über 200 Kirchgemeinden. In den Kirchgemeinden findet ein vielfältiges Angebot statt.

Name: Southside Church
Description: Southside Church exists to inspire and equip people to follow Jesus by engaging them in the life and mission of the church.

Name: CatholcisimRocks
Description: CatholicismRocks is a media ministry that serves Christ by explaining and defending the Catholic faith. We help Christians grow in their faith; we bring former Catholics home; and we lead non-Catholics into the fullness of the faith.

Name: Love Thy Neighborhood
Description:
Our mission is to disciple Christians to serve their neighbors, cultivate healthy relationships and follow Jesus in their culture and context. 

Our vision is a community of relationally and culturally competent Christians who walk together in the life and lifestyle of Jesus.

To accomplish this, we run an urban missions program for young adults, as well as provide discipleship content through podcasts, workshops and books for Christians from all walks of life.

Name: Bishop Mclaughlin Catholic High School
Description: Bishop McLaughlin Catholic High School is a religious educational institution based out of the United States.

Name: Dallas Willard Ministries
Description:
Dallas Willard Ministries exists to continue to develop and promote the ideas, writings, and teachings that the Lord brought to the world through Dallas Willard. We do not focus our efforts on Dallas himself, but on the truth toward which he was always directing his “fellow pilgrims.” 

Our Vision: To equip people to live in a daily interactive relationship with God through a fresh hearing of Jesus’ life and teachings. (See our expanded Vision statement)

Our Intention: To present the reality of the kingdom of God now on earth and available to all. We are committed to empowering people to step into their “eternal destiny in God’s great universe.”

Our Means: God has graciously blessed DWM with dedicated partners, plans and opportunities to make our vision an increasing reality.

Our Core Values:
Cultivating disciples of Jesus, not generating Dallas Willard enthusiasts.
Empowering people with the VIM for transformation into Christlikeness.
Training people to think and act on what the Bible teaches.
Equipping Christians as they follow Jesus in their world in His Kingdom now.

Name: SIGMA ALPHA OMEGA CHRISTIAN SORORITY INC
Description:
Sigma Alpha Omega, "SAO", is a non-denominational, Christian national social sorority that is first founded in Christ and second founded in sisterhood. We encourage each other to grow in the Lord and in the Word while holding one another accountable through our friendships.

Together, we pursue the Biblical ideals of Christian leadership, sisterhood, spiritual development, campus leadership, good scholarship, fine standards, service, excellence, and love through life in Christ. We enjoy Christian fellowship through Bible studies, service projects, social activities, and more.

We are already sisters in Christ, so it feels natural for us to operate as a social sorority providing women a Christian focus in university Greek Life.

 

Depending on the campus, Sigma Alpha Omega can be classified as a club or as a Greek Special Interest Group. Sigma Alpha Omega is not a part of Panhellenic or Inter-Fraternity Conferences or other National Councils. 

www.sigmaalphaomega.org

Name: Youthfront
Description:
Founded in 1943, Youthfront, Inc., a nonprofit organization, provides leadership, and character-building programs for students. By equipping them with a sense of responsibility and a strong spiritual foundation, Youthfront believes these students will become positive contributors to their schools, employers, families, churches, and communities.  

Youthfront operates two camps, national and international community development projects, Something To Eat food packaging, mercy and justice initiatives, and other training and service events.

Name: Holy Trinity
Description: We are a Catholic family who loves, grows, and lives in faith through Jesus Christ!  In 1880, 20 Catholic families requested permission to form a parish. The request was granted and Holy Trinity was founded.  Today we have 2,500 registered families, equaling around 8,000 people.  Our Award-Winning Catholic school is the largest parochial school by enrollment in the state of Kansas.  Come by for a visit!

Name: Frälsningsarmén socialt arbete
Description: Frälsningsarmén har hjälpt människor i över hundra år. Det har gett oss en stor erfarenhet av att se till varje människas behov i sin helhet. Vi bedriver evidensbaserad vård och omsorg av människor i utsatthet, och i vårt nätverk av verksamheter kan vi hjälpa människor hela vägen.

Name: Financial Planning Ministry
Description:
Financial Planning Ministry…For over 40 years, a New Dimension in Stewardship! Celebrating serving 47,000 families, over 150 ministry partners and $2.5 billion in gift designations to Christian ministries. 

Financial Planning Ministry is not a law firm and does not give legal advice. The information provided is for educational purposes only. Both information and forms provided are not substitutes for an attorney's advice or services.

Name: INTERNATIONAL CHURCH OF THE FOURSQUARE GOSPEL
Description: INTERNATIONAL CHURCH OF THE FOURSQUARE GOSPEL is a religious institutions company based out of 1910 SUNSET BLVD SUITE 200, LOS ANGELES, California, United States.

Name: College Park Church Indianapolis
Description:
College Park Church is a vibrant church on a mission to ignite a passion to follow Jesus. Founded in 1985, College Park Church has a rich heritage rooted in the core values of the pre-eminence of Jesus, the authority of the Word, redemptive community, biblical unity in diversity, extravagant grace, and the call to go.  

College Park’s story includes being able to reach the unreached globally, serve  our city, and pursue the unchurched populations in our region through outreach and a unique campus model of multi-site campuses becoming locally self-governing churches.

Come worship with us on Sundays at 9 or 10:45 a.m.

Name: The Greater Allen A.M.E. Cathedral of New York
Description:
Former U.S. Congressman, the Reverend Dr. Floyd H. Flake is the senior pastor of the more than 23,000 member Greater Allen A. M. E. Cathedral of New York in Jamaica, Queens.  

Allen has become one of the nation’s foremost Christian churches. It is listed among the top 100 churches in America in Outreach Magazine’s Annual Survey.  The Greater Allen Cathedral’s operations are a national paradigm of church-centered, faith based, public/private community educational and economic development. Further, Allen’s administrative structure, efficiency, and development efforts have increasingly attracted international and national recognition in print and electronic media.

The church also owns expansive commercial and residential developments and various commercial and social service enterprises, which has placed it among the nation’s most productive religious and urban development institutions.  The corporations, church administrative offices, school, and ministries comprise one of the Borough of Queens’ largest private sector employers.

Name: Fourth Presbyterian Church, Bethesda
Description: We seek to glorify God by making disciples of Jesus Christ through Christ-Centered Worship, Gospel-Shaped Community, Kingdom-Advancing Multiplication, and Neighbor-Loving Service. God has upheld each of Fourth’s eight Senior Pastors as they have committed to preaching his Word and spreading the gospel message in this city and to the uttermost parts of the world.

Name: Fellowship Dallas
Description: Fellowship Dallas is Bible church right in the heart of the Dallas metroplex. Our vision is to awaken people to their unique God-given purpose and to help them share the hope of the Gospel through their gifts, talents, and passions. We get real in honest relationships, get moving by challenge each other to act on God’s next step for our lives, get together as diverse generations, ethnicities, and backgrounds, and get out beyond the walls to transform our homes, communities, and world.

Name: Saint Clement Parish
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT
Rooted in the richness of Catholic tradition, Saint Clement is a welcoming, respectful, and vibrant parish community, on a common journey toward holiness.

Empowered by the liturgy, we worship together and deepen our faith in Jesus Christ through Sacraments, prayer, service, spiritual formation and education.

Grateful to God for our many blessings, we have a sacred responsibility to share our gifts, serve the common good, make a meaningful difference in people's lives and respond to the challenge to live the Gospel every day.

VISION STATEMENT
Striving for deeper holiness, greater communion and wider service.

Our Five Anchors are Belong. Pray. Serve. Give. Learn.

Name: Restoration Project
Description: Transformative experiences and resources to help men become more aware, connected, and intentional with their lives. We envision a world where men are men as God intended.

Name: IQRA
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of the International Quran Research Association (IQRA'). Our association is a group of scholars and scientists dedicated to the study of the Qur'an. Our community includes scholars, students, publishers, and the interested public who share a passion for advancing Quranic research.

Our mission is to produce high-quality content such as commentaries, translations, books, research papers, articles, and multimedia resources to foster a contemporary understanding of the Qur'an. We use multidisciplinary research methods, employing diverse knowledge to produce work that reflects the richness and complexity of the Qur'an.

As an official IQRA member, you will have access to exclusive member benefits, including access to our experts, leaders, and partners. You will also have the opportunity to engage in vibrant discussions with fellow scholars and researchers.

Our vision is to advance a contemporary understanding of the Qur'an continuously. We believe that the Qur'an is a dynamic and living text, and our goal is to deepen our understanding of its message and its relevance to our lives today.

As a respected institution of Qur'anic research, we are committed to fostering an inclusive and supportive community of learners and researchers. We welcome scholars, students, and the interested public to join us in our mission to advance the study of the Qur'an.

In addition to our research, IQRA' is committed to outreach and engagement with broader communities. The Qur'an has much to offer the world, and we strive to share its message and insights through public lectures, seminars, and workshops. We are dedicated to promoting interfaith dialogue and understanding, as we believe that such discussion can help build bridges of understanding between different communities.

Thank you for visiting our page, and we look forward to connecting with you. 

May Allah guide us all on the path of knowledge and understanding.

Name: Christian Surfers International
Description: Since the late 1970’s Christian Surfers has been reaching out to surfers. We have a passion for Jesus, a passion for surfing and passion for our world surfing communities. Christian Surfers International was born in 1999 when Christian Surfer groups from a number of countries joined together as an international movement. Learn more at http://www.christiansurfers.net/about-us/

Name: Russian Orthodox Church Outside of Russia
Description: The Russian Orthodox Church Outside of Russia [Russian Orthodox Church Abroad] is an autonomous part of the Russian Orthodox Church, Moscow Patriarchate. The current First-Hierarch of the ROCOR is Metropolitan Nicholas (Olhovsky).

Name: The Friends of Israel Gospel Ministry
Description:
Our mission is to bring physical and spiritual comfort to the Jewish people while teaching about Israel and the Messiah.

Over 85 years ago, the Friends of Israel Gospel Ministry (FOI) was founded as a compassionate effort to meet the spiritual and physical needs of Jewish people whose lives were displaced and tragically affected by the Holocaust.

Since its inception in 1938, the ministry continues to stand against every form of anti-Semitism and support the right of the Jewish people to live in their ancient homeland, Israel.

Additionally, FOI actively invests in the edification of Christians by teaching Scripture that exemplifies why loving the Jewish people and supporting Israel is integral to the Christian faith. Today, FOI’s presence spans the globe with ministry workers serving Jewish people worldwide.

Name: Shalem Institute for Spiritual Formation
Description:
Shalem serves those who seek spiritual deepening in all of life.  We welcome you wherever you are on the path of spiritual discovery.  

Shalem's programs center on contemplative teaching and practices that open the mind and awaken the heart to the living Spirit.  Shalem is grounded in the Christian contemplative tradition, yet we draw on the wisdom of many religious traditions.  We provide opportunity for spiritual exploration individually and within a community of seekers.  

Shalem is one of the most respected centers for spiritual deepening in the U.S. and globally.  For 40 years, we have been privileged to have on staff and in our programs many of the world's foremost spiritual speakers and writers.

Name: Fourth Presbyterian Church
Description:
A vibrant worshiping and serving community, the Fourth Presbyterian Church of Chicago is made up of more than 5,400 members from diverse backgrounds, denominations, and faith traditions.

Across from the John Hancock Center and located at the  heart of the city, on Chicago's Magnificent Mile, Fourth Church has been an active presence on North Michigan Avenue since 1914.

Name: Worship Security Academy
Description: Church Security Training for Volunteers, Staff and Safety Leaders.

Name: Jubilé en 4L 2025
Description: C’est reparti pour l’aventure en 4L, cette fois-ci direction le Jubilé des Jeunes à Rome en juillet 2025 !

Name: Quran in Arabic
Description:
رسالة الإسلام الخالدة
أرجو أن تعجبكم الأقوال والأقوال الإسلامية التي تم جمعها وتجدها مفيدة.
Quran in Arabic - القران الكريم باللغة العربية

ইসলামের চিরন্তনীবাণী 
সংগৃহীত ইসলামিক উক্তি ও বানী আশা করি আপনার অনেক ভালো লাগবে এবং কাজে দিবে।

Name: Diocese of Gary
Description: As members of the Body of Christ, the people of the Roman Catholic community of the  Diocese of Gary, diverse but united  through Baptism and empowered by the Holy Spirit, nourished by Word and Sacrament, are called to continue the mission of Jesus by being a sign and instrument of God’s kingdom of truth, peace, justice, and love.

Name: Cáritas Diocesana de Granada
BROTHERS IN ARMS NL
Description:
VANDAAG IS DE DAG VAN DE REDDING
Als ik vandaag sterf, ga ik dan naar de hemel?
Waarom zou iemand de belangrijkste beslissing die hij ooit in zijn leven zou kunnen nemen, over het eeuwige leven, uitstellen?

Want omdat God zo liefdevol en goed is, heeft Hij jullie gered door jullie geloof. Jullie hebben niet jezelf gered, maar Gód heeft jullie gered. Het is zíjn geschenk. Jullie zijn dus niet gered doordat jullie zelf zo goed je best deden om goede mensen te zijn. Want Hij wilde niet dat jullie over je redding zouden kunnen opscheppen. 
EFEZIËRS 2:8-9

A.	Admit you’re a sinner
B.	Believe Jesus is Lord
C.	Call upon His name

DE APOSTEL PAULUS VERTELT ONS WAT HET EVANGELIE IS
Broeders en zusters, ik wil jullie herinneren aan het goede nieuws dat ik jullie heb verteld. Jullie hebben het geloofd en het is de basis van jullie leven geworden. Jullie zijn door dat goede nieuws ook gered. Maar jullie moeten het wel precies zó blijven geloven als ik het jullie heb verteld. Anders zijn jullie voor niets tot geloof gekomen.

Ik heb jullie het belangrijkste van het goede nieuws geleerd. En dat is: Christus is gestorven voor al onze ongehoorzaamheid aan God. Dat was ook van tevoren in de Boeken opgeschreven.  Hij is begraven en op de derde dag weer uit de dood opgestaan. Ook dat was van tevoren in de Boeken opgeschreven. 
1 KORINTHE 15:1-4

A Geef toe dat je een zondaar bent. Dit is waar dat goddelijke verdriet leidt tot oprecht berouw voor het zondigen tegen de rechtvaardige God en er is een verandering van hart, wij veranderen van gedachten en God verandert ons hart en herstelt ons van binnenuit.
B Geloof in uw hart dat Jezus Christus stierf voor je zonden, werd begraven en dat God Jezus uit de dood heeft opgewekt. Dit betekent met heel je hart vertrouwen dat Jezus Christus is wie Hij zei dat Hij was.
C Roep de naam van de Heer aan. Dit betekent met heel je hart vertrouwen dat Jezus Christus is wie Hij zei dat Hij was.

Name: Glorieta Adventure Camps
Description:
Nestled in the Southern Rockies, Glorieta is a mountain escape that has adventure for everyone – from casual camper, to outdoor adventurer, to extreme sports enthusiast. While the mild climate and outdoor activities draw them here, the transformations many experience have the greatest impact on their lives.

Glorieta Camps are filled with activities and programs that are loaded with fun and tailored to inspire lives towards a deeper relationship with Christ. Our programs are built to tackle tough issues head-on with humility, straight talk and uncompromising Biblical perspectives.
Our camps are operated by a fun-loving staff that is comprised of devoted, inspired and specially trained believers who are passionate about providing a morally, emotionally and physically sound environment that is safe, inspiring, and life changing for our campers. It’s in our DNA.

Our Mission is to inspire Christ-like change through outdoor adventure, authentic relationships, and Biblical truth.
Our Vision is to fully utilize the resources God has given us, inspiring each individual to leave Glorieta more Christ-like, ready to make a difference in their own life, home and community.
And we do it all in a super fun and inspiring way that’s designed to “Get ’em off the Couch!” and bring the best out in every single camper.

Glorieta is more than just a summer camp but it also is a connnecting hub for retreats of all kinds. Corporations, schools, social gratherings and personal hobbies are some examples of retreats who have chosen Glorieta.

Name: Arquidiócesis Primada de México A. R.
Description:
Somos la Iglesia de la Ciudad de México.

La Arquidiócesis Primada de México es una comunidad de discípulos misioneros que actúa como fermento de vida cristiana entre los habitantes de la capital del país para ayudarles a vivir en comunión con Dios.

Como Iglesia particular fue creada el 2 de septiembre de 1530 y elevada a Metropolitana el 12 de febrero de 1546. Comprende en la actualidad gran parte del territorio de la Ciudad de México, que comparte con las diócesis de Xochimilco, Iztapalapa y Azcapotzalco.
