El Sr. Cardenal Carlos Aguiar Retes, quien gobierna pastoralmente este territorio, sucedió al Cardenal Norberto Rivera Carrera el 5 de febrero de 2018, como Arzobispo Primado de México, convirtiéndose así en el trigésimo sexto sucesor de Fray Juan de Zumárraga.

Los fieles laicos, las religiosas, los religiosos, los diáconos y los presbíteros, todos en unidad y comunión con el Arzobispo, y bajo el amparo de Santa María de Guadalupe, formamos una Iglesia local, pero que a su vez es signo y realización concreta de la Iglesia Universal, que es Una, Santa, Católica y Apostólica.

Name: International Project
Description:
International Project exists to initiate church plants through Unreached People Groups living outside their homeland.

We have teams internationally and stateside.

Name: Orchard Hill Church
Description:
Orchard Hill is an inter-denominational Christian church, located in the Pittsburgh area, where everyone is welcome. Whether you are a follower of Jesus Christ or you are still considering if God has a place in your life, this is a community where you can explore faith and the reality of Jesus Christ.

In the 1980's, a handful of people responded to the many around them who were without a church home - the people who thought that God had no relevance in their world. They made a commitment to look at church from a new perspective and wanted to connect people who had become disillusioned with church to the truth of God's love.

As a result, these people chose to invest their lives to develop a contemporary biblical community in a modern-day world, a community that would be relevant in today's culture while teaching the timeless truths of the Bible. This community began with 54 founding members who built far more than a structure. They began a new kind of church. On May 6, 1989, over 400 people attended the opening of Orchard Hill Church.

Today, over 3,000 people call Orchard Hill their church home. A second location is open in the Strip District of downtown Pittsburgh and a third location in Butler County. Through ministries for adults, students, and kids, this is a place to discover the Bible on your own level and at your own pace. Through a commitment to community and Life Groups, Orchard Hill is a place where you can connect with others in a way that is comfortable for you. No matter what you believe about God or what you think about church, you are welcome here.

The purpose of Orchard Hill Church remains the same - to present the message of Jesus Christ and his grace that brings about transformation from the inside out.

Name: iAAMOG Ministries
Description:
iAAMOG Ministries

Love Jesus . Love Others . Make Disciples

Name: Diocese of Knoxville
Description: I'm webmaster for our new site, dioknox.org, and editor of The East Tennessee Catholic newspaper.

Name: Partners in Ministry
Description: Partners in Ministry are seeking Church renewal by equipping leaders to flourish under God. We support and equip Church Leaders to effectively lead their churches in Christ’s mission and to build a culture of discipleship, evangelism and leadership development.

Name: Great Plains United Methodist Conference
Description:
The Great Plains Conference has more than 220,000 United Methodists across Kansas and Nebraska in more than 1,000 churches. 

Our calling is to equip and connect congregations to make disciples of Jesus Christ. The conference brings specific focus to Christ-centered excellence in ministry, preaching and worship, engaging our communities and transforming service to the world.

Name: Grace Fellowship
Description:
Grace Fellowship is a community seeking God together.  Anyone from any walk of life is welcome. We desire to cultivate an atmosphere where people of all ages can be real… A place where there is love, acceptance and honesty.  A place where you can discover God for yourself.

Check it out on Sundays at 9 & 10:30am!

Name: Grace Assembly of God (Singapore)
Description:
Grace Assembly seeks to raise Spirit-filled Gracians who love God, love people, and make disciples of Jesus Christ within and beyond the church walls.

We are a church that welcomes and encourages the intergenerational family to worship and grow together as the Body of Christ.

More People, More Like Jesus

Name: Christ Community Church - Kansas City
Description: Christ Community Evangelical Free Church is one church with multiple locations in the Kansas City metro area whose mission is to be a caring family of multiplying disciples influencing our community and world for Jesus Christ. Christ Community currently meets in five locations - Brookside, Downtown, Leawood, Olathe, and Shawnee Mission.

Name: Grace Family Church, South Africa
Description: Grace Family Church is a contemporary, independent church that meets in five locations: Ballito, uMhlanga, Riverside, Cornubia, and Online. We are passionate about God, His people, and joining His mission to heal the world. All are welcome at Grace and we say, “COME AS YOU ARE”.

Name: OSCAR
Description:
OSCAR provides information, advice and resources for anyone interested or involved in Christian mission work.

OSCAR is mostly, but not exclusively, aimed at UK Christians, whether they are based in the UK or around the world. More specifically, OSCAR is useful for:

Christian and mission workers on the frontline. 
Christians open to the possibility of serving God in mission or ministry.
Christian and mission workers recently returned from their place of work. 
Supporters of Christian and mission workers and mission in general. 
Non-UK Christians coming to the UK as Christian workers. 
Anyone responsible for 'resourcing' any of the above. 
If your work or interest falls into one or more of these categories, OSCAR is designed to take the 'leg work' out of finding related information. It helps you locate the organisations, services and resources you need and puts you in complete control of managing your own situation, whether you're a frontline worker, supporter or enquirer.

Name: Islamic Center of Greater Cincinnati
Description:
The Islamic Educational Council (IEC) envisioned the ICGC as a world-class American institution that models Islamic principles and spirituality while promoting education and service to our greater community.

Mission

The Islamic Educational Council at the Islamic Center of Greater Cincinnati’s purpose is to:
- Serve the regional Muslim community in fulfilling its communal and individual obligations as mainstream Muslim Americans meeting their religious obligations and spiritual needs;
- Establish and maintain a high caliber, multi-faceted and inclusive Islamic institution serving as a resource for the community;
- Promote cooperation, religious understanding and community harmony through outreach, education on Islam, and collective work countering ignorance, prejudice and bigotry; and
- Serve community needs within its capacity and in partnership to improve the status and well-being of Muslim Americans and the community at large.

Goals
- Strengthen Our Relationships: with Allah swt (One God), across our diverse ICGC community, and with our greater American community
- Enhance Our Educational Offerings: In the areas of Religious, Outreach, Collaboration, and Social Services
- Raise ICGC’s Regional and National Profile: Through programs and services that reflect the practices of a professional Islamic Institution

Name: International Association for Refugees (IAFR)
Description:
IAFR was established in 2009 in response to the need for an international Christian non-profit to help people survive and recover from forced displacement.

OUR WORK
We serve women, children and men who are uprooted from their homes by rampant violence, war, gross violations of human rights, and/or persecution.

We focus on long-term recovery work that serves to break isolation, strengthen community, build capacity, facilitate healing, promote reconciliation, deepen faith and generate hope.

We connect local churches along the Refugee Highway (including refugee churches) with the church-at-large in ways that preserve dignity and help people survive and recover from forced displacement.

OUR FOUNDER
IAFR Founder and President, Tom Albinson, has served among refugees full-time since 1981 bringing a wealth of experience, understanding and relationships to IAFR.

TRAINING & RESOURCES
IAFR's refugee ministry training is sought after internationally by people, churches, agencies, and ministry networks. Our ministry and advocacy resources are used by churches and practitioners around the world to raise awareness, train and equip people for service among the forcibly displaced.

GET INVOLVED
Be Informed: A good starting point is to visit www.IAFR.org and subscribe to IAFR Emails to keep informed about current refugee realities and IAFR ministry.

DONATE: Financial partners make a tangible difference in the lives of forcibly displaced men, women and children through IAFR ministries and projects. No gift is too small to make a difference.

SERVE: Volunteers help with numerous tasks that are essential to the on-going success of our ministry. While many opportunities are behind-the-scenes, they truly impact the work of IAFR and the lives of the refugees we serve. We also have opportunities for short-term and long-term service. 

CONTACT: Email: info@iafr.org

Name: Especially For Youth - EFY
Description:
At Especially for Youth (EFY), we’re dedicated to strengthening youth in their commitment to live the gospel of Jesus Christ by providing inspiring and edifying learning opportunities and wholesome social experiences.
We are a summer program sponsored by Brigham Young University and hold sessions all over the country. Sessions range from 300-1300 youth from 14-18 years old. Our staff are the key to our success and they undergo a rigorous schedule that is rich with leadership experience. Your people skills will never grow more than when you get to help a teenager who doesn't want to be here end up having the best week of their life. You'll never have a better networking opportunity than working 24/7 alongside many of the brightest, most talented Young Single Adults in the country.

Name: Church of the Common Ground
Description:
The Church of the Common Ground is a worshiping community of the Episcopal Diocese of Atlanta. We are a “church without walls” on the streets of Atlanta, providing support for the pastoral and spiritual needs of women, men and youth who live on the margins of our city. We welcome people of all faith backgrounds, and those who seek a new connection to faith.

Common Ground aims to be a faithful, consistent presence and a witness to Christ’s love for all people. We work to share the good news with the un-housed, the urban poor and other underserved people that they are God’s beloved. We offer comfort and relationship through pastoral, social and health care connections and referrals.

Annually, approximately 5,000 people worship, pray and share fellowship with one another at Church of the Common Ground services and programs. Our core congregation membership is 50 to 60 people.

Name: BCM International
Description: Bible Centered Ministries (BCM) International is an international faith-based community dedicated to ministering with children and strengthening churches worldwide. BCM has thousands of missionaries and volunteers serving in over 55 countries across five continents. We are committed to making disciples of all age groups for the Lord Jesus Christ through evangelism, teaching and training so that churches are established and the Church strengthened.

Name: St. Andrew's Lutheran Church - MN
Description:
St. Andrew’s Lutheran Church is a vibrant community of Christ followers, living in faith every day. We gather in person at our campus in Mahtomedi, Minnesota, and online via this website. We’re part of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in America (ELCA) and bring a range of experiences and perspectives to our community. We’re diverse in opinion, but united in our mission to help the whole world know the healing power of Christ’s love.

Our Mission: Proclaim Jesus Christ, Live in Christ, Serve! 

Our Vision: Empowered by God’s love, we help transform lives, communities and the world so that everyone may know Christ’s healing power.

Name: Pastor Bob Tousey, Christian Life Events Ministries
Description:
Pastor Bob is a non-denominational Christian Concierge Pastor striving provide you with a church without walls. Today, for various reasons many Christians do not have a physical church to call home, but have a need for clergy. Whatever the reason Pastor Bob wants to be there to serve you.



Pastor Bob's concierge ministry fulfills your family's needs, whether they be Weddings, Funerals, Dedications, Believer Baptisms, Sick Call Visits, etc... while at the same time, if you desire, help you in your search for a church and Pastor that you are comfortable with.



Pastor Bob is a graduate of Liberty University's Rawlings School of Divinity having earned a Masters in Christian Ministry and is a traditionally ordained Pastor. In addition to his seminary degree he also holds Graduate Certificates in Pastoral Counseling and Christian Leadership. Pastor Bob has served (2015-2019) as Faith Commissioner and Chair of the Governor's Commission on Suicide Prevention. He is also a Certified SYMBIS Facilitator.

Name: Community Presbyterian Church
Description:
Our mission is to reach people and follow Jesus. At CPC, we believe being for others, like God is for us, can change the world. To find out more information on our denomination, background, and programs we offer, visit cpcdanville.org.
Join us for a service on Sunday at 9AM & 10:45AM, or online.

Name: Apostólica Church
Description:
Apostólica Church é uma Assembleia de Deus contemporânea que vive os valores da Igreja de Atos 2: Uma vida na Palavra, na Comunidade, na Justiça Social e na Busca pela presença de Deus. Somos parte do movimento iniciado pelo Espírito Santo em Los Angeles no ano de 1906. 

Esse é o nosso tempo!
-
Apostólica Church is a contemporary Assembly of God that lives the values of the Church in Acts 2: A life in the Word, Community, Social Justice and seeking for the presence of God. We are part of the movement initiated by the Holy Spirit in Los Angeles in 1906.

This is our time!

Name: Pathway To Paradise Ministries
Description: We are a Christian media production company that shares the everlasting gospel and the Three Angels' Messages with the world. We work with local churches to present public evangelistic series and revival seminars. We also conduct online evangelism and publish digital and print Bible study resources.

Name: MentorMe of West Michigan
Description: We are a non-profit mentoring organization located in West Michigan. We hire mentors who have a desire to follow God's will and have a consistent, positive impact in the life of students. Our mentors are sold out to the cause of Jesus Christ, and have a passion for seeing lives changed for the glory of God! Visit our website to learn more about us!

Name: Leeds Beckett University Islamic Society
Description:
The official page for Leeds Beckett Islamic Society.

Our society is dedicated to fostering a supportive, inclusive, and vibrant community for Muslim students and anyone interested in learning about Islam!

Through social events, educational workshops, interfaith dialogues, and community service, we aim to build bridges, promote understanding, and encourage personal growth.

Name: The Billy Graham Training Center at The Cove
Description: Billy Graham Training Ctr is a religious institutions company based out of 1 Porters Cove Rd, Asheville, North Carolina, United States.

Name: Alberta Seventh-day Adventist Conference
Description: The Alberta Seventh-day Adventist Conference is the administrative body for 86 Adventist congregations (serving over 12,000 members), eleven elementary schools, a bookstore, a camp, and a nursing home in Alberta and the Northwest Territories, Canada.

Name: Catholic Funeral & Cemetery Services of the Diocese of Sacramento
Description:
Catholic Funeral & Cemetery Services is a full service provider of Eng-Of-Life care for the Catholic Community in the Diocese of Sacramento.  We accompany families as they affectionately honor their loved ones in harmony with the Catholic Rites of Christian Burial.  We cooperate with Parishes from Vigil to Mass and the Committal, bringing to all the consolation and mercy of Jesus.  

With 11 cemeteries and four funeral centers serving the Diocese of Sacramento.  We can accommodate you and your family's needs and fulfill your wishes.  Contact us today to learn more about Pre-Need Funeral and Cemetery Planning.

Name: pureHOPE
Description:
Face life’s challenges with Hope and Confidence!

Biblical content focused on identity, sexuality and technology that empower parents to have healthy conversations at home and be the go-to person for their children. It must start at home.

Name: JESUS CHRIST To God Be The Glory Church International, Inc.
Description:
An International One-God Doctrine Christian Organization

To spread the true meaning of the Gospel in all the world, through whatever ways and means based on Acts 2:38: “REPENT AND BE BAPTIZED EVERYONE OF YOU IN THE NAME OF JESUS CHRIST, FOR THE REMISSION OF SINS; AND YOU SHALL RECEIVE THE GIFT OF THE HOLY SPIRIT“; and to teach the church members to live according to the Apostles’ teachings.

To build a Life-Transformed, Heart-Changed Community of Christians cultured by the Ministry of Encouragement.

Name: Curé of Ars Catholic Church
Description:
Welcome to Curé of Ars!

Whether you are looking for a Spiritual Home, visiting from another church or part of the country, or just curious about what Curé of Ars is about,

We are glad that you are here!

Curé of Ars is a Catholic Community centered in the Sacraments, especially in the Eucharist and Reconciliation, dedicated to bringing the Good News of Jesus Christ to our immediate community and beyond. Explore our website http://www.cureofars.com/ or use this brief guide to find what you are looking for: 

Liturgy & Sacraments
• Find information and sign up for the one of the many opportunities for prayer & worship, including how to participate in Liturgical Ministries like Lectoring, Ushering, & Music.

Faith Formation
• Grow in and Learn about the Catholic Faith through these programs for all ages: Religious Education, Catechesis of the Good Shepherd, Junior & Senior High Youth Ministries, Adult Formation, & the Catechumenate program for those wishing to enter the Church.

Ministries
• Join one of the many groups dedicated to enriching your faith experience through fellowship and support.

News/Events
• Find the latest Church events and news in our area and around the world.

Name: Brenda Moore & Associates
Description:
Most ministry and nonprofits leaders struggle with Legacy Giving and endowment growth. Without a Legacy Giving program in place, organizations are squandering their donors' potential and desire for leaving bigger, better and more impactful gifts.

For 40 years, Brenda's vocation has evolved around ministry and money. As a resource development professional for church-related organizations, she's honed her skills and influence at the intersection of faith, family and philanthropy.

With a focus on non cash assets, bequests and endowment growth, Brenda gives you the competence and confidence to integrate planned giving's best practices into your current and future gift fundraising by offering:

- a Legacy Giving Basics online course with group coaching
- a Legacy Giving Coaching program for one or more participants from your organization
- a Legacy Giving Assessment process to research your capacity and recommend a fundraising plan
- a Legacy Leaders Academy workshop for your fundraising staff, board, or a group of organizations

Name: لآ اِلَهَ اِلّا اللّهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُوُل اللّهِ
Description:
Arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّٰهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ ٱللَّٰهِ
Bengali: লা-ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু মুহাম্মাদুর রাসূলুল্লাহ 
English: La Ilaha Illallah Muhammadur Rasulullah.
English Translation: There is no deity but Allah. Prophet Muhammad is his messenger.

Name: Penick Village
Description:
Penick Village is a unique Life Plan community for older adults in North Carolina; located moments away from charming downtown Southern Pines and minutes from historic Pinehurst. Penick Village offers independent living, assisted living, skilled nursing, memory support, and long & short term therapy services all on one campus. This comprehensive range of options provides the most flexibility for active independent living and guaranteed access to a continuum of onsite health care services, if ever needed - for life.
 
As a faith-based nonprofit organization, Penick Village's mission is to cultivate a friendly and safe community where residents have the freedom to focus on their wellness and relationships while living to life's fullest potential.

Name: Congregation Beth El
Description: Congregation Beth El is a friendly, warm, and vibrant congregation located in South Orange, NJ. We are a dynamic, egalitarian Conservative synagogue with a strong commitment to inspiring learning, engaging worship, connection to Israel, and pursuit of social justice. We welcome people of all ages, genders, and backgrounds to join us on our journey: learned and novice; born-Jewish, Jew-by-choice, or non-Jew living Jewish; single or partnered; gay or straight. Our intent is that all who enter find a makom kadosh — a holy space — in which to seek God, connection, and community. Congregation Beth El is home to 450+ households who participate regularly in a wide range of religious, educational and social activities for all ages, from toddlers to seniors, and for all walks of life, from newlyweds to empty nesters and interfaith families to the LGBTQ community.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Salina
Description: We, the Roman Catholic people of the Diocese of Salina, a community of faith united with our bishop, are called to live out the mission of Jesus Christ. Through Baptism we are given the grace of God's salvation and the individual and collective responsibility to continue Christ's mission of advancing the Kingdom of God in the human family. We share our living faith by proclaiming the Gospel in word, worship and service. Therefore, we dedicate ourselves as church to be ministers of the Word of God and to extend our heritage of faith, not only among the communities of northwest and north central Kansas, but among all the peoples of the world.

Name: IVCU Alumni Fellowship
Description: Alumni Fellowship of the Ibadan Varsity Christian Union (IVCU) - IVCU is a student fellowship established in 1960. Over the decades IVCU trained many students of the premier University of Ibadan to reach the world for Christ.

Name: Hillel at Binghamton University
Description: Hillel at Binghamton provides opportunities for Jewish students to challenge, explore and nurture their Jewish identity so they can become Jewish adults and help improve the world.

Name: Catholic Apostolate Center
Description:
The Catholic Apostolate Center, a ministry of the Society of the Catholic Apostolate (Pallottines) - Immaculate Conception Province, was founded in 2011 to respond to the needs of the Church through:

+ Developing, in collaboration with dioceses and other institutions and organizations, formation programs for the New Evangelization.

+ Assisting pastoral ministers in deepening collaboration with one another.

+ Providing formation and apostolic opportunities for members and collaborators of the Union of Catholic Apostolate.

The Center takes its inspiration from the spirituality of St. Vincent Pallotti and achieves its goals through hosting conferences, seminars, webinars, and presentations as well as providing online and print resources.

Name: The Rock Church
Description: See website.

Name: Newbreak Church
Description: Our vision is to be in a city, loving a city, impacting a city for Jesus throughout San Diego one community at a time. When asked what the greatest commandment was, Jesus replied, "'Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength. The second is this: Love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no commandment greater than these." (Mark 12:29-31)

Name: The Father's House
Description: Dave and Donna Patterson are the Lead and Founding Pastors of The Father’s House in Northern California where the church community started with 8 people, in the living room, and is currently 7,500 people in 5 locations. Pastors Dave and Donna have over 30 years’ experience in leading worship, teaching, and pastoring. They also lead The Father’s House Network (related Churches) and speak at conferences nationally and internationally. Their passion is to see people encounter the reality of God and the Body of Christ to experience new levels of God’s presence through worship.

Name: Leicester Cathedral
Description:
Leicester Cathedral is at the physical heart of our city and county. Our church, built on the site of a Roman temple and dedicated to St Martin of Tours, has been embedded in the public, economic, cultural and religious life of this community since medieval times. Since 1927, as the seat of the Bishop of Leicester, we now gather people together for worship, celebration, lament, debate and service of the poor and vulnerable. We offer hospitality to the wider church, the communities of faith which make up our multicultural society and those who come as visitors to the East Midlands, especially in search of the story of King Richard III.
We have found here that God’s love is liberating, transcending all the barriers that separate us and calling us to be a pilgrim people. We meet Jesus Christ afresh daily as we serve those most in physical or spiritual need. Every day we see that those who come as strangers so often leave as friends.

The Very Revd David Monteith, Dean of Leicester

Name: Pagan Federation
King Jesus Ministry
Description: King Jesus Ministry is a religious institutions company based out of 14100 SW 144 AVE, Miami, Florida, United States.

Name: Philadelphia Yearly Meeting
Description:
Philadelphia Yearly Meeting is a faith community comprised of over 100 local Meeting communities in Eastern Pennsylvania, Southern New Jersey, all of Delaware and Eastern Maryland. We practice "unprogrammed" Quaker worship. That is, we gather together in silent worship to wait on the word of God. We do not make use of a paid clergy or sacramental rituals. Rather we meet each other in a friendly atmosphere where anyone who feels strongly led to speak can do so. Many Friends give their time and resources to promote peace, understanding, justice and integrity.
800-2200-PYM
info@pym.org

Name: Congregação das Irmãs de Santa Doroteia da Frassinetti Província América Latina
Description: A Congregação das Irmãs de Santa Doroteia é uma congregação de religiosas católicas, fundada em 12 de agosto de 1834 por Santa Paula Frassinetti. Atualmente, as Irmãs Doroteias estão presentes em várias partes do mundo, trabalhando em colégios, paróquias e comunidades carentes.

Name: Marked Men for Christ Ministry
Description:
Marked Men For Christ ministry (MMFC) has one purpose: To build STRONGER men for JESUS CHRIST (from the inside-out). It is an Intense-Masculine-Powerful experience! We invite men to go deep into their heart and seek the healing of their brokenness through the power of the Holy Spirit. We DO what God’s word says in James 5:16. We encourage men to look deep within themselves in 5-potentially wounded/broken areas of their life; Deceit, Fear, Anger, Sadness and Shame – seeking God’s healing. This happens in the first 24-hours. Then, for the next 20-hours, we focus on celebrating and honoring GOD for what HE has done! Discovering God’s entrusted talents, gifts and blessings, every man will know his life’s purpose (mission) before they leave. After your 44-hour experience -- we invite you to go back to your local church! Share with your pastor what you discovered about yourself! Then, join our weekly follow-up sessions with other men (2-hours/week)! The "Christian faith strength training continues..." 13,000 men served in 20-years+

OUR MISSION: As a Holy Spirit led global ministry, we build STRONGER MEN for JESUS CHRIST through ongoing transformative experiences and authentic relationships.

OUR VISION: MEN throughout the world being healed and made whole and living in mission through the power of JESUS CHRIST for HIS CHURCH.

Name: Oitava Igreja Presbiteriana de Belo Horizonte
Description: Criada em 25 de maio de 1969, a Oitava Igreja nasceu do desejo do coração de pessoas inspiradas pelo propósito soberano do Senhor Jesus Cristo. Há quase 50 anos, uma congregação. E hoje, por graça soberana de Deus, somos uma comunidade, que desde seu início segue firme nos propósitos de levar a mensagem do evangelho e amor de Cristo por todo mundo.

Name: MGM International (MGMI)
Description: Recognizing the powerful working of God in the Hispanic world, the MGMI team of Spirit-led, biblically Fundamental, Baptist missionary servants is committed to multiplying Christ-like leaders by serving Bible-believing local churches and training leaders so that the Hispanic world would eagerly take up the responsibility of the Great Commission for the Glory of Jesus Christ.

Name: AHMADIYYA MUSLIM JAMAAT INTERNATIONAL
Description: AHMADIYYA MUSLIM JAMAAT INTERNATIONAL is a Chemicals company located in 22 Deer Park Rd, London, England, United Kingdom.

Name: Crossroads Bible Church
Description: Crossroads Bible Church is a non-denominational fellowship located in North Texas. Founded in 1986 out of the merger of two smaller Bible churches, Crossroads grew rapidly and now has active ministries locally, nationally and worldwide. CBC's distinctions are its emphasis on the grace of God for any circumstance in life, the authority of the Scriptures, and the transforming power of Jesus Christ to change any brokenness into wholeness.

Name: Woodmen Valley Chapel
Description: We believe church is about people — people discovering relationships with Jesus and with one another. Our vision is to love well and change lives through Christ.

Name: Transformation Church | SC
Description: Dr. Derwin L. Gray is the founding and lead Pastor of Transformation Church (TC), located just south of Charlotte, North Carolina. The Vision of Transformation Church is to be a multiethnic, multigenerational mission-shaped community that loves God completely (Upward), ourselves correctly (Inward), and our neighbors compassionately (Outward).

Name: Beyond - Transforming Unreached Peoples
Description:
Did you know that over 2 billion people don't have access to the Gospel?

They don’t know where to get information or know a Christian to even ask.  Beyond starts church planting movements by equipping everyday men, women and children to reach their own people directly, quickly and exponentially. Lives and whole communities are transformed by life changes and not masses of money thrown at problems.

Name: the Den Collective
Description:
Our vision at the Den is to create intimate spaces and intentional Jewish experiences of belonging where people feel seen, heard, and cared for; spaces where everyone has a rabbi they can talk to, learn with, and lean on. 

We envision a community that is created by people, for people and with people who are seeking deep Jewish learning, meaningful self-exploration and a connection to community. 

The Den aspires to be a space where people experience a true sense of ownership and confidence over their Jewish lives. The Den empowers people to lead in their homes – in the Jewish community and beyond – creating a world that is better, for everyone.

Name: Mercy United Kingdom
Description:
We want every Christian to have the tools they need to thrive: to experience real freedom from the issues that hold them back and to navigate life’s challenges from this place of wellbeing and wholeness.

Helping every Christian navigate the dynamics between faith & mental health. We want to do our part to help break the taboo, remove the stigma, and normalise Christ-centred mental health and wellbeing support.

Name: Mission To North America
Description:
Serving the Church to Advance God’s Kingdom

MNA coordinates church planting and missional partnerships to serve PCA churches and presbyteries in North America in their mission to grow and multiply biblically healthy churches..

Name: Faith-Fest
Description:
Faith Fest 2014
Mission:
Unity in the community | serving Christ by serving others.

Join Us for:
-Fellowship
-Music
-Praise
-Food
-Fun
-Good Work

For more information please visit our website www.Faith-Fest.com

"By this, everyone will know you are my disciples, if you love one another." John 13:35

Name: Abundant Life Church
Description: Abundant Life Church was founded in 2000 in Lee’s Summit, MO.

Name: Underground Network, Inc
Description:
The Underground Network is a global community of microchurches and missionaries. Our mission is to:

+ INSPIRE people to surrender all their lives to Jesus and His cause
+ CONNECT individuals into missional communities
+ EMPOWER communities to discover and obey their God given mission
+ ENGAGE every kind of evil in our city with prayerful action

Name: Victory Christian Fellowship
Description:
Located at 100 Wilton Blvd. New Castle, DE, Victory is a very diverse, multicultural, non-denominational ministry that ministers to the needs of the whole family. It is our desire to see your family ministered to and fulfilling the purpose of God for your lives. We want you to experience Jesus Christ and His life within you in abundance.
 
While you are here at Victory, we pray that you will experience Jesus in every aspect of your time here. We want Jesus to be the focus of your experience whether it is through the worship services, the Word of God, the greeters at the door, the ushers who seat you or your interaction with the Body of Christ.

Name: Temple Israel of Hollywood
Description: Temple Israel of Hollywood is a progressive Reform congregation made up of 3000 members from Hancock Park, West Hollywood, Los Feliz, Silverlake, Beverly Hills and the near Valley. Founded in 1926 by a group of entertainment luminaries, and located in the heart of Hollywood, Temple Israel has never strayed from its deep dedication to worship, education, social justice and action. A welcoming, inclusive community, Temple Israel offers robust adult learning and arts programming with a distinctly contemporary flair. Our three schools educate over 600 students and our social action programs help thousands in need every year.

Name: Catholic Community Foundation- CLE
Description: The mission of the Catholic Community Foundation is to foster faith-based stewardship in the community for the spiritual, educational and charitable needs of all. We support the advancement of the work of the Church in Northeast Ohio, ensuring that our investments and grant recipients are in alignment with the teachings and values of the Catholic Church. We help donors continue the mission of Jesus to transform the world by connecting their support to ministries and services that lift up the Catholic community as well as the entire region. Our public trust is earned through the integrity of our work and strength of our partnerships. We are a non-profit 501 (c) (3) with a Board of Directors that includes Catholic, religious and community leaders.

Name: Saints Community Church - Chris Onayinka Ministries
Description:
We are a Church Ministry.
We equip believers (as we fellowship together) with the Word to the end that they are grounded & able to teach others the same

Name: Veda Gayathri - India's Largest Pooja Booking Portal
Description:
We provide top and best Pandit in Hyderabad, now you can book best Pandit in Hyderabad just in 5 minutes Find Pandits For your puja in hyderabad and we are providing best pooja samagri in hyderabad

Pandit Veda Gayathri Services have Vedic Pandits, Best Purohit in Hyderabad, Best Shastri in Hyderabad with lots of experience in all kind of Hindu religious Poojalu like Ceremony, Homalu, Poojalu, Special Pooja s, Vratam Japalu, Ancestor Rituals Nomu,Festival Pooja s, Abhishekam, Pariharams, Muhurtham Fixing, Astrology, Horoscope and many more

Name: Exfam Impact
Description:
Exfam is a faith-based organization founded with a global mission to promote Christianity on the internet. Rooted in the belief that the message of Jesus Christ is meant to be shared with people from all walks of life, Exfam harnesses the power of digital platforms to reach a diverse audience, break down barriers, and foster a deeper understanding of the Christian faith.

Exfam envisions a world where the internet becomes a powerful tool for sharing the love of Christ, fostering global unity, and transforming lives. By leveraging digital platforms, the organization strives to reach individuals from diverse backgrounds, cultures, and languages, offering them a chance to encounter the life-changing message of Christianity. Through intentional online engagement, Exfam aims to promote the Gospel, inspire believers, and create a global community rooted in faith, hope, and love.

Name: Youth Ministry Institute
Description: At Youth Ministry Institute, we are passionate about equipping and empowering the Church and its leaders to make a difference in the lives of young people. Our organization was founded with the goal of providing high-quality training, resources, and support to those who serve in youth ministry and children's ministry, helping them thrive in their roles and positively impact the next generation.

Name: Warsaw Community Church
Description:
Warsaw Community Church (WCC) is a nondenominational, Bible-based church in Warsaw, Indiana, committed to growing deeper in Christ and sharing the hope of the Gospel. We gather every Sunday at 9:00 a.m. and 10:30 a.m., both in person and online.

At WCC, we help people explore who God is, connect with others, and grow in faith. Our ministries serve all ages and life stages—from children and youth to adults, men, women, and Hispanic ministries. We also invest in global missions, community outreach, and care ministries like counseling, marriage mentoring, and Stephen Ministry.

Whether you’re new to faith or looking for a church home, WCC is a place to belong, grow, and serve.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Charleston
Description:
Our mission is to cover the world in Christ by unapologetically declaring to the world whose we are by proactively creating faith-centric cultures in the workplace.

We are a group of business executives who come together every month to share how including Christ in our daily lives has positively affected the work environment.

In sharing joys and struggles with others who walk similar paths, we are able to support and encourage our brothers and sisters in Christ to live courageously in witness to him. It is our hope to rejuvenate the working soul through fellowship and praise of God.

How is your soul today?

Name: Coastal Church
Description:
Coastal Church is a non-denominational church that meets in the heart of downtown Vancouver. Pastors Dave and Cheryl Koop are the senior and founding pastors of Coastal. 

Coastal Church is a collection of individuals from all walks of life, and together we’re embarking on life’s greatest journey – following Jesus Christ. We’re not a collection of perfect people and we’re certainly not the perfect church, but we’re passionate about growing closer to God!

Coastal has 15 weekend services for you to choose from:
Downtown: Saturday @ 5:00PM, Sunday @ 9:00AM & 11:00AM
Arizona: Saturday @ 6:00 PM
Pitt Meadows: Sunday @ 10:00 AM
Commercial: Sunday @ 10:00 AM (English) & 12:00 PM & 2:00 PM (Spanish)
North Vancouver: Sunday @ 11:00 AM
Richmond: Sunday @ 10:00 AM
Burnaby Microsite: Sunday @ 10:00 AM
Squamish Microsite: Sunday @ 11:00 AM
Online: Saturday @ 5:00 PM, Sunday @ 9:00 AM & 11:00AM at live.coastalchurch.org, YouTube, and Facebook Live.

Name: Park Cities Presbyterian Church
Description: Park Cities Presbyterian Church (PCA) is a large family of people seeking to be Christ's disciples and to bear His truth into our world. We believe we exist to extend the transforming presence of the Kingdom of our Lord Jesus Christ to Dallas and the world.

Name: Disciples Made
Description:
You weren’t meant to carry the weight of discipleship alone.

Whether you're a pastor, church leader, network leader, or marketplace disciple-maker, the burden of spiritual leadership can feel heavy—but it doesn’t have to.

At Disciples Made, we equip churches, networks, and businesses to build sustainable, multiplying cultures of discipleship—by unleashing the leadership potential already within your people.

Through our proven digital-yet-deeply-personal experiences, ordinary believers grow in intimacy with God (character) and influence in the world (calling)—so they become Fully Alive followers of Jesus who multiply others.

For Pastors, Church Leaders, & Networks:
 Share the leadership load and reduce burnout
 Multiply disciple-makers who co-labor, not just consume
 Implement outcome-focused experiences that deliver real, Spirit-led transformation

For Marketplace Leaders:
 Integrate faith and influence where you work
 Build a disciple-making legacy in your sphere of impact
 Launch purpose-driven cohorts that activate spiritual vitality

 Why Disciples Made?
Measurable transformation in character and calling

Digital yet relational—accessible tools anchored in authentic community

We’re not a church, but we exist for the Church and the Kingdom

 Vision 2040: 70,000 disciple-makers impacting 2 million lives
 Let’s reimagine discipleship together → disciplesmade.com

#DiscipleMaking #LeadershipDevelopment #FullyAlive #FaithAndWork #SpiritualMultiplication

Name: General Curia of the Society of Jesus
Description: The Society of Jesus was founded in 1540 by St Ignatius Loyola with the approval of Pope Paul III. Ignatius Loyola had gathered around him an energetic band of well-educated men who desired nothing more than to help others find God in their lives. It was Ignatius’ original plan that the Jesuits be travelling missionaries who would preach and administer the sacraments wherever there was the hope of accomplishing the greater good. Since its foundation the Order has grown from the original ten to more than 14,000 Jesuits worldwide.

Name: Village Presbyterian Church
Description:
Village Presbyterian Church is a family of faith actively shaped by the life of Christ to love one another, provide leadership for the transformation of our communities and serve the world. Village Church was founded in 1949. Rev. Dr. Rodger Nishoka serves as senior pastor. In 2017, Village opened the Village Church Antioch Campus, located at 14895 Antioch Road in Overland Park. 

Village Church also manages the Meneilly Center for Mission at 99th and Mission Road in Overland Park, which includes a Child and Family Development Center and a Food Pantry and Clothes Closet that serve the surrounding community. 

Please join us for Sunday morning worship in the Village Church Mission Campus Sanctuary at 9 and 11 a.m., or The Gathering, alternative worship, at 4 p.m. Sundays in Friendship Hall.  Worship with us at our Antioch Campus in southern Johnson County at 10 a.m. Sundays.

Learn more at www.villagepres.org.

Name: WildSeed Society
Description: The WildSeed Society is first and foremost a spiritual community for people trying emancipate themselves and their community from systems of extraction and exploitation so that they can experience true belonging as fellow travelers down the road of liberation. It is a church in the Wild at the intersection of Spiritual Liberation, Social Transformation and Economic Revolution. An infinite game whose objective is to keep its members joyfully alive, deeply cared for, and secure as the world is on fire while they build portals to a future where we all get free.

Name: Église Nouvelle Vie
Description:
NOTRE ADN
Nous croyons que l’Église chrétienne doit être à l'image de Jésus. Comme lui, nous sommes là pour aimer, servir, et apporter un message d'espoir à notre monde. C’est la vision de l’Église Nouvelle Vie, une église pour aujourd’hui.

NOTRE MISSION
Nous sommes passionnément consacrés à l’établissement d’une église d'influence au Québec et dans la francophonie

Name: Friends General Conference
Description: Friends General Conference provides services and resources for individual Friends, meetings, and people interested in the Quaker way. FGC is an association of regional Quaker communities in the U.S. and Canada working together to nurture a vital Quaker faith.

Name: Clifton Diocese
Description: A registered charity for the advancement of the Roman Catholic religion throughout the Diocese of Clifton. The provision of pastoral and charitable services in Roman Catholic parishes and within local communities. The provision of education through Catholic and Ecumenical schools and programmes of adult formation.

Name: Islam City
Description: Islam City zet zich in voor de “nieuwe moslim”

Name: Christ Apostolic Church (Worldwide)
Description: First Pentecostal Church in Africa

Name: Svenska kyrkan Alingsås
Description:
Om Svenska kyrkan i Alingsås

Svenska kyrkan i Alingsås är ett pastorat där tre församlingar ingår – Alingsås, Hemsjö och Ödenäs. Pastoratet har sju kyrkor, sju kyrkogårdar, 21 600 medlemmar och över 47 000 gudstjänstbesökare per år. Vi är ett av Skara stifts största pastorat och en av kommunens största arbetsgivare. Totalt har pastoratet cirka 100 personer anställda.

Name: Missão País
Description: A Missão País é um projeto católico de universitários que tem como objectivo levar Jesus às Universidades e evangelizar Portugal através do testemunho da fé, do serviço e da caridade.

Name: Langham Partnership International
Description:
Langham Partnership seeks to strengthen the church in places where there is little access to resources and training. We work alongside Christian leaders around the world, especially in the global south and east, equipping them to grow the church with depth and maturity.

Langham Partnership provides training and resources through three programmes:

Langham Preaching partners with national leaders to nurture indigenous biblical preaching movements for pastors and lay preachers all around the world

Langham Literature provides books in many languages and support for local Christian writers and publishers in their own language and culture.

Langham Scholars programme supports evangelical doctoral students from the Majority World who return to become the leaders and teachers of their countries’ next generation of pastors.

Name: Mid-America Reformed Seminary
Description: Mid-America is a community where students and faculty are committed to one another and to the pursuit of the highest standards of scholastic excellence for the glory of Christ and the church. Rigorous academic study and Mid-America’s Ministerial Apprenticeship Program combine to provide a rich learning environment that develops students who have the Word of God in their hearts and their minds. Students gain valuable field experience throughout their seminary education via mentoring relationships with experienced pastors. Students learn to know their Savior and themselves more fully and as a result gain confidence in their ability to minister to God’s people.

Name: Lord of Life Lutheran Church
Description: ELCA Church

Name: First Priority South Florida
Description: First Priority South Florida is a religious institutions company based out of 5120 N Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL, United States.

Name: Cross Timbers Church
Description: Meeting emotional, practical & spiritual needs in the name of Jesus!

Name: Lake Avenue Church
Description:
Lake Avenue Church is a 120 year-old congregational church. We have a strong history of growth, vibrancy, and community engagement. We have an evangelical theology and value a diversity of thought and spiritual expression. 

Our value for diversity is much deeper than worship styles and programs. Our neighborhood represents a variety of ethnicities, socioeconomics, beliefs, and lifestyles, and we are passionate about reflecting this diversity as well as engaging with our diverse neighborhood.  We desire to be an expression God’s Kingdom that is strongly connected with our community 

The Mission of Lake Avenue Church: Following Jesus, we participate in God’s reconciling work by making disciples of all peoples and generations. (Matt. 28:18-20; Col. 1:19-20)

Name: Grace Fellowship Church (Snellville, GA)
Description: Every Sunday, we gather to study the Bible, worship God, and share our lives over a cup of good coffee (or three). Then, equipped and encouraged, we go to show the life of Christ to the neighborhoods, to the nations, and to the next generation. Why? We believe the Church is called to make disciples for the glory of God. We invite you and your family to join us.

Name: CAMPUS FÜR CHRISTUS
Description:
Campus für Christus e. V. (CFC) ist eine überkonfessionell geprägte Missionsbewegung. Die Ziele der Arbeit sind, suchende Menschen über den christlichen Glauben zu informieren und sie dafür zu gewinnen. Weiterhin sollen Christen dazu herausgefordert werden, ihren Glauben relevant zu leben und ihn in ihrem Umfeld zur Sprache zu bringen. Das Motto dazu lautet: gewinnen – fördern – senden. Im deutschsprachigen Raum gibt es CAMPUS FÜR CHRISTUS seit 1967. CFC ist der deutsche Zweig von Agape Europe.

Der eingetragene Verein arbeitet auf der Glaubensgrundlage der Deutschen Evangelischen Allianz mit zahlreichen Kirchen, Gemeinden und Organisationen zusammen. Er ist dem Diakonischen Werk der Evangelischen Kirche angegliedert und Mitglied bei netzwerk-m.

Leitung
Die Leitung von CAMPUS FÜR CHRISTUS setzt sich aktuell aus folgenden Personen zusammen:
•	Andreas Boppart – Missionsleiter
•	Andreas Fürbringer
•	Raphael Funck
•	Florian Stielper
•	Friedemann Schwinger

Name: Mitra da Arquidiocese de Porto Alegre
Description:
Nossa missão é evangelizar, educar e apoiar a formação espiritual das pessoas, fortalecendo sua fé e construindo um mundo mais solidário e fraterno. Com uma rica história e tradição, a Arquidiocese de Porto Alegre busca ser uma presença viva de Cristo, inspirando vidas através da caridade, do diálogo inter-religioso e do cuidado com os mais vulneráveis.

Com mais de 140 paróquias e uma rica história que remonta ao século XIX, buscamos ser uma presença viva de Cristo, inspirando a fé e o compromisso social em todos os nossos fiéis e colaboradores.

Name: Episcopal Diocese of Massachusetts
Description: The Episcopal Diocese of Massachusetts was organized in 1784 – one of the nine original dioceses of The Episcopal Church when it separated from the Church of England during the American Revolution. Today, nearly 250 years later, our common life thrives in over 170 worshipping communities and 40,000 Episcopalians, along with a variety of Episcopal schools, hospital chaplaincies, monastic communities, and other affiliated organizations. We are committed to building up sustainable, vibrant, diverse, faithful, and justice-striving worshipping communities that form faithful Christians and serve their neighbors, all centered around our five core values: Welcome, Courage, Justice, Joy and Love.

Name: Crossroads Christian Church
Description:
Crossroads Christian Church is an independent, nondenominational fellowship of believers who seek to follow Christ and wear only His name.

Crossroads shares a common heritage with about 5,000 churches worldwide known as the Christian Churches / Churches of Christ. The principle of this movement is to restore today's church life as dictated by the teachings of the New Testament.

Although we exist apart from any external authority or control, we do participate with other churches in many projects and programs that exalt Jesus Christ and spread the Gospel.

Name: Christian Executives Organization
Description:
C.E.O. is a non-denominational Christian Fellowship comprised of senior business executives who are committed to living an integrated Christian life, wherein there is no difference in behavior between Sunday morning in Church, and Monday morning in the Boardroom.

For too long the marketplace has been comprised of individuals who have failed to boldly live their faith in the marketplace.  In fact, historically, most professing Christians have actually been "Closet Christians," who weren't discernible from their Non-Believer peers in the workplace.  Too frequently, professing Christians are governed by peer pressures and fear of reproach, rather than being governed by their Bible-formed beliefs.

C.E.O. provides a forum for Christian Fellowship where senior business executives can come together with others of like precious faith, and build one another up to be salt and light in their respective spheres of influence within the marketplace.

Name: Astro Shivansh
Description:
हम किसी घटना के समय के लिए एक कुंडली बनाते हैं, जैसे कि किसी व्यक्ति का जन्म, और उस व्यक्ति की विशेषताओं को समझने के लिए घटना के समय विभिन्न खगोलीय बिंदुओं और उनकी स्थितियों की व्याख्या करते हैं।

ज्योतिषीय चार्ट जन्म के समय ब्रह्मांड के एक मानचित्र को दर्शाता है, जो व्यक्ति को उसके केंद्र में केंद्रित करता है, सूर्य, चंद्रमा और अन्य खगोलीय पिंडों को उस व्यक्ति के व्यक्तिगत ग्रह या तारे माना जाता है, जो केवल उस व्यक्ति के लिए विशिष्ट रूप से प्रासंगिक हैं। हालांकि प्राचीन ज्योतिषीय प्रथाओं में विभिन्न संस्कृतियों की जड़ें समान हैं, कई ने अनूठी पद्धतियां तैयार की हैं, जिनमें से सबसे महत्वपूर्ण हिंदू ज्योतिष (जिसे "वैदिक ज्योतिष" भी कहा जाता है) हैं। इसने विश्व के सांस्कृतिक इतिहास पर बहुत प्रभाव डाला है।

लोग आमतौर पर अपनी कुंडली के बारे में ज्योतिषियों से परामर्श करना पसंद करते हैं क्योंकि एक विशेषज्ञ ज्योतिषी उन्हें स्वास्थ्य, रिश्तों, धन, शिक्षा, करियर, संपत्ति और यात्रा आदि से संबंधित मामलों को सुलझाने में मदद कर सकता है। ऐसे कई लोगों के उदाहरण हैं जिन्होंने अपनी कुंडली के माध्यम से मार्गदर्शन प्राप्त किया है। उन अवसरों पर मददगार जहाँ उन्हें चुनौतीपूर्ण निर्णयों का सामना करना पड़ा।

Name: Grace Fellowship Church
Description: Macclenny, Florida

Name: Church of Norway - National Council
Description: The National council is the national level of Church of Norway, with 3,7 millions members

Name: ALRA TV
Description: ALRA TV is the official YouTube channel of Mehdi/Messiah Foundation International. On this channel, CEO of MFI and ALRA TV, Sufi Spiritual Revivalist Younus AlGohar, covers a variety of topics ranging from the most profound spiritual knowledge to current affairs. ALRA TV: Unifying humanity in pursuit of love!

Name: Reformed Presbyterian Theological Seminary
Description:
The mission of the Reformed Presbyterian Theological Seminary is to educate students who love the Lord Jesus Christ and His Word, equipping pastors for the ministry of the gospel and preparing others in the Church for effective service in His Kingdom, all within the framework of the historic Reformed faith.

The founding purpose of the Reformed Presbyterian Theological Seminary was to train pastors for the Gospel ministry within the sponsoring denomination. This fundamental purpose remains unchanged in the twenty-first century.

As God has provided opportunity, the mission of the Seminary has expanded to include the training of men and women from many Reformed and evangelical churches, and from various cultures and nations, for a variety of ministries, including missions, counseling, Christian education, youth and campus work, and other specialized fields of service.

Our instruction is guided by the theology and practice of the Reformed Presbyterian Church of North America, a denomination which wholeheartedly embraces the historic Reformed faith, while stressing Christ's Kingship over every area of life.

Our training emphasizes scholarship in Biblical studies, systematic theology, and church history; the cultivation of personal godliness and interpersonal skills; and the development of spiritual gifts - all with a vision for discipling the nations of the world.

Our educational setting is a multicultural urban environment, which provides both challenges and opportunities for ministry. Because the redemptive grace of God is the basis for ultimate answers to the personal and interpersonal problems around us, our ministry presents a message of reconciliation to God and to one another through the Prince of Peace, our Lord Jesus Christ.

Name: San Antonio Marriage Initiative
Description:
The San Antonio Marriage Initiative (SAMI) exists for one purpose-- We believe God desires to redeem and restore marriages in San Antonio by His power and for His glory

OUR VISION
The restoration of family, by strategically investing in marriage, for the strengthening of communities and the glorification of God.
 

OUR MISSION:
We are "others centered" focused on uniting, connecting, and supporting in three vital ways - 

We desire to - INSPIRE
Re-frame how we prioritize and value marriage.

We desire to - RESOURCE
Help marriage resources reach deeper into the heart of our community.

We desire to - ENPOWER
Help people use their unique talents to work in their highest and best roles.

Name: Faith Church of Lafayette, IN
Description: Faith Church is an independent Baptist church in Lafayette, Indiana. Our ministries include Faith Christian School, Faith Biblical Counseling Ministries, Faith Bible Seminary, Faith Community Ministries, Faith Global Ministries, Faith Legacy Foundation, Faith Resources, and Vision of Hope.

Name: Lake Union Conference of Seventh-day Adventists
Description:
The Lake Union is an integral part of the North American Division of Seventh-day Adventists. Our primary objective is to share the "good news" of Christ's saving grace to every individual within its territory.

We are committed to helping prepare a people for the soon return of our Lord and Savior, Jesus and we heartily endorse the caring church concept as a means of involving every member in ministering to the needs of God's children.

We accept the vital role that the union must play in coordinating the efforts of individual members, churches, and institutions within its territory. In its role, we pledge the support of personnel and means to the World Church in the fulfillment of this task.

Name: Believers community
Description: We are passionate about intentional growth and understanding our Lord Jesus Christ more.

Name: Hindu Priest In Bay Area, San Francisco, California, USA
Description:
Sunnyvale-CA, PanditJi/Pandits For Puja/Pooja, Indian Hindu Priests in San Francisco Bay Area CA USA
Hindu Priest in Pleasanton, California. Hindu Pandit Near Pleasanton,CA, Dublin, Livermore, Union City, Fairview, San Ramon, Fremont, Hayward, CA..Mountain View, Los Altos, Santa Clara, Los Altos Hills, Saratoga, Campbell, Palo Alto, San Jose, Stanford, Milpitas, East Palo Alto, Menlo Park, Los Gatos, Cities near Sunnyvale, California Mountain View, Cupertino, Los Altos, Santa Clara, San Jose, Stanford, Milpitas, Newark,San Francisco Hindu Temple. Hindu Mandir. Puja Pooja Havan Vedic Yagya USA.

Name: Good Shepherd
Description: Good Shepherd Presbyterian Church exists to invite all people into a Christ-centered life in God's family.

Name: Erzbistum Hamburg
Description:
Das Erzbistum Hamburg ist das jüngste Bistum in Deutschland. Kirche erneuern, darum geht es hier. Und sich dabei immer wieder neu in Beziehung setzen – mit den Menschen, der Gesellschaft und der Weltkirche. Hier wird Gemeinschaft gelebt und ökumenische Verbundenheit. 

Für die Menschen und eine zeitgerechte, zukunftsreiche katholische Kirche im Norden arbeiten derzeit rund 2.000 Beschäftigte: von der Gefängnisseelsorge bis zur Leitung Controlling, vom Gebäudemanagement bis zur Buchhaltung, von den pastoralen Diensten bis zur IT, von den katholischen Schulen und Kindergärten bis zur Öffentlichkeitsarbeit, vom Generalvikariat bis in die Pfarreien. 

Zeit für eine frische Brise im Beruf? Leinen los!

Name: World Outreach Church
Description: As an interdenominational Christian church, we welcome a diverse opportunity to help people find worship comfortable and more engaging. We are devoted to helping people become more fully devoted followers of Jesus Christ, in Murfreesboro, Middle Tennessee and across the world.

Name: McMaster University Muslim Students' Association
Description:
McMaster MSA (MacMSA for short) has a long, rich history dating back to the 60’s with a large body of great leadership. What began as a small group, over 50 years ago, has grown into one of the largest clubs McMaster has on campus, being given religious club of the year on numerous occasions. Through the hard work of the early pioneers in MSA history who built the club from scratch and fostered it, the later pioneers of the MSA introduced various legislations, events and directorship as well executive positions. It has been a body of knowledge passed down the generations.

MacMSA strives to maintain the identity of Muslims on campus while engaging them in the betterment of society as a whole while pursuing lofty academic ambitions. The community it provides to the students is invaluable in that it allows for a facilitation of brotherhood and sisterhood bonds, whereby long-lasting friendships are developed and memories are made.

Name: Northeast Christian Church
Description: We are the Love the 'Ville church focused on sharing the love of Jesus every day, to everybody, everywhere in the home, workplace, city, and church.

Name: Ignatian Spirituality Project
Description:
The Ignatian Spirituality Project invites people recovering from homelessness and addiction to encounter God’s love, hope and healing through spiritual companionship that transforms lives.

Our Approach:
-We offer spiritual retreat programs, inspired by and rooted in Ignatian spirituality, which invite individuals into communities of hope and belonging.
-We are a network of volunteer teams building relationships with one another and creating welcoming spaces for all.
-We empower people who are in recovery from homelessness and addiction to become leaders on our teams and in our organization.  
-We collaborate with other ministries and organizations in the communities where we serve to achieve and further our mission.

ISP is a volunteer-based ministry that is privileged to support over 750 volunteers who work together in collaborative teams to facilitate our retreat and spirituality programs across our network of 28 cities.

Name: Erzdiözese Salzburg
Description: Die Erzdiözese Salzburg ist die älteste österreichische Diözese und die am längsten bestehende im gesamten deutschen Sprachraum. Sie wurde im 8. Jahrhundert vom heiligen Rupert gegründet. Heute zählt sie rund 460.100 Katholikinnen und Katholiken in 210 Pfarren. Derzeitiger Erzbischof ist Franz Lackner.

Name: Zion Lutheran Church
Description:
Zion Lutheran Church offers many ministries for people of all ages and walks of life who are looking to strengthen their relationship with Christ.

At Zion we are committed to Sharing the Message of Salvation through Jesus Christ, Strengthening Believers, and Caring for People in Need

Name: One Community Church - Broadcast Campus
Description:
One Community Church  was founded in 2008 with a commitment to create an environment where no one walks alone. We are intentionally non-denominational and exists expressly to connect and engage with the communities in which our members/partners live and serve. 

We have 3 campuses located in Plano, Lewisville, and Prosper, Texas. For information about service times, events, and how to connect with us, go to visitonecc.com.

Name: Grace Community School
Description: Grace Community School was founded by Grace Community Church in 1973 and began with an enrollment of 60 students in grades 2-12. With the completion of the high school building in 1996, Grace expanded to two locations keeping the elementary on Old Jacksonville Road and moving the junior high and high school to University Boulevard. Today the school exists as a K4-12, coeducational, college-preparatory day school with selective admissions. At more than 980 students it is the largest private school in East Texas. The curriculum is rigorous and high moral standards are expected and encouraged.

Name: Emmanuel Christian Seminary
Description:
For over 50 years, Emmanuel Christian Seminary at Milligan has brought together strong academics, a commitment to ministry both at home and abroad, and true discipleship in a loving Christian community in order to train the next generation of leaders in ministry. We are a graduate seminary preparing people to lead and serve in ministry. 

Degrees Offered: MACM, MAR, MDiv, and DMin.

Name: Satlok Ashram - India
Description: Satlok Ashram - India is a religious institutions company based out of Satlok Ashram Barwala Hisar - Tohana Road Barwala, , India Pin Code, HISAR, Haryana, India.

Name: Awaken Church
Description: A family-focused and life-giving church with campuses in San Diego and Salt Lake City.

Name: Navigators Nederland
Description: Bij Navigators willen we samen leren leven als leerling van Jezus.

Name: Benaiah | በናያስ
Description: God has Created

Name: Katholische Kirche im Kanton Zürich
Description:
Die Katholische Kirche im Kanton Zürich setzt sich für das Wohl der Menschen ein – hier und anderswo.

Ihre Kirchensteuer kommt der Seelsorge und Lebenshilfe zu Gute. Wir unterstützen Menschen in Armut, Flüchtlinge und Randständige. 

Mit Ihrer Kirchensteuer können wir viel Gutes bewirken.
Erfahren Sie auf dieser Seite, wie und wo Ihr Beitrag Früchte trägt.

Name: Associação Paulista Sudoeste (APSo)
Description: Seja bem-vindo ao perfil oficial da Associação Paulista Sudoeste (APSo), sede administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia na região sudoeste do estado de São Paulo.

Name: Evangelical Presbyterian Church
Description:
Our Mission: 
The EPC exists to carry out the Great Commission of Jesus as a denomination of Presbyterian, Reformed, Evangelical, and Missional congregations.

Our Vision:
To the glory of God, the EPC family aspires to embody and proclaim Jesus’ love as a global movement of congregations engaged together in God’s mission through transformation, multiplication, and effective biblical leadership.

Our Motto:
In Essentials: Unity. In Non-Essentials: Liberty. In All Things: Charity.

Name: TAL
Description: London’s leading platform for Jewish Students and Young Professionals!

Name: FEZANA
Description:
FEZANA is the Federation of Zoroastrians Associations of North America, representing roughly 25,000 Zoroastrians. The purpose of this page is to promote networking and professional development throughout the Zoroastrian diaspora. While FEZANA is based in North America, our hope is we can provide a global network of Zoroastrian professionals with the purpose of helping others and promoting Zoroastrian owned businesses. 

Please note this is not a religious forum, therefore religious advice will not be provided. Additionally any kind of hate speech will not be tolerated.

Name: The Solas Council
Description: The Solas Council

Name: Job Quest
Description:
Welcome to Whittier Area Community Church.

Mission Statement and History

Our Mission Statement: Follow God + Love People
Simple, yet deep; uncomplicated, yet profound. Follow God + Love People sums up the purpose for our fellowship together. Our vision comes from Paul's words in Ephesians 5:1-2. "Follow God's example in everything you do, because you are His dear children. Live a life filled with love for others, following the example of Christ, who loved you and gave Himself as a sacrifice to take away your sins. And God was pleased, because that sacrifice was like a sweet perfume to Him."

Name: St. Mary's Catholic Church
Description: A Catholic Church based in German Village, Ohio.

Name: Valley Catholic School & SSMO Campus
Description:
We invite all Valley Catholic School faculty, staff, students and alumni, as well as those who support Valley Catholic on the Sisters of St. Mary of Oregon (SSMO) campus, to connect with this account.

Valley Catholic School, sharing in the mission of the Sisters of St. Mary of Oregon, fosters a faith-filled community of lifelong learners and compassionate leaders committed to living out Catholic values and following Jesus' example through prayer, service, and love. We offer a faith-based education, award-winning academic programs taught by outstanding faculty, championship athletics, and quality fine arts in a close-knit community, serving students in pre-K through 12th grades. Rigorous classes start early and college preparation begins at the middle school level. Students of all ages have many opportunities to learn, perform, compete and serve. 

Our beautiful, 43-acre campus is also home to a music school, which offers lessons to children and adults from across the region; Maryville, a residential short- and long-term care facility; and the Motherhouse, where the Sisters of St. Mary of Oregon reside.

Name: Lake Junaluska
Description:
A beloved spiritual retreat center for more than 100 years, scenic Lake Junaluska in the mountains of Western North Carolina welcomes leisure and business travelers, families and groups seeking a special getaway experience with plenty of on-site things to do.  

Located in the Great Smoky Mountains near Asheville, the 1,200-acre property features a 200-acre lake, over 400 lodging rooms and more than 100,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor meeting space. Accommodations include a lakeside hotel, historic inn, vacation rentals, campground and economy options. Guests enjoy an 18-hole golf course; pool, canoe, kayak and paddleboard rentals; guided lake cruises; tennis and pickleball courts; mini-golf; volleyball; basketball; beautiful gardens; and a scenic, mostly paved lakeside walking trail with 2.3- and 3.8-mile loops. 

The lake, hotels, conference center and recreational facilities are operated by a not-for-profit organization with a mission of being a place of Christian hospitality where lives are transformed through renewal of soul, mind and body.

Name: Omaha Kroc Center
Description:
At The Salvation Army Ray and Joan Kroc Corps Community Center children, adults, and families are inspired to discover their God given talents and develop their potential through artistic, educational, physical, and spiritual experiences in a Christ-centered atmosphere. 

The Kroc Center's award-winning facility is open to members and the general public, and can be rented for special events and meetings. The Kroc Center covers a six square block area and includes a Fitness Center, Aquatics Center, Gymnasium Complex, Assembly Hall, Fellowship Hall, Education Center, Learning Center, outdoor Sports Field Complex, Festival Plaza, and commercial kitchen with a full-time Executive Chef. 

For more information or to donate, please visit www.OmahaKroc.org.

Name: Interserve
Description: Interserve exists to be a community of disciples of Jesus Christ who through their commitment to wholistic ministry are agents of God’s transformational work as He reveals Himself to the peoples of the Asian and Arab World wherever they may be found.

Name: Dynamic Church Planting International
Description: Dynamic Church Planting International (DCPI) is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization founded in 1992 with the vision of training leaders in every country of the world to plant dynamic churches to reach the world for Jesus. We offer all of our trainings free of charge, so that hundreds of thousands of men and women called by God can take the Gospel to their tribes, tongues, and nations. We offer 8 tracks of training built upon biblical principles and actionable applications, so DCPI churches are effective and healthy. In 2021, we celebrated 1 MILLION churches!

Name: Council for World Mission
Description:
Council for World Mission (CWM) is a global partnership of 36 member churches in 31 countries, with over 50,000 congregations worldwide. For over 40 years, CWM has been committed to the mutual sharing of people, ideas and money to advance God’s liberating and transformative mission in the world.  

Vision
Life-flourishing Communities, living out God’s promise of a New Heaven and a New Earth. 

Mission
Called in Christ to radical and prophetic discipleship, working in partnership with churches and the ecumenical community to resist life-denying systems, affirm peace, do justice and enable life-flourishing communities. 

Our Values
The underlying core values that have guided CWM since 1977 and informed its relationship with others in doing God’s mission are: 
•	Justice in relationships
•	Mutuality, equality and interdependence
•	Generosity of spirit  
•	Unity in diversity

Please visit https://www.cwmission.org/about/ for details.

Name: Preserving Bible Times
Description:
Preserving Bible Times, Inc. (PBT) is a faith-based educational organization with a vision for preserving and presenting Biblical Truth and meaning through integrating the Biblical text with its visual, geographical, literary, historical and cultural context. PBT’s approach is to creatively assemble a “tool box” of Bible Times related images, resources and contextual elements that will allow the Scriptures to increasingly come alive for 21st Century readers as they did for 1st Century hearers. This integrated contextual approach to engaging the Scriptures is shared in our growing portfolio of Bible-in-Context resources, e.g. digital resources, publications, and maps featured in different sections of this website. https://preservingbibletimes.org 

Welcome to the Preserving Bible Times (PBT) website where context always matters! At PBT our purpose is to preserve and present biblical truth.

Our central thesis is that we should never ask what a passage means to us today until we first know what those words and phrases meant to those we meet in the Bible.

Our emphasis is restoring the historical, cultural, literary, visual and geographic context of a passage so we can understand it as a Middle Eastern villager would have first understood it. That gets us closer to the original meaning of a passage and therefore closer to the Spirit’s intended transformation.

We invite you to take some time to explore and sample the various devotional/teaching/Bible study resources we have assembled on this site to help God’s Kingdom feed more robustly on His Word. If you have questions about our church-hosted “Bible Alive,” “Making Disciples Jesus’ Way,” “The Bible and the Land,” and “The Last Days of Jesus: The Greatest Story Never Told” seminars and conferences, our “Bible Alive” Intensives Columbia, MD, as well as our portfolio of Bible-in-Context teaching resources, just let us know.

Shalom,
The PBT Team

Name: Bethel Baptist Church
Description: Bethel Baptist Church is a ministry located in the South Bay Area of Southern California.

Name: Congregation Beth Israel
Description: At Congregation Beth Israel, Jewish life is relevant, modern, and joyful. As the oldest Jewish congregation in Texas, Beth Israel has a rich history and legacy. We are an active and vibrant Reform Jewish congregation with a diverse membership. We strive to be welcoming and inclusive to meet the needs of all our members.

Name: Josiah Venture
Description:
A christian missions organization that works with churches in Central and Eastern Europe to train young leaders to make disciples through the local church in turn transforms society.

Josiah Venture has grown from three couples in 1993 to over 340 staff members today. Our staff, over half of which are nationals, are located in 16 countries in Central and Eastern Europe, along with support teams in North America and Canada and the UK. 

Thousands of young leaders are trained each year by our staff, and through those young leaders hundreds of new believers are entering the local church as a result of evangelistic and discipleship efforts.

Name: International Catholic Stewardship Council
Description: The International Catholic Stewardship Council (ICSC) is a professional organization recognized internationally as a source of education, networking and information to advance the ministry of Christian stewardship as a way of life in the Roman Catholic Church, and to promote the cause of Catholic philanthropy in dioceses and parishes worldwide.  ICSC is the only organization dedicated exclusively to advancing Christian stewardship, Catholic philanthropy and resource development in North America as well as overseas. Founded in 1962, ICSC has over 1,200 members representing over 800 dioceses and archdioceses, parish communities, Catholic organizations and professional firms internationally.

Name: Re-Forma
Description:
Re-Forma exists to ensure that millions of pastors and church leaders are biblically-trained by providing a recognised, global standard for outcome- and impact-based assessment.
Re-Forma does this through a program that provides guidelines for evaluating the thousands of existing training programmes for ministry competency and guidelines for start-up organisations wanting to train thousands of church leaders annually.

Name: HOPE CITY
Description:
Hope City is a movement aimed at bringing Jesus to Houston and beyond.

What started as a calling in 2015 is now one church in many locations, giving thousands of people a chance to personally experience the life-transforming message of Jesus each week. And as God changes us, we're changing our city and our world!

Name: Elmbrook Church
Description: Elmbrook Church is a non-denominational, Bible-based church with two locations in Brookfield, WI & Hartland, WI. We have worship services in both English & Spanish. All are welcome! Our mission is to help people become rooted in Jesus and released to His mission. General Information Brookfield Campus 777 S. Barker Rd. Brookfield, WI Sundays at 9 & 10:45am Lake Country Campus 1100 WI-83 Hartland, WI Sundays at 9 & 10:45am Elmbrook en Español 777 S. Barker Rd. Brookfield, WI Sundays at 10:45am

Name: Muslim Community Center - East Bay
Description:
You Belong Here 
Have you ever felt like you don’t belong? Like the differences between you and your neighbor were too great to find common ground? Join us at your community mosque to hear about the kind of community that has a place for everyone. We weren’t made to do life alone, we were made to do it together. Each day, we find community in faith. ➤ Join us!

A Mosque Where Everybody Belongs
The Muslim Community Center (MCC) – East Bay is a vibrant congregation that exudes a sense of community. Ever day we attempt to love and worship God (great and glorified is He) and follow the teachings of the Holy Qur’an and the guidance of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).

Our conviction is driven by a community-minded approach to Islam that appreciates the many opportunities and challenges of being an American-Muslim in 2021. That ethos is expressed daily through our many services and programs.

We offer spiritual development and youth empowerment programs that aim to be fun and inspiring. We strive for a family-friendly environment that encourages modesty, creativity, and community involvement. We are responsive, forward-thinking, and an environmentally friendly and special-needs friendly mosque.
