Mission Statement – We invite children into a relationship with Jesus Christ through imaginative programs and outreaches, and encourage you, no matter your age, to know Him through Bible reading and prayer, so you can grow as part of a worldwide community of believers.

Name: Potter's House Ministries Romania
Description: We exist to help abandoned babies and to show God's love to those around us.

Name: Open Field Awakening
Description:
Thesis question…

Like the grain of sand precipitates the pearl from its environment, we at OFA are holding a thesis question towards which to draw insightful dialogue, the cultivation of wisdom, informative and hopefully nourishing prototypes into the emerging ecosystem of care rising to meet the world.

In these times of transformation and potentially terrible upheaval, how do we ground our feet in the web of life and yet reach as far as we may into the world in service to a holistic flourishing for all?

Name: Christian Medical Fellowship New Zealand
Description:
Christian Medical Fellowship New Zealand (CMFnz) is a national network of Christian doctors and medical students whose vision is to live wholeheartedly for Christ. CMFnz exists to support and equip doctors and medical students to grow personally and professionally in Christian faith and expression in New Zealand.

Key focuses in supporting our members include a national conference, Tuakana mentoring support, public advocacy on ethically sensitive legislation, regional groups, and more, with significant potential for growth.

We are also a member of the International Christian Medical and Dental Association (ICMDA).

Name: Interim Ministry Network - (IMN)
Description:
For over four decades, IMN has dedicated itself to the health and wellness of faith communities. The wellness of a congregation is influenced by three kinds of learned leadership skills - prevention of unhealthy practices before they take root, maintenance of congregational health during times of stress or change and restorative care when it is required.

IMN has a skilled and proven faculty are practicing ministers and rabbis with years of ecumenical education experience. It offers regularly scheduled training programs, dedicated and specific news sources, an annual international conference, an advanced skills designation program (PTS and Church Consultants) and membership in a professional association of practitioners. IMN provides clergy, administrators and lay leaders with contemporary education and training to help them avoid or reduce the severity of unhealthy practices, manage the effects of change and restore spiritual wellness where it has been lost.

Name: Islamconnect
Description: Wij streven ernaar de moslimgemeenschap in Nederland te verbinden door een uitgebreid overzicht te bieden van moskeeën en islamitische organisaties. Met onze interactieve kaart en zoekfunctie maken we het gemakkelijk om moskeeën in jouw omgeving te vinden, inclusief gedetailleerde informatie over faciliteiten. Daarnaast bieden we een overzicht van islamitische organisaties, van onderwijsinstellingen tot liefdadigheidsorganisaties, zodat de moslimgemeenschap de juiste hulp en ondersteuning kan vinden. In sha Allah zullen we dit platform blijven uitbreiden om de moslimgemeenschap verder te versterken.

Name: THE APOSTOLIC CHURCH
Description: THE APOSTOLIC CHURCH is a religious institutions company based out of 8844 PURITAN ST , DETROIT, Michigan, United States.

Name: Favor Church
Description:
We are a bold, passionate, spirit-filled church for imperfect people. We love Jesus and people, and we have a lot of fun doing both.

Join us LIVE IN-PERSON at Crowne Plaza, Manila Galleria – every Sunday at 10AM, 1PM, and 4PM

Find us on Instagaram @favor.mnl

#favorchurch #churchforimperfectpeople #thefamilyyouvebeenlookingfor

Name: American Ethical Union
Description: The American Ethical Union (AEU) creates, nurtures, and inspires ethical humanist communities to foster a world that is democratic, compassionate, just, and sustainable. The AEU is a federation of Ethical Societies throughout the USA. Ethical Humanism/Ethical Culture is an alternative to traditional religion, often referred to as a non-theistic or humanist Movement because it focuses on ethics over speculative theology. Our members work to foster a world that honors the worth of every individual, nurtures ethical relationships, and builds social justice. We believe in deed before creed and seek partnerships with groups dedicated to empowering everyone through service and activism. We advocate for reason, compassion, and rational thinking so that we can celebrate with and support each other through life.

Name: Emanuel Congregation: Reform Synagogue Chicago
Description: At Emanuel Congregation, we open our doors to all who seek richer, more meaningful lives. Together, our diverse community engages in prayer, lifelong learning and tikkun olam (repairing the world), empowering adults and children alike to apply Jewish values to our everyday lives and to be a collective force for good.

Name: Dallas Lutheran School
Description: Dallas Lutheran School empowers students to discover their God-given potential.

Name: Ministérios Pão Diário
Description:
O ano de 1938 marcou o início de uma grande história para Ministérios Pão Diário. Há mais de 83 anos, um homem de fé começou um programa de rádio chamado Escola Bíblica de Detroit, em Michigan, EUA, para compartilhar palavras sábias e de valor eterno. O doutor M. R. DeHaan passou a transcrever suas mensagens a pedido dos seus ouvintes que as usavam como material de estudo. Hoje, anos mais tarde, esta iniciativa ainda alcança inúmeras pessoas ao redor do mundo, servindo com recursos bíblicos em 58 idiomas e em 150 países.
No Brasil, a tradução e distribuição são feitas desde 1980. Contudo, o escritório foi inaugurado em 2001 e a partir dele, cooperamos com mais 10 países: Argentina, Colômbia, Peru Honduras, México, Jamaica, Guiana, Trinidad e Tobago, Portugal e Espanha.

Por mais de 83 anos, temos testemunhado a fidelidade divina na missão de Ministérios Pão Diário. E sabemos que é por meio de sua cooperação, família, amigos e igreja que podemos compartilhar as boas-novas do amor, graça e perdão de Deus em todo o mundo.

Name: First Presbyterian Church of Colorado Springs
Description:
A worshiping community in the heart of downtown Colorado Springs, reflecting the love of Jesus to be Light + Life for the City

First Pres is part of ECO: A Covenant Order of Evangelical Presbyterians.

Name: KINGDOM PREP LUTHERAN HIGH SCHOOL INC (Creating a brotherhood in Christ for lives of purpose)
Description: KINGDOM PREP LUTHERAN HIGH SCHOOL INC is a religious institutions company based out of 2520 N WAUWATOSA AVE, Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, United States.

Name: Grace Community School Southwest Florida
Description:
Grace Community Schools has been southwest Florida's leader in early childhood education since 1986. Our innovative approach to early childhood education has helped many children begin reading before Kindergarten. We believe that reading builds self-esteem and a sense of accomplishment, something that is necessary for every child.

The most important decision that you make for your child's life is that of early childhood education. A poor start in education could make it difficult or even impossible for your child to succeed throughout the educational process. Attending Grace Community School provides your child with every advantage necessary to succeed in his or her chosen path.

Name: Kloster Kappel
Description: Das Kloster Kappel ist ein Seminarhotel und Bildungshaus der Evangelisch-reformierten Landeskirche des Kantons Zürich. Zeitgemässe christliche Spiritualität & Theologie mit weitem Herz und Horizont, im Dialog mit Kunst & Kultur.

Name: UCOB - União Centro Oeste Brasileida da IASD
Description: Sede Administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo para a região Centro Oeste do Brasil.

Name: Irish Church Missions Dublin Bible Talks- Forged for Work Ireland
Description:
Mid-week lunch-time Bible teaching to forge Christian workers for their life in the workplace, and to reach others with the extraordinary message about Jesus.

Wednesdays at 1pm (Dublin Time) on ZOOM using this link - https://bit.ly/DublinBIbleTalks

Attending lunch-time talks will help Christians:
* Stand Out - a simple way of publicly identifying as a Christian
* Invite - the talks are public and free, a way of introducing colleagues to what the Bible teaches about Jesus
* Grow - the message of Jesus saves, and also forges us for our life and work as God's people.
* Share - a Christian in the workplace is the most important person their colleagues know. They hold in their mouths the saving message of Jesus.  Hearing the Bible taught forges us for this work.

Name: Blue Lotus Meditation and Mindfulness Center
Description: The Blue Lotus Meditation and Mindfulness Center offers individual and group talks. Instructional sessions, called Dharma talks, can range from finding inner peace to dealing with anxiety. Sessions are not dogmatic, for that is not what the Buddha taught, but instead are reflective of both nature and human nature. When we are mindful then we learn what’s truly important about ourselves and the world we live in.

Name: Jesus Is Lord
Description: Jesus Christ did not come to condemn you, Jesus came to save you from your sins. Hear ye the word of the LORD.

Name: YatraDham.Org! Though
Description: YatraDham is a travel agency that offers online booking of rooms and accommodations in Dharamshala, ashram, and mutt for guests and groups.

Name: TNTT
Description:
Who are we?
The Vietnamese Eucharistic Youth Movement is a non-profit organization, under the leadership of the Catholic Church. Its aim is to teach youths to be virtuous people and good Christians. It also offers apostolate services for the youth. Throughout its years of service, the Movement has kept pace with social and cultural changes of the day in an attempt to reach out to the youth of all times.
 
Our Purpose
The Eucharistic Youth Movement has two general purposes:
1. To educate and to train youths in becoming a better person as well as an excellent Christian.
2. To organize and to guide all youths in spreading the Good News of the Gospel and to actively be involved in working for the good of society through charitable services and helping others.
 
Our Foundation
The Eucharistic Youth Movement utilizes God's Word in the Scriptures and the teaching of the Catholic Churchas the basis for educating and guiding the youth in its activities.
 
Our Ideal
Eucharistic Youth Movement accepts the Eucharistic Jesus Christ as its focal point, as source of spiritual life, and as ideal for the life of its members.
 
Our Principles:
1. Live God's Word and be united with the Eucharistic Christ through Prayer, Communion, Sacrifice, and Apostolic Work under the guidance of the Holy Spirit, particularly apostolic work by the youth: "Theyouth must do apostolic work first and directly to the youth" (Decree Lay Apostolicity, no. 12)
2. Love and honor the Blessed Virgin Mary, Mother of the Savior, so that through Our Mother, we receive Christ and take Christ into our lives in a perfect way.
3. Honor the Vietnamese Martyrs; follow their examples to become witnesses for the Good News of Christ.
4. Love and obey the representative of Christ, the Pope, who is the leader of the Eucharistic Youth, and at the same time pray and implement the monthly wishes of the Holy Father.
5. Improve humanity; protect and develop Vietnamese traditions and culture.

Name: Encounter Jesus Ministries international
Description:
Encounter Jesus Ministries International (EJMI) is a non-denominational, inter-denominational ministry with an apostolic mandate to raise believers who are sustaining an experiential knowledge of God and walking in the fullness of their eternal ordinations.
Our Mission:
Sustaining an experiential knowledge of God and walking in the fullness of our eternal ordinations.
Our Vision:
To raise a tribe of sons that do the will of their heavenly Father; Priests that bear the burdens of their Lord and Kings that advance the Kingdom of their God and reign in life. (Eph 4.11-13)

Name: Centre Catholique Romand de Formations en Église (CCRFE)
Description: Les évêques romands ont institué le Centre catholique romand de formations en Eglise (CCRFE), dont le mandat est de «planifier, coordonner et dispenser la formation humaine, spirituelle, intellectuelle et pastorale des candidats au sacerdoce, au diaconat et à un ministère ou service d’agent pastoral laïc, ainsi que la formation continue des prêtres, diacres et agents pastoraux laïcs»

Name: C3 Church
Description: C3 Church exists to love people to a growing relationship with Jesus.

Name: Central Association of the Miraculous Medal
Description:
Our Mission at CAMM is simple: to help continue the work of St. Vincent de Paul by supporting the ministry of the priests and brothers who follow in his footsteps. For more than 100 years, CAMM has been dedicated to spreading devotion to Mary Immaculate and her Miraculous Medal, helping the formation and education of seminarians, providing care to the aged and infirm Vincentian Priests and Brothers of the Eastern Province, and supporting programs that provide assistance to the poor.

CAMM oversees the operation of The Miraculous Medal Shrine, home of the Perpetual Miraculous Medal Monday Novena. Located in the East Germantown section of Philadelphia, the Shrine is a sanctuary for prayer, meditation, and pilgrimage to God and to the Blessed Virgin Mary. Visitors are also encouraged to enjoy our world-class Art Museum, featuring more than 500 historical works of Marian and religious art.

Name: St. Mary Student Parish
Description:
Located two blocks from the central campus of the University of Michigan, St. Mary Student Parish has been serving the Catholic community at U of M for more than 90 years. As a Jesuit parish, we strive in the Ignatian tradition to help everyone discover God already at work in their lives.

The Diocese of Lansing has designated St Mary Student Parish as the Ann Arbor Catholic parish with particular responsibility for serving the students, faculty and staff of the University of Michigan, with particular emphasis on the students. In addition, we are blessed with support from a strong network of alumni and friends. Each group has a role to play in keeping parish life vibrant, diverse and welcoming.

Name: City Church Chicago
Description:
Kent Munsey + Alli Munsey are the senior pastors of City Church Chicago - a church right in the heart of down town Chicago.  In October of 2010, Kent and Alli planted City Church in Chicago at our River West location (777 N. Green Street).

Pastor Kent + Alli’s vision is to bring the message of Jesus Christ to the city of Chicago in a fresh and relevant way by building a community of people that LOVE people to life in Christ, LIVE planted in God's House, and LEAD change in the world. 

Kent and Alli have three amazing boys, Malachi, Kausti, and baby Thaj. While they love spending time at home with their family, they truly enjoy the city. From pastoring and parenting to leading and loving - this God loving couple are determined to make the name of JESUS known in the Windy City and beyond!

Name: Diocese of St Edmundsbury and Ipswich
Description:
Supporting a Christian lifestyle in all of us for the benefit of all.  Our vision is to have flourishing congregations making a difference. 

With 443 parish churches and a Cathedral, our presence is in every community.  We also have 87 Church of England schools across Suffolk with 15,000 children receiving a distinctively Christian education.

Name: Canal 27 (Ministerio de Motivación Cristiana)
Description: El Ministerio de Motivación Cristiana es una corporación de varias emrpresas destinadas a llevar el conocimiento de la Palabra de Dios a la población de Guatemala.   El conglomerado incluye Canal 27, Radio Exclusiva, Librerías Qumran, Seminario Bíblico Teológico e Iglesia La Familia de Dios.  La corporación está liderada por el conocido Pastor Luis Fernando Solares.

Name: Bhaktimay
Description: Bhaktimay is a devotion-driven organization dedicated to making sacred pujas, rituals, prasadam, and chadhava accessible across India. With a mission to preserve Sanatan Dharma and deliver authentic spiritual experiences, we have proudly served over 50,000 devotees nationwide. From Rudrabhishek, Mahamrityunjay Jaap, and Navratri Anusthans to karmakand rituals like Narayan Bali, Naagbali, and Pitru Tarpan at sacred kshetras including Prayagraj, Kashi, Ujjain, Trimbakeshwar, and Gaya, every ritual is performed with scriptural precision by authentic priests. Each sankalp is taken with care, and prasadam is delivered to homes with reliability and devotion. Combining tradition with technology, Bhaktimay uses secure systems, WhatsApp updates, and a dedicated mobile app to ensure transparency and ease. Our message is simple: devotion must never be distant. With every puja, every offering, and every devotee we serve, Bhaktimay keeps India’s timeless traditions alive.

Name: Asbury United Methodist Church
Description:
Asbury United Methodist Church has a long and rich history. Beginning in our ministry in 1888, we were a mission of First Methodist Episcopal Church South and Winfield Episcopal Methodist Church South. The newly formed congregation first met in an old store building on Eighth Street.  In 1906 the church moved to 12th and Schiller ,then in 1982 moved to our current location.
Almost immediately the church outgrew its new facilities. More classrooms and parking were needed. The vision we have as a community of faith reaching out to West Little Rock in ministry and service to God is the same vision that those pioneers had in 1888 when a mission was started in an old grocery store. Like those early members of Asbury, we too will reach out to do what is needed to fulfill our calling. Our challenge today is to be all God calls us to be.

Worship Schedule and Styles:

Sunday Morning
9:00 A.M.: Sanctuary Worship - The sanctuary service is a more formal style of worship in which we worship God through traditional hymns, the historic Creeds, responsive readings, a traditional choir, and the proclamation of the Word.

10:00 A.M.: Sunday School Classes-For Children, Youth and Adults.

11:00 A.M.: The LAUNCH Worship (Wilson Activity Center) - The LAUNCH service is a more relaxed setting in which we worship God alongside a praise and worship band. We join together in worship through contemporary and modern songs accompanied by multi-media, as well as, hear the Word proclaimed and how it relates to our lives today.

Please check the church website for upcoming services.

Name: Comunidad Amijai
Description:
Amijai es una Comunidad Judía Masortí (Conservadora) creada en Marzo de 1993, con el objetivo de construir un espacio de espiritualidad y vida judía en un ámbito familiar, igualitario e inclusivo.

Su nombre significa MI PUEBLO VIVE y sugiere como horizonte una forma de vida activa, comprometida con los valores de nuestra tradición. Es a partir de este contexto, donde entendemos que la espiritualidad se manifiesta no sólo en el culto y las costumbres milenarias, sino también en la música, el arte y toda expresión cultural del ser humano, sin distinción de origen, nacionalidad o religión.

Su sinagoga, ubicada en el barrio de Belgrano, se inauguró en el año 2004. Esta, además de caracterizarse por un estilo sobrio e imponente, rodeado de jardines y obras de arte, cuenta con una excelente acústica elogiada por críticos especializados. Por tal motivo, a la par de ser utilizado para servicios religiosos, funciona como auditorio con capacidad para 850 personas y ofrece conciertos y recitales abiertos a todo público, los que se destacan por ser de primer nivel e incluir artistas reconocidos tanto del ámbito nacional como internacional.

En Amijai desarrollamos programas de Acción Social, mantenidos exclusivamente por sus asociados y la generosa contribución voluntaria de sus donantes. El beneficio obtenido con la organización de eventos culturales, nos permite seguir soñando y continuar con nuestra tarea religiosa, educativa y social.

Name: Molloy College
Description: Religous Education formation program for grades 1-8.

Name: St. Monica Catholic Community
Description: St. Monica Catholic Church in Santa Monica is a diverse and vibrant Catholic community.  It is a home that offers many opportunities to enrich your spiritual life, gain new insights in faith, and to serve those in need. Come join us in our mission to form loving disciples who will transform the world.

Name: European Union & International Affairs Office of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
Description: The European Union & International Affairs Office of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Brussels works with and fosters dialogue among EU stakeholders, including opinion leaders, academics, religious and political leaders engaged in freedom of religion or belief, humanitarian assistance, volunteerism and youth. It is also a member of the European Platform on Religious Intolerance and Discrimination (EPRID), a network of civil society organisations, including religious and non-religious associations, that aims to contribute to the collective promotion and protection of the right to freedom of religion or belief (#FoRB) in the world as defined by Article 18 of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.

Name: Alpha Singapore
Description:
Alpha Singapore is a non-profit organisation that exists to help churches and groups to use Alpha. Our national office is part of a global team, residing in more than 70 countries.

The Alpha Course began at Holy Trinity Brompton in central London, United Kingdom in the late 1970s, initially as a means of presenting the basics of the Christian faith to new believers in a relaxed and informal setting.

By 1990, Alpha became a central feature of the church's life when former lawyer Nicky Gumbel realised how this simple course could also appeal to non-churchgoers. He adapted the course to give it the feel that would suit this group.

The use of Alpha spread during the 1990s, initially in the UK and then internationally, as more churches and groups found it a helpful way to answer questions about the Christian faith in an informal setting. 

Today, Alpha is an 11-week course that creates a space, online or in person, where people are excited to bring their friends for a conversation about faith, life and God. It is a tool built for local churches based on hospitality, sharing and open conversations. It is run all over the world by Christians of all major traditions and denominations to provide an expression of proclamation, service and witness. Millions of people have experienced Alpha in more than 100 countries and over 100 languages around the globe.

Name: Iglesia Misión Carismática Internacional
Description: Nuestro anhelo es que cada persona que nos visite pueda tener una experiencia personal con Jesús y su vida sea transformada. Nuestra misión es que cada miembro dentro de la iglesia pueda desarrollarse como un líder que pueda influir en 12 personas, y llevarlos a ser verdaderos discípulos de Jesús por medio del mensaje de la Cruz y del poder de la Sangre.

Name: Syracuse Hillel
Description:
To create a diverse, dynamic, and welcoming Jewish community on the Syracuse University Campus.

Hillel strives to empower students by deepening their commitment to being Jewish. We also seek to engage students by developing multiple opportunities, or entry points, into Jewish life for unaffiliated Jewish students. To be successful, Hillel must create an environment of exciting programs that compel students to join the worldwide Jewish family.

Please join our Linkedin group! "Hillel at Syracuse University: Students, Parents, Alumni"

Name: Persekutuan Mahasiswa Kristen ITS
Description: Persekutuan Mahasiwa Kristen ITS adalah sebuah organisasi yang dibentuk untuk mengayomi seluruh Mahasiswa Kristen yang berkuliah di Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember.

Name: Emmanuel Church
Description: Emmanuel Church exists to see people come to Christ and grow in Christ. We focus on sharing the love of Jesus, presenting the truth of God’s Word to all who attend in the hope that they will open their heart up to Him, and guiding them to grow in their faith as followers of Jesus. All people matter to God, so all people matter to us.

Name: Spruce Lake Retreat
Description:
Are you a youth worker, pastor, or nonprofit leader looking for a new location for your group’s next retreat? Consider hosting your retreat at Spruce Lake Retreat. Located on over 800 acres of beautiful woodlands in the Pocono Mountains of northeastern Pennsylvania, Spruce Lake makes planning and leading a retreat simple. We take care of accommodations and meals for your group, so you just have to focus on the activities and spending more time with your group. 
Your group will love exploring our trails and finding streams and waterfalls. Or play some of your favorite games — like basketball, dodgeball, tennis, gaga, soccer, and more. If they are feeling adventurous, let your group try our high ropes course, vertical playpen, climbing tower, or 500-foot zip line. 

Looking for a conference center for a church, business, or denominational event? Our Spruce Lodge is a full-service conference center. With hotel and motel style accommodations for up to 600 participants, flexible meeting spaces, and buffet-style dining, your entire event can happen on Spruce Lake property. That means your guests will be raving about your conference and the beautiful mountaintop location. And we are only a few hours from New York, Philadelphia, and Delaware, making it easy for participants to arrive here. 

In addition to our retreat and conference center, we host hundreds of children for week-long summer camp. Kids age 7-18 can enjoy playing games, swimming in our pool, building lasting relationships, and learning more about Jesus Christ.
Founded in 1963, Spruce Lake exists to help people enjoy God’s creation and to point them toward Christ. We are a member of the Christian Camp & Conference Association (CCCA) and the Mennonite Camping Association (MCA). 

Visit our website or give us call to find out how affordable it is to host your next event at Spruce Lake.

Name: Heartland Community Church
Description: "A church for the unchurched."

Name: Adore Ministries
Description:
Adore Ministries is a grassroots ministry centered on knowing, loving and serving God.

Vision:	
Adore ministries envisions lives, and indeed churches, renewed through people worshiping God with their whole lives through knowing, loving and serving God in the ordinary and extraordinary.  We accomplish this in moments, with movement, for mission.

InMOMENTS: Adore Ministries is about providing people with the opportunity to experience Jesus in life changing moments so that their lives can radiate His glory for all eternity. From city-wide worship nights, to conferences, to retreats and home gatherings, we at Adore Ministries invite people to experience the Risen Lord in new and powerful ways.   

withMOVEMENT: This is a lived love fostered with intentional community. The particular way we live this out as Adore Ministries is through the “Family Dinner movement”. This movement is built upon fostering an evangelistic community in which brotherly and neighborly love can be lived out in an authentic way in intentional community. Another integral part of this is lived through following our rule of life, a general blue print of the expectations of adore missionaries and community. Do you know your neighbors?

forMISSION: This is lived by going radically out to the margins. This is the missional component of Adore Ministries and serves by going specifically to those parishes and neighborhoods in need of quality evangelization. This also includes activating Project Starfish, our disaster relief effort for when crisis devastates one of our mission communities.

Name: ICF Church
Description: Church planting movement with 75+ locations in 13 nations

Name: URJ Camp Newman
Description:
URJ Camp Newman offers fun, immersive Jewish experiences that empower children, teens and adults to better themselves, their communities and the world. Our aim is to become a year-round hub for Jewish engagement—broadcasting the top hits from our camp playlist, far and wide, all year. We accomplish this through three key offerings:
 
Summer Camp
From our popular summer camp in Santa Rosa, to social action corps nationwide, to educational trips to Israel, our summer programs empower children, teens and adults to better themselves, their communities, and the world.

Year-Round Programs
We offer meaningful Jewish experiences for all ages, all year, in Santa Rosa and beyond! Inspired by the magic of camp, our programs foster a love of Judaism while connecting you to our local and global Jewish community.

Retreat Center
Nestled in the wine country, our Retreat & Conference Center is the perfect setting for your corporate, congregational or family retreat. Enjoy multiple indoor and outdoor spaces, acres of hiking trails, and more.

Name: Reconciliation Initiatives
Description: RI offers a programme called Reconciling Mission which resources participants with a vision for mission as part of joining in God’s reconciling work, marked by deep engagement with local communities, along with ways for the church to play a creative role in promoting reconciliation within society, building on the assets within local neighbourhoods.

Name: King of Kings Church
Description: King of Kings Church began in 1962 with 75 members. Since then, God has broadened our reach and influence in the city. It is our desire to partner with other life-giving churches to see our city, region and beyond reached with the Good News of Jesus. King of Kings is affiliated with the Lutheran Church – Missouri Synod, a mainline Protestant denomination.

Name: The Hills Church
Description:
The Hills Church exists to make and grow followers of Jesus. We do this together by being with Jesus, becoming like Jesus, and doing the things he did.

Visit one of our three campuses in the DFW area: Dallas, North Richland Hills, Keller, and West Fort Worth. We can't wait to meet you!

Name: Brentwood United Methodist Church
Description:
Brentwood United Methodist Church is a vital faith community that is "making disciples of Jesus Christ for the transformation of the world." We do this by connecting people to God and one another, preparing them to live as disciples, and sending them back out into our world. 

Our core values establish that every aspect of Brentwood UMC is: 

• Christ-Centered - We passionately strive to stay focused on Christ alone. Following the example of Christ, we seek to live holy lives, sharing the love and grace of Christ with all persons.

• Teachable - Recognizing that there is always more to learn, we humbly seek God’s guidance as we study scripture and pray for discernment at and across all life stages and ages; striving to be both prophetic and pastoral. 

• Ministry for all believers - We are a hands-on congregation, where everyone has a role in ministry in the church, to the community and the world.

• Risk-taking - Through spirit-led and team-based discernment, we are willing to take risks for the sake of the mission.

• Wesleyan - As a community aligned with the teachings and practices of John Wesley, we believe in the Trinity - Father, Son and Holy Spirit; the centrality of grace; continued growth in personal and social holiness; and the primacy of Scripture, along with tradition, reason, and experience for practical and theological discernment.

Name: Jesus king of Kings Online Church
Description:
Welcome to JESUS KING OF KINGS
Christian Church, Healing and Deliverance Ministry. Apostle Francisco Gómez greets you from Victorville, California, United States. Here we fight the Spiritual War, Prayer of power; place to receive healing, deliverance and revelation of the word, place for those who joyfully await the second coming of our Lord. Where you will learn to live a holy life, to be a disciple of Jesus Christ, not by human strength but by the guidance of God's spirit. Jesus Christ said be holy because I am holy and without holiness no one will look at God...

If you like to see other videos like this, don't forget to subscribe to the channel click here https://bit.ly/2GcGA9W 

Mark 16: 17-20 And these signs will follow those who believe: In my name they will cast out demons; speak new languages; 18 They will take away snakes, and if they drink anything deadly, it will not harm them; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will get well. 19 And the Lord, after he had spoken to them, was received up into heaven, and sat down at the right hand of God. 20 And they went forth and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them, and confirming the word with the signs that followed. Amen.

James 5: 14-16 Is any sick among you? Call the elders of the church, and pray for him, anointing him with oil in the name of the Lord. 15 And the prayer of faith will save the sick, and the Lord will raise him up; and if he has committed sins, they will be forgiven him. 16 Confess your trespasses to one another and pray for one another so that you may be healed. The effective prayer of the righteous can do much.

Ephesians 6:12 For we do not fight against blood and flesh, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual wickedness in the heavenly regions.

2 Corinthians 10: 4 because the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but powerful in God for the destruction of strongholds,

Name: RCCG Pastors' Seed Family
Description:
In 12 years, PSF's story has been a testimony of God's mercy
and grace. What started as a simple conversation in 2008
between two passionate youth in the Redeemed Christian
Church of God (Leke Adeboye and Ayorinde Adebello) who
saw the struggles of pastor's children and youth of RCCG,
has turned into one of the fastest-growing youth movements
in the body of Christ.

The Pastor's Seeds Family, PSF is the family of seeds of
pastors, ministers, and workers children. Backed firmly with
significant support from the general overseer, members of
the governing council pastors and leaders in RCCG has
grown in membership and support over the past few years.
The Pastor's Seeds Family, PSF has not been without
trials and challenges, but we keep growing in might and
strength as God gives us capacity.

PSF remains faithful to its vision to create an
environment for young people to express themselves,
by using programs and platform to tackle
unconventional issues affecting young people, build
spiritual consciousness, and earthly relevance in seeds.

The pastor's seeds family through its 19 cells has
created a platform for seeds to be built up to dominate
mountains of influence for Christ.

Name: Abounding Grace Ministries
Description: Abounding Grace Ministries was founded by Pastor Rick Del Rio in 1982. The ministry formed as a church designed to specifically meet the needs of the most hardened drug addicts, criminals, and homeless living on the lower east side. Central to our mission is the proclamation of the gospel of Jesus Christ and the spiritual transformation offered through faith in Jesus Christ and obedience to the Bible. Our youth programs aim to empower young people to create and pursue hopeful alternatives to mediocrity, poverty, and delinquency; and to enable youth to develop and realize ambitions and dreams.

Name: Prayer Without Ceasing
Description:
We are told in 1 Thessalonians 5:15-18 to "pray without ceasing" or to "pray continually". Rejoice always, pray without ceasing, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you. Praying without ceasing is all about developing a lifestyle of prayer .

There is a spirit of dependence that should permeate all we do. praying without ceasing means not giving up on prayer. Don’t ever come to a point in your life where you cease to pray at all. Praying repeatedly and often Don’t abandon the God of hope and say, “There’s no use praying.” Jesus is very jealous for us to learn this lesson.

The world presents many things that we could pray to God about: our families, surroundings, neighborhoods, and communities. Our nation, leaders, public servants and agencies. Our economy, sources of income, and commodities. Friends, we need to pray.

Name: Church of England, Diocese of Durham
Description:
The Church of England from the Tyne to the Tees and the Dales to the Sea, blessing our communities in Jesus’ name for the transformation of us all.

The Church of England Diocese of Durham is centred in historic City and County Durham,  the City of Sunderland, the Metropolitan Districts of Gateshead & South Tyneside and also the boroughs of Darlington, Hartlepool, and  of Stockton-on-Tees, north of the River Tees. The mission of the diocese of Durham is to reach out to all people with the Good News of Jesus Christ, through evangelism, social action, community development, engaging with issues of poverty and the environment, Fair Trade, as well as working ecumenically and with other faith groups.

Name: Encounter Ministries - Catholic
Description: Encounter Ministries exists to unleash the transforming power of the Holy Spirit in the world. We do this by teaching, equipping, and activating disciples to demonstrate the love of God through the power of the Holy Spirit in their sphere of influence. Our events include our annual conference in late December/early January, various weekend Schools of Healing and Schools of Prophetic Ministry, and our annual 4-day Summer Intensive Conference. We also run a 2-year Encounter School of Ministry both at our main campus in Michigan as well as 18+ satellite campuses across the country and the world. For more information about attending or hosting a school/event, please visit us at www.encounterministries.us or www.encounterschool.org!

Name: Stronger Network
Description: A resourcing network that seeks to strengthen the UK church through online events, resources & networking opportunities.

Name: St Elizabeth Ann Seton
Description: The Catholic Community of St. Elizabeth Ann Seton strives to be one of the most vibrant and energetic Catholic communities in North Texas.  Our countless list of  ministries, stewardship activities and clubs, makes us an active Catholic center within Collin County  and the Diocese of Dallas.

Name: Freedom In Christ Ministries
Description:
Freedom In Christ Ministries International exists to equip the Church worldwide to make fruitful disciples (not just converts). We do this by producing Biblical resources for church leaders to use and supporting them as they carry out Jesus' commission to make disciples.

Founded in the USA by Dr. Neil T. Anderson in 1989, we now have offices or representatives in around 40 countries and growing fast.

If you have a leadership position of any kind in a church and a heart to see your church make growing, fruitful disciples who are making a real impact in your community, do please find your local representative from the map on the home page at www.ficminternational.org and get in touch with them. We'd love to work with you.

Name: Evangelisch Werkverband
Description: Biddend zoeken naar en werken aan de geestelijke vernieuwing. Het Evangelisch Werkverband is een beweging van geestelijke vernieuwing voor kerk in Nederland, met name voor de Protestantse Kerk.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Houston
Description:
C-Suite for Christ is an international fellowship for Christians in business. There are many ways to join our movement. Help us in our mission of being open about our faith and covering the world in Christ.

Get Involved:
1. Attend a monthly gathering.
Join us each month. Connect with other Christian business leaders.
2. Become a member.
If you are a follower of Jesus Christ and have a significant level of responsibility in your organization, become a member of C-Suite For Christ. Attend our monthly meetings and learn from other members through robust discussions around shared issues of similar complexity and significance.
3. Start a chapter in your city.
Our C-Suite for Christ family is growing. Do you feel a call to help cover the world in Christ? We’re nurturing the beginnings of several new chapters of C-Suite for Christ across the U.S. God is indeed on the move! Plant a chapter near you. Licenses are exclusive to your city. Spots are filling up fast, reserve your area today.
4. Create a corporate partnership.
Invest in your faith and get in front of Christian executives through our partnership opportunities.

For information regarding who we are, our meetings, and membership benefits, please visit our website. If you have specific questions about our chapter or creating a corporate sponsorship, contact Market President Kevin Goodnight at 832-993-1966 or kgoodnight@csuiteforchrist.com.

Name: Bibotalk
Description: BiboTalk é um ministério a serviço da Igreja de Cristo. Nossa missão é despertar o interesse pelo estudo bíblico e pela teologia.

Name: Baptist Churches Of New England, Inc.
Description: Ministry in New England can be hard and lonely. The experienced team at the BCNE assists churches in multiplying Christ-followers through partnering, equipping and encouraging. Let us help you fulfill your vision instead of struggling alone.

Name: Maryknoll Sisters of St. Dominic, Inc.
Description:
We give witness to God's love and devote our lives in service overseas.  As nurses, doctors, teachers, theologians, social workers, environmentalists and more,  we serve the needs of the people – the poor, the ailing and the marginalized –  where we are missioned. Our mission began in 1912,  when we became the first group of Catholic Sisters in the United States founded for overseas mission.  

Today we have approximately 400 Sisters serving in 24 places around the world.

Follow us on:
Facebook-https://www.facebook.com/MaryknollSisters/

Twitter-https://twitter.com/MaryknollSister

Instagram-https://www.instagram.com/maryknollsister/

Name: Together for the Gospel (T4G)
Description:
The T4G 2010 Conference will be held on April 13 - 15, 2010 in Louisville, KY.  Please visit our website: t4g.org

Together for the Gospel (T4G) began as a friendship between four pastors. These friends differed on a number of theological issues, like baptism and the charismatic gifts. But they were committed to standing together for the main thing—the gospel of Jesus Christ..

The four long-time friends, Mark Dever, Ligon Duncan, C. J. Mahaney, and Albert Mohler, also asked their friends Thabiti Anyabwile, John MacArthur, John Piper, and R. C. Sproul to join them for these conferences, since each of these men has been contributing so valuably to the church today.

Name: Spiritual Energy Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Astro Find Panditji powered by Spiritual Energy Pvt. Ltd., is an application, developed in India with the dynamic vision to facilitate the yajmans with all their spiritual needs.
Empowering your Hindu spiritual journey through a seamless blend of tradition and modern technology, Astro Find Panditji is your one-stop shop for all things spiritual. Our user-friendly app connects you with a world of enriching experiences, from online puja booking and live temple darshan to expert consultations in Vedic Astrology, Vastu, Numerology, and Tarot.
Explore your inner world with mantra chanting, bhajan collections, and spiritual blogs. Uncover life's insights through personalized Kundli creation and matching. Find peace and guidance with live darshan of renowned temples and discover delicious prasad recipes.
User-friendly and constantly evolving, Astro Find Panditji is your digital temple,  bridging the gap between faith and technology.  Download the app today and embark on a fulfilling spiritual adventure with Astro Find Panditji!

Name: Northstar Church
Description: A contemporary church in Blacksburg, Virginia.

Name: Diocese of Birmingham in Alabama
Description: Established in 1969 under the patronage of St. Paul, the Roman Catholic Diocese of Birmingham in Alabama is missionary in nature, serving central and northern Alabama.

Name: Temple Israel Minneapolis
Description:
At Temple Israel, Jewish wisdom inspires us as we navigate and improve our ever-changing world. 

The vision of Temple Israel is to be a world leader of innovative Jewish community. 

The values we lead with at Temple are: 
Kedusha (Believing): Our beliefs and experience of the sacred evolve through individual reflection, meaningful ritual, and shared experience with our diverse community. 
Mah'ahsot (Acting): Our actions are influenced by a commitment to tzedakah, tradition, and openness to reinvention in our ongoing pursuit of justice.
Kehillah (Belonging): Our sense of belonging is cultivated by participating in a committed, welcoming, and inclusive community that is there for each of us wherever we are on our journey and whenever we need it.

Name: Saint John Institute
Description:
The Saint John Institute (SJI) was founded to raise up saints to lead by bringing the power of faith to leaders and power of leadership to believers. Since all Christians are called by Christ to live holy lives, they will shape the culture of their workplace, family, and community for Christ by their actions.  Since 2003, SJI has existed to provide inspiration and practical learning for Christians who want to integrate their faith with their daily challenges.
 
Through its four branches, SJI offers retreats, workshops, presentations, pilgrimages, and media that empower people of all ages to boldly live out their faith in the spheres of their leadership.  Through Eagle Eye Ministries, SJI harnesses life-changing excursions to shape youth into virtuous leaders; through the Saint John Leadership Institute, SJI inspires the intellects of Catholic leaders through events at its Denver, CO campus; through the Saint John Leadership Network, SJI evangelizes and supports families and businesses across the U.S. who wish to proclaim their faith in their business and lead their families in the faith. In 2025, the Saint John Institute will launch DareGreatThings.org, where users can journey deeper into their identity as Christian leaders and discover the call of Christ to dare great things in their lives.

From in-person events to books, to outdoor excursions and SJI’s podcast & digital presence, there is something for you. Learn more about the Saint John Institute at https://saintjohninstitute.org/.

Name: C-Suite for Christ Tampa Bay
Description: C-Suite for Christ is an international fellowship for Christian business executives. There are many ways to join our movement. Help us in our mission of being open about our faith and covering the world in Christ.

Name: Persekutuan Oikoumene BINUS University
Description:
PO BINUS (Persekutuan Oikoumene BINUS University) / ECF BINUS (Ecumenical Christian Fellowship BINUS University) is the only Christian student forum recognized by BINUS University. 

ECF is an interdenominational Christian fellowship and does not belong to any church or institution, this makes Christian students in BINUS University AUTOMATICALLY members of ECF. 

ECF started from students, are managed by students, and serves students. Founded in 1986, to this day ECF has been serving students in BINUS University located at Kemanggisan, Alam Sutera, Bekasi, Bandung, Malang & Senayan regional campuses.

Name: Lighthouse NG
Description: Lighthouse is committed to reproduce leaders who become change agents. We are passionate about teaching God’s Word, helping individuals discover their uniqueness in God so they can take ownership of their gift to fill the various sectors of the marketplace.

Name: ACU Graduate School of Theology
Description: The Graduate School of Theology offers master's level degree programs that train men and women for Christian leadership and ministry in all its forms. We are not here to offer all the answers to life and faith, but we can teach you to ask good questions and approach a changing world with virtuous curiosity and theological rigor.  Our faculty are highly accessible, pastorally minded, and world-renowned scholars in their fields.

Name: NorthStar Church - Kennesaw, GA
Description:
Our mission at NorthStar Church is to help people find their way Home! First - and most importantly, we want to point people to a relationship with Jesus Christ and an eternal Home with him! Second, we'd love to help them find a church home - a body of believers who can gather together and support, encourage, and serve one another and our community.

Since we first began in January 1997, we have made it a priority to partner with our incredible communities of Acworth and Kennesaw. We understand that the better our cities are, the better we all are!

Name: Theologische Universiteit Kampen
Description: The Theological University aims to provide academic education in the field of theology to students. Two Master’s programmes are offered in addition to a Bachelor course. Our three-year Master’s programme is a course educating students for the position of minister in the Reformed Churches (liberated). The one-year general Master’s programme is directed at academic practice of theology, with a major of personal preference. In addition to academic education, specific academic research is conducted. We also provide consultation and services to congregations, churches, and ministers. Among other things, this involves extended education of ministers by means of courses.

Name: College Church in Wheaton
Description:
Since 1861, College Church in Wheaton has stood for the gospel of Jesus Christ.

This focus came through the vision of its founding pastor, Jonathan Blanchard, also the first President of Wheaton College.  While not officially affiliated with Wheaton College, the church first met on the college campus.

Unlike some historic institutions, College Church has never relied upon a charitable foundation. It runs on faith by the generosity of the members and attenders of the church who are committed to its gospel vision.
Core to the essence of the church has been compassion. Blanchard was an abolitionist who worked against slavery during most of his life. Similarly, during The Great Depression, rather than look after itself, the church committed to a massive long term investment in global missions.  That legacy continues today with hundreds of missionaries around the world.

The value of God’s Word as the message of hope, and the anchor of faith, is integral to College Church’s identity.  Then…and now.

Name: Anglican Diocese of Niagara
Description: We're a diocese of the Anglican Church of Canada that is called to life and compelled to love! Ignited by the irresistible love of Jesus and renewed by the Holy Spirit, we partner with God to deepen faith, share stories and care for God’s world through our parishes in Hamilton and Guelph, the regions of Niagara and Halton, as well as Wellington, Haldimand and Dufferin counties. The Right Reverend Susan Bell is the Bishop of Niagara.

Name: Mission Community Church
Description:
Mission Community Church was established in the Fall of 1995.  Weekend worship services are Sundays at 9a, 1030a and 1159a .

Located at Power & Elliot in Gilbert, Arizona.

Currently averaging 5000 people in attendance every weekend.

The vision of the church is to be an irresistible church for our next door neighbors and the next generation, leading them to find thriving life in Jesus. Because Jesus changes everything for everyone.

Name: Newfrontiers
Description:
Newfrontiers is a worldwide family of churches together on a mission, with over 700 churches in over 60 nations.

With a passionate commitment to build the church according to New Testament principles, we believe that the most effective form of evangelism is worked out from strong local churches.

There are local churches where each member participates, the gifts of the Spirit are outworked, there is joy in caring one for the other, there is a desire to make a difference in society and an urgency to reach those in need. We aim to achieve this by;

    *      restoring the church
    *      making disciples
    *      training leaders
    *      starting churches
    *      reaching the nations.

Name: Stichting Choice
Description: Ons DNA is mensen inspireren en activeren om in hun eigen omgeving het verschil te kunnen maken.

Name: Multiracial Reverted Muslims
Description:
Empowering People Changing Lives

We are here to help you to find the truth about Islam.

Multiracial Reverted Muslims (MRM) is a registered non-profit da’wah organization, founded by Brother Firdaus Wong Wai Hung since 5th February 2014. Here in MRM, we provide a platform for da’wah (meaning “invitation” in Arabic) to the not-yet-Muslims in and out of Malaysia as well as to enable reverts to interact, share ideas, and to find support either on social media or at our centre.

Name: La Chapelle
Description:
Une église pertinente et jeune d’esprit ; inclusive, créative et généreuse. Une église qui défie les perceptions et restaure l’image du christianisme auprès de la société. Une église centrée sur le message d’espoir et d’amour de Jésus-Christ. Une église qui aime Dieu, qui aime les gens, qui aime sa ville. Une église qui accompagne les personnes dans leur cheminement spirituel et qui les équipe dans tous les domaines de leur vie afin qu’à leur tour, ils influencent celle des autres.

Tous les dimanches
ROSEMONT | 6030 rue Marquette • 9h45 11h45
AHUNTSIC | 100 Rue Sauvé E• 9h45
MILE END | 5240 Av du Parc • 17h00 19h00

Name: Benediktinerstift Admont
Description: Das Benediktinerstift Admont – ein seit Jahrhunderten bestehendes spirituelles Zentrum in der Steiermark gelegen, zählt zu einem der Leitbetriebe des Ennstals. Die in unterschiedlichen Branchen tätigen Unternehmensbeteiligungen zeugen von der wirtschaftlich langfristigen und nachhaltigen Ausrichtung unserer Institution.

Name: United Kingdom Christian Church
Description: United Kingdom became the name of a handful of faithful believers who decided it was time to work not as an individual church, but as part of God’s Team.  We began a study of God’s Word and came across King David bringing unity to the divided nation of Israel.  It was very apparent that the moment had arrived to close all connection with personal pursuits and now was the time to follow our Bishop’s (Bishop Eddie L. Long) heart and work with only a Kingdom Agenda in mind.

Name: First Presbyterian Church of Nashville
Description: First Presbyterian Church, the oldest worshipping community in Nashville, is a multi-generational church family where each family treasures the presence and the gifts that others bring to it. The doors to First Presbyterian Church are wide open to you.

Name: The Church at Rocky Peak
Description: A church located in Chatsworth, CA with a vision to unleash a movement of passionate Christ-followers who are pursuing God, loving people, serving sacrificially, and sharing Christ.

Name: el Lloc de la Dona
Description:
El Lloc de la Dona es una entidad social ubicada en el barrio del Raval, Barcelona, dedicada a acompañar y apoyar a mujeres en contextos de trabajo sexual. Como proyecto de la Congregación de las Hermanas Oblatas del Santísimo Redentor, nuestra misión es promover la autonomía e integración social y laboral de estas mujeres, así como la sensibilización y transformación social.

Nos guiamos por valores de respeto, dignidad, diversidad, compromiso solidario y esperanza, creando espacios de acogida y oportunidades para la transformación personal y social.

Name: The Falls Church Fellows
Description:
The Fellows at The Falls Church Anglican offers a nine-month, Christian leadership development program for recent college graduates at the intersection of faith and work.  It focuses on intentional vocational growth through a paid internship, practical discipleship experiences and graduate studies, service opportunities, and family living, all in the context of a community of believers.

Located in the Washington D.C. metro area, The Falls Church Fellows experience launches participants into seamless lives of faith for the sake of others and the glory of God.

Be transformed.  Know God.  Know yourself.  Know others.  Start well.

Name: IGMG Jongeren Zuid Nederland
Description: IGMG Jongeren Zuid Nerd is een landelijke islamitische jongerenorganisatie die jongeren mobiliseert om vanuit een islamitisch perspectief actief bij te dragen aan een positieve ontwikkeling van de samenleving, zowel binnen als buiten de islamitische gemeenschap.

Name: Epic Movement
Description:
Epic Movement is a Cru ministry, and shares in its Statement of Faith and mission to join God’s work of transforming lives of students and faculty, so that their hearts and lives are given to Jesus Christ. As an ethnic focused ministry, Epic specifically focuses its resources, thinking, and training on transformation and mission among Asian Americans.

Young people today have a stronger voice and a broader reach than ever before. Epic Movement wants to help them enact the positive change they’re called to on their campuses and beyond.

Name: Church of the Brethren, Inc
Description: We are a body of Christians committed to continuing the work of Jesus peacefully and simply, and to living out our faith in community. We have nearly 800 congregations across the United States, with sister churches in Brazil, Burundi, Democratic Republic of Congo, Dominican Republic, Haiti, India, Nigeria, Rwanda, South Sudan, Spain, and Venezuela. Based in the Anabaptist and Pietist faith traditions, the Church of the Brethren is a Historic Peace Church. We celebrated our 300th anniversary in 2008.

Name: kingdom of God
Description: "the kingdom of God is in your midst." ~Luke 17:21

Name: Diocese of Tucson
Description:
The Diocese of Tucson was established by Pope Leo XIII on May 8, 1897.

The diocese comprises nine counties in the state of Arizona, making it the fifth largest Roman Catholic diocese in the continental United States in terms of area. The diocese oversees 78 parishes, dozens of missions, 23 Catholic schools, and hundreds of charitable and fraternal organizations.

The current Bishop of Tucson is Most Reverend Edward Weisenburger, who was appointed by His Holiness Pope Francis on October 3, 2017. The cathedral parish for the Diocese of Tucson is St. Augustine Cathedral.

Name: Nova Igreja Batista
Description: A Nova Igreja Batista é uma família, formada por pessoas que estão firmadas na Palavra de Deus e no Amor. Somos diferentes, claro! Mas juntos somos fortalecidos e as diferenças desaparecem. Perseveramos no amor que Jesus nos ensinou, para que façamos o bem por onde passarmos.

Name: Tech Tribe
Description: Tech Tribe is a Jewish community dedicated to providing a space for Jews of all backgrounds to connect with each other and their heritage. We believe our mission is to reveal the true divine potential of the world and do our part to serve as lamplighters to illuminate it.

Name: EBTC European Bible Training Center
Description:
What is the EBTC?
The European Bible Training Center (abbreviated as “EBTC”) is a bi-vocational Bible school. All faculty and staff acknowledge the authority, inerrancy and sufficiency of Scripture. We are convinced that God's Word is the lamp unto our feet (Psalm 119:105).

2. What is our Mission?
We believe that a thorough exegesis  of the Bible and the application thereof is and must be the foundation of all ministry – and necessarily so. We aim to support churches in equipping their members, especially the men who preach. 
Therefore, we focus on diligent exegesis and interpretation, powerful teaching and preaching, and faithful application of the Word of God. Our goal, in accordance with Matthew 28:19-20 and Colossians 1:27-29, is to equip disciples for a life of service in Christ's church.

How is the EBTC Funded?
The work of EBTC is financed by donations from our supporters as well as through tuition and conference fees. The continuation of the Bible School depends on the help of friends, both in prayer and through continued financial support. From the beginning, we have experienced the faithfulness and grace of God and believe that He will continue to use this ministry for His glory.

EBTC is a Member School of TMAI (The Master's Academy International.

Name: The Maafa Redemption Project
Description: “MAAFA,” a Kiswahili word meaning “the great disaster,” is commonly used to refer to the tragic history of the Transatlantic African Slave Trade and its enduring effects in the present-day. In 2000, the term was re-appropriated and reimagined by New Mount Pilgrim Church, a key stake-holder in West Garfield Park, Chicago. The church commissioned a twenty-five-foot stained glass window entitled “MAAFA Remembrance,” to commemorate the history, as well as inspire observers to commit to the redemptive work of transforming self and community. The window now serves as New Mount Pilgrim’s brand; encapsulating its mission and ministry. Accordingly, the Pilgrim Development Corporation, the church’s social and economic development arm, has created the MAAFA Redemption Project, an initiative targeting and investing in the neighborhood's most vulnerable population: African American males. The project's overall goal is linked to the church’s ongoing ministry: transforming West Garfield Park one life at a time.

Name: Meaningful People Podcast
Description: Weekly interviews with some of Judaism's biggest people.

Name: World Council of Independent Christian Churches
Description: World Council of Independent Christian Churches is a religious institutions company based out of 1643 Savannah Hwy, Charleston, SC, United States.

Name: Chabad Lubavitch UK
Description:
Chabad Lubavitch prides itself on its unique approach, striving towards: 

• To provide a welcoming open door to Jewish people of all walks of life, no matter their background or affiliation

•  Making Judaism accesible and relevant to every Jew by empowering them to personally take ownership of their Judaism in a meaningful way never underestimating the value of a single deed.

•  Caring for and supporting the welfare of Jewish people and communities with devotion and affection - no matter the time, place or need. 

•  Educating a generation of dedicated and skilled leaders who live by the words "Love your fellow as yourself".  

 
Chabad Lubavitch UK was founded in 1959 with the direction of the Lubavitcher Rebbe OBM whose  unconditional love for all people continues to live on through the work of his Shluchim around the world

Name: Cross Pointe Church
Description:
Cross Pointe Church is a thriving community of Christ-followers in north metro Atlanta, Georgia. We have three campuses in Duluth, Flowery Branch and Buford/Lake Lanier. We are committed to teaching and living the Truth found in the Bible as we worship, pray, share the Gospel of Jesus Christ, care for one another and serve our community, nation and world. 

James Merritt is the Lead Pastor of Cross Pointe Church. He was born and raised in Oakwood, Georgia and surrendered his life to Christ as a 9-year-old boy. At age 21, he committed to full-time Christian ministry, and went on to pastor five churches. He has preached around the world to hundreds of thousands of people through television and radio.

As a popular Bible teacher and respected voice of the Christian faith, James has been interviewed by media outlets including 60 Minutes, The New York Times, ABC World News Tonight, Time Magazine, and Hannity and Colmes. Each week, Merritt's messages are broadcast in all 50 states and 122 countries around the world through Touching Lives, a television and media ministry.

Dr. Merritt earned his bachelor degree from Stetson University and his Master of Divinity degree and Doctor of Philosophy degree from the Southern Baptist Theological Seminary in Louisville, Kentucky. He has published several books including Friends, Foes and Fools and How to Be a Winner and Influence Anybody with Broadman and Holman publishers.

Name: श्रीमद भगवद्गीता (Srimad Bhagwad Geeta)
Description:
Entire knowledge of the cosmos is packed into the Gita. It is a gift to entire mankind to seek truth about the life & it's goal. Bhagwat Geeta is above religion or caste it is for whole mankind !!! 
|| जय श्री कृष्णा ||

Name: The Ridhwan Foundation
Description: The Ridhwan Foundation is the nonprofit spiritual organization (incorporated as a church) established to support and preserve the integrity of the Diamond Approach teaching. The Ridhwan Foundation was recognized as a 501(c)(3) religious association or church in 1987.

Name: Grace Church
Description:
We are one church in multiple locations: Overland Park & Olathe. Our Mission is to help everyone become an outward-focused follower of Jesus. 

Visit www.visitgracechurch.com to learn more about Grace Church and our vision.

Name: Touch the World
Description: Touch the World is a 501(c)(3) Christian ministry that creates opportunities for youth to encounter God and engage their faith through missions. Through strategic pre-trip training and intentional debriefing and discipleship, Touch the World helps churches and schools engage in short-term mission trips that make a long-term impact.

Name: Street Youth Ministry
Description: A Christian ministry to know, serve, and love street-dependent young people. Seeks to help our client to access the strength of faith as well as to provide basic needs and sound social work. Provides unique value-add services such as street outreach, Bible study, accessible prayer, advanced discipleship, Christian fellowship, and faith-based counseling. Delivers basic needs whenever possible to compliment the work of other social and religious ministries in the community.

Name: SUDE Foundation
Description:
Welcome to SUDE Foundation!

This is the Unstoppable Execution of Greatness!

SUDE Foundation is a Christian Non-Profit organisation which is fundamentally guided by the Word of God, and fully powered by the Holy Ghost. SUDE Foundation only operates within biblical parameters.

SUDE Foundation is different! This is because everything we do and teach is based on the teachings of our LORD Jesus Christ.

The organisation was founded by Nana Adjei Ampofo Manu – NAAM, an Evangelist, Marketer and Counselor in the year 2017.

VISION
To be a reference Christian Evangelical, Coaching and Counseling organisation in the world by 2025.

MISSION
To PREACH and TEACH Jesus Christ, and COUNSEL people to know God and serve Him within biblical parameters.

CORE VALUES
• Hope and Faith
• Integrity
• Empathy
• Love and Passion
• Motivation
• Determination and Persistence
• Counsel
• Performance
• Teamwork
• Compassion
• Commitment and Consistency

#NAAM #SUDE #SudeGlobal #SudeFoundation #SudeWisdom

Name: Lifepoint Church
Description: We exist so that people far from God will become fully alive in Christ.

Name: Wisdom Hunters
Description: Wisdom Hunters daily devotionals is an Atlanta-based ministry created to encourage Christians to apply God’s unchanging Truth in a changing world. Sign up for the free daily devotional email here: http://www.wisdomhunters.com/daily-devotional-sign-up/

Name: Sociedad Biblica Chilena
Description:
Sociedad Bíblica Chilena es una organización sin fines de lucro, al servicio de todas las confesiones cristianas. Nuestra misión es poner la Palabra de Dios al alcance de toda persona, en un idioma que puedan leer y entender y a un precio que pueda pagar. Programas de traducción, producción y distribución, hacen realidad este propósito.

Traducir la Biblia es un ministerio complejo y delicado. Se necesita no sólo un amplio conocimiento de los idiomas bíblicos (hebreo, arameo y griego), sino un dominio profesional de las lenguas receptoras del texto sagrado y de una decida vocación  por la difusión de la Palabra de Dios

En la actualidad las Sagradas Escrituras han sido traducidas a más de 2000 idiomas y dialectos. Si consideramos que existen en el mundo cerca de 5000 lenguas, queda todavía un gran desafío por cumplirse en el campo de traducción bíblica.

Name: Landelijk Contact Jeugdwerk Christelijke Gereformeerde Kerken
Description: Het LCJ is een jeugdwerkorganisatie van de Christelijke Gereformeerde Kerken, een vereniging met ruim 40 zondagsscholen en ruim 180 kinderclubs, jeugdclubs en jeugdverenigingen van zo'n 70 plaatselijke gemeenten als leden. Doelgroep wordt gevormd door alle jongeren van 0 tot 27 in de aangesloten gemeenten. Kijk voor meer informatie op de website onder 'algemeen'.

Name: CityofAgape Charitable Foundation Inc
Description:
In reflecting our mission to provide the Word of God through a beautiful Catholic Edition Bible free of charge, CityOfAgape Charitable Foundation is the only local Coastal Bend charity that solely focuses on spreading the word of God through free Bible distribution.

Funds raised through donations and fundraisers are used for the distribution of free Bibles to individuals, churches, schools, hospitals, nursing homes, prisons, and inner-city organizations.

The Word of God through the Bible can change an attitude, save a life, instruct, inspire, lift the spirit, encourage the heart, and renew the mind.

View Daily Readings https://www.cityofagape.org/liturgical-readings/ and Reflections https://www.cityofagape.org/daily-reflections/ and Words of Inspiration https://www.cityofagape.org/inspirational-blog/

CityofAgape is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization based out of Corpus Christi, Texas, United States

Name: Florida United Methodist Foundation
Description: As an independent, faith-based financial institution, the Florida United Methodist Foundation is uniquely positioned to offer congregations and individuals the resources and tools they need to be more faithful stewards.

Name: Diocese of Brownsville
Description: The Diocese of Brownsville is the presence of the Catholic Church within the Rio Grande Valley.  It covers Cameron, Willacy, Hidalgo and Starr Counties in the southernmost tip of Texas.  The Most Reverend Daniel E Flores is currently the bishop of the diocese.

Name: Mizrachi UK
Description:
Mizrachi connects the community to Israel through a range of innovative and educational programs.

We are the UK's leading framework for religious Zionism. Founded in 1902 our goal is to strengthen Jewish identity and support Israel where it is most needed.

Name: Our Lady of Grace Catholic Church
Description: Parish Coordinator

Name: Spiritual Life and Leadership
Description:
Spiritual Life and Leadership exist to help ministry leaders develop a vital inner life of union with Jesus so that they can lead in healthy and effective ways in their outer life of ministry leadership.

We do this through our podcast, as well as through coachingn and consulting.

Name: Trivedi Effect
Description: The Trivedi Effect is an extraordinary, unprecedented and evidence-based phenomenon that can transform the cellular structure of living organisms, alter atomic structure of non-living materials and revolutionize an individual’s life.

Name: Forge
Description:
We passionately pursue Jesus' mission to raise up more Kingdom Laborers – people who love God, love others, and advance the Kingdom everyday, everywhere.

Ordinary Kingdom Laborers… You may never know their names or faces. Most have never had professional seminary training, fancy titles, or powerful positions. But, they are writing history. They are seeing, stopping, and spending time with people that no one else ever has, bringing the message of Jesus up-close. The Forge Laborership movement is multiplying above ground, and even underground – not only in the U.S., but in places like Europe, South America, Asia, and Africa!

While Jesus said, “the harvest is plentiful but the laborers are few,” we believe His prayer request for more laborers is being answered as hundreds of thousands of people are embracing the call to impact the world around them… the Laborers are increasing!

Name: FJMC International
Description:
Leadership | Innovation | Community.

The Federation of Jewish Men's Clubs (FJMC) mission is to Involve Jewish Men in Jewish Life. We do this by:
Leadership: Mentoring leaders at the club, region and international level.
Innovation: Developing programming that better connects people of all ages to the Jewish community.
Community: Forming meaningful long-lasting relationships based on camaraderie, common interests and core values.

FJMC brings meaning to the lives of men, and through our programming touches hundreds of thousands of people each year. 

The FJMC is a partnership of over 250 affiliated clubs with more than 20,000 members across North America. FJMC empowers the men of Conservative/Masorti Judaism so that their passionate voices are heard in their communities and in the movement throughout North America and around the world.

Name: St Mary Redcliffe Church
Description:
St Mary Redcliffe was described by Queen Elizabeth I as "the fairest, goodliest, and most famous parish church in England" and the church building is today recognised as one of the great masterpieces of Gothic architecture. The church houses a large and diverse community, drawn from many parts of Bristol and beyond; the variety of which is expressed in the range of services, and through the many activities that have grown out of this worship. 

Dan Tyndall, the vicar of St Mary Redcliffe, is actively engaged within the local community, playing an important role - as a member of Redcliffe Neighbourhood Development Forum and Redcliffe Delivery Board - in creating plans for the development of the Redcliffe area of the city. To this end Dan is interested in forging strong and lasting links with local businesses and  charities, government bodies, council representatives, MPs, resident associations and other local interest groups.

Name: Dominican Friars Province of St. Joseph
Description:
The Province of St. Joseph, founded in 1805, is one of four Dominican provinces in the United States of America, extending from New England south to Virginia, then west to Ohio. We are one of the fastest growing men’s religious communities in the United States. In the last 10 years, over 50 men were ordained for the priesthood.

Our friars serve as university chaplains, professors, parish priests, hospital chaplains, itinerant preachers, and digital evangelists. Our ministries include a university, a pontifical faculty of theology, a nationwide network of campus chapters, and media apostolates with national and international reach.

Name: Kingdom Empresários
Description:
Conectamos executivos e empresários, fornecendo uma rede de relacionamento, cooperação e apoio espiritual.

Inscreva-se!

Name: Nurquest
Description: Nurquest is your dedicated partner on a transformative journey toward spiritual enlightenment through the beauty of Islamic teachings. With a wide array of features and services, Nurquest serves as your compass, guiding you through various aspects of Islamic life and knowledge. Our platform is designed to connect you with the wisdom of Islam, helping you grow spiritually and deepen your understanding of the faith.

Name: Hope Presbyterian Church
Description: Through intersecting lives, we aim to be a community that goes deep with Jesus, close with one another, and wide in how we serve the world.

Name: Campingstickkids
Description: CAMPING STICKS KIDS is a 501(c)(3). They are official alliance partners with Trail Life USA. Their resources are also used at camps and churches throughout the USA and CANADA.

Name: Harvard Catholic Center
Description:
The Harvard Catholic Center invites students, faculty, alumni and the greater University community to grow into a meaningful relationship with Jesus Christ through the Roman Catholic tradition of worship, inquiry, prayer and service to develop informed and compassionate individuals who use their intellectual and spiritual gifts for the benefit of the Church and the World. 

What we do:

College can be one of the most exciting and challenging times in a young person’s life. Catholic Campus ministry can serve as an outlet for calm and relevance and provides meaningful support for a student’s education intellectually, spiritually and socially. While students come from diverse religious backgrounds and explore the world of contemporary ideas, the Catholic Center, anchored at St. Paul Church in the heart of Harvard Square, partners effectively with the University to enhance college life. 

• Serve as a vibrant student organization which helps the admissions office attract and retain students.

• Improve the quality of campus life for students to aid in a well-rounded college experience.

• Provide in-kind student services should there be any counseling needs or crisis management. Our three Catholic chaplains are available to assist students with their personal concerns.

• Give students social outreach opportunities such as volunteering at the food pantry at St. Paul Church, teaching Sunday School or traveling to Peru to help those less fortunate.

• A safe environment for quiet study, events and dinners for students. 

• Offer students the chance for leadership opportunities.

• A resource for Harvard parents.

Name: Communicating with Purpose Ministries
Description:
Communicating With Purpose is all about proclaiming Jesus, encouraging you to follow Him, and sharing the Truth with others through traditional and innovative means. Growing in creative and diverse ways to fulfill the directions God has opened for us.  CWP seeks to be faithful to God and the clarity of his Word. 
Here's how we do it: 
•	Check out our website cwp-now.com: Learn more about God’s direction for this ministry, a little more about us, a chance to get Joyce’s latest recordings, and be inspired through the Word.  
•	Connect on Facebook:  We use social media to share inspirational messaging through words, video devotionals, and Biblical insights. You can also follow us on Instagram. 
•	Turn up the music: Joyce has two solo albums that are currently being offered online.  For a donation, they and other recordings are available on CD, USB drive, and download. 
•	Email Devotionals: You will start receiving our regular email devotionals A Purposeful Pause, Digging Deeper, and Join the Ripple.  These short, timely, and well-received devotionals focus on application of Biblical truth, and will make you think about your walk with the Lord. You are now signed up to start receiving these devotionals – you can opt-out at any time.   
•	In Person Events:  Does your group or church need a speaker for an event - like a men's breakfast, retreat, tea, conference, or meeting? How about pulpit supply and special music? We are ready, willing, and able to come and serve your needs and bring God's truth of encouragement and fulfillment of his promises. Contact us with your need via email - and we'll get right back to you!

Name: Congregation Kol Emeth
Description: Congregation Kol Emeth, an egalitarian, Conservative synagogue located in the heart of Silicon Valley. We offer a warm environment for Jewish study and prayer. Through our classes and programs, congregants have many opportunities to stay involved with the synagogue and to be part of a vibrant Jewish community. Please come by and visit us soon!

Name: FRIENDS IN ACTION INTERNATIONAL INC
