Our Mission: Embodied Justice for All People & for God’s Creation • Church Vitality • Rooted Spirituality • Transparent & Accountable Leadership • Inclusive Community

The Episcopal Diocese of California serves a diverse community of faith encompassing the greater San Francisco Bay Area. Approximately 21,000 people form 73 congregations and the diocese is organized into six deaneries (a geographical group of parishes). The Alameda, Contra Costa, Marin, San Francisco, and Southern Alameda deaneries cover their respective counties; the Peninsula Deanery consists of all of San Mateo County and a small portion of Santa Clara County.

Name: World Communion of Reformed Churches
Description:
With roots in the 16th-century Reformation, and particularly in the theology of John Calvin, the World Communion of Reformed Churches dates its organisational history to 1875—and has been unifying churches over the course of its existence.
“The Alliance of the Reformed Churches throughout the World holding the Presbyterian System” was formed in London in 1875, bringing together 21 presbyterian churches from Europe and North America. In 1891, also in London, the International Congregational Council was formed.

In 1970, in Nairobi, Kenya, these two organisations, congregational and presbyterian, united as the World Alliance of Reformed Churches (WARC), with 114 member churches in 70 countries across all continents.

Meanwhile, the Reformed Ecumenical Council (REC) formed in 1946. It gathered churches that had no other international ecumenical ties and were committed to mutual support in a Reformed confessional unity. The REC ultimately encompassed 41 churches with 12 million members in 26 countries, the majority in Africa and Asia.

In 2010, in Grand Rapids, Michigan, United States, the WARC and REC united to create the World Communion of Reformed Churches. Read more on the website.

Jesus said the most important thing we can do is to love God with all our heart, soul, strength, and mind, and love our neighbor as our self.  This simple yet profound statement represents the real grace and real love Jesus has for all people, particularly those whom the rest of the world often overlooks. las Hijas de San Pablo,

Additionally, we support local communities and collaborations to empower individuals and transform neighborhoods, while working to create systemic change by educating everyone we meet about the lived realities of the poor and advocating for greater support.
The Sisters of Social Service are women of many cultures...We come together to fulfill the Gospel through our work with and on behalf of those who are alienated, struggling, or living in poverty. The right of all people to live in dignity is at the heart of our work and of our religious faith.

We trust in the guidance of the Holy Spirit...
Our lives are blessed by Benedictine values that
* Respect all creation
* Spirit of hospitality
* Balance of prayer and work

Name: Acts 1:8 Ministry
Description:
Our mission is equipping  Christians to evangelize through kindness. 

God calls us to share our faith and His love. {Matthew 28:19-20} At Acts 1:8 Ministry, we make evangelizing easy, non-threatening, and fun for any Christian through our evangelism method called Planned Acts of Christian Kindness (P.A.C.K.).

Christian Kindness is when you do something special for someone else by giving something or providing a free service, it opens the door to evangelize by simply explaining that God’s love is free just like the gift or service that you provided! 

Our free resources are woven together to serve and grow the body of Christ. The Christian Kindness Program teaches you how to share your faith while the Christian Kindness Cards ensure that God’s love is being passed on with each encounter.

Our program is for all Christians, from brand new to mature, which can be integrated into your daily walk and is easily customized to fit your needs and the needs of your community. Christian Kindness can be used by individuals on a daily basis or by groups, such as youth groups, businesses, bible studies, outreach teams, etc.

To learn more about Acts 1:8 Ministry and Planned Acts of Christian Kindness, visit us at www.acts18.org

WebYeshiva.org has a dynamic schedule of around-the-clock Torah study providing live, interactive classes to students of all levels and backgrounds in a wide variety of topics. 

Our outstanding Rabbis and teachers join you from around the globe in your home, office, or on-the-go to replicate the nurturing spirituality of a conventional yeshiva and bring Jews from all over the world together in the study of Torah. 

All classes are recorded and available for those who are unable to attend live or wish to review.

WebYeshiva has a more advanced learning track on the topic of practical halacha (Shabbat, Kashrut, Nidda, Aveylut and more). Please see our Halacha Mastery & Semicha Program at https://www.webyeshiva.org/halacha-mastery-program-overview/

Name: Memphis Leadership Foundation
Description:
MLF exists to empower urban individuals and families through creative, innovative, and effective ministry and leadership. 

General Information
The mission of the Memphis Leadership Foundation is to proclaim the
Whole Gospel to the whole city through the empowerment of leaders and the development of ministries/programs that focus on the needs of under-resourced people and communities. We accomplish our mission by:

• Providing the necessary resources for urban churches and Christian organizations to strengthen their existing ministries with urban people.
• Partnering and networking with urban churches and Christian organizations in order to create new ministries when and where necessary.
• Serving as the “conduit” for suburban churches as they seek avenues for valid urban missions and partnerships in Memphis.
• To empower indigenous leadership to minister effectively through creative programming.


MLF focuses on five key areas of service. These areas address some of the most pressing needs in our community:
1. Families and Children
2. Affordable Housing
3. Youth
4. Leadership Development
5. Community and Economic Development

The Impact
250 homes built and sold at a value of $17.5 million
1,500 men and women placed in sustainable jobs
2,000 juvenile offense cases mediated reducing recidivism from 38% to 14% for juvenile offenders
48,000 patients without insurance receive quality healthcare
600 youth attend weekly Bible club through RedZone ministries
Over 7,500, mostly inner-city youth attend For the Kingdom Camp for one week
350 multinational youth participate in reading and tutoring programs
Over 150 youth workers trained and over 10,000 youth involved regularly through the Urban Youth Initiative Program

Description:
We are being changed by God to reach all people!

As a community church, we are a fellowship of Christians who are united on those doctrines that are essential to salvation, and we respect the diversity of views held by our members on those doctrines that are important but not essential. We are a nondenominational church but are dually aligned with the Christian and Missionary Alliance and the California Southern Baptist Convention.

Name: FMDM
Description:
The Franciscan Missionaries of the Divine Motherhood (FMDM) are an International Religious Congregation of Catholic women who seek to proclaim with their lives, the joy and freedom of the Gospel in the spirit of Francis and Clare of Assisi.      

The sisters purchased Ladywell in 1956 and it provided a ‘home’ for sisters from around the world. Since the 1980’s, part of the buildings has been used as a Retreat Centre.

The essence of Ladywell is captured in its Mission Statement:

 “In Ladywell we seek to create a hospitable Franciscan place with a peaceful atmosphere, rooted in Gospel values and which nurtures life for everyone.”

There are several different ministries carried out at Ladywell: - a Care Home for the elderly and sick sisters and a resident community of sisters contributing to the hospitality offered. Offices of the FMDM Congregational Leadership Team (CLT) who are also the Trustees of the Charity and a Finance and Administration hub which supports the work of the CLT. 

Throughout 2020 and most of 2021, the sisters have made significant changes to the physical structures and will be embarking on a new mission with the opening of a Franciscan Centre at Ladywell for both day and residential groups.

Nestled within a beautiful and peaceful setting, Ladywell, is also a vibrant and busy place of work, with around 70 employees. Each of which, are supporting the Sisters, in an environment that offers varied opportunities and personal growth.

Name: Vintage Church
Description:
Vintage Church is a church of seekers, followers and doubters who are learning to follow and worship Jesus Christ.  All are welcome with no prerequisite of church background or prior belief. Bring your faith and your doubt, your joy and your tears, your praise and your selfishness. As a church, we want to emulate Jesus’ call in Matthew 11:28 for all to come to him.

See our current open internship, staff, and pastoral positions at http://www.vintagenc.com/employment

Name: Lifeline Church
Description: Be a Lifeline, by leading people into becoming Lifelong followers of Jesus

Name: Midtown Fellowship
Description: In September of 2005 a group of friends joined together for the purpose of planting a church in downtown Columbia, SC. 9 people moved from the upstate of South Carolina in hopes of building a church that would be a light to the city of Columbia. Our hope was and is to be a Jesus-centered family on mission with Him. We now have six weekly gatherings at two locations in Columbia SC.

Name: Igreja Batista do Povo
Description: Igreja Batista Do Povo is a company based out of Brazil.

Name: Faith Forms
Description:
What does it mean to be a Christian in the games industry?

This is the question at the center of what we do. We believe that faith is living, active, and practical. When lived out, it shapes every aspect of our lives, including how we approach making games. Join us as we explore this question.

Name: Catholic HEART Workcamp
Description: We provide youth groups with safe and enjoyable Catholic mission trips where they can grow spiritually, serve the community, meet other members of the Catholic Church, and renew their faith in God’s love. Our campers play hard and work harder while transforming themselves and the world around them. We have a summer young adult staff that operates each camp throughout the summer, on stage, in the kitchen, tool room, and media table.

Name: Franciscan Sisters of Christian Charity
Description:
In 1869, five young Catholic women in rural Wisconsin responded to God’s call. They discerned that they should share their daily lives together in religious community. St. Francis of Assisi’s Gospel way of life inspired them. Their love for the Catholic Church and selfless dedication to the service of others guided them.

Today, we Franciscan Sisters of Christian Charity whole-heartedly live our vocation in the loving community spirit of our foundresses. We strive to live the Gospel in simplicity, built on faith in a loving God; joyful acceptance of poverty, love for the Church, and selfless dedication to the service of others.

Name: Rebirth Homes
Description: Rebirth Homes exists to combat human trafficking through education/awareness and by providing a residential healing program for survivors of human trafficking.

Name: Ambika Jyotish - Famous Astrologer in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Description: Famous Astrologer in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, USA, UK, Australia, and Canada. Call me on +91-9879803955.

Name: Diocese of Sheffield
Description: The Church of England working in Sheffield, Rotherham, Doncaster and Goole; and all the surrounding areas.

Name: Gateway Faith + Work
Description: Gateway Faith + Work provides Christian professionals with professional development, spiritual edification, and fellowship opportunities so they may glorify God and remain Gospel-rooted in all settings - even the most secular work environments.

Name: Baptist Theological College of Southern Africa
Description:
BTC is a Private Higher Education Institution offering four degree programs: 
1. Higher Certificate of Ministry (NQF 5)
2. Bachelor of Biblical Studies (NQF 7)
3. Bachelor of Theology (NQF8)
4. Master of Theology (NQF 9)


Baptist Theological College of Southern Africa is an Association incorporated under section 21 Reg. No. 2003/019542/08 BTC is registered with the Department of Education as a Private Higher Education Institution under the Higher Education Act, 1997. Registration Certificate N0 2000/HE08/004.

Name: Diocese of Southwell & Nottingham
Description:
We believe there is nothing better anyone can do with their life than become a follower of Jesus Christ.
We seek to be a diocese where every Christian and local church has a compelling vision and plan for 'growing disciples, wider, younger and deeper.' Serving God together we can make a bigger difference in the communities where we live and serve.

Name: GREATER ATLANTA ADVENTIST ACADEMY
Description:
GREATER ATLANTA ADVENTIST ACADEMY Greater Atlanta Adventist Academy (GAAA), located in the greater Atlanta metropolitan area, is a college preparatory high school that provides its students with an outstanding educational experience.  Students who are members of the GAAA Family are challenged to have GREATER EXPECTATIONS in all their endeavors, which in turn leads to GREATER ACHIEVEMENTS of excellence in our spiritual, academic, and social programs.
 
GAAA was built upon the foundation of excellence laid by Berean Junior Christian Academy, one of metro Atlanta's oldest educational institutions providing quality education since 1901. Throughout its rich history, the founders, and subsequently, its caretakers and dedicated parents, recognized the need of ensuring a Christ-centered education for all secondary students in the region. In 1981, this long-cherished dream became a reality. The addition of the curriculum for grades eleven and twelve gave birth to Greater Atlanta Adventist Academy, adding to the rich legacy a quality college preparatory academic program.
 
Here at GAAA, we believe that each student is unique, possesses unlimited potential for greatness, and enhances our program with his/her God-given talents and abilities. The academy opens its doors to all parents and students who are committed to collaborate with our dedicated administration and committed faculty and staff whose aim is to write positively on the pages of the mind and life of each student who enters through its doors. Paramount to our goals is the student’s development in the areas of spiritual growth, academic excellence, and Christ-like citizenship. Through our deliberately intentional instruction, provided within a spiritual and safe environment, we seek to nurture compassionate, service-oriented, and industrious citizens in their communities; but more importantly, students who will be excellent citizens of heaven.

Name: Svenska kyrkan Uppsala
Description: Svenska kyrkan Uppsala är de sex tätortsförsamlingarna i samverkan, och ansvarar också för Uppsala kyrkogårdar. Tillsammans vill vi vara den lokala kyrkan för 160 000 Uppsalabor.

Name: Gospel Recordings Nederland
Description:
Op aarde worden vele talen gesproken. Zelfs meer dan 10.000 als we ook de dialecten erbij rekenen. De taalverschillen zijn voor Gods gemeente een enorme barrière om te overwinnen als deze gehoorzaam wil zijn aan Gods opdracht om het evangelie te verkondigen en uit alle volken discipelen te maken.

In deze tijd van communicatietechnologie is het maar moeilijk voor te stellen dat duizenden bevolkingsgroepen nog nooit over Jezus gehoord hebben. Geen Bijbelvertaling in hun taal. Geen zendeling die onder hen werkt. Zij kennen het evangelie niet.

In nauwe samenwerking met gemeenten, kerken en andere zendingsorganisaties brengt GRN het evangelie van Jezus Christus aan hen die nog nooit van Hem gehoord hebben. Voor velen van hen zijn audio-opnamen de enige manier om over Jezus te horen.

Onze mobiele opnameteams reizen over de hele wereld op zoek naar minderheidsgroepen. We gaan van de Amazone tot de Himalaya’s en nog verder om het goede nieuws te brengen. Geen stam is te klein. Geen taal te vreemd. Geen dorp te ver!

Iedereen die contacten heeft met anderstaligen kan bij ons terecht voor op maat advies en audio-materialen.

Via onze gratis app 5Fish kunt u luisteren naar alle opnames en deze downloaden.

Neem contact met ons op als u meer over het werk van Gospel Recordings Nederland wilt weten. Wij vertellen u graag meer over de inhoud van ons werk.

Via onze nieuwsbrief en social media houden we u ook op de hoogte van de laatste ontwikkelingen.

Name: Vereinigung der Benediktiner zu Maria Laach e.V.
Description:
Impressum: https://www.maria-laach.de/impressum-und-datenschutz.html

Wir möchten Sie einladen:  Kommen Sie zu uns und lernen Sie unser Kloster kennen. Erleben Sie die benediktinische Gastfreundschaft. Besichtigen Sie unsere romanische Basilika. Wenn Sie wollen, nehmen Sie an unseren
Gebeten und Gottesdiensten teil. Kommen Sie in unsere Klosterbetriebe und gewinnen Sie einen Eindruck, wie wir arbeiten. Genießen Sie die einmalige Landschaft, und verbringen Sie eine Weile der Stille und Erholung bei uns. Ob in Gruppen, mit der Familie, mit Freunden oder allein, ob für ein paar Stunden oder für länger, wir heißen Sie herzlich willkommen!

Name: GrowTorah
Description: GrowTorah develops experiential & environmental Torah education programs for Jewish institutions. Our Shorashim & Anafim garden programs are active at 25 partner sites across the USA. We run seasonal workshops around Tu B'Shvat for thousands, and we run a farm camp at the end of August every year.

Name: Faithful Central Bible Church
Description:
We are a Bible-based, Spirit-led extension of the body of Christ located in the heart of Inglewood, CA. Our ministry is led by integrity and compassion, as we work to impact the world for the Kingdom of God. 

Founded in 1936, Faithful Central Bible Church strives to develop, "Champions for Divine Deployment." Our company is dedicated to the advancement and glorification of the kingdom through the works of our staff.

Name: South Mountain Community Church
Description:
SMCC is a non-denominational Christian church, meeting at three locations in Utah—Draper and Daybreak campuses in the Salt Lake City area and the Springs campus in St. George. You will experience joyful worship music and hope-filled biblical messages. Your children will have fun while learning about our loving God in a safe environment. Above all, you can expect to be welcomed!

Our Mission

We exist to help as many people as possible take their Next Step toward becoming fully devoted and fully delighted followers of Jesus Christ.

Our Vision/Values

Our vision (preferred future) isn’t about the size of our ministry or any particular accomplishment.  Instead, we envision SMCC as a particular kind of church; a healthy church with a particular kind culture.  We are committed to being a church where…

Anyone new can belong before they believe.
The members value the guests.
The truth of the Bible is explained in helpful and hopeful ways.
The measure of maturity is not how much we know, but how well we love.
We honor the process in which God changes people from the inside out.

Name: BlueSky Global Ministries
Description: BlueSky Global Ministries is a missions organization serving in Nairobi, Kenya, with an operations base in the United States. BlueSky exists to build relationships through adventure to engage people of all nations with the gospel. We are looking to hire camp staff for each summer, interns for 10 month ministry positions, as well as full-time positions related to outdoor adventure, climbing, recreation, business, and relational ministry.

Name: Abu Huraira Center
Description:
Mission Statement

The AHC is a non-profit organization dedicated to addressing the concerns of Muslims within our community. We strive to put the wishes of our community first and use our programs to build stronger, efficient, and more resourceful community networks capable of organizing volunteers to address local needs.

 

Objective

We will work to build a community and a future where Muslims of all ages can learn and practice the fundamentals of Islam. We will achieve this by:

- Improving and elevating the Islamic standards of Muslims in Canada.
- Strengthening accessibility of Muslim community services and resources so its members can manage their affairs internally, without significant outside involvement.
- Educating the community on the rudiments of Islam.
- Providing an exemplary example of leadership for the Muslims and subsequently, helping to create the strong leaders for generations to come.
 

*Vision*

Our vision is greater than just building without a spirit, but to fill the center with people from every race and every ethnic group. The central foundations of AHC have been established however it is evolving as it is catering to the growth of the Muslim community. As Abu Huraira Center continues to expand we look forward to a center that will include a prayer hall, a school, a gymnasium, Youth Center, a multi media (Studio) and IT department, administration offices, a multipurpose hall, and much more, Inshallah.

 

*Our Values*

- Fostering the fundamental principles and values of Islam in the community members
- Familiarizing the community with the Quranic and Prophetic principles and guidance.
- Striving to deliver innovative and accessible services and programs.
- Working in collaboration with the community and other community organizations.

Our community is an integral part in achieving our goals and aspirations, and they are central part of our development process which we will achieve with the help of Allah

Name: MUSSA
Description:
MUSSA - Muslim Science Students’ Association (University of Lagos, Nigeria.)

The Muslim Science Students’ Association (MUSSA) is a vibrant community that fosters spiritual, intellectual, and moral growth among Muslim students in the Faculty of Science, University of Lagos. We aim to unite and support students through various activities, programs, and initiatives that promote Islamic values, academic excellence, and personal development.

Join us in strengthening our faith, expanding our knowledge, and building a supportive network within and beyond the university community.

Let’s connect in faith and knowledge for a brighter future!

Name: Iglesia De Dios De La Profecia
Description: Iglesia De Dios De La Profecia is a Religious Institutions company located in 569 Bushwick Ave, Brooklyn, New York, United States.

Name: De Stadskerk
Description:
De Stadskerk is een kerk in de stad Groningen met een missie; Gods liefde ontvangen, beantwoorden en doorgeven. Het verhaal van De Stadskerk is het verhaal van een handjevol mensen (in 1988) dat uitgroeide tot een kerk die in 2019 door ruim 1500 mensen bezocht wordt. Het is het verhaal van een kerk met een kloppend hart en grote visie voor de stad Groningen. Maar bovenal zijn het honderden verhalen van mensen die hun vertrouwen stelden op God en niet teleurgesteld werden. 

Nieuwsgierig geworden? Als je op zoek bent naar een kerk, of als je meer wilt weten van deze liefdevolle God, weet dan dat je welkom bent in de Stadskerk.

Name: Schoenstatt Argentina
Description:
Comunidad de espiritualidad mariana y misionera  que cobija, transforma y envía a servir a los demás.

El Movimiento Apostólico de Schoenstatt es un movimiento católico fundado el 18 de octubre de 1914 por José Kentenich y un pequeño grupo de seminaristas del antiguo seminario de los Padres Palotinos.

Su nombre proviene del santuario de Schoenstatt, ubicado en una pequeña aldea del pueblo de Vallendar, cerca de la ciudad alemana de Coblenza, donde el movimiento tiene su sede central.

 Schoenstatt se ha convertido en un lugar de peregrinación mundial, el que es visitado anualmente por miles de personas. En el santuario también se encuentra el óleo Madre Tres Veces Admirable, óleo de 1898 pintado por Luigi Crosio.

El Movimiento de Schoenstatt tiene actualmente presencia en 42 países

Name: The Discovery Course
Description:
The (temporary) working title (and logo design) is 'Discovery Course' and will only be published, so long as permission is given from any relevant Seventh-day Adventist Church departments/organisations, etc. -  it is intended to be an Adventist version of the Alpha Course, with significant content differences.

The course is free to attend offline or online and is currently planned to consist of an optional students book, students manual and teachers book, as well as videos included for each session.

The table of contents has been created, which encompassese the 28 Fundamental Beliefs of the Seventh-day Adventist Church has been created - this ministry agrees with the doctrines and supports the Seventh-day Adventist Church.

The first draft of all 3 books is currently planned by around the end of 2022.

The course is (currently) planned to try and be published via an existing, "established" Seventh-day Adventist organisation, rather than a "private project" (preliminary talks have already taken place with one). For any enquiries, please email: info@DiscoveryCourse.org.

Name: CPAS
Description:
Making Mission Possible.
CPAS enables churches to help every person hear and discover the good news of Jesus Christ.
We are committed to mission and equipping churches for their God-given task of evangelism. We believe the most strategic way for us to help churches become more mission-focused is by developing effective leadership.
We long to see a Christ-centred, Bible-based, mission-focused Church where leaders are clear about their call to discipleship, growing in Christ-like character, and competent to lead in a time of rapid change.
This includes:
-Making disciples of young people and developing leadership potential through Ventures and Falcons.
-Resourcing churches in developing missional leaders.
-Developing key local church leaders for mission.
-Taking a national lead in furthering missional leadership through our patronage work.

Name: V1 CHURCH INC
Description:
V1 Church is a growing faith organization with three locations in the greater New York City area. Founded by Mike and Julie Signorelli, a husband-and-wife faith leadership team, the church is a pillar of its diverse community and a beacon of hope for atheists, agnostics, and skeptics looking to discover or rediscover their faith. 

The church is defined by the good works of its members. In just three short years, the church’s growing membership contributed more than $300,000 to New York-area homeless shelters, making a tangible difference in the lives of thousands of people experiencing homelessness during an unprecedented pandemic.

V1 Church arose out of Mike Signorelli’s later-in-life conversion to Christianity. Moved by a presentation about the importance of spirituality in an uncertain world, Signorelli relocated his family from Indiana to New York and began laying the foundation for what would become V1 Church. 

The organization’s mission meets reality thanks to its Impact Team, a growing group of dedicated members who devote countless hours to serving the community’s most vulnerable members. Among the Impact Team’s signature achievements are a combined $300,000 in donations and gifts (and counting) to New York City homeless shelters; a focused aid and giving program aimed at New Yorkers affected by the pandemic; hosting and staffing blood drives throughout the year; serving meals at New York-area soup kitchens; donating Thanksgiving meals to undocumented families; and paying off school lunch debt for children in a Long Island school district.

V1 Church hosts worship sessions in Long Island and Queens, NY. Since the onset of the pandemic in early 2020, V1 Church has also run a Sunday morning livestream of Pastor Signorelli’s sermons each Sunday. Archival sermons are available to view at any time on V1 Church’s website or YouTube page.

Name: St Pius X Catholic Church
Description: Rooted in the Granger community, and part of the Diocese of Fort-Wayne-South Bend, St. Pius X Catholic Church promotes a faith-based spiritual community proclaiming the Word of God and celebrating the Sacraments, with the Eucharist as the source and summit of our spiritual life. Our church community includes people of all ages and groups in which everyone can respond to God’s call to salvation by developing a sense of community and fellowship. This is done through stewardship of our resources and religious education, including all members in service to others, sharing our blessings with those in need, and promoting Catholic social justice.

Name: Göteborgs begravningssamfällighet
Description: Göteborgs begravningssamfällighet bildades 1 januari 2018 efter en omorganisation av Svenska kyrkan i Göteborg. Begravningssamfälligheten ansvarar för begravningsverksamheten i enlighet med begravningslagen och förvaltar begravningsplatserna i Göteborg. Verksamheten omsätter cirka 290 miljoner kronor och finansieras av begravningsavgiften. Samfälligheten styrs av förtroendevalda inom Svenska kyrkan i Göteborg genom indirekta val till begravningsdelegerade som i sin tur väljer en begravningsstyrelse. Här finns 36 begravningsplatser med över 118 000 gravar, sju ceremonilokaler/kapell och ett krematorium. Vårt krematorium utför kremationer både inom Göteborg och på uppdrag av andra begravningshuvudmän. Inom begravningssamfälligheten arbetar cirka 190 personer och under sommarhalvåret anställs ytterligare runt 120 personer, säsongsanställd personal. Förvaltningen är organiserad i en geografiskt indelad skötselavdelning, fyra funktionsindelade enheter och ett kansli.

Name: Circle City Fellows
Description:
Our mission is to empower young adults to integrate their faith into the workplace and beyond, for the sake of the flourishing of greater Indianapolis.

We believe God’s people are meant to do the work of God in the space where they spend the bulk of their time – their workplace. 

Our flagship fellowship provides Indianapolis residents in their 20s and 30s with nine months of spiritual formation, professional development, and civic education. Fellows are given a renewed vision for how the work they do each day, when aligned with God’s heart for mission, is ministry. 

Ultimately, we hope to partner with God in making Indianapolis a city where everyone has enough and no one needs to be afraid.

Name: Islamic Center (ইসলামিক সেন্টার)
Description: ইসলামকে সহজে জানা, শেখা, মানা এবং জীবনে বাস্তবায়নে সহযোগিতার এক অনন্য প্লাটফরম।

Name: Gull Lake Ministries
Description: Gull Lake Ministries is a spectacular family resort and conference center with a staff who wants to joyfully serve you! We recognize that real service is about meeting the real needs of our guests. Because Jesus is our model, we want to demonstrate our love for Him in the little opportunities that occur everyday. Established in 1920 as Gull Lake Bible Conference Association, our purpose remains the same as that of our founding fathers: “to impact lives for God’s glory,” while we continue to develop meaningful ways to strengthen the family and equip the saints for God’s service.

Name: VEZ | Vrije Evangelisatie Zwolle
Description: De Vrije Evangelisatie Zwolle (VEZ) is een bruisende kerk in Zwolle met ruim 5000 leden, afkomstig uit Zwolle en omgeving. De VEZ is een warme en open kerk van enthousiaste christenen, waar iedereen welkom is. De VEZ is een geestelijk thuis met impact op het leven van jong en oud. Het is een plek om te ontmoeten, te leren, te ontdekken en te groeien en om zo samen Jezus na te volgen. We zijn er niet voor onszelf; we willen in onze missionaire en diaconale opdracht een positieve invloed op de samenleving in Zwolle en de regio hebben. De visie van de VEZ is gecentreerd rondom het evangelie. Met het kruis als middelpunt richten we ons op aanbidding, missie, community en navolging.

Name: NASRUL-LAHI-L-FATIH SOCIETY
Description: We're on a Mission to develop an enlightened Muslim society nurtured by a true understanding of Islam for the spiritual upliftment and welfare of mankind.

Name: Poor Handmaids of Jesus Christ
Description:
Today, we Poor Handmaids of Jesus Christ strive to listen attentively to the promptings of that same Spirit. We respond with courage to the daily challenge to be women of faith and vision. We live gospel values through our presence and ministry to and with others.

Today, the American Province of the Poor Handmaids of Jesus Christ focus on serving those who are economically disadvantaged, providing education, spiritual guidance, healthcare, and social services to the communities they serve.  The sisters are also known for their commitment to sustainability and care for the environment, and advocating for social justice and the needs of marginalized communities.

Name: Sovereign See Church
Description: church

Name: Forum Ukhuwah dan Kajian Islam Fasilkom UI
Description: FUKI adalah wadah untuk mempererat ukhuwah dan peningkatan kapasitas keislaman agar dapat menjadi Muslim yang bermanfaat bagi sekitar.

Name: URJ Greene Family Camp
Description:
Our Mission: Inspiring Jewish Life in Texas and Oklahoma all year long. 

URJ Greene Family Camp takes the magic of camp and translates it into a year-round experience!

URJ Greene Family Camp offers an expanded menu of fun, immersive Jewish experiences, 365 days a year. Our mission is to become a year-round hub for Jewish engagement—broadcasting the top hits from our camp playlist, far and wide, all year. We accomplish this through three key offerings:

Summer Programs 
From Greene Family Camp in Bruceville, TX, to social action corps nationwide, to educational trips to Israel, our summer programs empower children, teens and adults to better themselves, their communities, and the world.

Year-Round Programs 
We offer meaningful Jewish experiences for all ages, all year, in Texas, Oklahoma and beyond! Inspired by the magic of camp, our programs foster a love of Judaism while connecting you to our local and global Jewish community.

Rental Facilities
Nestled in a central location to Austin, Dallas, San Antonio and Houston, our camp and facilities is the perfect setting for your corporate, congregational or family retreat. Enjoy multiple indoor and outdoor spaces, acres of hiking trails, and more.

Name: Temple Shalom of Newton
Description: Temple Shalom of Newton is a vibrant and growing Reform Jewish community of roughly 650 families.  We have a diverse congregation and a wide variety of programs and activities.  Our collaborative staff and lay leaders are eager to help new and existing members engage in ways that are meaningful to them and make the process of receiving and sharing information smooth and efficient.

Name: Vrijzinnigen Nederland
Description: Vrijzinnigen Nederland verbindt 47 lokale afdelingen waar zinzoekers inspiratie vinden in de vorm van lezingen, religieuze bijeenkomsten, gespreksgroepen en contact met gelijkgestemden. Deze activiteiten zijn toegankelijk voor iedereen met interesse voor het vrijzinnig gedachtegoed.

Name: Dunwoody United Methodist Church
Description:
Welcome to the linkedin page for Dunwoody United Methodist Church in Dunwoody, GA. Since 1903, the people of Dunwoody United Methodist Church have sought to be God's people so that God might be a part of our community. People of all ages bring a variety of gifts and experiences as we are the very family of God together. 

Please come and join us in worship Sunday at 9:00 or 10:30 a.m. 

Dunwoody United Methodist welcomes everyone to experience the vast opportunities for fellowship and sharing of God's Word in the community and beyond.

Name: Camp All-American
Description: Camp All-American (CAA) was established in the summer of 1989 as a summer camp for children. CAA strives to bring adventure and excitement into kids lives while integrating the gospel of Jesus Christ into all facets of the program. Over the past 30 years, CAA has grown and matured into a one-of-a-kind experience that provides unrivaled sports and adventure programming. Our carefully selected and trained college age counselors and extraordinary facilities ensure that each child has the best day camp experience on the planet. Transforming the 100 acres of Perimeter Church into a safe and one-of-a-kind environment for kids makes CAA ‘The Place to Be” for kids in Gwinnett, Fulton, Forsyth and many of the surrounding counties during the summer. CAA has five unique camps for kids 5 – 14 years, as well as a Counselor-in-Training (CIT) program for high school students.

Name: Antioch Community Church
Description:
At Antioch Community Church Brighton we aim to be people who are Loving God, Sharing Life, and Proclaiming Jesus.  Our entire vision is summed up in these three statements.  They are short and easy to remember; and by God's grace, we aim to live them out every day!

The seven value statements that follow are designed to help us practically live out these values.

In Loving God, we value...

• Intimacy with Jesus through prayer, and worship.
• The Bible as God inspired and life transforming.
• The presence of God in every setting
 

In Sharing Life, we value...

• Building lifelong friendships through sacrificial living.
• Reproducing life through discipleship, small groups and church planting.
 

In Proclaiming Jesus, we value...

• Taking risks to make Jesus known.
• Extending God's Kingdom by evangelism and church planting throughout the world.

Name: Kingdom Life Cathedral Ministries, Inc.
Description: Committed to service the Kearneysville, Ranson, Charles Town townships as well as the entire West Virginia Eastern Panhandle, the United States and the World. We take a holistic approach to ministry, ministering to the total man. An individual’s personality is the total of what an individual is, physically, socially, emotionally, mentally, and spiritually. Development of the total personality is related to heredity and environment. We play an intricate part in this vision. God has called us, sent us and ordained us to travel this road together at this time to bring a message of power and deliverance to a captive people, an oppressed people a lost people, such as we were.

Name: Christian Record Services, Inc.
Description:
HISTORY
With a clothes wringer, sheets of tin and paper, an awl, and a hammer, a young blind man launched a Braille magazine, Christian Record, in 1899. National Camps for Blind Children, a program of Christian Record, started in 1967. 

The organization moved to Lincoln, Nebraska, from Michigan in 1904 and continues to develop creative ways to brighten the lives of those who live with legal blindness.

LEARN MORE:
ChristianRecord.org
Facebook.com/ChristianRecord
Twitter.com/CRSBfriends
Vimeo.com/CRSB

Name: St. John the Evangelist Parish & School
Description: St. John the Evangelist is a dynamic Roman Catholic Community united by our common faith and nourished by our shared Eucharist. Utilizing our individual and unique talents, we strive to enable one another to know and live Christ more fully. Through witness and faithful service, we proclaim the Good News of God's Kingdom present among us.  Parish school serves preschool through 8th grade.

Name: Kingdom Lighthouse Worship Center
Description:

Name: Daughters of Charity, Province of St. Louise
Description:
The Daughters of Charity are a community of women (Sisters) who devote their lives to serving the poorest and most abandoned individuals in today’s society. The 300+ Sisters of the Daughters of Charity Province of St. Louise are supported by 800+ employees organization-wide across the Daughters of Charity Province of St. Louise, through its operating entities Daughters of Charity Ministries and its nine Sponsored Works.

The nine Sponsored Works include Elizabeth Seton High School, Mother Seton School, St. Vincent Early Learning Center, Seton Center, St. Joseph Services, Seton Harvest, Proyecto Juan Diego, Seton Heritage Ministries, and Marillac St. Vincent Family Services.

The Daughters of the Province serve as far north as Montreal, Quebec, Canada, and as far south as Brownsville, Texas. The Sisters serve in varying ministries including social services, education, prevention of trafficking, health care, prison ministry, and more.

The Province of St. Louise is one of 94 worldwide Provinces of the Daughters of Charity. Founded in 1633 in Paris, France, there are nearly 14,000 Daughters of Charity in the world today.

Name: ANCIENT WISDOM & MODERN LEADERSHIP Insights for Timeless Innovation
Description:
“Ancient Wisdom & Modern Leadership, Insights for Timeless Innovation & Success,” by Anthony Nayagan is a compelling guide for those who feel destined to make a significant impact on the world.

Ancient mystics, despite leading isolated lives, made significant contributions to fields such as Traditional Medicine, Science, Mathematics, Architecture, Music, Art, Astrology, and Philosophy. These contributions have endured through time, unlike many creations of modern secular intellect. 

Nayagan aims to mentor and coach thought-leaders, creators, and innovators, empowering them to achieve their highest potential through spiritual enlightenment. He writes, “In Wisdom, whether we contribute to art or science or assume roles of leadership, our outputs will endure the test of time. This is because they originate from the imperishable core of our existence. According to the teachings of the Bible, anything originated from imperishable will itself be imperishable.”

Name: Islamic Studies Research
Description:
“ISR & IFR – Islamic Studies & Islamic Finance Research Library: 

India’s First Integrated Islamic Library—Where Every Page Revives the Heart, Every Prayer Restores the Soul, and Every Woman and Child Finds Their Rightful Place in the House of Allah.”

“ISR & IFR Library – The First Door to Knowledge, Dignity, and Deen for Every Heart in Mumbai.”

Embark on a journey with us through the captivating world of Islamic Studies. Drawing from the Quran and the rich traditions of Hadith, we delve into the profound teachings of Islam. As we explore the beauty of the Quran, we're reminded of its invitation to humanity, encouraging reflection, understanding, and enlightenment. Join us as we uncover the wisdom of Islam, guided by verses such as:

1. "Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom and good instruction, and argue with them in a way that is best. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has strayed from His way, and He is most knowing of who is [rightly] guided." (Quran 16:125)

2. "Say, 'This is my way; I invite to Allah with insight, I and those who follow me. And exalted is Allah; and I am not of those who associate others with Him.'" (Quran 12:108)

Our exploration also encompasses the teachings of Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) as recorded in the Hadith collections of Bukhari and Muslim, providing further insight and guidance for inviting people to the path of Islam. Join us as we deepen our understanding and share the timeless wisdom of Islam. #IslamicStudies #Quran #Hadith

Description:
We are a family church, focused on bringing the love and truth of God to our generation. We run a number of fun, inspirational events for children and young people, making this a church that is relevant to the whole family.

God has given Pastors Peter and Bev a simple, yet powerful, vision and purpose for City Impact Church to accomplish. It has been the same since day one, and has enabled a healthy, welcoming church to grow as a result.

If you are considering making City Impact your home church, then we’d love to invite you to attend an Intro. At Intro you’ll learn the different ways you can get connected and become involved at City Impact Church through attending Gateway, joining an Impact Hub, or volunteering as part of our Support Crew or Ministry Teams.

Local campuses in both North and South Island of New Zealand and campuses internationally. Name: Luxembourg School of Religion & Society
Description:
The LSRS is an institution of higher education and research founded in 2015. It focuses on the relationship between religion and society as an ongoing, tense, complex, and transformative process of dialogue and mutual enrichment. In other words: the conjunction “and” in the School’s name is its theme and program.

Its foundational questions are: “How can one be(come) a religious person in our pluralist postmodern society?”, and “How can religions make a contribution to contemporary ethical, social, and political challenges in a globalized world?”.

As a theological institution, it involves religious communities in the elaboration of possible answers. It develops its research and teaching by bringing into dialogue the religious heritage, i.e., sources, rites, traditions, on one hand, and contemporary life experience, on the other hand, referring to philosophy, humanities, and natural sciences as hermeneutical tools.

Working in collaboration with the other religious communities that signed an agreement with the State, it offers a creative response to the changing social, political, cultural, and religious landscape in Luxembourg, a contribution to religious identities, responsible citizenship, social cohesion, and respect of diversity.

The LSRS develops its research and teaching activities mainly in two departments:
1) The Department Religion, Communication, Education works on the question how one can be(come) a religious person in our north-Atlantic, pluralist, secularized society, focusing on the transmission of faith between generations.
2) The Department of Public Responsibility works on the question how religions can make a contribution to ethical problems, namely in the context of peace building and finance.

Beyond its Academical programs, the LSRS develops specific offers of initial training, lifelong learning, and adult education for religious communities and other clients.

Name: École du Sacré Coeur de la Trinité des Monts - Rome
Description:
En 1828, une convention diplomatique entre le Saint Siège et le Gouvernement Français (convention reconduite en 1974, 1998 et 2005) est signée. Elle invite l'Institut du Sacre Coeur à éduquer les jeunes en portant une attention particulière à l'enseignement de la langue française et à la diffusion de la culture française, tout en respectant les lois et les réglements des établissements scolaires italiens.
La particulière condition historique, juridique et culturelle de l'Institut favorise un climat d'internationalité au sein duquel la langue française joue un rôle principal.
L'école italienne privilege généralement l'étude et la diffusion de l'anglais comme seconde langue; les parents qui désirent pour leurs enfants un enrichissement culturel et une formation différente par rapport à celle offerte par  le système national, s'adressent à l'Institut du Sacré-Cœur qui assure les diplômes d'étude reconnus par l’état italien et une formation optimale concernant la langue et la culture française.

L’Istituto "Sacro Cuore" della Trinità dei Monti è una scuola con un'affermata tradizione pedagogica. Il suo Progetto Educativo è esteso e condiviso da tutte le scuole del "Sacro Cuore" presenti in 43 paesi del mondo.
E' un’istituzione attenta ai valori culturali tradizionali e nel contempo da sempre aperta al dialogo con le diverse culture e alla dimensione internazionale. I percorsi del bilinguismo, gli scambi culturali con diverse scuole, il Network of Sacred Heart Schools, la cooperazione dell’AMASC (Association Mondiale des Anciennes Elèves) ne sono un'esemplificazione.

Name: New Hope Church
Description:
The Fellowship of New Hope Church embraces classic Protestant theological concepts which we hold essential to our faith:

        Sola Scriptura, by scripture alone
        Sola Fide, by faith alone
        Sola Gratia, by grace alone
        Solus Christus, through Christ alone
        Soli Deo Gloria, for the glory of God alone

We believe that the Bible is the authoritative and inspired word of God, serving as the means by which God reveals himself to mankind. We believe that it is the responsibility of all Christians to accurately interpret the Bible through an understanding of the historical setting, context, and language used by the original authors and to make every effort to properly determine what messages or lessons the authors were trying to convey and to determine which truths are normative and applicable in our lives today.

These values endure from season to season, situation to situation, and person to person. They guide our organizational culture as we live out faithful commitments to all of God’s creation.

There is no better way to instill a love for Judaism than a summer at Ramah. At Ramah, being Jewish is fun. At Ramah, being Jewish is cool. Surrounded by their close friends and the extraordinary Jewish role models who are their counselors, Ramah campers get to live a Jewish life at Ramah.

In sharing joys and struggles with others who walk similar paths, we are able to support and encourage our brothers and sisters in Christ to live courageously in witness to him. It is our hope to rejuvenate the working soul through fellowship and praise of God.

Learn more at chicago.csuiteforchrist.com

Interested in becoming a member? Learn more and register at https://chicago.csuiteforchrist.com/application/

Join us at one of our upcoming events! See all events here: https://chicago.csuiteforchrist.com/meeting-schedule/

Name: Madrasah Alsagoff Al-Arabiah
Description: An Instituion believes in the promotion of an Islamic school community with strong emphasis on Al-Quran, As-Sunnah and the Arabic Language so as to nurture pious, creative and innovative Muslimah leaders, who will realise their highest potential to serve their religion, family, community and the nation.

Name: All Saints Episcopal Church
Description:
Founded in 1742, All Saints' is the oldest Episcopal parish in western Maryland.  Parishioners of All Saints' have continually been the leaders in the community.  Thomas Johnson, the first post-Colonial governor of Maryland, and Francis Scott Key, prominent attorney and author of the National Anthem, worshipped at All Saints.  In 1793, All Saints' was the site of the first confirmation of an American citizen, by Bishop Thomas John Claggett, the first Episcopal Bishop consecrated on American soil.

A few years after 1742, a small colonial building was constructed about four blocks from our present church, and served the parish for over sixty years.  The replacement structure was built on Court Street in 1814, and is now used as parish hall and classrooms.  In 1855, a handsome neo-gothic structure was designed by the noted 19th church architect Richard Upjohn.  The steeple is one of the clusted spires of Frederick, cited in John Greenleaf Whittier's poem, Barbara Fritchie.

The 20th century brought about a growth in membership and relative stability.  Through it all we remain firmly committed to the Episcopal Church.

It appears that those things which have defined us during our history have not been our differences of opinion on the latest issues. Instead, our ability to evolve enables us to continue serving God and God’s people.

Name: College Golf Fellowship
Description: CGF exist to make disciples by investing relationally with the gospel of Jesus Christ throughout the world of college golf.

Name: International Scripture Ministries, Inc. (ISM)
Description: International Scripture Ministries is a global ministry leading and pioneering technology to serve the global church in fulfilling the great commission. We believe the Bible is the inspired Word of God, and that every person should have unhindered access so they can know Christ.

Name: The Nikah Co
Description:
The Nikah Co (Est. 1437/2016) is the UK's leading and award-winning bespoke Nikah service. We understand that the Nikah is the most important part of your big day, and after all it's the fulfilment of half your Deen! Our professional and tailored approach ensures that you & your spouse have a memorable experience of your Nikah ceremony with one of our qualified Imams. We offer a wide range of packages to suit your needs which include tailored speeches in English, recitations, and professional wedding hosting. 

OUR PROMISE: As specialists in Nikah ceremonies, our promise is to bring back the true meaning of the Nikah and deliver it in a unique way, ensuring that it becomes the highlight of the day. Our team work hard to personalise and tailor the ceremony around the couple regardless of their background, race or overall religious understanding. We appreciate that this is the biggest moment of an individual's life which is why we want to make it as easy and stress-free for them as possible. Our qualified Imams are here to attend to the needs of the couple and their families on the day, and will ensure the speech is delivered in English and is relevant whilst highlighting the true beauty of marriage in Islam.

Name: Casa Sobre La Roca
Description:
Casa Sobre la Roca es una Iglesia Cristiana Integral, administrada bajo principios bíblicos para trabajar por el bienestar moral de Colombia y el mundo de habla hispana.

- Amamos a Dios
- Amamos a la Gente
- Amamos a la Iglesia

------

La inauguración oficial de Casa Sobre La Roca Iglesia Cristiana Integral, se produjo el 1ro de Septiembre de 1987, con la asistencia de 72 personas y la asistencia de varios pastores reconocidos del país.

Name: Universitas Abdurrab Univrab
Description: Universitas Abdurrab is a religious institutions company based out of JI. Riau Ujung No. 73, Tampan, Air Hitam, Payung Sekaki, Air Hitam, Kec. Payung Sekaki, Kota Pekanbaru, Riau 28291

Name: GraceLife Church of Pineville
Description: GraceLife Church is located in Pineville, NC, and serves the surrounding communities of the Charlotte Metro area and South Carolina. We emphasize a salvation that is received by simply believing in Christ for His free gift. This salvation empowers us to love God and others.

Name: Jesus is the Lord Ministries
Description: “Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind.

Name: YFC Northern Indiana
Description:
Youth for Christ of Northern Indiana gives young people everywhere the opportunity to know Jesus. For 75 years, YFC Northern Indiana has been a relational ministry centered on Jesus. We've been faithfully serving Northern Indiana by going where young people are and building connections through authentic relationships.

We work in urban neighborhoods, community centers, high schools, middle schools, and juvenile detention centers - we meet young people where they are. This happens through programs like Campus Life, City Life, and Juvenile Justice Ministry. YFC is compelled by love to offer hope to the next generation.

Name: Islamic Society of Greater Houston
Description:
Islamic Society of Greater Houston is a company based out of 3110
Eastside St, Houston, TX, United States.

Name: Assyrian Church of the East
Description: Assyrian Church Of The East is a religious institutions company

Name: MAGIS Brasil - Rede Inaciana de Juventudes
Description:
O Programa MAGIS Brasil é a Rede Inaciana de Juventude da Companhia de Jesus, presente em todo o país por meio de Centros e Espaços MAGIS, além de atuar em espaços de fronteira, respondendo ao chamado do Papa Francisco por uma Igreja em saída.

Com uma ampla rede de parcerias e atuação nacional, promovemos experiências, formação e acompanhamento para que os jovens desenvolvam um projeto de vida com propósito, unindo fé e compromisso com a justiça. Nossa missão é formar homens e mulheres para os demais, construindo, junto com tantas iniciativas, um mundo mais humano e solidário.

Name: Holy Wisdom Monastery
Description:
All are welcome. Holy Wisdom Monastery is an ecumenical Benedictine community of communities, located near Madison, Wisconsin.

Prayer, hospitality, justice and respect for all of creation form the heart of these communities. Our peaceful setting includes restored prairie, a retreat and guest house and a ‘green’ monastery building.

Name: Yeshivat Maharat
Description: Yeshivat Maharat is a pioneering venture, founded in 2009 to be the first institution in Jewish history to train and ordain women to be fully integrated into the Orthodox community as rabbinic leaders and Halakhic authorities. Yeshivat Maharat is dedicated to giving Orthodox women proficiency in learning and teaching Talmud, understanding Jewish law and its application to everyday life, as well as the pastoral skills necessary to be effective Jewish communal leaders.

Name: Agape Flights
Description:
Serving Christ by Serving His Missionaries in Haiti | Bahamas | Dominican Republic

Agape Flights is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit, Christian aviation ministry.

Our vision is a world where missionaries never lack resources to share the unconditional love of Christ.

Our mission is to provide excellent aviation service delivering cargo, mail and humanitarian aid to missionary partners serving Christ, carrying hope to the nations of the Caribbean.

Our purpose is scripturally aligned with our mission statement where in 2 Corinthians 9:12, the apostle Paul gives us a clear picture of God’s desire for us to “supply the needs of the saints.” For the ministry of this service is not only supplying the needs of saints, but is also overflowing in many acts of thanksgiving to God.

With that clear mandate, we are committed to supporting our missionaries, their families and their unique missions.

Nearly 13 million people live in the areas regularly reached by Agape’s flights to Haiti, the Dominican Republic and the Bahamas. The supplies transported to more than 350 missionaries, their families and their missions are used to change lives, one person at a time.

Each year, Agape Flights touches the lives of more than 1.5 million men, women and children through its affiliated missionaries who provide clean water, community health, education, evangelism, medical services, microenterprise, orphan care and vocational training.

Name: Moskee Bilal Alkmaar
Description:
Begin jaren ’80 is er vanuit de Marokkaanse gemeenschap behoefte ontstaan voor een gebedsruimte in Alkmaar. In 1981 is de eerste gebedsruimte gekocht aan de Spanjaardstraat in het centrum van Alkmaar. Dit betrof een kleine ruimte die al snel uitgebreid moest worden. Eind jaren ’80 was het aantal gelovigen dat gebruikt maakte van de moskee dusdanig groot dat de stichting op zoek moest naar een grotere en geschikte gebedsruimte. Tevens was er behoefte naar een ruimte waarin andere activiteiten konden plaatsvinden. Dit heeft geresulteerd in een jarenlange en moeizame zoektocht naar een nieuw pand. Op 25-05-1998 heeft de stichting met succes een voormalig pand van een basisschool aan de Montalbaen in Overdie-oost (Alkmaar-Zuid) kunnen kopen. In deze wijk woont uiteindelijk ook een groot deel van de moskeebezoekers.

De stichting is opgericht op 11 september 1981 en ingeschreven in het handelsregister van KvK Noord-Holland te Alkmaar onder dossiernummer 41239048.

gf.me/u/2r4r58

Name: Common Grace
Description: Common Grace is a movement of over 50,000 people pursuing Jesus and Justice. Common Grace seeks to be a more gracious, compassionate Christian voice in the public.  Common Grace pursues justice in four key justice areas: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander justice, Creation and Climate justice, justice for people seeking asylum and Refugees, and Domestic and Family Violence justice.

Name: Kirkko Oulussa - Oulun seurakuntayhtymä
Description:
Oulun seurakuntayhtymään kuuluvat Haukiputaan, Karjasillan, Kiimingin, Oulujoen, Oulunsalon ja Tuiran seurakunnat sekä Oulun tuomiokirkkoseurakunta. 

Meillä työskentelee esimerkiksi hengellisen työn, kasvatuksen ja nuorisotyön, talouden, hallinnon, viestinnän sekä kiinteistönhoidon ja musiikin ammattilaisia. Oulun seurakuntayhtymässä on yli 400 työntekijää. 

Avoinna oleviin työpaikkoihin voit tutustua osoitteessa https://kirkkorekry.fi/fi/tyonantajat/oulun-ev.lut-seurakuntayhtyma/

Name: Restoration Church
Description: We exist to see every man, woman, and child have repeated opportunities to experience the restoration of the Gospel.

Name: Ev.-Luth. Kirchenkreis Hamburg-West/Südholstein
Description:
The Ev.-Luth. church district Hamburg-West/South Holstein is the smaller of the two church districts in Hamburg. It unites very different worlds of life in its area. Conurbations, large urban settlements, small towns and rural villages are part of the living environment of the people in the church district.  

The population spectrum in the 55 parishes with a total of 212,000 parishioners is broad, ranging from people on the poverty line to the wealthy middle classes.

In this environment the church district of Hamburg-West/South Holstein sees itself as open, tolerant and solidary. Supporting people in their living environment is therefore a major focus in many diaconal and educational institutions.

Name: Bel Air Church
Description:
Ever since Bel Air Church (also known as Bel Air Presbyterian Church) was established in 1956 it has been known as a church deeply committed to Christ, His people, and caring for the world. 

We seek to Follow Jesus Every Day and Everywhere with Everyone.

So that...

Every Person, Every Neighborhood, and Every City will be Revived and Renewed by Jesus.

Building upon over sixty years of faithful men and women serving the Risen Christ, it’s our turn to be God’s agents of healing, redemption and reconciliation. We want to continue to develop our church as a spiritual home that equips Christians for today’s complex and tough challenges.

Name: The Standard | For Business.  For Life
Description:
Firstly, please don't leave without following.  The Standard is about helping business owners understand the promises of God for their businesses.  

The Bible says 'The blessing of the Lord makes a person rich and he adds no sorrow with it'. (Proverbs 10:22). Whilst it's not all about the money, we are expected to thrive as believers but to also understand what it means to live with His peace.

The Standard is all about helping businesses thrive and not just survive.  Doing it God's way and understanding what's influencing our businesses, people and decisions.  To support our beliefs, we have our own business and significant presence online at https://salesxchange.co.uk

Visit our website to learn about our approach to digital selling for B2B and read our articles, watch our live streams and videos, listen to our podcasts and download our guides.

If you need help or guidance, we're only a PM or phone call away.

Name: Kumanz'obom Ministries
Description:
Kumanz'obom, which means Water of Life in the Xhosa language, is a Christian ministry dedicated to training preachers and counselling families for the purpose of promoting biblical principles in the community.

Created by Dr OT Mngqibisa in 2007 and located in the beautiful city of East London, South Africa, our philosophy of service is based on the words of General Douglas MacArthur which state, "Be ashamed to die until you have done something for humanity".


OUR VISION
To make Christ known to all in a personal and permanent way.



OUR MISSION
To equip and transform the community through its leaders and families for the glorification of Jesus Christ.



OUR VALUES
1. Unity
As a Christian ministry, we acknowledge and value the role Biblical principles play in building a loving and united household.

2. Leadership
To provide religious and community leaders with the necessary tools to lead their flock to the one and only True Shepherd.

3. Service
Serving the community wholeheartedly in fulfillment of God's purpose for us.


COME BE INSPIRED.

Name: Enlace TV
Description: Enlace es una cadena internacional de comunicación cristiana en español, que durante las 24 horas, los 365 días del año, proclama el sublime mensaje de la cruz. Después de 30 años de predicar el evangelio a través de la televisión, en el 2018 lanzamos Enlace+, muestra plataforma de contenido en demanda, con el deseo de estar presente en los medios del momento, utilizando tecnologías emergentes para compartir un mensaje acertado, con la persona correcta, en el momento oportuno. Como siempre, Enlace sigue y seguirá siendo, una imagen de lo alto.

Name: ISKCON Attapur, Hyderabad
Description:
The International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON), known colloquially as the Hare Krishna movement or Hare Krishnas, is a Gaudiya Vaishnava religious organisation. ISKCON was founded in 1966 in New York City by A. C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada.
ISKCON has been active in the Attapur area for more than 3 years and has been conducting various programs based on the Vedic scriptures along with performing regular nagar sankirtan, chanting the Holy Names of the Lord. The Attapur center has been very active during the pandemic by distributing hundreds of free meals to the needy on a daily basis as part of its Food for Life Annadaan program.
ISKCON has inaugurated a grand new temple (include) the three deities names) in HUDA colony of Attapur and devotees are thronging the place to receive the divine blessings
The International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON), known colloquially as the Hare Krishna movement or Hare Krishnas, is a Gaudiya Vaishnava religious organisation. ISKCON was founded in 1966 in New York City by A. C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada.

Name: New Life Christian Church
Description:
We exist to help people discover God daily.

Find. Hope. Here.

Name: CATHOLIC DIOCESE OF KANSAS CITY-ST. JOSEPH
Description: The Diocese of Kansas City-St. Joseph ministers to the souls of approximately 124,000 Catholics living in 27 counties of north and western Missouri.  Under the guidance of Bishop James V. Johnston, Jr., the Diocese of Kansas City-St. Joseph provides social services, education, and comfort for the faithful of the region.

Name: Sisters of St. Joseph Brentwood
Description: Located in Brentwood, NY, The Sisters of St. Joseph are the largest order of Catholic women religious on Long Island with more than 500 members, and have a 160-year tradition of ministering wherever they are needed including the Dioceses of Brooklyn and Rockville Centre, the New York Archdioceses, and in communities located in Connecticut, Massachusetts, Florida, Indiana, New Jersey, Washington, D.C., Appalachia, California, Puerto Rico, the Dominican Republic, and Brazil. The Sisters of St. Joseph operate five schools for girls in New York -Fontbonne Hall Academy, The Mary Louis Academy, Sacred Heart Academy, St. Joseph H.S, Bishop Kearney H.S., as well as Academia Maria Reina in San Juan Puerto Rico. At their Brentwood campus, the Sisters operate The CSJ Learning Connection for Adult Education, Maria Regina skilled nursing facility, their Organic Garden to promote ecological conservation, and the St. Joseph’s Renewal Center for spiritual renewal. Providence House and Hour Children, founded by the Sisters of St. Joseph, are programs to help incarcerated and formerly incarcerated women and their children in Brooklyn, Queens and Westchester. For more information, please visit www.brentwoodcsj.org.

Name: Kehillas Federation & KF Kosher
Description:
Kehillas Federation  comprises a network of 17 constituent and 22 affiliated Synagogues and is based at Watford Way, Hendon, London.

As well as looking after its member shuls, the Federation has a Beis Din, a Burial Society and runs a kosher food licensing organisation. 

The Federation Beth Din's dynamic Dayanim are internationally recognised authorities and are always available to discuss halachic questions. As a formal Beth Din they hear civil cases and deal with matrimonial matters. 

The Kashrus Division issues local kosher catering licences as well as undertaking product certification at home and abroad. 

The Federation is going through an exciting period of growth and is developing new communities. It provides numerous shiurim throughout its synagogues and is very involved with formal and informal education in the Jewish community across the UK.

Name: Young Evangelicals for Climate Action
Description: YECA exists to equip, empower, and catalyze young Christians to love God and love our neighbors through bold, wholehearted, and faithful climate action in our church and community in order to create a more just, equitable, and loving world.

Name: Tennessee Baptist Mission Board
Description: Tennessee Baptist Mission Board is a Christ-centered, field-focused, Great Commission organization created by Tennessee Baptists to serve Tennessee Baptist Churches.

Name: Keystone Church
Description:
We are Keystone Church, a church in Dallas/Ft. Worth that follows Jesus Christ as Lord and joins God in the work He is doing today. We do this by loving God, loving others, and loving life.

At KEYSTONE, we believe in extreme freedom because we’re passionate about life and living it whole in all its fullness. It’s because of who we believe in—and that’s the very Life-giver Himself. Jesus. For it’s through Him we exist and for one reason alone—to build lives on His foundational truths that’ll see people living in the freedom of restored hope and purpose, just as He originally designed.

For people who want to overcome in life and experience greater freedom, Keystone Church is passionate about seeing lives transformed by building them on Jesus and the foundational truths of His Word. We share the gospel in ways people can relate to personally, there’s a connection that brings revelation, opening up their lives and setting them free.

The key to living with a whole lot more than what you’re experiencing now. And we just love that…

Name: Union Church Hong Kong
Description:
We are a friendly, interdenominational, English-speaking church welcoming all to our church located in the Wan Chai district of Hong Kong. Our vision is to build a home in Christ to seek, love and serve God and our neighbours. 

Join us for worship services - in-person and online, small groups, study groups, midweek fellowship, and other events and activities. We hope that you will sense God's presence and also the love and friendship of God's people at Union Church Hong Kong.

Name: St Helen's Bishopsgate - City lunchtime talks
Description: Partnering with Christians across London to reach the City with the life-giving news of Jesus.

Name: The American Cathedral in Paris
Description:
The American Cathedral in Paris has been a spiritual home to an international and multicultural community since 1886. Inspired by our American, Episcopalian and Anglican heritage, we are open to and inclusive of the faiths, languages and cultures that surround us. We joyfully follow the Episcopal Church’s commitment to recognize everyone as a child of God.

We are a parish church and the Cathedral of the Convocation of Episcopal Churches in Europe which is a collection of churches, mission congregations, and specialized ministries spread geographically over seven countries in continental Europe.

Name: Bethany Church LA
Description: Bethany was started in 1963 in a small house in Baker, Louisiana. We are a church that is rich in Godly heritage and carries a legacy that is three generations strong. Pastor Jonathan Stockstill leads Bethany with fresh vision to see Baton Rouge and surrounding areas won for Christ and to see people’s hearts set ablaze for the Kingdom of God. With that vision in mind, we are moving full steam ahead with excitement at what God is doing through our local church. The move of God that is happening here is something you must experience!

Name: Bisdom Haarlem-Amsterdam
Description: The Catholic Church in the province of North-Holland and southern Flevoland. Current bishop is Mgr. dr. Josef Punt and the auxiliary bishop is Mgr. dr. Hendriks. The diocese has about 468.000 Catholics in 172 parishes. The diocese has its own seminary in Vogelenzang, a traditional procession in Laren, a renown bendectine abbey in Egmond, a marian pilgrimage place and missionary center in Heiloo. The cathedral church is in Haarlem. The patron Saint of the diocese is Saint Bavo.

Name: Seton Catholic Central
Description:
OUR MISSION
The Catholic-based learning environment at Seton Catholic Central is inspired by our ever-present teacher, Jesus Christ. Our students are encouraged to develop a love of learning, which will serve them throughout their lives. Our mission is to meet each student’s needs – spiritual, academic and emotional – through a fiscally responsible program that recognizes the importance of stewardship in all its forms.

Location / Affiliation:
Seton Catholic Central is located at 70 Seminary Avenue in Binghamton, New York. Seton is a member of the Catholic Schools of Broome County educational experience. This system is affiliated with the Roman Catholic Diocese of Syracuse.

Accreditation:
Seton Catholic Central is chartered by the New York State Board of Regents and is a member of the Middle States Association of Colleges and Schools. The school was ranked 14 out of 100 of the best Catholic schools in New York State by Niche in 2016.

Athletics:
The SAINTS embrace interscholastic athletics as an experience that is an integral part of their overall academic mission. Sportsmanship, teamwork, discipline, commitment, fitness, social interaction and healthy competition are the cornerstones of the athletic program. Every year, 80% of the student-body competes on at least one interscholastic athletic team. Seton offers 15 sports programs at the Varsity, J.V. and Modified levels. Teams have won 7 New York State Championships and 14 NYSPHSAA Regional Championships.
