Name: Religious Formation Conference
Description: The Religious Formation Conference educates and strengthens formators in their ministry of formation. The RFC engages religious communities with timely resources, services, and experiences that support initial and ongoing formation, that are responsive to an emerging future, in prophetic witness to Gospel values through personal and communal transformation.

Name: Hoboken Grace Community Church
Description:
Hoboken Grace Community Church is a diverse, growing, contemporary Christian Church learning what it means to follow Jesus Christ here in our city.

Follow us on our social media accounts @hobokengrace

Name: Ecclesia Hills Church
Description:
Ecclesia Hills is a community of God-loving people, worshipping in Lagos, Nigeria. We exist to help hearts go aflame for God, until God’s purpose is done on earth as in heaven. We gather to encounter God's presence and to continue our journey in love.

Our Mission:
Love- To create a non-judgmental environment for you, engendering compassion and drawing you from any impossible situation into a warm, lively, uplifting, and hopeful atmosphere where your healing is completed under God through Christ

Family- You will find a family at The Hills. Many people try to survive in the spiritual outback on their own, and it is hard. God is calling us to be a Church family to you. A place where Fathers, Mothers, Children and relationships blossom in the nuclear and in the spiritual extended family

Touch the World- We are the ones who heal the world. We have been given the mandate to reconcile generations. We are God’s hands and feet to those who cannot find their way. We touch and heal men and women everywhere we go. Through practical ministry, we proclaim the good news and impact culture through a Godly lifestyle

Name: Associação Central Paranaense da IASD
Description:
A Associação Central Paranaense é a sede administrativa da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia para a região central do Paraná. 

A Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia é um corpo organizacional estabelecido praticamente no mundo todo, com aproximadamente 21,9 milhões de membros.

A Organização está dividida em três níveis administrativos: Igrejas e Congregações – formam uma Associação ou Missão; Associações e Missões – formam uma União; Uniões – formam a Associação Geral da Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia.

Sobre a instituição: https://www.adventistas.org/pt/institucional/

Name: "Matthew 2414" Christian Ministry - Matthew2414ChristianMinistry.org - "Live By Faith"
Description:
The head of this ministry Philip de Rivaz is a Seventh-day Adventist and this ministry supports the church's beliefs, which can be seen here: https://www-adventist-org.webpkgcache.com/doc/-/s/www.adventist.org/beliefs/.
Give PayPal: info@matthew2414.info

Matthew2414.info - spreading the Christian Gospel around the world.

“And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.”

Currently 5 "live" real-time internet TV channels + websites launched: https://lnkd.in/dCWJDWJ / https://lnkd.in/d2wyycf / http://www.sdaforum.org / https://lnkd.in/dMd2UUu / https://lnkd.in/dTYsnY2.

Name: Il Cerchio, Monasteri e Centri Zen
Description: Il Cerchio è un'associazione nata per la diffusione dello Zen in Italia. Siamo a Milano, Padova, Berceto, Cecina, Pesaro, Napoli.

Name: General Administration of the Sisters of the Holy Names of Jesus and Mary
Description:
The Congregation of the Sisters of the Holy Names of Jesus and Mary (SNJM) is a Roman Catholic religious institute currently living and working in over five countries. 

Committed to the service of the Church and society, our foundress, Eulalie Durocher (Mother Marie-Rose), provided needed access to education to young people and focused on developing all the aspects of each person. Under their inspiration, the Congregation has worked for the education of girls and young women, especially those living in rural areas, with the concern of meeting the needs of people from every background.

Today, the SNJM mission revolves around these focal points while integrating the values of social solidarity with impoverished and marginalized people, the promotion of justice and human rights, and protection of the environment. The spiritual heritage, the educational vision of “the full development of the human person” and the concern for justice bequeathed by Marie-Rose Durocher are still alive to this day while being constantly adapted to the multiple needs and challenges of our changing societies.

Name: General Board of Church and Society
Description: The General Board of Church and Society (GBCS) is one of four international general program boards of The United Methodist Church. The General Board has headquarters on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C. and at the Church Center for the United Nations in New York City.

Name: Catholic Diocese Of Portsmouth
Description: The Diocese of Portsmouth comprises 90 parishes across Hampshire, Dorset, Berkshire (except Slough), South Oxfordshire, the Isle of Wight and the Channel Islands. Formed 19th May 1882 by the division of the Diocese of Southwark, the Diocese of Portsmouth has a presence in every community and can offer ministry and mission to all who come to us, working towards the Bishop’s vision of Bringing people closer to Jesus Christ through his church.

Name: Vyomology
Description:
Blending Astrology with technology.
India's best Astrologers just a few clicks away.

Vyomology is a one-stop solution for all your astrological needs. We bring India's best Astrologers for online consultation. You can consult them through call or chat and get answers to all your questions.

Name: Family Worship Center
Description:
Regardless of your current state in life, we at Family Worship Center want you to feel the love of Christ & come to know Him deeper than you ever have before.

You will be challenged in your spiritual journey & will hear our pastors preach & teach the Bible. From the time you walk in the door, our dedicated staff & volunteers are willing to help with any questions you have. We want to make God real to you & your family.

We have a friendly diverse community from all walks of life; truck drivers, teachers, lawyers, construction workers, engineers… We all come together to learn about Christ, develop new friendships & grow in our own spiritual journeys.

Name: EastLake Church
Description:
From the website: "EastLake Church is a non-denominational, Christian church located in Chula Vista California. With nearly 5300 weekly attendees, high energy kids' programs, powerful rock and roll style worship music, and relevant Bible based teaching, EastLake Church is a great place to check out God, His truths, and what He has in store for you.

Please join us this weekend as we figure out God's plans for our life, our church, our communities and our world."

Name: Prince Of Peace Catholic Church
Description:
Who We Are
For over 30 years, Prince of Peace Catholic Parish has been serving the families of Plano, TX. Led by pastor, Father Michael Forge, our parish is a vibrant Roman Catholic community of over 2000 families and an elementary school, School.

Our parishioners are known both for their generosity and hospitality - fruits we believe come from a strong relationship with Jesus Christ and the sacramental life. Wherever you are in your faith journey, we are confident that you will find your home here. From all of us at POP, welcome! 

Our MISSION is to engage our community by celebrating, renewing, and sharing our Catholic faith through liturgy, sacraments, education, and service to others.

Our VISION is to live and grow as a Catholic community so that we might walk more closely with Jesus.

Name: Pathfinder Church, Ellisville, MO
Description:
At Pathfinder Church, we know that life is a journey and the road is rarely smooth. That's why we strive to be a place where real people can gather together to find clarity, purpose and connection. Pathfinder Church aims to shed light on life's journey, as we walk it together.

We invite you to take the next step to join us for a live streamed service or in person. You’ll experience thought-provoking messages and a welcoming community.

Name: Holy Trinity Lutheran Church
Description: A congregation of the ELCA

Name: Radical Mentoring
Description:
People today are connected but more alone than ever before. This isolation causes them to stumble through life, unsure of who they are or where they’re going.

When you connect with someone who’s a few steps down the road and engage in authentic community with others, you begin to uncover who God created you to be.

Radical Mentoring has developed a relational mentoring process that creates a safe space for people to learn and grow and drive relationships deep.

Connection changes everything. When people are fully known by God and others, they can live life to the full.

Name: New Camaldoli Hermitage
Description: A Camaldolese Benedictine monastery in Big Sur, California.

Name: New Life Christian Fellowship of Jacksonville
Description: The heartbeat of New Life is not just to have people sitting in seats. Rather, to be a house that lives the gospel every day, giving away what was so freely given. There’s nothing more powerful than a body of believers who have been rocked by His power and changed by His presence. And so, we join hands and lift our voices to bring the message of powerful hope and unmatched love to a broken and weary world. Everyone has a role and everything falls into place as we lift Jesus high. This is the rise of the saints and this is why we love being a church where Jesus is the center of it all.

Name: FHOP - Florianópolis House of Prayer
Description:
A Florianópolis House of Prayer é um centro de oração e adoração que se expressa na forma de casa de oração, base missionária e igreja local. Localizado no coração da ilha de Florianópolis, o FHOP nasceu de um desejo de fortalecer a Igreja de Cristo no lugar de intercessão por todo o Brasil, através de oração persistente e adoração movida pela beleza de Jesus.

Atualmente a equipe composta por missionários intercessores em tempo integral chega a cerca de 120, sendo cantores, músicos, intercessores e também aqueles que operam em outros ofícios pertinentes à estrutura de uma Igreja e Base Missionária.

Como igreja local, a comunidade de membros tem crescido em comunhão e conhecimento da Palavra nos ajuntamentos dominicais e pequenos grupos semanais. No campo das ações sociais, a Florianópolis House of Prayer acredita fortemente que, a partir do lugar de oração, somos capacitados a manifestar a Grande Comissão alcançando a cidade, tocando a comunidade carente e praticando atos de justiça. No campo da ministração itinerante, o FHOP realiza diversas conferências ao ano, com diferentes ênfases e em outras localidades além de Florianópolis, afim de contribuir para a edificação da Igreja Intercessora no Brasil e perpetuar uma grande missão da qual se considera apenas uma pequena parte.

Name: Paraclete Mission Group
Description:
Our Mission: 
To come alongside Christian leaders around the world.

Our Vision: 
A flourishing global Church served by faithful, effective leaders.

Our Values:
Servanthood, 
Heart for the Nations, 
Action with Reflection, 
Respect, 
Excellence with Integrity

In 2020, Paraclete received a      4-star rating from Charity Navigator for the 7th year in a row, an honor acheived by only 7% of charities evaluated by CN.

Name: Wisdom Word Leadership Institute
Description: We are an advanced educational and training institution, human capital builders, corporate governance consulting and public policy developers and evaluators.

Name: Engage Your Destiny
Description:
Engage Your Destiny (EYD) is on a mission to help combat the deadly epidemic of veteran suicide by equipping our Bravest with the spiritual tools they need to face any battle. We exist to minister to the military men and women of the United States, and get them connected to life-changing programs and resources.
 
Join the mission and bring honor, hope and healing to our active duty military, veterans and their families today: www.engageyourdestiny.com/donate

Name: FUND FOR VOCATIONS
Description:
Many young men and women are called to religious life but are prevented or delayed because of student loan debt. The Fund for Vocations removes this obstacle by assuming monthly student loan payments while they are in formation. Upon profession of final vows, we pay off the the debt. 

Thanks to our supporters we are currently funding 106 vocations and many more are knocking on our door. Please join us!

Name: Office of the Archbishop of Canterbury
Description: Archbishop of Canterbury concentrated on busy times in the diocese, including Christmas, Easter, and deacon ordinations.

Name: Archdiocese of Las Vegas
Description: Archdiocese of Las Vegas is a religious institutions company based out of United States.

Name: Diocese of Rochester
Description: A diverse and vibrant community of faith, seeking first the Kingdom of God, we are called together by God to change, serve, and grow with compassion, courage, and creativity.

Name: Arcidiocesi di Milano
Description:
L'Arcidiocesi di Milano per storia, estensione e struttura ecclesiale è tra le più importanti del mondo ed è la prima diocesi in Europa per numero di cattolici. 

Conta circa 2000 preti diocesani, circa 800 religiosi, più di 6.000 religiose. Il Seminario Arcivescovile per la formazione dei sacerdoti è a Venegono Inferiore (Va). La diocesi è detta "ambrosiana" dal nome del suo patrono Sant'Ambrogio (340-397). 

Si estende su un territorio di 4.234 kmq e comprende le province di Milano, Varese e Lecco, Monza-Brianza, parte di quella di Como e alcuni comuni delle province di Bergamo e Pavia. Ha una popolazione di oltre i 5,4 milioni di abitanti. È composta da 1107 parrocchie, distribuite in 73 decanati, organizzati in 7 Zone pastorali.

Name: Athens Church
Description:
At Athens Church, everything we do is driven by our mission: to lead people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ. With two locations serving our community, we are passionate about creating environments where people—especially those who may not typically attend church—feel welcomed, valued, and inspired to explore faith.

Our vision is simple yet powerful: to create a church that unchurched people love to attend. We believe church should be engaging, relevant, and life-changing. That’s why we’re intentional about every detail—from our weekend services to our community involvement—so people feel encouraged to take their next step in faith, no matter where they're starting from.

Name: Church of God Ministries (North America)
Description:
Church of God Ministries is the headquarters for all Church of God congregations in North America (The Church of God based in Anderson, IN).  They hold an annual convention each June for people from Church of God congregations to meet, attend seminars, go to church services, etc.  

The organization is also in charge of all global missions - preparing missionaries for assignments and assisting them with whatever they need when they are serving in the several countries we have missionaries stationed at.  

They hold many different events for youth (7th-12h grades).  The largest event is the International Youth Convention which takes place in the U.S. and typically draws an average of 6,000 young adult.  It is held every other year.

The company also produces curriculum and other support materials for the many Church of God congregations to use for kid's ministries, Bible studies, etc.

Name: The Episcopal Diocese of Texas
Description: Founded in 1838 by the Episcopal Church as a mission to the people of Texas, the Diocese of Texas has been led continuously by the Holy Spirit to plant ministries and congregations to partner with and serve the wider community. Today the diocese spans more than 46,000 square miles and encompasses 57 counties. We are headquartered in historic downtown Houston with offices in Austin and Tyler. Led by the Rt. Rev. C. Andrew Doyle, the ninth Bishop of Texas, the diocese is more than 400 clergy, 167 congregations, 70 missional communities, 22 campus missions, chaplaincies, foundations, institutions, and over 72,000 parishioners serving our neighbors. We embrace all people with mutual love and respect. We are one Church reconciled by Jesus Christ, joining God’s mission to reconcile others and build up the kingdom of God.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Tyler
Description: Our mission is to serve the people living within the diocese, supporting parish priests and the people in our parish and school communities to worship and live according to Gospel values and to evangelize within their local communities through the witness of their lives.

Name: Manchester Cathedral
Description:
Manchester Cathedral has been centre stage in its city’s history for nearly 600 years. In 1421 Henry V signed a royal charter granting permission for a collegiate church to be built.

In 1847 a new Manchester diocese was created and this historic church became a Cathedral.

This Grade I listed masterpiece has not only provided a stage on which the city of Manchester’s compelling history has been played out but also provided some of the leading actors for this narrative. Century after century the stone walls have survived wars and bombings, Henry VIII’s reformation and Queen Elizabeth I’s spy, witnessed the birth of the world’s anti-slavery movement and lived the Industrial Revolution first hand.

There are medieval quires and ancient archives, bees on the roof and kangaroos carved on thrones, choristers running to practice and artists drawing in aisles. Classical music concerts served with coffee and wines fairs set to jazz.

Opening Hours:

Monday and  Friday 8.30am - 5.30pm
Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday 8.30am - 6.30pm
Saturday 8.30am - 6.30pm
Sunday 8.30am - 6.30pm

These times may vary during special events.

Admission is free.  All we ask is that you consider leaving a voluntary donation to help support the running costs of the Cathedral.

Name: VINIA
Description: Together, we start, support, and strengthen churches and engage, develop, and empower leaders who bear lasting fruit for kingdom movement.

Name: Dominican Sisters of Mary, Mother of the Eucharist
Description: We are the Dominican Sisters of Mary, Mother of the Eucharist in Ann Arbor, Michigan. Through profession of the vows of poverty, chastity and obedience, along with a contemplative emphasis on Eucharistic adoration and Marian devotion, our community exists.

Name: Ta Collective
Description:
We run events & courses led by women scholars to help Muslim women love Allah in a safe & nourishing space.

We have a commitment to fair payment, support and training for all of the women scholars who work with us.

Check out our website for our latest events and courses!

Name: Diocese of Delhi CNI
Description: The Church of North India as a United and Uniting together is committed to announce the Good News of the reign of God inaugurated through death and resurrection of Jesus Christ in proclamation and to demonstrate in actions to restore the integrity of God’s creation though continuous struggle against the demonic powers by breaking down the barriers of caste, class, gender, economic inequality, and exploitation of nature.

Name: Word & Deed Ministries
Description: Word & Deed Ministries is an international Reformed relief and development organization based out of St. Thomas, Ontario and Hudsonville, Michigan.

Name: Heart of a Man
Description:
As men, we need each other. We need brothers, we need wisdom, we need encouragement, we need faith. Heart of a Man is a movement of men towards Jesus, authentic friendships, and character. We are made by our Creator to be deeply connected with other men who are equally committed to learning, growing, and walking through life together and deepening in faith.

We are recreating the traditional idea of "Men's Ministry" at Heart of a Man to more holistically meet the needs of men. We first are coming together to build life-long friendships built on a foundation of faith in Jesus. On top of that, we have developed a diverse set of programs, classes, and men's groups to meet men exactly where they are and help them grow, develop, heal, process, and ultimately, become a man of character, integrity, and excellence.

We believe that the role of a man in marriage and in society is vital, and so we are developing men into gospel-centered leaders, teaching men what it looks like to love and care for a wife, to invest in your children, and to lead, love and serve the world as Jesus did. Come be a part of our movement! We are shifting the way men lead and serve, and are building a new generation of Christ-honoring, character-driven men.

Name: The Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church
Description: The Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church also known as the Malankara Church and the Indian Orthodox Church, is an autocephalous church based in Kerala, India. Part of Oriental Orthodoxy, it is one of the oldest Christian communities in Asia. The Church serves India's Saint Thomas Christian (also known as the Nasrani) population. According to tradition, the Church originated during the first-century AD missions of Thomas the Apostle. The autocephalous Catholicos of the East and the Malankara Metropolitan, enthroned on the Apostolic Throne of St. Thomas (currently H.H. Moran Mar Baselios Marthoma Paulose II), is the primate of the Church. It employs the Malankara Rite, an Indian form of the West Syriac liturgical rite.

Name: Bisdom van 's-Hertogenbosch
Description:
Een bisdom of diocees is een kerkrechtelijk afgebakend gebied dat onder het bestuur van een lokale bisschop staat. Een kerkprovincie kan uit een of meer bisdommen bestaan. Er zijn zeven bisdommen binnen de Nederlandse Rooms-katholieke kerkprovincie: Utrecht, ’s-Hertogenbosch, Groningen, Haarlem, Rotterdam, Breda en Roermond.

Bisdommen worden vernoemd naar de stad waar de bisschop resideert, vandaar de naam bisdom van ’s-Hertogenbosch.

Binnen het bisdom zijn verschillende personen werkzaam binnen instellingen, raden en commissies. Zij allen werken vanuit het beleidsplan van de bisschop: “Samen bouwen in vertrouwen”.

Name: Lubavitch of Wisconsin
Description:
We are an organization dedicated to providing a wide array of institutions and programs that serve the needs of every Jew in the state – from infants and college students to families and senior citizens...and everyone in between.

Our mission is to serve every Jew in Wisconsin with Ahavat Yisrael – love and concern – meeting each one exactly where they're at.

Name: GOSPEL APP MINISTRIES
Description: GOSPEL APP MINISTRIES is a religious institutions company based out of 563 RIDGESIDE DR, Golden, Colorado, United States.

Name: Seventh-day Adventist Church British Columbia Conference
Description: The Seventh-day Adventist Church (British Columbia Conference) mission is to provide resources to assist our Churches and Christian Schools as they paint a clear and caring picture of God as revealed through the Bible.

Name: NorthPlace Church
Description:
We believe the Kingdom of God has come to expand into every area of our lives. Expansion means making a lot out of a little. It’s the power found in Biblical community to find hope, grace, and encouragement. Expansion means that following Jesus will take you places you didn’t expect. Places that are far beyond what you could have imagined for yourself.

Each of us are on a journey to give God more territory in our hearts each day, expanding to each part of our lives. Through us, the Kingdom of God then touches the lives of families, communities, and the world. We want every person at Northplace to join us on that journey.

Name: Mission Adelante
Description:
We envision a growing multicultural community of disciples making disciples, where immigrants and others are thriving and using our gifts together to transform our neighborhood and the world for the glory of Jesus Christ.

Our mission is to to make disciples by serving, sharing life and sharing Jesus with people from other places.

Name: Episcopal Diocese of Long Island
Description:
Welcome to the Episcopal Diocese of Long Island

Tthe Diocese of Long Island is a vastly diverse and holy community of people and ministries that strive to bring people into relationship with Jesus Christ and each other and to serve the needs of all of God's people.

We are organized into four Archdeaconries representing the four counties of the diocese - Brooklyn, Queens, Nassau and Suffolk.

Each Archdeaconry is responsible for the formation of regional mission strategies in consultation and in concert with the ministries of the diocese as a whole, which includes parishes, missions, schools and health care organizations serving an area from the Brooklyn Bridge to Montauk Point.

We are truly blessed by a great variety of people who are open, welcoming and eager to serve Christ in all persons.

Blessings,

Bishop Larry Provenzano

Name: Dominican Friars | Province of the Most Holy Name of Jesus
Description:
The Dominican Province of the Most Holy Name of Jesus (Western Dominican Province) belongs to the international Order of Preachers (aka Dominicans), and is called by the Roman Catholic Church to evangelize in the name of Jesus Christ for the salvation of souls.

The Province consists of approximately 150 friars operating in parishes, campus ministries, teaching and preaching posts, international missions, and a variety of other specialized apostolates. Learn more at www.opwest.org.

Like St Dominic, we believe that Jesus Christ is the truth that sets us free and the way by which everyone can receive the blessing of friendship with God and eternal life. It was out of mercy and love for his fellow men and women that Dominic founded us nearly 800 years, so that every souls may come to know, love and serve Jesus Christ.

Name: Our Lady of Bethesda Retreat Center, Bethesda
Description:
Our Lady of Bethesda Retreat Center (OLB) and the Center for Family Development (CFD) are two apostolates of the Regnum Christi Movement that work together to serve the local Catholic community.  OLB is a retreat center that seeks to be a spiritual resource for all members of the community by offering retreats based on the Spiritual Exercises of St. Ignatius of Loyola.  The CFD is a Catholic family center dedicated to promoting the purpose and value of marriage and the family by offering a variety of faith-based programs that provide concrete tools to enrich and strengthen family life, and educate Catholics to be apostles for the family in the culture.  

Our signature programs include: 
-Spiritual Exercises Weekends
-Three to Get Married Marriage Preparation Program
-Three to STAY Married, Marriage Enrichment Program
-Monthly Mornings & Evenings of Reflection

Name: Missionários de São Carlos - Scalabrinianos
Description:
A Congregação dos Missionários de São Carlos, também conhecida como Scalabrinianos, é uma instituição católica com mais de um século de história e um vasto impacto global na vida dos migrantes. Fundada em 28 de novembro de 1887 por São João Batista Scalabrini, a Congregação tem como missão responder ao chamado de Jesus para acolher e servir os migrantes, como expressado em Mateus 25,35: “Eu era migrante e vós me acolhestes”.

A Congregação dos Missionários de São Carlos opera atualmente em 34 países, coordenando uma ampla gama de atividades e serviços voltados para a assistência e evangelização dos migrantes. Suas principais instituições incluem: Casas de Acolhimento e Centros de Atendimento, Pastoral do Migrante, Centros Stella Maris e Educação e Formação.

Com o apoio de voluntários e benfeitores, os Scalabrinianos continuam a ser um pilar essencial de acolhida e serviço, alinhando-se ao carisma de São João Batista Scalabrini e à missão da Igreja em defesa dos direitos e dignidade dos migrantes.

Name: Our Daily Bread Pilipinas
Description:
We are a global Bible Engagement ministry committed to provide accessible resources, contextually and locally, to people seeking a deeper relationship with God and others so that lives and communities are transformed.

Our Mission: To make the life-changing wisdom of the Bible understandable and accessible to all.

Our Vision: To see people of all nations experiencing a personal relationship with Christ, growing to be more like Him, and serving in a local body of His family.

Name: Margolin Hebrew Academy
Description:
The Margolin Hebrew Academy/Feinstone Yeshiva of the South is a warm, community-focused, values-driven Orthodox Jewish day school that empowers and inspires its students with the knowledge and skills they will need to meaningfully contribute to all aspects of society.  

 

We are committed to:

The importance of Torah learning and Torah living

Rigorous academics in both general and Judaic studies

Rethinking and reimagining education for a rapidly changing world

Integrity, kindness, respect, and responsibility as foundational values of Jewish life

Name: Annunciation Catholic Church-MSP
Description:
The Church of Annunciation is a dynamic, multi-generational Minneapolis neighborhood Roman Catholic church with a strong sense of community.

Annunciation School’s parents will tell you what an amazing place our pre-K through 8th grade campus is. They see their children become more confident academically, socially and in faith. We offer innovative and effective learning strategies including Smart Boards in each classroom and iPads to connect with children at all levels and the world at large. Combine all this with our dedicated staff who truly connect with parents and we think you’ll agree that Annunciation is a unique learning experience.

Annunciation School is a Catholic parish School.  We are a united and caring community of students, staff and parents committed to learning based on Christian values within our rich Catholic heritage.  We provide our students with an outstanding religious and academic education, addressing the needs of the whole child.

We are proud to announce that Annunciation is an International Baccalaureate (IB) candidate school.

Name: Christ Church Memphis
Description: Our mission is to glorify God by making, maturing, and mobilizing disciples as we love Jesus and love like jesus in the world.

Name: Forum Wiedenest e.V.
Description:
Forum Wiedenest ist ein christliches, gemeinnütziges Bildungs- und Veranstaltungszentrum in Bergneustadt-Wiedenest. 70 festangestellte sowie 400 ehrenamtliche Mitarbeiter sind überwiegend in den drei Arbeitsbereichen Biblisch-Theologische Akademie, Jugend- und Gemeindeforum sowie Weltweite Mission tätig. Auf der Glaubensbasis der Deutschen Evangelischen Allianz arbeiten wir in Deutschland und im Ausland zusammen mit vielen freikirchlichen und kirchlichen Gemeinden.

Biblisch-Theologische Akademie
Theologische Ausbildung von 145 jungen Leuten, die nach ihrer Absolvierung vollzeitig oder ehrenamtlich tätig sind als Mitarbeiter oder Pastoralreferenten in christlichen Gemeinden (Gemeindearbeit, Jugendarbeit usw.), als Missionare im Ausland oder die sich durch ein akademisches Aufbauprogramm auf einen Mastertitel vorbereiten. Im „herzwerk“ haben junge Leute die Möglichkeit, lebensbezogen und beruflich Orientierung zu finden.

Jugend- und Gemeindeforum
Konferenzen, Fortbildungen und Freizeiten zu vielen Themen einer christlichen Gemeinde wie Arbeit mit Kindern und Jugendlichen sowie Männern und Frauen. Beratung von Leitungskreisen. Jährlich nehmen etwa 10.000 Teilnehmer an den Veranstaltungen von Forum Wiedenest teil.

Weltweite Mission
135 weitere Wiedenester Mitarbeiter und 42 Kurzzeitmitarbeiter arbeiten international in 26 Ländern, beispielsweise als Ärzte, Krankenschwestern und Lehrer sowie in der Literatur- oder Jugendarbeit bzw. im Aufbau und der Unterstützung von christlichen Gemeinden.

Name: Impacting The Nations Ministries
Description:
Professionally, Max holds a Master’s in Computer Engineering specifically in the area of computer Embedded Systems from the Queensland University of Technology. In addition, he holds a postgraduate diploma in Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence and DNA Storage Sequencing from the Texas University, Austin TX. He also has a Bachelors Degree in Science, Applied Physics, Electronics and Instrumentation from the Papua New Guinea University of Technology. He also is a certified Microsoft CompTIA A+ Security Specialist and is recognized in Papua New Guinea as one of the top 5 cyber specialist and works directly with the government on special operations.

Max is currently married to his beautiful wife and they both reside in Papua New Guinea. Apart from being a well devoted husband and a challenging family life, Max had laid down his career to fully pursue the Call of God into Ministry as a full time pastor and evangelist. Max runs a ICT Business that supports ministry and also with a strategic team, they maintain corporate governance in business and ministry in all accountability.

Max life is dedicated and focused to the CALL OF GOD in his life despite all odds. He yearns for Revival and had prayed for Revival 10years now. Let us see what 2022 unfolds for God’s Glory.

Name: Southwell Minster
Description:
Southwell Minster is the Cathedral church for Nottinghamshire (Diocese of Southwell and Nottingham).

For more than 1,000 years Southwell Minster has been opening its doors to welcome visitors, pilgrims and worshippers. Hospitality in the name of Jesus Christ is at the heart of what we offer the 100,000 people who come in a typical year. As well as being a beautiful and fascinating historic building, Southwell Minster is a community of clergy, other workers and many worshippers, contributing to the public life and private lives of the town and the whole diocese.

Name: Grace Assembly of God
Description: The purpose of Grace Assembly of God is to connect people to God and each other.

Name: Mishkan Chicago
Description: Our mission is to reimagine and breathe new life into Judaism. We create radically inclusive spaces for Jewish spiritual practice and community, focusing on engaging, educating, and empowering people across the spectrum of identity, background, age, and belief. We are re-invigorating Judaism for the 21st century and leading people in Chicago and beyond toward more purposeful, more connected, and more inspired lives.

Name: City Church Tallahassee
Description:
CITYCHURCH’s vision is to be for the Gospel and for the City of Tallahassee. We seek to build relationships and create experiences that point people towards taking their next steps in a relationship with Jesus Christ.

City Church reaches out to people who are far from God. Rather than run from culture, we have chosen to harness it to connect with people and show them God's timeless truths. Although our approach may be a little outside of what some would call “traditional,” we believe in and maintain a conservative theological position.

Name: Vandan Pandit
Description: Vandan is the India’s 1st and most trusted platform for Hindu puja service, Vedic Rituals, Religious Ceremonies. We provide the India’s well-known, highly qualified and experienced Pandits for you who will come to your house and do the puja.

Name: Sisters of St. Francis of Philadelphia
Description:
We are a congregation of approximately 375 Catholic women religious who: choose a Gospel way of life lived in community; are dedicated to serving others, especially those who are economically poor, marginal, and oppressed; minister in the United States in approximately 17 states, as well as Ireland, and Africa; serve in a variety of ministries and settings; and follow the values of the Third Order Regular Franciscans .

We have taken corporate stands against the war in Iraq, human trafficking, the death penalty, and for immigration reform. Visit our website to learn more about us

Name: Haaqqah Institute
Description: Learning about Islam, Qur'an, Sunnah, Hadith, Fiqh and Qur’anic Arabic. A unique one of its kind platform to learn Islam.

Name: St. Thomas Aquinas Seminary
Description:
St. Thomas Aquinas Seminary (STAS) is a house of studies of the Society of St. Pius X (SSPX), established in the United States in 1973, for the formation of Roman Catholic priests according to the traditional teaching of the Church. 

St. Thomas Aquinas Seminary draws from the greatest riches of the 2,000 year history of the Church in the formation of her priests. The formation that the seminarians receive is traditional in every aspect: doctrine, liturgy, retreats, daily schedule. 

The core of the seminarians' study is the philosophy and theology of St. Thomas Aquinas, while moderate proficiency in Latin is required before ordination. A typical day in the life of the seminarian contains three hours of prayer, three hours of classes, four hours of study, and a hour and a half of recreation. 

Seminarians are expected to attain the holiness required of a priest, through the means provided at the Seminary: daily Mass, meditation, Rosary, and hours of the Divine Office, as well as Benediction, Ignatian retreats, monthly recollections, and weekly confession and spiritual direction.

MISSION

The purpose of the St. Thomas Aquinas Seminary is to form holy priests according to the traditions of the Church. What does this formation entail? Sacerdos alter Christus — "The priest is another Christ" — and so his formation will be to become another Christ.  Prayer life, studies, work, recreation — all harmonize at the Seminary to make the seminarian like to Christ.

Name: Reaching & Teaching International Ministries
Description: We seek to advance the gospel by partnering with local churches as they send qualified missionaries to make mature disciples, establish healthy churches, and train local leaders around the world.

Name: Roots of Reform Judaism
Description: Inspired by the past, embracing today, shaping tomorrow

Name: St. Mark's Lutheran Church
Description:
The mission of St. Mark's Lutheran Church is to share God's love, welcome others into his church, and grow to become like Jesus.  

Growth for Christians is a lot like tending to a plant: we water it, make sure it gets sunlight, till the soil, weed it, but ultimately only God can cause the growth to take place. As Christians there are a number of ways we can nourish and till the soil of our hearts for growth to take place, and the Holy Spirit uses those disciplines to cause us to grow.

Name: Iskcon of Philadelphia Inc
Description: Iskcon of Atlanta Inc is a spiritual Institutions company located Atlanta  Georgia, United States.

Name: Bíblia Viva
Description:
Nosso objetivo é fornecer um ambiente seguro e incentivador onde as pessoas possam crescer em sua fé. Acreditamos que a Bíblia é a Palavra de Deus e que ela tem o poder de transformar vidas. 

Junte-se a nós no canal do YouTube da Bíblia Viva Fé Cristã e embarque nesta jornada espiritual transformadora. Se inscreva, ative as notificações e compartilhe com outras pessoas que desejam conhecer e viver a Palavra de Deus.

Name: Christ Methodist Church
Description: Our mission is to glorify God by making, maturing, and mobilizing disciples as we love Jesus and love like jesus in the world.

Name: Ev.-Luth. Kirchenkreis Hamburg-Ost
Description: Im Ev.-Luth. Kirchenkreis Hamburg-Ost engagieren sich Menschen für Menschen – in den Kirchengemeinden vor Ort und in vielfältigen Arbeitsbereichen. Mit 250 Pastorinnen und Pastoren, fast 4.000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern und 16.000 Ehrenamtlichen, 160 Kirchen, 109 Kirchengemeinden, 130 Kindertagesstätten sowie weiteren Einrichtungen und Tagungshäusern ist der Ev.-Luth. Kirchenkreis Hamburg-Ost der größte Kirchenkreis in Deutschland – und kann in Hamburg deshalb viel bewegen.

Name: Oklahoma United Methodist Conference
Description: We serve about 550 United Methodist Churches in the state of Oklahoma.

Name: Dienstenbureau CGK
Description: Dienstenbureau CGK is een professionele instelling die ondersteunend, meedenkend, adviserend en informerend klaarstaat.

Name: North Shore Congregation Israel
Description:
We Are NSCI
We believe in the transformative power of Jewish living.
We recognize the Divine spark in every person.
We affirm that everyone is a stakeholder and community matters.
We understand that Judaism has something to offer everyone.
We value diversity.
We are young and young at heart.
We are seekers and cynics and everyone in between.
We are born Jews and choosing Jews.  We are interfaith.  we are LGBTQ.
We are Am Yisrael. We are our brothers' keepers.
We believe Jewish living calls us to do nothing less than repair our world.
We experience Judaism as a lived practice.
We travel.  We eat.  We celebrate.  We mourn.  We pray.  We learn.  We give.
We ask big questions and explore big ideas.  
We yearn. We hope. We invite.  We inspire.
We foster understanding.  We change lives. We make a difference.
We nourish our deep roots. We grow.  We believe in the possible.
#WeAreNSCI

Name: St. Mary's Roman Catholic Church
Description: Roman Catholic Church and School

Name: Christian Student Fellowship (University of Kentucky)
Description:
CSF is a non-denominational campus ministry at the University of Kentucky. CSF isn’t a place. CSF isn’t a program. CSF is everywhere on campus—although we do have a building where we sometimes hang out. It’s a million different places and a million different people. It’s downtown serving the homeless. Climbing at the Johnson Center. A conversation about Jesus ’til 2am. It’s wherever people are interacting with each other and with God.

CSF is mainly staffed by recent UK grads who take the first year or two post-graduation to give back to the UK community by working full time at CSF. A few long-term staff help guide and invest into these younger staff members who in turn pour into our student leaders as they reach out to campus with the good news and good life of Jesus.

Name: Church of the Redeemer
Description: Church of the Redeemer is an Anglican church in Greensboro, NC, desiring to be a church that follows Jesus by being a worshipping, missional community of faith. We are part of the Diocese of Christ Our Hope, within the Anglican Church of North America.

Name: Kingdom Seekers Wesleyan Methodist Church
Description: Kingdom Seekers Wesleyan Methodist Church operates from the Gold Coast, Australia. We are an informal gathering, and all are welcome. We meet every Saturday from 5 PM at 5/99 Spencer Rd, Nerang. Gold Coast. You can also join our page and watch the live-streamed meetings via Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/1516615075036311

Name: International Seminary of St. Peter
Description: Group of the former students of International Seminary St. Peter.

Name: Allen Ministry Resources
Description: Providing resources to local pastors as they serve in their church and community.

Name: Kenya Christian Professionals Forum
Description:
The Kenya Christian Professionals Forum (KCPF) is a group of Christian professionals from various denominations sharing common values on Life, Family, Religion and Governance; which are our pillars. KCPF membership is drawn from various churches and church groups. 
Major partners are Kenya Conference of Catholic Bishops (KCCB); National Council of Churches of Kenya (NCCK); and Evangelical Alliance of Kenya (EAK).
Mission: To provide professional support in influencing the development of a legal and social environment that is supportive of biblical values.
Vision: A society that respects life, family, religion, social justice and good governance.

Name: Jain Network
Description:
The Jain Network (JN) is a registered charity and a non-profit company in England and Wales, launched in March 2007, as a result of the merger of Jain Sangha of Europe, Jain Academy and Ahimsa for Quality of Life. Its mission is improvement of spiritual and physical quality of life for Jain and wider communities.

Jain Network acquired a substantial property in 2010 for the development of the Jain Centre London, to allow the above vision to be realised. It is situated in Colindale, North West London. Once developed, the Jain Centre will be a magnificent and traditional architecture to practice values and bring awareness of Jainism.  

Benefits of the Jain Centre:

For the Jain Community:
- A place in London for worship and study for all major Jain traditions
- Promotion of Jain values, including Jivdaya and environmental improvement
- Humanitarian, multifaith, educational and cultural projects that can attract the young generation
- Women empowerment
- Activities, especially for the youth, young children and elderly people
- Global hub for coordination of Jain, Philanthropic, Educational and Entrepreneur activities
- A Jain library, Pathshala and Swadhyay rooms 
- Space for events, celebrations and fellows

For the Wider Community:
- Increase spiritual and physical wellbeing, through provision of community activities, including:
* Health and wellbeing, including yoga and meditation
* Education and training, workshops for life skills
* Advocacy 
* Arts and Culture
- Better community cohesion, through events and activities aimed at bringing together all faith and cultural traditions
- More people of other faiths and of none learn about Jainism and its values, through courses and workshops organised by the Jain Academy

For the World:
- Increase in understanding of Jain Values, which can help them to live a harmonious life of peace, non-violence, prosperity and good health
- Promotion of Jain Values of Art of Loving, Art of Living and Art of Leaving

Name: Dharma Ocean Foundation
Description:
The Dharma Ocean Foundation offers us the chance to live within the brilliance of our deepest lives. Within our Buddhist lineage, somatic meditation is the primary way to uncover this radiance, and the foundation offers a wide range of retreats and online programs in the sitting practice of meditation. 

Residential retreats include our 5-month Meditating with the Body program, a month-long Winter Meditation Intensive (Dathün), and the 10-day The Body Loves retreat. Online programs include Awakening the Body, the Somatic Practice of Pure Awareness, Boundless Heart, and our 2-part Sutrayana Study and Practice Intensive. Students wishing to become vajrayana practitioners enter the vajrayana path through Vajra Assembly and return annually for the Vajrayana Training Intensive. 

Dr. Reginald A. Ray and senior students lead these retreats and programs as well as regional practice groups around the world. 

Dharma Ocean owns and operates the Blazing Mountain Retreat Center in Crestone, Colorado. The center was created as a sacred and protected space for guests to explore the richness and depth of their most fundamental self, through connection with their spiritual tradition and their community.

Nestled in the majestic Sangre de Cristo mountains of southern Colorado, we host meditation and embodiment retreats as well as other contemplative programs that promote and inspire wakefulness in the world.

Name: Avila Institute for Spiritual Formation
Description:
The mission of the Avila Institute is to provide spiritual education and formation to Catholics around the world who seek to deepen their understanding and appropriation of magisterium faithful mystical and ascetical patrimony of the Catholic Church.

We serve the following groups:

• Priests and Religious: Those that provide formation to members of their congregations, their orders, and their diocese.

• Laity: Those involved in the formation of others as Spiritual Directors or Mentors, DREs, Catechists, RCIA Instructors, Baptismal Class Instructors, Parents that home school, Pre Cana Instructors.

• Professionals: Catholic Counselors, Therapists, Social Workers, Psychologists, and Chaplains.

• Individuals: All those seeking to deepen their relationship with Christ through the spiritual patrimony of the Church.

• Faithful Poor: The faithful poor around the world often lack the means to deepen their own faith and to aid in the formation of others. The faithful poor are made up of priests, deacons, and religious who have taken a vow of poverty, or laypeople who simply do not have the means to access the level of education and formation we provide without assistance.

With the following services:

• Mystagogically Oriented Education Focused on the Pursuit of a Transformational Relationship with God

• Live/Interactive/Online – Location Independent Spiritual Education

• 2-4 year Masters Level Spiritual Theology Program

• Continuing Education Courses

• Personal Enrichment Courses

Name: Halal Institute of America
Description: Halal Institute of America is a non-profit organization dedicated to certifying the Halal food and financial industry, supporting Halal businesses, serving the Muslim-American community, and promoting a Halal and healthy way of life.

Name: Église catholique de Québec
Description:
L’Église catholique de Québec (ECDQ) a été fondée en 1674! Elle s'est fait présente au coeur de notre région au fil des siècles, et compte aujourd'hui près d'un million de baptisés et baptisées. Son archevêque est le cardinal Gérald Cyprien Lacroix.

L'ECDQ peut compter sur l’équipe des « Services diocésains ». Celle-ci soutient la vitalité des communautés chrétiennes du diocèse qui couvre le territoire de Portneuf, Québec, Charlevoix, les Bois-Francs, Lotbinière, Lévis, Bellechasse, les Etchemins, la Beauce et l’Amiante. 

Les champs d’action des Services diocésains sont la pastorale, l’administration, les ressources humaines, les communications, le service du droit. Cette organisation d’environ 70 personnes offre un climat organisationnel axé sur l’esprit d’équipe et le partage d’une mission stimulante. 

L'énoncé de la vision diocésaine, en ces temps de grandes transitions : 
« Proposer ou renouveler la rencontre personnelle et communautaire avec le Christ pour former des communautés de 'disciples-missionnaires'. »

Name: Horizons International
Description:
Horizons International exists to communicate and demonstrate the love of Jesus Christ to all people, so that the world would be transformed by God’s love and forgiveness.

Our ministry involves charity and community development that benefits orphans, widows, and impoverished communities. However, since we believe that spiritual issues are at the core of human suffering, our primary focus is evangelism, discipleship, and church planting.

We invite you to browse through the various ministries listed and prayerfully consider joining us in this exciting journey of following Jesus to the ends of the earth.

Name: Christian Residential Network
Description: Christian Residential Network (formerly Christian Camping International UK Limited) is the membership association of Christian residential venues and holiday providers across the UK.

Name: Converge MidAmerica | Southeast | Caribbean
Description:
Converge MidAmerica | Southeast | Caribbean is a missional network of gospel driven churches.

Converge MidAmerica is a proven church planting force reaching people from every segment of society. We are a missional network of likeminded churches who have worked together to start over 80 new churches in the last twelve years.

Converge MSC is serious about church health with a number of new church health initiatives we commitment to seeing every church moving towards greater health and global impact.

Converge MSC is part of Converge Worldwide who in the last twenty years has planted over 500 churches through out the United States.

Name: Trimtab
Description:
Helping you develop the full potential of APEST in your life and ministry so we can mature in Christ.

Courses
Coaching
🗫 Consulting
Co-Labs

Name: Igreja Pentecostal Assembleia De Deus
Description: Somos uma igreja militante, avivada que defende a salvação por meio da fé em Cristo Jesus, a atualidade dos Dons Espirituais, a esperança da volta do Senhor Jesus, tendo a Bíblia como a infalível palavra de Deus e a única regra de fé e pratica.

Name: Insight Meditation Community of Washington
Description: Promoting the instruction and practice of Buddhist Insight Meditation (Vipassana) and related Buddhist teachings which awaken our natural wisdom and compassion.

Name: Catholic Diocese of Christchurch
Description:
The Catholic Diocese of Christchurch is a missionary, charitable organisation of which the primary objective is to provide administration services for the Catholic community and to aid and support the pastoral mission. 

Our three diocesan priorities:

Growing in Holiness
If you and I are to reach our God given potential, then we are called to become holy. Our Church communities will be looking at what we need to do to help people to grow in holiness. If I don’t fall in love with Jesus Christ and desire to become holy, then I won’t have the conviction to tell anyone else about it either. Our parishes, schools, and organisations need to be focused on helping us grow in holiness.

Strengthening our Catholic Community
Coming together as people of faith is an essential part of being a follower of Christ. The Church is made up of many communities who meet together to praise God, receive his grace and strength, especially through the Sacraments, and care for one another. We need strong faith communities if we are to survive and have a place to bring people who are searching. This is the second focus of our renewal.

Proclaiming the Good News
This is the call to evangelisation. We have generally been rather timid in this area I suspect. The call of Jesus is to spread his message to all peoples. This is part of our baptismal calling. We need to look at how we do this and how we can help people become more confident in this mission. Our Church is missionary and this is what it means, so we need to get on with it. We are not a therapeutic group just caring for one another.

Name: Quail Springs Baptist Church
Description: Thriving church in the NW OKC Metro with its beginnings and roots in 1950 in Nichols Hills to the move to its now 50 acre campus in 1982. Reaching OKC to the Ends of the Earth.

Name: Masjid Al-Rahman
Description: Masjid Al-Rahman, Islamic Society of West Contra Costa County (ISWCCC), was established in 1993.

Name: Église Saint-Eustache
Description: Vaisseau majestueux, chef-d'œuvre d'architecture. Haut lieu de musique et de culture abritant un des plus grands orgues de France.

Name: Canyon Hills Community Church
Description: Canyon Hills Community Church is a religious community.

Name: Churches of Christ in Victoria and Tasmania
Description:
Churches of Christ in Victoria and Tasmania is a movement of around 130 churches and mission agencies, known by many as ‘Conference’. 

Our office is in Fairfield, Victoria. We have four Partner Departments that join with us in the work we do for our churches and the communities in which they are located.

Mission & Ministry, www.missionandministry.com.au, The Mission and Ministry team provides leadership, encouragement, expertise and support processes for congregations and their leaders to create and sustain healthy local mission shaped church communities.

PropCorp, www.propcorp.org.au, The Properties Corporation understands the special needs and issues confronting churches when it comes to dealing with property and financial matters.

Community Care, www.ccare.com.au, Community Care seeks to stand alongside people in the community, particularly those with special needs.

Stirling Theological College: a ministry of Churches of Christ, www.cctc.edu.au,  welcomes new students of all ages, offering exciting contemporary study programs designed to nurture faith and enhance Christian spirituality.

Our Constitution can be found here: http://www.churchesofchrist.org.au/component/docman/doc_download/51-cofcvt-constitution-140511

Name: Atmashrama
Description: Atmashrama - Vedic Wisdom for Modern Living

Name: RKK
Description:
RKK is de omroep voor Rooms Katholiek Nederland. Met programma's op Nederland 1, 2 en 3 en op Radio 4 en 5. 

Presentatoren: Antoine Bodar, Leo Fijen, Wilfred Kemp, Roderick Vonhögen en Rolanda Correia.
Programma's: Kruispunt, Katholiek Nederland, The Passion, Echo van Eeuwigheid, Eeuwigh gaat voor Oogenblick, De Zandtovenaar.

Name: Living Word Community Church
Description: Living Word Community Church is a place where we encounter Jesus together. We're here to help people grow closer to God through faith in Jesus. We create an environment where anyone can connect and belong no matter where they are in their faith. We love being the hands and feet of Jesus to meet the needs in our local community.

Name: Catholic Institute of Western Australia
Description:
CATHOLIC INSTITUTE OF WESTERN AUSTRALIA 
The Catholic Institute of Western Australia (CIWA) is a unique Catholic tertiary educational body, created by and accountable to the Conference of Catholic Bishops of Western Australia.
The purpose of CIWA is to provide professional and theological education; and, spiritual and faith formation for current and future educators and leaders in Catholic schools and other groups who, from time to time, may seek such assistance.

Name: Baptist Union of Great Britain
Description:
As Baptists Together, we commit ourselves to being a movement led by the Spirit of God:
 
We will seek God’s will and purpose;
 
Celebrating diversity,
    We will value trust and respect one another in Christ;
 
Being serious about discipleship,
    We will embrace adventure
    And risk-taking faith in our faithful God;
 
Following the Servant King,
    We will be generous of spirit,
    Encouraging and inspiring one another,
    To be all that God created us to be;
 
Seeking God’s Kingdom,
    We will hunger and thirst after his righteousness,
    Confronting evil and praying for the grace
    To live the life of God’s coming Kingdom now.

Name: Diocese of Winchester
Description:
Supporting the people, churches, schools and communities across the Diocese of Winchester. Our diocese has four key values: 

Serving - Christlike engagement with our communities, bringing peace, hope and reconciliation
Learning - Deepening our discipleship as followers of Christ
Growing - The renewal of the Church as the Body of Christ
Loving - Making the loving presence of Jesus known in our midst, as his body

Name: Church Army USA
Description: The Church Army USA plants bases of evangelism to bring the redemptive good news of Jesus Christ to those trapped in addiction. Currently we have bases in Missouri, Pennsylvania and Virginia with other Church Army Captains working through local churches in New Mexico, and Maryland. Over 100 years ago the Church Army started in the United Kingdom as part of the Anglican Church. The church wanted to go outside their walls and reach people overlooked by the world. God has taken us into the streets of America, Africa, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Denmark, Barbados and Jamaica.

Name: EJNS Portugal
Description: As Equipas de Jovens de Nossa Senhora (EJNS) são um movimento internacional de formação espiritual que propõe aos seus membros um caminho de crescimento cristão e humano em comunidade, em equipa.

Name: Kingdom of God
Description:
The Kingdom of God is the reign where Jesus Christ is accepted as king and savior. Here shall be brought on earth what is good in heaven. Health, reconciled relationships, caring for each other and the creation. Forgiveness and love.

People enter the kingdom by trusting Jesus, repent towards the father, be baptised in water and spirit. 

See www.good-leading.com and the embedded videos.

Name: The Diocese of Exeter
Description:
Welcome to The Church of England in Devon! The Diocese of England represents the Church of England in Devon, with more than 500 mission communities, over 600 churches, and 22,000 children in our 131 church schools. 

Led by the Bishop of Exeter Robert Atwell, we have a vision to grow in prayer, make new disciples and serve the people of Devon with joy! We have a small central staff team based in Exeter and hundreds of clergy and readers leading and working with communities, from the smallest hamlet to our most vibrant urban areas. It’s a beautiful place to live, work and worship God. Come and share the adventure with us! 

Hear what some of our clergy have to say about working here on our website and keep checking this page for our latest vacancies.

Name: Living Hope Community Church
Description:
We believe that Jesus Christ was, is, and always will be the only hope of the world. We believe that, as Christians, we are called to spread that hope and that the best way to do so is by mirroring Christ’s own methods. Because of this, Living Hope’s mission becomes clear: To spread the Living Hope of Christ by making disciples of all nations. At Living Hope, we've molded everything we do by studying how Christ lived, taught, and discipled. From this, we've dedicated ourselves to three primary ‘pillars’ by which we see our ministry: 'Intentional Discipleship' in 'Relational Environments' with a 'Missional Mindset.'

Since Living Hope's founding in 1997, we’ve been blessed with a growing congregation full of passionate individuals looking to participate in the growth of the church and the gospel. With that growth, we’ve learned that, in order to better reach our surrounding communities and bring the Living Hope of Jesus to them, it's not sufficient to continually expand as a church in one single location. Instead, in order to better reach people, our goal is to ‘go and make disciples’ where they are. It’s this principle that led us to a multi-site model--one church in multiple locations. In 2022, Living Hope officially expanded to include the Living Hope Doylestown Campus.

God willing, we seek to continue this multiplication of the gospel's impact on surrounding communities. One way we hope to do so is by building a Community Center on the edge of the town of Dublin, PA - just across the street from Living Hope's main campus.

Join us in our mission to spread the Living Hope of Christ by making disciples of all nations!

Name: Youth for Christ Winnipeg
Description:
There are more than 60,000 young people in Winnipeg and surrounding area. Some have everything while others do without. Some are given every opportunity to succeed, while others must struggle to find their own way. Their future is our passion!

We believe every young person needs:
• Ongoing relationships with caring adults
• Safe places with structured activities during non-school hours
• To be equipped with marketable skills
• Opportunities to give back through community service
• Encouragement to nurture a healthy, vibrant, grace-based spirituality

For 65 years, YFC Winnipeg has been a leader of innovation and excellence in positive youth development. As a Christian non-profit charity, YFC exists to help young people attain their full life potential. YFC is not a church, but we do work with churches, government, schools and other youth serving agencies to meet the needs of teenagers.

Our passion is to combine healthy relationships with creative programs to help young people make good choices and establish a solid foundation for life.

Name: St Edmundsbury Cathedral
Description:
Cathedral in Bury St Edmunds. 
Founded C11th but with new tower, organ and chapels; truly ancient and modern. 
Music, Services, Events, Venue Hire, Exhibitions, Tours. 
Cafe & Shop on site.

Name: Jude 3 Project
Description:
The primary mission of the Jude 3 Project is to help the Christian community know what they believe and why they believe it. Distinctive in its strong emphasis in equipping those of African descent in the United States and abroad.

The vision of the Ministry encompasses apologetics that address current issues and the intellectual struggles of Christians of African descent in the United States and abroad. We are committed to equipping the local Church that the mandate of Jude 1:3 might be fulfilled - contend for the faith that was once for all entrusted to God’s holy people.

The Ministry’s objectives are accomplished through:

- Lectures and Seminars
- Training in Apologetics
- Podcasts & Blogs
- Curriculums
- Online Courses
- Media Series
- College Tours

Name: The Center for Biblical Living
Description:
Mission: The Center for Biblical Living exists to serve the local church by providing biblical counseling and enrichment care for ministry leaders around the world.

How many people in ministry have you seen get burned out?

How many families have you seen overburdened by the weight of ministry?
Often the people doing ministry aren’t ministered to themselves.
CBL exists to do just that.

Name: The Diocese Of Rockford
Description: The Diocese of Rockford is a community of Catholic believers in 11 Northern Illinois counties.

Name: The Guild of Health and St Raphael
Description:
The Guild of Health and St Raphael is a Christian organisation with a vision to see flourishing communities made up of flourishing individuals. Our purpose is to equip and inspire people to nurture health and healing in ourselves, in our community and in our world. 

We work closely with medical, psychological and community health professionals to promote a holistic understanding of human flourishing. We deliver training and courses, and we nurture membership communities. We offer a podcast exploring this holistic understanding of health and healing, and we work with organisations who want to support the Christian ministry and mission through the gift of the healing ministry. 

We work to promote churches to be hubs for community health, and are building a network of people, professionals and organisations who are interested in the intersection of health and faith.

#healthyhealinghubs #christianfaith #gohealth

Name: Truth78
Description: Our mission is to inspire and equip the church and the home for the comprehensive discipleship of the next generation.

Name: Rahman Islamic Services
Description: RIS provides many Islamic services for the community including Islamic Studies, Quranic Recitation, Quran Memorization, Tajweed, performing Nikah, Marriage Counselling, Youth & Adult Counselling and family mediation, conducting inspirational and motivational speeches in social and private parties, and performing burial rituals.

Name: Lerab Ling
Description:
Lerab Ling is one of the main centres preserving the authentic study and practice of Tibetan of Buddhism in Europe and is under the patronage of His Holiness the Dalai Lama.

Lerab Ling was founded in 1991 by Sogyal Rinpoche together with a first generation of Western Buddhists students. Since then, and up until today, many great masters visit Lerab Ling, giving profound teachings and bestowing their blessings, in particular His Holiness the Dalai Lama in 2000 and 2008.

Located in the lush green setting of the Natural Regional Park of the Haut-Languedoc, Lerab Ling preserves a natural and calm environment that is beneficial for developing inner tranquillity. At the same time Lerab Ling is a place of activity, hosting a community of monastic and lay members whose main vocation is to support everyone to discover, study, and practice Buddhism. Lerab Ling is a member of the French Buddhist Union (UBF) and the European Buddhist Union (UBE), and a founding member of the Tibetan Buddhist Federation (FBT).

OUR VISION
Lerab Ling is a sanctuary of meditation and enlightened activity, where the Buddha’s teachings and blessings are shared with those who seek a complete path to enlightenment and a refuge from the busyness of everyday life.

OUR MISSION
· A Spiritual Community of monastics and lay people who study, contemplate and apply the teachings of the Nyingma lineage of Tibetan Buddhism.
· An International Retreat Centre at the heart of the international Rigpa community.
· A public place that is an expression of Tibetan sacred culture, where anyone can make a connection with the wisdom of the Buddha’s teachings.

Full mission statement and more information at lerabling.org/lang-en/about/lerab-ling

Name: Oratoire du Louvre
Description:
Le temple protestant de l’Oratoire du Louvre est une paroisse située 145 rue Saint-Honoré, au centre de Paris face au musée du Louvre. Elle est membre de l'Église protestante unie de France.

Les cultes ont lieu tous les dimanches de 10h30 à 12h.  Toute personne de bonne volonté y est bienvenue (ne serait-ce que pour avoir été à un culte protestant une fois dans sa vie !). La Cène (communion) est célébrée un dimanche par  mois. Verre de l’amitié le 2e dimanche du mois.

Les pasteurs sont Agnès Adeline-Schaeffer et Béatrice Cléro-Mazire. Elles reçoivent sur rendez-vous à la maison presbytérale et rendent volontiers visite. Pour un entretien pastoral, une préparation de baptême, confirmation, mariage ou deuil, une adresse mail : pasteur@oratoiredulouvre.fr

Facebook : www.facebook.com/oratoiredulouvre
Instagram Facebook : www.instagram.com/oratoiredulouvre/
Youtube : www.youtube.com/user/oratoiredulouvre
Twitter : www.twitter.com/Oratoire
site internet : www.oratoiredulouvre.fr

Name: Keynote
Description:
Helping start spiritual conversations about Jesus.

A ministry of Cru (Campus Crusade for Christ)

Keynote helps start spiritual conversations about Jesus by providing digital resources and mobile apps, music and other creative outreach tools, and communication training to Cru staff and believers around the World.

Name: Wiccan Life
Description:
7000+ listeners worldwide
 Helping people through their spiritual journey
 A place between the worlds for all magical people

Name: Virtual Reality Ministry
Description: VR Ministry is a global pioneer in deploying virtual reality as a new tool for existing church ministries.  Our organization helps local churches create ministries for hospitals, senior living, hospice, prison, homeless, and missionary work.  Our mission is to ensure that VR comes into our world for the glory of Jesus Christ.

Name: The Magic Church
Description:
A modern transformative institution dedicated to understanding and supporting human emotional and existential growth through science, psychology, and contemplative practice.

The Magic Church studies how people evolve, find meaning, and navigate periods of inner transformation. Through rigorous research, structured education, and a high-integrity community, we help individuals cultivate clarity, resilience, and deeper self-understanding.

Our work integrates insights from neuroscience, reflective traditions, and narrative psychology to develop frameworks that support inner development and conscious living.

We further our mission by:

● Conducting research through the Magic Church Intelligence Division to illuminate the emotional, psychological, and symbolic dimensions of transformation
● Offering science-aligned education on resilience, expanded states, meaning-making, and integration
● Providing structured reflection pathways, including The Calling, to help individuals clarify intentions and connect with our community
● Cultivating a high-integrity environment rooted in ethics, safety, and contemplative practice

We serve those seeking deeper purpose, emotional clarity, and pathways for inner development in a rapidly changing world.

Follow us for research updates, insights, and invitations to future educational offerings.

Name: Calumet Lutheran Ministries, Camp & Conference Center
Description: At Calumet, we strive to reach out to people from all walks of life. We seek to gather them together in a safe and secure environment where they can think about their spiritual connection, laugh with each other, grow in friendship, and dig deep into their personal journey.

Name: Islam Foundation
Description:
You CAN learn to become a powerful catalyst of conscious evolution and play a role in one of the most exciting events ever envisioned: a planetary Birth Day on December 22, 2012. 
This day will help us shift beyond fearful separation toward a global sense of oneness, symbolically marking the start of a new era in human development.

Name: Feba UK
Description:
Feba is a Christian mission agency, working with partners using radio and audio media to inspire people to follow Jesus Christ. We have a particular focus on places and people groups considered 'hard to reach' and those who might face persecution for their faith.

Feba was established initially in the 1950s to support the work of sister organisation FEBC (the Far East Broadcasting Company) in the US - through prayer and financial giving, and was later incorporated in its own right in the UK as FEBA Radio (Far East Broadcasting Association Radio) in 1968. Feba went on to establish a network of offices internationally, each carrying the 'Feba' name. Today, Feba's operating model focuses on enabling and promoting the work of various local partners using radio and other related audio media overseas, including independent bodies as well as fellow members of the FEBC International association.

Name: Ebenezer Baptist Church -Atlanta, GA
Description:
PURPOSE STATEMENT
Ebenezer Baptist Church is an urban-based, global ministry dedicated to individual growth and social transformation through living in the message and carrying out the mission of Jesus Christ.

SPIRITUAL FORMATION
We EXALT our Lord, Jesus Christ and believe that by living in His Word we have eternal salvation.
We EDUCATE our members through an interactive program of life-long learning that includes Bible studies, small groups, spiritual mentoring, and practice.
We EDIFY God with head and heart through vibrant praise, persistent prayer and relevant proclamation.
We EFFECT growth in the church and change in the community by faithfully rendering to God our time, tithes and talents.
We EMBRACE the belief that the acid test of a congregation’s spiritual health and the relevance of its ministry is its impact upon the community.

SOCIAL TRANSFORMATION
We EMBODY the mission of Jesus Christ through service-filled lives that work to feed the poor, liberate the oppressed, welcome the stranger, clothe the naked, and visit those who are sick or imprisoned.
We EQUIP the body to both discern and perfect the various gifts of individual members for the work of Christ here on earth.
We EMPOWER the people of Ebenezer to impact the world by bearing witness to the God of love and justice through Jesus Christ.
We EVANGELIZE those who have not accepted Jesus Christ as Lord and Liberator.
We ENLIST the people of our community

Name: Evangile21
Description: Evangile21 aide l’Église à connaître la Parole de Dieu avec l’esprit, à aimer pleinement Dieu avec le cœur et à témoigner au monde avec grâce et vérité.

Name: Imago Dei Community
Description: Imago Dei Community is a non-denominational church in the heart of Portland, Oregon.

Name: Friendship Church
Description:

Name: FAST Islamic Society
Description:
FAST Islamic Society (FIS) aims at building a community at FAST that strives for the rejuvenation of the spirit of Islam in our campus lives. 

We arrange exhibitions, seminars, weekly halaqahs, and a host of other campus activities, each touching on a different aspect of The Holy Quran and the Sunnah of our beloved Prophet PBUH. 
Amidst the hectic academic, and extra curricular, activities of FAST, FIS events are a break from all of that, and an opportunity to get together and remind each other of our true purpose in life, for Allah says in the holy Quran: 
"And remind (each other), for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers." (51:55)

Name: Brooklyn Heights Synagogue
Description:
Brooklyn Heights Synagogue (BHS) is an inclusive lay-led community dedicated to caring for the world and each other. As a progressive congregation affiliated with the Union for Reform Judaism, we value the diverse ways our members express their Jewish identities as we maintain an abiding respect for the traditions of the Jewish people. 

Founded in 1959 by a small group of Brooklyn Heights neighbors, BHS is today a congregation of nearly 500 member units living in Brownstone Brooklyn and DUMBO, Lower Manhattan, throughout New York City and the Tri-State area. 

We welcome the participation of members of all ages and backgrounds, and work together to shape and strengthen our community. BHS is proud to offer a full calendar of worship services, education programs including a K-12 Religious School and adult and intergenerational learning opportunities, social gatherings, and Tikkun Olam initiatives. Our highly-regarded Preschool and parenting center serve our members and the wider community. As a founding member of the New York City Emergency Shelter Network, BHS has hosted a volunteer-operated homeless shelter since 1983.

Name: NEXUS CHURCH PLANTING & LEADER CARE
Description:
Our vision is to launch church-planting movements throughout North America! Our end game is not to create one monolithic church-planting entity that controls or guides church planting in various regions… but to launch multiple networks that voluntarily collaborate and partner to launch churches in their own regions. 
Our leader care is our "secrete sauce" which includes these five ingredients:

• Coaching: the art of ministry with close attention to the project and key deliverables
• Mentoring: the heart of ministry with close attention to the leader and the family
• Training: the wisdom of ministry with close attention to leadership & entrepreneurial skills
• Community: the personal touch with close attention to the leader’s spiritual formation and a sense of belonging to the Nexus family
•Accountability: the ministry community paying close attention to biblical leadership in community

We walk with our family of church planters through a 4 phase process of;
Look: Discern, connect with partner networks, and recruit church planters that are called
Lab: Assessment and training to confirm and prepare our family of church planters to hit the ground running in their community they are called
Launch: Coach/Mentor, provide Management Team oversight, and help launch the new church
Re-Launch: provide on-going leader care and support the multiplication of disciples and church planting

Nexus plants churches that are independent Christian Churches dedicated to the restoration of the New Testament Church in its ordinances, its faith and its life, in the historic line of the Restoration Movement of the Thomas and Alexander Campbell tradition.  We focus on the great commission of the Lord Jesus Christ as revealed in the New Testament of the Word of God (Matthew 28:18-20).  We will provide opportunity for Christian people to continue steadfastly in the apostles’ teaching, fellowship, breaking of bread and prayers (Acts 2:42), and prepare them for works of service (Eph. 4:12).
