Name: St. Theresa Catholic School
Description: Located in NW Hills of Austin,  22 acres of a healthy environment with small class sizes and dedicated teachers.  Serving preschool-8th grade,

Name: Christian Warrior Mission
Description: Christian Warrior Mission is a Home Church Community, Farm, and Mission,  Forging Christian Warriors in Jesus Christ for Todays Challenges!

Name: Ebenezer Hospital Church
Description:
Ebenezer Baptist Church Fifth Ward aka Ebenezer the Hospital Church ( where God does the healing) a place where you can come and grow. We are big enough to help you but small enough to miss you.

We are:
Veteran Friendly
LGBTQ Friendly

Name: Rogationist Seminary - Manila
Description: As a pontifical clerical religious Institute, founded by St. Hannibal Mary Di Francia (1851-1927), the Congregation of the Rogationists of the Heart of Jesus (RCJ) finds its spirituality in the words of Jesus in the Gospel “The harvest is rich but the workers are few. Pray, therefore, the Lord of the harvest that He may send workers into His harvest" (Mt.9:37-38/Lk.10:2).

Name: Streams Ministries International
Description: Streams Ministries, Intl is a Christian equipping ministry that helps to restore the awe of God to the earth and helps people to fulfill the purpose God created them for. We teach about intimacy with God, hearing him in all the ways that he speaks, and recognizing his presence throughout life. We are a prophetic ministry that trains people to understand God's ways whether he sends a dream, speaks through an angel, highlights a verse from the Bible, or communicates in any of the other many ways he has revealed in Scripture. We work with local churches, ministries, and individuals to accomplish this in countries around the world.

Name: 242 Community Church
Description:
We’re a diverse community of people of all ages, races, and religious backgrounds together living out the mission of helping people take next steps with God. We are one church in seven locations seeking to be like the first church found in Acts 2|42-47 - which is what we’re named after! 

We invite you to take your first step in joining us this upcoming Sunday! We have a seat just for you, as well as a place for your kids and teenagers!

Name: Diocese of Sioux City
Description:
The Diocese of Sioux City was established by a decree of His Holiness, Pope Leo XIII, on Jan. 15, 1902, by the separation of 24 counties in northwest Iowa from the territory of the Archdiocese of Dubuque. 

The Diocese of Sioux City belongs to the ecclesiastical Province of Iowa with Dubuque as the See City of the Archdiocese and with sister dioceses in Davenport and Des Moines. Each of these jurisdictions is a ‘particular’ or ‘local’ Church which, through its Ordinary, or bishop, who is appointed by the Holy Father, is united to the universal Catholic Church of which Pope Benedict XVI is the head.

On Nov. 10, 2005, it was announced that Pope Benedict XVI had appointed Msgr. R. Walker Nickless of Denver as the seventh bishop of the diocese. His episcopal ordination was held on Jan. 20, 2006 at Nativity of Our Lord Jesus Christ Church in Sioux City.

Name: Burnt Hickory Baptist Church
Description: Burnt Hickory Baptist Church is passionately pointing people to Christ. We pursue growing strong Godly men and women for his Kingdom, helping parents lead their children to know and grow in Christ, and help the broken and hurting to become whole in Christ. We pursue building stronger families, bringing hope to our community, and sharing God's love, acceptance, and forgiveness to all.

Name: Priory of Sion
Description:
Priory of Sion Is A Divine Principality And One Of The Oldest Private /G\, Discreet, Prestigious, Holy Religious Orders, And Fraternities In The World. Priory Of Sion Was Originally Instituted By Holy Knights In Jerusalem In The Year Of Our Lord 1099 A.D. The Primary Reason For Existence Of Priory of Sion Throughout Centuries Has Been The Protection Of, And Devotion To The Living Descendants Of Our Lord Jesus Christ With Unique Divine Genome Attributed To Christ Himself. We Are Currently The Devotees And Guardians Of The Only Living Descendant Of The Lord Jesus Christ Also Known As The Holy Grail, In This Realm. 

The Following Grand Declaration Is Approved By The Grand Supreme Council Of Priory of Sion And The Grand Office Of His Holiness, Grand And Holy Prince Apollo Marquis.

Behold!!! Only The Worthy Are Permitted To Enter This Holy Sanctuary.

The Following Grand Offices Of Priory of Sion Are Occupied By The Following Personages:
The Grand Office Of The Grand Master Continuum Of Priory of Sion Is Occupied By His Excellency And Grand Knight Sir Arthur Gary Marashlian.
The Grand Office Of The Grand Warden Continuum Of Priory of Sion Is Occupied By Her Excellency And Grand Knight Lady Kavalla Callahan.
The Grand Office Of The Presidency Of Priory of Sion Is Occupied By The Chairman Of The Grand Supreme Council Of Priory of Sion, His Holiness Grand And Holy Prince Apollo Marquis.
The Grand Office Of The Grand Pastor Of Priory of Sion Is Occupied By His Holiness Grand And Holy Prince Apollo Marquis.
The Grand Office Of The Grand Interdenominational Ambassador Of Priory of Sion Is Occupied By His Holiness Grand And Holy Prince Apollo Marquis.
The Grand Office Of The Grand Secretary, The Grand Office Of The Grand Commander And The Grand Office Of The Grand Tyler Of Priory of Sion Are Occupied, But No Names Associated With These Grand Offices Shall Be Disclosed At This Time.  
The High Office Of The Senior Pastor Is Occupied By Her Excellency And Knight Lady Kaytie S-N.

Name: Quay Church
Description:
Quay Church is a vibrant, multi-generational community in Windermere, FL. We exist to help people find their place, anchor their faith, and be sent out with purpose.

With more than 2,700 weekly in worship and thriving ministries for kids, students, young adults, and women, Quay is a growing movement shaped by our core values: Jesus is our purpose, belonging is our heart, excellence is our standard, and worship is our way.

We are committed to bold faith, wise stewardship, and building spaces that serve both our church family and the greater Orlando community.

Name: Great Commission Ministry Ethiopia
Description:
Great commission ministry is a ministry dedicated to winning more souls to the kingdom of God.



Our purpose is to help fulfill the Great Commission in the power of the Holy Spirit as mandated by our Lord Jesus Christ. We are committed to the centrality of the cross, the truth of the Word, the power of the Holy Spirit and the national scope of the Great Commission.

GCME offers spiritual guidance, resources and programs tailored to people from all cultures in every walk of life through many diverse outreaches, including:
More than 140 full-time staffs that work with the different sectors in the organizations, like on campus, on mission fields on churches etc…
Partnership with more than 1000 churches across the country.
Family life movement to 4500 people annually through media, conferences, counseling and locally hosted events.
Women for change program aiming to maximize the potentials of women in the church.
Tel-Eshtahol, telephone ministry to more than 50,000 callers in need of counseling and answers for basic questions annually.
Facebook/online evangelism to over 1.4 million people per annum.
Evangelism using different tools like Holy Spirit booklet, God tools, websites like Habesha student etc…
Jesus film ministry
Cru was originally founded as Campus Crusade for Christ in 1951, when Bill and Vonette Bright began the ministry on the UCLA campus. God had given him a vision portraying the total fulfillment of the Great Commission throughout the world.  We are only a part of God’s workforce to accomplish that, but we are passionate about our part and how we can help others achieve their parts. From the beginning, we have sought to be a caring community as well as a community on mission.

Name: Futures Church
Description: The heart of Futures Church is to see people encounter the love of Jesus and find their home in a life-giving church. We are a generational church, passionate about creating an environment where family is celebrated, the presence of God is experienced, and people discover all that God has for them.

Name: First Nations Kitchen
Description:
First Nations Kitchen is a food justice-focused outreach program of All Saints Episcopal Indian Mission in South Minneapolis. We serve healthy, organic and indigenous food every Sunday.  Our primary action is to provide food to those in our community who would not otherwise have access to high-quality, fresh organic food. We work to cultivate an environment of radical hospitality and cultural empowerment. The kitchen provides a unique opportunity to come together around common values that everyone can be fed and no one goes hungry. We have been serving since Nov. 2008. 

Since the onset of COVID-19 we have moved to sharing To Go Meals and bagged organic produce outside our building, rain, snow or shine every Sunday from 4:00-5:00 pm. To make inquiries or to volunteer as a group or individual please email director@firstnationskitchen.org or contact us through our website www.firstnationskitchen.org! Pidamayaye, Miigwech, Thank you!

Name: Ananda Worldwide
Description: A worldwide movement to help you find Joy within yourself.

Name: All Seasons Ministry Services
Description:
Are you a Christian who currently does not have a church home? Do you still want God to be involved in your major life events but don't know who to call?

That is what happened to me over 20 years ago, and I am here to help you by "standing in the gap" for you until you find your church family.

I am an Ordained Minister with the Assemblies of God currently serving Southwestern Pennsylvania. Please reach out to me if you need a Christian Wedding Officiant, Marriage Counselor, Relationship Coach, Funeral Celebrant, or if you just need prayer.

Name: The Rocket Company
Description: The Rocket Company provides the best coaching and "done-for-you" resources for church leaders. Through our core coaching programs and stand-alone products and resources, we help churches accomplish their unique vision by having more money for ministry, preaching better sermons, and engaging volunteers with the mission of their church.

Name: The Fellowship Church
Description:
We are here to reach people for Christ and help believers grow to be like Him.
We have two locations, Round Rock and Hutto, but are one church family. At the Fellowship, our beliefs come from the Bible, God’s inerrant Word to us. Every Sunday, and throughout all of our events, we study and teach straight from the Bible.

We have a variety of ministries for a variety of people. We truly are a family and we would love for you to be a part.

Name: Calvary Chapel of Philadelphia
Description:
The Calvary Chapel Church has been formed as a fellowship of believers in the Lordship of Jesus Christ. Our supreme desire is to know Christ and be conformed into His image by the power of the Holy Spirit. We are not a denominational church, nor are we opposed to denominations as such, only their over-emphasis of doctrinal differences that have led to the division of the body of Christ. We believe that the only true basis of Christian fellowship is His (Agape) love, which is greater than any differences we possess and without which we have no right to claim ourselves Christians.

We Believe: worship of God should be Spiritual. Therefore: We remain flexible and yielded to the Holy Spirit to direct our worship. 
We Believe: worship of God should be Inspirational. Therefore: We give a great place to music in our worship. 
We Believe: worship of God should be Intelligent. Therefore: Our services are designed with great emphasis upon teaching of the Word of God that He might instruct us how He should be worshipped. 
We Believe: worship of God is Fruitful. Therefore: We look for His Love in our lives as the supreme manifestation that we have truly been worshipping Him.

Name: Hunter Street Baptist Church
Description:
Our church exists to lead people to Jesus Christ and church membership, develop them to Christ-like maturity, equip them for ministry and send them on mission in order to magnify God.

Hunter Street is a place where we can grow to be more like Jesus. It's where we can be equipped for ministry by discovering the gifts and talents God has given each of us.

Here we can learn to take the Gospel to neighbors, to people in our city and to those around the world.

Name: Yeshivat Eretz HaTzvi
Description: Eretz HaTzvi is a leading Zionist, Modern Orthodox Yeshiva where you will engage in rigorous learning in a warm and supportive environment that prepares you for the independence of university life while rooting you firmly in Torah values.

Name: Diocese of Ely
Description:
The Diocese of Ely is one of 42 regional areas of the Church of England. The diocese covers an area roughly similar to the county of Cambridgeshire, but also includes some parts of western Norfolk, Peterborough, Essex and Bedfordshire. Within that area, there are 344 individual parishes. Every parish has at least one church and many parishes also have a Church of England school. 
The diocese operates within the national structures of the Church of England. For more information about this, visit the Church of England website.

Name: Concordia Lutheran Church
Description:
Concordia Lutheran Church is a congregation of believers with faith and hope placed in the one true Savior, Jesus Christ. God's Word is at the heart of all we do and His message of love, forgiveness, and salvation is the driving force behind every aspect of our ministry.

Whether looking for a weekend service to attend while in town on business, or searching for a new church home, we are here to welcome you. We cordially invite you to join us for worship. We offer five weekly worship services to accommodate busy schedules. In addition, we provide Bible studies, Sunday school, small groups, special events, and many more ministries to both serve and encourage all individuals and families throughout the various stages of life.

We welcome you to our campus and to our family of faith. Please tour our website for more information about us and feel free to contact us (use the form below) should you have any questions or desire further details regarding our ministries or teachings.

May God bless your day!

Name: Full Gospel Business Men Fellowship Int, Nigeria
Description: We are the largest gathering of christian business men in Nigeria. Our community includes CEOs, MDS, entrepreneurs, artisan, laymen and a whole lots more.

Name: Archdiocese of Ottawa-Cornwall
Description:
The Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Ottawa-Cornwall is a bilingual diocese that shares the Gospel with the residents of Akwesasne and Champlain in the east to Mississippi Mills in the west. It offers opportunities to encounter Jesus Christ through its parishes to people of all ages who want to learn about Him, become closer to Him, and serve Him through their unique gifts and talents. You can connect with the Archdiocese at
ottawacornwall.ca and on social media using the ottawacornwall handle.

L’Archidiocèse catholique romain bilingue d’Ottawa-Cornwall partage l’Évangile avec les résidents d’Akwesasne et Champlain dans l’est jusqu’à Mississippi Mills dans l’ouest. Il offre des occasions pour rencontrer Jésus-Christ par l’entremise de ses paroisses aux personnes de tout âge qui veulent en apprendre davantage sur Lui, see rapprocher de Lui et Le servir par leurs dons et talents uniques. Vous pouvez rejoinder l’Archidiocèse à ottawacornwall.ca et par l’entremise des médias sociaux en utilisant
l’identifiant ottawacornwall.

Name: Salt & Light Partners
Description: At Salt & Light Partners, our chaplains seek to build deep relationships and provide care that supports emotional and spiritual wellbeing in the workplace.

Name: New Life Camp
Description:
New Life Camp is a non-denominational and non-profit organization that is owned and operated by Children's Bible Ministries of North Carolina, Inc. We specialize in activities for children, kindergarten through twelfth grade, weaving the truth of God's Word in everything that we do.

New Life Camp exists to lead youth to Jesus and the life-transforming truth of the Gospel through camp, teaching, and sports ministries.

Name: Vienna Presbyterian Church
Description:
Our Mission:

A Caring Fellowship Bringing Christ Into Our Diverse Community Through Discipleship and Service

Values:
Living the Gospel
Discipleship
Scripture
Worship
Fellowship

Attributes:
Christ-centered
Prayerful
Compassionate
Hopeful
Joyful
Authentic

Name: Impact Church AZ
Description:
What began as a bible study for the Arizona Cardinals was opened to the public and quickly grew to become one of the fastest growing churches in the nation.  Impact Church is known for diversity, authenticity, and throwing a huge God-sized party celebrating Jesus each weekend!
We hope that you'll join us for one of our services! Our staff and volunteers plan each of our services to be uplifting, authentic, fun and life-changing. Our atmosphere is "come as you are". On a typical weekend you'll see people dressed up, dressed down, and a lot of in between. Our services last around an hour and include upbeat music and a relevant, practical message.
Travis Hearn has been the Senior Pastor of Impact Church for over six years. He and his wife Natalie have three children, Kylie, Josiah, and Jazzlyn. Pastor Travis also serves as the team pastor for the NBA's Phoenix Suns, and has served as a chaplain for Major and Minor League Baseball for over a decade.

Name: Lifegate Church
Description: Lifegate is a multi-campus church based in Omaha, Nebraska with four locations in Nebraska and 3 international locations. All of our campuses feature live worship and share the same weekend message broadcast. Lifegate is a nondenominational church and we love serving the communities around our campuses. We have an endless passion to invite people everywhere to discover, live and give life in Jesus.

Name: Paakofinie Online Shop
Description:
Paakofinie Online Shop offers a wide range of products and digital services to meet diverse needs. Our product selection includes apparel, accessories, electronics, home decor, and more. We strive to provide quality products that cater to various lifestyles.

In addition to our product offerings, we provide comprehensive digital services aimed at enhancing online presence and user experience. Our services include web design, UI design, app development, e-commerce solutions, graphic design, digital marketing, SEO, content creation, social media management, branding, and IT consulting.

Our web design services focus on creating visually stunning and user-friendly websites that reflect our clients' brand identities. We also specialize in UI design, crafting intuitive interfaces for web and mobile applications. Our app development team delivers customized solutions tailored to our clients' needs, including native apps, cross-platform solutions, and PWAs.

Paakofinie Online Shop is committed to empowering businesses and individuals in the digital age. Whether you're looking for quality products or innovative digital solutions, we're here to help you succeed!

Name: Assemblies of God World Missions
Description: Assemblies of God World Missions (AGWM) is the world missions arm of the U.S. Assemblies of God. Its formation parallels that of the General Council, and in fact, many of our church leaders and historians believe missions was the primary reason the General Council was formed. Fundamental to Assemblies of God World Missions' outlook is our commitment to establishing the Church among all peoples everywhere. We do that by reaching, planting, training, and serving. These four categories of ministry actions support the breadth of God’s work. They are rarely separate acts or processes but woven together in the work of our global teams and partners. So all can hear the hope of the gospel.

Name: Truth In Business
Description:
Truth In Business is a non-profit organization dedicated to spreading the gospel through the business community.  At each of our lunch gatherings, a Christian business leader delivers key business insights, speaks about his/her faith experience, and shares the truth of the gospel.  Regardless of your faith background, we’re confident that you’ll leave each luncheon with actionable insight from a trusted leader in the business community.

Truth In Business luncheons are held at Perry’s Steakhouse and Grille in Franklin, TN. Doors open at 11:45am, and lunch is served at 12:00pm. Our speaker begins at 12:25pm, and the meeting concludes by 1:00pm.  The minimum suggested donation is $29 per person; bring a friend or co-worker, and join us at the next luncheon!

Name: Bible Media
Description: A media company in service of the evangelical message of the Bible. Our activities encompass printed material such as books, Bible studies and homecell study material, a magazine (LIG) and newspaper (kerkbode). It also equips church leaders (particularly in the African Independent Churches) with distance education (in six languages) and through Good News Media, it helps missionaries by supplying the Bible in audio format for illiterate/blind/poorly sighted people.

Name: New York Insight Meditation Center
Description: New York Insight Meditation Center (NYIMC) is devoted to nurturing a community of belonging by weaving the Buddha’s teachings of wisdom, compassion, and awakening into our everyday lives.  Our primary offerings are classes, courses, retreats, and community meditation gatherings.

Name: REVELATION CHURCH LA
Description:
Revelation Church LA is the fastest growing multicultural international non-profit organization on the West Coast. 

Our international reach includes South Africa, India, Canada, Kenya, France, Jamaica, The United Kingdom, The Philippines, South America and over 40 countries not listed. The organization was officially founded and established by Dr. Lovy L. Elias in 2016. 

Visit revelationchurchla.org for more details about our organization and <revelationchurchla.org/partners> to learn how you may help us build.

Name: V3 Church Planting Movement
Description:
Make Disciples, Plant a Church, Grow a Movement. http://thev3movement.org/for-planters/

At the heart of developing a church planting movement is understanding that we serve a triune missionary God, who has sent us into the world to bless people and seek transformation.  We exist to help you start disciple-making churches that are a sign, foretaste and instrument of God’s kingdom.  If you want to find partners in the gospel, experience renewal, discover the latest resources in church planting with a movement mentality, learn from experienced planters and those gifted differently than you, and contribute to a larger movement, then contact us, and consider joining the V3 movement.

Name: Trietsch Memorial United Methodist Church
Description:
Almost thirty years strong and continuing to grow, what started with a handful of people meeting in a school cafeteria has mushroomed into a 15 acre campus with state of the art facilities. More than that, Trietsch is your home for enjoyable fellowship, relationships of depth and meaning, and life-changing experiences. With three services on Sunday morning, numerous adult Bible studies throughout the week, energetic small groups, programs for children and youth and missions that change lives, there is a place for everyone to feel connected.
 
We invite you to be transformed with us as we work together to lead people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ.
 
Our Mission: Leading people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ

Our Vision: Create settings where all are encouraged and equipped to discover intimacy with God, grow in relationship together, serve others, and transform the culture.

Our Values: Biblical Relevance, Radical Love, Servant Ministry

Name: Faculty of Orthodox Theology, University of Belgrade
Transforming Center
Description:
We create space for God to strengthen the souls of leaders and transform communities.

For over 20 years, the Transforming Center has provided retreats, relationships, and resources for those who long to keep seeking God in the crucible of leadership.

We serve leaders and influencers of purposeful communities – churches, non-profits, and businesses – who long for new rhythms that allow them to flourish in their life and leadership. If we’re honest, over time many Christian leaders experience a disconnect between their outer life and their inner life – the presence of God deep within. For this reason, we walk with pastors and leaders, helping them distinguish God’s voice beyond all the noise so they can lead from that place.

In a time of deconstruction – within the church and within ourselves – our community has spent over 20 years reconstructing leaders and their vision for the church, guiding them in ancient sacramental practices that breathe life back into them and their communities. Grounded in a highly ecumenical approach, we reflect and welcome the diversity that is present in the Body of Christ. Our gatherings include leaders from all denominations, a variety of businesses, and many organizations like International Justice Mission (IJM), Compassion International, and Neighborhood Film Co.

The retreats, resources, and relationships we offer are designed to provide you with a safe place to be honest about the challenges of spiritual leadership; to experience rhythms of solitude, prayer, and community; and to deepen your understanding of leadership that flows from your transforming self. In everything we do, the Transforming Center seeks to be trustworthy, spacious, communal, practical, prophetic, and biblical.

“On the day I called, you answered me, you increased my strength of soul.” 
—Psalm 138:3

Name: The Movement for Reform Judaism
Description: The Movement for Reform Judaism supports individuals, rabbis and synagogues in over 40 communities across the UK to meet their spiritual, social and educational needs and to reach out to new members and the wider community. It is inclusive and welcomes anyone on a Jewish journey of any sort.

Name: Uniting Church in South Australia
Description: Check out our career opportunities here: http://sa.uca.org.au/uc-positions-vacant/current-positions/

Name: NewSpring Church Kansas
Description:
NewSpring Church is a non-denominational Christian church located in Wichita, KS.

NewSpring exists to help people make an eternal connection with Jesus Christ and with others. Our strategy is to accomplish this by creating joyful, relevant, irresistible environments led by skilled staff and dedicated volunteers.

Name: Franciscan Mission Service
Description:
Franciscan Mission Service (FMS) is a DC-based nonprofit focused on building partnerships with Catholic women and men who are inspired to live and serve in solidarity with economically poor communities across the globe and in the Greater Washington, DC region.

Walking in the footsteps of St. Francis, we promote simplicity, the absolute and fundamental dignity of each individual and creation, Catholic Social Teaching and faith in the transforming power of Christ’s love in the world. While preparing lay Catholics for two-year international, one-year domestic and 1-2 week short-term mission service opportunities, FMS engages in a mission of presence, accompaniment, and advocacy.

Name: City Mission Movement UK&I
Description:
The City Mission Movement was founded in 1991 and is a network across UK and Ireland which seeks to serve existing City Missions in the work they undertake in their cities; support new Missions in starting; and offer a national voice of hope.

The City Mission Movement is lead by an executive team headed by Carl Knightly.

Name: Men's Group Foundation (mensgroup.org)
Description:
Founder/President, Men's Group Foundation, 501c3. Free Bible resources. 

A book to help with stress & anxiety. Author, "Saving the Corporate Animal, One Soul at a Time." You can live both a fulfilling, faith based life, AND thrive as a successful corporate being.

Mensgroup.org offers Fast, Free & Focused Men's Bible Study Guides 
- Discussion topics for Small Groups

Topics such as Men & Their Jobs, Personal Journey & Purpose, Macho Man, Cherishing Your Spouse, When Life Doesn't Turn out like we Planned, Life in a Gray World & More.

Our VISION: Men Leading God-driven lives.

Our MISSION: To provide Biblical foundational resources to help men grow in their discovery and pursuit of Godly living. 


We are a 501c3 Non-Profit Organization based in Durango, CO.

Name: MPowered Christian Ministries
Description:
Are you "on-fire" for Jesus or do you wish you were? Are you looking to find freedom, discover your calling, become the best version of yourself, and do more for the glory of God? If so, you've found the right ministry!

VISION: Global revival by the Kingdom of God in every city
MISSION: Mobilize disciples to advance the Kingdom of God globally

HOW? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

1. EDUCATE
     Teach biblical, gospel-centered, conservative protestant theology that glorifies God, magnifies Christ, and edifies, equips, and empowers the Church.

2. RENOVATE
     •  Beautify the Bride of Christ — Challenge unrepentant, sinful, and worldly cultural-Christianity to genuine repentance, sanctification, and a right understanding of, and relationship with, God.
     •  Heal the Body of Christ — Revitalize the saints holistically (mind, body, emotions, soul,
         and desires) and cultivate proactive, disciplined, and Christ-centered living.
     •  Equip Spiritual Warriors of Christ to recognize, rebuke, and expel demons, false
         teachings, and cultural compromise.

3. CREATE
     Create genuine, radical, mature disciples of Jesus into leaders that will be empowered to
     create other genuine, radical, mature disciples of Jesus.

     Edify, Equip, and Empower disciples that:

     •  Live out their faith wholeheartedly
     •  Identify and fulfill their calling fruitfully
     •  Proclaim the gospel unapologetically
     •  Fight the good fight fearlessly
     •  Shine the light of Christ into the dark relentlessly

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

WE EMPOWER AND MOBILIZE DISCIPLES THROUGH:

1.  Action Workshops for churches, small groups, individuals
2.  Online Courses, Videos, Books, Articles, Wall Art, Memes
3.  Small Cell Group discipleship programs
4.  Empowerment Coaching for groups or individuals

Name: The Christ School
Description:
The Christ School is an independent school located in downtown Orlando, Florida that partners with families to provide academic excellence through an individualized, Christ-centered TK–8 experience. Our students thrive in an engaging, project-based learning environment that encourages a growth-mindset. Lessons are focused on collaboration, communication, creative problem-solving and critical thinking and STEAM-based activities are infused across all subject areas.

The Christ School is accredited by the Florida Council of Independent Schools (FCIS), Cognia, the Council on Educational Standards and Accountability (CESA). The Bridge at The Christ School is accredited by the Orton-Gillingham Academy (OGA).

Name: Kingdom Millionaires
Description: We are a Christian organisation with the mission of helping members discover their purpose and fulfil their God-given vision, achieve financial independence, become faithful stewards of financial resources, learn from successful people, and help them design a life of great eternal impact.

Name: Catholic Chaplaincy at York
Description:
Roman Catholic Priest of the Companions of the Cross
Experience in University Campus Ministry and Spiritual Direction
Encounter School of Ministry

Name: Saint Columbkille Partnership School
Description:
Saint Columbkille is the only preschool to Grade 8 laboratory school in Boston. Partnering with Boston College’s Lynch School of Education and Human Development, we design and redesign our curricula and pedagogy with evidence-based shifts and leaps in education. This dynamic and student-centered approach to teaching and learning enables our faculty to equip your student with the distinct characteristics, attributes, skills, and values they need to continuously adapt their mindsets.

We are a leading private, Catholic, lab school for preschool, Kindergarten, elementary and middle school students. Located in Brighton, we welcome students from all over the Boston area including Cambridge, Watertown, Waltham, Brookline, Newton, Dedham & Chestnut Hill.

Name: Shaarei - Israel
Description: A instituição Shaarei (Shaarei Bina e Shaarei Daat - ISRAEL) a única instituição para jovens brasileiros em Israel. Na qual a missão é lutar conta a assimilação dos jovens brasileiros e proporcionar a eles uma formação ampla em todos os âmbitos da vida (espiritual, profissional e social).

Name: Lutheran Church of the Good Shepherd
Description: Good Shepherd is a community of people just like you who are seeking to live the abundant life Jesus offers by following Him together. We have our hopes and fears, our dreams and disappointments like everyone else, but by God's grace we are finding new healing, strength, and meaning in our lives. Whether you have grown up in church or have never been to church before, there is a place for you here at Good Shepherd. Good Shepherd is a congregation of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in America.

Name: Haad - Islamic cneter of Unaizah
Description: Islamic center on Unaiza is one of Islamic center on Saudi Arabia Which seeks to release the message of Islam to all human beings

Name: Fresh Life Church
Description: Fresh Life is a multi-site church led by Pastor Levi and Jennie Lusko in Montana, Utah, Oregon, Wyoming, and Idaho.

Name: Canadian Baptists of Atlantic Canada
Description: We are a ministry partnership of 400+ Canadian Baptist churches in the Atlantic Provinces. Resourcing pastors & churches, facilitating our shared mission through CBAC churches. Joining God in our neighbourhoods & overflowing with hope.

Name: Faith Methodist Orange
Description: A Global Methodist Church in Southeast Texas

Name: Llandaff Cathedral | Cadeirlan Llandaf
Description:
Your Cathedral, 1,500 years in the making.

We are an ancient building that is home to an inclusive community. We serve all people in the city, region and across the nation of Wales. We are Cardiff's Anglican Cathedral and home to Epstein's 'Majestas' and Rossetti's 'Seed of David'.

As we worship Jesus, we recognise in every person the image and likeness of God. Join us for worship, visit us as a tourist or come as a pilgrim. We are your cathedral and whoever you are you will find a welcome and a home here.

Name: Radiant Church
Description:
Radiant Church is dedicated to being an Acts 2:42-47 church in its entirety. We do that by providing 52 Unforgettable Experiences that Turn on Lights, Build Bridges, And Make Fully Devoted Followers of Jesus. 

Every time we connect we want to have fun living life together, know a little more about God than when we came in, invite everyone to take the journey and in the end grow closer in our walk with God.

We create environments for each person in your family to own your faith. From energetic and engaging Children and Student areas to connecting adults in every walk of life. From singing songs to God and making it personal to biblically based messages that are sure to inspire each of us to chase all God has for us to be in this life and the next life. Every environment is well thought out for you to love God and be all He has designed for you and your family to be.

We are a church of compassion! We do that through our outreach environment called REACH. It stands for Relationships with other organizations; Educating the next generation; Assisting the Poor; Care for the Sick; Help People experience God. We do that based on Acts 1:8 which says that we are to be His witnesses in Jerusalem, Judea and Samaria and to the Ends of the Earth.

Last but not least, we are a praying Church. We do that with weekly prayer groups, in our services and in our monthly Prayer Meeting.

We love God and love others and we invite you to come experience a Life Changing Church! Radiant Church!

Name: Faith Bible Church
Description:
The mission of Faith Bible Church is to create a community of Christ followers who love God passionately, love their neighbors personally, and love themselves properly - all to the glory of God and to help others do the same throughout the world.

Faith Bible Church was founded in 1978 by a group of Christians interested in establishing a Bible teaching fellowship in the Northwest Valley.  Its first pastor, Tim Smith, served the congregation from its inception until 1998.  During that time, the community grew dramatically and so did the church.  In 1981 it successfully built the first phase of its old facilities and launched a second phase in 1989.  In 1998, Dan Lind was invited to become Faith's new senior pastor after Tim's many years of service.  As the church continued to grow, it became clear that its campus could not accommodate the growth.  The church acquired 8.5 acres of land on 59th Avenue, just north of Bell Road. We officially opened our doors to the public on November 16th, 2008. Faith Bible Church shares its roots with a number of other Bible churches in the Valley.

Name: Soul Quest Ayahuasca Church of Mother Earth
Description: Soul Quest offers its church members ceremonial retreats for healing and personal evolution, with one of the most powerful shamanic medicines on the planet and with a professional and psychotherapeutic approach that is reaching thousands of people from all over the world, providing conclusive answers and real solutions to their problems. We have no hierarchy in relationships between medicine man/ woman, facilitators, and guests. We believe we are all on our own unique path of understanding and healing and that we have so much to offer one another in that process. We believe that our way of symbolizing, celebrating and honoring the Spirit embraces all people and transcends all cultural boundaries. As such we welcome people of all faiths and religions, scientists and doctors, atheists and agnostic’s, to our retreat at Soul Quest Our ceremonial retreats, combining Sacred Plant Medicine and psychotherapy, are encounters for people seeking personal growth through the evolution of their consciousness. Bearing in mind that no human development is sustainable, unless it grows from the root, and that everything that is resolved at a deep level is maintained. This is a retreat because it is a “residential cohabitation” and lasts in most cases 3 days and 2 nights, but it’s also possible to come for just one night If you are a regular member and there is room available. It usually runs from Friday to Sunday, and there are up to 4 Sacred Plant Medicine sessions over the course of the weekend, with psycho- therapeutic work before and after each session. (In some cases there are retreats that lasts up to 11 days).

Name: Trout Lake Camps
Description:
Trout Lake Camps is multi-campus Christian camp located in central Minnesota. 

Trout Lake Camps exists to engage children, youth and adults with the life-changing message of Jesus Christ by creating unique camp communities and learning experiences in which our words, our service and our personal relationships capture and communicate the essence of the gospel.

Trout Lake Camps offers incredible experiences including weekly summer camps, 
family camps, and weekend retreats for youth, adults and families.

Name: Benedictine Sisters of Perpetual Adoration
Description:
We are a contemplative monastic community living according to the Rule of St. Benedict with a distinctive dedication to the Eucharist.

Our ministry is one of prayer, and we support ourselves with the sale of altar breads. We are the Vatican's first approved maker of low-gluten altar breads.

We also publish Spirit&Life magazine, one of the oldest, continuously published faith-centered periodicals in the nation, and own Monastery Creations, a line of handcrafted soaps, lotions other items made through the partnership of work and prayer. Many of our soaps and lotions are crafted with a drop of holy water.

Name: Acadia Divinity College
Description:
Acadia Divinity College is the official Seminary for the Canadian Baptists of Atlantic Canada, and serves as the Faculty of Theology of Acadia University.
www.acadiadiv.ca

Name: Diocese of Monterey
Description: 46 Parishes Across four counties Monterey County, San Benito County and San Luis Obispo County,  Santa Cruz County ,18 Catholic Schools.

Name: Teen Challenge of Texas
Description: The faith-based solution to the drug epidemic

Name: St. Luke's Episcopal Church
Description:
St. Luke's Mission Statement
St. Luke's is a joyful, Christ-centered community. We accept, encourage, and celebrate a unique mix of people and embrace each other's faith journey. We offer a rich variety of worship experiences, undergirded by strong preaching, liturgy and music. We are committed to growing through caring, education, and service. Our mission is to live the Gospel, looking beyond ourselves, by praying, learning and giving.

Name: SAMBICA
Description:
The Sammamish Bible Camp Association (SAMBICA) began as a young people’s conference in 1919. Founded by members of the Swedish Tabernacle Church, SAMBICA is now a not-for-profit, non-denominational Christian camp and conference center. 

For over 99 years, SAMBICA has gone through many phases of growth and development to achieve the current level of high-quality programs that benefit our campers and the surrounding community. SAMBICA is no longer a remote camp nestled in the woods; it is now immersed in suburbia. SAMBICA’s 30+ buildings are spread over 11 acres on the shores of Lake Sammamish in Bellevue, Washington.

Today, SAMBICA exists to be a light on the lake, inspiring youth to a relationship with Jesus Christ.

SAMBICA provides both overnight camps, day camps, and a high school leadership program during the summer months. Approximately 100 staff members are hired each summer to run the camp operations in roles such as counselors, lifeguards, boat drivers, and kitchen staff. Over 2,200 children attend SAMBICA’s summer and year-round programs each year.

During the fall, winter and spring seasons SAMBICA serves other corporations, not-for-profit organizations, schools, and churches through guest group accommodations.  SAMBICA’s quality food, great customer service, and convenient location provide the perfect setting for reflection, relaxation, and team building.

Name: Global Gates
Description:
Global Gates exists to have a global impact through urban gates. We seek to be a part of God's work in the following ways:

A. Recruit, qualify, train, and oversee local and transplanted missionaries: 

B. Create a missions culture among churches in our cities of operation:

C. Plant reproducing churches among all unreached people groups represented in our cities of operation:

D. Offer services for the social betterment of the unreached people group population:

E. Launch and develop evangelism and church planting initiatives among unreached peoples through their relational networks in the city back to their countries of origin:

Name: Bet Am Shalom Synagogue
Description: We are a vibrant, egalitarian, Reconstructionist congregation of families and individuals from diverse backgrounds, bound together by a shared belief in a thoughtful and progressive approach to Judaism. With a deep respect for tradition, we seek to evolve as the world around us evolves. The creative spirit of our members fuels our community as together we learn, share lifecycle events, support each other and commit to tikkun olam.

Name: Masjid Toronto - Muslim Association of Canada
Description: Masjid Toronto is a mosque in the heart of downtown Toronto, serving a large and diverse Muslim community. Its unique location near universities, downtown businesses, and the Greyhound Bus Station makes it a sanctuary for Muslim students, professionals, and travelers alike. Today, hundreds of people each week make use of Masjid Toronto to perform the five daily prayers and the congregational Friday prayer. The mosque also hosts community events, a weekend children’s school, and various classes. It is located at 168 Dundas St. West, at the corner of Dundas and Chestnut.  It is accessible by public transit via the 505 Dundas Street car.  The Masjid is also a short walk from St. Patrick Subway station and Dundas Subway station.

Name: Unity of Houston
Description: Unity of Houston offers positive, practical teachings that support spiritual evolution and abundant living.  We welcome you to join us for any and all of our services.   Diane and I invite you to stop by the reception line after either Sunday service and allow us to extend a personal welcome to you.  The Unity movement is open and welcoming of all individuals regardless of race, color, gender, age, creed, religion, national origin, ethnicity, physical disability or sexual orientation.  We take an extremely positive approach to life, emphasizing our Oneness in God and the goodness in people and all of life.  We believe…”Life is meant to be good!” ~ Rev. Howard Caesar

Name: Christianity Explored USA
Description: We equip God's people in evangelism. Our approach is exploring Jesus in the Bible in a relational environment.

Name: Crazy Love Ministries
Description: Crazy Love Ministries is a religious institution based out of 107 Sagamore st, San Francisco, California, United States.

Name: St. Stephen's Episcopal Church
Description: We are a community of faith that welcomes everyone. St Stephen’s is located across the Golden Gate Bridge on the Tiburon peninsula.

Name: Potter's Transformation Christian Centre
Description:
Have you ever wondered what the world will be like if you have people who are committed to growth, quality leadership and are spiritually sound? well we won't stress you to find out the answer, we will gladly tell you; A world of peace and quality people!

Potter's Transformation Christian centre is committed to raising a community of Christ like disciples who are purpose driven, passionately ablaze for God and set for Global Impact. 

We are big on:
Growth
Purpose 
Spirituality 
Worship 
Excellence 
Love 
Leadership

We are not just a church, we are super committed to making sure you live the best live God has ordained for you. 

You can join our services, seminars and teaching on our website where you can also find more information about us.

Name: Theology is for Everyone
Description: Theology is for Everyone exists to produce solid biblical and doctrinal resources that everyone can use and understand

Name: New Life International
Description:
Since 1998, New Life International, Inc.’s mission has been to provide safe water and deliver the Gospel of Jesus Christ throughout the world. A very durable, yet cost-effective and simple-to-operate, water purifier was invented by Duvon McGuire that creates chlorine to disinfect water. One purifier has the capability of serving a school, orphanage, clinic, hospital or even an entire community.

More than 4,000 water purification systems have been deployed to 83 countries. Missionaries, pastors and church leaders who know of a need for safe water come to our campus in Underwood, Indiana, for a free, one-day training on proper placement and installation of a purifier. It is through these relationships that New Life International is able to bring safe water and abundant life to the uttermost parts of the world.

Name: New City Church
Description: New City Church is a family of congregations helping people find and follow Jesus here, near, and far.

Name: JEC Côte d'Ivoire Officiel
Description: Jeunesse Etudiante Catholique (JEC) est un Mouvement d'action catholique qui lutte contre les maux qui minent de les milieux scolaires et universitaires.

Name: Epic Church
Description:
Hey there!   We think church should be fun, meaningful, and make a difference in your life. Whether you’re just exploring faith or you want to grow in your relationship with God, we’re here to help. 

Our name, Epic, represents our vision: to see every person in the city know Jesus. We think life’s better with God at the center of it, and we want that for everyone. We look forward to connecting. 

Epic is a non-denominational church with multiple locations, based in Philadelphia.

Name: First McKinney
Description: Conservative Baptist church in a rapidly growing suburb of Dallas TX.  "Our mission is to lead as many people as possible to KNOW Christ to GROW in Him and to SHOW Him to the world."  First Baptist McKinney's vision is to be a church of influence. A church whose message is so clear that lives are constantly being changed by the power of the Gospel.  Our priority is prayer and we are constantly calling out for the power of God to transform lives. We are a church so committed to heartfelt worship and so devoted to oneness in community that grace abounds every time we gather. First Baptist McKinney is a church where all people are accepted and loved regardless of age, race, or background.  We strive to build Christ-centered homes whose members are committed to on-going spiritual formation in their lives and are constantly devoting themselves to the ministries of the church and is committed to establishing other apostolic churches devoted to caring for the physical and spiritual needs of the poor.  We are very committed to raising, training and empowering a gift-based leadership generation where every member becomes a minister.

Name: African Union Catholic Chaplaincy
Description: The AU Chaplaincy is at the forefront of dialogue with members of other Christian denominations and religions represented in the African Union Commission. It works with other believers and people of goodwill to promote activities for harmonious coexistence among brothers and sisters in the wider African Union family.

Name: Eglise La Compassion
Description:
La Compassion est une communauté chrétienne qui répand l’évangile de Jésus-Christ avec un message d’amour, de sainteté, de puissance et d’équilibre. Elle compte actuellement 18 extensions (à Kinshasa et dans les provinces). Marcello Jérémie Tunasi en est le fondateur et Pasteur principal.
La Compassion diffuse ses cultes en direct sur internet (Facebook & YouTube) tous les mercredis et vendredis à partir de 18h00 et tous les dimanches à partir de 10h30

Name: Emeke Odili Ministries
Description:
Pastor Emeke Odili has a divine vision of: “Practically teaching people, how to make success in every area of life, through absolute righteousness and Faith”. His vision is scripturally anchored in 1Timothy 1: 19, which says; "Holding faith, and a good conscience; which some having put away concerning faith have made shipwreck:".

Pastor Emeke Odili is happily married to his best friend- Joy. And their marriage is blessed with two lovely boys: Enoch and Excellence
Shared with Public

Name: The Metropolitan Church of Toronto (MCC Toronto)
Description: The Metropolitan Community Church of Toronto (MCC Toronto) has been helping shape Canadian values of inclusion, diversity and equality for 45 years. A place of action – and a place of worship – MCC Toronto is a vibrant, inclusive and progressive church rooted in the Christian faith, the LGBTQ2+ community with a commitment to diversity and inclusion. MCC Toronto is on the forefront of ground-breaking human rights and social justice work and was the site for the world’s first legalized same gender marriage in 2001. Located in Riverdale, MCC Toronto is home to 1,000 engaged members, the award-winning MCC Toronto Choir, and the Triangle Program, the first LGBTQ2+ high school in Canada. MCC Toronto is also home to a refugee program that supports over 850 refugee claimants a year. Beyond its three Sunday services (9 AM, 11 AM and 7 PM), and a weekly broadcast seen in 150 countries, MCC Toronto offers many public-facing community and member engagement programs.

Name: Reach the Forgotten Jail Ministry
Description:
Our mission is to provide Christ-centered hope and healing through biblically-based, chaplain led, volunteer jail ministries. 

Our vision is for every incarcerated person to experience new life in Christ
and develop healthy family, church, and community relationships.

Name: Maitreya Instituut Nederland
Description: Maitreya Instituut is a Buddhist study and meditation organization, with centres in Amsterdam and Loenen and study groups in Groningen and Breda. It is an affiliate of the FPMT worldwide Buddhist organization. Courses and meditations are given on many different levels, both in Dutch and English, by highly qualified teachers.

Name: Finish Line Ministries International
Description: Finish Line Ministries International is committed to Training Pastors, Equipping The Church, Providing For Orphans, and Reaching The Lost in Malawi, Mozambique, and Zimbabwe. Working alongside the remarkable men and women of southeast Africa, Finish Line Ministries International creates and develops ministry initiatives specifically designed to impact lives, proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ, and establish His church.

Name: Family Missions Company
Description: Compelled by Jesus’ missionary mandate, and filled with the Holy Spirit, Family Missions Company missionaries proclaim Jesus Christ and His Gospel to the poor. Always working in concert with the pastors of the Catholic Church, we strive to live the Gospel that we preach. We believe the Lord is calling many Catholic lay people, both singles and families, to serve in foreign missions, “the greatest and holiest duty of the Church.” The need is urgent; we must go!

Name: Diocese of Jefferson City
Description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Jefferson City serves the spiritual and temporal needs of people living in the center/northeast quadrant of the state of Missouri. In these 38 counties are more than 80,000 Catholics who worship, pray, serve and celebrate their faith in God every day!

Name: Profile School
Description:
The Profile School Community will provide diverse educational opportunities to inspire, engage, and challenge all students. 
We value an educational experience that encourages each student to reach his or her highest level of academic capability. We promote respect, communication, compassion, and accomplishment for each member of our Profile Community. We value collaboration among staff, students, families, and community members to support personal and social development in addition to academic growth in all our students. Therefore, we believe in providing diverse educational opportunities that inspire, engage, and challenge all students to develop the skills and knowledge necessary to be contributing members of their local and global communities.

Name: Mercy Culture Church
Description:
Mercy Culture Church was founded by Pastor's Landon and Heather Schott in 2019 in Fort Worth, Texas. The story of how Mercy Culture started is simple—we heard and obeyed The Lord. Our prayer is that you too would hear His voice, know His ways, and find favor with Him! We've experienced supernatural growth in just a few short years. We recently launched a campus in Waco, TX as well as an online campus for anyone looking to join and be a part of what God is doing. You are welcome here!

Love God + Love People + Love Mercy

Name: Riverbend Church
Description:
We exist to serve the Bruised, Battered, Broken and Bored of our community and the world. Reclaiming, Restoring and Reproducing for the cause of Jesus Christ and the Kingdom of God.
Come just as you are, and experience God's grace.

Name: Diocesan Fiscal Management Conference
Description: Diocesan Fiscal Management Conference (DFMC) is the only professional membership organization for senior-level Catholic diocesan executives, particularly chief financial officers and equivalent roles.

Name: ISKCON YOUTH FORUM Delhi
Description:
It was set up by ISKCON India Advisory Council (IIAC) to inspire, train and engage youths from all walks of life by providing them the ideas, resources and guidance to achieve success in life. To achieve this objective, Annual National Conventions are being held since the year 2016 at various locations across India.

Our major goals are 

1.Nurturing Youths of India in strengthening their moral and ethical values
2.Imparting Knowledge and Wisdom of Vedic Scriptures
3.Practicing Mindfulness techniques from Bhagvad Gita
4.Develop Leadership Qualities
5.Providing Resources and platform to Learn, Grow and Share
6.To practically help the Society in providing all kind of support in every tough situations like Corona pandemic

Name: Union Gospel Mission of Salem
Description:
Union Gospel Mission of Salem was founded in 1953 by a group of Christian businessmen with a heart for the homeless…

Our Union Gospel Mission seeks to restore dignity, hope, and renewal by sharing the love and grace of Jesus Christ with those in need. Through an array of transformative services (such as the New Life Fellowship) and comprehensive human care, we reach out to hurting and vulnerable neighbors to help them discover new life in Christ.

Name: Young Life College
Description: Young Life College leaders build relationships with college students, showing up in their lives daily and offering weekly events, small groups, trips, and service opportunities, ultimately inviting students to take their next steps in following Jesus.

Name: Eastridge Church
Description: Since its creation in 1964, Eastridge has been a hub for the community and a place where people from all walks of life gather to worship God and serve the community. Over the past 50 years we have physically spanned three corners of the Issaquah Fall City and Issaquah Pine Lake Road intersection, as well as vital presence in West Seattle. We are a vibrant and growing church built upon contemporary worship and a strong emphasis on relevant Bible teaching. You’ll find ministry for the entire family that is based on building lives for God in a fun and exciting atmosphere.

Name: Eglise catholique dans le canton de Vaud
Description:
L’Eglise catholique dans le canton de Vaud déploie sa présence dans tout le canton avec plus de 50 paroisses, 5 départements et 5 missions linguistiques, soit 270 collaborateurs et de très nombreux bénévoles qui mettent en oeuvre les valeurs de l’Evangile. Elle bénéficie d’une reconnaissance de l’Etat qui lui permet d’exercer sa mission au service de toutes et tous. 

L’Eglise catholique dans le canton de Vaud dépend du diocèse de Lausanne, Genève et Fribourg et du diocèse de Sion pour le Chablais.

Une représentation pastorale pour la région vaudoise du diocèse de Lausanne, Genève et Fribourg est quant à elle en charge de soutenir et de guider les orientations et impulsions venant du diocèse de Lausanne, Genève et Fribourg.

L’Eglise catholique dans le canton de Vaud est inscrite dans la Constitution vaudoise. Sa contribution au lien social et à la transmission des valeurs fondamentales en étant au service de toutes et tous est en effet reconnue de droit public à travers la Fédération ecclésiastique catholique romaine du canton de Vaud (FEDEC-VD) qui coordonne les relations de l’Eglise catholique romaine avec l’Etat de Vaud et la gestion financière et administrative de l’Eglise dans le canton.

En Suisse, les catholiques ont développé un système original qui consiste à épauler les structures ecclésiales chargées de la pastorale par des structures démocratiques qui gèrent les aspects financiers et administratifs et entretiennent les liens avec les autorités cantonales. Dans la plupart des cantons, surtout en Suisse alémanique, ces entités sont des corporations ecclésiastiques. En Suisse romande, ces entités sont surtout organisées sur le mode associatif en fédérations.

Name: MCI Canada
Description:
MCI Canada ( Mission Chrétienne Intergénérationnelle du Canada) croit qu'une nation ne peut être transformée que par le changement de chaque individu. Jésus nous l'a démontré par son approche personnalisée. C'est pour cette raison que nous avons des groupes pour les femmes, les hommes, les adolescents et les enfants. Votre besoin nous tient à coeur, quelque soit votre âge.

Notre vision ne se veut ni religieuse ni traditionnelle. C'est pourquoi, nous ne présentons pas une nouvelle religion, mais une relation personnelle avec Jésus.

Notre mission est de rejoindre le monde avec le message d'espoir en construisant une église contemporaine dédiée à développer des personnes dévouées à Christ et qui influencent la société.

Name: The Gathering United Methodist Church
Description:
The Gathering, founded in 2006 by Matt Miofsky, began out of a belief that church could be different. Matt, along with a group of mission minded people, had a deep desire to make a significant impact on our city. This vision continues to evolve, bringing new generations of people together to serve and worship Jesus Christ, not only in our city, but beyond.

Since its beginning, The Gathering has continued to see dramatic growth. Multiple sites, numerous worship services, intentional online worship, a variety of small groups, a blossoming children’s ministry, an engaging student ministry, allies of and support of a growing LGBTQ+ community, a duty to fight racism and white supremacy, and a commitment to serving our city and our world are just a few of the ways in which we live out out our commitment to follow Jesus. We look forward to the future and hope that you will be a part of our emerging history and what God is doing through our growing community.

Name: Eglise Catholique Romaine - Genève (ECR)
Description:
L'Église Catholique Romaine - Genève (ECR) est à votre service au travers des prêtres, agents pastoraux, des 54 paroisses catholiques qui se trouvent sur le canton de Genève.

Nous sommes à vos côtés tout au long de votre vie, du baptême, à la catéchèse, lors de la première communion, d'une confirmation, d'un mariage, d'un décès.

Name: Grace Bible Church
Description: On Sundays, we connect with God's grace through casual, meaningful worship services made up of engaging musical worship and practical Bible teaching.  We exist as a church to see God's grace change lives, and we'd love to have you attend with us!

Name: Moose Ministries Inc
Description:
Training And Equipping Believers To Reach Their Cities So That They Can Impact The Nations

Our hope and desire is to train and equip the church so that they can reach out and impact their city. With these tools they can impact the world through discipleship enabling them to fulfill their role in the great commission.
Our Vision Is:

Train and Equip

This is in the form of training and helping local believers and pastors in areas that need help so that they have the knowledge they need to make an impact for the gospel.
You could say we want to teach them to fish instead of looking for a handout.
Love of God

We wish to demonstrate the Love of God everywhere we minister.
Jesus tells us to love one another. This is so important that he even says this is how others should know we are His disciples. So we aim to set an example everywhere we serve.
UNITY

This means we encourage all believers to work together and reach the world for the gospel. It is not about any other name, denomination, or creed other than the name of Jesus. We work to encourage and stir up local believers and only look to establish something new if there is not a sustainable establishment to reach the area.
Basically, we are not interested in competition or competing but in strategic partnerships.Our hope and desire is to train and equip the church so that they can reach out and impact their city. With these tools they can impact the world through discipleship enabling them to fulfill their role in the great commission.

Name: New North London Synagogue
Description:
We are a thriving Masorti community in North-West London with a membership of over 3000, led by Rabbi Jonathan Wittenberg.
At NNLS we aim to provide a supportive and inclusive community, that faces the intellectual and spiritual challenges of today with integrity and passion. We are a community that pursues a genuine concern for diversity, and for social and environmental justice.
In addition to running religious services, NNLS offers a wide range of educational, cultural, inter-faith, social action and other communal activities for both its membership and the wider Jewish and non-Jewish London community.

Name: Stichting Impact
Description:
Volg met je kerk het inspirerende seminar Reis door de Oude óf Nieuw Testament en ontdekt de rode lijn van Gods verhaal.

Stichting Impact wil volgelingen van Jezus Christus toerusten, inspireren en bemoedigen op hun geloofsreis. Door middel van seminars zoals Reis door het Oude én Nieuwe Testament, (s)preekbeurten en trainingen.

Wil je meer weten neem contact met ons op. De gegevens vind je op onze website.

Name: Har Zion Temple
Description: Har Zion is more than a temple. It is a sanctuary for prayer, an institution for learning, a gathering place to connect with others, the perfect location for life celebrations and, most importantly, a place to call home.

Name: Southwell Minster
Description: Southwell Minster is the Cathedral church for Nottinghamshire (Diocese of Southwell and Nottingham)

Name: Diocese of Owensboro, Ky
Description: Catholic organization for 32 Western Ky counties

Name: Adventist Mission
Description:
The Seventh-day Adventist Church finds its strength in mission. Its commitment includes a worldwide humanitarian work, and international volunteer program, satellite television and shortwave radio blanketing the globe, a huge publishing program, thousands of schools, a large network of hospitals and clinics, the Global Mission pioneer program, and hundreds of overseas missionaries.

Through the years, Seventh-day Adventists have generously supported mission through their tithes and mission offerings because they believe the gospel commission. They believe we're called to help the less fortunate, the poor, the sick, and those who don't know about Jesus. 

The story of Adventist Mission around the world centers not on the story of highly-educated super-Christians performing exceptional feats. It's the story of everyday people who answer the call to touch the lives of others in the name of Jesus. And it's your story, because you help make it happen. 

Our team here at Adventist Mission is grateful to have a small part to play in bringing that story to you. And we thank you for everything you do to tell the world about the good news and love of Jesus.

Name: Larger Story with Dr. Larry Crabb
Description:
At Larger Story, we are joining with Heaven to tell the beautiful story of redemption and restoration. It spans from before time – from the birth of the earth, to Christ’s life, death and resurrection – to today. God invites us to tell His Larger Story, the over-arching narrative that unites all of history. Deeper and wider than merely a collection of events, this story’s meaning is only realized when we see it as relational.

We aim to offer spiritually hungry people online resources and support based on Dr. Larry Crabb’s gospel-centered relational framework. Our resources help you go deeper to discover and live in the love story God is telling. We equip individuals, groups and churches to courageously face what makes meaningful and lasting community difficult and to break through those obstacles to live with purpose and power.

Name: Christian Peacemaker Teams
Description:
Partnering with nonviolent movements around the world, CPT seeks to embody an inclusive, ecumenical and diverse community of God's love.  We believe we can transform war and occupation, our own lives, and the wider Christian world through: the nonviolent power of God's truth, partnership with local peacemakers and bold action.

CPT places teams at the invitation of local peacemaking communities that are confronting situations of lethal conflict.  These teams seek to follow God's Spirit as it works through local peacemakers who risk injury and death by waging nonviolent direct action to confront systems of violence and oppression. 

CPT understands violence to be rooted in systemic structures of oppression. We are committed to undoing oppressions, starting within our own lives and in the practices of our organization.

CPT enlists the whole Church in an organized, nonviolent alternative to war.  CPT's initial roots among Mennonites, Church of the Brethren and Quakers have spread into a broad ecumenical network that supports biblically based and spiritually-centered peacemaking, creative public witness, nonviolent direct action and protection of human rights.

Name: First Lutheran Church & School
Description: Faithfully Learning and Serving God by Sharing God's Word with Children Daily, Teaching Academic Excellance, Christian Values and Love, Responsibility and Compassion.

Name: Lifebridge Church
Description:
We’re here to serve and love you in whatever situation or stage of life you find yourself in, not because we’re really good people but because we serve a really good God.
 
Life can get crazy, but here we find support within our community and grace within Christ. From our awesome family ministry program for your sweet little ones to our engaging services for adults, we have ministry programs that are sure to make you and your family feel right at home. Come and fellowship with us on Sunday mornings at 9:00 or 11am. We have a seat saved just for you!

Name: Alfirdaus College
Description:
Alfirdaus was established in 2005 by 7 colleagues from Western Sydney with a history of actively inviting Muslims and non-Muslims to learn about Islam.

It was established as an endowment for Islamic education with a focus on conveying the teachings of the Quran and Prophet Muhammad (PBUH).

It places an emphasis on developing a student’s spiritual knowledge and character to ensure they correctly apply Islamic principles in their day-to-day lives.

From humble beginnings with 15 students in a small centre in Bankstown, Alfirdaus now has students 6 centres across Sydney – Auburn, Bankstown, Blacktown, Hurstville, and Liverpool.

Name: GEMS Girls' Clubs
Description:
GEMS Girls’ Clubs is a global ministry dedicated to helping girls discover their true identity in Christ through mentoring relationships, Bible study, and hands-on activities. For over 65 years, GEMS has equipped women to lead girls in grades 1–8 in safe, small-group settings where faith is nurtured, friendships flourish, and purpose is found.

Whether meeting in churches, schools, or community centers, GEMS Clubs provide girls with a place to belong and believe. Each club receives biblically-based curriculum, leader training, and ongoing support from our team—helping mentors guide girls to grow in faith, confidence, and character.

From North America to Africa and beyond, GEMS is on mission to reach every girl with the good news: she is loved by God and created on purpose—for a purpose.

 Start a club.
 Partner with us.
 Help us expand this movement around the world.

#MentorshipMatters #GirlsMinistry #FaithInAction #NonprofitLeadership #GEMSGirlsClubs

Name: Self Enquiry Life Fellowship - Hansavedas
Description:
Self Enquiry Life Fellowship is a United States nonprofit organization guided by the monastic wisdom of the Hansavedas Mission to preserve the indigenous knowledge from the Sanskrit heritage, including: extant literature on spiritual philosophy that is meaningful to modern inquiry; spiritual practices of Vedic antiquity that bring about peace in our communities through mindful participation; Himalayan yoga-vinyāsa and Ayurveda that promote wellness and mindfulness in daily living; and Himalayan meditation techniques of unbroken lineages which bring about mental clarity and compassion through self-empowerment, ultimately guiding the meditator to liberation.

Our holistic curriculum of transmission is designed to inspire those interested in enlightened living. The focus is on legacy building in the United States, while harnessing the ancient wisdom tradition. This is aimed at heritage revival at the source as well as preservation of that precious heritage in the West by disseminating the salient features of a living tradition for the benefit of modern society.

The curriculum interprets esoteric Sanskrit scriptures, revives intonated Sanskrit chanting methods, safeguards historic archival imagery and rare meditative arts, and undertakes educational publications on spiritual philosophy. Our nonprofit forum also facilitates a cultural transmission of the Sanskrit heritage by presenting Vedic fine arts and classical music related to the theme of meditation.

The educational publications reflect the holistic curriculum that is based on an accelerated learning system derived from the Vedic shruti method and the Himalayan meditation techniques taught by the adepts. The organization is enriched with extraordinary guidance from several Vedic monks of ancient monastic orders. His Holiness Swami Vidyadhishananda is the spiritual head of the Hansavedas Mission and the spiritual founder of the Nonprofit.

Name: New Life Community Church
Description:
New Life Community Church is one church that meets in many locations throughout Chicagoland and internationally. 

Our purpose is to be a family of love that cooperates with God in making fully devoted fruitful followers of Christ.

Name: Ripon College Cuddesdon
Description:
Ripon College Cuddesdon seeks to prepare men and women for God's mission in a changing world through the imaginative pursuit of academic excellence, spiritual depth and pastoral engagement within the rhythm of daily life together.

There has been an Anglican theological college in Cuddesdon for over 150 years.   Almost uniquely among theological colleges, Cuddesdon attracts students from almost the whole spectrum of the Church of England who seek the stability of the daily office and the noble simplicity of liturgical worship. 

The College lies just seven miles south-east of Oxford city centre just off the main London road.  It is closely linked with the University of Oxford and has the right of matriculation. Most students follow an Oxford University course with full access to the Theology Faculty and Bodleian Libraries. Others take courses validated by Oxford Brookes University.

Name: Artists in Christian Testimony Intl
Description:
What A.C.T. Intl does:
-A.C.T. Intl gets artistic & creative Christians into ministry & missions throughout the world.  
-Our ministry gives artistic & creative Christian ministries a non-profit organizational home, and permission to raise tax-deductible donations for their ministry efforts.  
-We equip creative and artistic ministry-initiators for Christian ministry and missionary work throughout the world—through our Arts-Ministry Training Institute classes.

Description:  
Artists in Christian Testimony Intl is an evangelical, interdenominational Christian ministry that sends out and supports artistic ministers and missionaries—from all arts disciplines—who carry out various works of the New Testament Church.

Mission:  
A.C.T. Intl exists to mobilize and equip artistic and innovative ministries, ministers and missionaries for the work of the church around the world.  Those ministries include efforts to evangelize the lost, disciple believers, develop churches and minister to people in need. “

Name: Lee's Summit Community Church
Description:
Lee’s Summit Community Church is a nondenominational church dedicated to making disciple makers who saturate Lee’s Summit, MO with the gospel. Our goal is to give every man, woman, and child the opportunity to hear, know, and follow Jesus. Join our church as we practice our rhythm of worship, community, and mission.
Our church service is held on Sundays at 10:00 AM which includes Sunday School and childcare for children birth through 5th grade. Our additional ministries include Wednesday night youth group, various bible-based support groups, VBS, community outreach events, and more.

Name: Denison Forum
Description:
Denison Forum exists to thoughtfully engage the issues of the day from a biblical perspective. In covering global events, politics, sports, pop culture, and more, we remain committed to speaking biblical truth into every story.  

Launched in 2009 by Jeff Byrd and cultural theologian Dr. Jim Denison, Denison Forum offers a new way of digesting top headlines. The goal was to encourage spiritual awakening while equipping believers to engage with the issues and news of the day.

Today, Denison Forum produces articles, podcasts and books that receive 2.6 million monthly engagements and reaches an average audience of over 1 million people.

Denison Forum is part of Denison Ministries, which also includes First15, Christian Parenting, and Foundations with Janet.

Name: Chabad at University of Maryland
Description: The Chabad Jewish Student Center was established in Fall 1995. Our aim is to give meaning, share joy and add spirituality to the every day. Our dream is to teach these values in a warm and nurturing environment where people can grow together, enjoying life and Judaism simultaneously.

Name: Vibrant Faith
Description:
Vibrant faith - our name is our mission. When the people of God live an active and vibrant faith, the world is changed. As an organization, we are a team of passionate ministry leaders on a mission to explore the changing landscape of faith formation in the hearts of people today. We serve God by serving the Church and its leaders. That’s what matters most to us.

Learning Communities
We're asking important questions, seeking deep discovery, and putting in all into use by experimenting, innovating, and taking action in partnership with ministry leaders.

Coaching and Consulting:
Vibrant Faith partners with individuals to develop their leadership capacities, and with Christian faith communities to create a culture of spiritual vitality. We help leaders gain clarity and then develop road maps that harness their energy and assets for transformational change.

Training:
Through our diverse set of training experiences, the leader (or team) will benefit from our study and analysis of the latest research, decades of experience in faith forming ministry, and tried and tested expertise in many areas of church ministry.
 
Digital Strategies:
If we all could keep our church doors open 24/7 with full access to the faith forming value that our communities have, we would do it in a heartbeat. That’s the opportunity we have by paying attention to digital strategy as a ministry reality. When we embrace digital hospitality as a first word of welcome, we meet people as Jesus did, in the spaces and places they already live and learn. We’ve moved far beyond the need for a website so people can find directions to church.
