Description:
OUR SHARED VISION: 
Australia for Christ

OUR SHARED MISSION:
To make disciples, empower leaders and to multiply healthy churches.

OUR SHARED VALUES:
Faith with Stewardship - we value INC’s foundations in the supernatural power of God and are committed to being diligent stewards of these gifts to see the kingdom of God established.

Growing Relationships with Results - we value our “one vision through many churches” ethic, and are therefore committed to God and one another through growing relationships where all are accepted, yet challenged to pursue our personal and corporate destinies.

Winning Souls and Influencing Communities - we value the gospel and its power and remain committed to seeing our movement effective in bringing people to a saving relationship with Jesus Christ and influencing our communities through transformation.

Name: Inner City Impact
Description:
We work with children and teens in neighborhoods where the status quo is unacceptable, building healthy relationships, engaging them in wholesome activities, providing programs to teach them life skills and leadership, and allow them to experience the love of Christ.

Experiencing the love of Jesus can cause a child to rethink their worldview, reimagine their self worth, rewrite their future, and ultimately be reborn. 

Inner City Impact has served the inner city of Chicago since 1972. Committed staff reach kids ages 5 – 18 in some of Chicago’s toughest neighborhoods — Humboldt Park, Logan Square, and Cicero. Through its core programs, dedicated full-time missionaries and volunteers work with children through Bible studies, one-on-one discipleship, and in a variety of Christ-centered, wholesome and fun activities. Programs include after school clubs, summer and winter camp adventures, sports leagues, and leadership development.

Name: Kingdom Business
Description:
The Kingdom Business Network is a community of Christian Business Leaders from across the UK which meets weekly over Zoom.

The meetings are usually made up of two parts: 

1) We share what's happening in our businesses and pray for each other.

2) We discuss an issue which will help us become more effective Christian business leaders. Past questions have included:

- When, if ever, have you made God the CEO of your business?
- How does your business reflect God’s character?
- How would you define Godly success in your business?

Our weekly meetings take place on Zoom each Friday, start at 7.29am and run for an hour.

We also have monthly in-person evening socials which usually take place in the Nottingham/Derby area. There are also occasional bigger events which draw people from across the UK.

Kingdom Business Network has the following three objectives:

- Developing people’s wisdom in business
- Encouraging people in the Christian faith
- Enabling people to build a network of relevant business contacts

If you'd like to know more and receive the Zoom link to the meetings then send a connection request to:

Dewi Hughes - https://www.linkedin.com/in/dewihughes/
Mark Saxby - https://www.linkedin.com/in/social-media-consultant/

Name: Sacred Heart Seminary and School of Theology
Description:
With approximately 150 students, Sacred Heart Seminary and School of Theology is North America's largest Catholic seminary focused on preparing men of all ages for priesthood. Sacred Heart's expertise ensures a rich, rewarding and exemplary formation experience for men, while rigorously following the Program of Priestly Formation, 5th Edition. Approximately 30 bishops and religious superiors entrust their seminarians to Sacred Heart. Our core program is our accredited Master of Divinity Program, with approximately 100 seminarians. Seminarians who don't have a bachelor's degree enroll in our Pre-Theology Program, earning credits through a collaboration with nearby Cardinal Stritch University.

Sacred Heart also offers an accredited Master of Arts Program open to laity. Our Cor Unum evening program is a cohort of 12 students that go through intellectual, spiritual, human and pastoral formation together.  We also offer a robust ESL and Accent Modification program serving religious communities and dioceses around the world. Numerous lectures and mini-courses are offered, check our website for details.  

Sacred Heart is also home to the Lux Center for Catholic-Jewish Studies. It is the mission of the Lux Center to instill the knowledge, understanding and skills to advance interreligious dialogue and relations in future Catholic priests and religious leaders serving across the United States, Canada and throughout the world. 

Sacred Heart Seminary and School of Theology is an apostolate of the Priests of the Sacred Heart. It is located in Hales Corners, a suburb of Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

Name: Evangelical Christian Church in Canada (Christian Disciples)
Description:
The Evangelical Christian Church in Canada (Christian Disciples), as a mainstream Christian religion in North America, traces its historic roots to the formal organization of the Christian Church in 1804 in Bourbon County, Kentucky, U.S.A., and in 1810 near Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, Canada under the leadership of Barton Warren Stone (1772-1844), a former Presbyterian minister. 

The Christian Disciples in Canada whose faith was influenced by Baptist theology, was founded in 1810, near Stratford, PEI, where a small Georgian/Colonial style church was built in 1813, by John R. Stewart, an immigrant from Perthshire, Scotland. As early as 1813, he was holding worship services in his home. The young congregation decided to establish their first meeting house - a crude log cabin which was only thirty feet long by twenty feet wide. At this time, all of the adherents were of Scots ancestry.

The Stone Movement later merged with the efforts of Thomas Campbell (1763-1854) and his son Alexander Campbell (1788-1866) to become the Restoration Movement that gave birth to the Churches of Christ (Non-Instrumental), the Christian Churches and Churches of Christ, The Christian Church (Disciples of Christ), and The Christian Connection. The emphasis on religious freedom became strong enough that Barton Stone avoided any man-made ecclesiastical traditions that resulted in a movement that was "largely without dogma, form or structure," committing only to a primitive Christianity. This movement sought to restore the whole Christian church and the unification of all Christians in a single body patterned after the church of the New Testament. In a nutshell, it was believed that the church had departed from the New Testament model by adding to the scriptures.

Name: Association of Social Sciences Muslim Students
Description:
Welcome to the vibrant community of ASSMUS - the dedicated arm of the Muslim Student Society of Nigeria (MSSN) at the University of Lagos!

 About ASSMUS 
We are here to create a nurturing, supportive, and enriching environment for Muslim students within the Faculty of Social Sciences. ASSMUS is more than just a body; it's a home away from home, a sanctuary for personal and academic growth, and a thriving hub of meaningful connections.


 Spiritual Enrichment 
Our commitment to spiritual prosperity is unwavering. At ASSMUS, we provide a sacred space where you can explore and deepen your faith. We offer engaging events, discussions, and programs that help you connect with your spirituality, find inner peace, and share those experiences with like-minded individuals.


 Academic Growth 
Education is the foundation of a brighter future, and we are here to empower you on your academic journey. ASSMUS offers a wealth of resources, study support, and a community of mentors and peers who are always ready to assist you. Whether you need research guidance, study materials, or simply a friendly study partner, we've got your back.


 Valuable Social Connections 
University life isn't just about textbooks and lectures; it's also about building lifelong friendships and networking. ASSMUS hosts a variety of social events, workshops, and networking opportunities to help you thrive both personally and professionally. Our aim is to foster connections that will last a lifetime.


Join us in our mission to make your university experience extraordinary! ASSMUS is where boisterous aspirations meet insightful journeys, and where you're guaranteed to have a fulfilling time in your university life. Together, let's explore the realms of academia, spirituality, and friendship.

Name: Charles Simeon Trust
Description:
When it was founded in 2001, the Charles Simeon Trust's vision was "to promote the growth of the gospel of Jesus Christ throughout the world by training up the next generation of Biblical expositors." This vision remains the single conviction holding all of the work of the Charles Simeon Trust today.

One of our first endeavors was to develop Workshops on Biblical Exposition. These training events, lasting two or three days, are now held in more than 50 locations worldwide. The workshops help pastors and Bible teachers to learn methods of expositional preaching, be encouraged through sitting under God's Word, and gather in small groups with the aim of sharpening each other’s teaching.

Our other foundational initiative was the Simeon Model—a residential training scheme that combines the best of seminary education with a real church environment and the guidance of established, working pastors. But growing gospel churches around the world and broadening our reach right here in the U.S. requires a different kind of effort, an exponential effort. This work has expanded to include an online training platform called the Simeon Course on Biblical Exposition.We are also working toward establishing a center for full-time residential training.

We do everything we can to stay narrowly focused on our one goal: "to promote the Gospel of Jesus Christ throughout the world by training the next generation of Bible expositors." The gospel opportunities before us are immense.

Name: Mumbaicha Raja, Ganeshgalli
Description:
Mumbaicha Raja | Ganeshgalli, Lalbaug
A Legacy of Devotion Since 1928

Mumbaicha Raja is one of Mumbai’s most iconic and oldest Ganesh Utsav Pandal, established in 1928 by the residents of Ganesh Galli, named as Lalbaug Sarvajanik Utsav Mandal. Born during the Indian freedom movement, this public Ganesh festival was created to bring people together not just in faith, but in unity, cultural pride, and social awareness.

For nearly a century, Mumbaicha Raja has been a symbol of Mumbai’s collective spirit bringing millions of devotees, volunteers, and artisans together every year under one roof. The mandal is known for its majestic idol, spiritual sanctity, and thematic decorations that reflect India’s cultural, social, and historical ethos.

As one of the most visited mandals during Ganesh Chaturthi, Mumbaicha Raja represents more than tradition it embodies meticulous planning, civic coordination, creative direction, and community service at scale.

Now on LinkedIn, we aim to showcase the timeless value of Ganesh Utsav as a platform for culture, collaboration, and community impact and invite cultural institutions, civic leaders, and professionals to experience this unique confluence of heritage and harmony.

For Enquiry Mail Us at:
mumbaicharaja.lsum@gmail.com

Name: Camp Alonim
Description:
Camp Alonim is a program of the American Jewish University, an organization founded in 2007 when the Brandeis-Bardin Institute merged with the University of Judaism. Originally, Camp Alonim was a program of the Brandeis-Bardin Institute, which had a long and rich history. Dr. Shlomo Bardin was an educator who believed that American young people were assimilating at alarming rates and sought to create programming to stem this tide. He started with the Brandeis Collegiate Institute (B.C.I.), which is a summer residential program for college students to explore the place Judaism will hold in their adult lives by engaging in art, music, drama, Israeli folk dance, and learning with dynamic scholars. In 1947, 2,200 acres in Simi Valley were purchased and B.C.I. settled into its permanent home where it has been inspiring college students for over 60 years.

Dr. Bardin established Camp Alonim in 1953 with the same educational philosophy as the original program: to truly touch young people, they would have to experience Judaism through their senses–through art, music, Israeli folk dance and drama. In the nearly 60 years since, we have added sports, nature, and interactive learning to the repertoire of experiences we offer our campers. Both Camp Alonim and B.C.I. are still thriving today and run simultaneously during the summer months in separate areas of the Brandeis-Bardin property.

We welcome families and campers who come from all backgrounds and levels of Jewish observance.  Because we are a community camp and not affiliated with a particular movement or denomination, you will find many different kinds of families here—each with its own way of identifying with Judaism.

In our history of over 65 summers, over 30,000 “Alonimers” have called camp their home away from home.  Alonimers often have a passionate love for Jewish culture, a sense of responsibility to the community at large, and the hardy confidence that only comes from the unique experience of Jewish camping.

Name: Southland Christian Church
Description: We are courageous followers of Jesus who love God and love people. We are a large community of believers with places of worship covering central Kentucky including Danville, Georgetown, Lexington, Nicholasville, and Richmond. Visit any one of our Christian church services each Sunday or join us online!

Name: kerksondermure
Description:
Kerksondermure is'n Afrikaansprekende, insluitende gemeenskap in Centrurion en Midstream wat saam die Jesuslewe ontdek.

In 'n seer wêreld waar eensaamheid en isolasie toeneem, is Kerksondermure daartoe verbind om outentieke vriendskappe te bou wat lewens beter en mooier maak. Navorsing bevestig wat gereeld dwarsdeur die Bybel gesê word: Mense wat deel is van gemeenskappe, veral geloofsgemeenskappe, is gelukkiger, gesonder en leef langer. 

As 'n gesonde en groeiende Afrikaanssprekende kerk in Gauteng is ons goed geposisioneer om saam, binne die pragtige raamwerk van God se droom vir ons, die Jesuslewe te ontdek.

Name: Pandit Jii
Description:
PanditJii.in was founded under the guidance of Pandit Acharya Chakradhar Shukla Ji, a renowned Vedic scholar with over 50 years of experience in Vedic rituals (Karmkand), pujas, and Bhagwat Katha. He has successfully performed 1 lakh+ Vedic Pujas and rituals and delivered over 100+ Bhagwat Kathas, bringing spiritual wisdom and peace to countless lives. Acharya Chakradhar Shukla Ji observed that people often face difficulties in finding Pandit Ji near them and struggle to get the right Pandit Ji on time for their rituals.

To address this challenge, he mentored his grandson, Rishabh Shukla, and together they launched the PanditJii.in portal. Their vision was to provide a reliable platform where people could easily book the best Pandit ji for puja at the right time and ensure all rituals are performed with authenticity and precision.

Today, PanditJii.in connects you with experienced Pandit Ji’s across India, offering hassle-free bookings for pujas like Griha Pravesh, Satyanarayan Katha, and more. With Acharya Chakradhar Shukla Ji’s guidance and Rishabh Shukla’s dedication, PanditJii.in has become the go-to platform for all your spiritual needs.

Find the best Pandit for your rituals easily with PanditJii.in—authenticity and convenience at your service!

Name: Amazing Facts Ministries
Description:
Amazing Facts Ministry is a ministry dedicated to sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ and the three angels’ messages of Revelation 14 to the entire world through television, radio, literature, live Bible and prophecy events, the internet, and evangelism.

Our vision is to proudly proclaim God’s word in such a distinct and compelling way that millions will accept Christ and follow Him.

Canada is the second largest country in the world, with a population of only 33 million. Its population density is among the lowest in the world. And we must use the media to reach those people spread across this great country of ours.

People from all over the world live in Canada; 16% of Canadians are immigrants. We have two official languages; English and French, but at the same time other non-official languages are widely used in Canada such as: Chinese, Punjabi, Italian, German and Russian.

Our core ministry beliefs can be summarized in the following ways:
1. The Bible is God's Word, the only rule of faith and practice for the Christian.
2. Jesus Christ is the eternal Son of God and is man’s only Savior.
3. Salvation comes as a free gift of grace through the shed blood of Jesus.
4. God calls believers to accept Christ not only as their Savior from sin, but also as the Lord and ruler of their lives.
5. Bible prophecy reveals that we are living in the last days and that Jesus is soon to return.

Name: KOINÈ - ITALIAN EXHIBITION GROUP
Description: Koinè, febbraio 2025 a Vicenza è la principale fiera del mondo religioso. Koinè nasce con l'obiettivo di connettere il mondo della produzione, della distribuzione, del design e della liturgia. Propone eventi di formazione e convegni per professionisti dell'edilizia di culto su temi come architettura Sacra, recupero dei beni ecclesiastici, valorizzazione dei territori, turismo spirituale. A Koinè sono visionabili Mostre di Arte Sacra e di Design di prestigio internazionale.

Name: Mt. Zion Baptist Church
Description: Mt. Zion Baptist Church was established in 1921.  We are a fast-growing church with an emphasis on our community.  Our vision is A Vibrant Community Living By Faith.  Our mission is Empowering People to Transform Themselves and the Community.  Dr. Addis Moore has been the pastor of Mt. Zion since 1995.

Name: Fifth Avenue Presbyterian Church
Description:
A diverse, curious, inclusive community of faith at the corner of Fifth Avenue and 55th Street in midtown Manhattan.

Mission:
Fifth Avenue Presbyterian Church exists to continue the earthly ministry of Jesus Christ by recruiting disciples for the kingdom of God, renewing disciples in their faith commitment and reaching out in love and compassion to a world in need.

Description:
We of Fifth Avenue Presbyterian Church will be a relevant servant church that makes a difference for Christ in the lives of people of this city and around the world by utilizing our strategic location at the crossroads of the world in New York City.

General Information:
Fifth Avenue Presbyterian Church is located at the corner of Fifth Avenue and 55th Street in midtown Manhattan. The congregation was founded in 1808 and has been worshiping and serving at the current location since 1875. We are a vibrant, diverse, inclusive congregation of 2,000 members, part of the Presbyterian Church (USA).

Services at 9:30 am in the Chapel with Sunday School and 11:00 am in the Sanctuary with child care. The Sacrament of the Lord's Supper is usually celebrated on the first Sunday of each month.

Senior Pastor - Rev. Dr. Scott Black Johnston

Name: Word of Faith Family Worship Cathedral
Description: Word of Faith Family Worship Cathedral is an interdenominational church based out of Austell, Georgia, where Bishop Dale C. Bronner is Founder and Senior Pastor.

Name: Covenant Evangelical Free Church
Description: Covenant Evangelical Free Church is an Intentional Disciplemaking Church that is called to return the Church to its disciplemaking roots through authentic discipleship and intentional disciplemaking so as to reproduce disciples of “a certain kind” and to multiply them to win the world for Christ!

Name: Faith 2 Faith Ministries, Inc.
Description: f2fmi is spreading the gospel through youth centered, community based outreach in partnership with the church.

Name: SeekersHub Global Islamic Seminary (Legacy Page)
Description:
SeekersHub Global Islamic Seminary endeavours to nurture individuals to manifest the guidance of the Qur’an and Prophetic teachings in their own life.

SeekersHub is a non-profit Islamic educational portal. It is our mission to make sound knowledge from reliable scholars available anywhere, at any time, through online courses, on-the-ground seminars, engaging and inspiring Islamic media and through our Answers service — completely free of cost, with our Knowledge without Barriers initiative.

Name: Capital Fellows
Description:
The Capital Fellows Program is a Christian leadership and discipleship program for recent college graduates. The program runs from September through May and is hosted at McLean Presbyterian Church, just inside the Washington D.C. beltway. Through graduate courses, a paid internship, one-on-one mentoring and many leadership and community service opportunities, the Capital Fellows are challenged to integrate a Christian worldview into all areas of their lives.

The program focuses on four core pillars of development:

     - Vocation & Calling
     - Leadership Development
     - Service
     - Community

Name: Billy Graham Evangelistic Association UK
Description:
The Billy Graham Evangelistic Association of the United Kingdom (BGEA UK) is well known for the powerful evangelism or outreach ministry of our founder, Billy Graham, his son Franklin Graham and grandson Will Graham. Their mission is our mission: Proclaiming the Gospel of the Lord Jesus Christ to all we can by every effective means available to us, and equipping others to do the same.

Christ offers hope, encouragement and the gift of eternal life. The BGEA UK is committed to proclaiming His message through a broad range of regional, national and international ministries using methods and language that inspire, whatever the age group or culture. To achieve our mission, we join with local churches and Christian communities forging lasting partnerships to bring the Good News through both word and deed.

Name: Chesterton House
Description:
Chesterton House is a center for Christian studies at Cornell University. We exist to facilitate the discovery of the intellectual riches of the historic Christian faith, thereby empowering more faithful Christian living. We do this through our distinguished public lecture series, our residential living centers and the courses we offer in biblical, theological, cultural, and ethical studies.

Chesteton House is also a registered student organization at Cornell University

Name: Second Baptist Church, Springfield, MO
Description: At Second, we're committed to providing a safe and welcoming place to gather, worship, study God's Word together, and participate in intentional outreach — all rooted in the Bible and tailored to a multi-generational congregation.

Name: Reformed Evangelical Seminary
Description:
Reformed Evangelical Seminary's mission is to "assist the church in equipping pastors and leaders for orthodoxy and orthopraxy rooted in Reformed catholicity." 

The Seminary’s flagship program is its online Master of Divinity (M.Div.) degree. The M.Div. requires completion of 45 2-credit courses, or 90 credits. It can be completed in three years of full-time study or six years of half-time study. Pastoral mentoring and in-church ministry training are required components of the program. Designed for current and aspiring pastors, the program includes advanced studies and mentorship in Bible, theology, and practica for preaching, counseling, and ministry. Studies in biblical Hebrew and Greek are required. Pastoral mentoring and in-church ministry training and other supervised learning experiences are required parts of the program. 

Regular tuition is $200 per credit hour or $400 per typical 2-credit course. The audit fee is $100 (non-refundable). We offer a $50 “Listener’s Pass” (and a $250 group rate for M.Div. courses is available for five or more listeners from Church Partner congregations). 

RES offers substantial education and tuition benefits to its Church Partner and Global Associate congregations (https://revseminary.com/church-partnerships; https://revseminary.com/global-church-associates).

RES is governed by a seven-member Board of Directors, which consists of ordained and experienced Christian pastors and church leaders serving in the Communion of Reformed Evangelical Churches (CREC; https://revseminary.com/administration). 

Reformed Evangelical Seminary has been granted exempt status by the State of Oregon to offer theological and/or religious occupations degrees. 

Reformed Evangelical Seminary is not accredited by a U.S. government-recognized accrediting body. While we recognize the value of peer accreditation in higher education for institutional and programmatic quality assurance and accountability, RES is not accredited at this time.

Name: CHRISTIAN MILITARY FELLOWSHIP
Description: Christian Military Fellowship (CMF) is an association of believers who are committed to encouraging Men and Women in the United States Armed Forces, and their families, to love and serve the Lord Jesus Christ. CMF involves all elements of that society including all ranks, family members, veterans, retirees, and civilian employees.  Within the military society, our members, staff and constituents work to introduce people to Jesus Christ and help Christians to grow in faith.

Name: Calvary Presbyterian Church, San Francisco
Description:
Calvary's congregation is an open community seeking to grow in Christian faith through connecting with Christ, one another, fellow citizens of San Francisco and the Bay Area, and people throughout the world. Visitors are welcome to be part of all our activities -- we invite you to explore Calvary’s many opportunities for worship, study, fellowship and service to others.

Calvary is actively engaged in community service around the Bay Area  and is a strong advocate of social justice both locally and around the world. 

Learn more at our website:
https://calvarypresbyterian.org
and on Facebook:
http://www.facebook.com/calvarypresbyterian

Name: Henderson Hills Baptist Church
Description: Henderson Hills is a diverse family of surrendered and transformed people who passionately love God and others. By God’s grace, our world will be changed because we are here. Our vision is to glorify God by becoming a hub for an all-ages disciple-making movement—seeing lives transformed in Edmond, building a network of neighborhood churches in the OKC metro, planting churches in our nation, and sending everyday missionaries to gateway cities among the nations.

Name: Emmanuel Faith Community Church
Description:
We are a church of 3000+ attenders committed to "honoring God by living like Jesus." With more than 75 years of history in North San Diego County, we are a church family that is growing in our knowledge of Christ and His Word, seeking to live out the Gospel in our everyday lives.  As we are transformed through His work on the cross, we are prepared to communicate His love for the world around us through our words and deeds.

With ministries designed to encourage and serve all ages, we invite you to come and visit us.

Name: Executive Pastor Online
Description:
I’m interested in helping church leaders figure out how to accomplish their missions using basic, fundamental leadership principles that I believe are critical to success. 

I regularly write on church leadership and infrastructure development, including specifics on leadership technique and the details of implementing systems, processes, and methods that enable the church to succeed. I will also, on occasion, share my thoughts on a variety of other related topics, sharing some of my passion for reaching the lost, helping people learn about and experience the love of Christ.

My goal is to create insightful, relevant content that you can put to work in your ministry. If you are in a position of leadership in the church, we should connect.

Name: Dhuha Reminders
Description: A page that brings you daily Islamic reminders from the Glorious Qur’an, Hadith and Sunnah of the Prophet (SAW) and wordings of Islamic scholars

Name: The Labouré Society
Description:
Help build up the Kingdom of God! With the support of generous, faith-filled Catholics, The Labouré Society provides financial assistance and spiritual support to men and women who must resolve student loans in order to pursue their vocations to the priesthood and/or religious life in the Catholic Church. Labouré's unique program includes human formation, tangible skills, and evangelization experience. Program alumni and their dioceses / religious communities tell us they enter formation not only debt-free, but better prepared for the priesthood and consecrated life.

Since our founding in 2003, we've awarded more than $10.5 million in financial assistance, and have helped over 400 individuals answer God's call. We invite you to join us in helping rescue vocations!

Name: Ignite Texas
Description:
Ignite is a four-day retreat for incoming freshmen and transfer students who are looking to find Christian community at the University of Texas. With a band and speaker, small group time, and fun camp traditions, the retreat not only provides students with friends and community before arriving to campus, but also gives them the tools they need to seek spiritual growth during their time at UT.

Our purpose is to glorify the Lord by serving incoming students and showing them their first glimpse of the body of Christ at the University of Texas. At retreat, the Ministry Fair introduces campers to many churches and Christian organizations in Austin, allowing them to see God’s influence both on campus and in the city.

Name: N.T. Wright Online
Description:
N.T. Wright Online is an online course series based on the teachings of Prof. N.T. Wright. These courses contain video lecture material, written material to augment the videos, textbook recommendations, assessment tools, and discussion sections so you can dialogue online with fellow students from around the world.

Our courses are made possible through the collaboration between N.T. Wright, Professor at St. Andrews University, Scotland, and David Seemuth, Ph.D., Executive Director of the Wisconsin Center for Christian Study. The courses are not affiliated with St. Andrews University and carry no formal credit, but are meant to be sources of enrichment for those who choose to participate in the classes.

NOTE: Registered 501c3 non-profit organization
Courses developed for N.T. Wright Online are made possible by the generous donations of people who support the Wisconsin Center for Christian Study, Inc., a registered 501c3 non-profit organization. Tuition paid enables us to provide scholarships for those in need and allows us to fund new courses and translations of existing courses, and we are able to offer courses at significant discounts. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at courses@ntwrightonline.org

Name: Fox River Christian Church
Description:
A Bible based Christian church, Fox River is a non-denominational church in Wisconsin with three locations - Waukesha, Muskego and Waterford. We offer contemporary worship and messages from God's word with real life application. We welcome everyone to come as you are and join us at one of our weekend worship services or any of our many events.
Staff, residency, and internship positions are available. Update posting can be found on the church’s webpage: https://foxriverchristian.org/jobs/

Name: Eglise Protestante Unie de l'Etoile
Description: Une paroisse protestante à Paris, qui se veut intelligente et ouverte à tous

Name: Inspetoria Salesiana São Pio X
Description:
A Inspetoria Salesiana São Pio X é uma das 88 sedes províncias da Sociedade de São Francisco de Sales, congregação religiosa masculina da Igreja Católica Apostólica Romana, fundada em Roma em 1859, por São João Bosco, e aprovada, em 1874, pelo Papa Pio IX.

A Inspetoria Salesiana tem como primeiros e principais destinatários os jovens, especialmente os mais pobres e em situação de risco, os jovens trabalhadores e aqueles que se encaminham para o trabalho, e vocações apostólicas. Trabalhamos nos ambientes populares e entre os povos ainda não evangelizados, dando atenção aos leigos evangelizadores, à família e à comunicação social. Proporcionamos um ambiente de ampla acolhida, aberto a grande diversidade de jovens e com variadas propostas educativas e de evangelização. A característica mais marcante das nossas propostas é o protagonismo juvenil, além da forte conexão entre educadores e jovens, tornando possível a presença missionária no mundo e na sociedade como um todo.

Atualmente, a Inspetoria do Sul do Brasil, como é também chamada, conta com 81 salesianos distribuídos em 13 cidades dos estados do Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina e do Paraná. Esses Salesianos animam e dirigem os grupos da Família Salesiana, as Casas de Formação (Seminários), atuam na Rede Salesiana de Escolas, Rede Salesiana de Ensino Superior, Rede Salesiana de Obras Sociais (Oratório e Centro Juvenil), Rede Salesiana de Paróquias, entre outras atividades educativas e evangelizadoras. A congregação é composta por irmãos de vida consagrada, que fazem votos simples de castidade, pobreza e obediência. Os salesianos podem optar pelo sacerdócio, de modo que existem padres e irmãos salesianos.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Isaiah 61.TV
Description: Isaiah 61.TV is a Christian Television Streaming network spreading the saving message of the Gospel to millions around the globe. No limitations and no boundaries.

Name: HILLCREST LUTHERAN ACADEMY
Description: Hillcrest has been established for over 100 years, offering Classical Christian Education.  Beginning in 2020, our education expanded to students in grades PreSchool - 12th Grade.  We offer both Boarding and Day School opportunities for Local, Domestic and International Students.

Name: Baptist Mid-Missions
Description: The Baptist Mid-Missions Family exists to strategically advance the building of Christ’s church, with His passion and for His glory, in vital partnership with Baptist churches worldwide.

Name: Apostolate for Family Consecration
Description: The Apostolate for Family Consecration (AFC) is a private association of Christ's faithful founded in 1975 by Jerry and Servant of God Gwen Coniker. Inspired by Pope St. John Paul II and Our Lady's Fatima message, the AFC promotes Family Consecration to Jesus, through Mary, in union with St. Joseph as the best way for families to grow in holiness. The AFC offers Catholic family vacations, retreats, and resources to lead families to an encounter with Jesus and form them in the truths of our Catholic Faith.

Name: Ev.-luth. Landeskirche in Braunschweig
Description: 4.000 beruflich Beschäftigte und 16.000 Ehrenamtliche engagieren sich in der Landeskirche Braunschweig. Zu ihr zählen 274.000 Mitglieder in 239 Gemeinden und 11 Propsteien zwischen Wolfsburg und Bad Harzburg, Peine und Helmstedt sowie in den Exklaven Calvörde und Blankenburg. Die Landeskirche Braunschweig ist in Verkündigung und Seelsorge und durch viele diakonische Einrichtungen für die Menschen in der Region da. Auf ihrem Gebiet stehen 400 Kirchen und Kapellen, darunter historisch wertvolle Gebäude wie der Braunschweiger Dom oder die Wolfenbütteler Hauptkirche.

Name: Parish Network
Description:
Parish Network is a network of house churches in Tulsa, OK—a church of churches. 

We are made up of churches planted in Tulsa neighborhoods that meet on Sunday nights for a meal, fellowship, prayer and teaching.

Name: Iglesia Adventista del Septimo Dia
Description: Iglesia Adventista del Septimo Dia is a religious institutions company based out of a 6-70, , Cl. 32 #62, Montería, Colombia.

Name: Sunset International Bible Institute (SIBI)
Description: Sunset International Bible Institute began in 1962 and has trained thousands of preachers and missionaries to carry the Gospel to the world.

Name: International House Of Prayer Atlanta
Description:
In October of 2004, we started IHOP Atlanta with trembling in our hearts, yet hopeful that the Lord would indeed build His house of prayer. We started with 40 hours a week of worship and prayer and as God added new people, we added more prayer. In a short period of time, we expanded our weekly prayer meetings to cover 75 hours and later, 120 hours a week.

We were amazed as God continued to bring people who, in spite of their own human weakness, were committed to giving themselves to the vision of night and day prayer. On February 12, 2006 what was previously only a dream became a reality, as the IHOP Atlanta prayer room was expanded to cover 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The prayer meeting that started on February 12, 2006 continues to this day, without ceasing. God has continued to gather people from around the nation to see that the fire on the altar never goes out. It's astounding to think that there has never been a worship-led prayer meeting that continued unabated for this length of time in our city, until now! Prayer and worship never cease to arise from our city to our great God.

Name: Fellowship Missionary Baptist Church
Description: We fulfill our ministry as we preach and teach, pray and empower, forgive and reconcile. FMBC seeks only to be God’s agent of healing and wholeness in a wounded and fragmented community, to be a congregation where all members are ministered to and where youth are valued and religiously educated to live a balanced and fruitful life.

Name: Grace Covenant Church
Description:
Grace Covenant Church is devoted to loving God and people, leading them to Christ, and helping them be more like Him.

Check out our website or find us on Facebook at facebook.com/GraceCovenantChurch or on Twitter at @GraceSocial.

We hope that you visit our community, and prayerfully consider making this church family yours. You'll see that we're a lot like you — on a spiritual journey, seeking significance in our relationship with God and people around us.

Name: Living Faith International Church
Description: Church and headquarters for International Ministry including churches and Bible schools

Name: Be Real With God! Ministries
Description:
Be Real With God! Ministries is the ministry I use to initiate new ground into understanding the scriptures and how they affect the global worldview to make a connection by using current popular culture.

         Leading as senior pastor/shepherd in the preaching, fellowship, and visitation outreach in introducing God's Word to the community and the world.
         Serving as a floating teacher/assistant shepherd for Sunday Morning Class for First Baptist Church Atlanta Adult Life Ministries.
         Serving as Career Club Networking Group Career Club Shepherd/Host for jobseekers in career transition.
         Hosting Career Club on the Apex Christian Singles Fellowship ZOOM Video Conferencing platform.
         Serving as a "Networking Pastor" where job seekers are encouraged, counseled, and directed in their career.
         Recently acknowledged by Al Smith, “the HIRED! guy,” in his book “HIRED! Every Employment Method”.

         Ministry Specialties: Senior Pastor, Pastor, Shepherd, Shepherding, Associate Pastor, Minister, Pastoral Care, Preaching, Biblical Teaching, Biblical Studies, Prayer Warrior, Apologetics, Christian Apologetics, Evangelist, Christian Theology, Bible, Gospel, Community Outreach, Friend, Spiritual Warfare, Church Growth, Homiletics, Local Missions, Church Events, Discipleship, Theologian, Philosophy, Christian, Christian Business Owner, Spiritual Direction, Lifestyle Coaching, Volunteer Management, Conflict Resolution, Pastoral Theology, Religion, and Non-profits.

         Media Specialties: Journalist, Emmy Award Winning, Researcher, Networking, Social Media, Storytelling, Multimedia Management, Producer, Event Management, Publicity, Problem

Name: First Corinthian Baptist Church
Description:
Harlem, New York based Baptist Church with a membership younger than most similar churches. Our Senior Pastor is Michael A. Walrond, Jr. and our Executive Pastor is LaKeesha Walrond.
 
We are defined by our Purpose Statement that "We are an ever evolving community of Visionaries and Dreamers who have been Called by God to live the lives we were created to live; Commanded by God to love beyond the limits of our Prejudices and Commissioned by God to Serve. Our membership is now close to 6,000 and growing.

Name: Trans-European Division of Seventh-day Adventists
Description:
The Trans-European Division is comprised of 22 European countries.

Our mission is to help our fields achieve substantial and long-term growth by providing exceptional service and witness.

On our journey of hope, we will build a growing community of disciples that are one in Christ - diverse yet inclusive, open to the needs of people, active, caring, learning and communicative - to build God's kingdom in unity and develop each person's life in an awareness of God's presence through the Holy Spirit.

Name: NewPointe Community Church
Description:
OUR MISSION AT NEWPOINTE IS TO INSPIRE PEOPLE TO FOLLOW JESUS. 

We work to realize this mission by creating relevant environments that are designed to encourage and equip people to pursue 3 vital relationships: connecting with God, connecting with others, and connecting others to God.

As a church, we hold to specific values that guide, shape, and uphold all of these efforts. 

BIBLICAL AUTHORITY
We believe the Bible is God’s Word and is without flaw. Therefore it is our ultimate standard.

SERVING OTHERS
We are called to be spiritual contributors not spiritual consumers. We believe the church does not exist for us; we are the church and we exist for the world.

SACRIFICE
We give up things we love for the things we love even more. We believe it is more blessed to give than to receive – through our service and giving.

PEOPLE
We believe God is active in every person’s life. It’s the church’s role to equip individuals to respond to this.

CONNECTING WITH GOD
God is the ultimate power source for personal transformation. Lasting life change happens through intentional pursuit of Him.

ACCOUNTABILITY
There is power in full grace and complete truth, which is best experienced in authentic community. Doing life alone is deadly.

We know that coming to a new church can be overwhelming, but knowing what to expect can help make things easier. Everything at NewPointe is designed with you in mind. Through the use of engaging music, relevant messages, and creative environments, we strive to be a place where you and your family can connect with God.

Name: Trinity Church in the City of Boston
Description: Trinity Church in the City of Boston, located in the Back Bay of Boston, Massachusetts, is a parish of the Episcopal Diocese of Massachusetts. The congregation, currently standing at approximately 3,000 households, was founded in 1733. In addition to worship, the parish is actively involved in service to the community, pastoral care, programs for children and teenagers, and Christian education for all ages.

Name: Annunciation Greek Orthodox Church
Description:
The Annunciation Greek Orthodox Church in Kansas City is part of the Greek Orthodox Archdiocese of America, the Holy Metropolis of Denver, under the spiritual guidance of His Eminence Metropolitan Isaiah of Denver.

Our mission is to love God with all our heart, soul, strength and mind and our neighbors as ourselves.

While this parish was established in downtown Kansas City over 100 years ago in 1910 and has been in its present location since the late 1970s, Orthodox Christianity has spanned the globe since 33 AD. Annunciation Greek Orthodox Church was originally founded by a small group of Greek immigrants, but today aptly reflects the American experience, and is comprised of individuals and families representing many other nationalities all witnessing to the Good News of Jesus Christ, striving to reflect His love, and living according to the principles and discipline of the Orthodox Church.

Today, the Annunciation in Kansas City is a vibrant community of men and women from every background and age, adhering to Orthodox Christian principles that are concurrently Scriptural, Traditional, Apostolic and Eucharistic. This Church family continually searches for dynamic ways to serve the Lord, manifest the light of Christ to the world and try to address the needs of all of God’s people.

Name: Camp Bernadette and Camp Fatima
Description: A joyful Catholic community offering a fun, active camping experience and a sense of belonging for all.

Name: Blue Ridge Fellows
Description: The Blue Ridge Fellows Program is a transformative nine-month experience for recent college graduates, designed to help them kickstart their professional careers, anchored in Jesus. Through an engaging, gospel-focused curriculum, participants learn to integrate their faith in Christ into every aspect of their lives and work.

Name: FaithChurch.com
Description: FaithChurch.com is a multi-state, multi-campus church with 20,000 members across 8 campuses in St. Louis, Missouri & West Palm Beach, Florida. Led by Lead Pastors David & Nicole Crank.

Name: URJ Camp Coleman
Description:
Camp Coleman, a program of the Union for Reform Judaism, serves campers from the Southeast United States from Tennessee and the Carolinas through Georgia and Florida.

Our mission is to inspire campers and staff to be caring, committed, and connected to the Jewish community through an extraordinary camp experience.

Committed to core values of respect, peace, community and kindness, we build a warm and caring community where campers have fun and experience the excitement and warmth of belonging to a Reform Jewish community. We look with pride to the thousands of young people who have formed lasting friendships and called Camp Coleman home for more than 50 years.

URJ Camp Coleman allows our children to live a wholly Jewish life while at camp. Campers can experience Jewish culture and tradition while in a safe, challenging and fun environment. In a natural setting, campers are given the opportunity to explore their Judaism. Coleman provides a creative setting for Jewish living and learning, through camp programming. At Camp Coleman campers and staff can develop lifelong friendships.

Name: Congregation Beth Sholom
Description:
Congregation Beth Sholom is committed to traditional and egalitarian Jewish practice, encouraging everyone to find their unique Jewish path. With Shabbat at our core, our vibrant congregation is a lifelong home for individuals and families across generations to discover, deepen and express their Jewish identity through learning, ritual, service and enriched community life.

You will leave each encounter at Congregation Beth Sholom feeling enriched, relevant and with a sense of belonging.

Name: The Mainstay Foundation - UK
Description:
The Mainstay Foundation works with trusted partners across the globe, providing developmental aid, educational programmes and faith-strengthening initiatives. As Shia Muslims, our faith guides us to pursue knowledge and education for the betterment of the human condition.

Our pioneering projects across East Africa, India, the Middle East, Europe and North America have touched hundreds of thousands of lives, and we remain committed to evaluating and partnering with organisations that share our vision. As guardians of conviction, we are dedicated to building on our community’s successes and facilitating collaborative progress and development for a brighter future for all humanity.

Our mission is to assist in the advancement of Shia Muslim communities globally in the areas of Religion, Education and Development.

Name: Greenhouse Church
Description:
We see churches of real disciples, not part-time believers … people that love God as Father, follow Him as Rabbi, and honor Him as King … people that give themselves for one another, and the cause of the lost and the least.

…churches of passion … people who stand so amazed at God’s grace that they can’t help but live lives of adventure and generosity. We see God leading us to spend ourselves for those who could never pay us back … strong with children, students, missions, and the poor. We have been sent.

… churches where people feel like they can belong before they believe and believe before they behave. We also see bodies with too much brown to be called a white church, and too much Hispanic to be called a black church; with too many kids to be called an old church, and too many wise ones to be called a young church – churches that model the diversity of God’s kingdom.

… congregations that love God with more than Sundays and care for people with more than words. We see characteristically Spirit-filled churches that move in undeniable power yet stay non-religious and creative. We see churches where people become whole – in spirit, soul, and body.

… communities where the potential of all the members get realized, as people recognize that they are called, whether they work in a church building or the marketplace. We see teams that are led by people who are greater on the inside than they are on the outside.

… a movement of disciples who reorient their lives around Jesus’ call to make more disciples. We see a multiplying network of churches and microchurches that unashamedly and fiercely love their neighbor both locally and globally. We see ordinary people mobilized to go and change the world.

… mentoring churches and missions outposts, worshipping families and authentic communities. We see houses of prayer. We see a church as supernatural as its Master, because He promised nothing less.

Name: MKA USA
Description:
Majlis Khuddamul Ahmadiyya (MKA) is the name of the youth auxiliary of the greater Worldwide Ahmadiyya Muslim Community. 

The name "Majlis Khuddamul Ahmadiyya" is derived from its roots in Arabic. Translated into English, it literally means, "Group of the Servants of Ahmadiyya." Ahmadiyya Muslim (or Ahmadi Muslim) is the name given to those who are members of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community in Islam.

Members of the Ahmadiyya Community are Muslims who believe in the Messiah, Hadhrat Mirza Ghulam Ahmad (as) of Qadian, India. In 1889, Hadhrat Mirza Ghulam Ahmad, the Promised Messiah (as), established the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community with a notion that "members of this Community would show something distinctive in their day-to-day behaviors."

As the Worldwide Ahmadiyya Muslim Community grew, so too did the demands of the organization. Hadhrat Mirza Bashiruddin Mahmood Ahmad (ra), the second Khalifa or Successor to the Promised Messiah, created several organizations periodically to fulfill these growing needs. On February 4th, 1938, he established Majlis Khuddamul Ahmadiyya; a culmination of the great characteristics found in previously established organizations of the community.

Name: ISKCON Bhiwandi
Description: ISKCON has been at the forefront of charity and social welfare through their various temples across the city and their ‘Food for Life’ is one such significant initiative that aims at fighting hunger with nutritious, Stavik meals served to the underprivileged in its vicinity. ISKCON’s Bhiwandi temple is leading one such significant ‘Food For Life’ program, serving up to 1000 free meals per day, every day, since March 2020, to the daily wage workers and warehouse labourers, who are battling unemployment and poverty during COVID. Further, the meals prepared by the temple devotees on a daily basis, are hygienic, and made using Satvik ingredients, ensuring it nourishes not only the body but also the mind and soul! In addition to the free meals on a daily basis, the temple has also been conducting online sessions for stress and mental health management through meditations, chanting, and discourses on Bhagavad Gita, helping people find peace in these chaotic times.

Name: F.A.I
Description:
FAIT est une entreprise marocaine au service de l’industrie et de l’environnement.

Leader marocain dans le domaine de filtrage pour les secteurs présentant un risque d’émission de particules, ICT ENVIRONNEMENT apporte des solutions éco-efficientes de pointe pour améliorer la compétitivité des entreprises et réduire leur impact sur l’environnement.

ICT ENVIRONNEMENT assure également l’installation, la mise en service et l'entretien des chaudières, et toutes les activités relatives à la technologie de l’huile thermique. Notre but est d’obtenir la satisfaction de nos clients grâce à la qualité de nos services, et la pertinence de nos choix techniques qui nous permettent d’apporter des solutions optimales à tous les problèmes de chauffage de l’industrie.

Name: Turun ja Kaarinan seurakuntayhtymä
Description:
Turun ja Kaarinan seurakuntayhtymä on yli 142 000 jäsenen yhteisö, jonka arkeen ja juhlaan haluamme tuoda uskoa, toivoa ja rakkautta. Meillä työskentelee noin 450 henkilöä. Tavoitteenamme on olla aina vain parempi työnantaja ja työyhteisö nykyisille ja tuleville työntekijöillemme.

Turun ja Kaarinan seurakuntayhtymä koostuu yhtymän eri yksiköistä sekä yhdeksästä suomenkielisestä seurakunnasta ja yhdestä ruotsinkielisestä seurakunnasta. Seurakuntayhtymänä olemme olleet olemassa vuodesta 1921. Seurakunnilla on tällä alueella lähes tuhatvuotiset juuret.

Strategisia painopistealueitamme ovat ihmisläheisyys ja osallisuus kirkossa, viestinnän kehittäminen, ilmastonmuutoksen torjuminen, laadukas johtaminen ja henkilöstön työhyvinvointi sekä taloudellisten toimintaedellytysten turvaaminen.

* * * 

Åbo och S:t Karins kyrkliga samfällighet är en gemenskap som består av tio församlingar: nio finskpråkiga och en svenskspråkig. Tillsammans har vi över 142 000 medlemmar. Vi vill bygga en kyrka som genomsyras av tro, hopp och kärlek. En kyrka där alla ska känna sig välkomna med i byggänget, vare sig man är nyfiken nybörjare, van församlingsaktiv, engagerad förtroendevald eller församlingsanställd. Ta gärna kontakt om du vill komma med!

* * *
Turku and Kaarina Parish Union is formed by nine Finnish speaking parishes and one Swedish speaking parish and by the Parish Union’s different units. Our mission is to bring love, faith and hope to the everyday life and celebrations of the people in Turku and Kaarina.

* * *

Tällä sivulla julkaisemme paitsi rekrytointi-ilmoituksia myös kuulumisia ja uutisia toiminnastamme.

Name: Full-Time Training in Indonesia
Description:
The Full-Time Training in Indonesia (FTTI) is a two-year post-baccalaureate program that equips men and women of faith for a life of service in their respective churches and communities.

At the conclusion of the program, graduates pursue advanced degrees at leading graduate school, enter the work force in their pre-training fields, or serve with their full-time. In any event, the goal of this Training is to produce individuals that cultivate a healthy spiritual life and are actively involved in their respective churches.

Name: Storyhill Church
Description: Our mission is simple. To Love God, to love people, and to keep Christ in the center of all we do. Our pursuit of that mission happens on two fronts...organizationally (through a set of foundational Christian practices) and individually (with a set of shared “callings” toward the example Jesus set).

Name: Training Kings
Description:
Training Kings is a Christian business network that helps men and women grow their businesses in order to help fund the Great Commission given by Jesus Christ.  We do this by providing platforms for people to network and by delivering training workshops to members.

We meet regularly and all members give a short introduction about themselves and what kind of business they are looking for. Then there is a prayer of blessing over everybody before members network, build relationships and pass business referrals to one another.

We also have regular training workshops around Sales, Marketing, Investing Money, Business and Personal Development. All these workshops are delivered in an ethical and God honouring way often with biblical themed principles throughout.

Samuel Leeds is the founder of Training Kings and was captivated by the verses in Isaiah 58 that talk about loosing chains of injustice, feeding the hungry, clothing the naked and bringing the good news of Jesus to the world.

When deciding how to most effectively live out this Great Commission he believed God told him to use everything he had been given by God to do this. Samuel believed he had a business mind so set up a property business. Alongside his business he spent two years to study theology and train for the ministry full time at Birmingham Bible Institute.

Within five years he became financially free through his systemised property business. Along the way he helped launch the Walsall Youth For Christ Project and travelled to many parts of the world with numerous charities helping the poor and bringing the love of Jesus to many.

We invite you to join us at our next networking event.  For further information visit www.trainingkings.co.uk

Name: Capuchin Franciscan Province of St. Joseph
Description: The Capuchins are an international community of friars modeling themselves after St. Francis of Assisi.  The brothers of the Capuchin Province of St. Joseph, headquartered in Detroit, serve in a variety of ministries including social service, schools, chaplaincy, retreat house and parishes in Michigan, Wisconsin, Illinois, Montana, Arizona and Nicaragua.

Name: City Harvest Church
Description:
City Harvest Church was birthed in 1989 to bring God’s love to the lost and broken. Located in Singapore, this congregation transcends societal boundaries, engaging individuals through its contemporary worship services, cell groups, and a commitment to serve the poor through its community initiatives. Additionally, its webcast brings the gospel to a global audience on a weekly basis. 

CHC’s passion for developing strong local churches is evidenced by its 153 branches and affiliates worldwide, collectively known as The Harvest Network. Its School of Theology has graduated over 8,000 students since 1994, equipping each with a profound love for God’s Word and a heart for revival. With a vision of reaching Asia for Christ, mission teams are sent fortnightly to engage unreached people groups.

As a Pentecostal church, the story of CHC is one of partnership with the Holy Spirit, ushering divine love, holiness, and power to people, and drawing them into a life-transforming union with God.

Name: St. Anthony of Padua Catholic Church - The Woodlands
Description: St. Anthony of Padua Catholic Church is a vibrant, diverse parish located in The Woodlands, TX. We are proud to serve our community with beautiful, reverent Masses, a bustling food pantry, thriving community groups, and so much more.

Bethel School of Supernatural Ministry

Name: Lighthouse Church
Description: Services at Lighthouse Church are vibrant and contemporary. Filled with powerful teachings, passionate praise & worship and active relationships, Lighthouse Church sees literally hundreds of people come through our doors over the weekend. Why not come along and check it out for yourself and find a place full of Real People, Doing Good, God's Way...

Name: Unity of Boulder Spiritual Center
Description:
Embracing Diversity, United by the Truth of Love...A Positive Path for Spiritual Living. 

Unity focuses on the message that unites, and brings us together.  No matter who we are or what we believe, we are all bound by the same Truth – we are made in the image and likeness of God.  Folks come here to celebrate that.  We know people can find divisive, controversial topics anywhere, in the news, in social media.  And there are all kinds of spiritual and religious leaders out there who are quick to tell you how to live your life.  But as for our spiritual home, this is where we let all of that go and just be present with that oneness that already exists, empowering us to create the life we want to live. 

We know the world is changing and it’s easy to focus on the negative, but who does that really benefit!? The good news is that change is a necessary part of humanity's spiritual evolution and there are attainable solutions to our problems. We believe that we will find these solutions through love, a united purpose, and prayer, which will bring about a better result than our egos alone could ever contrive.   We trust in the higher consciousness to do the work of God’s divine purpose in the world, just like it has done and continues to do in each of us. And we are dedicated to being that change we wish to see in the world.  

Come join us this Sunday at our 9:00 a.m. or 11:00 a.m. service or our Saturday evening Service at 5pm, and see for yourself what we have to offer. Our goal is to make everyone feel welcome and part of the family as soon as they step in the door!  We look forward to meeting you.

Name: The Georgia Tech Catholic Center
Description:
The Georgia Tech Catholic Center ministers to the students, faculty, alumni and friends of Georgia Tech.  Our Mission is to provide a thriving community for individuals to encounter Christ in the Liturgy, the Sacraments, Formation and Discipleship, and Christian Service.  We strive to form intentional disciples of our Lord.

We are 100% self-sustaining through the generosity of Alumni and friends of the Catholic Center.

Name: Wakefield Cathedral
Description:
Wakefield Cathedral exists in order to worship God and point others to him. We seek to help people live as disciples of Jesus Christ, and to share his love with the world. 

We are set in the heart of the city of Wakefield, and endeavour to offer a warm welcome to all who enter or pass by our doors. We have made public our desire that everyone who lives in Wakefield District will come inside at least once a year. We try to give priority to people who are needy or disadvantaged. 

We hope to be a place of conversation for people of all faiths and none, and a cultural hub in the city centre.

Name: LCMC
Description:
We’re Lutheran Congregations in Mission for Christ, and our name pretty much says it all.  We’re not a denomination, we’re a movement.  We view the local church as the place where people in the community come to get connected with God and one another.  We celebrate the fact that that everyone is wired a little differently; it allows each and every one of us to serve according to our own unique strengths, skills and talents.

We are free in Christ, accountable to one another, rooted in the Scriptures and the Lutheran Confessions, and all working together to fulfill Christ's Great Commission to go and make disciples of all nations.

Description:
Our passion is to meet people wherever they are on their spiritual journey and lead them into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ in order to change the world.

Live Loved | Live Linked | Live SENT

Name: God's Love International
Description:
Through the help of our Lord Jesus Christ we are founded to help others in time of major and minor disasters.  Our goal is to be able to provide relief to anywhere in the world within 24 hours of a major disaster.   


Here locally in United States we are to provide relief with food, clothing, shelter, educational, medical, and transportation expenses. 


We are funded through donations and grants.  Please see the donations page to make a differance with God.

Name: Montgomery Community Church
Description: We are a diverse community of believers who intentionally serve our community and world in order to share God's love and establish the next generation of believers.  We embrace the mission to "engage people to live and serve like Jesus", which means that everything we do and offer at MCC is designed to help people get involved, take next steps, and become passionate representatives of their faith.  We're conveniently located close to the intersection of I-275 and I-71.  Come visit us - we'd love to get to know you!

Name: CLC Ministries International
Description: CLC MINISTRIES INTERNATIONAL is a non-profit mission organization based out of Fort Washington, Pennsylvania, United States. We publish faithful Christian books for a deeper walk with Christ, and distribute Bibles and books in over 100 languages to reach the Nations among us. We desire to equip the church to boldly and faithfully reach their neighbors with the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Name: UWaterloo Muslim Alumni Society
Description: Our vision is to build an expansive network that empowers members to excel in career & faith through life-long connections & purposeful programming, such that they make meaningful contributions to society as leaders of their disciplines while preserving their religious identity

Name: Forum Dialog
Description:
Forum Dialog 

Forum Dialog ist eine bundesweit aktive Dialoginitiative, die auf ein friedliches Zusammenleben in Deutschland hinwirkt, in dem es Menschen mit unterschiedlichen Überzeugungen in Gesprächsrunden, Workshops, Konferenzen und vielfältigen Kulturveranstaltungen zusammenbringt. Innerhalb des Forums werden neben religiösen Inhalten auch aktuelle gesellschaftliche und politische Themen behandelt.

Die Geschichte von Forum Dialog nimmt ihren Anfang im Jahr 2008, als es mit dem Namen Forum für Interkulturellen Dialog von deutsch-türkischen Muslimen in Berlin gegründet wurde, wobei die ersten Dialogbemühungen schon 2005 begonnen hatten. 2015 haben sich mehrere Dialogvereine aus unterschiedlichen Bundesländern dazu entschlossen, gemeinsam unter dem Namen Forum Dialog zu agieren.

Das Forum Dialog wurde von deutschen MuslimInnen mit überwiegend türkischer Migrationsgeschichte, deren Inspiration auf die Lehren und die Werte des muslimischen Gelehrten Fethullah Gülen zurückgeht, gegründet. Es bietet – unabhängig von Glaube, Weltanschauung und Herkunft – ein Forum für alle Dialoginteressierten in Deutschland und setzt sich für ein tieferes Verständnis des Islams und anderer Religionen, Demokratie, soziale Teilhabe und Menschenrechte ein, und stellt sich gegen die Instrumentalisierung von Religion.

Für sein Engagement kooperiert das Forum Dialog mit zahlreichen Partnern, u.a. Abraham-Geiger-Kolleg, Deutsches Orient Institut, Stuttgarter Lehrhaus, Berliner Forum der Religionen.

Name: Campus Christian Center (C3 Tempe)
Description: Campus Christian Center (C3 Tempe) is a Christian ministry center located at 1034 S. Mill Avenue in Tempe, Arizona.  We are adjacent to the Tempe campus of Arizona State University, the largest university campus in the United States.  We provide meeting space for more than 30 ministries.  We also host the Arizona Center for Christian Studies, 24-7 Prayer Room, and International Student Center.

Name: Stiftung Frauenkirche Dresden
Description:
Mit großherzigem Engagement aus aller Welt konnte der Wiederaufbau der Frauenkirche gelingen und ein Wahrzeichen entstehen, das mit seiner Geschichte und Architektur weit über Dresden hinaus zu Toleranz, Versöhnung und Frieden mahnt. 
Es ist uns Herzensanliegen und Stiftungsauftrag zugleich, unseren Gästen die Friedensbotschaft des Gotteshauses näher zu bringen und an diesem bedeutsamen Ort kulturellen Erbes junge Menschen zu engagiertem Handeln in unserer Gesellschaft zu ermutigen. Zwei Millionen Besucher aller Kontinente begrüßen wir in der Frauenkirche Jahr für Jahr zu Andachten und Gottesdiensten, zur "Offenen Kirche", zu Konzerten und Dialogen rund um aktuelle Friedensfragen. 
Bürgerschaftliches Engagement machte den Wiederaufbau möglich - bürgerschaftliches Engagement trägt die Frauenkirche bis heute. Werden Sie Teil einer weltweiten Gemeinschaft der Frauenkirche!

Name: Open Doors Finland
Description:
Open Doors Business Partners -verkosto on tarkoitettu yrittäjille ja yrityspäättäjille! Liittymällä mukaan luot yrityksellesi win-win tilanteita, joissa lähimmäisen rakkaus muuttuu sanoista teoiksi. Business Partnerina voit omalla panoksellaan tukea arvokasta työtä kristittyjen auttamiseksi ja samalla inspiroitua, verkostoitua ja lisätä yrityksesi näkyvyyttä. 

Kiinnostuitko? Liity mukaan Business Partners -verkostoon osoitteessa: 
https://opendoors.fi/businesspartners/

Open Doors Finland ry toimii osana maailmanlaajuista Open Doors –järjestöä. Toiminta Suomessa käynnistyi keväällä 2015. Open Doors on vuonna 1955 perustettu kansainvälinen avustusjärjestö, joka toimii vainottujen kristittyjen auttamiseksi yli 60 kohdemaassa. Open Doors toimii ekumeenisesti, kristilliseltä arvopohjalta ja on poliittisesti sitoutumaton. Kristittyjen vainot ovat totta tänäänkin – kaukana ja lähellä.

Toimintamme tavoitteena on:

Vahvistaa ja varustaa vainon keskellä eläviä seurakuntia
Vahvistaa ja kouluttaa vainon kohteeksi joutuvia kirkkoja
Jakaa tietoa ja rohkaista avustustyöhön ns. vapaissa maissa toimivia seurakuntia

Name: U.S. Baha'i Office of Public Affairs
Description:
Our Office contributes to the discourses of society based on the principles of the Baha’i Faith, drawing from the collective experience of the American Baha’i community to apply these principles in action. These principles include the oneness of humanity, the essential harmony of scientific and religious truth, the need to eliminate the extremes of wealth and poverty, and the need to abolish all forms of prejudice.

Our work leads us into close collaboration with like-minded individuals and groups. With them, we hope to recast the national conversation around urgent social issues, discovering new ways of engaging with them that propel America to greater heights of unity and justice.

Name: MOVIMIENTO MISIONERO MUNDIAL INC.
Description:
MOVIMIENTO MISIONERO MUNDIAL INC  Somos una organización que nació en el corazón de Dios con fundamento bíblico que defiende la sana doctrina.

Nuestra organización Cristiana Evangélica, Movimiento Misionero Mundial está presente en todo el mundo, las actividades que ejercemos radican en la predicación de los Santos Evangelios, enfatizado en la Sana Doctrina Bíblica. Realizamos también campañas de evangelización, instaurando iglesias, estudios bíblicos, formando obreros y estableciendo nuevos templos.

Name: Englewood Community Development Corporation
Description:
Englewood Community Development Corporation (ECDC) strives to nurture and embody “love of neighbor” in the areas of affordable housing, economic development, and comprehensive community development on the Near Eastside of Indianapolis.

ECDC’s asset-based approach recognizes first the strengths of its community rather than its deficits. 

Becoming an independent 501(c)3 in 1997, ECDC began as an outgrowth of Englewood Christian Church (ECC) a few years prior. While the congregation has been in the same location since 1895, in the mid-90’s its members began to rethink and reshape the congregation's presence in place. Almost all of our staff and the vast majority of our board members live within the Englewood Neighborhood. Because we care about every aspect of shared life with our neighbors, and because we believe fiercely in developing local neighborhood-based capacity, the organization has enacted a wide array of projects and initiatives.

While we strive to serve all neighbors, most major projects or initiatives have sought to directly build community with and/or develop the capacities of children, seniors or low-income neighbors.

Key Programs include:
- Homeowner Development and Repair
- Affordable Housing Development and Management (including 5 multifamily buildings)
- Resident Supportive Services
- Englewood Recreation (Near Eastside Soccer Alliance & Indy Rooftop Hockey League)
- Job Creation & Retention
- Strategic Acquisition & Development
- Business Façade Grant Program
- Social Enterprise (Uplift Produce)
- P.R. Mallory Redevelopment (tenants: Purdue Polytechnic High School, Paramount Englewood)
- DayStar Childcare Supports
- Englewood Review of Books

Name: St. Luke's United Methodist Church
Description:
St. Luke’s exists to awaken disciples to reveal the Kingdom and reveal the Kingdom to awaken disciples.

The believers of St. Luke’s United Methodist Church will reach as many people as possible in Central Florida introducing them to eternal life in Jesus Christ. Together, we commit to worship, connect, care, and grow as Disciples, to serve in revealing the Kingdom of God.

St. Luke’s Core Values: At St. Luke’s center is the love of Jesus Christ.

St. Luke’s values Christ-Centered:

Acceptance: We recognize that Christ’s love has no boundaries.

Hospitality: We welcome all to share Christ’s love through help, hope, and healing

Community: We claim a sacred place where Christ’s love unites all to support and care for others while nurturing a personal relationship with God.

Discipleship: We believe we are called to be living representatives of Jesus Christ and bring others to know God’s mercy, justice, grace, and love.

Service: We respond to Christ’s love and God’s call, by sharing our time, talents, tithes, spiritual gifts, and resources.

Name: Seton LaSalle Catholic High School
Description:
Seton LaSalle Catholic High School is a private, Roman Catholic high school in Mt. Lebanon, a suburb of Pittsburgh. It is located in the Roman Catholic Diocese of Pittsburgh.

Seton LaSalle has been ranked among the top 50 Catholic high schools in the U.S. The required courses at Seton LaSalle build upon state-mandated courses. Instruction is provided to students in three tracks: Honors, Academic and General. Also, over ten AP courses are offered. The grading system at Seton LaSalle is similar to some other high schools (especially Catholic high schools) in that an 'A' is rewarded for work that receives a 92.5% through 100%. Also, Seton LaSalle is fully accredited by the Middle States Association of Colleges and Schools.

Name: Saint Paul Catholic Church
Description: Saint Paul Roman Catholic Church's mission is that of Jesus Christ: the conversion of sinners and the salvation of souls. We accomplish our mission by preaching the Gospel, conferring the Sacraments, and evangelizing the world around us faithfully guided by the Magisterium.

Name: Bethany Baptist Church of Peoria
Description:
The mission of Bethany Baptist Church is to glorify God by proclaiming Jesus Christ as Lord and preparing His people to worship Him forever.  Bethany is a family of believers committed to expository preaching, transforming worship, loving fellowship, and Spirit-driven ministry.
  
2 Corinthians 4:5  For what we proclaim is not ourselves, but Jesus Christ as Lord, with ourselves as your servants for Jesus' sake.

Name: BETI 3D
Description: L’objectif du groupement BETI est la relève du défi technologique à travers la recherche de synergies, la fédération des ressources humaines, la mutualisation des moyens matériels et la répartition de l’effort d’investissements très capitalistiques que requièrent les secteurs de la lasergrammétrie, la cartographie mobile, la photogrammétrie et la topographie.

Name: As-Sakhi Foundation
Description: As-Sakhi is a charitable organization based out of Kashmir. It was started by young college students to help the most vulnerable section of our community.

Name: The Church In The Lord Jesus Christ of the Apostolic Faith
Description: Our spiritual services and fellowship with our members are designed to encourage you to save yourself form this untoward generation and to seek The Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. Services are held five times each week and our Pastor, Bishop Joe C. Tisdale, will enlighten and strengthen your knowledge and relationship with The Lord.

Name: Almuzakkirah
Description:
Kidsquranteacher is an Online Quran Academy. 

                We Provide Highly Qualified and well-experienced teachers
                who are Huffaz and scholars at same time and able to teach
	        Islamic fundamentals which is obligatory action to learn upon every 
                Muslim.
		Kidsquranteacher has made it possible to teach you Quran at your home
		and no need to drive your kids far away from your House but they will
		Learn under your Monitoring at home.The live Quran classes are 
                organized one to one.
		Each kid is focused individually by teacher. we provide fully friendly 
                atmosphere
	        to engage students and they get familiar with their teachers in very 
                short time.
Why Choose us:
		1, 24/7 Accessibility teaching all around the world.
		2, Highly Qualified Well-Experienced teachers (Huffaz & Scholors).
		3, one to one Quran classes by male and female teachers.
		4, Learn Quran with Tajweed.
