Name: Horizon Community Church
Description:
Horizon Community Church started in 1975 at the Ramada Inn (now the Nyberg Woods Mall) in Tualatin, Oregon. The pioneering pastors had a vision for it to be a Bible-based, Spirit-led, genuine, authentic group of Christ-followers who would reach out to others with the love of God. 
 
God led the people to purchase the Sagert Farm in Tualatin, still the location of our elementary and middle school. Here they took an existing barn and remodeled it to become the first building for the church. Through the years, the church body added on to that building and started an elementary school as the Spirit of God made it obvious that this church would lead in the community by providing a safe place for children to attend school.
 
The growing fellowship would soon start on another adventure to secure land at another location and build again. God spoke to our pastor first and said that he wanted to, “Build a great high school to glorify My name.” This new endeavor that the Lord sent Horizon Community Church on would bring about many remarkable miracles as the Lord brought provision to validate His will. Today we have a second, larger campus where our church, high school and pre-school/daycare meet, located on forty acres on Boones Ferry Road in Tualatin.
 
The story of Horizon Community Church is a great God adventure, in which the people have trusted God and followed by faith in an effort to help others become followers of Jesus.

Name: St John Baptist Church
Description:
"Discover Something New Together"

Visiting a new church can be overwhelming. At St John Baptist Church, we strive to make you feel like family the moment you walk through the doors. Don't be surprised if a complete stranger welcomes you like an old friend. To make you feel more at ease before you visit, here are some things to know:  

Where Do I Go?
You can start by entering the main or rear entrance. Once inside, you can stop by our Welcome Center located in the lobby. One of our greeters or ushers will be happy to direct you to our nursery and answer any questions you might have. 

When Are Your Worship Services?
We have two worship services with three worship styles: the Traditional Service, the Blended/Contemporary Service. 
The Traditional Service begins on Sundays at 8:00 a.m. This service is more traditional with a full choir, and hymns.
The Blended/Contemporary Service begins at 10:15 a.m. This service is a blend of the traditional and contemporary services.
The Contemporary Service begins at 12 noon.  This service provides a more relaxed atmosphere and a praise team & worship band.

We also have a Wednesday Evening Power Hour service at 7:00 p.m. 

How Do I Find a Sunday School Class?
We have plenty of opportunity for every individual to plug into a Sunday School class. From ages 3 to to Golden Agers and everyone in between, we have an inviting class waiting for you. 

Visit our website to see the wonderful things that are going at SJBC! www.stjohnbaptistchurch.org

Name: Light of Christ Catholic Schools
Description:
Beginning in 2012, the five Catholic parishes of Bismarck came together to form Light of Christ Catholic Schools, an unprecedented venture reaffirming the strengths and successes of Catholic education in Bismarck.

Today, Light of Christ Catholic Schools offers a modern educational program in which students learn language arts, mathematics, science, morality, fine arts, faith, and languages in small classes taught by caring teachers.
The students at Light of Christ Catholic Schools have opportunities to discover themselves as scholars, leaders, stewards, thinkers, athletes, and artists.
 

Vision Statement:
The Catholic schools of the Bismarck area will respond to the Bishops’ call by being Catholic in spirit and culture, academically excellent, jointly operated by the member parishes, and funded in a manner that makes them available, accessible, and affordable to all families who wish to choose them for their children.

Mission Statement:
“We are convinced that Catholic Schools continue to be ‘the most effective means available to the Church for the education of children and young people’ who are the future of the Church.”
An excerpt from Renewing our Commitment to Catholic Elementary and Secondary Schools in the Third Millennium published by the United States Catholic Bishops in support of Catholic schools.  2005

Name: Black Rock Church
Description: We were established in 1849 by just a few faithful Christ-followers and have now grown to thousands of adults and children who attend our services each weekend. As a non-denominational church, we welcome you no matter your religious background. We want to see people develop into mature disciples who are equipped to glorify God through membership in His family, ministry in the church, and mission to our community and beyond.

Name: Catholic Diocese Of Saginaw
Description: The Catholic Diocese of Saginaw was established by Pope Pius XI on Feb. 26, 1938. Today, it includes 6,955 square miles across Arenac, Bay, Clare, Gladwin, Gratiot, Huron, Isabella, Midland, Sanilac, Saginaw and Tuscola counties.

Name: Presentation Sisters of the Blessed Virgin Mary
Description: We are a vowed faith community who share the mission of Jesus. Inspired by our foundress, Nano Nagle, we willingly go forth to any part of the world to work for justice, alleviate oppression and promote human dignity, especially among the poor. We proclaim the Good News with missionary zeal, in a spirit of love and joy.

Name: CHURCH PROJECT
Description:
We are a “Church of House Churches”. We gather together to grow in relationship with God & one another. We gather in smaller groups in House Churches throughout the week, corporately on Sundays, and in ongoing relationships beyond the structure of church.

We are serving our world generously with our lives & money through partnerships with dozens of effective local & global ministries. We meet practical needs and share the message of God’s love in Christ.

Name: Sinsinawa Dominicans
Description: Sinsinawa Dominican Sisters are called to proclaim the Gospel through the ministry of preaching and teaching in order to participate in the building of a holy and just Church and society.

Name: St Paul Catholic Church
Description: Check out our website

Name: Mitra Arquidiocesana De Brasilia
Description: Mitra Arquidiocesana De Brasilia is a religious institutions company based out of Esp Dos Ministerios Lote, 12, Edificio Joao Paulo Ii, Brasilia, Distrito Federal, Brazil.

Name: Shree Swaminarayan Temple Cardiff
VOUS CHURCH INC
Description: Welcome to VOUS Church! Whatever your age or life story, you are welcome! Our mission is simple: People are our heart and Jesus is our message. VOUS Church is a place for "VOUS", or in English...YOU. This is your guide for all things Vous Church. Glad you are here. Enjoy!

Name: Go for God Family Church
Description:
In January 2009 Go for God was formed to build a community of people with a passion for pursuing God's Presence and His Purpose.

We are a non-denominational bible-based church committed to accurately teaching the Word of God, fellowship,  and witness. The result is this unique company of believers, “In passionate pursuit of God and in powerful pursuit of His purpose", with a heart to evangelize the people and to transform whole communities for the Glory of God.

We are looking forward to celebrating life with you!

Name: Allen Temple Baptist Church
Description:
Allen Temple Baptist Church was organized in 1919 in Oakland, CA . Throughout its history, the church has served as a bright beacon of  faith, hope, and love beyond its four walls. The congregation is affiliated with both the American Baptist Churches USA and the Progressive National Baptist Convention, Inc.

Allen Temple is committed to sharing the love of God and the message of Good News throughout the world.  We welcome people of all ages & cultural backgrounds as we joyfully celebrate worship and fellowship, and carry out ministries of evangelism, discipleship,  education, community outreach, and global missions. Allen Temple’s holistic ministries address the needs of the whole person as well as the whole community.

Name: Tucson Refugee Ministry
Description:
Tucson Refugee Ministry exists to create and develop a welcoming community that values the nations at our doorstep. This partnership helps to cultivate authentic and lasting relationships between the church and our newest neighbors as we journey together to create new paths of opportunities for growth. Our hope is to nurture and empower refugees to thrive as an integral part of our shared communities.

VALUES
Connecting the Church with Refugees
Collaborating with agencies, churches, ministries and community partners
Cultivating transformative cross-cultural relationships with refugees
Communicating the facts, faces and stories of refugees

Name: Foundations in Faith
Description: Foundations in Faith has been established to nurture, guide, and reinvigorate the diocesan approach to life-long formation for parishioners, seminarians and priests as we journey in growing closer to God. Our focus on Pastoral Care prioritizes the importance of reaching out to the most vulnerable in our Catholic parish communities; the very young, the elderly, the differently-abled and the under-resourced.

Name: OCADES SED de Dédougou
Description:
L’OCADES Caritas Dédougou est un des démembrements de l’OCADES Caritas Burkina structure de la Caritas International.

L’OCADES BURKINA est une organisation apolitique à but non lucratif. Elle a été créée le 5 février 1998 par la Conférence Episcopale du Burkina par fusion de la CARITAS et du BEL (Bureau d’Etudes et de Liaison). Elle a été reconnue par le récépissé n°98181MATS/SG/DGAT/DLPAJ du 25 mai 1998 par l’Etat Burkinabé. L’OCADES est représentée dans chaque Diocèse par une OCADES diocésaine (démembrement).

Name: Anoopam Mission
Description: Anoopam Mission is a socio-religious non-profit charitable organization based at the Shree Swaminarayan Spiritual & Cultural Center in Coplay, PA. Inspired by its founder Sant Bhagwant Sahebji and committed to the physical, social, cultural, and spiritual advancement of humanity, Anoopam Mission is actively engaged in humanitarian work globally in the fields of education, healthcare, social welfare, and disaster relief.

Name: The Bible Society of Singapore
Description:
With a history of more than 200 years in Singapore, The Bible Society of Singapore is a non-profit organisation and a Christian mission agency whose mission is to make the Word of God known to all people, by making it available through the work of translation & publishing, accessible through distribution & literacy programmes, and credible through engagement & advocacy.

We are part of the global movement of the Bible Mission, being a member of the United Bible Societies's global fellowship of 147 national Bible Societies in more than 200 countries and territories.
 
As part of our effort towards Holistic Missions, the Bible Society also undertakes projects in humanitarian efforts both overseas and in Singapore.

Name: Miami Vineyard Community Church
Description:
Changed lives. That's our story in a nutshell.  Besides meeting in our building for "church" where you can enjoy free coffee and donuts in a casual and friendly atmosphere, we're a group that loves to get outside the building and share God's love with our neighbors in practical ways through:

1) $1 Car Washes (where we pay YOU $1 to get your car washed)
2) Pepsi Giveaways and Drive-Thru Prayers
3) Feeding the Homeless, 
4) Partnering with Habitat for Humanity
5) Free Christmas Gift-wrapping
6) Free movies in the park
7) Block parties
 
just to name a few. We do it because we've been changed by the love of God and we want to share that love with you.

Name: Southcrest Baptist Church
Description: Southcrest Baptist Church is a religious institutions company based out of 3801 S Loop 289, Lubbock, Texas, United States.

Name: Fervent Christian Network
Description:
Fervent Christian Network (FCN) has a singular focus, it is a Kingdom ministry with a humble directive called to bring revival through the call to repentance, and further bring healing and deliverance to the community, regions and nations, and to prepare the universal bride of Christ for the return of our glorious Bridegroom, King Jesus according to Revelation 22:17.

We are called to empower the body of Christ through powerful teachings, trainings and equip the saints, so, they can walk in the fullness of their God-given destinies and through the Lord's mandated command of the Great Commission with unlimited demonstration of His power in healings, miracles, signs and wonders.

Name: Oklahoma Faith Network (formerly Oklahoma Conference of Churches)
Description: The Oklahoma Faith Network connects, motivates, and empowers communities of faith and individuals throughout Oklahoma on issues of faith and social justice.

Name: Pandit NM shrimali
Description:
The Great Astrologer, Motivational Speaker & Numerologist Smt. Nidhi Ji Shrimali is the world fame Best Astrologer. With great peace of mind, and having the Spiritual power given by her Ancestor in her inheritance, Smt. Nidhi Ji Shrimali is making her own way to live life. She was born in Jodhpur (Raj), In a very Good and Supporting family. 

She is having a great experience of 15 + Years in the Astrological Environment. Also, she visits many Countries for her Devotees, to meet them, to help them in their life. She also provides Daily, Weekly, Monthly & Yearly horoscopes on her YouTube Channel NIDHI SHRIMALI.

Smt. Nidhi Ji Shrimali also runs an Astrological Website name https://panditnmshrimali.com, On this website you can find any Astrology Item Energized, also provide Kundali Services & Kundali Reports for a Particular Person. In which she personally checks Kundali (Horoscope) via Telephonic Appointment.

Name: Tomoka Christian Church
Description:
One Church. Multiple Locations.

Tomoka Christian is a non-denominational, missions-oriented church spreading God's love by reaching out to people in the community, the nation and throughout the world.  

The church offers dozens of local, national and overseas mission trips. On these trips, participants provide humanitarian, medical and spiritual care to people in need. 

The church tithes 10 percent or more of its own annual income to local, national and international missions. 

Campuses are located in Ormond Beach, DeLand and Palm Bay, Florida.


SOCIAL MEDIA

facebook.com/tomokachristian
instagram.com/tomokachristian
youtube.com/tomokacc
linkedin.com/company/tomoka-christian-church
vimeo.com/tomokacc

Name: Terreiro de Umbanda Pai Maneco
Description: Terreiro De Umbanda Pai Maneco is a religious institutions company based out of Estrada Nova de Colombo, 5487, Curitiba, Paraná, Brazil.

Name: Our Lady of Hope Catholic School
Description:
Our Lady of Hope is a Catholic Church and School in Potomac Falls, VA. The Church was founded in the year 2000, and the School opened in the year 2005 for grades K-8. 

Our mission is to develop young Catholic Christians with a deep, personal commitment to Jesus Christ and His Church, to actively practice and profess that faith through compassion and respect for others, and to find passion for learning in order to achieve their full, God-given potential.

We provide an academically-rigorous, nurturing, and joyful learning environment, using the best of traditional and 21st Century practices, making accommodations for children’s diverse learning needs.  Moreover, we integrate the teachings, traditions, virtues, and values of our Catholic faith into the spiritual, intellectual, social, and physical development of all our children.

Thus, with this faith foundation and passion for excellence, our students will be able to make a difference in the world around them, as witnesses for our Lord Jesus Christ.

Name: Sync with God
Description: Sync with God is a 501C3, non-profit ministry, to unleash life-changing online discipleship groups on one virtual screen: video chat, texting, lessons, journaling, discussions. We simplify Kingdom building, mentoring, and the spiritual growth process while leading people to become Christ followers, so they don’t leave the faith.  Short demo video: http://bit.ly/sync_walkthru3

Name: Roble del Sur
Description: Promovemos la participación de los Santos de los Últimos Días en la esfera pública.

Name: Sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Montligeon
Description:
Situé dans le diocèse de Séez (Orne), au cœur du parc naturel du Perche et à 150 km de Paris, le sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Montligeon est le centre mondial de prière pour les défunts. Créé à la fin du XIXe siècle à l’initiative d’un curé de campagne, l’abbé Paul Buguet, le sanctuaire accueille aujourd’hui de nombreux pèlerins et retraitant : 50 événements et 20 000 retraitants rythment la vie du sanctuaire.
Le sanctuaire comprend une basilique de style néo-gothique et un ensemble immobiliers dédiés au culte et à l’accueil du public. Avec une capacité d’hébergement totale de 300 lits, 3 salles de restaurant, 20 salles de réunion de 20 à 300 places et une friche Industrielle de 10 000 m2 en cours de réhabilitation le sanctuaire à toujours besoin de nouveaux talents pour étoffer ses équipes qui comptent déjà plus de 30 collaborateurs.

Name: Fervent Christian Network
Description:
Fervent Christian Network (FCN) has a singular focus, it is a Kingdom ministry with a humble directive called to bring revival through the call to repentance, and further bring healing and deliverance to the community, regions and nations, and to prepare the universal bride of Christ for the return of our glorious Bridegroom, King Jesus according to Revelation 22:17.

We are called to empower the body of Christ through powerful teachings, trainings and equip the saints, so, they can walk in the fullness of their God-given destinies and through the Lord's mandated command of the Great Commission with unlimited demonstration of His power in healings, miracles, signs and wonders.

Name: White Fields Inc
Description: White Fields Inc is a religious institutions company based out of 7127 N County Line Rd, Piedmont, OK, United States.

Name: MyFiladelfia Biblical Counselling and Training
Description:
MyFiladelfia is a Registered Skills Development Provider that focuses on community upliftment, enriching the lives of all those with whom we partner.
We equip individuals through skills development training in Biblical Pastoral counselling, Theological Skills Training, Life Skills Courses and Coaching and Mentoring. 
Ook beskikbaar in Afrikaans.

Name: National Association of Clinical Theology
Description:
The National Association of Clinical Theology is a tax-exempt nonprofit 501(c) (3.) organization. We exist of clinical professionals and ministers who volunteer their time and resources to give common people an affordable, accountable, and credible alternative to clinical ministry in the community.

Our mission is to support and equip ministers in Spiritual Care who work in healthcare settings or volunteer service organizations as Chaplains or Christian Counselors.

Name: C.S.V. Ichthus Groningen
Description:
Wij zijn C.S.V. Ichthus! Een interkerkelijke, christelijke studentenvereniging in het prachtige Groningen voor zowel HBO- als WO-studenten. Ichthus heeft ongeveer 140 leden, wat betekent dat bijna iedereen elkaar wel kent, en de vereniging onderscheidt zich door een open, gemoedelijk en divers karakter. Iedereen is welkom!

Ichthus staat voor een ‘Studentenleven met God’; met aandacht voor je ontwikkeling als christen, maar ook als student. Daarom hebben we verschillende activiteiten die zowel gericht zijn op geloof als op het studentenleven!

Name: Oak Grove Baptist Church
Description: A Southern Baptist Church in Cleveland Tennessee.

Name: Bisdom Gent
Description: Het bisdom Gent omvat de hele provincie Oost-Vlaanderen en de gemeenten Zwijndrecht en Burcht van de provincie Antwerpen. Het bisdom is ingedeeld in 427 parochies die samenwerken in 34 dekenaten en 6 pastorale streken. Monseigneur Luc Van Looy is momenteel bisschop van het bisdom Gent.

Name: Diocese de Joinville
Description:
Fundada em 17 de janeiro de 1927 pelo Papa Pio XI, por meio da Bula "Inter Praecipuas", a Diocese de Joinville emergiu numa época em que Santa Catarina não possuía uma Arquidiocese, sendo inicialmente parte do Rio de Janeiro e posteriormente de Curitiba. Com o estabelecimento da Arquidiocese de Florianópolis, foram instituídas as Dioceses de Joinville e Lages.

A Diocese de Joinville abrange os seguintes municípios: Joinville, Garuva, Itapoá, Itaiópolis, Mafra, Campo Alegre, Rio Negrinho, São Bento do Sul, Corupá, Guaramirim, Jaraguá do Sul, Massaranduba, Schroeder, Araquari, Balneário Barra do Sul, Barra Velha, São Francisco do Sul e São João do Itaperiú. Compreende um total de 66 paróquias e cerca de 500 comunidades.

Name: Sending Out Servants (SOS)
Description: Sending Out Servants is a company based out of 5731 Wanakah Dr, Houston, Texas, United States.

Name: Turning Point Church
Description: Assemblies of God religous institution.

Name: First Presbyterian Church of Jackson, MS
Description:
First Presbyterian Church of Jackson exists to glorify God by making disciples on the North State Street corridor, in the greater Jackson area, and around the world.

(601) 353-8316
Facebook: FirstPresJackson
Twitter: FPCJxnMS
Instagram: fpcjackson

Name: Foundation of IslamCity
Description:
You ask and we answer

We, the volunteers of IslamCity, thought it would be useful if we could help others and ourselves by providing the correct answers to questions about the Islam on the internet.

The answers and advices to the questions are prepared with great care by the volunteers. Each question and it’s answer are checked by the editors of IslamCity, and adjusted where necessary.
The intention of IslamCity is with the will of Allah;
•	To help Non-Muslims get acquainted with the Islam experience as to minimalize misconceptions in society and improve relationships within the community.

•	Inform New-Muslims so that they will practice the Islam according to the Qur’an and Sunnah.

•	Call up Muslims to return to practice the Islam according to the Qur’an and Sunnah, so that they a) practice the Islam in a correct way and b)don’t radicalize.

We ask Allah (سبحانه و تعالى) to forgive us for any mistakes we may have made:

……….Our Lord! Condemn us not if we forget, or miss the mark!

Al-Baqarah-286- رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذۡنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوۡ أَخۡطَأۡنَاۚ ...     سُوۡرَةُ البَقَرَة

Name: The Christian Methodist Episcopal Church
Description: The mission of the Christian Methodist Episcopal Church is to be disciples of Jesus the Christ by serving individuals, communities and the world as the representative, loving presence of God and as witnesses to God’s salvation and grace.

Name: The Ridge Community Church
Description: The Ridge Community Church exists to bring the hope of Jesus into every home. We're a church for people who don't like church based in the Metro Milwaukee area of Wisconsin. We have campuses in Greenfield, Oak Creek - Franklin Area, and an online experience at live.theridgecc.com and on YouTube.

Name: Centerpoint Church
Description:
Our Mission:
Loving and leading people to a life-changing connection with Christ.

Our Discipleship Pathway:

Worship is about centering our hearts and lives around Jesus Christ through songs, prayer, and God’s word

Connecting is about biblical fellowship and community with God and each other

Serving is about using the gifts God has given you to help others through the ministry of the local church

Influence is about reaching our community and world with God’s love

Name: Boca Raton Synagogue
Description:
In 1991 Rabbi Kenneth Brander was brought down from New York to serve as the Rabbi of the synagogue. During his 14 year tenure, the synagogue has grown to more than 600 families. Rabbi Brander was instrumental in creating not just a vibrant synagogue, but he was the key figure in creating a Mikvah, Yeshiva High School, starting a community Kollel and addressing kashrut issues by serving as head of the ORB. His work with other institutions, not just in Boca Raton, but throughout the Tri-County area was critical in establishing The Boca Raton Synagogue as an important, integrated Orthodox community. On September 1, 2005, we were very fortunate to have Rabbi Efrem Goldberg agree to assume the position of our Marah D'Atrah. As Rabbi Goldberg was the associate Rabbi of the Synagogue for the last 3 years of Rabbi Brander's tenure, he assumed the role without missing a beat. Under Rabbi Goldberg's leadership, BRS continues to nurture and grow its membership and programming, and continues to be centrally involved our comminuty at large. 

Today, our Synagogue is spiritual home to more than 650 families. BRS provides daily, Shabbat and holiday services and offers a substantial broad adult education program. There are several active committees including sisterhood, men’s club events, Chevra Kadisha, chesed and hospitality. BRS also has a strong youth program that server the needs of approximately 1,000 children.

Name: TAG (Technology Awareness Group)
Description:
TAG is an international organisation, dedicated to increase an awareness into the potential pitfalls and dangers associated with technological devices.

TAG provides up to date and reliable filtering services utilising the most advanced resources at our disposal

Name: Gereja Kristus Di Indonesia (GKDI) | Official
Description:
God designed the church to be his earthly household with Jesus as the standard and chief cornerstone; and that’s what Gereja Kristus Di Indonesia (GKDI) stands for. 

GKDI is not a perfect church but a church striving for perfection in Christ. It is a melting pot where people from different walks of lives, gather and worship God, growing to be more like Christ.

We Gather Here to Know God and Make God Known.

Name: OLLV Foundation
Description:
The OLLV Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that manages fundraising and the project management of building new places of worship on the Christ Cathedral campus in Orange County, California.

Our mission is to help create and make available prestigious worship spaces and facilities. These places of worship are designed to help all who visit find a deeper connection with God. We build for our Lord Jesus Christ and His mother, Mary, in hopes of sharing their glory with the world.

Our projects include the Our Lady of La Vang Shrine, St. Callistus Chapel and Crypts, and the Marian Gardens for the Roman Catholic Diocese of Orange in Orange, California. The OLLV Foundation is centered on philanthropy for Roman Catholic communities, helping to sustain and enhance the faith life of all those it serves. The Foundation also seeks to promote the ideals of the shrine with future sites in its honor.

Name: Coastal Community Church
Description: Coastal Community Church is a group of people from all walks of life who are being transformed by Jesus Christ. We are passionate about sharing the love of Christ by caring for, encouraging one another and positively impacting our community.

Name: Great Cities Missions
Description:
Sharing Christ by planting churches in the Great Cities of the Latin World.  

We are a non-profit missions organization that recruits, trains and cares for mission teams throughout Latin America as well as the United States.  Churches have been established in Bolivia, Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Peru, Paraguay, Uruguay, Colombia, Mexico, the Dominican Republic, Cuba and the United States.

Name: International Student Ministries Canada - ISMC
Description: International Student Ministries Canada is a Christian charitable organization committed to empowering international students to impact the world through Jesus Christ.

Name: Concert of Prayer for Scotland
Description: Training leaders and churches to pray together, host prayer meetings & create a culture of prayer in the local church. Praying together for the glory of God in our time in Scotland.

Name: Bayou City Fellowship
Description:
Bayou City is a vibrant worshipping church with a radical focus on Jesus. 

We are passionate about serving the city and world while starting new churches.

Name: Igreja Batista Fonte
Description:
A Igreja Batista Fonte está estabelecida na cidade de Campinas-SP desde Março de 1984, e é formada por pessoas na sua maioria, residentes na própria cidade e também em cidades vizinhas, tais como Paulínia, Cosmópolis, Sumaré, Nova Odessa, Hortolândia, Americana, Valinhos, Vinhedo dentre outras.

Somos uma grande família cristã composta por pessoas que reconhecem a Jesus Cristo como seu Senhor e Salvador.

Name: Sovereign Grace Ministries
Description:
Sovereign Grace Ministries exists to plant and build churches with the gospel, for the glory of God. In support of that mission we also operate a Pastors College, host conferences, and publish books, music, and audio messages.
Visit our website to:
- Find a Sovereign Grace church near you
- Browse the resources we provide
- Read C.J. Mahaney’s blog
- Sign up for our ministry newsletter
- View upcoming conferences, and
- Learn about our church-planting initiatives
http://sovereigngraceministries.org/

Name: La Salle Global  - Brothers of the Christian Schools
Description:
Internationally, some 4,500 Brothers serve in 80 countries. Our Lasallian family extends to include all people involved in sharing in and carrying out the Lasallian educational mission around the world.

Women and men, young and old, people of different faith traditions associate themselves in a way to respond flexible to the needs of young people in our times and understanding there is unity in diversity in how our mission and charism is lived out.

From all states of life (religious, married, single) we are all called to deepen our spirituality and commitment through the shared inspiration of recognizing how our personal, professional and spiritual lives connect to the founding story of St. John Baptist de La Salle and the first Brothers.

Association is a means of responding with creativity to needs and accompanying others on their journeys. We can work with others to respond to the needs of those that we minister to, while at the same time working with our peers to continue formation and deepen their commitment to the Lasallian mission.

Name: The Navigators of Canada
Description: For over 50 years, The Navigators of Canada have come alongside people who desire a deeper connection with God by offering a transformative and holistic mentoring relationship. The Navigators engage individuals with the life-giving Word and intentionally equip Christ-followers to confidently pass along their faith and, in turn, help others know Jesus. The Navigators choose to be faithfully present, to intentionally and actively engage in relational ministry: with students on campuses across Canada, with people in their communities and neighbourhoods, supporting and partnering with the local church, working alongside business people and in global contexts beyond Canada.

Name: Leeds University Islamic Society
Description: Welcome to the Leeds University Islamic Society. This is a faith platform for students to gather, organise and participate in numerous social and educational activities. As well as also providing a united voice in expressing the views and aspirations of the Leeds University Muslim student community.

Name: Ordo Fratrum Minorum
Description: The Order of Friars Minor, founded by St. Francis of Assisi, is a fraternity. In a more complete fulfilment of their baptismal consecration and in answer to the divine call, the friars give themselves totally to God, their supreme love; through profession of obedience, poverty and chastity, which they are to live in the spirit of Saint Francis.

Name: The Kitchen SF
Description:
We are creating a spiritually engaging community of seekers at all levels of Jewish knowledge and experience.

We believe that Jewish religious practice can transform: It can change lives, make meaning, and invest people in the world. This transformation requires a flexible, living ecosystem of Jewish experiences. So we’re building it in San Francisco and engaging people here and beyond the Bay Area.

Name: Stephen Wise Free Synagogue
Description: A vibrant Reform congregation on Manhattan’s Upper West Side, Stephen Wise Free Synagogue has served as a catalyst for progressive Jewish thought, committed social action in the local community and beyond, and support for Israel for more than 100 years.

Name: WE ARE ONE CHURCH
Description: Vi är en kyrka i hjärtat av Stockholm. Vi tror på Gud, vi tror på Jesus och vi tror på dig! Vi har Gudstjänster varje fredag kl 19, söndag kl 10 & kl 18 som du kan se via vår livestream på www.waoplay.com.

Name: St. Ann Catholic Parish
Description: St. Ann Catholic Parish is a large parish of more than 8,000 families located in Coppell, Texas. St. Ann is a young vibrant community with over 100 ministries to meet the needs of this growing Catholic community.

Name: Castleton United Methodist Church
Description:
Castleton United Methodist Church is part of the Indiana Conference of United Methodist Churches. Our hope is that you will be assisted and blessed by the ministries that we offer. Our goal is to be a welcoming congregation where people are excited about the Lordship of Jesus Christ.  We hope to equip and enable all ages to engage in a lifestyle of servant leadership.  We strive to be a group of people who are enthusiastic about our personal spiritual growth, who are committed to service and mission in our community and who want to impact and change the world with the Good News of Jesus Christ.

MISSION: Our mission is “to make disciples of Jesus Christ for the transformation of the world.”
This mission was given to us by Jesus in the Great Commission (Matthew 28:16-20).

VISION: We are called to be an outward facing circle of people; seeking, reaching, and welcoming others to join us in serving Jesus Christ.

VALUES: Prayer, Families, Missions / Outreach

Castleton United Methodist Church
7160 Shadeland Station 
Indianapolis, Indiana 46256

Name: Dominican Sisters of Springfield, Illinois
Description: Dominican Sisters of Springfield, Illinois, enriched by members from the United States and Peru, firmly embrace vowed life in community.  We are preachers in the spirit of Dominic, sustained by our life together and nourished by our study, contemplation and liturgical prayer. Moved by the woundedness of all creation, we compassionately preach the truth of the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

Name: Immanuel Schools
Description: Immanuel Schools specializes in providing education and extracurricular programs for students in grades K-12.

Name: Dawateislami Madani Markaz | Faizan e Madina BD3
Description: Dawateislami Madani Markaz | Faizan e Madina BD3 is a religious institutions company based out of Maudsley St, Bradford, United Kingdom.

Name: Bridges (Network of Community Entrepreneurs)
Description:
Vision:  Bridges dreams of an ever-increasing number of Christ-following communities partnering with existing congregations to create positive social impact that transforms America.

Purpose:  
Help leaders discover innovative ways to make disciples of Jesus who form new Christ-following communities across America. 

Mission:  
To support a new type of leader for a new model of church for America.  Bridges seeks to provide the very best support to leaders seeking to change lives, start new ministries, and facilitate newly Christ-following Communities, especially among people who think church is irrelevant.

Name: Zin in Utrecht
Description:
Zin in Utrecht is een centrum voor Levensvragen en een samenwerkingsverband van vrijgevestigd geestelijk verzorgers van verschillende denominaties. Wij bieden ondersteuning op het terrein van zingeving, levensvragen en spiritualiteit aan inwoners van de gemeente Utrecht. Dit doen wij in de vorm van individuele gesprekken en door het organiseren van bijeenkomsten.

Daarnaast ondersteunen wij professionals en vrijwilligers in de hulpverlening. Ons trainings- en scholingsaanbod is gericht op het herkennen van en inspelen op zingevingsvragen bij cliënten en op een diepere afstemming op zichzelf en de ander.

Name: The Paradox Church
Description: We exist to saturate Fort Worth with the glory and grace of Jesus.

Name: LeadRidge
Description: At LeadRidge, we partner with church leaders in the Apostolic Community to enable growth, increase retention, develop leaders, and much more. We do this by providing resources, solutions, and strategic insight customized for churches and organizations.

Name: JLCF Foursquare Gospel Church
Description: The Jesus' Love and Care Fellowship (JLCF) is a ministry to reach-out the less fortunate people by letting them experience the love and care of Jesus Christ. It is under the banner of the International Church of the Foursquare Gospel. (http://www.foursquare.org/)

Name: Hill City Church
Description:
Hill City Church is a non-denominational church in Richmond, Virginia. We are easily accessible from The Fan, Museum District, Downtown, Henrico, Chesterfield & Mechanicsville areas.

Our mission here at Hill City:

To help connect people to the life giving message of Jesus.


In Matthew 28:18-20 Jesus spoke these words to his disciples: 18 Jesus came and told his disciples, “I have been given all authority in heaven and on earth. 19 Therefore, go and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit. 20 Teach these new disciples to obey all the commands I have given you. And be sure of this: I am with you always, even to the end of the age.”

Jesus gives his disciples a very specific purpose and for us, it can be summed up in this statement:

Love God. Love People. Pass it on.

Name: Ascending Leaders
Description: Your church isn’t cookie cutter, and a cookie cutter program won’t help your congregation grow closer to Christ. We provide experienced coaches who will help you find your church’s unique strengths, set measurable goals for creating a discipleship culture, and guide you in achieving eternal outcomes. Our coaches equip you, because we understand that discipleship is not an inspiring event or an academic seminar: it’s a journey.

Name: ISKCON Etawah
Description:
The International Society for Krishna Consciousness (ISKCON), otherwise known as the Hare Krishna movement, includes five hundred major centers, temples and rural communities, nearly one hundred affilated vegetarian restaurants, thousands of namahattas or local meeting groups, a wide variety of community projects, and millions of congregational members worldwide.
God is known across the world by many names including Allah, Jehovah, Yahweh, Rama, etc. ISKCON devotees chant God’s names in the form of the maha-mantra, or the great prayer for deliverance: Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare/Hare Rama Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare.
For more information, please visit: https://iskconetawah.com

Name: Institute of Christ the King Sovereign Priest
Description: The mission of the Institute of Christ the King Sovereign Priest is to spread the reign of Christ in all spheres of human life by drawing from the millennial treasury of the Roman Catholic Church, particularly her liturgical tradition, the unbroken line of spiritual thought and practice of her saints, and her cultural patrimony in music, art and architecture.

Name: Canadian Conference of Mennonite Brethren Churches
Description:
The Canadian Conference of Mennonite Brethren Churches is a community of 250+ diverse Mennonite Brethren (MB) congregations spread across Canada, united by Jesus Christ through our evangelical Anabaptist beliefs and values and by our mission to grow healthy churches, helping them reach their worlds.

Our mission statement is “Healthy, growing churches reaching their worlds”. By this we mean that each church has a “world”, or sphere of impact, within which to share the good news of God’s kingdom. This sphere is primarily local, but it also includes sharing in another culture or country. The conference exists to help each church achieve that potential.

Our vision is to advance the gospel of Jesus Christ through the development of godly character in every member and the mindset of multiplication in every congregation.

Find ministry related job postings in the North American evangelical Anabaptist community at http://jobs.mbherald.com/

Name: Forest Springs Camp & Conference Center
Description: Forest Springs is a year round Christian camp and conference center located in north-central Wisconsin.

Name: DFW Airport Interfaith Chaplaincy
Description:
The DFW Airport Interfaith Chaplaincy serves as a devoted "Ministry of Presence" to the airport community by providing prayer services, caring support, and ministering to the needs of passengers, military and airport employees. 

The Chaplaincy ministry fills the gap where others are not comfortable or trained to step in. They touch lives. They calm fears. They heal hearts and make a difference. 

Furthermore, the Chaplaincy maintains five chapels, one in each terminal as places of worship and reflection for people of all faiths, religious and spiritual traditions. 

"All are Welcome" is the motto of the DFW Airport Interfaith Chaplaincy. We will continue to keep the Chapel doors open and offer spiritual presence to the passengers, employees, and military that travel through DFW International Airport.

We uphold nearly 50 years of service, respectful and inclusive to a variety of faith groups. Our purpose is to provide care and counseling to the DFW International Airport community. Our chapels are shared spaces open to all for prayer and reflection.

Name: Cybermissions
Description:
Cybermissions provides bible teaching, training, free Christian ebooks, courses and resources to help train Christians, pastors, and other leaders in the developing world and in under-served areas. 

Cybermissions also develops software and hardware solutions such as the H@BAC evangelistic Android app and the Patsorbox, a wireless hotspot that allows pastors in remote areas to download training content.

Name: Visionary Family Ministries
Description: We encourage families and train church leaders through our live conferences, books, DVD Bible Studies, and free internet resources. Each year we offer more than 50 seminars and conferences in the United States and around the world.

Name: Song For Israel
Description:
Song For Israel is a non-profit organization (functioning under “Hill of Hope,” a 501c3), partnering with pro-Israel organizations in order to build support for Israel through education; providing events (in Orange County); & service opportunities both in the United States & in Israel in this manner:
    Educate Christians in the Biblical & moral imperatives of supporting Israel. We accept invitations to come to your church, synagogue or non-religious organization to share from the Bible why it is biblically relevant to support Israel. You will learn the Biblical beginnings of Israel, prophecies which apply to Israel both fulfilled & for future fulfillment.
    Take a political stand in Orange County, the nation and the world in support of Israel. Learn about hands-on experiences that will help you take a stand & make a difference! Get connected with organizations already making a difference politically.
    Network organizations with service projects to financially and physically support Israel. Song For Israel maintains a list of non-profit organizations, churches and synagogues in Israel with which you may be connected.. If you are a church or a synagogue in the United States, we will work within your criteria and help you find a church or synagogue in Israel that will match your criteria for involvement. There are many non-profit organizations ranging from helping to build bomb shelters, join archeological digs, or even dance companies in order to further their growth.

Name: Delmarva Christian Service Camp
Description: A Christian camp devoted to teaching the youth and families, the unchanging word of God in a way that becomes a life changing encounter, everlasting life, and encouraging fellowship.

Name: YWAM Montana | Lakeside
Description:
Youth With A Mission is a global movement of Christians from many cultures, age groups, and Christian traditions, dedicated to serving Jesus throughout the world. Also known as YWAM (pronounced “WHY-wham”), we unite in a common purpose to know God and to make Him known.

Back when we began in 1960, our main focus was to get youth involved in missions. Today, we still focus on youth, and we also involve people aged 8 to 80. We currently work in more than 1,100 locations in over 180 countries, with a staff of over 18,000.

Name: Manna Church
Description:
We are many churches in many locations.
Love God. Love Each Other. Love the World

Name: Enjoy Church
Description:
Enjoy Church is a vibrant and contemporary church meeting in multiple locations across Australia, USA, Japan, Cambodia + Online.

It’s our heart to love, equip and encourage you in Christ and to help you become all that God has purposed and called you to be.

Name: Imamia Jantri Official
Description: Imamia Jantri Official is the home for all your Islamic content needs – From Islamic astrology books to Duas, Amaals, prayer timings and Islamic events – here you will find all the answers to your questions from authentic sources of information.

Name: Pilgrim Center of Hope
Description:
A Catholic evangelization ministry located in the Archdiocese of San Antonio, Pilgrim Center of Hope answers Christ's call by guiding people to encounter Him so as to live in hope, as pilgrims in daily life.

Following the apostles’ example, we cast our three ‘nets':  Ministry of Pilgrimages, Ministry of Conferences, and Evangelization Outreach.

Name: City of Angels International Christian Church
Description:
The Los Angeles church of the SoldOut Discipling Movement.

Statement of Faith:
The Bible is the inspired Word of God and is the final authority in life and doctrine. (2 Timothy 3:16)
There is one God, eternally existing in three persons: God the Father, God the Son, and God the Holy Spirit. (Romans 8, Ephesians 1:13-14)
God made man to have a relationship with him. (Genesis 1:27)
God, out of love for his children, sent His son Jesus Christ to die on a cross for our sins and rise from the dead. (Romans 3:22-24, 1 Corinthians 15:1-8)
Christ has all authority on earth and will return and reign forever. (1 Thessalonians 4:13-18)
We are saved by grace and through faith in Jesus Christ, and God rewards those who earnestly seek Him. (Ephesians 2:1-10, Hebrews 11:1-6)
All have sinned and are separated from God, but all can be saved. (Romans 3:23, Romans 6:23)
We are saved by grace, and salvation is available to all who put their faith in Jesus as Lord and Savior, who repent of their sins, who confess their faith, and who are baptized. (Hebrews 11:1-6, Ephesians 2:1-10, Romans 10:9, Acts 2:38, John 3:16, 2 Corinthians 7:11)
As Christians, God calls us to continue obeying his Word and to live a life of good works. (John 8:31-32, Ephesians 2:10)
The church is the body of Christ on earth, empowered by the Holy Spirit to continue the task of reaching the lost and discipling the saved, helping them to become fully devoted followers of Christ. (Ephesians 4:1-16)

Name: Urban Expression NL
Description:
Creatieve gemeentestichting in aandachtswijken van de stad
#relaties #creativiteit #nederigheid
Survivalgids pionieren. Praktijkverhalen van creatieve gemeentestichting. Arnhem 2016, verkrijgbaar via www.webwinkelvindingrijk.nl

Name: Allison Park Church
Description: Allison Park Church is a multi-campus church in Pittsburgh that is committed to changing the world one life at a time.

Name: Najam Institute
Description: Najam Institute is a non-political educational institute based in Atlanta, GA, dedicated to classical Islamic learning and designed to serve all members of the community.

Name: St. Patrick Catholic Church
Description:
The mission of St. Patrick Parish is to build up the Church by worshipping the Father, proclaiming the Gospel of Jesus, and, guided by the Spirit, loving and serving others as we share our gifts.

We gather each week to celebrate the Sacred Mysteries of our faith with the fullness of our beings.  The staff and parishioners of St. Patrick are committed to being hospitable and welcoming to all God’s people.  We hope that you will join us on Saturday at 5:00 PM or Sunday at 11:00 AM. You would honor us with your presence, prayer, and participation in the Eucharistic Liturgy.

Name: YWAM Orlando
Description:
You want to see genuine change in the world because what you see concerns you.  You want to partner with organizations that are making a difference in the lives of the next generation, teaching them a Biblical worldview, discipling them as they mature in the faith, and equipping them to boldly share their faith in Jesus.  

We invite you to join with us, to partner with a movement of people committed to these same values.  YWAM Orlando (YO) was founded in 1995 with the dream of developing a major mission's training launchpad right here in Central Florida.  For 30 years we've hosted training schools and continue to send young people on short term-missions to reach the nations with the good news of Jesus.  

Let's link arms to reach the 2.2 Billion people who have yet to hear the Gospel.  Until All Have Heard ...

Name: Open Bible Churches
Description: Open Bible Churches is a religious institutions company based out of 2020 Bell Ave, Des Moines, Iowa, United States.

Name: Ohiri Ifeanyichukwu Solomon
Description: A renowned man of God that has impacted alot of lives positively in Nigeria & worldwide

Name: Palomar Christian Conference Center
Description:
Palomar Christian Conference Center has been serving Southern California for over 65 years. and we can accommodate up to 360 people. Palomar Christian Conference Center is located on 320 acres, 32 miles NE of Escondido CA, adjacent to the Palomar Mountain State Park. 

The camp was started in 1922 by the First Baptist Church of San Diego and incorporated into a non-denominational, independent non-profit Christian Camp in 1951. Since the very beginning, the desire of those involved with the camp has been to use the natural beauty of the mountains, the solitude of the trees, the peaceful streams and the clear mountain air, to draw men and women, boys and girls to new understanding of who God is.

The mission of PCCC is to reach the lost for Christ and pursue spiritual growth through the study of God's word.

Name: Hope Unlimited Church
Description:
Hope Unlimited Church is a dynamic local church impacting lives for Christ in the San Gorgonio Pass of Southern California. We have campuses in Banning, Beaumont; and have stretched beyond our country’s borders to plant a church in San Pedro Sula, Honduras and the Philippines. We also work with a coalition of churches in Guatemala, and have established Bible schools in California, Guatemala, and Uganda.

As we fulfill the vision God has given us, we desire to see every person reach their full potential in Christ. We believe serving in the local Church is the result of a heart totally committed to God and provides a platform for training ministers for the work of the Kingdom. We extend our commitment to service in the communities of Banning and Beaumont by donating 1000 hours of community service each year to each city.

Hope Unlimited is founded on the truth of God's Word, the power of His Love for all people and the reality that He has a plan for each of us.

Name: Urban Devotion Birmingham
Description: URBAN DEVOTION BIRMINGHAM exists to see the transformation of communities one life at a time. We believe that everyone has enormous value and we want to help remove the obstacles that prevent potential from being realised. People’s postcodes should not determine their possibilities. We build relationships with children, young people and families to help make our local neighbourhoods places that local people are proud to call home. We have a strong Christian foundation to who we are and what we do. This motivates us to create spaces where all people are welcome regardless of their faith, ethnicity, background or any other defining characteristic. Our faith is also expressed in prayer, that hope would transform even the most hopeless situations.

Name: Holy Quran Classes
Description:
holyquranclasses.com is  an excellent Learning academy through which Muslims, who are looking to learn to read Quran in Arabic, can easily improve their Quran reading and recitation ability. Three different types of courses are being offered at this academy those are:

Quran Teaching Courses

The courses being offered and taught are as under:

Quran Memorization Course
Quran Recitation Course
Quran Translation Course
Arabic Language Classes


Why Choose Us?
Offers Online Tutoring - That means, you do not need to drive your kids or yourself to a Mosque or any place. Simply, by loging into your skype account, the tutoring process will begin and your journey towards learning Quran will start at its best.
Qualified Teachers - We have numbers of tutors who are not only equipped witht he latest Quran Learning and Teaching techniques, but also are aware of the Modern General Tutoring. This is where QuranTutor.com becomes special and distinct from other online Quran Learning academies.
Multiple Courses - The QuranTutor.com offers multiple courses from basic Quran Reading level to an advanced level which gives a student an opportunity to start learning Quran from a feasible course.

visit the site and get yourself registered in order to start your Quran Learning Journey now...

http://www.holyquranclasses.com/

May Allah's Blessings be upon All of Us

Name: Tse Chen Ling Center for Tibetan Buddhist Studies
Description:
Tse Chen Ling means “Land of Great Compassion” in the Tibetan language. Our center was named by His Holiness the Dalai Lama of Tibet. We are a non-profit, volunteer based organization located in the Ingleside District of San Francisco.

We are a meditation, study and practice center. We offer courses following the basic Buddhist studies program, advanced Tibetan Buddhist studies, as well as other basic life improvement classes. As an urban center, we are pleased to offer a taste of long retreat by hosting several weekend retreats per year. We are especially happy to host qualified Buddhist masters from all over the world, particularly from India and Tibet. We are grateful to have dedicated local instructors and facilitators to lead many of our classes. Our doors are open to anyone sincerely interested in discovering the Buddhist path. The Center is affiliated with the Foundation for the Preservation of the Mahayana Tradition (FPMT) – a network of 160 meditation centres and social service projects dedicated to benefitting others in 36 countries around the world. For more information about the FPMT, please visit www.fpmt.org.

Name: Harvest Ministries Guam
Description: Harvest Baptist Church has been helping people develop a heart for God on Guam since 1975. We operate Harvest Christian Academy, Harvest Baptist Bible College, Harvest Family Radio, and other associated ministries.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Springfield
Description:
The Roman Catholic Bishop of Springfield, a corporation sole, is the civil corporate name for the Diocese of Springfield. The Bishop of Springfield is the head of the corporation. The Roman Catholic Diocese of Springfield, which was erected on June 14, 1870, operates under both civil law and canon law (the law of the Church). It is comprised of 79 parishes and 7 missions with more than 199,289 Catholics. There are 184 priests throughout the four western counties of Massachusetts (Berkshire, Franklin, Hampden and Hampshire).
The diocese educates over 2,500 students in 12 elementary schools, 2 high schools. There are also 2 Catholic college in the Diocese of Springfield.
The diocese supports our laity and public with extensive services, such as providing homes for the aged, a hospital, and a health care center.

Name: Sojourn Chaplaincy / San Francisco General Hospital and Trauma Center
Description: Sojourn offers a multi-faith nonjudgmental ministry of presence, and pastoral care training for the broad multicultural mix of patients, their loved ones, the staff of San Francisco General Hospital and the community.

Name: Grace Church, Erie PA
Description: Grace Church exists to make and be fully devoted followers of Jesus Christ. We have locations in McKean and Harborcreek Pennsylvania and love to serve the Erie community. Our live Grace Online church community also exists to share Jesus and the gospel with people all around the world.

Name: Redeemer Community Church - Birmingham
Description: We strive to be a people who spread a passion for the supremacy of God in all things through Jesus Christ. The gospel of Jesus Christ transforms us to be a people who love God and love our neighbor.

Name: Church of the Holy Spirit Leesburg
Description: Our church is a multi-ethnic, multi-generational church that is known for loving God, loving people, and welcoming God’s presence and power.  You are welcome here, no matter what you believe – you can belong before you believe.   When you visit us on a weekend, please introduce yourself to a pastor – we really want to get to know you!

Name: Asbury Church, Raleigh
Description:
Asbury Church is located in Raleigh, North Carolina. Tom Newman is the lead pastor. 

The mission of Asbury is to engage people in relationships where Christ transforms. Its vision is met by engaging people during WORSHIP, in GROUPS, and through SERVICE.

To this end, Asbury offers a dynamic environment for families, children and students. Asbury has two worship environments. You'll experience a blend of current musical styles with timeless lyrics in a relaxed setting at our 9:30 contemporary service. If you prefer a more traditional service, join us at 11:00 to enjoy classic hymns and seasonal liturgy.

Come as you are, enjoy a cup of coffee and join us as we worship together.

Name: United Hebrew Congregation
Description: To be at United Hebrew is to be completely, joyfully at home. Ours is a congregation that welcomes people at all stages of life. No matter where you are on your own journey, there is a place for you at United Hebrew. We provide innovative and inclusive opportunities to participate in Jewish life through worship, music, education, social events, community service opportunities, and youth and family programs. We are thankful to have a rich history that weaves us into the fabric of the St. Louis community – and a bright future carried by our congregants, our clergy, and all who pass through our doors.

Name: International Missionary Foundation
Description:
The International Missionary Foundation is a growing nonprofit which exists to serve the suffering Christ in the poor both physically and spiritually through mutually beneficial Parish2Parish relationships. IMF connects parishes in the United States with parishes in developing countries through sustainable mission trips and retreats to bring about parish renewal in the Church. Currently, the organization operates within the Lincoln Diocese, and the Omaha and Denver Archdioceses. 

To learn more about IMF visit: imfmission.org

Follow us on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/International-Missionary-Foundation-IMF-221148004586421

Name: Adath Israel Congregation
Description: Adath Israel Congregation is an egalitarian Conservative synagogue affiliated with The USCJ providing religious involvement, cultural and social programming and education for individuals of all ages. Adath is committed to building bridges locally within our own greater Mercer County interfaith community and internationally with the promotion of peace and healing in Israel and throughout the world.

Name: Canadian Land Reclamation Association
Description: Canadian Land Reclamation Association is a religious institutions company based out of P.O. Box 61047 Kensington RPO, Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

Name: Live Free
Description: Live Free Ministries exists to help men and women break free of porn addiction and shame through the power of supportive community.

Name: Diyanet Center of America
Description: The Diyanet Center of America’s mission is to enlighten society about religion with factual and updated knowledge based on essential Islamic sources, an organization dedicated to providing religious and social services to Turkish people and all Muslims living in the United States. It is the assumed business name of Turkish American Community Center Inc. (TACC), a non-profit organization that was founded by the local Turkish community in 1993 in Lanham, Maryland.

Name: Igreja Batista Central em Santo André
Description: Uma Igreja comprometida com a oração e a dependência do Espírito Santo. Priorizamos o ensino da Palavra, reconhecemos a bíblia como a palavra de Deus e o nosso manual de fé e prática.

Name: Trinity Church Lubbock
Description:
Trinity Church was founded in 1963 and our vision is to spiritually transform the world by growing fruitful, fulfilled followers of Jesus Christ, who are spiritually whole.
Here at Trinity Church, we extend Christ to all, engage in passionate worship, equip the believer, and experience community.
Trinity Church is a place for people like you!

Name: New Testament Christian Church
Description: New Testament Christian Church is a religious institutions company based out of P.O. Box 629, Graham, WA 98338

Name: Countryside Bible Church
Description: Countryside Bible Church in Southlake Texas

Name: Church Safety Guys
Description: Our goal is to provide resources of training, equipment, and discipleship to the 90% of Churches in the United States with under 500 in membership. Church Safety isn't all about security and medical practices. It's about a ministry approach, blending in service, leadership and grace to assist the community with effective ministries.

Name: Roskilde Stift
Description:
Roskilde Stift er ét af ti stifter i den danske folkekirke og ledes af biskop Ulla Thorbjørn Hansen.
Stiftsadministrationen har adresse i Roskilde, på Stændertorvet 3a.

Stiftet består af 12 provstier og 313 sogne fordelt over 5480 kvadratkilometer på Sjælland. Der er ansat ca. 289 præster og en lang række andre medarbejdere og frivillige i forskellige funktioner.

På LinkedIn fortæller vi om Roskilde Stift og kirkerne som professionelle arbejdspladser. 

Vi opslår job i stiftets administration og udvalgte jobs i kirkerne. Alle job i den danske folkekirke annonceres desuden lokalt og på folkekirken.dk/job.

Følg os også på Facebook og Instagram.

Profilen drives af Presse og Kommunikation i Roskilde Stift.

Name: Eastern Pennsylvania Conference of The United Methodist Church
Description:
If you are in eastern Pennsylvania, there is a great chance that you are not more than a few miles away from a United Methodist Church. The Eastern Pennsylvania Conference of the United Methodist Church is made up of about 465 churches, which serve nearly 125,000 members in 16 counties. The Eastern Pennsylvania Conference and its sister Peninsula/Delaware Conference together compose the Philadelphia Area, with nearly 1,000 churches served by Bishop Peggy Johnson.

Led by Bishop Johnson, the Conference is part of a spiritual movement, with a mission to make disciples of Jesus Christ for the transformation of the world. Today, this mission is the focus of the conference’s 465 churches, congregations which speak to diverse and multi-generational populations in the many cities, towns, and rural areas throughout our area. 

These congregations seek to call persons to new life in Christ, nurture persons to be disciples of Jesus Christ, and address the needs in our communities as well as throughout the world through mission and ministry and by advocating for justice. 

Counties in The Eastern Pennsylvania Conference: Berks, Bucks, Carbon, Chester, Columbia, Delaware, Lancaster, Lebanon, Lehigh, Luzerne, Monroe, Montgomery, Northhampton, Northumberland, Philadelphia, Schuykill 
Cities in The Eastern Pennsylvania Conference: Lebanon, Hazleton, Pottsville, Shamokin, Chester, Coatesville, Philadelphia, Doylestown, Reading, West Chester, Allentown, Bethlehem, Quakertown, Stroudsburg, Norristown, Lancaster, Levittown, Pottsville

Name: Baptistengemeente De Rank
Description: We zien er naar uit je te ontmoeten tijdens een van onze diensten. Deze zijn elke zondag om 10.00 uur aan de Floridadreef 9, Utrecht.

Name: Countryside Christian Church
Description: No matter where you are in life, you are welcome here. At Countryside Christian Church, you’ll find a community built on faith, love, and a shared mission to grow closer to God. Join us as we worship, serve, and walk together in a life of purpose. There’s a place for you at Countryside, and we can’t wait to see what God has in store for you.

Name: Ministry Outreach Foundation
Description: MOF is an independent FAITH-BASED organization working to help underprivileged and marginalized groups by empowering, equipping, and evangelizing. Founded by Richard L. Hamlet in 2003, as a holistic relief and development organization, MOF is focused on sponsoring gospel-centered ministries in over thirty countries around the world. Visit our website, mofonline.org for more information on how you can be involved.

Name: Young Life Asia Pacific
Description: Young Life is a world class organization for adolescents. Our staff and volunteers enter the world of young people, focusing on what matters to them -- fun, adventure, friendship and a sense of significance. In doing so, we earn the privilege of talking to them about the good news of Jesus Christ and His love for them. Lives are dramatically impacted when caring adults come alongside them, and they begin to see that their lives have great worth, meaning, and purpose. Young Life's Asia Pacific Division currently impacts the lives of over 78,000 young people in 18 countries in Asia and the Pacific.

Name: Wilberforce International Institute
Description:
Wilberforce International Institute empowers international students and scholars to apply creative, Christ-honoring solutions to the challenges facing their home societies. Tackling issues ranging from poverty and corruption to financial literacy and access to education, we have come alongside individuals from more than 20 nations worldwide develop redemptive, practical solutions.

Recent projects include:

A financial literacy and discipleship program among the impoverished in Indonesia.

A Christian K-12 school among underserved children in Northern India.

A peace-building and reconciliation program training pastors in Zimbabwe.

A Bible-based Christian Education and discipleship program for parents and churches in the Cameroon, where children are rarely included in church life and the concept of discipling children remains largely absent.

A training program for pastors in the eastern Congo focusing on biblical wealth creation through creative entrepreneurial responses to local needs, alleviating corruption, and leadership development.

We believe that God calls Christians to the redemptive task of nurturing human flourishing through the gifts he has given us in the contexts he places us.

Name: Macedonia World Baptist Missions Inc.
Description:
The purpose of Macedonia World Baptist Missions is to assist local independent Baptist churches in the servicing of their missionary families as they are sent forth around the world to propagate the Gospel of Jesus Christ with the goal of establishing local New Testament Churches.

Macedonia World Baptist Missions is pretribulationist, premillennial, and fundamental in doctrine and separatist in practice, opposing modernism, ecumenicalism, neoevangelicalism and the charismatic movement.

Name: Presbyterian Outlook
Description: An independent, biweekly news and ministry resource magazine serving the Presbyterian Church (USA) for 192 years.  We keep an active Web site with up to date news posted almost daily, offer professional development Webinars for church leaders and periodic bulletin inserts for churches.

Name: Greater Cincinnati Young Life
Description: Young Life is a world-class organization for adolescents. Our Greater Cincinnati staff and volunteers enter the world of kids, focusing on what matters to them -- fun, adventure, friendship, and a sense of significance. In doing so, we earn the privilege of talking to them about something that we believe matters most of all -- the truth about God and His love for them.

Name: St. Bartholomew's Episcopal Church
Description:
Welcome to St. Bartholomew's Church, affectionately known as St. B's. St. Bartholomew's is a member of the World-wide Anglican Communion of Churches numbering 70 million people in 38 provinces worldwide. We are followers of Jesus Christ, and as Anglicans trace our origins back to Christ and His apostles. As Anglican Christians, we look to the Scripture first as the authority over the church, tradition (the practices and writings of the historical church) and reason, for allowing continued development of doctrine. We regard the Bible, the three Creeds (Nicene Creed, Apostles' Creed and Athanasian Creed), the Thirty-Nine Articles and the Book of Common Prayer (based on Scripture) as the principal statements of the Anglican doctrine.

OUR MISSION IS:

St. Bartholomew’s Episcopal Church is a family called to grow in love for God, each other and the world. We intentionally choose to live as members of this community, grow in Christ’s image and likeness, and serve the Lord and the greater community with the love of Jesus. 

We do this through The Way of St. B’s -- a rule of life that shapes us through Worship, Internal Formation, External Formation, Action, Evangelism and Stewardship.

Name: Amazing Power of God Prophetic ministry
Description: Amazing Power of God Prophetic ministry (APOGPM) is founded by a Nigerian pastor Daniel Ezekiel in 2009 with a vision of saving the lost of the household of Christ, with mission of preaching the gospel of Jesus Christ: love, forgiveness and peace round the globe. had branches in Nigeria, Ghana, ivory coast, Cyprus.... and was first incorporated in the Republic of Ghana on 15th July 2016.

Name: Viroentg Stratiq Group
Description: Delivering clear, actionable insights that empower brands to grow, innovate, and stay ahead of market shifts.

Name: Missio Africanus
Description: Established in 2014, Missio Africanus is a learning community dedicated to unleashing the missional capabilities of African and other non-Western Christians residing in Britain. Our mission is to enable the UK church to receive and leverage the talents of the diaspora Christian community, while empowering them to effectively disciple their second generation and extend their reach beyond their own communities. To achieve this, we bring together British and non-Western church leaders to engage in mutual learning, enriching the broader church community. Our organization was founded in Birmingham with the assistance of the late Reverend Gabriel Diya, a Nigerian RCCG pastor in Charlton. Over the years, we have united a diverse group of mission leaders, representing various denominations, ethnic and cultural backgrounds, and theological perspectives, to envision how we can participate in God's mission in the contemporary world.

Name: Shift Youth + Community
Description:
We are part of Shift Youth + Community who base themselves in local communities and work with churches, schools and other agencies to provide the best opportunities for young people and communities to find their purpose and their voice.

We believe changing lives by transforming culture is possible – and we’d love you to join us!

Why Are We Here?
We are building a nation of thriving communities with hope filled young people; creating a future where all can flourish.

Who Are We?
We are a growing group of friends, dedicated to our faith, to one another and to the desire to see hope, life and joy return to our local community and across our nation.

What Do We Do?
We base ourselves in local communities and work with churches, schools and other agencies to shift culture and provide the best opportunities for young people and communities to flourish. Grounded in local mission this way, we are able to support others across our region and the country as they work to see their young people and communities flourishing too.

What makes us unique?
We have learnt how to transform the social atmosphere, the culture in a place. We’d love to show you how you can do the same; make the settings and groups you are part of happier, healthier places for everyone. We are more than just a team with a task to do, we support and join each other in many aspects of our lives as well as the youth and community work we do. For us every bit of our lives is an expression of our faith, not just our prayer times alone or together. In our work we focus both on young people and the communities in which they exist. In the same way we are equally concerned for our local communities and the nation as a whole.

Name: Crestview Baptist Church
Description: Life change through Jesus Christ.

Name: Instituto Emaús
Description:
Restaurar o sentido da vida e pertença social de pessoas em situação de exclusão e invisibilidade, ampliando horizontes e sonhos.
Ressignificar a vida de pessoas, promovendo uma visão integral do ser humano e sua dignidade.
Ser referência no cuidado e valorização da vida, em vista da superação de toda forma de indiferença e apartação social.

Name: HighRidge Church
Description:
You can expect a contemporary service filled with music and energy, a friendly welcoming environment and a message rooted firmly in the Bible.
HighRidge Church's extraordinarily gifted worship team fills the church with song before Pastor Jeff Klingenberg delivers a practical, entertaining and relevant message. The service lasts about an hour and fifteen minutes.

We never pressure anyone into worship, membership or in any other area. Our primary purpose is to strengthen people for life through the love and encouragement of Christ.

Dress ranges from very casual to business casual. Just come comfortable! Join us to experience how God is moving at HighRidge Church!

Name: Kingdom Global Ministries
Description:
WHY DOES KINGDOM GLOBAL MINISTRIES EXIST?

KGM's purpose is to expand the Kingdom of God through connecting & growing people in men's, women's, and mission's ministries. Kingdom Global Ministries (KGM) is a non-profit ministry organization founded in 1992 by Devi & Larry Titus. While growing local churches Larry had a passion to relationally connect and grow people in their personal lives and in their Kingdom callings. From nation to nation, men and women are empowered to accomplish their Kingdom purpose. Whether small groups or mass crowds, business or church leaders, husband and wives, Kingdom Global elevates potential for Kingdom influence.

Name: Patchwork Heart Ministry
Description: Inspired by this generation of young Catholics, Patchwork Heart Ministry seeks to draw the youth of today into a deep and profound relationship with Jesus Christ by sharing our faith through stories, prayer experiences and by boldly and passionately witnessing to the Catholic Faith.

Name: Diocèse de Créteil
Description:
Créé en 1966, le diocèse de Créteil est une circonscription ecclésiastique couvrant le département du Val-de-Marne. Il fait partir de la province ecclésiastique de Paris et regroupe une communauté marquée par une grande diversité culturelle et sociale, reflet de la richesse de son territoire.

Sous la direction de Mgr. Dominique Blanchet, évêque actuel, le diocèse est engagé dans une mission pastorale dynamique, centrée sur l’annonce de l’Évangile et le service des habitants. Structuré en pôles missionnaires et doyennés, il favorise une action concertée entre les paroisses pour répondre aux besoins spirituels et sociaux des populations locales. 

Le diocèse de Créteil s’investit dans plusieurs initiatives contemporaines, notamment la lutte contre les abus, l’écologie intégrale et le cheminement synodal, témoignant de son implication dans les grands défis de l’Église et de la société actuelle. Son objectif est de construire une Église vivante, ouverte au dialogue, au service de tous et en cohérence avec les transformations du monde moderne.

Name: Church of God Mission International
Description: Church of God International’s (CGMi) primary ministry was evangelism-Living up to her motto: Evangelism our Supreme Task, the church engaged in street evangelism and open air crusades.

Name: Royal Redeemer Lutheran School
Description: RRLS exist to equip each student to achieve academic excellence, inspire a lifelong love of learning, and grow Christian leaders. RRLS is a suburban Lutheran school serving 340 preschoolers to grade 8 students and their families, in our 38th year.

Name: Shine Messengers
Description:
Our ultimate goal is to be a shining example for others that glorifies Christ. 
 
Motivational speaking platforms.
 
Interview format and a diverse program filled with Q&A and interactive group sessions.
 
We host meet & greet forums for churches that want to engage members into orientation and aide in communication efforts. 
 
Fun interactive ways to engage new and existing members of your congregation in addition to outreach efforts.
 
Video and photography services for churches.

Name: Legacy Nashville
Description:
At Legacy Nashville, everything we do is motivated by our love for Jesus, for people, and for the world He’s called us to reach. We exist to see lives transformed by the gospel, empowered by the Spirit, and sent out for the sake of eternity. Whether you’re new to faith or looking for a church to call home, you’re welcome here.

Our calling is “The Great Commission” Our conviction is to carry out what Jesus charges us with: “Go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything that I have commanded you.”

Mission
We aim to establish “Kingdom Expressions” in twelve key cities around the world, including Nashville, TN; Calhoun, KY; Dallas, TX; Los Angeles, CA; Seattle, WA; New York City, NY; Toronto, Canada; London, England; Bali, Indonesia; Seoul, South Korea; Tokyo, Japan; and Berlin, Germany.

We are committed to providing education from kindergarten through college, ensuring access to quality learning opportunities for all. 

Our goal is to feed 100,000 children every day, making a tangible impact in the fight against hunger.

Name: Valley Community Baptist Church
Description: Valley is a community of believers of all ages and stages of life — from young adults to growing families to senior adults. There's something for everyone here. As a community and as individuals, our mission is to honor God and grow in Christ by worshiping God, equipping believers, bringing people to Christ and serving our neighbors.

Name: LABI College
