Description: Since 1926, LABI College has equipped young men and women for leadership in the Latino churches by providing biblical, theological, and ministerial training. Reflecting the needs of a multicultural population, today instruction is offered in both English and Spanish, thus providing a setting conducive to the development of an effective multicultural ministry. The Institute’s curriculum focuses on the bilingual and bicultural preparation of men and women who have a calling from God to enter into either full-time ministry, church leadership, or pursue higher education

Name: Westover Church
Description: Westover Church is dedicated to developing mature followers of Jesus Christ through growing in the Gospel, connecting in community, and serving on mission.

Name: Foundations Church
Description:
Foundations Church officially launched in January, 2012. In a very short amount of time we have experienced God’s blessing in a tremendous way, and it is clear that God intends to use Foundations Church to make an eternal impact in Northern Colorado.

We are glad you stopped by our website. Take some time to look around and get to know us better. We hope you’ll consider joining us on a weekend. We currently meet at 1380 Denver Ave in Loveland Colorado on Saturday evenings at 4:30pm and Sunday mornings at 9:00 and 10:45am. Children’s Programs are available for infants through fifth grade.

Name: St. Paul's Baptist Church
Description: St. Paul's is a 120 year old predominantly African American congregation in the heart of the city of Philadelphia.  We are affiliated with the American Baptist Churches and with the Progressive National Baptist Convention. Our Sunday service begins at 11 o'clock in the morning. We also provide food to those who are in need on Wednesday mornings at 11 o'clock.

Name: Christ Church Cathedral
Description: Christ Church Cathedral, the chief mission church of the Episcopal Diocese of Lexington serves a unique downtown ministry in the heart of Lexington. We are a people of prayer and action committed to serving our community.  We have programs and events for all generations.  Everyone can find a place for involvement and service as we seek to extend God’s love made known in Jesus Christ. If you would like to know more about the Cathedral, please visit our website at www.ccclex.org.

Name: Sing Africa-AFLEWO (Africa Let's Worship)
Description:
AFLEWO (Africa Lets Worship) is a project that stems from Sing Africa’s continuing vision to bring hope in Jesus to Africa. Sing Africa was formed in 1996 by a group of then Daystar University students, with a vision of affecting Africa positively by spreading a message of Hope. In Isaiah 43:1-2, God speaks to His chosen people giving them assurance that He is God and there is no need to fear for He created us for a great purpose. AFLEWO was first held in 2004 and has been an annual event ever since.
The AFLEWO Vision is “to stir up hope in Jesus across Africa through annual events of Worship in Music and Prayer from a united front” 
Our mission statement is uniting in worship. We believe our mandate as a ministry is to unite the body of Christ not only in Kenya but Africa. 
The ministry is upheld by the AFLEWO 7 Pillars which are Hope, Unity, Music, Prayer, Word, Leadership, and Excellence.

Name: Memorial Drive Presbyterian Church-MDPC
Description: Memorial Drive Presbyterian Church-MDPC is a religious institutions company based out of 11612 MEMORIAL DR, Houston, Texas, United States.

Name: Cambridge University Sikh Society
Description: Cambridge University Sikh Society is a student-run society, that has the aims of bringing together Sikh Students at the University of Cambridge, as well as to teach people about Sikhism.  We frequently do volunteer work, to serve the public, and help those who can't help themselves, in the way that Sikhism teaches us to.

Name: Central Peninsula Church
Description:
We believe church should be a refuge–a place where anyone can be welcomed in and find rest for their souls. We know that every person has a deep desire to be known and loved, so we seek to meet people where they are, showing them the grace and love of Jesus.

For additional information on CPC, please visit cpc.org or call the church office at 650.349.1132

Name: gfaith
Description:
At gfaith's core we believe that people of faith should have the same right to expressing their beliefs and ideas as everyone else. Our mission is to set a new standard for data privacy protection as we connect people of faith online, all the while creating a welcoming environment for generosity and information exchange.

The gfaith platform will be a place for all of God's people to receive messages of hope and healing.

Name: Personal Ordinariate of the Chair of Saint Peter
Description:
The Personal Ordinariate of the Chair of Saint Peter is a Roman Catholic diocese founded in 2012 to provide a path for groups of Anglicans to become fully Roman Catholic while retaining elements of their worship traditions and spiritual heritage in full communion with the Catholic Church.  The Ordinariate serves Roman Catholics across the United States and Canada through its evangelizing mission, reverence and beauty of worship, sacred music, and study of sacred Scripture. 

Our mission is particularly experienced in our celebration of liturgy, which features Anglican traditions of worship while conforming to Catholic doctrinal, sacramental and liturgical standards. Through Divine Worship: The Missal, we share our distinctive commitment to praising God in the eloquence of the Anglican liturgical patrimony and Prayer Book English.

Members of the Ordinariate are led by Bishop Steven J. Lopes, the first bishop of the Ordinariate of the Chair of Saint Peter.  Based in Houston, Texas, it is the first diocese of its kind in North America with more than 40 parishes and communities.

Name: ESERCITO DELLA SALVEZZA
Description: ESERCITO DELLA SALVEZZA

Name: The Restored Church of God
Description:
The Restored Church of God, led by Pastor General David C. Pack, is commissioned by Jesus Christ to:

1. Announce the good news of the kingdom of God to all nations (Matt. 24:14), including warning the modern nations descended from ancient Israel of impending national punishment (Isa. 58:1-2; Ezek. 33:1-19)

2. Feed God’s flock called out of the world and into His Church (John 21:15-17; I Pet. 5:1-2)

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Portland, ME
Description: The Diocese of Portland was established by Pope Pius IX on July 29, 1853. It includes the entire state of Maine and is part of the Province of Boston. The diocese has an area of 33,215 square miles and a population of more than 275,000 Catholics. It is organized in the form of a corporation sole, the title of which is "Roman Catholic Bishop of Portland." In addition to its 48 parishes, it has eight elementary schools, one private elementary school, one diocesan high school, and one private high school. It also includes one Catholic college, Saint Joseph's College of Maine in Standish.

Name: Archives diocésaines de Fréjus-Toulon
Description:
Service des Archives historiques du diocèse de Fréjus-Toulon (France - 83) installé depuis 2020 à La Castille (Solliès-Ville - 83)

Notre mission : Témoigner de l'enracinement local de la tradition catholique (https://archives.frejustoulon.fr/le-service-diocesain/notre-mission/)

Name: The Jurisdiction of the Armed Forces and Chaplaincy (JAFC)
Description: Under the oversight of the Bishop of the Armed Forces and Chaplaincy, the Jurisdiction of the Armed Forces and Chaplaincy supports the endorsement and care of chaplains serving in the US military, federal and local government, hospital and hospice, law enforcement and other vocational and volunteer chaplains serving their communities. We are the endorsing agency and canonical residence for professional chaplains with the Anglican Church in North America (ACNA) , and other participating Anglican bodies.

Name: Scholar Leaders
Description:
Mission:
Scholar Leaders exists to encourage and enable Christian theological leaders from the Majority World for the Global Church

Vision:
Scholar Leaders’ vision is to cultivate theological leaders from around the globe for lifetimes of impact in the Church and on societies.

Name: Irish Bahá'í Office of Public Affairs
Description: The Irish Bahá'í Office of Public Affairs is involved in a number of social spaces at all levels of society and engages in a range of ongoing activities concerned with various aspects of the wellbeing and progress of all who live in Ireland. While we are always happy to share any learning or insights we may have we don't ever seek to impose a Bahá’í position or, indeed, offer any specific solutions to the problems that face humanity. The OPA strives to learn with and from others through working with like-minded individuals and groups for the wellbeing of all in Ireland and throughout the world.

Name: Our Lady of the Wayside Parish
Description:
Our Lady of the Wayside is a large Roman Catholic parish serving approximately 3,000 families located on the south side of Arlington Heights, Illinois. 

We are a parish who lives the message and mission of Jesus. We do this by building a nurturing Catholic community through prayer, service, and celebration.

In addition to our beautiful Church, OLW has vibrant faith community, active social and pastoral ministries and committees, and a Blue-Ribbon Award-winning K-8 elementary school and a pre-school, located in three of the four parish buildings. 

We invite you to worship and learn with us.

Name: KMK TEKNIK UI
Description: KMK TEKNIK UI (Formerly KUKTEK UI) is a Catholic fellowship/organization operating as one of the religion-governing student body in Universitas Indonesia’s Faculty of Engineering (FTUI). It is established in 1994 with the aim to develop comradery within its’ members, as well as accommodating and supporting members in developing their skill and self-potential.

Name: Zion Lutheran Church & School
Description: Zion Lutheran Church and School is a religious institutions company based out of United States.

Name: Grace Ascent Collective
Description: At Grace Ascent Collective, we believe in the transformative power of grace and elevation, nurtured through a strong sense of community and collaboration. Our platform is dedicated to empowering women to rise above challenges, discover their strengths, and achieve personal and professional fulfillment.

Name: The Family Church
Description: The Family Church is a non denominational.  Seeking to share the Love of Christ with each and every person who walks through the door.  Allow them to be a part of our congregation while walking along side of them, teaching them about Christ, encouraging them to true, trust in the Lord for everything and be faithful to Him.

Name: Apostolic Assembly of The Faith In Christ Jesus
Description: The Apostolic Assembly of the Faith in Christ Jesus is currently one of the fastest-growing Hispanic Christian denominations in the world and the largest and oldest Spanish-speaking Oneness Pentecostal denomination in the United States. Today, it is comprised of over 800 churches in the U. S. and 550 missionary churches in 20 countries including Central and South America and Europe.

Name: Calvary Episcopal Church
Description:
Calvary Episcopal Church is a member parish of the Episcopal Diocese of West Tennessee and The Episcopal Church, USA, which is the United States province of the Anglican Communion. As Episcopalians, we look to Scripture, tradition and reason as the cornerstones of our faith.

We invite you to come experience our worship services and to learn more about Episcopal beliefs and traditions.

Founded in 1832, Calvary today is a vibrant parish that comprises 1200 baptized members.  Although a growing number reside in downtown, our parishioners also come from elsewhere in Memphis, Shelby County, and other neighboring communities.

Name: Freedom House
Description: Join us every Sunday at 10:00am

Name: Diócesis de Sonsón Rionegro
Description: Somos la Iglesia de Jesucristo que peregrina en Sonsón-Rionegro en la fe, la esperanza y el amor; prolongamos la presencia de Cristo viviendo su Evangelio y construyendo el Reino de Dios para que los habitantes del Oriente Antioqueño conozcan al único Dios verdadero y a su enviado Jesucristo y lo anuncien a todos los hombres. 60 Años con el Evangelio, fuerza de Dios!.

Name: Departamento Nacional da Pastoral Juvenil
Description:
O DNPJ pretende ser um mobilizador das juventudes para o anúncio de Cristo Vivo. 

Nessa verdade, partilhada, vivida, experimentada, com os desafios da vida diária de cada jovem, procura-se um reforço da identidade juvenil, numa sociedade e numa Igreja que precisa
da nossa afirmação, pois, o jovem na sua vida, é construção integral, serviço, missão, solidariedade, justiça e caridade, na vida dos que o rodeiam e na vida do próprio planeta.
O jovem utilizará a sua força, energia e paixão, se, depois de escutado, nas realidades em que se insere, sentir aposta nas suas capacidades e tiver espaço para crescer, dando e construindo em conjunto.

O DNPJ é um lembrete para que as juventudes possam continuar a ser um tempo jovem num mundo que necessita de renovação.

Name: World Compassion
Description: For over 50 years, World Compassion has worked specifically in nations that are difficult to access with the Gospel of Jesus Christ. We work to see the Kingdom of God established through church planting, training and discipleship, literature, and humanitarian outreaches. From the former Soviet Union to the war-torn country of Iraq, World Compassion has reached millions with the love of Christ through compassionate programs and ministries around the world.

Name: Eagle Adventure Camps
Description:
Mission
Our Mission is to inspire Christ-like change through outdoor adventure, authentic relationships, and Biblical truth.

Vision
Our vision is to fully utilize the resources God has given us, inspiring each individual to leave our camps more Christ-like, ready to make a difference in their own life, home and community.

Camp Eagle
www.campeagle.org - Rocksprings, TX

Glorieta
www.glorieta.org - Glorieta, NM

Name: Measured Tones Institute of Quran
Description: Measured Tones Institute of Quran is dedicated to making tajwid studies accessible to Muslims around the globe by providing reduced-cost tajwid courses, workshops, and intensives.

Name: Memorial Tabernacle Church (CHSC)
Description:
JOIN THE FAMILY!  
Pastor Ulysses Stephen King, Jr., Mrs. Tiffany, and the Memorial Tabernacle Family welcome you to the family!  Choose to engage with your family to receive the love God has given us to give specifically to you!  

Memorial Tabernacle Church is a non-profit Christian organization serving the needs of North Oakland and its environs.  At Memorial Tabernacle, our focus is Jesus Christ - to worship Him, to praise Him, and to give Him all the glory!   

MISSION STATEMENT 
The Memorial Tabernacle Church has come together by the Holy Spirit for the specific purpose of preaching and teaching the word of God, (the Bible), and about Jesus Christ, God's son, and to proclaim the gospel of the Kingdom of God to the North Oakland Community and its environs; to bring healing to the brokenhearted and deliverance to the oppressed.

Name: International Conference on Missions
Description:
The International Conference on Missions (formerly the National Missionary Convention) exists to Encourage, Equip and Recruit workers for the Harvest.  Founded in 1948, the ICOM was originally a gathering for missionaries put on by missionaries.  In the last 15 years, ICOM has become a unique gathering of Christians from all over the world who are committed to the task of sharing the Good News of Jesus to the world.

International Conference on Missions is a ministry of the Christian Churches – Churches of Christ. It is a religious nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization dedicated to globally advancing the Gospel of Jesus Christ through missions.

Name: St. Therese of Lisieux Catholic Church
Diocese Of Winona-Rochester
Description: The Diocese of Winona-Rochester is a religious institutions company based out of 55 W Sanborn St, Winona, Minnesota, United States. It encompasses 13,000 square miles of southern Minnesota, serving a population of more than 131,000 Catholics.

Name: Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Manila (RCAM)
Description:
The Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Manila is the archdiocese of the Latin Rite of the Roman Catholic Church in Metro Manila, Philippines, encompassing the cities of Manila, Makati, San Juan, Pasay, and Mandaluyong. The current Archbishop is Luis Antonio Gokim Cardinal Tagle, D.D., S.Th.D, the 32nd to hold the office and the fifth native Filipino following centuries of Spanish, American, and Irish predecessors.

The cathedral church is a minor basilica located in Intramuros, which comprises the old city of Manila. The Blessed Virgin Mary, under the title Immaculate Conception, is the principal patroness.

The archdiocese also owns and manages the following institutions located outside its own territorial jurisdiction: Mount Peace Retreat House (in Baguio City, Benguet), Saint Michael Retreat House (in Antipolo City, Rizal), Radio Veritas (in Barangay Philam, Quezon City), and EDSA Shrine or the Archdiocesan Shrine of Mary, Queen of Peace (in Barangay Ugong Norte, Quezon City).

Name: Joshua Generation Church
Description:
Joshua Generation Church is a vibrant and diverse multisite church that meets across Southern Africa. Modelled after the early church in the book of Acts, we seek to live out authentic Christianity (Acts 2:42-47) as a family of believers, devoted to laying down our lives for God and for one another. Our vision is that Joshua Generation Church will become a blueprint for other churches in South Africa, and around the world.

Joshua Generation Church began in January 1999, when Andrew and Emma Selley were sent from The Storehouse Church in Port Elizabeth to start a church in Table View, Cape Town. Beginning with just four people in a lounge, we quickly grew as God added to our number. In time, we planted other congregations, while God also added whole churches to us. We now partner with many churches around the globe as part of an apostolic movement known as Four12.

Name: Ellel Ministries International
Description: Ellel Ministries is a non-denominational Christian ministry that began in England in 1986 and is now established in over 20 countries around the world. We look to serve the Body of Christ in two main ways - by offering personal prayer ministry to those in need and by training and equipping people so that they can help others more effectively.

Name: WINNEBAGO LUTHERAN ACADEMY
Description: WINNEBAGO LUTHERAN ACADEMY is a religious institutions company based out of 475 E MERRILL AVE, FOND DU LAC, Wisconsin, United States.

Name: Teamwork Associates Christian Centre
Description:
Teamwork Associates is an established Christian Centre which consists of an excellent Hospitality & Retreat Centre, Church and Academy, all of which are located in Torada Heights, a quiet and picturesque community with a breath-taking view of the Caribbean Sea and the elegant corridors of Montego Bay. 

These facilities serve to model the type of Christian ministry that encourages reconciliation by providing bases for evangelical outreach, as well as ongoing support of spiritually and socially enriching endeavors.

Teamwork Christian Academy is committed to Christian education and nurturing of children, from early childhood to the secondary level. The current offerings of our academy are an early childhood centre which provides care for children from 6 months to 5 years. Our high school's special education department serves as western Jamaica' s premier place of learning for students of secondary school age who are challenged by the grades 7 and 8 curriculum.

The Hospitality & Retreat Centre found on our 15 acre property, offers a dormitory with 24 bedrooms, a spacious conference room and dining area which are available to Christian organizations, community associations and corporate groups for camps, retreats, and conferences.

Individuals, families and other groups in need of a tranquil home away from home, may consider placing  a booking at Casa Torada. This facility is our tranquil guest house with 9 air-conditioned bedrooms, recreational spaces, swimming pool, and outdoor lawn areas which are perfect for small weddings and other events.

Worship services at our Church are held every Sunday at 10 a.m. Teamwork Church emphasizes ministry to children and youth as well as evangelism, building relationships and mobilizing teams.

Name: Sisters of St. Francis, Sylvania
Description: Called like Francis of Assisi to live the Gospel in joyful servanthood among all people, the Sisters of St. Francis of Sylvania, Ohio, as messengers of peace, commit themselves to works that reverence human dignity, embrace the poor and marginalized, and respect the gift of all creation.

Name: Hyde Park United Methodist
Description:
Hyde Park United Methodist Church is a warm-hearted, open-minded congregation in Tampa, FL. For more than 116 years, we have been dedicated to sharing the love of God within our own congregation, the Tampa community and around the world. 
We are a diverse body of believers, united by our beliefs, known to live our mission to Make God’s Love Real, through ministries to and with members, guests, our community and world. All are welcome to experience God’s love and grace. We invite all to learn and grow with us on the “Discipleship Pathway” — the way we deepen our relationship with Christ and the church, beginning with our five different Sunday services, which embrace both traditional and contemporary worship. Members are also actively involved in many small group activities including groups for adults, missions and outreach, care and support ministries, as well as dynamic children’s and youth programs.

Our Mission: Hyde Park United Methodist Church is a community of people committed to Jesus Christ, empowered by the Holy Spirit, united in the love of God, and called to make that love real to others.

Our Vision: Transforming lives, creating Christian community, and healing our city and the world.

Hyde Park United Methodist is one church with two campuses. Our Hyde Park campus is located on the site of the church’s original gathering place and offers Sunday morning worship as well as children’s and youth ministries. The Portico, our downtown campus, ministers to the downtown Tampa community through groups, music and meditation, with Sunday worship scheduled to begin in Sept. 2016.

Name: Vyasi Vedic Remedies
Description:
To provide the most effective traditional Vedic Yagyas, Pujas, and other remedial measures that assist individuals and organizations in achieving their desires in daily life

To always provide services with honesty, integrity, pure consciousness, and complete client satisfaction

To perform Homas/Yagyas, which are the most reliable and proven remedial measures using which one can avert any possible danger or reduce negativity in one’s life

Name: Espaço K Brasil
Description: O Espaço K foi inaugurado dia 10/03/2003 - dia 07 de Adar Beit de 5763, no calendário judaico - por um grupo de amigos em homenagem à saudosa Caroline Levinzon (Z”L), idealizadora de todo o projeto. Somos um espaço que promove o encontro de jovens da comunidade através de diversas atividades como eventos, palestras, viagens, trabalho voluntário e muito mais. Tudo isso feito pelos próprios jovens, para os jovens. Hoje estamos em mais de 15 cidades e crescendo a cada dia!

Name: Enders Island
Description:
Enders Island is an 11-acre island off the coast of Mason's Island in Mystic, CT. The grounds of Enders Island include a 360° ocean view, beautiful walking gardens, a Seaside Chapel, an outdoor Stations of the Cross, and iconic facilities including the Enders Mansion and the Catholic Chapel of Our Lady of the Assumption. Enders Island has 3 primary ministries:

St. Edmund's Retreat
Featuring private retreats, and an extensive array of programs open to people of all faiths: Speaker Series, Days of Recollection; Day, Weekend, and Week-long Retreats for men, women, clergy, married couples, and a variety of special interest groups.

The Sacred Art Institute
Offering week-long residency workshops in Iconography, Illumination, Calligraphy, Stained Glass, and Sacred Music among others. All Sacred Art Workshops feature highly skilled instructors and can be taken for college credit through Holy Apostles College in Cromwell, CT.

A Recovery Community
Featuring weekly 12-step meetings at Fr. Joe's Place, a Recovery Residence for college-aged men, and a satellite office of the CatholicPsych Institute. 11th Step Recovery Retreats are offered throughout the year.

Visitor parking is provided immediately to the left of the causeway. Our Gift Store featuring homemade jams, jellies, artwork, and apparel is located in the center of the island in the lobby of St. Michael's Hall. Our offices are open from 9 am to 4:30 pm on Monday - Friday and from 9 am to 3 pm on Saturday.

To learn more about the history of the Enders Island or to browse our program schedule, visit our website at www.endersisland.org and follow us on your favorite Social Media platform.

Name: Al-Khoei Foundation
Description:
The Al-Khoei Foundation is a non-profit organisation that comprises a series of charitable institutions in the UK, USA, Canada, France, Pakistan, India and Thailand.

Founded in 1989 by His Eminence the late Imam Sayed Abulqasim Al-Khoei, the Foundation’s aim is to look after the welfare of the Muslim communities, and Shia Muslims in particular, and promote education, engage in dialogue, enhance religious understanding and provide aid and support to the needy.

The Al-Khoei Foundation holds a General Consultative Status at the United Nations Economic and Social Council (UN ECOSOC), and runs several cultural and community centres, schools, semanries, libraries, a university and various other projects worldwide. Moreover, it is regularly consulted by governmental and non-governmental bodies on a number of issues such as community cohesion, faith matters and interfaith relations.

The Al-Khoei Foundation is headquartered in London, UK.

Name: Eglise catholique, Luxembourg
Description:
Eglise catholique à Luxembourg:

Christianisée dès le 4e siècle à partir de Trèves, capitale romaine chrétienne, la région fut parsemée de vastes paroisses lors d’une phase de consolidation au 6e et 7e siècle qui vit venir Saint Willibrord (658-739), missionnaire anglo-saxon actif en Frisonie, s’installer à Echternach où il fonda une abbaye bénédictine à grand rayonnement culturel. Le Luxembourg, marqué par une forte présence d’ordres religieux médiévaux et modernes (jésuites), élit N. D. Consolatrice des Affligés comme patronne de la Ville (1666) et du Pays (1678) - dévotion nationale qui se poursuit aujourd’hui par l’ « octave » mariale annuelle après Pâques. 
Le diocèse créé en 1870 fut érigé en archidiocèse par Jean-Paul II en 1988.

http://www.cathol.lu

Name: Spoken Gospel
Description:
Spoken Gospel is a non-profit digital ministry helping people encounter Jesus by changing the way they read their Bible. We provide free resources that come alongside Bible readers to explain what they’re reading and how it points to Jesus.

Our resources include:
- Explainer Videos — creative introductions that show how each book of the Bible points to Jesus.
- Devotionals & Reading Plans — designed to help people engage deeply with God’s Word.
- The Spoken Gospel Podcast — conversations exploring how the Bible’s biggest themes find their fulfillment in Christ.

Everything we produce is available for free, made possible by the generosity of people who believe in our mission.

We are convinced that true transformation happens when people see the good news of Jesus on every page of Scripture. As the Apostle Paul wrote, “Only by seeing the light of the gospel in the face of Jesus can we be transformed into his image” (2 Cor. 3:18; 4:6).

Join us in our mission at SpokenGospel.com.

Name: Kingdom Leaders Global Alliance
Description:
We are a global, non-denominational ministry called a Prophetic Equipper for the Body, to raise leaders who live for Christ and advance God’s Kingdom Agenda across all Spheres of Influence.

We are raising leaders who hold the two-edged sword of Consecration and Kingdom influence.

Name: Palm Valley Church
Description:
Palm Valley Church exists to lead people to become fully devoted followers of Christ. We also believe that church should be relevant, inspiring, and should put a personal relationship with Christ ahead of “organized religion”.
 
We want people to feel welcome no matter who they are, where they come from, or what they’ve done. We’ve always said, “come as you are!”

Name: The Methodist Church in Singapore
Description:
Founded in 1885, The Methodist Church in Singapore (MCS) is the largest Protestant denomination in Singapore. With 46 churches, 15 schools, missions and welfare agencies, MCS seeks to share the love of God and serve Him by reaching out to people in the different stages of their lives, who may speak different languages and have different needs. Since its founding, MCS has contributed significantly to nation building especially in the areas of education and community work.

Read more about us @ https://www.methodist.org.sg/about-mcs.

Name: Fajr Circle
Description:
Muslim Youth group in RTP area.
Encouraging the community to gather together and pray Fajr.
Striving to keep a strong deen in this dunya.

Name: Cathedral of the Most Blessed Sacrament
Description:
The Cathedral of the Most Blessed Sacrament, the seat of the Archbishop of Detroit and the mother church of the Archdiocese. As our mother church, the Cathedral is the center of our community of faith.

The Cathedral is also home to a parish community of disciples who gather here to worship, serve, learn, and receive the sacraments on a very regular basis.

Name: Associação das Irmãs Franciscanas da Penitência e Caridade Cristã Lar Santa Elisabeth
Description:
Somos uma Casa de Longa Permanência de Idosos mantida e administrada pelas Irmãs Franciscanas da Penitência e Caridade Cristã, que atuam no campo da saúde, educação e assistência social há 180 anos, hoje inseridas na Instituição Lar Santa Elisabeth.

O Lar Santa Elisabeth, está situado em local privilegiado e cercado pela natureza, foi fundado pelas Irmãs Franciscanas da Penitência e Caridade Cristã, há 114 anos zelando pelo cuidado à vida. Iniciou suas atividades em 1903 como Hospital, passando em 1913 para Sanatório, e por fim, em 1989 exclusivamente como Instituição de Longa Permanência de Idosos (ILPI).

Name: Belfast Cathedral
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Belfast Cathedral – a place of historic Christian worship at the centre of civic and religious life in Belfast.  
Join us as we gear up to celebrate 120 years of the ‘Cathedral at the Heart of the City, with the City at is Heart’. The Dean and community warmly welcome you to experience the stunning architecture and artwork of the Cathedral, The Cathedral Church of St Anne.

Among its many impressive features are mosaics by the Martin sisters, stonework by Rosamund Praeger and Morris Harding, beautiful stained glass, marble tiling, intricate wood carvings, and exquisite needlework such as the handcrafted Titanic Pall.

For those seeking a quiet space for prayer and reflection, the Chapel of the Holy Spirit is open to all visitors.

To help us prepare for our 120th anniversary please support the Belfast Cathedral Chairs Appeal: https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/belfast-cathedral-chairs-appeal
 
Regular Service Times: 
- Sundays: Choral Eucharist (11am) & Choral Evensong (3:30pm)  
- Wednesdays: Said Eucharist (1pm)  
- Fridays: Healing Service (1pm) & Choral Evensong (5:30pm)  
- Prayers are said daily in the Cathedral at 1pm 


House Rules: We do not tolerate abusive language, misinformation or incidents of hate crime on our Facebook page or any of our social media platforms. Action will be taken against any user deemed to be found guilty of these actions.

Name: Southern Miss Wesley Foundation Inc.
Description: College students often feel disconnected when they arrive to campus. At USM Wesley, we foster meaningful relationships that provide a faith family for students during their college years.

Name: Iowa Faith & Climate Network
Description:
Iowa Faith & Climate Network nurtures environmental leadership by equipping individuals and communities with resources to take climate action.

We envision a world where people of diverse faith and spirituality work together towards a healthy, just, and sustainable future for all.

Name: Central Assembly of God
Description:
In our church we practice a very personal religion. Why? Because we believe in a personal God who loves and cares about you. He knows what you need, and He wants to be involved in your life. We believe God connects those who accept His Son Jesus to His spiritual family and gives them the most fulfilling life. God's Holy Spirit actually comes to live in them and helps them to live for Him. This very personal relationship makes possible the most meaningful worship.

Our Worship Services and Programs
Our worship services and programs reflect the basic Bible mission of the Assemblies of God: 1) to worship God; 2) to help others come to know the Lord Jesus as Savior; and 3) to train believers for Christian life and service.

We believe the New Testament provides the pattern for life, worship, and service in the power of God's Holy Spirit.

The Bible Our Guide
We recognize the Bible as God's Word, given and preserved for all generations. We believe it is totally accurate, and is the authoritative standard by which to measure beliefs and conduct. That's why preaching and teaching of the Bible is central to every worship service and ministry of our church.

In many ways, we cultivate a “back-to-basics” emphasis. We're not big on ritual, preferring authentic, individual expressions in prayer, music, song, and preaching.

We observe only two sacraments or ordinances. These are ceremonies Christ himself instructed His followers to practice – baptism by immersion in water and Holy Communion.


People Oriented
Central is a people oriented church. Individuals from all backgrounds find acceptance and connect with friends.  We want to connect to each individual through the love of Jesus Christ. He said His love would be the mark of His followers. He also said God the Father seeks those who will worship Him in spirit and truth. That's the kind of worship you'll find at Central Assembly.

Name: St. Thomas More Catholic Church
Description: St. Thomas More Catholic Church is a religious institutions company based out of 11441 Goodwood Blvd, Baton Rouge, LA, United States.

Name: Corpus Christi Catholic School
Description:
At Corpus Christi Catholic School, we are dedicated to every student, providing an exemplary, faith-filled education in the Roman Catholic tradition of Vatican II. We combine that tradition with the very best of today’s technology and resources for a solid educational experience that develops the whole child – spiritually, intellectually, morally, physically and socially.

Our co-ed school of approximately 250 students from preschool through 8th grade provides exciting and challenging classes led by faculty members who are dedicated to presenting a curriculum and way of life that allows us to live, love, and learn faithfully.

Corpus Christi Catholic School is accredited by AdvancED and certified as Catholic through the Catholic School Endorsement of the Office of Total Catholic Education.

Name: ICEJ Canada Aid & Development
Description: International Christian Embassy Jerusalem was established in 1980 in recognition of the biblical significance of all of Jerusalem and its unique connection with the Jewish people. Today it represents millions of Christians, churches and denominations to the nation and the people of Israel. We recognize in the restoration of the State of Israel God's faithfulness to keep His ancient covenant with the Jewish people. We stand with Israel in support and friendship. We equip and teach the worldwide Church regarding God's purposes with Israel and the nations of the Middle East. We are an active voice of reconciliation between Jews, Christian and Arabs and we support the churches and congregations in the Holy Land. Our goal is to reach every segment of Israel's society with a Christian testimony of comfort and love and to reach and actively represent to Israel the support of denominations, churches and believers from every nation on earth.

Name: New Life Baptist Church in Caldas Novas
Description: This church exists to glorify God as we see lives being transformed by the Gospel of Jesus Christ. We want to be a Gospel Centered Community that lives in such a way to magnify the greatness and beauty of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. We aim to do this through our sanctification, our proclamation and our love for God and for our neighbors.

Name: Andrew Wommack Ministries Canada
Description:
Andrew Wommack Ministries is a teaching ministry that places special emphasis on the unconditional love of God and living in the balance of grace and faith. Our vision is to reach as many people as possible with the almost too good to be true news that God loves them unconditionally, and He has proven it through His son, Jesus!

Andrew and Jamie Wommack have been sharing this nearly-too-good-to-be-true news for over forty years. They are taking the Gospel farther by continually expanding their reach, using radio, television, internet, and social media, and by developing materials that they make available for free to those who cannot afford them. God is using Andrew Wommack Ministries to impact more lives today than ever before.

In order to take the Gospel deeper, Andrew and Jamie have also founded Charis Bible College. With over seventy Charis campuses in the United States and around the world, thousands of students every year are being transformed by the Word of God.

Thank you for connecting with us on LinkedIn. For more information about AWM, visit: www.awmi.net. For more information about Charis Bible College, visit: www.charisbiblecollege.ca.

Name: St. Michael Parish
Description:
Vision Statement
The Vision of the Saint Michael Parish Community is to guide and encourage all people to respond to God's universal call to holiness by living their lives according to the teachings of Jesus Christ.

"You shall be holy, for I am holy."  
(1 Peter 1:15-16)

Name: Generation Church
Description: For over ten years, Generation Church has been repeatedly been Arizona’s fastest growing church. Why? Because you’ll experience bold, Biblical preaching that actually speaks to real life, and worship that is passionate. This is a place where hope breaks into hopeless situations, where marriages are restored, families are strengthened, and where freedom from addiction is more than just a possibility... it’s a promise. At GC, you’ll find a community that walks with you through every season of life. Welcome home!

Name: Masorti Judaism (UK)
Description: Masorti means traditional Judaism for modern Jews.  Our purpose is to grow and support flourishing Masorti communities throughout the UK,  We are the umbrella organisation for 15 communities, the European Masorti Bet Din, Noam (Masorti Youth) and Marom (Masorti Young Adults).

Name: Young Professional Catholics of Toronto
Description: YPCT empowers young Catholic professionals to seamlessly integrate their spiritual values into their professional lives. Our vision is to create a thriving community that supports both the professional growth and spiritual development of young Catholics in Toronto. We want Catholic professionals to deepen their connection to the faith, while fostering their professional lives.

Name: SALAM Islamic Center
Description: SALAM Islamic Center is a civic & social organization company based out of 4541 COLLEGE OAK DR, Sacramento, California, United States.

Name: Love & Respect Ministries, Inc.
Description:
What is Love and Respect? We believe love best motivates a woman and respect most powerfully motivates a man. Research reveals that during marital conflict a husband most often reacts when feeling disrespected and a wife reacts when feeling unloved.

We conduct conferences and provide resources to the married, divorced, separated, dating and single. Men and women will learn how to resolve conflict, dealing with the negative reactions (The Crazy Cycle). They will also learn how to motivate each other by meeting each others need (The Energizing Cycle). Even those who feel hopeless in their relationships will gain understanding on how to handle an indifferent or unresponsive partner (The Rewarded Cycle).

Each Cycle centers on two concepts: love and respect. These two words surface in social research and the Bible (Ephesians 5:33) as the two key ingredients for a successful marriage. From our research, those attending the Love and Respect conference, watching the Love and Respect DVD in small groups, or reading the Love and Respect resources, are experiencing understanding, forgiveness, reconciliation, change, and hope. Through personal enrichment, they go on to minister to others in small groups.

Name: IPDA - IGREJA PENTECOSTAL DEUS É AMOR
Schweizerische Evangelische Allianz (SEA)
Description:
- Gemeinschaft fördern: Die Einheit und das gemeinsame Handeln der Christen sind uns wichtig.
Wir fördern die Zusammenarbeit evangelischer Werke sowie Landes- und Freikirchen – national und vor Ort.
- Gesellschaft verändern: Wir wünschen uns, dass christliche Werte die Gesellschaft positiv mitprägen.
Wir äussern uns zu aktuellen ethischen und religiösen Fragen und beteiligen uns an der öffentlichen Diskussion.
- Glauben teilen: Es ist uns ein Anliegen, dass Menschen Jesus Christus kennen lernen.
Wir realisieren und unterstützen Projekte, die den Menschen die Liebe Gottes und die Inhalte des christlichen Glaubens verständlich vermitteln.

Name: CSSp
Description:
Somos uma família missionária, fundada em 1703 e dedicada ao anúncio do Evangelho sobretudo entre os mais pobres e os que mal ouviram falar de Cristo.

Com mais de 300 anos de missão, olhamos o futuro com renovada confiança na ação do Espírito Santo. Assim vivemos e trabalhamos:

- Ao lado dos mais pobres e abandonados
- Ao serviço da primeira evangelização
- Em defesa da Justiça e da Paz
- Ao serviço das Igrejas locais
- No diálogo com as outras religiões

Name: Faith Lutheran School - Plano, Texas
Description: Faith Lutheran School is fully accredited and currently provides classes from pre-school three-year-olds through the twelfth grade. School curriculum is based on the classical model of education. The school’s educational program also includes both sports and the fine arts. In 1971, the congregation of Faith Lutheran Church in Plano, Texas established a four-year-old preschool for children of the congregation. Since then, the school has grown and opened enrollment to others in the community on a tuition basis. To learn more about Faith Lutheran School, please visit the school’s web site at www.flsplano.org or call 972.423.7448.

Name: Abba's House
Description: Abba's House & Ron Phillips Ministries seek to become an international voice, touching the whole world, and bringing the transforming message of Christ to every area of life.  We are a ministry founded on an unswerving commitment to Scripture.  We serve in the spirit of excellence with integrity and compassion for our community, our nation and our world.  We have established a reputation for Biblical integrity mixed with loving compassion.

Name: Holy Trinity Catholic Church - Washington, DC
Description: Holy Trinity is a Roman Catholic parish sponsored by the Society of Jesus (Jesuits), a religious community that was founded by St. Ignatius of Loyola in the 16th century. The mission of the parish, since her inception in 1787, has been to help parishioners live the Gospel of Jesus, that is, to celebrate the Sacraments well and often, to engage in collaborative ministry with the laity and all people of good will, to foster individuals' deepening relationship with Jesus through all forms of the Spiritual Exercises, and to be in solidarity with persons who are living on the margins of society, empowering them to change unjust social structures. In this way, Holy Trinity serves the larger Church and the people of God in the Washington, D.C. area.

Name: Faith Presbyterian Church
Description: We are a community of people seeking to glorify God through growing in Christ together; sharing our hope with others.

Name: YWAM Student Centre
Description: Haven House Christian Study Center is a ministry of YWAM Student Centre, which is part of YWAM International (Pronounced “WHY-wham”), a global movement of Christians dedicated to knowing God and making Him known.

Name: The Catholic Center at UGA
Description: The Catholic Center at UGA is a Eucharistic community that seeks to live the Gospel of Jesus Christ through the Roman Catholic Church. This faith-based and multi-generational community has served the UGA and Athens communities for over 70 years.

Name: Officers' Christian Fellowship at Leavenworth
Description: For over 50 years we have engaged mid-career military officers and their families in Biblical fellowship to grow and equip them for impactful Christ-like service in the next phase of their career and beyond.

Name: Diocese de Uberlândia
Description: Instituição religiosa oficial da Igreja Católica Apostólica Romana em Uberlândia, Minas Gerais. Criada em 22 de Julho de 1961, a Diocese de Uberlândia congrega as instituições católicas em nove cidades no Triângulo Mineiro. Mais informações, podem ser obtidas através do site http://www.dioceseuberlandia.org.br.

Name: Rabbi Yehonatan Sanders - הרב יהונתן סנדרס
Description: Rabbi Yonatan Sanders helps raise funds for the needy, he is a leader, you can feel free to send a message to any question you want.

Name: B. H. Carroll Theological Seminary
Description:
B. H. Carroll Theological Seminary is a graduate-level community of faith and learning that equips men and women called to serve Christ in the diverse and global ministries of His church.

Through an integrated network of Fellows, Teaching Churches, and Learning Centers, the Institute seeks to mobilize the priesthood of believers for service in society. It provides, through appropriate media, theological education that is both biblically based and praxis oriented. The Institute develops Christ-centered leaders who are committed to academic excellence, life long learning, and transformational ministry. The Institute works collegially with other evangelical Christians. its confessional basis is the consensus of opinion concerning those articles of the Christian faith and practice that have been most surely held and expressed in historic Baptist principles and practices.

Programs of Study: M.Div, M.Div. in Chaplain Ministry, M.A. in Worship, M.A. in Counseling, M.A. in Theology, M.A. in Religion, M.A.C.E., D.Min, PhD

Name: Brand Disciples
Description:
Brand Disciples helps businesses integrate a community impact venture with their business that aligns stakeholder concerns and business goals with high-impact social enterprises that transform inefficient charitable activity into community impact and business value.

The results are:
-Fully self-sustaining
-Greater marketing ROI and network expansion
-Charitable dollars become 100% deductible
-Expand and deepen skilled workforce
-Increase Employee retention and health 
-Open new markets and extend brand reach and visibility
-Customer loyalty improvement
-Documented community impacts

Name: Prison Ministry of America
Description: Prison Ministry of America (PMA) is a ministry of compassion with a focus on outreach to our community, evangelism and discipleship to the poor in spirit and those experiencing incarceration. This organization is a religious nonprofit, a 501 (c)(3) charity set up to provide resources, hope and light to those experiencing incarceration. It is a walk of faith and has been a labor of love since 1926 (formerly known as Christian Chaplain Services and Christian Jail Workers).

Name: Interserve Nederland
Description: Geloof werkt. Het stempelt ons leven en bepaalt hoe we ons gedragen op de werkvloer, in huis of op straat. Daarom zenden we enthousiaste vakmensen uit om in Azië en de Arabische wereld te werken en te laten zien hoe goed het is om met God te leven. We geloven dat een ontmoeting met Jezus Christus een blijvende verandering brengt.

Name: Living Bread Ministries
Description: Living Bread Ministries is leading a comprehensive church planting movement among the global poor.  We are equipping our church plants to minister to their communities in a comprehensive way; addressing spiritual, physical, emotional, and relational needs.

Name: Pre-Sin Citizens
Description: Pre Sin Citizen is a faith based organization of people who believe that we have been forgiven by God without sacrifice, and because God has forgiven us without sacrifice we can live life in Gods presents unashamed & free.

Name: Alfurqan Centre Manchester
Description:
Alfurqan Islamic Centre in Manchester aims to promote the true message of Islam, uniting Muslims to grow, while working to build positive relations with all communities.
Our mission is educating, empowering and serving the needs of the Greater Manchester Muslim & the wider community.
Our dream has always been to develop a broad-based, representative organisation for all Muslims in Manchester, accommodating and reflecting the variety of social and cultural backgrounds, in line with authentic Islamic principles.
Hence, the leadership team has been successful to build a very active, busy and productive Centre in the UK North, attracting Muslims and non-Muslims alike as follows

Name: Buddhist Society of Western Australia
Description:
The Buddhist Society of Western Australia was formed in 1973 with one overarching goal which persists to the present day: that people will be able to hear the Dhamma, practice the Dhamma and realise the Dhamma for themselves. The Dhamma is the teachings given by The Buddha over 2600 years ago, and those teachers point to an underlying and transcendent reality which everyone can experience directly for themselves. In order to see reality as it truly is without the fetters of craving and desire, the Buddha established a series of practices taken together are referred to as the Eightfold Path. This path of practice includes developing generosity and kindness, morality, and meditation, leading to the unfolding of wisdom.

Since the time of the Buddha up until today, people across time and place have taken to the practice as both laymen and monastics in order to see the truth (dhamma) directly for themselves. This is the tradition which the Buddhist Society of Western Australia seeks to establish and sustain in the contemporary world, so that through practice people can realise the Dhamma for themselves and be free from suffering.
The Gradual Path

The Buddha also referred to the practice as the Gradual Path as it unfolds gradually of time and in stages. The Buddhist Society of Western Australia seeks to support people striving to understand the human experience and escape from suffering at the stage where they are at. We offer free beginners courses in meditation to the general public as a first step. There are also numerous teachings on meditation available online to those new to meditation. For those wanting to take things further there are a range of practices that can be voluntarily adopted including the Five Precepts which is a morality practice aimed at reducing harm to others and refraining from the creation of unwholesome actions (kamma). There are also weekend and nine-day meditation retreats offered at our Jhana Grove Retreat Centre in Serpentine for those see

Name: Berean Baptist Church, MN
Description: We are a Baptist church with campuses in Burnsville and Lakeville, MN.

Name: Bless the Children Ministries
Description:
Millions of children are born into broken cultures that tell children they are not worthy of belonging. They are labeled:

- Forgotten: Millions of children are separated from their families, depriving them of love, care, and connection needed to thrive.
- Oppressed: Children who grow up in abusive, neglectful, and impoverished families are significantly more likely to pass it on to their own children.
- Trapped: Low quality education and lack of jobs force children and families to live day-to-day, unable to break cycles of poverty.

We help children discover their worth and make a way for a hope-filled, brighter future. We do this through 3 primary services: 

1) Family Restoration: We work to reunify a child with a safe, loving, permanent family while empowering and strengthening these families with resources.

2) Personalized Education: Every child is given the opportunity to excel and reach their fullest potential through a full continuum of education.

3) Discipleship: We help each child develop and nurture an authentic, personal relationship with God and with community.

Together, we can restore a child’s identity, ignite their God-given purpose, and equip them to transform generations.

Name: Lovers Lane United Methodist Church
Description:
At Lovers Lane, our mission is Loving ALL People Into Relationship with Jesus Christ. We carry this out by growing outreach to others and meeting the needs of our diverse congregation as we passionately serve ALL God’s children with humility, courage, and authenticity. On any given Sunday, you will witness a unique kind of church gathered and valuing “welcoming all, inspiring all, growing all and serving all people”. We hold both traditional and contemporary worship services, programs for children, youth adults and seniors. Lovers Lane is proud to host a Deaf Fellowship, African Fellowship and Zimbabwe Fellowship each Sunday, with some services translated in American Sign Language.
 
Throughout the week, you can experience the impact of the non-profit corporations we have formed as extensions of our outreach—The Lovers Lane Foundation, which supports the church’s ministry, outreach and evangelism; Wesley Prep, one of the finest schools anywhere for children 6 months through 6th grade; Rays of Light, the fastest growing respite ministry in the metroplex for children with special needs and their families; The Twelfth Step Ministry, arguably the largest classical recovery ministry in the world, which is housed at our Center for Spiritual Development; Lovers Lane Academy for the Deaf, which serves the greater Dallas area, and produced SEEDS, our incredibly dynamic ministry designed specifically for deaf children.

Name: Peachtree Road United Methodist Church (PRUMC)
Description:
Peachtree Road United Methodist Church seeks to help the people of Atlanta find their peace and their purpose within a Christian community.

Our vision is to be a place of inspiration for all people so they may realize their potential in serving others; and in doing so, become leaders and exemplify the principles of our Christian faith.

Here, all are welcome to join in the worship of God, the fellowship of this community, and the ministry of outreach. Regardless of your age, orientation, income, politics, color or creed, you are welcome in this place.

We believe that every person on every path can lead as well as serve, and in doing so find inclusion and fulfillment. Peachtree Road United Methodist Church is a church for all the people of Atlanta and we hope you will be a part.

Name: Our Lady of Mercy Regional Catholic School
Description:
Our Lady of Mercy Regional Catholic School opened its doors in the year 2012 and continues the outstanding legacy of Catholic education that was started in the Archdiocese of Philadelphia over 230 years ago.  OLM is a joint ministry of St. Alphonsus Parish (Maple Glen), Saint Catherine of Siena Parish (Horsham), St. Anthony of Padua Parish (Ambler) and St. Joseph Parish (Ambler).  Our School is one of the jewels in the crown of the Archdiocese of Philadelphia. It sparkles with the laughter of children, the joy of learning, the light of loving parents and teachers. It our short history, OLM has mushroomed into an expansive academic complex-complete with a state-of-the-art science lab, library, extended care program, computer lab, and dedicated rooms of instruction for music, art, and Spanish. 
More than 425 children - in grades K through eight-attend Our Lady of Mercy Regional Catholic School. A dedicated staff of over 30 lay professionals work in partnership with parents to provide our school children with a faith-based education that focuses on academic excellence and the development of Catholic values. 
Our children are actively engaged in public service from the time they enter kindergarten until they leave the eighth grade. Each graduate of OLM has left as a young Disciple of Christ-a shining reflection of His loving light.  Our Lady of Mercy Regional Catholic School is deeply committed to presenting educational opportunities and challenges that lead to solid student achievement.

Name: CMS Australia
Description: The Church Missionary Society (CMS) is a fellowship of Christian people and churches committed to global mission. We work with churches to set apart godly people as long-term cross-cultural gospel workers.

Name: Beth El Synagogue
Description: Beth El Synagogue is a vibrant home where Judaism is lived: community is family, learning inspires action, prayer touches the heart, and deeds repair the world

Name: GACX: a global alliance for church multiplication
Description: GACX, a global alliance for church multiplication, inspires and facilitates intentional collaboration among churches and missions organizations so that there will be a healthy, multiplying church for everyone.

Name: Hub City Wesley
Description: College students often feel disconnected when they arrive to campus. At USM Wesley, we foster meaningful relationships that provide a faith family for students during their college years.

Name: Redemption Church Netherlands
Description: Wij zijn een jonge kerk met mensen van allerlei leeftijden, achtergronden en voorkeuren. Maar wel allemaal met één passie: de liefde van God en als levend voorbeeld daarvan Zijn Zoon Jezus. Wij zijn door God zo geliefd, dat Hij het voor ons mogelijk heeft gemaakt om Zijn kinderen te worden. Net als Jezus. Daardoor voelen we ons waardevol, gelukkig, bevoorrecht en kijken we met een positieve blik naar het leven en de toekomst. Je kunt ons bezoeken in Amersfoort, Amsterdam, Hellevoetsluis, Rotterdam, Twente en Online.

Name: Saint Anthony Young Adult Society
Description: VIVA SANT'ANTONINO VIVA!!!

Name: Gist
Description:
Gist is een jong initiatief dat nog volop aan het rijpen is. Hoe we ons verlangen nu verwoorden? Bij Gist willen we iedereen een plek bieden om zich op een brede, belichaamde en transformatieve manier bezig te houden met christelijke spiritualiteit. Met een focus op creëren en het lichaam. 

Bij Gist wordt brood gebakken en bier gebrouwen op een ambachtelijke manier. Dat wil zeggen: ouderwets langzaam. Want de transformatie van graan, water, zout en hop in brood en bier gaat niet van de ene op de andere dag! Wanneer corona het weer toelaat bieden we interactieve programma's aan. Gist is gevestigd in twee mooie kelders onder de Nieuwe Herengracht 18.

Name: Iglesia Católica
Description: Fundada por Jesucristo, la Iglesia Católica es la Iglesia cristiana más numerosa. Está compuesta por veinticuatro Iglesias sui iuris: la Iglesia latina y veintitrés Iglesias orientales, que se encuentran en plena comunión con el papa y que en conjunto reúnen a más de 1378 millones de fieles en todo el mundo.

Name: IUT Society of Islamic Knowledge Seekers
Description:
IUT SIKS is an official Society of Islamic University of Technology (IUT). The motto of this club is to seek true knowledge of Islam.
IUT is an International University which is run by The Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC). As a Muslim, it's our duty to seek the true knowledge of Islam and spread the ideology among the Muslim Ummah around the globe.

Name: Benet Hill Monastery
Description:
The Sisters of Benet Hill Monastery are a contemporary, Benedictine monastic presence located in the Black Forest of Colorado Springs, CO. We provide the sacred space of Benedictine hospitality to create hope and healing for the world. We offer hospitality at our Colorado locations and through our digital presence.
 
We educate others about ancient monastic practices such as Centering Prayer, Spiritual Retreats, and Lectio Divina. We provide spiritual direction, counseling, and grief work for individuals, and online training to become certified as Benedictine Spiritual Directors.

We revere all creation and are radical signs of God's love and compassion, using our resources in service with all God's people.

Name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Erie
Description: The Diocese of Erie, the largest in Pennsylvania, spans 10,167 square miles across 13 counties in Northwestern Pennsylvania, serving a Catholic population of 193,000. Guided by Bishop Lawrence T. Persico, JCL, since 2012, our mission emphasizes active pastoral care, faith formation and community engagement. Bishop Persico has led us through a comprehensive pastoral plan while remaining deeply connected to the people, regularly visiting parishes, schools and organizations.

Name: Westside Church
Description:
Westside Church in Bend, Oregon, exists to equip men, women, and children to extend the life and love of Jesus in their world by helping them know Jesus and become more like Him.

Our focus is on three aspects of the Christian life: life in community, love for our neighbors, and keeping Jesus at the center of our faith and practice.

We want to extend the kind of warm welcome that Jesus offered to everyone He encountered. No matter your background, past religious experience, or skepticism, you are invited to belong here.

Name: Oklahoma Faith Network (formerly Oklahoma Conference of Churches)
Description: We seek to extend care, inclusion, and justice to all of our neighbors.

Name: One Hope Project
Description: One Hope Project is a creative collective which writes and records music, produces art and spoken word poetry and encourages young people to be creative, particularly in their own contexts.

Name: CMF Nederland (Christian Medical Fellowship)
Description:
CMF Nederland is een vereniging van artsen en medisch studenten, tandartsen en tandheelkunde studenten, die vanuit hun christelijke overtuiging hun medisch denken en handelen vorm willen geven.
Het organiseert hiertoe conferenties, heeft artsen-gespreksgroepen en thema-avonden in studentensteden en werkt aan eigen uitgaven.

Name: Exposit The Word
Description:
Pointing people towards sound Bible teaching.

Instant Free access to a vast and ever-growing video library made up of 2500+ videos

#Christian #Reformed

Name: Congregation Kol Ami
Description: Reform Jewish Congregation in Elkins Park, PA

Name: مؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة
Description:
مؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة


مؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة، تشكل إطارا للتعاون وتبادل التجارب، وتنسيق الجهود، بين العلماء، للقيام بواجبهم، في التعريف بالصورة الحقيقية للدين الإسلامي الحنيف، وبقيمه السمحة، القائمة على الاعتدال و التسامح والتعايش. ويندرج إحداث مؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة  في إطار منظور متكامل، للتعاون البناء، والتجاوب الملموس، مع مطالب عدد من البلدان الإفريقية الشقيقة، على الصعيدين الرسمي والشعبي، في المجال الديني.

ترأس أمير المؤمنين صاحب الجلالة الملك محمد السادس، نصره الله في 08 رمضان 1437 الموافق لـ 14 يونيو 2016 بجامع القرويين بفاس، حفل تنصيب أعضاء المجلس الأعلى لمؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة التي أحدثت بمقتضى الظهير الشريف رقم 1.15.75 الصادر في 07 رمضان 1436 الموافق لـ 24 يونيو2
في هذا السياق، ترأس أمير المؤمنين صاحب الجلالة الملك محمد السادس، نصره الله في
 08 رمضان 1437 الموافق لـ 14 يونيو 2016 بجامع القرويين بفاس، حفل تنصيب أعضاء المجلس الأعلى لمؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة التي أحدثت بمقتضى الظهير الشريف رقم 1.15.75 الصادر في 07 رمضان 1436 الموافق لـ 24 يونيو 2015.

أهداف مؤسسة محمد السادس للعلماء الأفارقة

توحيد وتنسيق جهود العلماء المسلمين، بكل من المغرب وباقي الدول الإفريقية، للتعريف   بقيم الإسلام السمحة ونشرها وترسيخها؛
القيام بمبادرات في إطار كل ما من شأنه تفعيل قيم الدين السمحة في كل إصلاح تتوقف عليه عملية التنمية في إفريقيا سواء على مستوى القارة أو على صعيد كل بلد؛
تنشيط الحركة الفكرية والعلمية والثقافية في المجال الإسلامي؛
توطيد العلاقات التاريخية التي تجمع المغرب وباقي دول إفريقيا والعمل على تطويرها؛
التشجيع على إقامة المراكز والمؤسسات الدينية والعلمية والثقافية؛
إحياء التراث الثقافي الإفريقي الإسلامي المشترك من خلال التعريف به ونشره والعمل على حفظه وصيانته؛
ربط الصلات وإقامة علاقات التعاون مع الجمعيات والهيئات ذات الاهتمام المشترك.

Name: Foursquare Gospel Church in Nigeria
Description:
In Nigeria, the Church started in October 1955 through the endeavours of a missionary couple; Rev and Mrs. Harold Curtis from USA. The registered headquarters in Nigeria is at 62/66, Akinwunmi Street Yaba, Lagos State. 

The Foursquare Gospel Church in Nigeria currently has about 4032 churches spread over 154 districts and 824 zones as at September 2018. 

The Church in Nigeria has also reached out to neighboring countries and had established in the Republic of Benin, Ghana, Gambia, Liberia, Cote d'Voire and Central African Republic. Most of these churches in the west coast have been nationalized.

Our current Genereal Overseer is Rev. Samuel Aboyeji.

Name: Sanghi Temple
Description:
Sanghi Temple, located atop Paramanand Giri Hill near Hyderabad, Telangana, is a prominent spiritual destination built in 1991. Renowned as a replica of the Tirumala Temple, it is dedicated to Lord Venkateswara and features a towering Raja Gopuram visible from afar. 

The temple is surrounded by serene landscapes, symbolizing devotion and tranquility, making it a sought-after site for pilgrims and tourists alike. Managed by the Sanghi family, this architectural marvel reflects their dedication to preserving spiritual and cultural heritage. It offers a peaceful retreat for seekers of divine blessings and inner peace!

Name: Temple Beth Ami
Description: Temple Beth Ami is a vibrant, inclusive, innovative community that embraces the beauty, meaning, and inspiration found in Reform Judaism.

Name: NorthCreek Church
Description: In glad reliance on the Holy Spirit and Scripture, we exist to glorify Christ, to make disciples who worship God, walk in love, and witness to the world.

Name: Moody Center
Description:
Continuing the work of Dwight L. Moody in creative evangelism and discipleship by equipping God's servants and ministry leaders to effectively share the gospel.

Moody Center is a 501c3 nonprofit organization created in May 2017. Nestled among the rolling hills intersecting Massachusetts, New Hampshire and Vermont, #DLMoody Center is located on a picturesque New England campus in Northfield, Mass., encompassing D.L. Moody’s historic Birthplace, Homestead, Auditorium, Round Top, Revell Hall and gravesite. 

Current initiatives include renovations for a Welcome Center to open in early Summer 2019, development of a #D.L. Moody Heritage Center
and Museum and final preparations to launch a digital library of never-before-seen archive collections consisting of Moody’s hand-written sermons, letters and other artifacts.

Name: Nederlandse Hervormde Evangelisatie Bethel Schagen
Description: Beth-El is een christelijke gemeente in Schagen.

Name: St. John the Apostle Catholic Church
Motor Racing Outreach
Description:
Motor Racing Outreach (MRO) is a non-profit 501(c)(3) organization founded in 1988 to serve the NASCAR racing community.

Over the years, MRO has evolved due to the requests for our services from other forms of motor sports like stock car, motorcycle, and powerboat racing. Our efforts and resources are directed towards four opportunities of ministry; touring series ministry, fan outreach and evangelism, in-homes and race shop discipleship, and lastly, the development of the Motor Racing Outreach Association (MROA).

Motor sports are pressure filled and can place stressful demands on drivers, crewmembers, officials, media, husbands, children, wives and the many other people groups that make up racing communities. For MRO, and those who partner with us, our opportunity is to support these racing communities so that they may enjoy a more wholesome life together and, in turn, become role models for millions of motor sports fans around the world.

Name: Sanatan Astro Private Limited (Pujari Ji)
Description:
Pujari Ji (Sanatan Astro Pvt. Ltd.), an end-to-end faith-tech venture, is redefining how Sanatan Dharma rituals and spiritual services are accessed in modern times. Through our digital-first platform www.pujariJi.com, we connect devotees with certified Acharyas and Pandits, ensuring that every ritual, whether at Home, Temples, Tirtha Kshetra,-online or offline is performed with authenticity, transparency, and devotion.

All you need is faith, we handle the rest. From verified Pandits to prasad to puja samagri, every detail is taken care of with authenticity and devotion.

Name: Mennonite Church USA
Description: Mennonite Church USA is an Anabaptist Christian denomination, founded in 2002 by the merger of the Mennonite Church and the General Conference Mennonite Church. Members of this historic peace church seek to follow Jesus by rejectingviolence and resisting injustice.MC USA’sRenewed Commitmentsstate the following shared commitments among its diverse body of believers: to follow Jesus, witness to God’s peace and experience the transformation of the Holy Spirit.Mennoniteusa.org

Name: One Hope Church
Description:
At One Hope, we are passionate about sharing the hope in Jesus as we become more like Him every day. 
Our goal is to SEE, FEEL, and ACT more like Jesus.  

To see the truth about God, and value in others.
To feel passion for God, and compassion for others.
To act in surrender to God, and in love towards others.

Name: Doopsgezinden
Description: De Algemene Doopsgezinde Sociëteit (ADS) ondersteunt de doopsgezinde geloofsgemeenschap in Nederland, fungeert als landelijk bureau en centraal beleids-/bestuursorgaan, en verzorgt de vertegenwoordiging naar andere organisaties in binnen- en buitenland.

Name: Yeshiva Toras Chaim Toras Emes
Description: Yeshiva Toras Chaim Toras Emes

Description:
"أُنَاشِدُكُمْ، أَيُّهَا الإِخْوَة، بِاسْمِ رَبِّنَا يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ، أَنْ يَكُونَ لِجَمِيعِكُمْ صَوْتٌ وَاحِدٌ"
