Name: Five Stone Media
Description:
We are a Christian 501c3 non-profit focused on creating video-based tools and resources to support our mission of using STORY to bring HOPE and HEALING to people in need of CHANGE.  Our family of products includes:
1.  LifeSupport Mental Health Library - Video-based resources built on stories shared by real people.  A collection of expert-informed and biblically sound tools including short topic-based videos, group curriculum, and conferences designed to help ministry and mental health professionals support people in need.
2.  Life Blood Reentry - A collection of Christ-centered, video-based tools to equip and support people affected by incarceration.  Products include; 
- The Turnipseed Trilogy of films about John Turnipseed, former gang leader.  The films tell the story of John's childhood, trials of gang life, and restoration.
- The Lifeblood Reentry Curriculum for use inside and out of correctional institutions, a 12-part, video-based course designed to lead individuals and groups on a journey of personal transformation.
- Lifeblood Reentry Support Groups - Weekly community-based, Christ-centered gatherings for anyone working through the affects of incarceration.

Name: Collegeville Institute
Description: The Collegeville Institute was founded in 1967 by Fr. Kilian McDonnell of the Order of Saint Benedict. It is an ecumenical institute rooted in the Benedictine tradition. Located on the campus of Saint John’s Abbey and University in central Minnesota, our mission is to foster healing through the power of religious ideas, insights, faith, and practices. Historically focused on academics and scholarship, we expanded our programs to include pastors, religious leaders, musicians, artists, activists, and writers—those who have something to say about the life of faith in the modern world. Through our writing workshops, research seminars, and long-term and short-term residency programs, we create space for conversation, reflection, and engagement.

Name: Our Lady Queen of Peace Catholic Cemetery of the Diocese of Palm Beach
Description:
Our Lady Queen of Peace Cemetery is pleased to introduce our beautiful Garden Mausoleums (new 2020) and is under new management.  We also offer estate mausoleums, crypts, gravesites, cremations niches, urns, monuments, vaults, and many custom memorial options. Our Family Services Advisors are available to meet with you.  They speak English, Spanish and Polish. 

Our Lady Queen of Peace offers many alternatives for cremation, full-body interment, and memorialization in keeping with the sacred beliefs and traditions of the Roman Catholic Church.

History:

Our Lady Queen of Peace Cemetery was consecrated in 1974 by Archbishop Coleman F. Carroll of Miami. Since 1984, this cemetery has been a part of the new Diocese of Palm Beach and is currently the only Catholic Cemetery owned & operated by the Diocese.

The cemetery is a member of the Catholic Cemetery Conference and serves the faithful communities within the Parishes and Missions of the Catholic Diocese of Palm Beach. The Diocese of Palm Beach includes the 53 parishes and missions of Palm Beach, Martin, St. Lucie, Indian River, and Okeechobee counties.

Name: Straight Street
Description:
The mission and purpose of Straight Street is to provide a positive Christian environment where at-risk* youth can go and obtain the necessary skills and training needed to mature and to discover God’s Divine plan for their lives.  

The staff and volunteers at Straight Street minister to the total individual:  

Physically	By providing opportunities for entertainment, exercise, and service.

Emotionally	By offering a safe place to meet and develop healthy relationships, and find help for unhealthy ones.

Intellectually	By assisting youth with supplemental educational resources, and encouraging them to take full advantage of educational and employment opportunities.

Spiritually	By demonstrating Godly principles for living fulfilled lives, and by leading youth to meet and accept the Lord Jesus Christ as their personal Savior and friend.



* For our purposes at Straight Street, an “at-risk” youth is a young person who is behaving in such a way that if a caring adult or peer does not step into their life with help, they stand a good chance of hurting themselves or others.


 Proverbs 3:5-6
Trust in the LORD with all your heart and do not lean on your own understanding.  In all your ways acknowledge Him, and He will make your paths straight.

Name: Christ Church Nashville
Description:
OUR VISION
Christ Church Nashville is a three streams congregation, uniting the liturgical, evangelical, and charismatic streams of the church into one unified expression of devotional and missional life.
￼￼
By liturgical, we mean that we believe and order our practices around the faith that at all times and in all places has been believed by the whole people of God. We place emphasis on the historical practices of the church, most regularly expressed through our celebration of baptism, communion, and holy days.

By evangelical, we mean that it is our desire to uphold the holy canon of Scripture, delivered to us through the sacrifice of the saints, as our standard and guide for teaching and discipleship. Furthermore, we believe that salvation comes through faith in Jesus Christ and it is our mission to share this news with all of our neighbors.

By charismatic, we mean that we believe the Holy Spirit is actively working to transform us and equip us for mission in the world. It is our desire that our church and our people will be filled with all of the gifts of the Holy Spirit so that we might be formed deeper into the image and character of Christ.

OUR MISSION
Worship—To glorify and honor God as Creator, Redeemer, and Giver of Life.
Proclamation—To declare the Gospel under the empowerment of the Holy Spirit.
Discipleship—To teach, train, and embody the Christian faith.
Community—To connect and engage with other believers.
Missions—To support the work of the Gospel among all peoples.
Service—To demonstrate the love of Christ by meeting the needs of people.

OUR VALUES
Teach and practice an ancient/future faith. 
Build a community of creative and growing people.
Discover, train, and release leaders.
Reach the nations here and abroad.

Name: GLOW Church
Description:
Glow Church is a new Gold Coast church founded and pastored by Joel and Ellen Cave. 

Glow is a vibrant church, currently meeting very centrally in the heart of Varsity Lakes. Please take the time to look around our website and if you can’t find information you’re after, contact us anytime. 

We are passionate about seeing people encounter Christ and do life with people that are committed to standing out. If you are new to the Gold Coast or looking for a Gold Coast church family, we would love to meet you and connect with you. 
Our venue at Varsity Lakes is very family friendly and include adequate parking, excellent child and toddler care facilities, as well as state of the art babies rooms that still allow you to enjoy the service. 
Glow Church also has a vibrant, growing youth and young adults community that have various mid week meet ups and multiple mid week connect groups to suit any age or interest.

The church has its foundations built around Matthew 5:14-16;

“You are the light of the world. A city on a hill that cannot be hidden. Neither do people light a lamp and put it under a bowl. Instead they put it on its stand, and it gives light to everyone in the house. In the same way, let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in Heaven.”

Name: Shavei Israel
Description:
Shavei Israel is a unique non-profit organization dedicated to assisting descendants of Jews and the Lost Tribes of Israel to reclaim their roots. Active worldwide, Shavei Israel is the starting point for anyone with Jewish heritage or ancestry who yearns to return. Communities we work with span the globe and include:

- Spain, Portugal and Latin America: Bnei Anousim (or "Marranos") whose ancestors were compelled to convert during the Spanish Inquisition 500 years ago.

- India: Descendants of the Ten Lost Tribes of Israel such as the Bnei Menashe

- Poland: Hidden Jews from the Holocaust era

- Russia: Subbotnik Jews whose forefathers  embraced Judaism two centuries ago

- China: The Chinese Jews of Kaifeng

- Peru: The Inca Jews of Trujillo

- Italy: The Jews of San Nicandro and the Bnei Anousim of Sicily and southern Italy

Name: Masjid Al-Sultan Abdullah, Presint Merdeka 118

The mosque is situated adjacent to the iconic Stadium Merdeka and features an architectural design inspired by Islamic geometric art, including modern minarets, intricate screens, and Islamic calligraphy. The construction of the mosque embodies a contemporary style, drawing inspiration from traditional domed roofs and elements.

Description:
Babylonian Society, promotion, study and research of the truths and values represented by Babylonian God Sin of the Moon and Goddess Ishtar, Queen of Heaven, by Oracle: Andrew Rogers – Babylonian Destroyer Incarnate. The Babylonian Society is established by Andrew Rogers, Sin and Ishtar to re-establish and establish of the Babylonian religion and its Gods and Goddesses, restoration of temples, buildings and building new temples and buildings and also Babylonian culture and represent all the Babylonian Gods, Goddesses and Spirits to influence the modern world and its people.

Through the Babylonian Society, Andrew Rogers aims to spread knowledge about the Babylonian religion and highlight the importance of understanding the values and truths represented by their deities. The society promotes the study and research of the Babylonian God Sin of the Moon and Goddess Ishtar, Queen of Heaven, who have been revered since ancient times.

As the founder of the Babylonian Society, Andrew Rogers believes in the power of religion and culture to bring people together and create a sense of belongingness. Finally, the Oracle: Andrew Rogers – Babylonian Destroyer Incarnate is the driving force behind the Babylonian Society. His deep understanding and knowledge about the Babylonian religion and its deities have helped to guide the society towards a brighter future. With his leadership, the Babylonian Society seeks to revive the ancient wisdom of Babylon and share it with the world.

Introducing Leading your Church into Growth - we're a Christian organisation who equip church leaders and churches to grow.

For over 30 years we have been serving the local church across the country with a vision to encourage and equip churches to grow in numbers, spiritual depth and in service to their local communities. We run residential conferences, provide training days and resources as well as supporting dioceses in developing their own growth programmes.  We help all kinds of churches, Catholic or Charismatic, Evangelical or Liberal, Rural or Urban, Big or Small.

Name: Grace Church in Indiana
Description:
We make disciples of Jesus and launch them into the mission of God. 

We believe in repairing the Six Broken Places of the World: 
1. Separation
2. Pain
3. Isolation
4. Hatred
5. Decay 
6. Injustice

Name: Society of the Little Flower
Description:
The mission of the Society of the Little Flower is to promote devotion to Saint Therese of the Child Jesus, the Carmelite Nun and Doctor of the Church. Through prayers and donations, friends of St. Therese enable Carmelites to continue her "Shower of Roses" in their ministries and in the education of seminarians.

St. Therese of Lisieux dedicated her life as a Carmelite Sister to pray for good priests - and she wanted to go to the ends of the earth "to make God known and loved."

The Society of the Little Flower was started in Chicago, in 1923 to fulfill her mission - to educate and support the life and missions of the Carmelites throughout the world.

Eventually, St. Clara Church on Woodlawn Avenue in Chicago became the National Shrine of St. Therese. It was just one of the places where the amazing "popular canonization" of St. Therese took place.

Over eighty years later, it has become the largest organization in the world promoting devotion to St. Therese and teaching her "little way of spiritual childhood." The message of St. Therese's life is timeless. She is a powerful messenger of God's love to the modern world.

Name: Second Presbyterian Church, Indianapolis
Description: A welcoming community, where Jesus Christ transforms lives. Second was originally on the circle downtown, moved to Vermont and Pennsylvania, and then moved to its current location in 1959.

Name: Diocese Of Gaylord
Description:
The Diocese of Gaylord is one of seven Roman Catholic Dioceses in the state of Michigan. It was established on July 20, 1971 by his Holiness Pope Paul VI.  

The 11,171 square miles of the diocese is comprised of territory which had previously been a part of the Saginaw and Grand Rapids dioceses. The area includes the 21 most northern counties of Michigan's lower peninsula, which are mostly rural in nature. Total population of the area exceeds 506,000, of which nearly 54,000 are Catholics.

Within its boundaries there are 75 parishes, 18 Catholic schools and many closely related institutions. All of our clergy, religious sisters and brothers, and laity have been called through Baptism to be disciples and to reflect the message of the Gospel.

We welcome your visit to the Diocese of Gaylord through our website, but especially in person, and we stand ready to minister to your needs as best we can.

Name: The Octet Collaborative at MIT
Description: The Octet Collaborative is a community of students, faculty, and staff at MIT, dedicated to human flourishing, formed by the historic Christian faith.

Name: American Conference of Cantors
Description:
The ACC, through its support for and cultivation of excellence among cantors, strengthens Reform Jewish life in North America. ACC cantors are equipped to be attentive to the joys and challenges that members within a congregation face over the course of their lives, using both their unique calling to music and prayer and their shared responsibilities for offering spiritual leadership to congregations. ACC members also can help lead their congregations and by extension, the Reform Jewish movement in North America, to a bright future.

The ACC maintains rigorous standards for ordination/certification, offers deep support for the professional needs of cantors, advocates with passion for the evolving role of the cantorial vocation, and cultivates ever-increasing professional excellence among its members.

The ACC as a professional benefits organization is strongly committed to its members, the Reform movement and the movement’s affiliated organizations. To its members it pledges advocacy, professional support, camaraderie and training. To the movement it pledges support and participation in the movement’s efforts to repair the world and to the movement’s affiliated organizations, it pledges cooperation and partnership.
 
The cantorial vocation is fundamentally a sacred calling, and the ACC’s work has a sacred quality to it. The ACC is more than a professional benefits organization or a labor union. It is an organization that, through its members, advocates, designs, facilitates and hosts sacred time and space within Jewish life.
 
The ACC is equipped to lead in uncertain times, both the movement and the congregations it serves. 
 
The ACC and its members help bring beauty into the world, through music, prayer, and the pastoral gift of being present to members in life’s joyful and sad moments. 
 
The ACC takes bold steps to meet today’s challenges and ensure a bright future for cantors, congregations, and the Reform movement in North America.

Name: PORTICO Community Church
Description: PORTICO is a multi-cultural, multi-generational church community located in the heart of Streetsville in Mississauga, ON. Our geographic location and broad demographic representation uniquely positions us to be a church community that extends a warm and sincere welcome to people that are new to our community, new to their journey of faith or simply looking for a church to call home.

Name: Oshwal Association of the UK
Description: Oshwal Association of the UK (OAUK) is the largest Jain organisation in the United Kingdom It was established in 1967 and registered as a charitable organisation in 1974 under Charity No. 267037.

Name: Ascension Lutheran Church, School and Preschool, Thousand Oaks
Description: "To provide opportunities for all people to become devoted followers of Christ" -- that is our mission statement and it applies to everything we do.  We are an ELCA congregation in beautiful Thousand Oaks, California, established in 1948, with our Ascension Lutheran School that opened in 1963, and our Ascension Lutheran Early Childhood Center soon after. Our school serves students from kindergarten through 8th Grade and is dedicated to nurturing each student, providing academic excellence and creating bold, compassionate leaders who inspire and serve others in their walk with Jesus Christ.  ALECC  serves preschoolers in a happy and caring environment.  Ascension has infant care as well.  We are a church hearty in fellowship, active in service, family friendly and steeped in the Gospel of Jesus Christ.  We offer worship services Saturday evenings at 6:00 p.m. (country), and Sunday mornings at 8:00, 9:30 (traditional) and 11:00 (contemporary) plus Bible Studies, Grief Share, a food pantry open Fridays from 10:00 a.m. until 2:00 p.m. and much more.  You're invited to check out our website, our Facebook page and, most definitely, to come and visit.  We'd love to meet you!

Name: Mytodayshoroscope.com
Description: At My Today Horoscope, we’re passionate about connecting you with the wisdom of the stars. Our mission is to provide accurate, insightful, and personalized horoscopes that empower you to navigate life’s journey with confidence. Whether you’re seeking guidance on love, career, or personal growth, our team of expert astrologers and cosmic enthusiasts crafts daily, weekly, and monthly forecasts tailored to your zodiac sign. With a blend of ancient astrology and modern clarity, we aim to make the universe’s messages accessible and meaningful for everyone. Join us to explore the cosmos, uncover your path, and embrace the magic of the stars!

Name: Jesus People
Description: We are a church family of 100+ people living together in an intentional community, sharing a 10-story building in the Uptown neighborhood of Chicago.

Name: Christ Church Greenwich CT
Description:
Christ Church is a lively community of faith composed of people with diverse backgrounds, circumstances and spiritual journeys. We are bound together by God's love for all people everywhere and united in the common mission to seek and serve God in all persons.

We fulfill this work through the dedicated ministries of over 300 volunteers annually, who serve on more than 40 commissions, committees, guilds and task forces. Our Christ Church Preschool is a regional leader in early education.

We seek to serve God in all people through inspiration from the Bible, worship, community outreach, music, and art in our beautiful sacred home.

Name: Master's Commission Bible Institute
Description:
The Master's Commission Bible Institute is a Spirit Filled, Evangelical School of Ministry preparing individuals for a lifestyle of effective Christian service.

Designed for the busy, working adult, MCBI offers Accredited Ministry Degrees for those who desire to work in the field of Christian Ministry.

Name: Anglican Church in Aotearoa, New Zealand and Polynesia
Description: Anglican Church in Aotearoa, New Zealand and Polynesia

Name: Adoration Ultra
Description:
Adoration Ultra was formed out of genuine love for The Eucharist. Most Christians do not receive The Eucharist or even know what it is. Early church father, Saint Ignatius of Antioch said that if someone didn't celebrate Christ's true presence in The Eucharist then they are not real Christians.

That is why we are starting a MOVEment using the gift of running to celebrate and confront the world with the gift of The Eucharist. We call it "Adoration Ultra".

Adoration Ultra begins in mass where we receive The Eucharist. Following mass, we spend 30 minutes in Eucharistic Adoration. Then, we run to the next parish and spend 30 minutes in Eucharistic Adoration there and so on until a full Ultra Marathon has been completed. The entire time we run with a 3 foot by 5 foot flag that says "Eat My Flesh" on one side and "Drink My Blood" on the other just as Christ commanded us. We offer the suffering we experience to God's glory and carry prayers with us the entire way.

If you would like to use your gift of running to glorify God join our community and sign up for the next Adoration Ultra or simply offer up your next run to someone on our prayer wall.

God Bless - Jimmy Coleman

Name: Jews for Judaism
Description: Jews for Judaism is an international organization that provides a wide variety of counseling services, educational materials and programs that enable Jews of all ages and denominations to rediscover and strengthen their Jewish identities.  Founded in 1985, Jews for Judaism was created as a response to religious coercion targeting Jews for conversion.  Jews for Judaism’s unique programs have provided hundreds-of-thousands of people with tools to respond to religious harassment and have lead them to discover the spiritual richness of Judaism.

Name: Trinity School of Texas
Description: Trinity School of Texas successfully prepares students for college and beyond in a joyful, spiritual environment. Our graduates will: attain academic excellence, embrace diversity, demonstrate intellectual curiosity, appreciate the arts, value physical well-being, serve their community, and exemplify Christian living.

Name: University of Toronto Scarborough Campus Catholic Chaplaincy
Description: We are a Catholic community of university students at UTSC, led by the Holy Spirit to live out God’s plan in our lives. Our mission is to engage, strengthen, and equip students and faculty, both active and inactive in their faith, to deepen their relationship with Jesus Christ.

Name: SYMBIS Pre-Marital Coach
Description: We are Uniting the Local churches of the First Coast...   God is glorified and the world knows He sent His Son and loves them.

Name: Burning Hearts Disciples
Description:
Burning Hearts Disciples is a 501c3 non-profit apostolate formed to further the Catholic Church's call to form disciples through the New Evangelization.

Our Mission

    We equip, train, and support Catholics to live out the New Evangelization through the art of accompaniment.

Whether you are looking to grow your own faith, more effectively share your faith with others, nurture the faith of your family, or create a culture of intentional discipleship at your parish, we can help you.

We meet you where you are on your journey, Help you plan for the next leg, and Walk with you down the road.

Name: Harvester Christian Church
Description: Harvester Christian Church is a non-denominational, independent Christian church located in the greater St. Louis area.  Our mission is to lead people to find and follow Jesus.  Our vision is to multiply disciples in relational environments.  We do this by helping people to: explore the faith, embrace community, engage in service, and empower disciples.  We currently have two locations:  St Charles, MO and Troy, MO.  Average combined weekend attendance is just under 3,000.

Name: Soldiers for Faith
Description:
Our Mission: We are a ministry that calls the sinner to salvation in Jesus Christ and charges the believer to stand courageously for their faith.

Our Vision: To be a global force for God’s glory.

Soldiers for Faith is a registered non-profit with 501c3 status.

Name: Irresistible Church Network
Description: There should be a church that unchurched people love in every community.

Name: Grace Baptist Church
Description: Grace Baptist Church is an independent Baptist Church in Springfield, Oregon.

Name: Grow Church
Description: We're a non-denominational church in SWFL. We exist to see people experience life transformation through a vibrant relationship with Jesus. One Church, three locations.

Name: Zion Church Quito
Description: Formar discípulos y lideres que manifiesten el Reino de Dios para transformar la tierra a través del amor de Cristo, la verdad de la Palabra y el poder del Espíritu Santo.

Name: Koinonia Christian Fellowship
Description: Steve and Beth Fleming, our senior pastors, have served Koinonia since founding it in 1984. The church grew as they began to preach the Word and share the vision that God had put in their hearts. Over the years, their faithfulness has brought constant and steady growth to Koinonia as they continue in their passion for God and compassion for people.

Name: Wave Leadership College
Description: Wave Leadership College is a dynamic, accredited, academic institution founded upon the belief that all Christians should develop their calling through education and experience. Our college combines practical leadership and ministry training with rigorous academic instruction, in an effort to prepare our graduates for life and leadership.

Name: Anglican Diocese of Adelaide
Description:
We are thousands of faithful Christians in 75 worship centres across 59 parishes and twelve Anglican Schools and AnglicareSA providing support services to the community. 
We are St Barnabas Theological College providing tertiary theological education as well as a community of learning for the whole people of God. 
We are Anglican Funds Management providing transactional financial services and investment services to Christian organisations across the country.

Name: Grace CMA Church
Description: Grace is a large church located in Middleburg Heights, Ohio. Grace belongs to The Christian & Missionary Alliance (C&MA), an association of over 18,000 churches around the world. The C&MA is a global alliance of evangelical believers, joined together in local churches, committed to fulfilling the Great Commission given by our Lord Jesus Christ in Matthew 28:19-20.

Name: Mother Cabrini Shrine
Description: Mother Cabrini Shrine is a religious institutions company based out of 20189 Cabrini Blvd, Golden, Colorado, United States.

Name: Holy Name of Jesus Catholic Community
Description: Holy Name of Jesus is an active, Christ-centered parish located in Wayzata, Minnesota. With a strong focus on hospitality, good liturgy, education and outreach, our community is one where we hope you feel welcome and a part of our mission.

Name: Eleventh Element Ministries
Description: Eleventh Element exists to combine and elevate the importance of physical and spiritual health by providing a pastoral presence to the fitness community. Our team of personal trainers partner with local gyms to provide free fitness classes to the local community and deliver an inspirational and encouraging message of spiritual hope from the Bible.

Name: Katholieke Vereniging voor Oecumene
Description: Bevlogen en enthousiast bevorderen we de eenheid van Christus’ kerk. Zo versterken we binnen de Rooms-katholieke kerk de kennis van en liefde voor andere christenen en onderhouden we het contact met andere kerken. Ook bevorderen we de relatie tussen Latijnse christenen en de Oosters-katholieke kerken, de veelkleurigheid van de Rooms-katholieke kerk vierend.

Name: Congregation Agudath Israel
Description:
Founded in 1920 as the Jewish League of Caldwell, CAI began its humble existence with approximately 30 families who recognized the need for a Jewish spiritual presence in the Caldwells. Among the founders were Harry Goodwin, Joseph Salper, Harry Krill, Jacob Lasser, Isaac Levy, William Stark and Joseph Bloom. 

We provide a wide variety of religious, educational, cultural, social and activist venues for Jewish living, led by an exceptional professional staff, an engaged lay leadership and an open and growing team of volunteers. We seek to enable our diverse and multi-generational membership to experience Judaism in ways that have personal meaning, promoting Jewish values as they move through the Jewish life cycle. The CAI community strives to assist our members in participating in the activities that best meet their personal interests and needs, and thereby ascending the Jewish “ladder of commitment” at their own pace. Our focus is to create an environment in which our members consider Congregation Agudath Israel to be “a second home.” We invite you to be part of our synagogue family!

Name: Holy Cross Lutheran School
Description: Holy Cross Lutheran School provides a quality faith-based education in a warm and nurturing environment. We passionately serve students from two years of age, thru 8th grade.

Name: Interfaith Atlanta
Description:
In 1989, the seeds of what is known today as Interfaith Atlanta were planted when 
Governor Joe Frank appointed a Human Relations Commission, recognizing the 
need for an interfaith organization in Atlanta. By 1992, the Interfaith Coalition of Metro Atlanta had formed, bringing together 16 clergy from diverse faiths to launch initiatives like television programming with Atlanta Interfaith Broadcasters.

The pivotal moment came on September 11, 2002, with a memorial service at The 
Temple. This interfaith service, which included 100 clergy sharing scripture from seven religions and a choir of 100 from various faith traditions, underscored the need for an official organization. Consequently, in 2002, 30 religious and community leaders convened at Calloway Gardens, led by Imam Plemon El-Amin, Rev. Joanna Adams, and Rabbi Alvin Sugarman, deciding that Atlanta needed an interfaith organization to commemorate the 9/11 tragedy and promote unity.

In 2003, FAMA (Faith Alliance of Metro Atlanta) officially became a 501(c) nonprofit organization. A year later, we partnered with the Interfaith Community Initiatives’ World Pilgrims program to increase empathy and understanding, reduce conflict, and create opportunities for cooperative action.

By 2013, ten years into our nonprofit journey, FAMA had grown to include over 60 faith groups and numerous friends and partners, all dedicated to fostering deeper and more meaningful human relations. This growth culminated in 2021 when FAMA became Interfaith Atlanta, reflecting our broader mission and vision for a unified Atlanta.

From our humble beginnings to our current status as a thriving interfaith organization, Interfaith Atlanta continues to build bridges, promote understanding, and work towards a more connected and compassionate community.

Name: Canons Regular of St. John Cantius
Description:
The priests and brothers of the Canons Regular of St. John Cantius in the Archdiocese of Chicago serve in parishes and help many to rediscover a profound sense of the Sacred through solemn liturgies, devotions, sacred art and music, as well as instruction in the heritage of the Church, catechetics and Catholic culture.

—were founded in 1998 by Fr. C. Frank Phillips, C.R., with the approval of Francis Cardinal George, O.M.I., and the approval of the Congregation of the Resurrection

—have members from across the United States and Canada.

—practice a sacramental and liturgical apostolate within the context of parish ministry.

—offer the liturgy of the Roman Rite in both the Ordinary and Extraordinary Forms.

—preserve and foster the devotional, musical, catechetical, and artistic traditions of the Catholic Church.

—live in community under the vows of poverty, chastity, and obedience, following the rule of St. Augustine.

Name: Diocese of Saint Cloud
Description:
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Saint Cloud is the local Catholic Church in Central Minnesota, a miniature of the Universal Church, and full expression of Roman Catholic Christianity in our given area. While serving in an administrative sense, the authentic Catholic understanding of a diocese is pastoral. It is all about the people who comprise the Catholic Church in a particular geographic area.

The Diocese of Saint Cloud encompasses 12,251 square miles in 16 central Minnesota counties, with an estimated total population of 555,400. The diocese stretches more than 175 miles from east to west.

Men and women of 16 different religious communities serve the diocese in its mission.

Catholic education is widely available throughout the diocese for all age groups, with elementary schools, middle schools, high schools, St. John's University, The College of St. Benedict, and St. John's School of Theology.

Catholic Charities of the Diocese of Saint Cloud provides a variety of social services throughout central Minnesota. The diocese also contains Catholic-sponsored hospitals, nursing homes and assisted living residences.

Bishop John F. Kinney was appointed the ninth bishop of the Diocese of Saint Cloud May 9, 1995. He was formally installed July 6, 1995.

Name: Southeast Christian Church in Denver
Description: At Southeast, you can start exploring your faith, begin your relationship with Jesus or start investing in relationships with others. It doesn’t stop there; you can also grow in your relationship with Jesus and others. Children and adults, college-aged and seniors, singles, couples and families: there is a place for you here. We encourage you to discover why so many people call Southeast Christian Church their home.

Name: School of Islamic Thought (SKIL)
Description: School of Islamic Thought (SKIL) is an organic platform that promotes critical discourse and scholarship on Islam and social sciences. It is a not-for-profit institute that aims for the democratisation of access to knowledge. The institute was established in 2014 in Centre for Foundational Studies of International Islamic University Malaysia, Petaling Jaya, Malaysia.

Name: Täby församling
Description:
Täby församling, som är en del av Svenska kyrkan, har ett rikt gudstjänstliv i församlingens fem kyrkor och många Täbybor väljer att döpa sina barn, gifta sig och ha begravningsgudstjänster för sina anhöriga här. Ett stort antal ungdomar deltar varje år i församlingens konfirmationsläger och här finns en uppskattad verksamhet för barn och familj samt en diakoniavdelning med kyrkans sociala arbete i centrum. Täby kommun har drygt 70 400 invånare och 42 300 av dessa är medlemmar i Täby församling, som därmed kan räkna sig som Sveriges största. Församlingens huvudsakliga arbetsplats finns i Tibble kyrka, granne med Täby centrum.

Att jobba i Täby församling

I Täby församling arbetar vi tillsammans mot vår vision – ” En kyrka som människor har en positiv relation till och känner glädje över att tillhöra”. 
Täby församling vill 
ge rum för möten med Gud.
ge möjlighet till stöd, eftertanke, engagemang och tro.
vara en närvarande och öppen kyrka buren av tillit, livsmod och hopp.

Vi som arbetar här – ett hundratal personer – har alla en viktig funktion att fylla. Präster, musiker och vaktmästare som möter människor i samband med dop, vigsel och begravning. Lokalvårdare som tar hand om våra fem kyrkor. Administrativ personal som ser till att ekonomin fungerar smidigt och kommunikatörer som ökar kännedomen om församlingens verksamhet. Församlingspedagoger och -assistenter som arbetar med att se till att barn och ungdomar får en bra start i livet.  Och på begravningsplatserna sker dagligdags ett omsorgsfullt arbete med att vårda och ta hand om gravar och grönytor.

Församlingens främste företrädare är kyrkoherde Michael Öjermo.

Lediga jobb i Täby församling: https://www.svenskakyrkan.se/taby/jobba-i-taby-forsamling

Name: Saint John School, Wellesley
Description: A Catholic school for students in PreSchool through Grade 6.

Name: Solitude for CEOs
Description:
Prayer. Scripture. Solitude. Business.

These are not words that are used together often. Not because they don't belong together, but because we don't know how to do it.

The good news is that God knows how.

The Lord only requires that we show up and give Him whatever is in our heart today. But that doesn't mean that it's easy.

Learn more about how you can spend minutes day to build a habit of solitude with God to make your whole business come alive.

We share articles, video, interviews and tools to help you get your CEO brain into more silence and solitude with Jesus.

Name: S2L Recovery
Description: Not only is S2L Recovery a Clinical and Medical program we also are proud of our Joint Commission Accreditation. We are a Christian-based addiction recovery residential care facility for men ages 18yrs-65yrs old. Our campus is located in the beautiful hills of Middle Tennessee on top of Short Mountain. S2L Recovery is a 501c3 non-profit and a “come as you are” type program.  Our hope is you find peace and rest while you go through a journey of understanding what God says about you.  That you’re not damaged goods but actually a mighty man of valor and that you were wonderfully made with deep respect.  Here is the incredible hope we’ve found in God’s Word–you DO NOT have to be an addict or alcoholic the rest of your life.

Name: The Center for Progressive Renewal
Description:
The mission of The Center for Progressive Renewal is to renew Progressive Christianity by training new entrepreneurial leaders, supporting the birth of new liberal/progressive congregations, and by renewing and strengthening existing progressive churches.

The name Progressive Renewal is the articulation of a vision that our organization exists to service the progressive church in a systematic/progressive way. We understand Progressive Christianity as a faith that believes God’s family includes all people. God’s people are responsible for caring for the environment, the poor, sick and vulnerable; that education, health care and civil liberties are vital to abundant life and therefore the desire of God for all people; and that truth is found more often in honest grappling with the questions than in absolute hierarchical pronouncement of the answers. We further believe that this is the type of faith for which millions of Americans hunger.

Our focus is helping church leadership develop the skills needed to effectively start and renew faith communities. The Center for Progressive Renewal, partnered with leaders, judicatures, local churches and church-related organizations is strong.  We are on our way to creating a world of inclusion, equality, compassion and critical imagination.  We are one team with one goal: Renewing the Progressive Church Together.

Name: Ellerslie Mission Society
Description:
Ellerslie Mission Society - Teaching that embraces the Good News of the Gospel and the riches of life in Christ. Led by Eric and Leslie Ludy, Ellerslie is a strong voice advocating Biblical truth and a whole hearted Christian lifestyle. Equipping those with a passion for Jesus Christ through top-selling books, discipleship conferences, compelling Christian videos, and sermons available for download.

Ellerslie Discipleship Training - This training experience is designed to super-charge your spiritual walk, deepen your daily relationship with Jesus Christ, ground you in a Gospel worldview, give you an unshakable passion for God’s Word, and prepare you for a lifestyle of Kingdom work.

Name: Citylight Church
Description: Citylight Church is a multi-congregational church in Philadelphia. We are part of a team of gospel-preaching churches that are committed to seeing lives changed through Jesus Christ. We are not perfect (far from it), but we are a community committed to one another, the gospel, and our city. We would love for you to find a home at Citylight Church.

Name: St. Luke The Evangelist Catholic Church
Bistum Passau
Description:
Das Bistum Passau wurde 739 gegründet und ist eines der ältesten Bistümer Bayerns. Das Bistum beinhaltet 10 Dekanate mit 305 Pfarreien in 86 Pfarrverbänden, welche sich in Teilen von Niederbayern und Oberbayern befinden.

Das Bistum Passau ist mit circa 10.000 Mitarbeiter einer der größten Arbeitgeber in Bayern und beinhaltet über 480.000 gläubige Katholiken. Mit 79 Prozent an der Gesamtbevölkerung hat das Bistum den höchsten Katholikenanteil aller deutschen Bistümer.

Bekannt ist das Bistum vor allem für den Dom St. Stefan, den Wallfahrtsort Altötting und dem aus dem Bistum stammenden emeritierten Papst Benedikt XVI.

Name: Franciscan Foundation for the Holy Land
Description: The Franciscan Foundation for the Holy Land is a worldwide organization founded in 1994 under the auspices of the Franciscan Custody of the Holy Land. The Foundation was created to safeguard the basic human rights and continued presence of the Christian Palestinian minority living in the Holy Land by providing academic scholarships, subsidized housing, and employment opportunities.

Name: GKV Zoetermeer (Reformed Church liberated)
Description:
De Gereformeerde kerk 'Het Kompas' bestaat sinds 1969 in Zoetermeer. Het Kompas heeft op dit moment ca. 440 leden. Daarnaast heeft de kerk een liefdevolle zusterkerkrelatie met de Christelijk Gereformeerde Kerk en de Nederlands Gereformeerde Kerk in Zoetermeer.

Samen vormen we een ‘veelkleurig’ geheel. We willen een uitnodigende gemeente van Jezus Christus zijn, op een bijbelgetrouwe en eigentijdse manier. We zien om naar elkaar en zijn present in de lokale samenleving. Gods liefde voor mensen is daarbij ons uitgangspunt.
 
Iedere zondag houden we twee kerkdiensten, om 09.30 uur en om 16.30 uur, waarvan de meesten in ons kerkgebouw aan het Piet Heinplein 13 in Zoetermeer. De middagdiensten zijn gecombineerd met de samenwerkingsgemeente 'De Lichtzijde' (NGK/CGK) en in cyclus van 2 maanden worden de diensten in ons kerkgebouw of dat van de Lichtzijde gehouden. Kijk voor de exacte locatie even op onze website. 
Wij nodigen u van harte uit deze diensten bij te wonen. 

Ook nodigen we u graag uit om via deze website met onze gemeente kennis te maken.

Name: Nebraska Lutheran Outdoor Ministries (NLOM)
Description:
At Nebraska Lutheran Outdoor Ministries, in places set apart, we live out faith in ways that show everyone they belong and are unconditionally loved by God. 

NLOM offers significant experiences that: 
-provide a safe, welcoming introduction to the Christian faith
-increase the relevance of faith in one's daily life
-promote community-building

As a part of our obligation to the Church and to the community, as well as in justice to our guests, campers, volunteers and staff, Nebraska Lutheran Outdoor Ministries, Inc., including its Carol Joy Holling and Sullivan Hills camps, is committed to principles that enable opportunities for full participation in its programs and activities. These programs and activities include Christian education, spiritual, psychological, social, personal and professional development. We welcome all people and we do not tolerate behavior that discriminates based upon race, religion, color, creed, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, national origin, age or ancestry. Such discrimination is demeaning, destructive and directly at odds with the Gospel of Christ and our goals of fostering equity, mutual understanding and cooperation.

Name: Trexo
Description:
We build people and organizations to run God's race. 
#restedrunning #overflow #kingdom #disciplemaking

Name: Old Norse Paganism
Description: Here at Old Norse Paganism being Norse isn’t complicated or political; it’s simply falling in love with the Gods, the myths, the culture, the practices, and the traditions of our people. We’re ordinary people with ordinary lives and ordinary problems, coming together for an extraordinary experience in the presence of the Norse Gods. No magic answers or secret formulas. Just pure simple faith and trust in the Gods!

Name: San Francisco Hillel (SF Hillel)
Description:
Our Mission: SF Hillel is here to support all Jewish college students in San Francisco and fortify the future of the Jewish people. We learn about each student’s relationship with Judaism and then help them explore their Jewish identity, build Jewish community and develop them into our future Jewish leaders.

Our Vision: San Francisco Hillel will create thoughtful and meaningful connections for Jewish students with each other, the broader Bay Area Jewish Community, and with Israel, so that each student can develop and strengthen their Jewish identity. In doing so, SF Hillel will be recognized as an integral part of the Bay Area Jewish Community, which will help make San Francisco an attractive destination for Jewish students. We will be financially resilient, ensuring that we can meet the needs of our students for generations to come.

Our Values:
We believe in the inherent worth, value, humanity, and dignity of each person. As Jewish tradition teaches, each of us is created b'tzelem Elohim, in the Divine image. To that end, we are committed to pluralistic Jewish life on campus, a diverse workforce, and the values of inclusivity. We embrace all the identities, experiences, and backgrounds each person brings. We respectfully welcome students, professionals, and community members of all abilities, races, ethnicities, socio-economic backgrounds, gender identities, sexual orientations, observances, and interfaith backgrounds, so that we can work together to contribute to, and experience the full richness of, Jewish life and community.

Name: Cal-Pac Annual Conference of the United Methodist Church
Description: The regional unit of the United Methodist Church covering Southern California, Hawaii, Guam and Saipan.

Name: Federation of Christian Ministries
Description: We are a convention of faith communities and churches, gathering and inspiring Christians and individual ministers. Ministering to God’s people, we serve as equals and partners by providing pastoral and spiritual care, leading worship services, officiating at weddings, baptisms and funerals. We offer spiritual direction, lead retreats, offer healing and interfaith outreach.

Name: Our Lady of Mercy Catholic Church & School
Description:
Welcome to Our Lady of Mercy Catholic Church and School! We have employment opportunities that we regularly share and we would love to visit with you more about these and we invite you to take a look at them here.

Mercy, we like to say is "Our Lady’s Church, the Pearl of Mid-City Baton Rouge." Our church parish is made up of 2 priests, 2 deacons, 25 professional lay ministers caring for 3,000 registered families that represent 9,000 souls! While at our parochial school, we are serving students from 3 years of age until 8th grade, having 100 professional team members, and we are forming nearly 1,000 children in the image and likeness of Jesus Christ.
Since our founding in 1947, the parish has grown to one of the largest Diocesan communities serving a rich and beautifully diverse area in the heart of Louisiana. In addition to our traditional parish family, we enjoy serving unofficially as a Marian shrine and Catholic Center offering regular celebrations of daily Eucharist, Reconciliation and the privilege of Perpetual Adoration of the Most Blessed Sacrament.

We are blessed with as many “friends of Mercy” as there are parishioners. Only after the celebration of the Sacraments of the Church comes our primary ministry, our Catholic School. Unified around the motto of “Prayer, Knowledge and Service” our teachers and our students strive for academic excellence all the while keeping their eyes fixed Heavenward. Our students are not only preparing for their bright futures, but they are transformed into the living Body of Christ now, each day participating in opportunities of service, mercy, and kindness, and liturgies celebrating the Saints and the Life of Christ.

Whether you can join us for daily Mass, a committed Holy Hour in our Adoration Chapel or you are streaming a Mass from afar I invite you to remember Our Lady of Mercy Catholic Church & School in prayer. 

To Jesus through Mary, Our Lady of Mercy,
Rev. Cleo J. Milano
Fifth Pastor of Our Lady of Mercy

Name: Impact Ministry Group
Description:
Often during our walk, as a Christian, we are left to face the business world alone. It does not have to be this way. By Joining "Kingdom Companies" you will get help in order to strengthen your businesses' and increase your resources so that you will have the power, capacity and influence to change the world for Christ. Let's connect.

Vision: Impact Ministry Group seeks to ignite individuals, businessmen and churches with purpose in the planting of New Testament Christian Churches across Canada and Europe.

Mission: The mission of Impact Ministry Group is to reach people throughout Canada and Europe with the Gospel of Jesus Christ by planting reproducing churches in highly unchurched regions. This is a Biblical mission. In obedience to the Great Commission (Matthew 28:18-20) we are seeking to share the Good News with the diverse people groups that call Canada or Europe home. We exist to raise up leaders and resources to seek lost people in unchurched, densely populated communities with the intention of planting a church among them that will reproduce itself to continue to reach others through the birth of even more new churches.

Partnerships: Impact Ministry Group values partnerships in church planting because that enables us to be better stewards of God's resources. Partnerships work well because of the synergism that flows out of several partners working together in harmony. Impact Ministry Group is committed to forging partnerships with individuals, businessmen, churches and other church planting associations to encourage greater participation in, and greater momentum for a dynamic movement of new churches.

Name: Linked in Christ
Description:
Nous partageons une vision commune.

Celle de servir Dieu à travers notre travail.

Dans les affaires, la technologie, les arts, les soins de santé ou tout autre domaine, nous croyons que notre foi peut être une source d'inspiration et de motivation pour accomplir de grandes choses.

Ayons un impact positif et glorifions Dieu à travers nos réalisations.

Name: Abadia de Montserrat
Description: Montserrat es una montaña, un santuario y un monasterio.

Name: Key Ministry
Description:
Key Ministry promotes meaningful connection between churches and families of kids with disabilities for the purpose of making disciples of Jesus Christ.

We serve a unique role in connecting churches with families of children with “hidden disabilities”… mental illness, trauma and developmental disabilities. We embrace our role as leaders among like-minded individuals, organizations and congregations in the movement to welcome and include persons with disabilities and their families in the life of the local church.

Vision

Families of children with disabilities would be represented in the church proportionate to their presence in the general population.

Values

Christ-centeredness. We seek to be driven by the mind and spirit of Jesus Christ as revealed through the Word of God and guided by the Holy Spirit.

We champion the local church. Christ established the local church as his representation and reflection in the world. It is through the church that God takes people with different personalities and gifts, unifies them as a single body, and equips them to care for each other and reach the world.

Family-based ministry. We believe parents bear the primary responsibility for guiding the spiritual development of their children. The role of the local church is to come alongside the family for the journey, providing resources, encouragement, and support.

Ministry that is relational, redemptive, restorative, and inclusive. Everyone has gifts and talents intended for the benefit of the Body of Christ as represented by the local church. The entire church misses out if any Christ-follower is excluded.

Generosity. God’s grace is given freely. Money shouldn’t be an impediment to ministry.

Innovation. To reach families no one else is reaching, churches will need to try new strategies and approaches no one else is trying.

Collaboration. Scripture clearly teaches that no individual or church has all been given all the gifts required to be sufficient.

Name: Associação Paulista Oeste da IASD
Description: A Igreja Adventista do Sétimo Dia crê na diversidade de dons e ministérios utilizados para cumprir com sua missão. Por essa razão, atua em diferentes áreas que realizam projetos, programas e ações estratégicas. Os ministérios, a partir da sede sul-americana adventista chamada Divisão Sul-Americana, são responsáveis pela produção de materiais, documentos oficiais e planejamentos gerais que beneficiam oito países.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Hopewell Baptist Church
Description: Hopewell Baptist Church, Savannah, TN

Name: Symons Valley United Church
Description: Symons Valley United Church is called to be a vibrant and affirming Christian community, sharing God’s love and engaging ALL through dynamic worship, strong family ministry and loving hospitality, in service and outreach to the community.

Name: Ursuline Sisters of Youngstown
Description: We are Catholic nuns who respond together to the most critical needs of God’s people in the greater Mahoning Valley located in Northeastern Ohio and have done so since 1874 – adapting our ministries to meet the needs of the times. We are committed to bringing our spirit, vision and presence to the Valley for generations to come.

Name: First Baptist Duluth
Description: We are a United Community of Faith that Loves, Reaches, and Disciples ALL People For Jesus Christ.

Name: All Shepherds Lutheran Church
Description: All Shepherds Lutheran Church is a member of the ELCA located at 6580 Columbus Pike, Lewis Center, OH

Name: CrossTalk.ai
Description:
We help you connect and engage your audience using Christian AI we've created and deployed globally.

BibleChat.Ai (download free app to ask the Bible questions!)
FaithAssistant.com (demo site for churches, ministries, & 501C3s)
AifortheChurch.Org (free LLM generation)

Name: Lifework Leadership Orlando
Description:
Lifework Leadership was established to provide a diverse cross section of Orlando leaders with training grounded in scripture - helping participants gain a deeper understanding of how to view all of life (and work) through a biblical lens by exploring the life and leadership of Jesus Christ. 

Our mission is to create training and opportunities for leaders to explore and act on principles that are "good for business" as well as personal development. We are committed to equipping leaders because we believe that the quality of leadership in an organization or society makes the difference between success and failure.

Name: Big Kids' Table
Description:
Big Kids’ Table exists to be an informative, loving perspective and to create safe, honest conversations about Kingdom identity, sexual experience and the expression of sexual desire.

We seek to create an online platform for such conversation, striving to become a safe resource for young people and their faith communities. Furthermore, we aim to facilitate tailored consultation and programs for such faith communities that will create powerful, creative and sustainable ministry transformation.

Name: Penboc'h
Description:
Le Centre spirituel jésuite de Penboc’h, situé au cœur du Morbihan s'est spécialisé dans l'accompagnement des dirigeants et des salariés. . 	
			
Vous souhaitez : 									
 Prendre du recul sur une situation ? 
 Vous ressourcer ?							
 Trouver du soutien, échanger et partager votre expérience avec d’autres personnes ? 
 Discerner pour prendre une décision ? 
 Méditer à partir de l'évangile   

Alors, regardez nos propositions sur notre site internet.  
Une session de 2 ou 3 jours correspondra à vos besoins (leadership, prise de décision, orientation professionnelle,  burnout...).

Name: Cornerstone Fellowship Church
Description: Church in Apex, NC working to build a people who love God, one another, and our neighbor by being rooted in sound doctrine, the power of the Holy Spirit, building authentic relationships, and growing spiritually.

Name: The LADO Group
Description: If you wish you could do more for the Latino Muslim community, great news! You can now give directly to The LatinoDawah Fund, administered by The LADO Group. Proceeds will be used towards the education of future Latino Muslim imams and scholars as well as towards the development and growth of Latino Muslim organizations.

Name: The Journey Church - Boca Raton, FL
Description:
The Journey is a casual, contemporary, Christian church in Boca Raton. Join us Sundays at 9:30am or 11:00am at:

The Journey Church
2200 NW Boca Raton Blvd.
Boca Raton, FL 33431
(Between Spanish River Blvd and Glades Rd., beside Maui Spa)
www.BocaJourney.com

Can't make it in-person? Join us for Church Online at www.BocaJourney.TV

** About The Journey Church **

The Journey is a casual, contemporary Christian church where you'll experience casual dress, rockin' music and a practical message that you can apply to your daily life.

In September 2010, The Journey held its first monthly service with 169 people in attendance. The Journey met monthly through February 2011, growing steadily, serving the community and sharing Christ with the people of South Florida along the way. 

On February 13, 2011, The Journey celebrated the start of weekly services at Boca Raton Community High School.  In just the first 8 years of ministry, we saw over 1,000 people come to faith in Christ, and baptized 350 people, while serving thousands through community ministry and outreach. 

On Easter Sunday, April 21, 2019 The Journey celebrated the Grand Opening of our new Ministry and Worship Center.  This new permanent building is allowing our church to expand our mission to "give the people of South Florida the best opportunity to become fully developing followers of Jesus" like never before.   God has blessed our church, not only here in Boca Raton, but at our campuses in New York City as well. And we believe that the best days are still ahead!

At The Journey, you will have a great opportunity to meet new people, have a genuinely fun and meaningful time at church, and grow spiritually in your life.

Name: St. John's Church & School, Denver, CO
Description: St. John's Church & School is an LCMS Lutheran Church, Early Learning Center and K-8 School in Denver, CO. Our mission is "Connecting people to Jesus!"

Name: Mission Chez Nous
Description:
Mission chez nous est un organisme de charité qui cherche à promouvoir la solidarité chrétienne avec les peuples autochtones. Nous avons pour objectif de sensibiliser un large public aux réalités autochtones et de favoriser le rapprochement entre les cultures en contrant les préjugés et en favorisant le dialogue. Nous voulons offrir un soutien, matériel autant que moral, aux communautés autochtones du territoire que nous appelons aujourd’hui le Québec.

Mission chez nous est une œuvre de l’Assemblée des évêques catholiques du Québec fondée en 1993 et un organisme sans but lucratif.

Name: Alive Church
Description: Alive Church is a life-giving church that loves God, loves people, and loves life. Join us at one of our worship experiences in Gainesville, Orlando, and online!

Name: Mitchell Road Presbyterian Church
Description:
Mitchell Road Presbyterian Church, a mission church plant of the former Augusta Street Presbyterian Church in downtown Greenville SC, began meeting together for worship services in May 1969 under the leadership of Dr. Thomas G. Cross, the former pastor of Augusta Street Presbyterian Church. The first worship service, with approximately 90 people in attendance at Northwood Junior High School, began the fulfillment of a vision for reaching the growing Eastside Greenville community.

Over the years, church leadership has placed a strong emphasis on Missions, Evangelism, Church Planting and Christian Education. Mitchell Road continues in it's commitment to Missions by supporting over 30 missions agencies, including over 70 missionaries, in North America and internationally. Locally, the church has actively participated in several church plants in Greenville County during recent years.

Mitchell Road as a member of Calvary Presbytery (PCA), currently has over 1000 communicant members, ministers to people of all ages through a wide variety of ministries. Mitchell Road Christian Academy (K3 - 8th grade) began in the fall of 1973 and now has enrollment of over 400 students. Campus Outreach (Greenville) has ministered among area college campuses since the mid 1990's.

Name: St. James Catholic Church
Description: St. James Catholic Church is a parish of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Omaha in Nebraska, USA.

Name: GBC Strategic Planning Team
Description:
The GBC Strategic Planning Team (SPT), has been helping the GBC explore the ways in which ISKCON needs to grow-up into the vibrant movement Srila Prabhupada wanted it to be, and then developing strategies to support that growth. Our theme? “More devotees, happier devotees”.

The GBC’s strategic planning focuses on a set of broad initiatives that have been developed with specific goals and action points. These concerns or areas of effort fit together like pieces of a puzzle; assembled they form a powerful and comprehensive plan for the future of the Krishna consciousness movement. The current broad categories are:

Strengthening Our Foundations
Building Capacity for Leadership
Expanding Outreach
Devotee Care
Bringing the Plan into the World of Action

Name: Phoebe Int'l Ministries
Description:
Phoebe Int’l Ministries is a faith-driven organization committed to equipping professionals and entrepreneurs with the wisdom, strategies, and mentorship needed to excel in their careers and businesses while honouring God’s purpose. 

Through practical career insights, leadership development, and biblical principles, we help individuals navigate workplace challenges, build meaningful relationships, and integrate faith into their professional lives.

Connect with us to grow, lead, and make a lasting impact in your workplace and industry.

Name: Kirkefondet
Description:
En levende og aktiv kirke er en essentiel del af et levende og aktivt lokalsamfund –sådan har det altid været.

Det er derfor, at Kirkefondet siden 1890 har bygget kirker. I dag bygger vi ikke alene i mursten, vi bygger også med viden og inspiration, så vi sammen med lokale kirker skaber aktive menigheder.

I Kirkefondet arbejder vi på at udvikle det danske kirkeliv. Det gør vi ved at bibringe ny viden og inspiration til alle med både et særligt historisk blik og kendskab til kirkelig fornyelse. Vi tror på et levende kirkeliv og en konstant udvikling af Folkekirken, så den altid vil gøre en forskel for mennesker og være samlingspunkt for vores lokalsamfund.

Kirken vil altid være en grundsten i samfundet, uagtet om det er i byen eller på landet. Når vi udvikler aktive menigheder og kirker, bidrager vi til et rigere trosliv, kulturliv og lokalsamfund. Det er derfor, vi er til –for at sikre en levende udvikling i Folkekirken.

Kirkefondet udfører sine opgaver som:

Iværksætter - ved at investere ressourcer i nye tiltag og eksperimenter og ved at udvikle, bruge og tilbyde redskaber, som kan være grundlag for udvikling i folkekirken

Inspirator – ved at opsøge, samle og formidle viden gennem udgivelse af "Kirken i dag", bøger, inspirationskort mv. og ved afholdelse af kurser, seminarer mv. Desuden sættes viden aktivt i spil gennem konsulentvirksomhed i sogne og provstier.

Katalysator – ved at stå for udviklings- og forandringsprocesser på flere forskellige niveauer i folkekirken

Italesætter – ved at være aktiv i den kirkelige debat. A consultant company - startet in 1890

Name: U.CO.I.I. - Unione delle Comunità Islamiche d'Italia
Description: Questa è la pagina ufficiale dell'U.CO.I.I. - Unione delle Comuità Islamiche d'Italia su linkedin. Seguiteci per tutti gli aggiornamenti o visitate il nostro sito www.ucoii.org ed iscrivetevi alla newsletter per essere sempre aggiornati sulle ultime novità della Comunità.

Name: Vor Frelsers Kirke
Description: Vor Frelsers Kirke is a church, build in the Baroque tradition. The tower of the church is a famous landmark and there is public access to the top and the wonderful view of Copenhagen.

Name: Reformierte Landeskirche Aargau
Description: Die Reformierte Landeskirche Aargau ist eine der drei öffentlich-rechtlich anerkannten Landeskirchen. Sie besteht seit mehr als 200 Jahren und hat in 74 Kirchgemeinden rund 145 000 Mitglieder. Im Kanton Aargau sind Staat und Kirche getrennt. Die Landeskirche erhält keine Beiträge vom Staat und finanziert sich durch die Kirchensteuer, die nur von den eigenen Mitgliedern (nicht von Unternehmen) erhoben wird. Die demokratischen kantonalen Strukturen sind um 1890 entstanden.

Name: C.S.V. Ichthus Eindhoven
Description:
Christelijke Studentenvereniging Ichthus Eindhoven is een groeiende en levendige vereniging. Al jaren is Ichthus uniek in Eindhoven door haar combinatie van christelijke activiteiten met een actief studentenleven. Ichthus is de grootste christelijke studentenvereniging van Eindhoven.

Elke week is er minimaal één activiteit met een religieus karakter voor de gehele vereniging. Daarnaast worden er ook veel andere uiteenlopende activiteiten georganiseerd. Zo organiseert Ichthus Eindhoven open avonden, een studentengala, sportactiviteiten, feesten, borrels, discussieavonden, Alpha-cursussen, en nog veel meer.

De goede banden die Ichthus opgebouwd heeft met christelijke en niet-christelijke verenigingen in Eindhoven en daarbuiten zijn een bron van gezellige en leerzame gemeenschappelijke activiteiten. 

Daarnaast hebben we onze sociëteit Amnis. Een prachtig monumentaal pand uit 1901, gevestigd op Dommelstraat 6 te Eindhoven. De Dommelstraat 6 is gelegen aan de rand van het Centrum, en bevindt zich op 350 meter afstand van Centraal station Eindhoven. De Dommelstraat is een drukbezochte straat met verschillende cafés en restaurantjes. Zo ligt het op een steenworp afstand van poppodium de Effenaar.

Als christelijke studentenvereniging willen we duidelijk zichtbaar zijn in de stad, zodat we ons als christelijke studenten een gezicht kunnen geven in Eindhoven. De Dommelstraat is een centrale, drukke straat en dus een ultieme plaats om ons als Ichthus te huisvesten.

Name: SFU Muslim Students Association
Description:
The Muslim Student Association of Simon Fraser University has been active for many years, and continues to be involved in providing a space for Muslims to pray, learn, meet others and get involved in the community.

The Muslim Students Association (MSA) is a volunteer organization run by Muslim students on campus. The MSA is one of the oldest clubs at SFU, founded during the early 70’s. The main purpose of the MSA is to raise awareness of Islam on campus and to provide related services and activities for both Muslim and non-Muslim students.
Services that the SFU MSA provides include:

    Daily Prayer Room (Musallah)
    Wudu facilities
    Jum’aah Prayers
    Lectures/Halaqas
    Sisters’ Speak
    Quran Classes
    Socials & Potlucks
    Humanitarian Fundraisers
    Ramadan Iftaars
    Themed Workshops
    Guest Lectures
    Muslim Advocacy & Dawah Work
    … and much more!

The MSA is located in the MutilFaith Centre (AQ 3200) at SFU Burnaby Campus.
For general inquiries, please email us at sfumsa@hotmail.com.

Name: Association of Marian Helpers
Description:
The Association of Marian Helpers is a spiritual benefit society that prayerfully and spiritually supports the Congregation of Marians of the Immaculate Conception. It was first founded in the United States in 1925 under the inspiration of Blessed George Matulaitis-Matulewicz, the Renovator of the Congregation. The Association now exists in Poland, Great Britain, Portugal, Ukraine, Lithuania, Czech Republic, Brazil, and North America.

The Association's spiritual home is Eden Hill, the grounds of the Marian Helpers Center and the National Shrine of The Divine Mercy, located in Stockbridge, Massachusetts. Located within the Center is the publishing arm, Marian Press, best known for its publication of the Diary of St. Faustina.

Name: Sacred Story Institute
Description: The Sacred Story Institute brings a new class of Christian resources and dynamic applications of classic Ignatian Spirituality through research in neuroscience, medicine, and psychological theory. Our resources for the individual, parish community, youth, and the imprisoned are designed to help ignite the faith in your heart, in your family, in your parish, and/or with your students.

Name: Areopagos Danmark
Description:
Our purpose is to contribute to more people experiencing peace, meaning, and coherence in life.

Have you ever longed for something without knowing exactly what?

We believe all people carry shared longings that unite us across cultures, beliefs, and worldviews. In a world marked by restlessness, polarisation, and turmoil, hope still shines.

What do we do? 
We seek to unite that which is often separated: body, soul, and spirit; contemplation and action; science and faith. Drawing from over 100 years of experience in both East and West, we experiment with new practices of faith and spirituality.

Our contribution is to create meeting places and share skills that foster more dialogue and spiritual practice in the world. Our goal is not to change or convince another, but to create spaces where change itself can occur. We give language and space for spiritual experiences and longings. We do this through large and small events, partnerships, podcasts, and articles.

We are Areopagos, and you are welcome on the journey. 
Let us together seek beauty, truth, and goodness.

Name: ISKCON Bhagawata Mahavidyalaya
Description: Hare Krsna Hare Krsna Krsna Krsna Hare Hare | Hare Ram Hare Ram Ram Ram Hare Hare

Name: CityRise
Description:
CityRise is a network of churches, ministries, non-profits, and global partners seeking to share the gospel of Jesus Christ in new and creative ways. We gather for worship in locations around Houston weekly, provide opportunities to serve our city in a variety of ways, and send people around the world to partner with missionaries as they seek to share the gospel.

Our locations include English, Spanish, and Chinese services located at West U Baptist, CityRise Bellaire, and CityRise Missouri City.

Name: Associação Brasileira da Igreja de Jesus Cristo Santos Últimos Dias
The Cove Church
Description:
The Cove is a Christian church where the message of Jesus is presented in a relaxed, casual setting with music you can relate to and talks that are simple and relevant to your everyday life. Our services are easy to understand, even if you've never been to church.
 
With multiple locations to choose from each week, we hope you’ll find a service that fits your schedule. Simultaneous Spanish interpretation is available at all Sunday services.

Name: Deer Park Monastery
Description:
Established By Zen Master Thich Nhat Hanh And Practicing In The Plum Village Tradition. Deer Park Monastery is a resident monastery with monks, nuns, and lay people living and practicing together. 

Wherever you come from, however you look or identify, whomever you love, we openly and warmly welcome the diversity of your experience to this place of refuge and healing.

Name: Lifesong Church
Description: Lifesong Church is based in Sutton, MA and is affiliated with ARC, the Association of Related Churches.

Name: Lenexa Baptist Church
Description: REACH.TEACH.UNLEASH Founded in 1988, Lenexa Baptist Church has grown from a local congregation meeting in a school to a multi-site body of believers passionate about reaching Kansas City with the Gospel. Lenexa Baptist Church is located at 15320 W 87th Street Pkwy in Lenexa, Kansas, United States.

Name: BridgePoint Church FL
Description:
BridgePoint Church exists to help people, all people, get closer to God. We do this by
Believing in Jesus
Living his teachings
and becoming his people.

We believe that we get closer to God through following the life and teachings of Jesus. Through Him, we are able to be all that God desires for us to be.

BridgePoint is a growing and dynamic multisite church with a mission and vision to reach our city and county.

Name: Sherwood Oaks Christian Church
Description:
Sherwood Oaks is a church that is constantly growing and changing, but stays rooted in the Biblical principles that we first were founded upon.  Sherwood Oaks is a church that believes that the Bible is Absolute Truth and infallible.  We believe that God sent His only son, Jesus, to live a perfect life and then die on a cross to save us for eternity. 
 
We believe that God desires our whole lives to be firmly rooted in Him and that He wants us to share our message with the world.  We are a church that chooses to be positive, encouraging and hopeful.  We sayYes2Love when others might say no. 
 
Sherwood Oaks is a place where you are welcome and we are excited to meet you.  We are a church that is for everyone –regardless of faith background, financial status, or any other worldly designation.  We are a church full of people just like you – unsure, complicated, excited, passionate, loving, graceful, dependent and human.  We know that everyone comes to church with different expectations and different experiences.  We choose to say Yes2Love instead of judging and we hope you choose to do the same.

Name: The Crossing Christian Church
Description: The Crossing is non-denominational Christian Church in southwest Las Vegas. Since we began in 2000, our mission has been “helping people discover Jesus and the journey.” We carry that mission out through a wide range of ministries. Our Sunday services include a Bible-based, thought provoking message that is relevant to your life, along with dynamic music, thematic videos, and other creative elements. We have children’s and student ministries with age-appropriate teaching and activities for birth through college. Our small groups and care ministries help everyone get connected, because we believe that life change happens best in relationships. We have outreach partnerships in five states and seventeen countries in order to promote unity and impact in our community and around the world.

Name: Zentrum Johannes Paul II.
Description: Das Zentrum Johannes Paul II. ist eine katholische Gemeinde im Herzen Wiens. Es ist ein Ort des Austauschs, der Begegnung, des gemeinsamen Gebets und der Glaubensvertiefung. Das Zentrum will fernstehende Menschen für den Glauben an Christus begeistern, sie zu missionarischer Jüngerschaft befähigen und anderen Gemeinden helfen, dasselbe zu tun.

Name: Al Wasilah Foundation
Description:
Welkom bij Al Wasilah, 

De stichting die staat voor verbinding!

Als stichting zijn wij toegewijd aan het dienen van onze gemeenschappen en het realiseren van maatschappelijke doelen. Door middel van inzamelingsacties streven wij naar het faciliteren van basisbehoeften (denk aan voedselpakketten, kleding en onderdak), culturele evenementen en het oprichten van gebeds- en onderwijsinstellingen. Bij Al Wasilah willen we graag een persoonlijke verbinding maken met de mensen die we dienen, en hen de steun en middelen bieden die ze nodig hebben om te groeien. Als stichting organiseren wij activiteiten vanuit een islamitisch perspectief, om de maatschappij kennis te laten maken met een van de belangrijke pijlers van ons geloof: Sadaqah, ofwel vrijwillige liefdadigheid. Deze activiteiten zijn bedoeld om mensen te inspireren om actief bij te dragen aan het welzijn van anderen en om de waarden van vrijwillige liefdadigheid te omarmen. Door middel van deze activiteiten willen wij een positieve impact hebben op onze gemeenschappen en de wereld om ons heen.

Wij geloven dat een oproep tot het goede begint met goed gedrag. Daarom streven wij ernaar de verbinding te zijn voor al het goede in het leven. Bij ons staat het geloof centraal dat het goede voor iedereen toegankelijk moet zijn en dat geen enkele persoon het recht heeft om anderen te vernederen of hun menselijke waardigheid te ontnemen. Wij streven ernaar om deze waarden te beschermen en te handhaven voor alle mensen. Door middel van vrijwillige liefdadigheid willen we samen met donateurs werken aan het creëren van een betere wereld, waarin mensen met elkaar verbonden zijn en een beter bestaan kunnen opbouwen.

Name: SRF-Yogananda
Description: “ you realize that all along there was something tremendous within you, and you did not know it. ”

Name: JESUS CHRIST HERITAGE AND LEGACY INTERNATIONAL MINISTRIES (JCHLIM)
Description: Jesus Christ Heritage and Legacy International Ministries (JCHLIM) is a living church of Jesus Christ where the true undiluted gospel of Jesus Christ is preached without fear or favor. If you are weary, troubled and heartbroken with the cares of this world this is your perfect home where all the weak, failures and hopeless cast their burdens onto Jesus Christ the author and finisher of our faith who in turn enables us.

Name: Christar USA
Description:
Christar seeks to glorify God by establishing reproducing fellowships of believers among Buddhists, Hindus, Muslims, refugees and the Deaf around the globe. Drawing from over 115 years of establishing churches among the least-reached, we connect members of Christ’s Body to fulfil the Great Commission among people who don’t have access to the gospel. 
Our workers use their gifts, vocations, skills and experience to cultivate Christ-honoring transformation in communities where the Church doesn’t yet exist. Through traditional cross-cultural service, marketplace ministry and strategic partnerships, we seek innovative ways to build the Body of Christ among the least-reached and create lasting impact. Explore opportunities to serve at christar.org/participate

Name: Resonate Church
Description:
OUR PURPOSE
Resonate Church exists to connect the Gospel to people, people to community, and community to mission.

OUR VISION
Our vision is to become an urgent, multiplying, collegiate church planting movement planting 21 churches by the year 2021. To read more about what God is doing through Resonate to start this movement, read more about 21x21.

OUR JOURNEY
From 6 people and 1 site to over 1,000 people in 3 states on 11 campuses, this is a story only God can write. We have released a series of documentary videos that tell the story of what God has done in our church.

Name: Legacy Christian Church
Description:
Legacy Christian Church is a multi-campus church guided by a singular vision: to become a biblical community, living the Word.

A BIBLICAL COMMUNITY
With an emphasis on transformational Bible teaching, the intimate sharing of life together in covenant groups, and a fully integrated family ministry, we strive to live and pass on the legacy of our faith in Christ. We believe all biblical communities should share the values expressed in Acts 2:42-47.

LIVING THE WORD
Scripture is God’s voice to us. It is authoritative and relevant to our everyday lives, and it has the power to be an incredible catalyst. When we hear the Word, see it modeled for us, and live it, our lives are forever changed, and God is glorified. Living the Word starts with pursuing the Lord’s great commandment (Matthew 22:37-40) and the Lord’s great commission (Matthew 28:18-20).

Name: Temple Beth Tikvah
